Genesis6:15 Markabeza keexxashe iza adussateththi 300 wadha, gomppay 50 wadha, pude dhoqqateththi 133 wadha histta ooththa." 
Genesis6:16 Markabezas kaara medhdha; kaaraappenne godaappe giddon issi wadha gidizaso doya agga; pengeza markabezas millera kessa; markabeza heedzdzu pooqe kessa keexxa. 
Genesis9:18 Markabezappe kezida Nohe nayti Seeme, Kaamenne Yaafeete; Kaamey Kanaane aawa." 
Numbers10:11 Derezi Gibxe dereppe kezida nam7anththo layththan nam7anththo aginay gelida nam7u tammanththo gallas Markkateththa Dunkaanezappe bollara diza shaarazi dendides. 
Deuteronomy17:7 Markkati koyrottidi shuchchan caddetto; hessafe guye hankko dere ubbay caddo; hessaththo ooththidi intte giddofe iita ubbaa diggite. 
Joshua19:5 Xigilaage, Beeti-Markaboote, Haxaare-Suusa," 
Joshua22:34 Oroobeeleynne Gaade qommoti, «GODAY izi Xoossaa gididayssas hayssi nu giddon markka» giidi yarshosohoza, «Markka» gi sunththida." 
1Chronicles4:31 Beeti-Markaboote, Haxaare-Susiime, Beeti-Baarenne Shaa7irayme katamatan de7ida; Dawiti kawotana gakkanaas heyti istta katamata gidida." 
Isaiah8:16 Markkateththaa lo7eththa oykka; ta tamaareta giddon wogaa maatamen shoca. 
Ezekiel27:7 Ne Markabeza xibabey Gibxe biitta laynoppe oosettides; hessi nena bandira mala go7ides. Salo misatizanne ochcha teera misatiza ne sharati Qophirooseppe yida. 
Ezekiel27:8 Markabe sololissizayti Sidoonappenne Arwaadeppe yidayta; hanne Xiroose, ne markabe laaggizayti loohida ne asata." 
Ezekiel27:26 Markabe sololissizayti ciimma abba giddon nena efida; gido attiin arshey mokkiza bagga carkoy abba giddon nena menththereththides. 
Ezekiel27:27 Markabe daafay ne bolla gakkiza gallas ne aqotay, ne shaqaceynne ne zal7e miishshay, ne markabeza sololissizayti, markabezan bizaytinne markabe oosanchchati, ne zal7anchchatinne ne wottadarati ubbay, markabezan dizayti ubbay, duge ciimma abban mitettana." 
Ezekiel27:29 Markabe sololissizayti ubbay bantta markabeta oli baana; markabe sololissizaytinne markaben dizayti ubbay wodhdhidi abbaa gaxan eqqana. 
Jonah1:4 Markabezi bishin GODAY abba bolla gote carko denththiin abba dambalay keehi darida gishshas markabezi meqqana gakkides. 
Jonah1:6 Markabeza halaqay izakko biidi, «Ays dhiskadii? Dendada ne xoossaa woossa! Izi ba lo7o ayfen xeellidi nuna ashshanaakko ooni erizee!» gides." 
Jonah1:7 Markabezan diza asay issoy issaa, «Haa yiite! Hayssi iita miishshi oona gaason nuna gakkidaakko eranaas ane saama yeggoos» gida; histtiin istti saama yeggiin saamay Yoonaasa bolla wodhdhides." 
Matthew1:1 Dawite naa, Abrahaame naa gidida Yesus Kirstoosa yeleta zarkkey hayssafe kaallizayssa;" 
Matthew1:2 Abrahaamey Yisaaqa yelides; Yisaaqi Yaaqoobe yelides; Yaaqoobey Yuhudanne iza ishata yelides; 
Matthew1:3 Yuhuday Timaarippe Faareesenne Zaara yelides; Faareesey Esroome yelides; Esroomey Aaraame yelides; 
Matthew1:4 Aaraamey Aminadaabe yelides; Aminadaabey Ne7asoone yelides; Ne7asooney Solomoone yelides; 
Matthew1:5 Solomooneykka Boo7eeze Eraabippe yelides; Boo7eezey Urutippe Iyoobeede yelides; Iyoobeedey Isseye yelides; 
Matthew1:6 Isseyey kawo Dawite yelides; Dawiti Ooriyo machcheyfe Solomoone yelides. 
Matthew1:7 Solomooney Erobi7aame yelides; Erobi7aamey Abbiya yelides; Abbiyayka Aasaafe yelides; 
Matthew1:8 Aasaafey Iyoosaafixe yelides; Iyoosaafixey Iyoraame yelides; Iyoraamey Ooziya yelides; 
Matthew1:9 Ooziyay Iyo7aatame yelides; Iyo7aatamey Akaaze yelides; Akaazey Hizqiyaasa yelides; 
Matthew1:10 Hizqiyaasi Minaase yelides; Minaasey Amoxe yelides; Amoxey Iyosiyaasa yelides; 
Matthew1:11 Iyosiyaasi Baabiloone di7o layth Ikoniyaanenne iza ishata yelides. 
Matthew1:12 Baabiloone di7oppe guye Ikoniyaaney Salatiyaale yelides; Salatiyaaley Zerubaabele yelides; 
Matthew1:13 Zerubaabeley Abiyoode yelides; Abiyoodey Elyaaqeeme yelides; Elyaaqeemey Azaare yelides; 
Matthew1:14 Azaarey Saadooqe yelides; Saadooqey Aakime yelides; Akimey Eliyoode yelides; 
Matthew1:15 Eliyoodey Alazaare yelides; Alazaarey Maataane yelides; Maataaney Yaaqoobe yelides; 
Matthew1:16 Yaaqoobeykka Kirstoosa geetettidayssa Yesusa yelida Maaramo ekkana giigsida Yooseefe yelides. 
Matthew1:17 Hessa gishshas Abrahaameppe yiidi Dawite gakkanaas tammanne oyddu yeleteth; qasse Dawiteppe Baabiloone di7o wode gakkanaas tammanne oyddu yeleteth; Baabiloone di7oppe Kirstoosa yeleta gakkanaas tammanne oyddu yeleta gidees. 
Matthew1:18 Yesus Kirstoosa yeleta taarikey hayssafe kaalli dizayssa; iza aayo Maarama Yooseefes giigetta dishin izi izira gayttontta Xillo Ayanan qanththatada beettadus. 
Matthew1:19 Izo giigsida Yooseefey xillo as gidida gishshas Maaramo asa sinththan qoncce kessontta qotara agganaas ba wozinara qachchides. 
Matthew1:20 Hayssa izi qoppishin Xoossa kiitanchchay agumora izas qonccidi, «Dawite naa Yooseefe! Ne giigsida Maarama qanththatiday Xillo Ayanan gidida gishshas izo neso efanaas babbofa." 
Matthew1:21 Iza attuma naa yelana; izi as nagarappe ashshanaade gidida gishshas iza sunth ne, ‹Yesusa› ga sunththana» gides." 
Matthew1:22 Goday nabe Isayaasa doonan, «Hekko! Geela7oy qanththatana; attuma naakka yelana; naaza sunththayka Amanu7eele geetettana; hessa birsheththika, ‹Xoossi nunara dees› geetettidi xaafettidayssi polettana mala hayssi wurikka hanides» gides." 
Matthew1:23  
Matthew1:24 Yooseefeykka dhiskofe beeggidi Godaa kiitanchchay iza azazida mala Maaramo baso efides. 
Matthew1:25 Gido attiin baada iza koyro naaza yelana gakkanaas izo ekkibeenna. Yelettida guuththa naaza sunththaa, «Yesusa» gides." 
Matthew2:1 Kawo Herdoosa wode Yesusi Beeteliheeme Yuhudan yelettidaappe guye arshey mokkiza baggafe eranchchati Yerusalaame yiidi," 
Matthew2:2 «Yelettida Ayhuda kawoy awan dizee? Awa arshey mokkiza baggara diza xoolintteza be7idi izas goynnana yidos» giidi oychchida. 
Matthew2:3 Kawo Herdoosi hessa siyidi dagammides; Yerusalaamen diza asay wuri izara dagammides. 
Matthew2:4 Izikka qeeseta halaqatanne woga tamaarsizayta ubba shiishshidi, «Kirstoosi awan yelettanee?» giidi oychchides." 
Matthew2:5 Isttika izas, «Nabey, ‹Yuhuda biittan dizaaree hanne Beeteliheemee! Ta dere Isra7eele naagizaadey neeppe kezana gishshas hankko Yuhuda haarizaytappe aazankka guuxxaka› giidi xaafida gishshas izi Beeteliheeme Yuhudan yelettana» giidi yootida." 
Matthew2:6  
Matthew2:7 Hessafe guye Herdoosi he eranchchata geemara xeygisidinne istta haasayssidi xoolinttezi isttas beettida wodeyo shaakki erides. 
Matthew2:8 Eranchchata Beeteliheeme yeddidi, «Biidi guuththa naaza koyite, tanikka baada izas goynnana mala demmida mala haa taakko simmidi izi awan dizaakkon taas yootite» gides." 
Matthew2:9 Eranchchatikka kawoy isttas gidayssa siyidaappe guye simmi bida; arshey mokkiza baggara isttas beettida xoolinttey istta kaaleththidi guuththa naazi dizaso gaththides. 
Matthew2:10 Istti xoolintteza be7ida wode daro ufayettida. 
Matthew2:11 Keeththe gelidi guuththa naaza iza aayo Maaramira demmidinne gulbatidi izas goynnida; ba saaxine saaxine doydi worqqa, exaanenne karbbe geetettiza miish izas immida." 
Matthew2:12 Istti Herdoosakko simmontta mala agumon keehi naagettana mala geetettida gishshas hara ogera ba dere simmida. 
Matthew2:13 Eranchchati bidaappe guye Godaa kiitanchchay Yooseefes agumora beettidi, «Herdoosi guuththa naaza wodhana koyza gishshas ne simmana wode ta nena erisana gakkanaas dendada guuththa naaza aayeyra ekkada duge Gibxe biitta baqatada heen daashsha» gides." 
Matthew2:14 Hessa gishshas Yooseefey dendidi aayiyo naazara ekkidi giddoththara duge Gibxe biitta bides. 
Matthew2:15 Herdoosi hayqqana gakkanaas heen de7ides. Hessankka, «Ta naaza ta Gibxe biittafe xeygadis» giidi Goday kase nabe doonan haasaydayssi polettides." 
Matthew2:16 Eranchchati iza baleththidayssa erida wode Herdoosi keehi hanqettides. Eranchchati izas kase yootida mala ba as kiittidi nam7u layththinne nam7u layth kumonttayta Beeteliheemeninne Beeteliheeme yuushon diza guuththa attuma nayta ubbaa wodhisides. 
Matthew2:17 Hessan, «Yeehoynne gita waaso giirissay Eraaman siyettides; Ira7eela ba naytas yeekkadus; nayti wuri wurida gishshas minnanaas dandayontta ixxadus» geetettidi nabe Ermaasan yootettidayssi polettides." 
Matthew2:18  
Matthew2:19 Herdoosi hayqqidaappe guye Godaa kiitanchchay agumora Yooseefes Gibxe biittan beettidi," 
Matthew2:20 «Dendada guuththa Naazanne iza aayiyo ekkada Isra7eele biitta simma; Naaza wodhana koyzayti hayqqida» gides. 
Matthew2:21 Yooseefey dendidi naaza aayeyra ekkidi Isra7eele biitta simmides. 
Matthew2:22 Gido attiin Arkalawoosey ba aawa Herdoosa sohon Yuhudan kawotidayssa siyidinne hee baanaas babbides; Goday agumora izi hee bontta mala yootida gishshas Galila awuraajja bides. 
Matthew2:23 Naazirete geetettiza katamayo biidi heen duus oykkides. Hessankka kase nabetan «Naazirete as geetettana» geetettidi sinththafe hananayssa kaseti yootettidayssi polettides. 
Matthew3:1 He wode xammaqiza Yohannisi asaas, «Salo kawoteththi matida gishshas intte nagarappe simmite» gi sabbakishe Yuhuda bazzora yides." 
Matthew3:2  
Matthew3:3 «Godaa oge ooththite; wogga ogezakka lo7eththite gishe bazzo biittan waassiza qaala» geetettidi kase nabe Isayaasan yootettidayssi Yohannisa gishshassa. 
Matthew3:4 Yohannisi gaamella iskefe oosettida may7o may7ees. Ba xeessan dafo gixxees; izi miza qumay degera eessinne boole. 
Matthew3:5 Yerusalaameppe, kumeththa Yuhudappenne Yordaanoose shaafa matan diza dere asay wuri Yohannisakko wodhdhidi," 
Matthew3:6 ba nagarakka izas paaxishe Yordaanoose Shaafan iza kushen xammaqettides. 
Matthew3:7 Daro Farsaawetinne Saduqaaweti izi xammaqizaso yishin be7idi Yohannisi, «Intteno shooshshatoo! Intte sinththara diza hanqofe attana mala inttena ooni bessidee?" 
Matthew3:8 Intte intte nagaraappe simmidayssa bessiza ooso ooththite. 
Matthew3:9 ‹Nu aaway Abrahaamey nuus dees› gizayssan intterkka inttena baleththofte; ta inttes Xoossi hayta shuchchatappe Abrahaames naa histti denththanaas dandayees gays. 
Matthew3:10 Hekko kalttay qanxxanaas miththata garsan giigetti uttides; hessa gishshas lo7o ayfe ayfontta miththi wuri qanxxettananne taman yegettana. 
Matthew3:11 Tani maaroteththas haaththan xammaqays; haray attoshin ta iza caamma tookkanaas bessonttaadey taappe aadhdhiza minoy guyera yaana; izikka Xillo Ayananinne taman inttena xammaqana. 
Matthew3:12 Kath suraggiza layday iza kushen dees; izikka ba kaththa baleza pitti geeshshana; ba gisttezakka di7en qolana; happaa gidikko to7ontta taman xuuggana» gides. 
Matthew3:13 He wode Yesusi Yohannisan xammaqettanaas Galilappe Yordaanoose shaafa bides. 
Matthew3:14 Gido attiin Yohannisi, «Hayssi hanenna; tani nenan xammaqettana bessishin neni waanada taakko yay?» giidi izara marshettides." 
Matthew3:15 Yesusikka, «Aykkoy baa, ero garkkii? Hayssa ooththidi nuni xilloteth ubbaa polanaas nuus bessees» gides. Yohannisikka iza qofaa ero gi ekkides." 
Matthew3:16 Yesusi xammaqettidi haaththaafe kezida mala heerakka saloy doyettiin Xoossa Ayanay haraphphe misatidi iza bolla wodhdhishin be7ides. 
Matthew3:17 Saloppeka, «Tani izan ufayettiza Naazinne ta siiqiza ta Naazi hayssa» giza qaalay siyettides." 
Matthew4:1 Hessafe guye Xillo Ayanay Xala7en paacettana mala Yesusa duge bazzo biitta efides. 
Matthew4:2 Oyddu tammu gallassinne oyddu tammu qamma xoomidaappe guye Yesusi gafides. 
Matthew4:3 Paaccizayssi Yesusaakko shiiqidi, «Ne Xoossa Naa gidikko ane hayta shuchchata uketh gidana mala azaza» gides." 
Matthew4:4 Yesusikka, « ‹Asi Xoossa doonappe keziza qaalanppe attiin kaththan xalla deenna› geetetti xaafettides» giidi izas zaarides." 
Matthew4:5 Qasseka Xala7ey Yesusa geeshsha katamayo efi Xoossa Keeththa qustte bolla kessidi," 
Matthew4:6 «Ne Xoossa Naa gidikko ane hayssafe duge guppa; ays giikko « ‹Ne tohoy shuchchan dhuphettontta mala kiitanchchati ba kushera nena oykki denththana mala ne gishshas Xoossi ba kiitanchcha kiittana› geetetti xaafettides» gides. 
Matthew4:7 Yesusikka, «Geeshsha Maxaafan, ‹GODAA ne Xoossaa paaccofa› geetetti xaafettides» giidi zaarides." 
Matthew4:8 Qasseka Xala7ey Yesusa keehi dhoqqa zuma bolla kessidi salo gufanththon diza kawoteththa bonchchozara ubba ehi bessidi," 
Matthew4:9 «Ne kundada taas goynniko hayssa ubbaa ta nees immana» gides. 
Matthew4:10 Yesusi, «Haysso Xala7e! Ta sinththafe ne haakka! ‹Neni Godaa ne Xoossaas goynna; izas xalala azazetta› geetetti Geeshsha maxaafan xaafettides» gides." 
Matthew4:11 Hessafe Xala7ey iza aggidi bides; kiitanchchatikka yiidi iza maaddida. 
Matthew4:12 Yesusi, Yohannisi qashettidayssa siyidi gede Galila simmides." 
Matthew4:13 Naazirete katama aggidi Zaabiloone Niftaaleme heeran abba matan diza Qifirnahoome kataman duus oykkides. 
Matthew4:14 «Hessan Zaabilooneninne Niftaaleme biittan, «Yordaanooseppe he pinththan abba lanqera efiza oge matan diza Ayzaabe gidida Galila dere asay, dhuman diza derey wolqqama poo7o be7ides. Hayqo kuwa giddon diza deres poo7oy poo7ides» geetettidi nabe Isayaasa doonan kasetidi haasayettidayssi polettides." 
Matthew4:15  
Matthew4:16  
Matthew4:17 Yesusi he wodeppe haa simmiin, «Salo kawoteththi matides; maarotan gelite» giidi sabbako oykkides." 
Matthew4:18 Yesusi Galila Abba lanqera aadhdhishe nam7u ishantta, heytikka Phexroosa geetettiza Simoonanne iza isha Indiraasa be7ides. Isttika mole oykkizayta gidida gishshas mole oykkiza gite abban yeggishe deettes." 
Matthew4:19 Yesusi istta, «Haa yiite! Tana kaallite! Ta inttena as oykkiza as kessana» gides." 
Matthew4:20 Istti heerakka mole oykkiza giteza yeggi aggidi Yesusa kaallida. 
Matthew4:21 Guuth sinththe bishe hara nam7u ishantta Zabdoosa naa nam7ata Yaaqoobenne Yohannisa be7ides; isttika ba aawa Zabdoosara wogolo giddon mole gite lo7eththeettes. Yesusikka istta xeygiin 
Matthew4:22 istti heerakka wogolozanne ba aawaa aggidi iza kaallida. 
Matthew4:23 Yesusi Ayhudata istta Woosa Keeththan tamaarsishenne kawoteththa Mishiraachcho qaala sabbakishe qasse dere giddon ay hargeyka sakkizayta paththishe kumeththa Galilan yuuyides. 
Matthew4:24 Hessa gaason lo7o nashoy kumeththa Sooriya biittan siyettides; dereykka dumma dumma sakon daro waayettizayta, daydanththi isttan gelidayta, biicco hargey dizaytanne silidayta izakko ehiin ubbaaka paththides." 
Matthew4:25 Hessafe dendidayssan Galilappe, tammu katamatappe, Yerusalaameppenne Yuhudappe, Yordaanoose shaafa pinththafe yida daro asay iza kaallides." 
Matthew5:1 Daro derey shiiqidayssa be7idi Yesusi pude zuma bolla kezi uttides; iza kaallizaytikka izakko yida. 
Matthew5:2 Izikka istta hizgi tamaarso oykkides; 
Matthew5:3 «Ayanan bana kawushshizayti anjjettidayta; ays giikko Salo Kawoteththi isttassa. 
Matthew5:4 Qadhettizayti anjjettidayta, ays giikko istti minettana." 
Matthew5:5 Ashketi anjjettidayta; ays giikko istti biitta laattana. 
Matthew5:6 Xilloteth gafizaytinne saamettizayti anjjettidayta; ays giikko istti kallana. 
Matthew5:7 Asas lo7o ooththizayti anjjettidayta; ays giikko isttaskka lo7oy oosettana. 
Matthew5:8 Wozina xilloti anjjettidayta; ays giikko istti Xoossa beyana. 
Matthew5:9 Saroteth ooththizayti anjjettidayta; ays giikko istti Xoossa nayta geetetti xeygettana. 
Matthew5:10 Xilloteththa gishshas goodettizayti anjjettidayta; ays giikko salo kawoteththi isttassa. 
Matthew5:11 «Ta gaason asay inttena cayikko, gooddikkonne iita yo7o wordora intte bolla haasaykko intte anjjettidayta." 
Matthew5:12 Intte salon demmana waagay keehi gita gidida gishshas ufayssan guppite. Inttefe sinththan diza nabetakka hessaththo gooddida. 
Matthew5:13 «Intte ha biitta asas maxine mala. Maxiney ba mal7oteththaa yeddizaa gidikko gede kare yegettidi yedheteththafe attiin zaaridi demmanaas dandayzee? 
Matthew5:14 Intte alames poo7o. Zuma bolla diza katamaya qotettanaas dandayakku. 
Matthew5:15 Asi xomppe oyththidi keeththan diza asaa kumeththaas poo7ana mala dhoqqasohon woththees attiin geemasohon woththi erenna. 
Matthew5:16 Hessaththoka asay intte lo7o ooso be7idi salon diza intte Aawaa bonchchana mala intte poo7oy asa sinththan poo7o. 
Matthew5:17 «Tani Muse wogaanne nabeta qaalaa shaarana yidaa inttes misatoppo; polanaas yadis attiin shaaranaas yabeekke. 
Matthew5:18 Ta inttes tumu gays, saloynne sa7ay aadhdhana gakkanaas Muse wogay wuri polettana attiin wogaappe issi pidaleykka woykko qeerinakka shaarettuku." 
Matthew5:19 Hessa gishshas oonikka ha azazotappe guuxxizaaro gidikkoka ooththontta yeggi aadhdhiko, hankkoytakka yedhdhi aadhdhana mala tamaarsiko salo kawoteththan hessaadey guuth geetetti xeygettana; gido attiin hayta azazota ooththi polishe hankkoyta polana mala tamaarsiko hessaadey Salo Kawoteththan gita geetettana." 
Matthew5:20 Ta inttes gays, intte xilloteththi Farsaawetappenne Muse wogaa tamaarsizayta xilloteththafe aadhdhontta aggiko Salo Kawoteth gelana dandayekketa." 
Matthew5:21 «Kase asatas, ‹Wodhoppa; wodhidaade bolla pirdettana› geetettidayssa intte siyideta." 
Matthew5:22 Ta qasse inttes gizay ba isha bolla ogey baynda hanqettizaade bolla pirdettana; oonikka ba isha, ‹Nappay› gizaadey duulata sinththan oyshettana. ‹Eeyay› gizaade Gaanname tama pirday naagees." 
Matthew5:23 Hessa gishshas neni yarsho shiishshizason Xoossas yarshana gishin ne ishay ne bolla mishettidaazi nees qofettiko," 
Matthew5:24 ne yarshizayssa heen yarshizason aggada koyro baada ne ishara giiga; hessafe guye simmada ne yarshoza Xoossas shiishsha. 
Matthew5:25 «Nena mootida ne morkkey ne bolla pirdisontta mala, pirdiza daannay qachchizayssas nena aaththi immontta mala, qasho keeththan ne wodhdhontta mala buro oge bolla dashe ne morkkera elela giigaychcha." 
Matthew5:26 Ta nees tumu gays; izi pirdisi wursidaa gidikko wurseththa santiyo qanxxana gakkanaas qashoppe neni birshettaka. 
Matthew5:27 « ‹Laymatoppa› gizayssa intte siyideta. 
Matthew5:28 Tani gidikko inttena hizgays; maccas amo ayfera xeellidaadey wuri ba wozinan izira laymatides. 
Matthew5:29 Nagara ooththanaas ne ushachcha ayfey nees gaaso gidikko neeppe kessa wora yegga; ne asateththay kumeth gede Gaanname taman yegettanaappe ne asateththafe issina pacciko lo7o. 
Matthew5:30 Ne ushachcha kushey nagara oosos gaaso gidikko neeppe qanxxa digga; ne asateththay kumeth Gaannamen yegettanayssafe ne asateththafe issi billitey nees pace gidikko lo7o. 
Matthew5:31 « ‹Machcho anjji yeddizaadey pirma waraqata izis immana bessees› geetettides. 
Matthew5:32 Tani qasse inttena hizgays, hara asara laymatishin be7ontta dishe ba machcho anjjizaadey wuri iza laymatana mala ooththees. Hessaththoka anjjettidaaro ekkizaadeyka laymatida mala qoodettees." 
Matthew5:33 «Kase asatas, ‹Wordo caaqqofa; Xoossa sinththan ne caaqqidayssa naaga› geetettidayssa intte siyideta." 
Matthew5:34 Ta qasse inttena aykkoka caaqqofte gays; saloy Xoossas uttiza araata gidida gishshas salon caaqqofte. 
Matthew5:35 Biittay Xoossa tohoy yedhdhizaso gidida gishshas biittankka caaqqofte. Wogga kawo katama gidida gishshas Yerusalaamenkka caaqqofte. 
Matthew5:36 Intte hu7enkka caaqqofte; intte hu7e binanappe issineyokka booth woykko kareth histtanaas dandayekketa. 
Matthew5:37 Hessa gishshas intte intte giddon haasayettishin intte haasayay, ‹Ee› gaanaaz gidikko, ‹Ee› giite; ‹Akkay› gaanaaz gidikko, ‹Akkay› giite; hessafe haray wuri iita asappe yizaaza." 
Matthew5:38 « ‹Ayfe gishshas ayfe, ach gishshas ach› geetettidayssa intte siyideta." 
Matthew5:39 Ta qasse inttes gizay iita ooththidaadera eqettofte; gido attiin nees ushachcha shagala baqqizaades hankkoyssaka yuushsha bessa. 
Matthew5:40 Issi asi neni garsara may7idayssa neeppe ekkanaas nena mootikko bollara may7idayssaka gujjada izas imma. 
Matthew5:41 Issi asi nena issi saate oge ne baana mala wolqqaththiko issife nam7u dakko gidana oge izara ba. 
Matthew5:42 Nena woossizaades imma; neeppe tal7e ekkanaas koyzaades zokko zaaroppa. 
Matthew5:43 « ‹Ne lagge siiqa; ne morkke ixxa› geetettidayssa siyideta. 
Matthew5:44 Ta qasse inttena intte morkketa dosite; inttena gooddizaytas woossite gays. 
Matthew5:45 Intte hessaththo ooththiko intte salo Aawaas nayta gidana. Izi arshe iitatassinne lo7otas issi bolla gaththi immees. Irakka xillotassinne nagaranchchatas issi bolla bukisees. 
Matthew5:46 Inttena dosizayta xalla intte dosikko inttes aaza go7ay dizee? Qaraxa qanxxisizayti hessaththo ooththettennee? 
Matthew5:47 Intte ishata xalla intte sarotikko hankkoytappe aazan lo7eetii? Ammanonttaytikka hessaththo ooththeettes. 
Matthew5:48 Hessa gishshas intte salo Aaway wosoy bayndaytas gidida mala intteka wosoy bayndaade gidite. 
Matthew6:1 «Asi inttena beyana mala asa sinththan lo7o ooththontta mala naagettite; hessaththo ooththiko intte salo Aawappe go7a demmeketa. 
Matthew6:2 Intte manqotas maado immiza wode asi tana beyo giidi asa sinththan bonchchettanaas ogeninne Ayhuda Woosa Keeththan xurumba punisiza qoodheppe qommon hanizaytaththo ooththofte. Ta inttes tumu gays; istti ba waaga ubbaa haan ekkida. 
Matthew6:3 Intte manqotas immishin ushachcha kushey ooththizaa hadirsa kushey eroppo. 
Matthew6:4 Intte imoy geeman gido; qotan oosettidayssa be7iza intte Aawaykka intte waaga inttes immana. 
Matthew6:5 «Intte woossishe qoodheppe qommon hanizayta mala hanopite; istti asi beyana mala Ayhuda woosa keeththataninne oyddu oge bolla eqqidi woossanaas doseettes. Ta inttes tumu gays; istti kumeththa waaga ekkichchida. 
Matthew6:6 Neni woossana geliza ne kifile gela; karekka ne bolla gordada geeman diza ne Aawaakko woossa. Geeman oosettidayssa be7iza ne Aaway ne ooso mala nees immana. 
Matthew6:7 «Ammanontta asay issi qaala zaari zaari woossiko isttas siyettiza misatiin istti zaari zaari gizayssaththo intteka woossishe issi qaala zaari zaari goopite. 
Matthew6:8 Gido attiin intte Aaway intte woossanaappe kasetidi inttes aazi koshshizaakko eriza gishshas intte istta misatopite. 
Matthew6:9 Intte woossishe, « ‹Salon diza nu Aawawu! Ne sunththi anjjetto." 
Matthew6:10 Ne kawoteththi haa yo; ne sheney salon gidida mala sa7ankka hano. 
Matthew6:11 Hachchis gidiza kath nuus hach imma. 
Matthew6:12 Nu nuna qohidaytas atto giza mala nekka nu qoho nuus atto ga. 
Matthew6:13 Iitappe nuna ashsha attiin nuna paacen gelththofa; bonchchoy merippe mernaa gakkanaas neyssa. Amiin› gi woossite. 
Matthew6:14 «Intte inttena qohidaytas atto giikko intte salo Aawaykka inttes atto gaana. 
Matthew6:15 Qasse intte asa nagara atto gontta ixxiko intte Aawaykka intte nagara atto geenna. 
Matthew6:16 «Intte xooma xoomishe qoodheppe qommon xoomizaytaththo shullofte. Istti ba xoomizayssa asi erana mala ba ayfeso iisseettes. Ta tumu gays; hessaththo ooththizayti ba waaga kumeth ekkichchida. 
Matthew6:17 Neni xooma xoomashe ne ayfeso meecetta, ne hu7e tiyetta." 
Matthew6:18 Hessaththo ne xoomikko geeman diza ne Aaway xalala erizaazinne asi oonikka erontta qotan gidana. Qotan oosettidayssa be7iza ne Aawaykka ne waaga nees immana. 
Matthew6:19 «Bilay mizason buuqqidinne shiydi moorettizason, kaysoy bookkidi kaysanaas dandayzason, ha biittaa bolla inttes miish shiishshofte." 
Matthew6:20 Gido attiin bilay maanaas, buuqqidi woykko shiydi moorettonttason, kaysoy bookki ekkana dandayonttason heen salon inttes miish shiishshite." 
Matthew6:21 Ne miishshay dizason ne wozinay heen dees. 
Matthew6:22 «Ayfey asateththas poo7o; hessa gishshas ne ayfey paxa gidikko, ne kumeththa asateththayka poo7o gidana." 
Matthew6:23 Ne ayfey harganchcha gidikko, ne kumeththa asateththayka dhuma xalla gidana. Histtiko nenan diza poo7oy dhuma gidikko, qasse dhumay waanida girdi gida dhuma gidandee?" 
Matthew6:24 «Issi asi nam7u godaas ooththana dandayenna. Issaa ixxidi nam7anththoza dosana; woykko issaa bonchchidi nam7anththoza leqqana; Xoossassinne miishshas nam7atas gaththi ooththanaas dandayettenna. 
Matthew6:25 «Hessa gishshas ta inttena intte duussa gishshas, ‹Ay miinoo? Ay uyinoo? Ay may7inoo?› giidi hirgofte gays. Shemppoy qumappe, ashoy may7ofe aadhdhennee?" 
Matthew6:26 Ane salo kafota xeellite! Zerettenna; maxettenna; di7en qolettenna; gido attiin intte salo Aaway istta mizees. Intte isttafe keehi aadhdheketii? 
Matthew6:27 Ane inttefe daro waayettidi baas imettida layththa bolla hara issi gallas gujjana dandayza asi dizee? 
Matthew6:28 «Qasse may7o gishshas aazas hirgeetii? Ane coo demban diza ciishshata xeellite; daaburettenna woykko suqettenna. 
Matthew6:29 Hessa gishshas ta inttena gizay haray attoshin kawo Solomooneykka ba bonchchora ha ciishshatappe issiney mala lo7o may7ibeenna. 
Matthew6:30 Intteno pace ammanoy dizaytoo! Hach asa ayfen beettidi wonto taman wodhdhana maata hayssaththo mayziza Xoossi inttena hessafe lo7eththi aaththi mayzanaas dandayennee? 
Matthew6:31 Hessa gishshas nu ay maanee? Ay uyanee? Ay may7anee? giidi hirgofte. 
Matthew6:32 Hankko ammanontta asay hayssa demmanaas daro qoppees. Hayssi wuri inttes koshshizayssa intte salo Aaway erees. 
Matthew6:33 Harappe sinththatidi Xoossa Kawoteththa xilloteth koyite; hayti wuri inttes gujettana. 
Matthew6:34 Hessa gishshas wontos keehi qoppofte; wonto metoy wontos aqo; issi issi gallassay baas baas gidiza metora dees. 
Matthew7:1 «Intte bolla pirdettontta mala hara asa bolla pirdofte. 
Matthew7:2 Intte pirdida mala intte bollaka pirdettana. Intte makkida miishshara inttes makettana. 
Matthew7:3 Ne ayfen diza gita miththaa be7ontta dashe ne isha ayfen diza qeeri buura aazas xeellay? 
Matthew7:4 Ne ayfen gita miththi dishin ne isha, ‹Ane ta ne ayfeppe qeeri buurayo kessays› gaanaas waana dandayay?" 
Matthew7:5 Nenoo qoodheppe qommon hanizaysso kasetada ne ayfen diza gita miththaa kessaycha. Hessafe guye ne isha ayfen diza buuraa kessanaas lo7eththa xeellandassa. 
Matthew7:6 Ba tohon yedhdhontta malanne simmidi inttena saxxi daakereththontta mala anjjettidayssa kanata sinththan yeggofte; qasse intte worqqaaka guddunthata sinththan yeggofte. 
Matthew7:7 «Woossite inttes imettana; koyite intte demmana; kare qoxxite inttes doyettana. 
Matthew7:8 Woossida ubbaas imettana; koyza asi demmana; qoxxizaades karey doyettana. 
Matthew7:9 Intte giddofe issaades nay uketh woossiko shuch immiza aaway daandee? 
Matthew7:10 Woykko mole woossiko shoosh immizaadey daandee? 
Matthew7:11 Histtiin intte iitata gidi uttidi intte naytas lo7o miish imo erizayta gidikko intte salo Aaway iza woossizaytas waanidi aadhdhiza lo7o miish immennee? 
Matthew7:12 Hessa gishshas hara asi inttes ooththana mala intte koyzayssa, intteka haratas ooththite. Muse wogaynne nabeti gizayssi hayssa." 
Matthew7:13 «Xunththa pengera gelite; dhayoso efiza ogey gita; pengeyka aaho; daro asay he pengezara gelees. 
Matthew7:14 De7os gaththiza ogey gidikko xunththa; pengeyka xunththa; gelanaytikka guuththata xalla. 
Matthew7:15 «Isttas giddo baggay Kana suyte mala gidi uttidinne dorsa ite may7i gelidi intte giddo giddon ooththiza wordo nabetappe naagettite. 
Matthew7:16 Intte istta, istta ooson erandeta. Agunththa worappe woyney, kindichcho agunththafe balase ayfey maxettizee?" 
Matthew7:17 Hessaththoka lo7o miththi wuri lo7o ayfees; iita miththika iita ayfe ayfees. 
Matthew7:18 Lo7o miththi iita ayfe ayfanaas dandayonttayssa mala iita miththi lo7o ayfe ayfanaas dandayenna. 
Matthew7:19 Lo7o ayfe ayfontta miththi wurikka qanxxettananne taman yegettana. 
Matthew7:20 Hessa gishshas intte istta istti ayfiza ayfen shaakki erana. 
Matthew7:21 «Salon diza ta Aawaa shene polontta dishe tana, ‹Godoo! Godoo!› gizay wuri Salo Kawoteth gelenna." 
Matthew7:22 He gallas daroti, ‹Godoo! Godoo! Nuni ne sunththan tinbite yootibeekkonii? Ne sunththan daydanth kessibeekkonii? Ne sunththan daro malaata ooththibeekkonii?› gaana." 
Matthew7:23 He wode ta isttas, ‹Ta inttena mulekka erikke! Intte iitati taappe haakkite› gaada qonccera ta isttas yootana." 
Matthew7:24 «Histtiko hayssa ta qaalaa siyidi ooson peyshizaadey ba keeththe zaalla bolla keexxizaade misatees. 
Matthew7:25 Deexo iray bukkiin haroykka harottides; carkoyka carkides; keeththaaka sugides shin zaalla bolla keexettida gishshas kundibeenna. 
Matthew7:26 «Hayssa ta qaalaa siyidi ooththonttaadey gidikko ba keeththe ace bolla keexxida eeya asa mala. 
Matthew7:27 Deexo iray bukkiin haroykka harottides; carkoyka carkides; he keeththaaka sugides; keeththayka iita kundeth kundides» gides. 
Matthew7:28 Yesusi tamaarsi wursiin asay iza timirtezan malalettides. 
Matthew7:29 Gaasoykka Muse woga tamaarsizayta mala gidontta izi godateththi diza asa mala tamaarsides. 
Matthew8:1 Yesusi zuma bollafe wodhdhiin daro derey iza kaallides. 
Matthew8:2 Issi inchchirachcha hargey dizaadey Yesusaakko shiiqidi iza sinththan gulbatidi, «Godoo! Ne koykko tana paththanaas dandayaasa» gides." 
Matthew8:3 Yesusi ba kushe yeddidi, «Ta dosadis; paxa!» giin addezi he hargezappe heerakka paxides." 
Matthew8:4 Qasseka Yesusi addeza, «Ne paxidayssa oonaska yootoppa; gido attiin baada nena qeeses bessa. Istti azazida yarshoza gaththa; hessika isttas markka gidana» gides." 
Matthew8:5 Yesusi Qifirnahoome gakkida mala mato halaqay izakko shiiqidi iza hizgi woossides. 
Matthew8:6 «Godoo! Ta ashkaray keehi sakettidi keeththan ichchi dees» gides. 
Matthew8:7 Yesusikka izas, «Ta baada paththana» gides." 
Matthew8:8 Mato halaqazi izas zaaridi, «Ta nena ta keeththe gelththanaas bessizaade gidikke; gido attiin ne haan daada issi qaala xalla giikko ta ashkaray paxana." 
Matthew8:9 Taaska tana azaziza halaqati taappe bollara deettes; qasseka taas azazettiza wottadarati taappe garsara deettes; isttafe issaa, ‹Ba!› giikko bees; qasse issaa, ‹Haa ya!› giikko yees; tani ta ashkaraza, ‹Hessa ooththa!› giikko ooththees» gides." 
Matthew8:10 Yesusi iza zaarozan malalettidi bana kaallizaytas, «Ta inttes tumu gays; haray attoshin Isra7eele asaa garsan hayssa mala ammanoy dizaade issaadeka demmabeekke." 
Matthew8:11 Ta inttes yootays; daroti arshey mokkiza baggafenne wulliza baggafe yaana. Salo Kawoteththa maaddan Abrahaamenttara Yisaaqanttaranne Yaaqoobenttara issife uttana. 
Matthew8:12 Salo Kawoteththi isttas gidana bessiza asati heen kare dhuman yegettana. Heenkka yeehonne achcha garccech gidana» gides. 
Matthew8:13 Yesusikka mato halaqazas, «Ba! Ne ammano mala nees hano» gides; ashkarazi heerakka paxides." 
Matthew8:14 Yesusikka buro Phexroosa keeththe gelishin Phexroosa bolloteya misho harge sakettada ichchidaaro be7ides. 
Matthew8:15 Izi kushe Yesusi bochchiin misho hargezi aggides. Izakka dendada Yesusa mokkadus. 
Matthew8:16 He gallassa omars daydanththi oykkida daro asata Yesusaakko ehida. Izikka tuna ayanata ba qaalara isttafe kessides; harganchchata ubbaaka paththides. 
Matthew8:17 Isayaasi, «Izi nu harge ekkides; nu sakokka tookkides» gida qaalay hayssan polettides." 
Matthew8:18 Daro asay iza giddoththidayssa biyidi Yesusi asaa abbafe he pinth pinnana mala azazides. 
Matthew8:19 He wode issi Ayhuda ammano tamaarsizaadey izakko shiiqidi, «Astamaaree! Ne bizaso awakka ta nena kaallana» gides." 
Matthew8:20 Yesusikka izas zaaridi, «Worakanatas ollay dees; salo kafotas keeththi dees; taas Asa Naas gidikko hu7e gelththizasoykka deenna» gides." 
Matthew8:21 Iza kaalliza issi hara asi qasse, «Godoo! Koyro baada ta aawa moogoo?» gides." 
Matthew8:22 Izi qasse, «Hayqqidayti ba hayqeth moogetto; neni gidikko tana kaalla» gides." 
Matthew8:23 Hessafe guye Yesusikka wogolon geliin iza kaallizaytikka izara issife bida. 
Matthew8:24 Qoppontta abba giddon dambalay dendidi wogoloyo mittana gakkanaas istta waayisides. Hessi wuri hanishin Yesusi dhiskides. 
Matthew8:25 Iza kaallizayti iza beegoththidi, «Godoo! Nu dhayoos; nuna ashsha!» gida." 
Matthew8:26 Yesusikka isttas, «Intteno ammanoy paccidaytoo! Aazas hayssa mala babbetii?» gides. Hessafe dendidi carkozanne abba dambalaa izi hanqiin heerakka sirphi gides." 
Matthew8:27 Isttika, «Hayssi abbaynne carkoyka izas azazettizaadey izi waanidaadee?» giidi malalettida." 
Matthew8:28 Izi abba pinnidi Gergesenoone geetettiza dere gakkida mala daydanththi oykkida nam7u as dayti ba diza duufoppe kezidi izara gaaggida. Asi he ogezara aadhdhanaas dandayetontta mala asas daro keehi meto gidi deettes. 
Matthew8:29 Isttika, «Xoossa Nawu! Nees nunara aaza issifeteththi dizee? Wodey gakkontta dishin nuna xuuggana yadii?» gi waassida." 
Matthew8:30 Heen isttafe guuth haakkidi daro guddunththa wudey issi bolla heemettees. 
Matthew8:31 Daydanththati Yesusa, «Ne nuna kessanaa gidikko haytan daro guddunththatan nu gelana mala nuus piqaade imma» giidi woossida." 
Matthew8:32 Yesusikka istta, «Biite!» gides. Daydanththatikka isttafe kezidi guddunththatan gelida. Guddunththati wurikka ba dizaso aafora bichcharishe abban gelidi haaththan mitetti hayqqida." 
Matthew8:33 Guddunththaa heemmizayti elelidi katamay dizaso biidi guddunthay hanoyssanne daydanththi istta oykkida asata bolla hanidayssa ubbaa asaas yootida. 
Matthew8:34 Katamaa asay wuri Yesusara gaagganaas kezides. Yesusa be7idinne istta dere yeddi baana mala iza woossida. 
Matthew9:1 Hessafe guye Yesusi abba bolla wogolora pinnidi kase ba diza katama yides. 
Matthew9:2 Heen issi gunda addeza, asay halara tookkidi Yesusaakko ehides. Yesusikka istta ammano be7idi gunda addeza, «Aykkoy baa; haysso naazoo! Ne nagaray atto geetettides» gides." 
Matthew9:3 He wode Muse wogaa tamaarsizayti, «Hayssi Xoossa cashsha» giidi ba wozinan qoppida." 
Matthew9:4 Yesusi istta qofaa eridi, «Intte wozinan iita yo7o aazas qoppeetii?" 
Matthew9:5 ‹Ne nagaray atto geetettides› guussafenne ‹Dendada ba!› guussafe awayssi kawushshee? 
Matthew9:6 Gido attiin Asa Naas biitta bolla ase nagarappe maaranaas sheney dizayssa erana malassa» giidi gunda addeza «Denda! Ne halaa ekkada neso ba» gides. 
Matthew9:7 Gunda addezikka dendidi baso bides. 
Matthew9:8 Dereykka hessa be7idi malaleteththaninne babon kumidi hayssa mala godateth asas immida Xoossaa galatides. 
Matthew9:9 Yesusi heeppe dendidi bishe issi Matoosa geetettizaadey qaraxa qanxxisizason uttidayssa be7idi, «Tana kaalla!» giin dendidi iza kaallides." 
Matthew9:10 Yesusi Matoosason maadda bolla dishin daro qaraxa qaraxizaytinne nagaranchchati izakko yiidi izaranne iza kaallizaytara issife maanaas uttida. 
Matthew9:11 Farsaaweti hessa biyidi Yesusa kaallizayta, «Inttena tamaarsizayssi qaraxa qanxxisizaytaranne nagaranchchatara waani isttara issife kath mizee?» gi oychchida." 
Matthew9:12 Yesusikka istti gizayssa siyidi isttas, «Aakimey koshshizay sakettidaytas attiin sakettontta paxatas gidenna." 
Matthew9:13 Hessa gishshas, ‹Intte biidi yarsho gidontta maaroteth dosays› giza qaalaa birsheth tamaarte. Nagaranchchata xeygana yadis attiin xillota xeyganaas yabeekke» gides." 
Matthew9:14 Xammaqiza Yohannisa kaallizayti Yesusaakko yiidi, «Nuninne Farsaaweti xoomishin nena kaallizayti aazas xoomettennee?» gi oychchida." 
Matthew9:15 Yesusi isttas, «Mishiraa laggeti mishirazi isttara dishin muuzottana bessizee? Mishiray isttafe ekettana wodey yaana; istti he wode xoomana." 
Matthew9:16 «Gal7a may7o bolla ooraththa woso woththi sikkiza asi deenna. Gal7a bolla oorath woththi sikkiko ooraththazi gal7aza peedhereththidi daaketh haa darssana. 
Matthew9:17 Oonikka ooraththa woyne ushshu gal7a lukkamon gujjenna. Gujjizaa gidikko lukkamozi dhuuqqana; woyne cajjezikka gukkana; lukkamozikka go7ay bayndaaz gidana. Gido attiin ooraththa woyne cajjey ooraththa lukkamozan gujjeettes. Hessa malara woyne cajjezinne lukkamozi lo7on naagettidi gam7ees» gides. 
Matthew9:18 Yesusi asaa haasaysson dishin issi shuumey iza sinththan kundidi, «Taas naa daara hayqqana gawus. Iza paxa daana mala yaada ne kushe izi bolla woththarkii?» giin," 
Matthew9:19 Yesusi dendidi izara bides; Yesusa kaallizaytikka izara bida. 
Matthew9:20 Tammanne nam7u layth kumeth izippe suuththi gukkiza issi maccassaya Yesusappe guyera yaada iza afala macara bochchadus. 
Matthew9:21 Iza hessa ooththiday, «Iza afalaa macara ta bochchidaakko paxana» giza ammanoy izi wozinan diza gishshas bochchadus." 
Matthew9:22 Yesusikka guye simmi xeellidi maccassayo, «Aykkoy baa, ta nayee! Nena ne ammanoy paththides» giin maccassaya heerakka paxaa gadus." 
Matthew9:23 Yesusikka shuumeza soo mata gakkishin derey zayeranne dinkera waassishe yeekkizayssa be7idi," 
Matthew9:24 «Kichchite! Naya dhiskadus attiin hayqqabeekku» giin istti iza bolla miiccida. 
Matthew9:25 Derey wuri keeththafe keziin izi keeththaa gelidi nay kushe oykkides; nayakka denda eqqadus. 
Matthew9:26 Iza goobateththi he dere ubbaan seetettides. 
Matthew9:27 Yesusikka heeppe bishin nam7u qooqeti, «Dawite Nawu! Nuna maararkkii!» giidi waassishe iza geedo kaallida." 
Matthew9:28 Qooqetikka Yesusi gelida keeththaa iza kaallidi gelida. Yesusikka isttas, «Ta intte ayfe paththana dandayzayssa ammaneetii?» giidi oychchides. Isttika, «Ee, Godoo!» gida." 
Matthew9:29 Hessafe guye Yesusi istta ayfe bochchidi, «Intte ammano mala inttes hano!» gides." 
Matthew9:30 Istta ayfeykka xeellides. Yesusikka, «Hayssa oonikka erontta mala» giidi minththi yootides." 
Matthew9:31 Gido attiin istti biidi heera ubbason Yesusa gishshas woresida. 
Matthew9:32 Istti heeppe kezishin daydanththi oykkida issi doona duude as Yesusaakko ehida. 
Matthew9:33 Daydanththazi kezidaappe guye he doona duude addezi haasaya oykkides; derezikka malalettidi, «Hayssa mala hanoy Isra7eele biittan haniin nu beyi erokko» gida." 
Matthew9:34 Gido attiin Farsaaweti zaaridi iza, «Daydanth kessizay daydanththata halaqanna» gida." 
Matthew9:35 Yesusi Ayhudata Woosa Keeththan Ayhudata tamaarsishenne Xoossa Kawoteththa Mishiraachcho qaala yootishe qasseka harge ubbaafe asaa paththishe gutatan gutatan yuuyides. 
Matthew9:36 Asay wuri heemmizaadey baynda dorsa mala keehi metotettidi xeellizay bayndaade gididayssa be7ida wode isttas daro mishettides. 
Matthew9:37 Bana kaallizaytaska, «Maxa gakkida kaththay daro shin maxi shiishshizayti guuththata." 
Matthew9:38 Hessa gishshas kaththaa Goday kaththaako oosanchchata yeddana mala woossite!» gides. 
Matthew10:1 Yesusi bana kaalliza tammanne nam7ata baakko xeygidi, istti tuna ayanata kessana mala qasseka sakoppenne hargefe paththana mala isttas godateth immides." 
Matthew10:2 Tammanne nam7u Hawaareta sunththay hayssafe kaallizayssa; koyroy Phexroosa geetettiza Simoona, iza ishaa Indiraasa, Zabdoosa naa Yaaqoobenne iza ishaa Yohannisa," 
Matthew10:3 Piliphoosanne Bartelemoosa, Toomaasanne qaraxa shiishshiza Matoosa, Ilfiyoosa naa Yaaqoobenne Tadoosa," 
Matthew10:4 ba baggas mishettiza Simoonanne guyeppe Yesusa hayqos aaththi immida Asqoronto Yuhuda. 
Matthew10:5 Hayta tammanne nam7ata ubbaa, «Ayzaabeta giddo boopite; Samaariya asaa katama gelopite." 
Matthew10:6 Gido attiin Isra7eele deraa garsafe dhayda dorsatakko biite. 
Matthew10:7 Biidinne, ‹Salo kawoteththi matides!› giidi sabbakite." 
Matthew10:8 Harganchchata paththite, hayqqidayta hayqoppe denththite, inchchirachcha hargizayta geeshshite; daydanththata kessite; intte mela ekkidayssa mela immite;" 
Matthew10:9 worqqa, bira woykko xarqimala gidiin intte kiisen oykkofte." 
Matthew10:10 Oosanchchas hachchis hachchis gidizaaz koshshiza gishshas intte oges giidi shinqe, koshshontta may7o, caamma woykko guufe ekki boopite." 
Matthew10:11 «Issi katama woykko issi guta intte geliza wode inttena mokkanaade koyi demmidi iza keeththan shempite; heeppe kezana gakkanaas heen diishshite. 
Matthew10:12 Intte oona keeththika gelshe, ‹Saro› giite." 
Matthew10:13 He keeththay sarotay bessiza keeththe gidikko intte sarotay he keeththaas gido; sarotay bessontta keeththe gidikko intte sarotay aggi inttes simmo. 
Matthew10:14 Ay asikka inttena mokki ekkanaassinne intte gizaa siyanaas koyonttaade gidikko hessaade keeththafe woykko he katamaappe kezishe istta bolla yiza gomeppe intte attidayssas markka gidana mala intte toho bolla diza gudulla pittidi kezite. 
Matthew10:15 Ta inttes tumu gays; pirda gallas he katamay bolla gakkana pirday Sodoome bollanne Gamoora bolla gakkida pirdaafe deexo gidana. 
Matthew10:16 «Ta inttena dorsa mala kana suyteta giddora kiittays. Hessa gishshas shooshsha mala cinccatanne haraphphe mala ashketa gidite. 
Matthew10:17 Asay inttena oykkidi pirdiza duulatas shiishshana; Ayhudati ba Woosa Keeththan inttena garafana; hessa gishshas isttafe naagettite. 
Matthew10:18 Ta gaason dere haarizaytakkonne kawotakko inttena efana; istta sinththaninne ammanontta asata sinththan intte markka gidana. 
Matthew10:19 Inttena istti oykkiza wode, ‹Nu ay gi haasaynoo? Wozgi zaaro imminoo?› gi hirgofte. He wode intte gaanaazi inttes imettana." 
Matthew10:20 Inttenan haasayanay intte Aawa Ayanappe attiin inttena gidekketa. 
Matthew10:21 «Ishay ba ishaa hayqos aaththi immana; aaway ba naa bolla, nayti bana yelidayta bolla makkallateththan dendidi hara asan wodhisana." 
Matthew10:22 Ta gishshas asi wurikka inttena ixxana. Gido attiin wurseth gakkanaas minni eqqiday izi attana. 
Matthew10:23 Asay inttena intte diza heeraappe gooddiko haraso kichchite! Ta inttes tumu gays; intte Isra7eele katama ubbaa gakkontta dishin ta Asa Nay yaana. 
Matthew10:24 «Ashkaray godaappe woykko kaallizaadey kaaleththizaadefe aadhdhenna. 
Matthew10:25 Tamaarey bana tamaarsizayssa mala woykko ashkaray ba godaa mala gidikko hessi izas gidana. Keeththa aawa, ‹Bi7elizeebula› giikko iza soo asaa ays hessafe iita geetenne!" 
Matthew10:26 «Hessa gishshas isttas babbofte; geemettiday qonccontta qotettiday geesh kezontta attenna. 
Matthew10:27 Ta inttes dhumara yootidayssa poo7on haasayte; hayththan siyidayssa qonccen haasayte. 
Matthew10:28 Asho wodhikkofe attiin shempo wodhanaas dandayonttaytas babbofte; hessafe ashonne shempo gaththi Gaanname taman dhayssanaas dandayzayssas babbite. 
Matthew10:29 Issi santen bayzettiza nam7u siine kafotappe issiniyakka intte salo Aawaa sheney baynda coo kunda attuku. 
Matthew10:30 Haray attoshin intte hu7e binanaykka taybon dees. 
Matthew10:31 Hessa gishshas babbofte. Daro siine kafotappe intte waagay aadhdhi bonchchettidaaza. 
Matthew10:32 «Asa sinththan taas markkattizaades tanikka salon diza ta Aawaa sinththan izaades markkattana. 
Matthew10:33 Qasse asa sinththan tana kaddidaade tanikka salon diza ta Aawaa sinththan iza ta kaddana. 
Matthew10:34 «Tani biitta bolla saroteth ehanaas yidaa inttes misatoppo; mashsha ehanaas attiin saroteth ehanaas yabeekke. 
Matthew10:35 Tani yiday naa aawappe, macca naa aayppe, naa machcho bollotippe shaakkanaassa." 
Matthew10:36 Asas morkkey soo asaa gidana. 
Matthew10:37 «Taappe aaththidi ba aawaa woykko ba aayo siiqizaadey taas gidanaas bessenna. Taappe aaththidi ba attuma naa woykko, macca naa siiqizaadey taas gidanaas bessenna." 
Matthew10:38 Ba masqale tookkidi tana kaallontta asi taas gidanaas bessenna. 
Matthew10:39 Ba shempo ashshanaas koyzaadey dhayssees; ba shempo ta gishshas aaththi immizaadey ashshees. 
Matthew10:40 «Inttena mokki ekkizaadey tanakka mokki ekkees. Tana mokki ekkizaadey tana kiittidaadekka mokki ekkees. 
Matthew10:41 Issi nabe nabeteththan mokki ekkizaadey he nabeza waaga demmana. Xillo as iza xilloteththa gishshas mokki ekkiko he xilloza waaga ekkana. 
Matthew10:42 Hessa gishshas ta inttes tumu gays; oonikka hayta guuththatappe tana kaallizaade gidida gishshas issi xuu7a irxxa haath ushshiko hinniska waagay dhayenna» gides. 
Matthew11:1 Yesusikka bana kaalliza tammanne nam7u asatas azazo immi wursidaappe guye tamaarsanaassinne sabbakanaas Galilan diza katamata bides. 
Matthew11:2 Yohannisi qasho keeththan dishe Kirstoosi ooththiza hanota siyidi bana kaallizayta izakko yeddidi, «As ashshizaadey yaana geetettiday neneyee? Hara naaginoo?» giidi oychchides." 
Matthew11:3  
Matthew11:4 Yesusikka zaaridi, «Biidi intte siyidayssanne intte be7idayssa Yohannisas yootite." 
Matthew11:5 Qooqeti xeelleettes; wobbeti hemetteettes; inchchirachcha hargizayti paxeettes; tulleti siyeettes; hayqqidayti hayqoppe paxi dendeettes; manqotas Mishiraachcho qaalay yooteettes. 
Matthew11:6 Tanan dhuphettonttaadey anjjettidaade» gides. 
Matthew11:7 Yohannisa kaallizayti bidaappe guye Yesusikka asaas Yohannisa gishshas, «Ay beyanaas duge bazzo bidetii? Carkoy qaaththiza shomboqo beyanaas yidetii?" 
Matthew11:8 Woykko ay beyanaas kezidetii? Lo7o may7o may7i dizayta beyana yidetii? Lo7o may7o may7idi lo7izayti kawota keeththan deettes. 
Matthew11:9 Histtiin ay beyana kezidetii? Nabe beyana kezidetii? Ee, ta inttes gays, nabeppe aadhdhizayssa beyanaassa." 
Matthew11:10 « ‹Ne baana oge nees giigsanaade neeppe kaseta ta nees kiittana geetettidi iza gishshas kase xaafettidaadey izakko!› gides. 
Matthew11:11 «Ta inttes tumu gays; maccassafe yelettida asappe xammaqiza Yohannisa misatiza asi biitta bolla dendibeenna. Gidikkoka Xoossa Kawoteththan as ubbaafe laafa asi Yohannisappe aadhdhana. 
Matthew11:12 «Xammaqiza Yohannisa wodeppe haa simmiin ha7i gakkanaas Salo Kawoteththaya daro baaxe bolla dawus. Mino asati xalla izo demmana. 
Matthew11:13 Nabetikka Muse wogaykka wuri Yohannisa wode gakkanaas buroppe hananayssa yootida. 
Matthew11:14 Histtiko intte ekkana koykko izi yaana geetettida Eelaasi izakko! 
Matthew11:15 Siyiza hayththi diza asi siyo! 
Matthew11:16 «Hayssa ha wode asaa aazan leemisoo? Giyan uttidi ba laggeta, ‹Nu inttes diith diixxiin intte duribeekketa! Yeeho zilas zilaliin yeekkibeekketa!› giza nayta misateettes." 
Matthew11:17  
Matthew11:18 Yohannisi muussafenne ushshafe naagettidi yida gishshas, ‹Izi daydanththara dees› gida." 
Matthew11:19 Ta Asa Nay mashenne uyashe yiin, ‹Hayssi miidi kallontta asa, ushshanchcha, qaraxa shiishshizaytassinne nagaranchchatas laggeko!› gida. Gido attiin Xoossa erateththi ba ooson xilladus» gides." 
Matthew11:20 Hessafe guye Yesusi izi malaatata ooththida katama asay maaroteththan gelontta aggida gishshas, «Kuraziinenne Betesayda! Inttena aayye ana! Intte bolla oosettida malatay Xiroose bollanne Sidoona bolla oosettidaakko istti maaqa may7idinne bidinththan uttidi beni maaroteththan gelanakkoshin." 
Matthew11:21  
Matthew11:22 Hessa gishshas tani inttes gizay pirda gallas inttefe aadhdhi Xiroosessinne Sidoonas qixaatey kawuyana. 
Matthew11:23 «Hanne Qifirnahoome pude salo dhoqqu dhoqqu gaanaas koyadii? Gido attiin neni duge Si7oole wodhdhandasa; ne bolla oosettida malatay Sodoomen oosettidaakko Sodoomey hach gakkanaas daanakkoshin. 
Matthew11:24 Hessa gishshas ta nena gizay pirda gallas qixaatey neeppe Sodoomes kawuyana» gides. 
Matthew11:25 He wode Yesusi, «Salonne sa7a Godoo! Ta Aawawu! Hayssa daro eranchchatappenne cinccatappe qottada qeeri naytas ne qonccisida gishshas ta nena galatays." 
Matthew11:26 Ta Aawawu! Ee hayssi ne sinththan lo7o ne shene gidi beettides. 
Matthew11:27 «Wurikka ta Aawappe taas imettides; Aawappe attiin Naaza gishshas eriza asi baa; qasse Naazappenne Naazi ba shenen qonccisida asappe haray aawaa eriza asi baa. 
Matthew11:28 «Toohoy deexxidaytoo, daaburdaytoo, intte wurikka taakko haa yiite; tanikka inttes shempo immana." 
Matthew11:29 Ta qambara tookkite; taappeka tamaarte; tani ta wozinan aadanne ashke; intte shemppos intte shempo demmana. 
Matthew11:30 Ta qambaray shaykonne ta toohoy kawushsha» gides. 
Matthew12:1 Hessafe guye Yesusi Sambata gallas kaththa giddora aadhdhi bides. Iza kaallizaytikka gafida gishshas tiya duuththidi shigechchi muus oykkida. 
Matthew12:2 Farsaaweti hessa be7idi Yesusa, «Hekko nena kaallizayti Sambata gallas oosettanaas bessonttayssa ooththeettes» gida." 
Matthew12:3 Izikka isttas zaaridi, «Dawitinne izara diza asati gafida wode izi ay ooththidaakkon nababibeekketii?" 
Matthew12:4 Xoossa Keeththe gelidi qeesetappe attiin Dawitinne izara dizayti bochchanaas bessontta dummatida uketh mides. 
Matthew12:5 Qasse qeeseti Sambata shaaridi Xoossa Keeththa giddon ooso ooththiko mooro gidonttayssa Muse wogappe nababibeekketii? 
Matthew12:6 Gidikkoka ta inttes gizay Xoossa Keeththafe aadhdhizaadey haan dees. 
Matthew12:7 ‹Tani yarsho gidontta maaroteth dosays› giza qaalay ay guussako intte erizaakko xillota bolla pirdeketakkoshin. 
Matthew12:8 Asa Nay Sambatas Goda» gides. 
Matthew12:9 Heeppe izi aadhdhi bishe Ayhudata Woosa Keeth gelides. 
Matthew12:10 Heenkka issi kushe silidaadey dees. Yesusa mootanaas gaaso koyidi, «Sambata gallas paththanaas bessizee?» giidi iza oychchides." 
Matthew12:11 Izikka istta, «Inttefe issaade dorsi Sambata gallas ollan gelikko ba dorsaa izi gelidi ollaafe goochchi kessi erennee?" 
Matthew12:12 Histtiko asi dorsafe keehi aadhdhennee? Hessa gishshas Sambata gallas lo7o oosoy digettenna» gides. 
Matthew12:13 Qasseka addeza, «Ne kushe piddisa!» gides; addezikka ba kushe piddisiin hinko kusheza mala paxa gidides." 
Matthew12:14 Gido attiin Farsaaweti heeppe kezidi, Yesusa wostti oykki wodhanaakko ba giddon zorettida." 
Matthew12:15 Yesusi istta qofaa eridi heeppe haraso sher7i gides. Daro derey iza kaallides; harganchchatakka ubbaa paththides. 
Matthew12:16 Izi oonakkonne asas yootontta mala istta azazides. 
Matthew12:17 Hessika haniday nabe Isayaasan, «Ta dooridaynne ta izan ufayettiza ta nay hayssako! Ta Ayana ta iza bolla woththana; izikka ammanontta deretas tumu pirda awajjana; marshettenna; woykko waassenna. Izas qaalaykka karen siyettenna; suure pirda xoonos gaththana gakkanaas dincetti uttida shomboqoka menththennanne cuwattiza muqaaddaka toyssenna; Ayzaabeti iza ufayssan naagana» geetetti yootettida tinbite qaalay polettana." 
Matthew12:18  
Matthew12:19  
Matthew12:20  
Matthew12:21  
Matthew12:22 Hessafe guye daydanththi oykkiin xeellanaassinne haasayanaas dandayontta issi as Yesusaakko ekki yida. Yesusikka iza paththiin addezi xeellanaassinne haasayanaas dandaydes. 
Matthew12:23 Asay wurikka malalettidi, «Hayssi addezi Dawite naashaa?» gides." 
Matthew12:24 Gido attiin Farsaaweti hessa siyidi, «Hayssi addezi daydanth kessizay daydanththa halaqa Bi7elizeebula wolqqan xalla gidanaas bessees» gida." 
Matthew12:25 Yesusikka istta qofaa eridi, «Ba giddon issoy issaafe shaakettiza kawoteththi wurikka kundana; ba giddon shaakettiza katamay woykko keeththa asi minnenna." 
Matthew12:26 Xala7ey Xala7e kessizaa gidikko Xala7ey ba giddon shaakettides guussa. Hessaththo hankko iza kawoteththi waani minnana dandayzee? 
Matthew12:27 Tani Bi7elizeebula wolqqan kessizaa gidikko intte nayti aaza wolqqan kessanee? Hessa gishshas intte nayti intte bolla pirdana. 
Matthew12:28 Gido attiin tani daydanth kessizay Xoossa Ayanan gidikko Xoossa Kawoteththi intteko yides guussa. 
Matthew12:29 «Woykko issi asi wolqqara dizaade keeththe gelidi miishshe bonqqana koykko kasetidi he wolqqara diza addeza oykki qachchontta wostti bonqqanee? Qachchidaappe guye bonqqana dandayees. 
Matthew12:30 «Tanara gidonttaadey tanara eqettees; tanara issife shiishshontta asi wurikka laallees. 
Matthew12:31 Hessa gishshas ta inttes tumu gays; nagara oosoynne cashshi wuri asas atto geetettana shin Xillo Ayana cayidaadey maarettenna. 
Matthew12:32 Ay asikka asa naa bolla haasayza iita qaalaa gishshas maarettanashin, Xillo Ayana bolla haasayza iita qaalay gidikko hayssa ha woden gidiin woykko buro yaana woden gidiin maaroy deenna." 
Matthew12:33 «Miththi wuri ayfen erettizayssa mala intte lo7o ayfe demmanaas inttes lo7o miththi do; inttes iita miththi dizaa gidikko intte iita ayfe ekkana. 
Matthew12:34 Intteno marzera diza shooshshatoo! Intte iitata gidi uttidi waani lo7o haasayanaas dandayeetii? Ulo giddon kumidaazi doonara haasayettees. 
Matthew12:35 «Lo7o asi ba wozinan kunththi woththida lo7o qofaappe lo7o haasayees; iita asikka ba wozinan kunththi woththida iitateththaafe iita yo7o kessees. 
Matthew12:36 Gido attiin ta inttes gizay asay ba haasayda hada qaala ubbaa gishshas pirda gallas wurikka oyshettana. 
Matthew12:37 Gaasoykka ne qaalappe dendidayssan ne xillada attananne ne qaalappe dendidayssan ne bolla pirdettana» gides. 
Matthew12:38 Hessafe guye issi issi Muse woga tamaarsizaytinne Farsaaweti Yesusa, «Astamaaree! Nu neeppe malalisiza malaata beyana koyoos» gida." 
Matthew12:39 Izi isttas zaaridi, «Ha iitanne layma yeletay malata oychchees; gido attiin nabe Yoonaasa malataappe attiin hara malatay imettenna." 
Matthew12:40 Yoonaasi gita mole ulo giddon heedzdzu qammanne heedzdzu gallas gam7ida mala Asa Naykka heedzdzu gallassinne heedzdzu qamma biitta garsan gam7ana. 
Matthew12:41 Nannawe asay pirda gallas hayssa ha yeletaara dendidi ha yeletaa bolla pirdana; gaasoykka Nannawe asay Yoonaasa markkateththan maaroteth gelida gishshassa. Hekko Yoonaasappe aadhdhizaadey haan dees. 
Matthew12:42 Dugeha dere kawoya Solomoone erateth siyanaas biitta gaxappe dendada yida gishshas pirda gallas iza hayssa ha yeletaara dendada ha yeletaa bolla pirdana. Hekko Solomooneppe aadhdhizaadey hayssan dees. 
Matthew12:43 «Tuna ayanay asappe kezidi shempo demmanaas haaththi baynda mela biittan daaburees. Gido attiin ba koyza shemppoza demmenna. 
Matthew12:44 Hessafe qasse kase ta dizaso simma baana giidi beniiso izi simmishin kase izi dizasoy aykkoyka baynda mela keeththe gididi geeyidayssanne giigetti dizayssa demmees. 
Matthew12:45 Hessafe biidi hara baappe iitiza laappun iita ayanata banara ekkidi yees. Isttika he addezan gelidi de7ana. He addezas kase duussaafe guye duussay iita gidana. Hayssa iita yeletaska hessa mala hanana» gides. 
Matthew12:46 Yesusi asaas yootishin iza aayeyanne ishati iza yoochchana koyidi karen eqqida. 
Matthew12:47 Issi asi, «Hekko ne aayanne ne ishati nena haasayssanaas karen eqqidi nena koyeettes» gides." 
Matthew12:48 Yesusikka, «Ta aaya oonee? Ta ishatich! Istti oonanttee?» gides." 
Matthew12:49 Ba kushera bana kaallizaytakko malatidi, «Ta aayanne ta ishati haytantta." 
Matthew12:50 Salon diza ta Aawa shene ooththizayti wurikka taas isha, michchonne aayo» gides." 
Matthew13:1 He gallas Yesusi keeththafe kare kezidi abbaa lanqen uttides. 
Matthew13:2 Daro derey iza yuuyi aadhdhi giddoththida gishshas asaa abbaa gaxan aggidi wogolo giddo geli uttidi," 
Matthew13:3 daro yo7o leemisora, «Issi goshshanchchay zereth zeranaas kezides." 
Matthew13:4 Izi zerishin issi issi zereththi oge doonan wodhdhiin kafoti yiidi maxi mida. 
Matthew13:5 Issi issi zereththi melanne shuchchatiza biitta bolla wodhdhiin biittay mela biitta gidida gishshas elle caarides. 
Matthew13:6 Gido attiin away awattiin shullidinne xapho yeddontta aggida gishshas melides. 
Matthew13:7 Issi issi zereththay agunththa giddon wodhdhides; agunththayka diccidi caarechchaa cuullides. 
Matthew13:8 Hara zereththika aradda biittan wodhdhidi ayfekka ayfides; issoy xeetu, issoy usuppun tammu, issoy heedzdzu tammu ayfe immides." 
Matthew13:9 Siyiza hayththi dizaadey siyo!» gi yootides. 
Matthew13:10 Hessafe guye iza kaallizayti izakko shiiqidi, «Ne aazas leemisora yootay?» gida." 
Matthew13:11 Izikka isttas, «Salo Kawoteththa xuura eroy inttes imettides; isttas gidikko imettibeenna." 
Matthew13:12 Dizaades dizayssa bolla gujettananne darana shin bayndaadefe hinna dizaarakka ekettaychchana. 
Matthew13:13 Ta hayssaththo leemisora yootizay istti siyishe ezgontta gishshassinne xeellishe demmontta gishshassa. 
Matthew13:14 «Isayaasi, ‹Intte sis siyana shin yuushshi qoppeketa; xeelo xeellana shin wozinan woththeketa; dereza wozinay muumides; istta hayththayka siyenna; xeellontta mala ba ayfe qilim7ida; hessa mala gidonttaakko istti ba ayfera be7idinne ba hayththara siyidi ba wozinan yuushshi qoppidi taakko haa simmiin ta istta paththanashin› gida tinbite qaalay isttan polettides." 
Matthew13:15  
Matthew13:16 «Intte ayfey xeelliza gishshassinne intte hayththati siyiza gishshas intte anjjettidayta. 
Matthew13:17 Ta inttes tumu gays; daro nabetinne daro xillo asati ha7i intte be7izayssa beyanaassinne ha7i intte siyizayssa siyanaas amottida shin isttas hanibeenna. 
Matthew13:18 «Histtiko ha7i zereththaa leemisoza birsheth siyite. 
Matthew13:19 Kawoteththa qaala siyidi yuushshi qoppontta ay asa wozinappeka Xala7ey yiidi zerettida zereththaa eeson maxichchana. Hessika oge bolla wodhdhida zereththa. 
Matthew13:20 Shuchcha bolla zerettidayssi qaala ufayssan siyidi heerakka ufayssan ekkizaade misatees. 
Matthew13:21 Gido attiin xapho yeddanaas dandayontta aggida gishshas daro gam7ontta qaalaa gaason metoynne goodeteththi yiza wode eleli dhuphettees. 
Matthew13:22 Agunththa giddon zerettida zereththay qaala siyidi hayssa ha alamezas daro metoteththaninne dureteththa qofan balettidinne cuulettidi ayfe immontta asa mala. 
Matthew13:23 Lo7o biittan zerettida zereththay qasse qaala siyidi yuushshi qoppizaade misatees; lo7o ayfe ayfees; issoy xeetu, issoy usuppun tammu, issoy heedzdzu tammu ayfe immides» gides." 
Matthew13:24 Yesusi qasseka hara leemiso isttas, «Salo Kawoteththi ba goshsha gaden lo7o zereth zeridaade misatees." 
Matthew13:25 Gido attiin asi wuri ichchida wode morkkey yiidi gistteza giddon leeshsho zeridi bides. 
Matthew13:26 Gisttezi diccidi ayfe ayfiza wode leeshshoyka izara issife beettides. 
Matthew13:27 «Kaththaa godaza ashkarati godazaakko shiiqidi, ‹Godoo! Neni ne goshshan lo7o zereth zerabeekkii? Hayssi leeshshoy awappe yidee?› gida." 
Matthew13:28 «Izikka isttas, ‹Hessa morkkey ooththides› gides. Ashkaratikka, ‹Nu biidi leeshshoza shoddana mala koyay?› gi oychchida." 
Matthew13:29 «Izikka isttas, ‹Akkay hanenna; gaasoykka intte leeshshoza shoddishe gisttezara gaththi shoddana;" 
Matthew13:30 aggite! Maxa wodey gakkanaas issife dicco; he wode maxizayti leeshshoza kasetidi qori maxidi taman xuugganaas mirqqen mirqqen qachchite; gistteza qasse shiishshidi gootaran gelththite› gaada ta inttes yootana» gi yootides. 
Matthew13:31 Hara leemiso isttas, «Salo Kawoteththi issi asi ba gade giddon zerida barzaafe miththa ayfe mala." 
Matthew13:32 Barzaafe miththa ayfey hara miththa ayfe ubbaafe daro laafa gidikkoka diccada miththa ubbaafe gita gidawus. Salo kafotikka izi hagga bolla keexxidi daana gakkanaas gita mith gidawus» gides. 
Matthew13:33 Ha7ikka hara leemiso isttas, «Salo Kawoteththi maccassi bukeesoy dendana mala bukeeso giddon gujjida guuththa irsho misatawus» gides." 
Matthew13:34 Yesusi hayssa ubba asaas leemisora yootides. Leemisoy baynda issinokka yootibeenna. 
Matthew13:35 Hessika kase nabe doonan, «Ta doona leemison ta doyana; alamey medhettoosoppe haa simmiin qotettidayssa ta haasayana» geetetti yootettidayssi polettides." 
Matthew13:36 Hessafe Yesusi asaa aggidi soo gelides. Iza kaallizayti izakko shiiqidi, «Kaththa giddon diza leeshshoza gishshas ne yootida leemisoza birsheth nuus yoota» gida." 
Matthew13:37 Izikka isttas zaaridi, «Lo7o zereth zeriday Asa Naa." 
Matthew13:38 Goshshay hayssa alameza; lo7o zereththay Kawoteththa nayta gididayssa bessees; leeshshoy qasse Xala7e nayta. 
Matthew13:39 Leeshshoza zeridi bida morkkey Daabulosa. Maxa wodey alame wurseth gidishin maxizayti Xoossa kiitanchchata. 
Matthew13:40 «Leeshshoy qorettidi taman xuugettiza mala alame wurseththan hessaththo hanana. 
Matthew13:41 Asa Nay ba kiitanchchata kiittana; isttika nagaras gaaso gididaytanne iita ooththizayta iza Kawoteththa giddofe ubbaa qori kessana. 
Matthew13:42 Yeehoy dizasoninne ach garccizason daro wolqqama taman istta yeggana. 
Matthew13:43 He wode xilloti ba Aawaa Kawoteththan arshe mala poo7ana. Siyiza hayththi dizaadey siyo! 
Matthew13:44 «Salo Kawoteththi gade giddon qotettida miishshe misatees. Issi asi he miishshayo demmidi zaari qottides. Ufayssafe dendidayssan biidi baas dizaaz ubbaa bayzidi he miishshiya diza biitta shammides. 
Matthew13:45 «Hessaththoka Salo Kawoteththi al7o worqqa koyza zal7anchcha misatees. 
Matthew13:46 Daro al7o gidida inqqu geetettiza shuch demmida mala biidi baas diza ubbaa bayzidi shammides. 
Matthew13:47 «Qasseka Salo Kawoteththi abba giddon yegettidi dumma dumma mole oykkida mole gite misatees. 
Matthew13:48 Mole oykkizayti gitey kumiin goochchidi abba lanqe kessida. Heen uttidi lo7o lo7o mole qoridi keeshen gujjida. Iita moleta wora yeggida. 
Matthew13:49 Alame wurseththan hessaththo hanana. Kiitanchchati yiidi nagaranchchata xillotappe shaakkidi yeekkizasonne ach garccizaso gede to7ontta taman yeggana. 
Matthew13:50  
Matthew13:51 «Yesusi istta hayssi wuri inttes gelidee?» gides. Isttika «Ee» gida. 
Matthew13:52 Izikka zaaridi, «Hessa gishshas Salo Kawoteththa xuuray gelida Muse wogaa tamaarsizaadey oonikka izas minjji woththida al7o miishshafe ooraththinne gal7a miish kessizaade misatees» gides." 
Matthew13:53 Yesusikka hayta leemisota yooti wursidi heeppe haraso bides. 
Matthew13:54 Ba dere biidi Ayhudata Woosa Keeththan asaa tamaarso oykkides. Isttika malalettidi, «Hayssi addezi hayssa erateththaanne hayta malaatata ooththana wolqqa awappe demmidee?" 
Matthew13:55 Hayssi anaaxeza naa deennee? Iza aayey sunththi Maaramo gidennee? Iza ishati Yaaqoobe, Yooseefe, Simoonanne Yuhuda gidettennee?" 
Matthew13:56 Michcheti nunara dizayta gidettennee? Histtiin hayssi addezi hayssa ubbaa awappe ekkidee?» gida. 
Matthew13:57 Hessa gishshas istti izi gizayssa ekkibeettenna. Yesusikka isttas, «Nabey ba dereninne ba keeththan bonchchettenna attiin harason bonchchettees» gides." 
Matthew13:58 Istti ammanontta aggida gishshas daro malaatata heen ooththibeenna. 
Matthew14:1 He wode Galila dere haariza Herdoosi asay Yesusa nashshizayssa siyides. 
Matthew14:2 Herdoosi ba ashkaratas, «Hessa gidikko Xammaqiza Yohannisi hayqoppe dendidi yides guussakaa! Hayssi wuri gita malaatay iza kushen oosettizay hessassa» gides." 
Matthew14:3 Herdoosi ba isha Piliphoosa machcho Herodiyaadi gaason Yohannisa oyththidi qasho keeththan yeggides. 
Matthew14:4 Gaasoykka Yohannisi Herdoosa, «Ne izo ekkana mala woga gidenna gida gishshassa» gides." 
Matthew14:5 Herdoosikka Yohannisa wodhanaas koyishin asay Yohannisa nabe mala xeelliza gishshas babbides. 
Matthew14:6 Herdoosi ba yeleta gallas Herodiyaadi naya yeththan iza ufayssida gishshas naya iza oychchidaaz ubbaa immanaas izis caaqqides. 
Matthew14:7  
Matthew14:8 Nayakka aayey zoren, «Xammaqiza Yohannisa hu7e keren woththada ha7i hannin taas imma» gadus." 
Matthew14:9 He wode kawozi izas mishettides. Gido attiin caaqqida gishshassinne izara diza imaththata gishshas giidi nayi oyshay polettana mala azazides. 
Matthew14:10 Kiittidinne Yohannisa woyne keeththan dishin qoodhe qanxxisides. 
Matthew14:11 Qanxxettida hu7eza keren woththidi nays immida. Nayakka ekkada ba aayeys immadus. 
Matthew14:12 Yohannisa kaallizayti iza aha ekkidi moogidinne hanidayssa ubbaa Yesusas yootida. 
Matthew14:13 Hessa siyida mala Yesusi kase ba dizaso aggidinne wogolon gelidi barkka hara asi bayndaso bides. Dereykka hessa siyidi katamay dizasoppe tohora iza kaallides. 
Matthew14:14 Yesusikka wogolozappe wodhdhishe daro asa be7idi asaas mishettides. Sakettizaytakka paththides. 
Matthew14:15 Gadey qammi qammi bizayssa be7idi iza kaallizayti izakko shiiqidi, «Hayssi nu dizasoy bazzo; gadeykka qammi qammi biza gishshas gede gutatan gutatan biidi baas maanaaz shammana mala asaa yedda» gida." 
Matthew14:16 Gido attiin Yesusikka istta, «Intte asaas maanaaz immite attiin asay baanaas koshshenna» gides." 
Matthew14:17 Isttika izas zaaridi, «Hayssan nuus ichchashu ukeththafenne nam7u moleppe attiin haray baa» gida." 
Matthew14:18 Izikka istta, «Ane heyta dizayta haa taas ekki yiite» gides." 
Matthew14:19 Qasseka asay maata bolla uttana mala azazides. Ichchashu ukeththinne nam7u moleta ba kushen oykkidi ba ayfe pude salo dhoqqu histti galatidi, ukeththaa menththi bana kaallizaytas immides. Isttika asaas immida." 
Matthew14:20 Asay wurikka miidi kallides. Hessafe guye iza kaallizayti asaappe mishin attidayssa tammanne nam7u leemate kumeth shiishshida. 
Matthew14:21 Mida asay maccassatinne guuththa nayti gujettontta attumasay xalla ichchashu shii gidanaaza. 
Matthew14:22 Heerakka iza kaallizayti wogolon gelidi gede pinth izappe kasetidi pinnana mala azazidi asaa moyzanaas baas guye attides. 
Matthew14:23 Dereza moyzidaappe guye woosa woossanaas barkka zuma bolla kezides. Gadey dhumiinkka heen zuma bolla barkka dees. 
Matthew14:24 He wode wogoloya abbaa kanththa bishin dambalay dendidi daro metoththo oykkides. 
Matthew14:25 Omars koyro kuttoy baqqishin Yesusi abba bollara hemettidi iza kaallizayti dizaso yides. 
Matthew14:26 Yesusa kaallizaytikka izi abba bollara hemetti yishin be7idi babbida gishshas iza moytille giidinne waassida. 
Matthew14:27 Yesusi heerakka, «Aykkoy baa! Tanakko; babbofte!» gides." 
Matthew14:28 Phexroosi, «Godoo! Nena gidikko ta abbaa bollara hemettada neekko baana mala tana azaza» gides." 
Matthew14:29 Yesusi iza, «Haa ya!» gides. Phexroosikka wogolozappe wodhdhidi haaththa bollara hemettidi Yesusaakko yides." 
Matthew14:30 Gido attiin carkoza wolqqa biyidi babbida gishshas haaththan miteteth oykkidi, «Godoo! Tana ashsha!» gi waassides." 
Matthew14:31 Yesusi heerakka ba kushe yeddi oykkidi, «Nenoo, ammanoy paccidayssoo! Aazas sidhadii?» gides." 
Matthew14:32 Yesusinne Phexroosi wogolozan gelida mala carkoy sirphi gides. 
Matthew14:33 Hessafe guye wogolon dizayti, «Tumu neni Xoossa Naa!» giidi izas goynnida." 
Matthew14:34 Yesusinne iza kaallizayti abba pinnidi Gensereexe geetettizaso gakkida. 
Matthew14:35 Heen dizayti Yesusa gididayssa eridi, he heeran yuuyi aadhdhanaas diza asaas kiita yeddida. Asaykka harganchchata ubbaa Yesusaakko ehides." 
Matthew14:36 Harganchchati iza afala xeera xalla bochchana mala Yesusa woossida. Bochchidayti wurikka paxida. 
Matthew15:1 Qasseka Yerusalaameppe yida Farsaawetinne Muse wogaa tamaarsizayti Yesusaakko shiiqidi," 
Matthew15:2 «Nena kaallizayti kase nu aawata wogaa aazas dhayssizoo? Quma maanaas kushe meecettettenna» gida. 
Matthew15:3 Yesusikka isttas, «Intte intte wogaas giidi Xoossa azazo ays shaareetii?" 
Matthew15:4 Xoossi, ‹Ne aayonne ne aawaa bonchcha; ba aawa bolla woykko ba aayi bolla iita qaala haasaydaadey hayqqo!› gi azazides." 
Matthew15:5 Intte gidikko ay asikka ba aawaa woykko ba aayo, ‹Ta inttes ooththanaas bessizaaz ay miishshika Xoossas yarsho ooththa shiishshadis› giikko," 
Matthew15:6 ‹He addezi ba aawaa woykko ba aayo bonchchides› geeta; hessa gishshas intte woga gishshas Xoossa qaala shaareeta. 
Matthew15:7 Intteno qoodheppe qommon hanizaytoo! Isayaasi intte gishshas yootishe, « ‹Hayssi derey tana doonan xalla bonchchees; wozinay gidikko taappe haakkides; mela hada tana goynnees; istta timirteyka asi woththida woga› gididi sinththafe hananayssa yootidayssi tuma» gides." 
Matthew15:8  
Matthew15:9  
Matthew15:10 Yesusi asaa baakko xeygidi, «Siyite wozinan woththite." 
Matthew15:11 As tunisizay izaade doonara haa kezizayssafe attiin doonara duge gelizay tunisenna» gides. 
Matthew15:12 Qasse iza kaallizayti izakko shiiqidi, «Farsaaweti ne gidayssa siyidi hanqettidayssa eradii?» gida." 
Matthew15:13 Izi isttas, «Ta Aawaa saloyssi tokkontta miththi wurikka dhoqallettana." 
Matthew15:14 Istta aggaagite; istti qooqeti kaaleththiza qooqeta gidida gishshas, qooqeti qooqe kaaleththiko nam7ay issoy issaara oykettidi aafon wullana» gides." 
Matthew15:15 Phexroosi Yesusa, «Ne yootida leemisoza nuus birsha» gides." 
Matthew15:16 Izikka, «Intte ha7i gakkanaaska eribeekketa guussee?" 
Matthew15:17 Doonara gelizay wuri duge qanth kanththidi gede kare kezizayssa erekketii? 
Matthew15:18 Doonara kezizay gidikko wozinappe pulttees. As tunisizay hessa. 
Matthew15:19 Iita qofay, shempo wodhoy, laymay, laymatanaas qaaqqatoy, kaysoy, wordo markkateththinne asa sunth mooroy wuri wozinappe pulttees." 
Matthew15:20 As tunisizay haytanttafe attiin kushe meecettontta muusi as tunisenna» gides. 
Matthew15:21 Yesusi heeppe kezidi Xiroosenne Sidoona geetettiza dere bides. 
Matthew15:22 Issi Kanaane maccas dizaara he heerappe kezada Yesusaakko yaada, «Godoo, Dawite nawu! Taas mishetta! Ta naya tuna ayanay oykkiin keeha waayawus» gaada waassadus." 
Matthew15:23 Gido attiin izi issi qaalakka izis zaaribeenna. Histtiin he wode iza kaallizayti izakko shiiqidi, «Nuna kaalla kaalla waayisiza gishshas ne izo moyza» giidi iza oychchida." 
Matthew15:24 Izikka isttas, «Tani Isra7eele keeththafe dhayda dorsatakko xalla kiitettadis» gides." 
Matthew15:25 Maccassayakka Yesusa toho bolla kundada, «Godoo! Tana maaddarkkii!» gadus." 
Matthew15:26 Izikka izis zaaridi, «Nayta kath ekkidi kana butulatas yegganaas bessenna» gides." 
Matthew15:27 Izakka, «Ee Godoo; butulatikka ba godaa maaddafe gaden wodhdhida kath maxi meettes» gadus." 
Matthew15:28 Yesusikka maccassayo, «Hanne maccassayee, ne ammanoy gita! Ne koyida mala nees hano» gides. Maccassay naya heerakka paxadus." 
Matthew15:29 Yesusi heeppe dendidi Galila abbaa lanqe biidi heen diza issi zuma bolla kezi uttides. 
Matthew15:30 Qoodan daro derey wobbeta, qooqeta, silata, haasayontta duudeta haratakka daro harganchchata ehidi iza sinththan woththides; izikka istta paththides." 
Matthew15:31 Duudey haasayshin, toho silay paxishin, wobbey sitti gi hemettishin, qooqey xeellishin be7idi asay malalettides; Isra7eele Godaakka galatides." 
Matthew15:32 Yesusi bana kaallizayta xeygidi, «Asay tanara heedzdzu gallas gam7ida gishshassinne maana kaththi baynda gishshas asay tana michchees. Oge bollan gafan daaburdi kundontta mala mela ulora yeddana koykke» gides." 
Matthew15:33 Iza kaallizayti, «Hayssan aykkoyka baynda bazzo biittan hayssa keena dere mizanaas gidiza quma nu awappe demmanee?» gida." 
Matthew15:34 Yesusi istta, «Inttes aappun ukeththi dizee?» gi oychchiin isttika, «Laappun ukeththinne qii guuththa moleti deettes» gida." 
Matthew15:35 Izikka derezi gaden uttana mala azazides. 
Matthew15:36 Laappun ukeththaanne moleza ba kushen oykkidi galatidaappe guye menththidi bana kaallizaytas immides; isttika deraas gishida. 
Matthew15:37 Asay wurikka miidi kallides; Yesusa kaallizayti asaappe attidayssa laappun leemate kumeth shiishshida. 
Matthew15:38 Midaytikka naytinne maccassay baynda addeti xalla oyddu shii gidida. 
Matthew15:39 Yesusi dereza moyzidaappe guye wogolon gelidi Megidoone geetettizaso bides. 
Matthew16:1 Farsaawetinne Saduqaawe geetettizayti Yesusaakko shiiqidi iza paaccanaas «Saloppe nuna malaata bessa» giidi oychchida. 
Matthew16:2 Izikka isttas, «Omarsa wode saloy zo7ikko, ‹Gadey awattana› geeta." 
Matthew16:3 Wontta bolla, ‹Saloy deexxiko hach iray bukkana› geeta; salo medha xeellidi shaakki ereeta shin ta yaana wode malaata shaakki eranaas dandayekketa." 
Matthew16:4 Hayssi iitanne layma yeletay malaata koyees; gido attiin Yoonaasa malataappe attiin hara malatay izas imettenna» gides. Yesusi istta heen aggidi haraso bides. 
Matthew16:5 Abba pinnida mala Yesusa kaallizayti quma ekki baanayssa balettida. 
Matthew16:6 Yesusikka, «Qopite; Farsaaweta irshofenne Saduqaaweta irshofe naagettite» gides." 
Matthew16:7 Istti qasse ba giddon, «Nuni kath oykkontta gishshas hessa gides» giidi issoy issaara haasayettida." 
Matthew16:8 Yesusikka istta qofaa eridi, «Intteno ammanoy paccidaytoo! Kath oykkontta gishshas aazas issoy issaara haasayetteetii?" 
Matthew16:9 Ichchashu ukeththi ichchashu shii asaas gididi aappun leematey tirpiin intte denththidaakko yuushshi qoppeketii? 
Matthew16:10 Hessaththoka laappun ukeththi oyddu shii asas gididi aappun leematey tirpiin intte denththidaakko wozinan woththibeekketa guussee? 
Matthew16:11 Histtiin ta inttes yootiday kaththa gishshas gidonttayssa ays yuushshi qoppeketii? Ha7ikka Farsaaweta irshofenne Saduqaaweta irshofe naagettite» gides. 
Matthew16:12 Ha7i izi istta qofsizay bukeeso denththanaas gujjiza irsho gishshas gidontta Farsaawetanne Saduqaaweta timirtefe naagettana mala gididayssi isttas gelides. 
Matthew16:13 Yesusi Qisaariya Piliphisiyoose geetettiza biitta gakkida wode bana kaallizayta, «Asay tana Asa Naa oona gizee?» giidi oychchides." 
Matthew16:14 Isttika, «Issi issi asay, ‹Xammaqiza Yohannisa› gees; bagga asay, ‹Eelaasa› gees; baggay, ‹Ermaasa woykko nabetappe issaa gidontta aggenna› gees» gida." 
Matthew16:15 Izikka istta, «Intte tana oona geetii?» gides." 
Matthew16:16 Simoona geetettiza Phexroosi, «Neni Kirstoosa de7o Xoossa Naa gidikkii?» giidi zaarides." 
Matthew16:17 Yesusi, «Yoona naa Simoonaa! Neni anjjettidaade! Nees hayssa qonccisiday salon diza ta Aawappe attiin ashonne suuth gidenna." 
Matthew16:18 Neni zaalla; hayssa zaalla bolla tani ta Woosa Keeththe keexxana; Gaanname pengetikka izo xoonettenna. 
Matthew16:19 Salo Kawoteththa qulpeta ta nees immana; neni biitta bolla hano gizay wuri salonkka hanana. Biitta bolla ne hanoppo gidayssi wurikka salonkka hanenna» gides. 
Matthew16:20 Qasseka izi Kirstoosa gididayssa istti oonaska yootontta mala bana kaallizaytas lo7eththi yootides. 
Matthew16:21 Hessafe haa simmiin Yesusi Yerusalaame baanayssa, heen dere cimatan, qeeseta halaqataninne Muse woga tamaarsizayta kushen waaye ekkanayssa, hayqqanayssanne heedzdzanththo gallas hayqoppe dendanayssa bana kaallizaytas qonccisi yootides." 
Matthew16:22 Phexroosi Yesusa gede issi bagga zaaridi, «Godoo! Hayssi ne bolla gakkofo!» giidi hanqides." 
Matthew16:23 Yesusi Phexroosakko shiiqidi, «Haysso Xala7ee! Hayssafe kichcha! Neni asazaappe attiin Xoossa yo7oy ne wozina giddon baynda gishshas ne taas dhuphe gidadasa» gides." 
Matthew16:24 Qasseka Yesusi bana kaallizaytas, «Tana kaallanaas dosiza asi bana kaddo; ba masqale tookkidi tana kaallo." 
Matthew16:25 Ba shempo ashshana koyza asi wuri dhayssana; gido attiin ba shempo ta gishshas dhayssizaadey ashshana. 
Matthew16:26 Asi alamen dizaaz kumeth haaridi ba shempo dhayssiko iza ay maaddanee? Woykko asi ba shempo gishshas qanxxana dandayzaazi aazee? 
Matthew16:27 Asa Nay ba Aawa bonchchoranne salo kiitanchchatara yaana; issaas issaas iza ooso mala izaade waaga immana. 
Matthew16:28 Ta inttes tumu gays; hayssan eqqida asata giddofe Asa Nay ba kawoteththara yishin beyana gakkanaas hayqoy istta bochchontta asati deettes» gides. 
Matthew17:1 Usuppun gallassafe guye Yesusi Phexroosanne Yaaqoobe qasseka Yaaqoobe isha Yohannisa banara ekkidi isttara xalla dhoqqa zuma bolla kezides. 
Matthew17:2 Istti heen dishin Yesusa medhay laamettides; iza ayfesoy Awa arshe mala poo7ides; iza may7oyka poo7o mala xolqides. 
Matthew17:3 Heerakka Museynne Eelaasi Yesusara haasayshe isttas beettides. 
Matthew17:4 Phexroosi Yesusa, «Godoo! Nu hannin dizaakko nuus lo7okko! Ne shene gidikko issi daase nees, issi daase Muses, issi daase Eelaasas heedzdzu daase ooththonii?» gides." 
Matthew17:5 Izi buro haasayan dishin poo7iza shaaray istta kammides; shaara gaaththara, «Tani izan ufayettiza ta dosiza ta nay hayssa; izi gizayssa siyite» giza qaala giiris Siyite." 
Matthew17:6 Iza kaallizaytikka hessa siyida mala dagammidi biitta bolla gufannida. 
Matthew17:7 Yesusi isttako shiiqidi istta ba kushen bochchidi, «Dendite; babbofte!» gides." 
Matthew17:8 Istti dhoqqu gi xeellishin Yesusappe attiin izara hara as oonakka be7ibeettenna. 
Matthew17:9 Istti zumaza bollafe wodhdhishin Yesusi, «Asa Nay hayqoppe dendana gakkanaas intte beyoyssa oonaska yootontta mala» gi azazides." 
Matthew17:10 Yesusa kaallizayti, «Histtiin Muse woga tamaarsizayti, Eelaasi kasetidi yaana bessees aazas gizoo?» gi oychchida." 
Matthew17:11 Izikka isttas, «Tumakko; Eelaasi yiidi wursika giigsana gi zaarides." 
Matthew17:12 Ta inttes gizay Eelaasi yides; gido attiin asay ba koyida mala iza bolla ooththides attiin iza eribeenna; hessaththoka Asa Nay istta kushen waaye beyana» gides. 
Matthew17:13 He wode Yesusa kaallizayti Yesusi isttas yootizayssi Xammaqiza Yohannisa gishshas gididayssa erida. 
Matthew17:14 Yesusinne iza kaallizayti asaakko simmida mala issi asi Yesusaakko shiiqidi iza sinththan gulbatidi, «Godoo! Ta naa dayssa bollafe yeggiza hargey daro waayisiza gishshas taas maararkkii! Daro wode taman kundees; haaththankka gelees." 
Matthew17:15  
Matthew17:16 Tani naaza nena kaallizaytakko ehadis shin istti iza paththana dandaybeettenna» gides. 
Matthew17:17 Yesusi, «Intteno ammanontta geella yeletatoo! Ayde gakkanaas ta inttenara daanee? Qasse ayde gakkanaas ta inttena dandayanee? Ane naaza haa taakko ehite» gides." 
Matthew17:18 Hessafe guye Yesusi daydanththaza seeridi naazappe kessides; naazikka he saateppe simmidi paxides. 
Matthew17:19 Yesusa kaallizayti xalala izakko shiiqidi, «Nuni daydanth kessanaas aazas dandaybeekkonii?» giidi oychchida." 
Matthew17:20 Izikka isttas, «Inttes ammanoy pace gidida gishshas dandaybeekketa; ta inttes tumu gays; qeeri gaashe ayfe mala ammanoy intte bolla dizaakko hayssa zumaa, ‹Hayssafe dendada gede ba!› intte gidaakko izi inttes baana. Inttena xoonanay deenna." 
Matthew17:21 Hayssa malay gidikko xoomaninne woosan attiin haran kezenna» gides. 
Matthew17:22 Istti Galilan issife dishin Yesusi isttas, «Tana Asa Naa asas aaththi immana." 
Matthew17:23 Isttika iza wodhana; izikka heedzdzanththo gallas dendana» giin iza kaallizayti keehi mishettida. 
Matthew17:24 Yesusinne iza kaallizayti Qifirnahoome geetettizaso gakkidaappe guye Xoossa Keeththa giira ekkizayti Phexroosakko shiiqidi, «Intte astamaarey Xoossa Keeththa giiraa nam7u dinaareza ays qanxxennee?» gida." 
Matthew17:25 Izikka isttas, «Qanxxees» gides. Phexroosi soo gelida mala Yesusi kasetidi, «Simoona dere kawoti giira gidiin woykko qaraxa gidiin ba naytappe ekkizoyee? Haratappe ekkiza misatizee?» gides." 
Matthew17:26 Phexroosikka, «Haratappe ekkeettes» gides. Yesusi, «Histtiko nayta bolla acoy baa guussakaa!" 
Matthew17:27 Histtikokka istta nu dhupheththontta mala ne mole oykkiza gite ekka baada abban yegga; koyro oykkida moleza doona pooqqada ne demmida miishshaa ekkada ta sunththaranne ne sunththara giira qanxxa» gides. 
Matthew18:1 He wode Yesusa kaallizayti izakko shiiqidi, «Salo Kawoteththan nu garsan ubbaafe aadhdhanaadey oonee?» gi oychchida." 
Matthew18:2 Yesusi issi naa xeygi ehidi istta giddon essidi, «Ta inttes tumu gays; intte simmontta ixxikonne guuththa nayta mala hanontta ixxiko mulekka Salo Kawoteth gelekketa." 
Matthew18:3  
Matthew18:4 Hessa gishshas ha naaza mala bana ziqqisizaadey Salo Kawoteththan ubbaafe aadhdhana. 
Matthew18:5 Hayssa mala guuththa naa ta sunththan ekkizaadey tana ekkees. 
Matthew18:6 «Gido attiin tana ammaniza guuththatappe issaade dhupheththizay deexo woxa shuchchi iza qoodhen qashettiin abba ciimman yegettidi mitettiko izas lo7o gidana. 
Matthew18:7 Hanna alameya as dhuphana gaaso gidida gishshas izis aayye ana! Dhuphey yuus aggenna shin dhuphezas gaaso gidizaades aayye ana! 
Matthew18:8 «Ne kushey woykko ne tohoy nena dhuphanaas gaaso gidikko neeppe qanxxa digga! Neni nam7u kushera woykko nam7u tohora gede mernaa taman yegettanaappe wobbe woykko toho sila gidada hee gede de7oy dizaso geloy nees lo7ana. 
Matthew18:9 Hessaththoka ne ayfey nees dhuphe gidikko neeppe kessa yegga! Nam7u ayfera gede Gaanname taman ne yegettanaappe issi ayfera de7oy dizaso ne gelizayssi nees lo7o. 
Matthew18:10 «Hayta guuththata giddofe issineyokka intte kadhontta mala naagettite! Ta inttes tumu gays; salon diza istta kiitanchchati salon ta Aawa ayfeso ubbaa gallas xeelleettes. 
Matthew18:11 Asa Nay dhaydayta ashshanaas yides. 
Matthew18:12 «Ane taas yootite, issaades xeetu dorsi diikko qasse isttafe issina dhaykko, hankko uddufun tammanne uddufunata zuma bolla yeggidi dhaydaaro koyana bi erennee?" 
Matthew18:13 Ta inttes tumu gays; hankko dhayontta attida uddufun tammanne uddufun dorsatappe aaththidi beettida dorsayn ufayettees. 
Matthew18:14 Hessaththoka ha guuththata giddofe issoy dhayana mala salon diza intte aawaa shene gidenna. 
Matthew18:15 «Ne ishay nena qohikko izakko baada iza xalala nenara ekkada iza mooro izas yoota; izi ne gizaa siyikko ne ishaa ne as histtaasa. 
Matthew18:16 Izi ne gizayssa siyontta ixxiko yo7oy wuri nam7u markkan woykko heedzdzu markkan ladhdhiza gishshas issaade woykko nam7u as nenara ekka baada iza haasayssa. 
Matthew18:17 Izi isttaka siyontta ixxiko Woosa Keeththas yoota; Woosa Keeththayokka siyontta ixxiko izaade ne ammanonttaade malanne yootiin simmontta iita asa mala qooda. 
Matthew18:18 «Ta inttes tumu gays; biitta bolla intte qachchiday wuri salonkka qashettidaa gidana; biitta bolla intte birshidaazi salonkka birshettidayssa gidana. 
Matthew18:19 Qasseka ta inttes tumu gays; biitta bolla intte nam7u gididi ay miishshika issife dosan intte oychchiko salon diza ta Aaway inttes immana. 
Matthew18:20 Nam7u woykko heedzdzu gididi ta sunththan intte shiiqizason heen intte giddon ta daana» gides. 
Matthew18:21 He wode Phexroosi Yesusaakko shiiqidi, «Godoo! Ta ishay tana qohikko ta izas aappunto atto goo? Laappunto atto goo?» gides." 
Matthew18:22 Yesusikka izas zaaridi, «Laappun tammuto laappun attiin laappunto xalla ga giikke;" 
Matthew18:23 «Hessa gishshas Salo Kawoteththi ba ashkarata bolla diza miishshe shiishshana koyida kawo misatawus. 
Matthew18:24 Miishshaa qooda oykkida mala iza ashkaratappe daro miloone bira acoy iza bolla dizaade ekki yida. 
Matthew18:25 Ashkarazikka ba bolla diza acoza qanxxoy xoonida gishshas izikka iza machchiyakka iza naytinne izas dizaazi wuri bayzettidi miishshay qanxxettana mala iza goday iza azazides.
