Matthew18:26 He wode ashkarazi godaza toho bolla kundidi, ‹Tani ta bolla diza acoza wursa nees qanxxana gakkanaas taas guuththa wode immarkkii!› giidi woossides." 
Matthew18:27 Iza godaykka izas mishettidi iza acoza ubbaa maaridi yeddides. 
Matthew18:28 «He ashkarazikka ba godaa achchafe kezida mala guuththa acoy iza bolla diza ba lagge demmidinne, ‹Ne bolla diza ta miishshayo ha7i hannin qanxxa› giidi cuulli oykkides." 
Matthew18:29 He iza lagge ashkaray, ‹Taas guuththa wode immarkkii! Ta nees qanxxana› giidi iza toho bolla kundidi woossides." 
Matthew18:30 «Gido attiin izas guuththa wode immanaas koyontta ixxidi iza laggezi ba bolla diza acoza qanxxana gakkanaas qasho keeththan yeggides. 
Matthew18:31 Izi hessa ooththishin be7ida asaynne hankko iza lagge ashkarati daro mishettida. Biidikka hanidayssa ubbaa ba godaas yootida. 
Matthew18:32 «He wode godazi he ashkaraa xeygisi ehidi, haysso nenoo! Iitazoo, ne tana woossiin ne bolla diza acoza ta nees aggadisi shin ta nena maarida mala nenikka ne laggeza maaranaas bessennee?" 
Matthew18:33  
Matthew18:34 giidi iza bolla diza acoza izi ubbaa qanxxana gakkanaas qachchana mala qachchizaytas aaththi immides. 
Matthew18:35 Hessa gishshas intte issoy issaa wozinappe maarontta aggiko salon diza ta Aawaykka inttena maarenna» gides. 
Matthew19:1 Yesusi yooti wursidaappe guye Galila aggidi Yordaanoose pinththan diza Yuhuda awuraajja bides. 
Matthew19:2 Daro derey iza heen kaalliin izikka harganchchata paththides. 
Matthew19:3 Farsaaweti iza paaccanaas izakko shiiqidi ay gaasonkka, «Asi ba machcho anjji yeddana bessizee?» gi oychchida." 
Matthew19:4 Izikka isttas, «Xoossi koyroppe maccanne adde medhdhidayssa nababibeekketii? gides." 
Matthew19:5 Qasseka, ‹Asi ba aawaanne ba aayo aggidi ba machchira issife gidees. Nam7ayka issi asho gideettes› geetettidayssi hayssa gaason gidennee? gides." 
Matthew19:6 Nam7ay issi asho attiin sinththafe nam7u gidettenna. Hessa gishshas Xoossi gaththi waaxidayssa asi shaakkofo» gides. 
Matthew19:7 Isttika izas, «Histtiin Musey, ‹Asi ba machcho anjji yeddida anjjo waraqata izis immi yeddo› giidi aazas azazidee?» gida." 
Matthew19:8 Yesusikka isttas, «Musey intte wozina muumeteth be7idi machcheta intte anjjana mala piqaade inttes immides attiin koyroppe hessa mala gidenna." 
Matthew19:9 «Ta inttes tumu gays; ba azinappe harara laymatontta dishin ba machcho anjji yeddida hara machcho ekkizaadey wuri laymatees. Anjjettidaarokka ekkizaadey izira laymatees» gides. 
Matthew19:10 Yesusa kaallizayti izas, «Machchi wogaynne azina wogay hayssa mala gidikko machcho ekkontta agoy lo7o» gida." 
Matthew19:11 Gido attiin Yesusi isttas, «Issi issi dumma imotay diza asatappe attiin hayssa timirteza oonikka ekkanaas dandayenna." 
Matthew19:12 Gaasoykka issi issi asay ba aayi uloppe yelettishe shuufa gidi yelettees; issi issi asay asa kushen qaaratettidi gundulees; issi issi asay Salo Kawoteththas giidi bana barkka gundula ooththiza asikka dees. Hayssa ekkanaas dandayzaadey ekko» gides. 
Matthew19:13 He wode Yesusi istta bolla ba kushe woththidi woossana mala guuththa nayta izakko ekki ehida; gido attiin iza kaallizayti nayta ehida asata bolla hanqettida. 
Matthew19:14 Yesusi, «Nayti haa taakko yetto; diggofte; Salo Kawoteththi haytantta malassa!» gides." 
Matthew19:15 Ba kushe nayta bolla woththidi anjjidaappe guye heeppe dendi bides. 
Matthew19:16 Hessafe guye issaadey Yesusaakko shiiqidi, «Astamaaree! Mernaa de7o demmanaas tani lo7o ooso ay ooththoo?» gi oychchides." 
Matthew19:17 Yesusikka, «Tana aazas lo7o gishshas oychchay? Lo7oy issi Xoossaa xalla; de7oy dizaso ne gelana koykko azazota naaga» gides." 
Matthew19:18 Addezi, «Azazoti awaytee?» giidi oychchides. Yesusikka zaaridi, «As wodhoppa; laymatoppa; kaysotoppa; wordo markkattofa; ne aawaanne ne aayo bonchcha; ne shooro ne mala siiqa» gides." 
Matthew19:19  
Matthew19:20 Naateththazi zaaridi, «Hayssa wursa ta naagadis; haray aazi taas paccidee?» gides." 
Matthew19:21 Yesusikka zaaridi, «Ne mule xillana koykko baada ne haaridaaz ubbaa bayzada miishshaa wursa manqotas imma; neni salon miish demmandasa; hessafe guye simma yaada tana kaalla» gides." 
Matthew19:22 Addezi hessa siyidi izas daro miishshi diza gishshas keehippe mishettishe bides. 
Matthew19:23 Yesusi bana kaallizayta, «Ta inttes tumu gays; dureti Salo Kawoteth gelanayssi daro meto." 
Matthew19:24 Qasseka tani inttes gizay durey Salo Kawoteth gelanayssafe gaamellay narpe lukora aadheththi kawuyana» gides. 
Matthew19:25 Hessa siyidi iza kaallizayti daro qoppidi, «Histtiin ooni attanaas dandayzee?» giidi Yesusa oychchida." 
Matthew19:26 Yesusikka istta xeellidi, «Hayssi asa achchan dandayettenna; Xoossa achchan gidikko wurikka dandayettees» gides." 
Matthew19:27 Phexroosi izas zaaridi, «Nu ubbaaka aggidi nena kaallidos; histtiin ha7i nu ay demmanee?» gides." 
Matthew19:28 Yesusikka isttas, «Ta inttes tumu gays; Asa Nay buro yaana ooraththa alamen ba bonchcho araata bolla uttiza wode intte tana kaallidayti tammanne nam7u araatata bolla uttidi tammanne nam7u Isra7eele nayta bolla pirdana." 
Matthew19:29 Ta sunththaa gishshas giidi ba keeththe, ba ishata, ba michcheta, ba aawa, ba aayonne ba nayta, woykko ba biitta aggiza asi wuri xeetu kushe dakko ekkana; mernaa de7okka laattana." 
Matthew19:30 Gido attiin daro sinththe gidida asati guye gidana; daro guyen diza asati sinththatana. 
Matthew20:1 «Salo Kawoteththi ba woyne atakilte giddon ooththiza oosanchchata qaxxaranaas maaladora kezida issi atakiltey diza gadaade misatawus. 
Matthew20:2 Issi gallassa damoza gidizaaz haasayettidi giigidaappe guye oosanchchata woyne atakilte ooso oyththides. 
Matthew20:3 «Maalado heedzdzu saaten kezidi oosoy baynda mela giyay eqqizason eqqida hara asata demmides. 
Matthew20:4 ‹Intte biidi ta woyne giddon ooththite; ta inttes bessiza miishshe immana› gides. 
Matthew20:5 Isttika bida. Qasseka gallassaafe usuppun saateninne uddufun saate bolla kezidi hara oosanchchata ooson gelththides. 
Matthew20:6 Omarsa wode tammanne issi saate gidishin kezidi coo eqqidayta harata demmidi, ‹Intte kumeththa gallas oosoy baynda aazas hayssan eqqidetii?› gi oychchides." 
Matthew20:7 «Isttika, ‹Nuna oosisiza asi dhayda gishshas eqqidos› gida. Izikka istta, ‹Intteka biidi ta woyne atakilte giddon ooththite› gides." 
Matthew20:8 «Gadey qammishin woyne atakilteza goday oosanchchata alaafezas, ‹Guyeppe yidaytappe doommada koyro yidayta gakkanaas diza oosanchchata ubbaa xeygada istta ooso gate qanxxa› gides." 
Matthew20:9 Tammanne issinththa saate bolla ooson gelidayti yiidi issoy issoy kumeththa gallassa gate ekkida. 
Matthew20:10 «Koyro ooson gelidayti yishe ba wozinara hinkoytappe bollara daro demmana gi qoppishin isttaskka hinkoytara gina immides. 
Matthew20:11 Miishshaa ekkishe qanxxizaade bolla, ‹Hayti wurseththan ooson gelidi issi saate xalla ooththidayti kumeththa gallas ooson daaburdinne awan xuugettidi pe7ida nuussinne isttas wostta issi gina qanxxay?› gida." 
Matthew20:12  
Matthew20:13 «Izikka isttafe issaades, ‹Ta jaalazoo! Nena qohabeekke; issi gallassas gidiza damozan ooththanaas tanara giigabeekkii? Ha7i hey ne gishaa ekkada ba; nees immidayssa mala wurseththan yidayssaska ta immana koyays." 
Matthew20:14  
Matthew20:15 Histtiin ta miishshaan ta dosidaaz ooththanaas dandaykkinaa? Woykko ta kiya gididayssi nena qanaatissizee?› 
Matthew20:16 «Guyen dizayti sinththe, sinththen dizayti guye aadhdhana» gides." 
Matthew20:17 Yesusi Yerusalaame bishe bana kaalliza tammanne nam7ata dumma shaakki ekkidi," 
Matthew20:18 «Hiya nuni Yerusalaame baana goos; Asa Nay qeeseta halaqassinne Muse wogaa tamaarsizaytas aadhdhi imettana; isttika izi hayqqana mala iza bolla pirdana. 
Matthew20:19 Iza bolla qidhi kaa7anaassinne garafana mala, wodhana malakka deretas aaththi immana; heedzdzanththo gallas izikka hayqoppe dendana» gides." 
Matthew20:20 Hessafekka Zabdoosa nayta aaya ba naytara Yesusaakko shiiqada iza sinththan gulbatada Yesusi izis issi miish ooththana mala woossadus. 
Matthew20:21 Izikka izo, «Ay koyay?» gides; izakka, «Hayti ta naa nam7ati ne kawoteththaan issoy ne ushachchara, issoy ne hadirsara uttana mala ooththarkkii!» gadus." 
Matthew20:22 Yesusikka zaaridi, «Intte woossizaaz erekketa; tani uyiza xuu7a intte uyana dandayanee?» gides. Isttika, «Ee dandayoos» gida." 
Matthew20:23 Izikka, «Ta xuu7aappe tumu intte uyanashin ta ushachchaninne ta hadirsan uteththi ta Aaway giigsidaadenttas attiin tani immizaaz gidenna» gides." 
Matthew20:24 Tammati hessa siyidi nam7u ishata bolla hanqettida. 
Matthew20:25 Yesusi istta issi bolla xeygidi, «Ayzaabe halaqati ba haariza dere bolla godatizayssa mala godateththi dizayti wolqqara haarizayssa intte ereeta." 
Matthew20:26 Intte giddon hessa mala hananaas bessenna; inttefe gita gidana koyzaadey inttes ooththizaade gido. 
Matthew20:27 Inttefe bolla gidanaas koyzaadey inttefe gars gido. 
Matthew20:28 Asa Nay asay izas ooththana mala gidontta izi asas ooththanaassinne ba shempo darota gishshas aaththi immanaas yides» gides. 
Matthew20:29 Yesusi bana kaallizaytara Iyarkkofe kezi bishin daro derey iza kaallides. 
Matthew20:30 Heen ayfey qooqida nam7u asati oge doonan utti deettes. Yesusi aadhdhi bizayssa siyidi, «Godoo! Dawite nawu, nuna maara!» giidi waassida." 
Matthew20:31 Derezi, «Hayzite!» giidi hanqides; gido attiin istti darssi waassishe, «Godoo! Dawite nawu, nuna maara!» gida." 
Matthew20:32 Yesusikka eqqi istta xeygidi, «Ta inttes ay ooththana mala koyeetii?» gides." 
Matthew20:33 Isttika, «Nu ayfey xeellana mala koyoos» gida." 
Matthew20:34 Yesusi isttas mishettidi istta ayfetakka ba kushera boshechiin heerakka xeellidi iza kaallida. 
Matthew21:1 Istti Yerusalaame matan Dabrazayte zuma bolla diza Betefaage geetettizaso gakkida mala Yesusi bana kaallizaytappe nam7ata kiittides. 
Matthew21:2 «Hanno intte matan diza gutayo biidi intte hee gakkida mala issi hare dizaara ba gutteyra qashetta dishin intte demmana. Birshidi haa taakko ekki yiite. 
Matthew21:3 Oonikka inttena, ‹Ays hayssaththo ooththeetii?› giikko ‹Goday istta koyees› giite; inttena oychchizaadey heerakka yeddana." 
Matthew21:4 «Hayssika hanizay kase naben Xiyoonis hizgite, ‹Hekko! Ne kawoy ashke gididi hareyonne harey gutteyo toggidi neekko yaana› geetettidayssi polettanaassa» gides." 
Matthew21:5  
Matthew21:6 Iza kaallizayti Yesusi isttas yootida mala ooththida. 
Matthew21:7 Hareyo izi gutteyra ehidi ba may7o istta bolla woththiin izikka hareta toggides. 
Matthew21:8 Deraappe dariza baggay ba may7o oge bolla miccides; bagga asay miththa boncco duuththi duuththi oge bolla aaththi aaththi yeggides. 
Matthew21:9 Izappe sinththara biza dereynne guyera kaalliza dereykka ba qaala dhoqqu histtidi, «Hoosa7inna! Dawite nay galatetto! Godaa sunththan yiday anjjettidaade! Xoossi galatetto!» gida." 
Matthew21:10 Izi Yerusalaame gelida mala katama asay wuri, «Hayssi oonee?» giidi yark yarkides." 
Matthew21:11 Iza kaallidi yida derezikka, «Hayssi Galila giddon diza Naazireteppe yida Nabe Yesusa gidennee?» gides." 
Matthew21:12 Hessafe guye Yesusi Xoossa Keeth gelidi Xoossa Keeththaa kare giddon gaaththan bayzizaytanne shammizayta gooddides. Miish laammizayta xaraphpheezatanne haraphphe bayzizayta oyde shiri shiri yeggidi, « ‹Ta Keeththay Woosa Keeththe geetettees› geetettidi xaafettides; intte qasse bonqqizayta gongolo histtideta» gides." 
Matthew21:13  
Matthew21:14 Ayfe qooqetanne tohoy silida asata Yesusaakko Xoossa Keeththe ehida. Izikka istta paththides. 
Matthew21:15 Gido attiin qeeseta halaqatinne Muse wogaa tamaarsizayti izi ooththida malaatata be7idayssaninne guuththa nayti, «Woze kawo, galatay Dawite naas gido!» giidi waassizayssa siyida gishshas daro hanqettida." 
Matthew21:16 Isttika Yesusa, «Hayti nayti gizayssa siyay?» gida; Yesusikka isttas, «Ee siyadis; nayta doonaninne dhammiza qeeri nayta doonan tani galata giigsadis gizaso mulerakka nababi erekketii?» gides." 
Matthew21:17 Istta yeggi aggidi he katamaappe kezidi Bitaaniya geetettizaso biidi heen aqides. 
Matthew21:18 Yesusi wonteththa gallas maalado guye katama simmishin iza gafisides. 
Matthew21:19 Oge matan issi balase geetettiza mith be7idi gede izikko shiiqishin hayth xalalappe attiin ayfey bayndayssa be7idi, «Hiyappe guye ne bolla ayfey dooppo!» giin balase miththaya heerakka meladus." 
Matthew21:20 Yesusa kaallizayti hessa be7idinne malalettidi, «Hanna balaseya waanada heerakka meladee?» gida." 
Matthew21:21 Yesusikka istta, «Ta inttes tumu gays; inttes ammanoy diikkonne intte sidhontta aggiko balase miththay bolla hanidayssa mala xalala gidontta hayssa zumaa, ‹Hayssafe dhoqallettada duge abban gela› intte gidaakkoka izi gelana» gides." 
Matthew21:22 Inttes ammanoy diikko intte woosan oychchida miish ubbaaka ekkana. 
Matthew21:23 Yesusi Xoossa Keeththe gelidi tamaarsishin qeeseta halaqatinne dere cimati izakko shiiqidi, «Hayssa wursa oona shenen ooththay? Hayssa ooththanaas shene nees ooni immidee?» giidi iza oychchida." 
Matthew21:24 Yesusikka isttas zaaridi, «Tanikka inttena issi miish oychchays; intte taas zaarikko tanikka hayta oona shenen ooththizaakko inttes yootana." 
Matthew21:25 Yohannisa xinqatay awappe yidee? Saloppe yideyee? Asappee?» gides. Isttika, «Nu, ‹Saloppe yides› giikko, ‹Histtiin aazas ammanibeekketii?› gaana giidi ba giddon issoy issoy issaara zorettida." 
Matthew21:26 Qasse nu, ‹Asappe› giikko, asay wurikka Yohannisa nabe giidi ammaniza gishshas nu babboos» gida." 
Matthew21:27 Hessa gishshas Yesusas, «Nu erokko» giidi zaarida. Izikka isttas, «Hayta ta oona shenen ooththizaakko tanikka inttes yootikke» gides." 
Matthew21:28 Yesusi istta, «Inttes ay misatizee? Nam7u attuma nay diza issaadey dees; izikka koyro naazakko biidi, ‹Ta naazoo! Hach gede woyne miththaso baada ooththa› gides." 
Matthew21:29 Naazi qasse, ‹Biikke!› giidinne guyeppe muuzottidi bides." 
Matthew21:30 «Nam7anththo naazakka kaseyssaththoka, ‹Ba!› giin naazi, ‹Ero!› giidi bontta aggaagides." 
Matthew21:31 Hayta nam7atappe aawaa shene poliday awayssee?» giidi oychchides. Isttika, «Koyro naaza!» gida. Yesusikka isttas, «Ta inttes tumu gays; qaraxa qanxxisizaytinne laymatizayti Salo Kawoteth inttefe sinththan gelana." 
Matthew21:32 «Xammaqiza Yohannisi inttena xilloteththa oge bessanaas intteko yides shin intte izi gizayssa ammanibeekketa; gido attiin qaraxa qanxxisizaytinne laymatizayti gidikko ammanida; izi hanidayssa intte beyi simmidikka maaroteththan gelidi ammanibeekketa» gides. 
Matthew21:33 «Hara leemisokka siyite; woyne miththi tokkizasohoy dizaadey he woynezas birda yuushshi aaththidi woyneza ayfe gum7anaas olla bookkides. Woyneza naaganaas miththa bolla shakko giigsides. Hessafe guye gadeza woyne miththara goyizaytas kira immidi hara dere bides. 
Matthew21:34 Boney gakkishin woyne miththaza ayfe ekkanaas ba ashkarata gadeza goyizaytakko yeddides. 
Matthew21:35 Gadeza goyizayti ashkarata oykkidi issaa wodhida; issaa qasse shuchchan caddida. 
Matthew21:36 Gadaa goday kaseytappe aadhdhiza hara ashkarata yeddides. Goyizayti ha7ikka kaseyta bolla ooththidayssa malakka istta bollaka polida. 
Matthew21:37 Wurseththan oone erizay, ‹Istti iza bonchchanaakko› giidi ba naa aaththi yeddides." 
Matthew21:38 Gido attiin gadaa goyizayti naaza be7ida mala, ‹Hayssi iza laattanayssako! Ane haa yiite; iza wodhidi gadaa laattoos› gida." 
Matthew21:39 Naaza oykkidi woyney tokettidasozappe kare kessidi wodhida. 
Matthew21:40 «Ero! Woyneza goday yiza wode he gadaa goyiza asata wosttana inttes misatizee?» gides. 
Matthew21:41 Isttika, «Heyta iitata daro waayisi wodhidi woyney tokettiza gadaappe bessiza woyne ayfe wodera izas immiza hara goshshanchchatas gadaa kirasana» gi izas zaarida." 
Matthew21:42 Yesusikka isttas, «Geeshsha Maxaafan, ‹Gimbe keexxizayti iita giidi wora yeggida shuchchay keeththas gula bolla wodhdhiza shuch gidides; Xoossi hayssa ooththides; iza oosoykka nu ayfes malalisizaaz› geetetti xaafettidayssa nababibeekketii?" 
Matthew21:43 «Hessa gishshas ta inttes Xoossa Kawoteththi inttefe ekettada ayfe ayfiza deretas imettana. 
Matthew21:44 Hayssa shuchchaa bolla kundizay meqqana; shuchchay iza bolla wodhizaadeyka liiqana» gides. 
Matthew21:45 Qeeseta halaqatinne Farsaaweti iza leemisoy istta gishshas gididayssa erida. 
Matthew21:46 Gido attiin istti iza oykki qachchontta mala asay Yesusa nabe mala xeelliza gishshas babbida. 
Matthew22:1 Qasseka Yesusi hara leemiso," 
Matthew22:2 «Salo Kawoteththi ba naas sarge giigsida issi kawo misatawus. 
Matthew22:3 Kawoykka diggisas yootidayta xeyganaas ba ashkarata yeddides; xeygettidaytikka, ‹Nu bookko› gida." 
Matthew22:4 «Qasseka hara ashkarata, ‹Kase isttas yootidayta hekko ta sanga booratanne modhdhida meheta shukkada diggisa giigsadis; wurikka giigettida gishshas sargeso haa yiite!› giidi yootite." 
Matthew22:5 Xeygettidayti gidikko iza xeyssaa wudan yeggontta aggidi issoy ba goshshasoho, issoy ba zal7eso bides." 
Matthew22:6 Hankko attidayta ashkarati oykkidi daro waayisidi wodhida. 
Matthew22:7 «Kawoykka hanqettidi wottadarata yeddidi ashkaraza wodhidayta dhayssides; istta katamaa xuuggides. 
Matthew22:8 Ba ashkaratakka, ‹Sargeza diggisay giigides; gido attiin sargezaso xeygettidayti sarges bessizayta gidibeettenna." 
Matthew22:9 Gede oge bolla kezidi intte demmida as ubbaa haa diggisaso xeygite› gides. 
Matthew22:10 Ashkaratikka oge bolla kezidi ba demmidayta lo7otakka iitatakka ubbaa shiishshidi sargezaso imath kunththida. 
Matthew22:11 «Kawoykka xeygettida imaththaa beyanaas soo geliza wode sarge may7o may7ontta as demmides. 
Matthew22:12 ‹Haysso! Sarge may7o may7ontta waanada haa gelanaas dandayadii?› gi oychchiin addezas zaarana qaalay dhaydes. 
Matthew22:13 Kawoykka ba ashkarata, ‹Hayssa addeza tohonne kushe shiishshi qachchidi heen karen diza dhumaan kessi olite; heen yeehonne achcha garccech gidana.›" 
Matthew22:14 «Xeygettidayti darota; doorettidayti gidikko guuththata» gi yootides. 
Matthew22:15 Hessafe guye Farsaaweti kezi bishe, «Iza doonappe bala qaala wostti demmi oykkinoo?» giidi zorettida." 
Matthew22:16 Bana kaallizayta Herdoosa asatara izakko kiittidi, «Astamaaree! Neni tumanchchanne Xoossa oge tumappe tamaarsizaade gididayssanne oonaska dumma maado ooththontta ubbaaka issi mala ne xeellizayssa nu eroos." 
Matthew22:17 Nees ay misatizaakko ane nuus yoota; Qeesaares giira qanxxanaas bessizee? Bessennee?» gida. 
Matthew22:18 Yesusikka istta gene qofaa eridi, «Intteno qoodheppe qommon hanizaytoo! Tana yo7on baleththi oykkanaas aazas koyeetii?" 
Matthew22:19 Intte giira qanxxiza miishshaa ane tana bessite» giin isttika issi dinaare geetettiza miish izas ehida. 
Matthew22:20 Izikka, «Hayssa miishshaa bolla diza misleynne xaafettida sunththay oonayssee?» gides." 
Matthew22:21 Isttika izas, «Qeesaareyssa» gida. Izikka isttas zaaridi, «Qeesaareyssa Qeesaares, Xoossayssa Xoossas immite» gides." 
Matthew22:22 Hessa siyidi istti malalettidi iza aggi bida. 
Matthew22:23 «Hayqqidaytas dendoy baa» giidi ammaniza Saduqaaweti he gallas Yesusaakko shiiqidi," 
Matthew22:24 «Astamaaree! Musey, ‹Issaadey machcho ekkidi naa yelontta hayqqiko iza ishay hayqqidayssa machcho ekkidi ba ishaa laattiza naa izas yelo› gides." 
Matthew22:25 Nu achchan laappun ishati deettes shin koyro ishay machcho ekkidi naa yelontta hayqqida gishshas kaalo ishay iza machcheyo ekkides. 
Matthew22:26 Nam7anththo ishaykka hayqqida ishaaththo naa yelontta hayqqides; hessaththoka hanishin maccassaya laappunththa ishaa geladus. 
Matthew22:27 Wurseththan maccassaya hayqqadus. 
Matthew22:28 Hessa gishshas laappunati wurikka izo ekkidashin hayqoppe denththa gallas maccassaya laappunatappe awayssa machcho gidanee?» gida. 
Matthew22:29 Yesusikka isttas zaaridi, «Geeshsha Maxaafatanne Xoossa wolqqa intte erontta gishshas baletteeta." 
Matthew22:30 Hayqoppe dendidaappe guye asay salo kiitanchchata mala gidana attiin eketettenanne gelettenna. 
Matthew22:31 Hayqqidayta denththa gishshas gidikko Xoossi, ‹Tani Abrahaame Xoossa, Yisaaqa Xoossa, Yaaqoobe Xoossa› giidi inttes yootoyssa nababibeekketii? Xoossi paxata Xoossa attiin hayqeththata Xoos gidenna» gides." 
Matthew22:32  
Matthew22:33 Derezikka hessa siyidi iza timirtezan malalettides. 
Matthew22:34 Yesusi Saduqaaweta co7u histtidayssa siyidi Farsaaweti issi bolla shiiqettida. 
Matthew22:35 Istta giddofe issi Muse wogaa lo7eththi erizaadey Yesusa paaccanaas koyidi, «Astamaaree! Muse wogata giddon ubbaafe aadhdhizay awayssee?» giidi oychchides." 
Matthew22:36  
Matthew22:37 Izikka zaaridi, « ‹Ne Godaa Xoossa ne kumeththa wozinappe, ne kumeththa shemppofe, ne kumeththa qofappe dosa.›" 
Matthew22:38 Hayssi koyronne ubbaafe aadhdhiza azazo. 
Matthew22:39 Nam7anththoyka iza misatees, hessika, ‹Ne shooro ne hu7e mala dosa› gizayssa." 
Matthew22:40 Muse wogaynne nabeta timirtey wurikka hayta nam7u azazotan qashettees» gides. 
Matthew22:41 Farsaaweti issi bolla shiiqetti dishin Yesusi istta," 
Matthew22:42 «Kirstoosa gishshas intte ay geetii? Izi oona naa?» gi oychchides; isttika izas zaaridi, «Izi Dawite naa» gida." 
Matthew22:43 Izikka isttas, «Histtiin Dawiti Xillo Ayana wolqqan, ‹Xoossay ta Godaa› giidi waani xeygidee? ‹Ta ne morkketa ne toho garsan gulbatissana gakkanaas ne ta ushachchan utta!› gides." 
Matthew22:44  
Matthew22:45 Hessa gishshas Dawiti iza, ‹Ta Godaa› giidi xeygikko waanidi izas naa gidana dandayzee?» gides." 
Matthew22:46 Izas issi qaala zaarana dandayda asi woykko he gallassafe simmiin iza oysho oychchana xalida asi oonikka beettibeenna. 
Matthew23:1 Qasseka Yesusi derezassinne bana kaallizaytas," 
Matthew23:2 «Muse wogaa tamaarsizaytinne Farsaaweti Muse wombora bolla uttida. 
Matthew23:3 Hessa gishshas istti inttes yootizayssa ubbaa ooththitenne naagite; gido attiin istti doonan haasayzayssa mala ooson bessontta gishshas intte istta ooso kaallofte. 
Matthew23:4 «Hessaththoka asi tookkanaas dandayontta deexo tooho qachchidi asa hashe bolla woththeettes; baas gidikko biradhdhe xeerankka bochchettenna. 
Matthew23:5 Istta ooso ubbaa asi beyana mala ooththeettes; ba ashenkitaabe Geeshsha Maxaafa giddofe xaafi ekkida issi issi xiqiseta kitabe sikkidi liiphe bolla woykko kushen qachchizaaz ooththeettes. Ba may7o macara adusseettes. 
Matthew23:6 Diggisay dizason bonchchoso Ayhuda Woosa Keeththankka sinththara uttana doseettes. 
Matthew23:7 Hessaththoka giya giddon saro geetettanaassinne asay istta, ‹Astamaaree!› gaana mala koyeettes." 
Matthew23:8 «Intte gidikko, ‹Astamaare› geetetti xeygettofte; intte Astamaarey issaa xalala gidishin intte wurikka issoy issaas ishantta." 
Matthew23:9 Salon inttes issi Aaway xalala diza gishshas biitta bolla oonakka, ‹Aawawu!› gi xeygopite." 
Matthew23:10 Intte astamaarey issi Kirstoosa xalla gidida gishshas intte, ‹Astamaarentoo!› geetettofte." 
Matthew23:11 Intte giddon ubbaafe aadhdhizaadey inttes ooththizaade gidana. 
Matthew23:12 Bana dhoqqisizaadey kawuyana; bana kawushshizaadey bonchchettana. 
Matthew23:13 «Intteno qoodheppe qommon hanizaytoo, Muse wogaa tamaarsizaytoo! Intteno Farsaawetoo! Asay Xoossa kawoteth gelontta mala asa bolla intte penge gordiza gishshas inttena aayye ana! Intte inttes gelekketanne gelanaas koyzaytakka gelththeketa." 
Matthew23:14 Intteno qoodheppe qommon hanizaytoo! Muse wogaa tamaarsizaytoo, qasseka Farsaawetoo! Inttes aayye ana! Azinay baynda maccassata keeth kallosishe asa ayfe sinththan adussa woosa intte woossiza gishshas intte iita pirda pirdettana." 
Matthew23:15 «Intteno qoodheppe qommon hanizaytoo! Muse wogaa tamaarsizaytoo! Qasseka Farsaawetoo! Issi as Ayhuda ammanon gelththanaas abba bollaranne biitta bollara yuuyi daaburdinne ammanththida asaa inttefe nam7u kushe aaththidi Gaanname naa intte kessiza gishshas inttes aayye ana! 
Matthew23:16 «Intteno Inttes qooqi uttidi harata kaaleththizaytoo! Inttes aayye ana! ‹Oonikka Xoossa Keeththan caaqqiko aykkoy baa› gido attiin, ‹Xoossa Keeththa giddon diza worqqan caaqqiko caaqo gomey gakkana› geeta." 
Matthew23:17 Intteno qooqidaytoo! Balettidaytoo! Worqqafenne worqqa dummasida Xoossa Keeththafe awayssi aadhdhizee? 
Matthew23:18 Hessaththoka, ‹Oonikka yarsho yarshizaso bolla caaqqiko aykkoy baa; gido attiin yarshizason diza yarshoza bolla caaqqiko caaqoy gomees› geeta." 
Matthew23:19 Intteno qooqetoo! Yarshofenne yarsho shiishshizasoppe awayssee aadhdhizay? 
Matthew23:20 Hessa gishshas yarsho shiishshizaso bolla caaqqizaadey yarshosoza bollanne yarshizaso bolla diza ubba miishshan caaqqees. 
Matthew23:21 Hessaththoka Xoossa Keeththaza bolla caaqqiday Xoossa Keeththaninne iza giddon aqizayssan caaqqees. 
Matthew23:22 Salon caaqizaadeyka Xoossa alganinne alga bolla uttidayssan caaqqees. 
Matthew23:23 «Intteno qoodheppe qommon hanizaytoo, Muse wogaa tamaarsizaytoo, Farsaawetoo! Inttes aayye ana! Aasutappe, aanugappenne katkal7afe tammaafe issino immeeta; gido attiin wogatappe waannatizayta heytikka tuma pirda, maaroteththinne ammaneteth gidikko kadhideta. Heyta aggontta dishe haytantta intte ooththanaas inttes bessees shin aggideta." 
Matthew23:24 Intteno qooqi uttidi kaaleththizaytoo! Uu7e gaccidi uyeeta shin gaamella muume mitteeta! 
Matthew23:25 «Intteno qoodheppe qommon hanizaytoo, Muse wogaa tamaarsizaytonne Farsaawetoo! Inttes aayye ana! Xuu7assinne keres bolla bagga qucceeta shin iza giddon dizayssa intte bonqqaninne uuzeteththan shiishshideta." 
Matthew23:26 Nenoo qooqe Farsaawezoo! Koyrottada xuu7assinne keres giddo bagga geeshsha! Hessafe guye kare baggay geesh gidana. 
Matthew23:27 «Intteno qoodheppe qommon hanizaytoo, Muse wogaa tamaarsizaytoo, qasse Farsaawetoo! Bolla baggay nooran meeshettidi lo7izayti giddoy gidikko hayqqidayta meqeththinne daro tunateththan kumida duufota misatiza gishshas inttes aayye ana!" 
Matthew23:28 Intteka bolla baggara asas xillo asata misateeta; intte giddoy gidikko cimoninne iitateththan kumides. 
Matthew23:29 «Intteno doonan cimmizaytoo! Muse wogaa astamaaretoo, qasseka Farsaawetoo! Inttes aayye ana! Nabeta duufo lo7eththizaytoo! Xillo asata duufo hawultera giigsizaytoo!" 
Matthew23:30 Nu aawati nabeta wodhiza wode nu dizaakko isttara zuppetokko shin," 
Matthew23:31 intte nabeta wodhida asata nayta gididayssa intte doonara intterkka intte intte bolla markkatteeta. 
Matthew23:32 Histtiko oosettidi polettontta oge bolla diza intte aawata ooso polite. 
Matthew23:33 «Intteno dukkiza iita shooshsha naytoo! Gaanname tama pirdafe intte waani attanee? 
Matthew23:34 Hessa gishshas nabetanne eranchchata astamaaretakka ta inttes yeddana. Intte istta giddofe issi issi asata wodhana. Baggayta intte kaqqana; baggayta intte Ayhuda Woosa Keeththan garafananne he katamappe hara katama intte gooddana. 
Matthew23:35 Hessa gishshas xillo Aabeele suuththaafe haa simmiin Xoossa Keeththaninne yarsho yarshizaso giddon intte wodhida Baarakiyo naa Zakaraasa suuththaa gakkanaas biitta bolla gukkida xillota suuththa ubbaas intte oyshettana. 
Matthew23:36 Ta inttes tumu gays; kase aadhdhida yo7o ubbaas hayssi ha yeletay oyshettana. 
Matthew23:37 «Hanne Yerusalaamee! Nabeta wodhizaaree! Neekko kiitettidayta shuchchara caddizaaree! Hanne Yerusalaame, kutto aaya ba ciyeta ba qefe giddo shiishshiza mala ta ne nayta shiishshanaas aappun wode koyadinaashin ne gidikko koyabeekka." 
Matthew23:38 Hekko intte keeththi kays gidi attana. 
Matthew23:39 Ta inttes tumu gays; intte Godaa sunththan yizaadey anjjettidaade gaana wodey gakkanaas nam7anththo tana beyekketa» gides. 
Matthew24:1 Yesusi Xoossa Keeththafe kezi bishin iza kaallizayti Xoossa Keeththazi shuchchan keexettidayssa bessana koyidi Yesusaakko shiiqida. 
Matthew24:2 Izikka isttas, «Hayssa ubbaa xeelleetii? Ta inttes tumu gays; hayssi intte be7iza issoy issaa bolla diza shuchchay laalettontta issi shuchchika hayssaththo deenna» gides." 
Matthew24:3 Izi Dabrazayte geetettiza zumaa bolla utti dishin iza kaallizayti xalala izakko shiiqidi, «Ane nuus yoota; hayssi ne gizayssi ayde hananee? Ne yuussassinne wode wurseththas malatay aazee?» gi oychchida." 
Matthew24:4 Yesusikka zaaridi, «Oonikka inttena baleththontta mala naagettite." 
Matthew24:5 Buro daroti, ‹Ta Kirstoosa› gishe ta sunththan yaana; darotakka baleththana." 
Matthew24:6 Olanne ola gishshas haasayettiza wore intte siyana. Ha yo7oti wurikka wolqqara polettana shin wurseththi buro gidida gishshas intte hayssan dagammontta mala naagettite. 
Matthew24:7 Derey dere bolla, kawoy kawo bolla dendana; dumma dumma deren koshaynne biitta qaaththi hanana." 
Matthew24:8 Hessi wurikka miixas leesso mala. 
Matthew24:9 He wode inttena waayes aaththi immana; inttena wodhana; ta sunththaa gaason dere ubbaan intte ixettidayta gidana. 
Matthew24:10 «He wode daro asay dhuphettana; issoy issaa aaththi immananne ba giddon ixettana. 
Matthew24:11 Daro wordo nabeti dendananne darota baleththana. 
Matthew24:12 Iitateththi dariza gishshas darotappe siiqoy irxxana. 
Matthew24:13 Wurseth gakkanaas minnidaadey attana. 
Matthew24:14 Dere ubbaas markka gidana mala hayssi kawoteththa Mishiraachcho qaalay kumeththa alamen yootettana; hessafe guye wurseththi yaana. 
Matthew24:15 «Hessa gishshas nabe Daaneelan yootettidayssa mala, ‹Harassiza tunateththi› anjjettidason eqqidayssa intte be7iza wode nababizaadey wozinan woththo;" 
Matthew24:16 He wode Yuhudan dizayti pude zuma bolla gangetto. 
Matthew24:17 Keeththa kaara bolla dizaadey oonikka ba miish keeththaafe kessana giidi duge wodhdhofo. 
Matthew24:18 Gade giddon dizaadey oonikka ba may7o ekkana giidi soo simmofo. 
Matthew24:19 He gallassatan qanththara diza maccassatassinne naa dhanththiza aayetas aayye ana! 
Matthew24:20 Hessa gishshas intte gangoy balgo woykko Sambata gallas gidontta mala woossite. 
Matthew24:21 He wode alamey medhettoosoppe hach gakkanaas hani erontta miishshi sinththafekka iza misatizay baynda wolqqama metoy hanana. 
Matthew24:22 He gallassati qaammonttaako asho may7ida asi wuri attenna shin doorettidayta gishshas he gallassati qaammana. 
Matthew24:23 «He wode oonikka, ‹Hekko Kirstoosi hayssan dees!› Woykko, ‹Hessan dees› gizaade ammanopite." 
Matthew24:24 Wordo Kirstoosinne wordo nabeti buro dendidi isttas dandayettiko doorettidayta baleththanaas giidi wolqqama malaatatanne kase oosetti erontta miish ooththana. 
Matthew24:25 «Hekko hayssa ta inttes kaseta yootays. 
Matthew24:26 Hessa gishshas, ‹Hekko hirki bazzon dees› giidi inttes yootikko hee kezopite; ‹Hekko ilpinnen dees› giikko ammanopite." 
Matthew24:27 Wolqqanththi arshey mokkizasora wolqqamidi arshey wullizaso gakkanaas poo7izayssa mala Asa Naa yuussayka hessaththo hanana. 
Matthew24:28 Ahay dizaso ankkoy shiiqees. 
Matthew24:29 «Heerakka he iita meto gallassatappe guye arshey dhumana; aginay ba poo7o diggana; xoolintteti saloppe qoqofettana; salo wolqqamatikka qaaxxana. 
Matthew24:30 «He wode asa naa malatay salo bolla beettana. Biitta bolla diza derey wuri yeekkana; Asa Naykka salo shaara bolla daro wolqqaranne gita bonchchora yishin asay beyana. 
Matthew24:31 Kiitanchchatakka daro wolqqama xurumba giirissara yeddana. Isttika doorettidayta oyddu gulappe salos ha gaxappe he gaxa gakkanaas ubbaa issiso shiishshana. 
Matthew24:32 «Balase geetettiza miththafe hayssa tamaarte; balase miththays unquloy cililiza wode iza hayth kessishin boney matidayssa intte ereeta. 
Matthew24:33 Hessaththoka hayta intte be7iza wode izi penge matidayssa intte erana. 
Matthew24:34 Ta tumu gays; hayssi wuri polettana gakkanaas ha yeletay aadhdhenna. 
Matthew24:35 Saloynne sa7ay aadhdhana shin ta qaalay gidikko mulekka aadhdhenna. 
Matthew24:36 «He gallassayonne he saateyo Aawappe attiin salo kiitanchchata gidiinkka Naaza gidiinkka oonikka erenna. 
Matthew24:37 Nohe wode hanidayssa mala Asa Naa yuussi hessa mala gidana. 
Matthew24:38 Dhayssiza haaththafe kase Nohey markaben geliza gallas gakkanaas asay mishenne uyishe, ekkishenne gelshe gam7ides." 
Matthew24:39 He wodey gakkanaas aazi hananaakko asay eronttanne qoppontta bashsha haaththi yiidi mittidayssa mala ta Asa Nay yiza wodeykka hessaththo hanana. 
Matthew24:40 «He wode nam7u asati issife goshshan pe7ana shin isttafe issaadey ekettana; issaadey attana. 
Matthew24:41 Nam7u maccassati woxan issife gaaccana shin isttafe issineya ekettana; issineya attana. 
Matthew24:42 «Histtiko intte Goday yaana gallassaa intte erontta gishshas beeggidi naagite. 
Matthew24:43 Hayssa wozinan woththite; kaysoy qammaafe aafuntha saate bolla yaanakkon erizaakko iza miish kaysoy ekkontta mala keeththaa aaway beeggidi naagana. 
Matthew24:44 Asa Naykka intte qoppontta saate bolla yaana; intteka hessaththo giigettidayta gidite. 
Matthew24:45 «Wodera soo asaa quma mizana mala goday ba keeththa asaa bolla shuumida ammanettiza cincca oosanchchay oonee? 
Matthew24:46 Keeththa aaway simmidi yiza wode izas immida hadara ooththi polishe beettida oosanchchay anjjettidayssa. 
Matthew24:47 Ta inttes tumu gays; goday iza ba haarida ubbaa bolla shuumana. 
Matthew24:48 Gido attiin he oosanchchay iita gididi, ‹Ta goday gam7idi yaana› gi qoppidi," 
Matthew24:49 dendi hankko oosanchchata wadha oykkiko maththottizaytara miikkonne uyikko," 
Matthew24:50 izi qoppontta gallassaninne erontta saaten iza goday yiidi," 
Matthew24:51 iza qanxxeththi kaa7ana; iza exa qoodheppe qommon hanizaytara ooththana. Heenkka yeehoynne achcha garccechchi hanana. 
Matthew25:1 «He wode Salo Kawoteththiya mishira mokkanaas xomppe oykkidi kezida tammu geela7ota misatawus. 
Matthew25:2 He tammatappe ichchashu geela7oti eeyata; hankko ichchashati cinccata. 
Matthew25:3 Eeyati kuraaze, xomppe oykkida shin wurikko gujjana hara naage lamba oykkibeettenna." 
Matthew25:4 Cinccati gidikko ba kuraazezara wurikko gujjana lamba hara xarmusen oykkida. 
Matthew25:5 Machchiyo ekkana mishiray yontta gam7iin dhiskoy deexxiin asay wurikka dhiskides. 
Matthew25:6 «Leela giddoth gidishin, ‹Mishirazi yees! Kezidi mokki ekkite!› giza xeyssa qaalay siyettides." 
Matthew25:7 He wode geela7oti wurikka dendidi ba xomppe xomppe oyseththonne giigeteth oykkida. 
Matthew25:8 Eeyati cinccata, ‹Nu xomppey to7ana giza gishshas intte lambaafe nuus immite› gida." 
Matthew25:9 «Cincca geela7oti isttas zaaridi, ‹Nuus diza lambay nuussaranne inttessara gidontta gishshas biidi lamba bayzizaytappe inttes shammite› gida." 
Matthew25:10 Istti lamba shammana bi kichchiin mishirazi gakki wodhdhides. Kase giigetti uttida geela7oti bullachchaso izara gelida; kareykka gordettides. 
Matthew25:11 «Guuth gam7ishe hankko geela7oti yiidi, ‹Godoo! Godoo! Kare nuus doya!› gida." 
Matthew25:12 Izikka zaaridi, ‹Ta inttes tumu gays; ta inttena erikke!› gides." 
Matthew25:13 Hessa gishshas yaana gallassaa woykko saateza intte erontta gishshas giigettidi naagite. 
Matthew25:14 «Xoossa Kawoteththi baas dizaaz ubbaa ba ashkaratas hadara immidi hara dere baana dendida issi as misatees. 
Matthew25:15 Ashkaratas issaas issaas istta wolqqa mala giigsidi issaas ichchashu shii bira, issaas nam7u shii bira, hankkoyssas qasse issi shii bira immidi bides." 
Matthew25:16 Ichchashu shii bira ekkida addezi heerakka miishshaan zal7e oykkidi hara ichchashu shii bira wodhisides. 
Matthew25:17 Qasseka nam7u shii bira ekkidayssi hara nam7u shii bira wodhisides. 
Matthew25:18 Issi shii bira ekkidayssi ba godaa bira biittan moogidi qottides. 
Matthew25:19 «Ashkarata goday ba bidason daro wode gam7i simmidi miishshaa isttara salla7ettides. 
Matthew25:20 Ichchashu shii bira ekkida ashkaray hara ichchashu shii bira wodhisidayssa ekki yiidi, ‹Godoo! Ne taas ichchashu shii bira immadasa shin hekko hayssa ta hara ichchashu shii bira wodhisadis› gides." 
Matthew25:21 Iza godaykka, ‹Lo7o ooththadasa; nenoo lo7o ammanettida ashkarazoo! Neni guuththa miishshan ammanettida as gidida gishshas ta nena daro miishsha bolla shuumana; gede ne godaa ufayssaso gela› gides." 
Matthew25:22 «Hessaththoka nam7u shii bira ekkidayssi godazaakko shiiqidi, ‹Godoo! Ne taas nam7u shii bira immadasa shin hekko hara nam7u shii bira wodhisadis› gides." 
Matthew25:23 Godazikka, ‹Lo7eththadasa; haysso lo7onne taas ammanettida ashkarazoo! Neni guuththan ammanettidaade gidida gishshas ta nena daro miishsha bolla shuumays; gede ne Godaa ufayssaso gela› gides." 
Matthew25:24 «Issi shii bira ekkida ashkarazi shiiqidi, ‹Godoo! Neni zeronttasoppe maxizaadenne laallonttasoppe shiishshiza menxe iita as gididayssa ta erays." 
Matthew25:25 Hessa gishshas ta babbada biitta bookkada ne biraa bookkida ollan moogada qottadis; ne miish hessa beya!› gides. 
Matthew25:26 «Iza goday zaaridi, ‹Haysso iita azalla ashkarazoo! Tani zeronttasoppe maxizaade laallonttasoppe shiishshizaade gididayssa ne eray?" 
Matthew25:27 Histtiin ta simma yiza wode ta miishshaa yelora ta ekkana mala tirpisi zal7iza asas ne immanaas besseesishin› gides. 
Matthew25:28 « ‹Ane ha7i izappe shii bira ekkidi tammu shii biray dizaades immite. 
Matthew25:29 Dizaades gujettananne dari dari baana; bayndaadefe he diza guuththayakka izappe ekettaychchana. 
Matthew25:30 Hayssa go7ay baynda ashkaraa gede yeekkizasonne achchey garccettizaso heen karen diza dhuman kessi yeggite› gides. 
Matthew25:31 «Asa Nay ba kiitanchchata ubbaara bonchchon yiza wode ba bonchcho alga bolla uttana. 
Matthew25:32 Derey wuri iza sinththi shiiqana; izikka mehe heemmizaadey deysh dorsafe qori shaakkiza mala asaa issaa issaafe qori shaakkana. 
Matthew25:33 Dorsata ba ushachcha baggara, deyshata hadirsa baggara essana." 
Matthew25:34 He wode kawoy ushachcha baggara dizayta, ‹Inttenoo! Ta Aaway inttena anjjidayti haa yiite! Alamey medhettoosoppe inttes giigettida kawoteththaa laattite! gaana." 
Matthew25:35 Gaasoykka tani gafiin tana mizideta; ta saamettiin tana ushshideta; ta imath gidada yiin tana mokki ekkideta. 
Matthew25:36 Ta kallottiin tana mayzideta; ta sakettiin tana hargisideta; ta qashettiin tana oychchideta› gaana. 
Matthew25:37 «Xillotikka zaaridi, ‹Godoo! Ne gafiin nu nena ayde mizidonii? Woykko ne saamettiin ayde be7idi nu nena ushshidonii?" 
Matthew25:38 Nu ayde nena be7idi imaththateth mokkidonii? Woykko ayde ne kallottiin be7idi nena mayzidonii? 
Matthew25:39 Hessaththoka ne sakettiin woykko qashettiin ayde be7idi nena oychchidonii?› gaana. 
Matthew25:40 Kawoykka zaaridi, ‹Ta inttes tumu gays; hayta laafa gidida ta ishatappe issaades ooththidayssi intte taas ooththida mala› gaana." 
Matthew25:41 «Qasseka hadirsa baggara dizaytas, ‹Intteno qanggettidaytoo! Taappe shaakettidi Daabulosassinne iza kiitanchchatas giigettida mernaa taman biite gaana." 
Matthew25:42 Gaasoykka ta gafiin tana mizibeekketa; ta saamettiin tana ushshibeekketa; 
Matthew25:43 tana imaththateth mokkibeekketa; ta kallottiin tana mayzibeekketa; ta sakettininne qashettiin tana oychchibeekketa› gaana. 
Matthew25:44 «Isttika zaaridi, ‹Godoo! Ne gafiin woykko ne saamettiin woykko ne imath gidiin woykko ne kallottininne ne sakettiin woykko ne qashettiin nu nena be7idi ayde neekko gakkibeekkonii?› gaana." 
Matthew25:45 «He wode izikka isttas zaaridi, ‹Ta inttes tumu gays; hayta laafa ta ishatappe issaades intte ooththontta aggidayssi taas intte ooththontta aggida mala› gaana." 
Matthew25:46 Heyti gede mernaa pirdan baana; xilloti gidikko mernaa de7okko baana» gides. 
Matthew26:1 Yesusi hessa haasayi wursidaappe guye bana kaallizaytas, «Nam7u gallassafe guye Paaziga gididayssa ereetii? Asa Nay kaqettanaas aadhdhi imettana» gides." 
Matthew26:2  
Matthew26:3 Hessafe guye qeeseta halaqatinne dere cimati Qayafa geetettiza qeeseta halaqaa gibben shiiqidi hiillara Yesusa oyththidi wodhisanaas maqettida. 
Matthew26:4  
Matthew26:5 Gido attiin, «Asaa giddon ooshshi dendontta mala ba7aale gallas gidoppo» giidi qachchida." 
Matthew26:6 Yesusi Bitaaniyan inchchirachcha hargera diza Simoona geetettizaade soon dishin," 
Matthew26:7 issi maccas dizaara gatey keehi al7o gidida albasxiroose shitto bilqaaxe kumeth oykkada Yesusaakko shiiqada izi maaddan utti dishin iza hu7e bolla shittoza gussadus. 
Matthew26:8 Iza kaallizayti, «Hessa be7idi hayssi aazas mela moorettizee?" 
Matthew26:9 Shittozi daro gates bayzettidi miishshay manqotas imettizaakochchii?» gida. 
Matthew26:10 Yesusi hessa eridi, «Hanno maccassayo aazas waayiseetii? Iza taas lo7o ooththadus." 
Matthew26:11 Manqoti ubba wode inttenara deettes; ta gidikko ubba wode inttenara diikke. 
Matthew26:12 Iza shittoza ta bolla gussidayssi tana moogos giigsanaassa. 
Matthew26:13 Ta inttes tumu gays; hayssi Mishiraachcho qaalay sabbakettiza alame yuushon awanka iza ooththidayssi izo qofsizaaz gididi haasayettana» gides. 
Matthew26:14 Hessafe guye tammanne nam7atappe issoy Asqoronto Yuhuda geetettizayssi qeeseta halaqataakko biidi," 
Matthew26:15 «Ta inttes iza aaththa immiko intte taas ay immanee?» gides. Isttika izas heedzdzu tammu bira iza kushen taybi immida. 
Matthew26:16 He gallassafe simmidi Yuhuday Yesusa isttas aaththi immanaas injje wode naagishe gam7ides. 
Matthew26:17 Ukeththa ba7aale geetettiza ba7aale gallas iza kaallizayti Yesusaakko shiiqidi, «Ne Paaziga maanaso awan giigsana mala koyay?» gida." 
Matthew26:18 Izikka isttas zaaridi gede katama biidi ebelo geetettiza as, «Astamaarey, ‹Ta wodey matida gishshas tana kaallizaytara Paaziga ta ne keeththan bonchchana gides› gi yootite» gides." 
Matthew26:19 Iza kaallizaytikka Yesusi istta azazida mala Paaziga kawo giigsida. 
Matthew26:20 Gadey omarsishin Yesusi tammanne nam7atara maaddan uttides. 
Matthew26:21 Istti muussan dishin izi isttas, «Ta tumu gays; inttefe issoy tana aaththi immana» gides." 
Matthew26:22 Isttika keehi muuzottidi taran taran, «Godoo taneeshaa?» gida." 
Matthew26:23 Izikka zaaridi, «Tana aaththi immanaadey keren tanara kushe yeddizaade." 
Matthew26:24 Iza gishshas kase xaafettidayssa mala Asa Nay baana; gido attiin Asa Naa aaththi immizaades aayye ana! Hessaadey yelettontta attidaakko izas lo7okkoshin» gides. 
Matthew26:25 Iza aaththi immana Yuhuday, «Astamaaree! Taneeshaa?» gides. Izikka, «Ee, ne gida mala» gides." 
Matthew26:26 Istti muussan dishin Yesusi miza qumaappe ekkidi anjjides. Menththidinne bana kaallizaytas immidi, «He7ite miite; hayssi ta ashokko» gides." 
Matthew26:27 Qasseka ushshaa denththidi galatidinne bana kaallizaytas immidi, «Wurikka hayssafe uyite;" 
Matthew26:28 daro asaa nagarappe maarana gukkiza ta ooraththa caaqo suuththay hayssa. 
Matthew26:29 Ta inttes gizay ta Aawaa Kawoteththan ta inttenara ooraththa woyne ushshaa uyana gakkanaas hayssafe guye hayssa woyne ushshaa inttenara uyikke» gides. 
Matthew26:30 Yeththa yexxidaappe guye pude Dabrazayte geetettiza zuma bolla kezida. 
Matthew26:31 Yesusi isttas, «Intte wuri hach omarsi tanan dhuphettidi tana yeggi baana; ‹Heemmizayssa ta shocana; meheti laalettana› geetettidi kase xaafettides." 
Matthew26:32 Gido attiin tani dendidaappe guye inttefe sinththatada Galila baana» gides. 
Matthew26:33 Phexroosi zaaridi, «Hankkoyti wuri ne gaason dhuphettikokka tani mulekka dhuphettike!» gides." 
Matthew26:34 Yesusikka izas zaaridi, «Tumu gays; hach omars kuttoy waassontta kasetada heedzdzuto ne tana kaddana» gides." 
Matthew26:35 Phexroosi qasse, «Nenara ta hayqqana koshshikokka mulekka ta nena kaddike!» gides. Yesusa kaalliza hankkoytikka kumeth izayssaththoka gida." 
Matthew26:36 Hessafe guye Yesusi bana kaallizaytara Getesemaane geetettizaso bides. Isttaka, «Hee baada ta woossishin intte hayssan uttiishshite» gides." 
Matthew26:37 Phexroosara Zabdoosa nayta nam7ata banara ekki biidi muuzoteththinne daro qofeteth oykkides. 
Matthew26:38 Hessafekka, «Ta shemppoya hayqqana gakkanaas daro muuzottadus; tanara minnidi hannin takkite» gides." 
Matthew26:39 Isttafe guuth gede haakki bi gufannidi, «Ta Aawawu! Nees dandayettiko hayssi metoy taappe aadho; gido attiin tani koyida mala gidontta neni koyida mala hano» gi woossides." 
Matthew26:40 Hessafe simmidi bana kaallizaytakko yiidi istti dhiskishin demmides. Phexroosakka, «Hayto asatoo! Intte tanara issi saatekka minnanaas xoonidee?" 
Matthew26:41 Paacen intte gelontta mala minnidi woossite; ayanay giigettides shin ashoy gidikko daaburanchcha» gides. 
Matthew26:42 Qasseka nam7anththo biidi, «Ta Aawawu! Ta hayssa uyanayssi taas attontta miish gidikko ne sheney poletto» giidi woossides." 
Matthew26:43 Qasseka izi yishin istta ayfen dhiskoy deexxida gishshas ichchidayta be7ides. 
Matthew26:44 Istta aggidi qasseka biidi heedzdzanththo kase woossida qaala zaari woossides. 
Matthew26:45 Hessafe bana kaallizaytakko simmidi, «Ha7ikka shempi dhiskidetii? Hekko ha7i saatey matides; Asa Nay nagaranchchata kushen aadhdhi imettana." 
Matthew26:46 Dendite ane boos! Tana aaththi immizaadey yuussa bolla dees» gides. 
Matthew26:47 Izi haasayshin tammanne nam7atappe issoy Yuhuday yides. Qeeseta halaqatinne dere cimati yeddida daro asay tooranne durqqa oykkidi Yuhudara issife dees. 
Matthew26:48 Yuhudaykka, «Ta yeerizaadey iza gidida gishshas oykkite» giidi kase yooti woththides." 
Matthew26:49 Sitti gi Yesusaakko biidi, «Astamaaree! Saro» gishe Yesusa yeerides." 
Matthew26:50 Yesusikka, «Ta laggee! Ne yida qofaa pola» gides. Heerakka asay shiiqidi Yesusa oykki qachchides." 
Matthew26:51 Yesusara dizaytappe issoy giththa mashsha shoddidi qeeseta halaqaza ashkaraa hayth qanxxides. 
Matthew26:52 Yesusikka, «Ane ne mashshaa koohon zaara gelththa; mashsha shoddizayti mashshan dhayana." 
Matthew26:53 Koshshiko tani ta Aawaa oychchizaakko daro shiyan qoodettiza oliza kiitanchcha taas yeddontta aggana nees misatizee? 
Matthew26:54 Hessaththo ooththiko qasse Geeshsha Maxaafatan hanana geetettidayssi waani polettanee?» gides. 
Matthew26:55 He wode Yesusi asaa, «Panga oykkiza asaththo mashshanne durqqa ekkidi tana oykkana yidetii? Wontiin wontiin Xoossa Keeththan uttada ta tamaarsishin kase oykkibeekketa shin." 
Matthew26:56 Gido attiin hayssi wurikka hanidayssi kase nabeti Geeshsha Maxaafatan yootidayssi polettanaassa» gides. He wode Yesusa kaallizayti iza yeggidi dhayda. 
Matthew26:57 He wode Yesusa oykkidi asati Muse wogaa astamaaretinne dere cimati issife shiiqidason qeeseta halaqa Qayafakko efida. 
Matthew26:58 Gido attiin Phexroosi qeeseta halaqa gibbe gakkanaas haahora Yesusa kaallides. Gibbe giddo gelidi hanizayssa wurseth beyanaas, gibbe naagizaytara uttides." 
Matthew26:59 He wode qeeseta halaqatinne Ayhudata duulatay kumeth Yesusa wodhisanaas wordo markka koyides. 
Matthew26:60 Daro wordo markkati shiiqikkoka bessiza markkateth demmibeettenna; gido attiin guyeppe nam7u as dayti shiiqidi, «Hayssi addezi, ‹Tani Xoossa Keeththaa laallada heedzdzu gallassara zaarada keexxana dandayays› gides» giidi markkattida." 
Matthew26:61  
Matthew26:62 Hessa siyida qeeseta halaqay uteththafe dendi eqqidi, «Hayti asati ne bolla markkattizayssas aykkoka zaarikkii?» gides." 
Matthew26:63 Yesusikka co7u gides. Qeeseta halaqay, «Ta nena de7o Xoossaa sunththan oychchays! Neni Xoossa naa Kirstoosa gidikko taas yoota!» gides." 
Matthew26:64 Yesusikka, «Ne goyssaka mala; gido attiin inttes ubbaas ta yootizay sinththafe Asa Nay Wolqqamaza ushachchan uttidi salo shaarara yiza wode intte beyana» gides." 
Matthew26:65 He wode qeeseta halaqay ba may7o daakkidi, «Xoossa bolla cashsha qaala haasaydes; nuus hayssafe aadhdhiza hara aaza markka koshshizee! Xoossa bolla cashsha qaala izi haasayshin intte intte hayththara siyideta." 
Matthew26:66 Inttes ay misatizee?» gides. Isttika zaaridi izas, «Hayqoy izas bessees» gida." 
Matthew26:67 He wode Yesusa ayfeson cuttishe iza iccida; baggayti iza baqqishe," 
Matthew26:68 «Kirstoosaa! Ne nena nabe gaasa shin nena baqqiday oonakkon ane nuus yoota» gida. 
Matthew26:69 Hessafe guye Phexroosi qeeseta halaqaza gibben utti dishin keeththa giddon ooththiza issi maccas dizaara izakko shiiqada, «Nenikka Galila Yesusara dizaade!» gadus." 
Matthew26:70 Izi qasse, «Ne ay gizaakko ta erikke!» giidi ubba asaa sinththan kaddides." 
Matthew26:71 Gibbeza penge izi bishin issi hara oosanchchaya iza xeellada heen dizaytas, «Hayssi addezi Naazirete Yesusara dizaadeko!» gadus." 
Matthew26:72 Izikka, «Ta iza erikke!» giidi nam7anththo kaddides." 
Matthew26:73 Guuth gam7ishin heen eqqida asati shiiqidi Phexroosa, «Ne haasayay ne haytara dizayssa qonccisees; tumappe ne istta bagga asa» gida." 
Matthew26:74 Izikka caaqishenne amatishe, «Hessa addeza ta erikke!» gides. Heerakka kuttoy waassides." 
Matthew26:75 He wode Yesusi kase Phexroosas, «Kuttoy waassanaas ne tana heedzdzuto kaddana» giidi yootida qaalay qofettiin, Phexroosi kare kezidi camo yeeho yeekkides." 
Matthew27:1 Maalado wonttara qeeseta halaqatinne dere cimati wurikka Yesusa wodhana oge zorettida. 
Matthew27:2 Yesusa qachchi efidi dere haariza Philaxoosas aaththi immida. 
Matthew27:3 Iza aaththi immida Yuhudaykka Yesusa bolla pirdettidayssa be7idi, «Ta iza aaththa immontta aggarkina» giidi ba ekkida heedzdzu tammu biraa qeeseta halaqatassinne dere cimatas zaari immidi, «Xillo as aaththa immida gishshas ta mooradis» gides. Isttika, «Histtiin nuus ay metoo! Ne era ekka!» gida." 
Matthew27:4  
Matthew27:5 Hessa gishshas Yuhuday biraa efidi Xoossa Keeththa giddon yeggidi kezi biidi cuuletti hayqqides. 
Matthew27:6 Qeeseta halaqati biraa denththidi, «Suuththa waaga gidida gishshas Xoossa Keeththa miishshan gujjanaas bessenna» gida." 
Matthew27:7 Ba giddon zorettidi imath gidida asatas duufo gidana mala issi urqqa miish medhdhiza hiillaza gade shammida. 
Matthew27:8 Hessa gishshas he gadey hach gakkanaas suuththa gade geetettees. 
Matthew27:9 Izas waaga gidana mala, «Isra7eele nayti heregida heedzdzu tammu bira qoodi ekkida. Xoossi tana azazida mala urqqa medhdhiza hiillaza gades immida» geetettidi nabe Ermaasa doonan yootettidayssi polettides." 
Matthew27:10  
Matthew27:11 He wode Yesusi dere haarizayssa sinth shiiqides. Dere haarizayssika, «Neni Ayhuda kawoo?» giidi iza oychchides. Yesusikka, «Ne gida mala gido» gides." 
Matthew27:12 Qeeseta halaqatinne dere cimati iza mootishin Yesusi isttas aynne zaaribeenna. 
Matthew27:13 He wode Philaxoosi Yesusa, «Aappun yo7on nena mootizaakko siyikkii?» gides." 
Matthew27:14 Dere haarizayssi keehi malalettana gakkanaas Yesusi issi qaalakka zaaribeenna. 
Matthew27:15 Dere haarizayssas ba7aale gallas derey qasho asaappe, «Ebeloy nuus birshetto!» gi oychchiko issaade birshiza wogay dees." 
Matthew27:16 He wode gene ooson erettida Barbaane geetettiza issaadey qashoson dees. 
Matthew27:17 Derey shiiqida mala Philaxoosi, «Barbaaneppenne Kirstoosa geetettiza Yesusappe ta inttes oona birshana mala koyeetii?» gides." 
Matthew27:18 Philaxoosi istta coo qanaates aaththi immidayssa erishe oychchides. 
Matthew27:19 Izi pirda alga bolla utti dishin iza machcheya, «Iza gaason hach tani agumora daro metotadis; hessa xillo addeza bolla ne aykkoka ooththontta mala» giza kiita Philaxoosas yeddadus." 
Matthew27:20 Gido attiin qeeseta halaqatinne cimati isttas Barbaaney birshettana malanne qasse Yesusa wodhana mala woossanaas dereza qaalay gaaggana mala ooththida. 
Matthew27:21 Dere haarizayssi, «Nam7atappe oona birshana mala koyeetii?» gi oychchiin istti, «Barbaane birsha!» gida." 
Matthew27:22 Philaxoosikka, «Histtiko Kirstoosa geetettiza Yesusa wosttoo?» gides. Intte wurikka, «Kaqetto!» gida." 
Matthew27:23 Philaxoosikka aazas? «Izi ay iita ooththidee?» giidi istta oychchides. Isttika qasse keehi waassidi, «Kaqetto!» gida." 
Matthew27:24 Philaxoosi hanizayssi wurikka asay ba giddon bul7aketeththafe attiin hara ay go7ay bayndayssa yuushshi xeellidi, «Hayssa addeza suuththaa gomeppe ta geeshsha; hayssafe guye intte shene» giidi haath ehisidi dereza sinththan ba kushe meecettides." 
Matthew27:25 Derey wuri, «Iza suuththi nu bollanne nu nayta bolla gakko» giidi zaarides." 
Matthew27:26 He wode Barbaane isttas birshidi Yesusa garafissidaappe guye kaqqana mala aaththi immides. 
Matthew27:27 Hessafe wottadarati Yesusa gede dere haarizayssa gibbe ekki biidi wuri shiiqidi Yesusa giddo aaththida. 
Matthew27:28 Iza may7o qaaridi hara zo7o may7o mayzida. 
Matthew27:29 Agunththa akilile xaaxidi giigsida; iza hu7e bolla woththida; shomboqo guufe ushachcha kushen oyththidinne iza sinththan gulbatidi, «Ayhuda kawoo! Inttes too!» giidi iza qidhida." 
Matthew27:30 Iza bolla cuttida; shomboqo guufeza iza kusheppe ekkidi Yesusa hu7en zaari zaaridi shocida. 
Matthew27:31 Iza bolla qidhi kaa7idaappe guye qasseka zo7o may7oza qaari ekkidinne kase iza may7oza zaari mayzidi kaqqanaaso ekki bida. 
Matthew27:32 Istti ekki bishin Qareena geetettizasoppe yida Simoona geetettizayssa demmidi masqaleza iza wolqqara toossida. 
Matthew27:33 Birsheththay, «Hu7e guugge» geetettiza Golgota gakkishin ciyera walakettida woyne cajje, «Uya» giidi immida; gido attiin izi ganxi ekkidi uyana koyibeenna." 
Matthew27:34  
Matthew27:35 Iza kaqqidaappe guye iza may7oza bolla saama yeggidi gishettida. 
Matthew27:36 Heen uttidi iza naagida. 
Matthew27:37 «Hayssi Ayhuda kawo Yesusa» giza mooto qaala iza hu7eppe bollara woththida. 
Matthew27:38 Nam7u pangatappe issoy Yesusappe ushachcha baggara, issoy hadirsa baggara izara issife kaqettida." 
Matthew27:39 Ogera aadhdhi biza asay cayishenne hu7e qaaththishe, «Xoossa Keeththaa laallada heedzdzu gallassan zaara keexxana gizayssoo! Ane nena ashsha; ne Xoossa Naa gidikko ane masqaleza bollafe wodhdha» gida." 
Matthew27:40  
Matthew27:41 Qeeseta halaqati dere cimatara gididi iza bolla qidhishe; 
Matthew27:42 «Hara asaa ashshides shin bana ashshanaas dandaybeenna; izi Isra7eele kawo gidikko ane ha7i masqale bollafe wodhdho; nunikka iza ammanana. 
Matthew27:43 Xoossan ammanettides; bana Xoossa Naa gida mala Xoossi iza dosizaa gidikko ane ha7i iza ashsho» gida. 
Matthew27:44 Izara issife kaqettida pangatikka hessaththo cashsha qaala iza bolla qoqofida. 
Matthew27:45 Gallas usuppun saateppe biidi uddufun saate gakkanaas kumeththa biittay dhumides. 
Matthew27:46 Uddufun saate gidishin Yesusi qaalaa dhoqqu histtidi, «Eelohe! Eelohe! Lama sabaqitane» giidi waassides. Hessa guussas birsheththay, «Ta Xoossoo! Ta Xoossoo! Tana ays aggadii?» guussa." 
Matthew27:47 Heen eqqida asaappe issi issi asati iza waasoza siyidi, «Eelaasa xeygees» gida." 
Matthew27:48 Isttafe issaadey woxxi biidi zandza misatiza safinege geetettiza miish ekkidi caalida woyne cajjen yeggi caphisidinne shomboqo geetettiza miththa xeeran qaaphidi uyana mala Yesusa doonaakko shiishshides. 
Matthew27:49 Hankko asay qasse, «Aggaagite ane, Eelaasi yiidi iza ashshishin beyana» gida." 
Matthew27:50 Yesusi qasseka dhoqqa qaalan waassidi shempo kezides. 
Matthew27:51 He wode Xoossa Keeththaa magalashay bolla hu7era duge simmi daakettidi nam7u kezides; biittay qaaxxides; zaallati za7ida. 
Matthew27:52 Duufoti doyettida; kase hayqqida Xoossa asaappe dariza baggay dendides. 
Matthew27:53 Duufoppe kezidi Yesusa denththaafe guye geeshsha katama gelidi darota ayfen beettida. 
Matthew27:54 Mato halaqaynne izara issife Yesusa naagizayti biitta qaaththaanne hanidayssa ubbaa be7idi daro babbida. Qasse, «Hayssi tumappe Xoossa Naakko!» gida." 
Matthew27:55 Galilappe yiidi Yesusa koshshizaazan ooththi maaddanaas kaalliza daro maccassati hanizayssa wursika haahora xeellishe heen deettes. 
Matthew27:56 Istta giddon Magdaleppe yida Maaramiranne, Yaaqoobenne Yooseefe aayo Maaramira, qasseka Zabdoosa nayta aayeyra issife deettes." 
Matthew27:57 Gadey omarsishin Yooseefe geetettiza issi dure adde dayssi Armatiyase geetettizasoppe yides. Izikka ba baggara Yesusa kaallizaade. 
Matthew27:58 Izi Philaxoosa sinththi shiiqidi Yesusa aha izas immana mala woossiin Philaxoosikka izas immana mala azazides. 
Matthew27:59 Yooseefey ahaa ekkidi geesh gidida moogo afalan xaaxides. 
Matthew27:60 Shuch woocidi baas giigsida duufon efi woththidi gita shuch genderisi duufoza gordides. 
Matthew27:61 He wode Magdale Maaramiranne hankko Maaramira duufoza ginan uttida. 
Matthew27:62 Sambatas giigettiza wonteththa gallas qeeseta halaqatinne Farsaaweti Philaxoosa sinth shiiqidi," 
Matthew27:63 «Godoo! He wordoy kase paxa dishe, ‹Heedzdzu gallassafe guye ta dendana› gida qaalay nu wozinan turchchu gides." 
Matthew27:64 Hessa gishshas iza kaallizayti iza ahaa kaysoti ekkidi deraas, ‹Izi hayqoppe dendides› giidi woresontta mala heedzdzanththo gallas gakkanaas duufoy naagettana mala azaza; akkay giikko kaseyssafe guye balay aadheth gidana» gida." 
Matthew27:65 Philaxoosi, «Inttes naagizayti deettes; biidinne inttes erettida mala naagisite» gides." 
Matthew27:66 Isttika biidi duufoza doona maatamen gordidi naagana zabe essida. 
Matthew28:1 Sambatay aadhdhidaappe guye saaminttafe koyro gallas buro saloy zo7ishin Magdale Maaramanne hankko Maarama duufoza beyana bida. 
Matthew28:2 Qoppontta dishin gita biitta qaaththi hanides; Godaa kiitanchchayka saloppe wodhdhi duufaakko biidi shuchchaa genderisidi iza bolla uttides. 
Matthew28:3 Kiitanchchazas medhay wolqqanththa poo7o mala; iza may7oyka shachcha mala booththa. 
Matthew28:4 Duufo naagizayti kiitanchchazas babbi kokkoridinne hayqeth misatida. 
Matthew28:5 Kiitanchchazi maccassata, «Babbofte; intte kaqettida Yesusa koyzayssa ta erays; izi ha7i haan baa; izi kase yootida mala hayqoppe dendides; haa yiidi izi ichchidaso be7ite." 
Matthew28:6  
Matthew28:7 Ha7ikka eleli biidi iza kaallizaytas, ‹Hayqoppe dendides. Inttefe kasetidi Galila bees; intte iza heen demmana› giidi yootite. Hi7a ta inttes yootadis» gides." 
Matthew28:8 Maccassatikka baboninne ufayssan kumidi iza kaallizaytas yootanaas elelidi woththan duufozi dizaso yeggi aggidi bida. 
Matthew28:9 Heerakka Yesusi istta demmidi, «Haytoo saro» gides. Isttika Yesusaakko shiiqidinne iza toho oykkidi izas goynnida." 
Matthew28:10 Yesusi istta, «Babbofte! Biidinne istti Galila baana mala ta ishatas yootite. Istti tana heen beyana» gides." 
Matthew28:11 Maccasati buro oge bolla dishin naagizaytappe baggati katamaa biidi hanidayssa ubbaa qeeseta halaqatas yootida. 
Matthew28:12 Qeeseta halaqatikka dere cimatara shiiqettidi zorettida; wottadaratas gidiza miish immidi, « ‹Nuni dhiskon dishin iza kaallizayti qammara yiidi kaysoti efida› gite gida." 
Matthew28:13  
Matthew28:14 Hayssi worey dere haarizayssa matan siyettikokka nuni izas lo7eththi yootana; aykko iitaykka intte bolla gakkontta mala nu ooththana» gida. 
Matthew28:15 Wottadaratikka miishshaa ekkidi istti gida mala ooththida; hayssi yo7ozi hach gakkanaas Ayhudata achchan daroson yootettishe dees. 
Matthew28:16 Hessafe guye Yesusa kaalliza tammanne issineti Yesusi istta bessida Galilan diza zuma bolla kezida. 
Matthew28:17 Yesusa be7ida mala izas goynnida; istta garsafe guuxxiza baggati sidhida. 
Matthew28:18 Yesusikka bana kaallizaytakko shiiqidi, «Saloninne sa7an godateththi taas imettides. Hessa gishshas biidi dere ubbaa Aawaa, Naazanne Xillo Ayana sunththan xammaqishe, tana kaallizayta ooththite; ta inttena azazidayssa ubbaa naagana mala tamaarsite. Tanikka alame wurseth gakkanaas inttenara days» gides." 
Matthew28:19  
Matthew28:20  
Mark1:1 Xoossa Naa Yesus Kirstoosa koyro Mishiraachchoy hayssa; 
Mark1:2 nabe Isayaasa baggara, «Hekko nees oge lo7eththanaas ta kiittanaade neeppe sinththara yeddana." 
Mark1:3 ‹Godaas oge giigsite; izi baana oge suurisidi ooththite› gishe bazzo biittan waassiza giiris» geetetti xaafettides. 
Mark1:4 Hessaththoka Xammaqiza Yohannisi asaa xammaqishe, «Intte nagarappe simmidi xammaqettite, Xoossi intte nagara atto gaana» gi awajjishe bazzora kezi wodhdhides." 
Mark1:5 Yuhuda derey kumeth Yerusalaame asay wuri Yohannisakko bi biidi ba nagara nagara paaxi paaxi Yordaanoose Shaafan Yohannisa kushen xammaqettides. 
Mark1:6 He wode Yohannisi may7izay gaamella iskefe oosettida may7o; qasse ba xeessan dafo gixxees; izi miza qumay boolenne degera eessa. 
Mark1:7 Izi, «Tani hokkada iza caamma qasho birshanaas bessonttaadey, taappe aadhdhizaadey taappe guyera yaana." 
Mark1:8 Tani inttena haaththan xammaqays; izi gidikko inttena Xillo Ayanan xammaqana» gi sabbakides. 
Mark1:9 He wode Yesusi Galila giddon diza Naazirete geetettiza katamayppe Yordaanoose Shaafa yiidi Yohannisa kushen xammaqettides. 
Mark1:10 Yesusi xammaqettidi haaththaafe kezida mala saloy doyettiin Xillo Ayanay iza bolla haraphphe misatidi wodhdhishin be7ides. 
Mark1:11 Qasseka, «Ta dosiza Nay nena, nenan ta ufayettays» giza qaala giirissi pude saloppe seetettides." 
Mark1:12 Heerakka Xillo Ayanay iza duge bazzo kaaleththi efides. 
Mark1:13 Heen bazzonkka oyddu tammu gallas gakkanaas Xala7era paacettishe gam7ides; do7atara issife de7ides; kiitanchchatikka iza maaddida. 
Mark1:14 Yohannisi qasho keeth gelidaappe guye Yesusi Xoossa Mishiraachcho qaalaa sabbakishe Galila biidi, «Wodey gakkides; Xoossa Kawoteththi matides; nagarappe simmite; Mishiraachcho qaalan ammanite» giidi sabbakides." 
Mark1:15  
Mark1:16 Yesusi Galila abbaa achchara aadhdhiin Simooninne iza isha Indiraasi mole oykkizayta gidida gishshas istti mole oykkiza gite abban yeggishin be7ides. 
Mark1:17 Yesusi istta, «Haa yiite! Tana kaallite; intte mole oykki shiishshiza mala ta inttena as oykkizayta ooththana» gides." 
Mark1:18 Istti heerakka mole giteza yeggi aggidi Yesusa kaallida. 
Mark1:19 Guuth gede sinththe aadhdhidi Zabdoosa naa Yaaqoobeynne iza isha Yohannisi wogolon uttidi mole gite giigsishin be7idi heerakka istta xeygides. 
Mark1:20 Isttika ba aawaa Zabdoosanne izas qaxxaretti ooththiza asatara issife wogoloza giddon aggidi Yesusa kaalli bida. 
Mark1:21 Heeppeka Qifirnahoome bida. Heerakka Yesusi Ayhudata Sambata gallas Ayhudata Woosa Keeth gelidi tamaarso oykkides. 
Mark1:22 Xaafeta mala gidontta godateththara diza asa mala izi tamaarsiin asay wuri iza timirtezan malalettides. 
Mark1:23 He wode Ayhudata Woosa Keeththan tuna ayanay iza bolla diza issaadey," 
Mark1:24 «Naazirete Yesusa ne nuuppe ay koyay? Nuna dhayssana yadii? Ne oonakko ta nena erays; neni Xoossa geeshshaza» giidi waassides. 
Mark1:25 Yesuska tuna ayanaza, «Co7u gaada izappe keza!» gi hanqides." 
Mark1:26 Tuna ayanay addeza genderisidi izi qakettishin izappe waassishe kezides. 
Mark1:27 Derey wuri, «Aso hayssi aaza palaa? Hayssi godateththara diza ooraththa timirte; tuna ayanatakka azazees; isttika izas azazetteettes» gi malalettishe asay ba giddon issoy issaa oyshechcho oykkides." 
Mark1:28 Heerakka iza ooso worey Galila yuushon diza dere ubbaan siyettides. 
Mark1:29 Ayhudata Woosa Keeththafe kezida mala Yaaqooberanne Yohannisara issife gede Simoonasonne Indiraasaso gelida. 
Mark1:30 Hee gelida mala Simoona bolloteya misha harge sakettada ichchidayssa izas yootida. 
Mark1:31 Hessa gishshas Yesusi izikko shiiqidi izi kushe oykki denththides. Mishay aggiin iza dendada istta mokkadus. 
Mark1:32 Arshey wullidaappe guye gadey dhumishin asay harganchchatanne daydanththi oykkida asaa wursi Yesusaakko ekki yides. 
Mark1:33 He katamayin diza asay wuri keeththa karen shiiqides. 
Mark1:34 Izikka dumma dumma hargen sakettidayta darota paththides; daro daydanththatakka kessides; gido attiin daydanththati Yesusi oonakko eriza gishshas istti haasayana mala Yesusi koyibeenna. 
Mark1:35 Bazzoy zo7ontta Yesusi maalado wonttara dendidi asi bayndaso biidi heen woosa oykkides. 
Mark1:36 Simooninne izara dizayti Yesusa koyana kezi bida. 
Mark1:37 Istti iza demmidi, «Asi wuri nena koshshan dees» gida." 
Mark1:38 Yesusikka, «Ta yiday tamaarsanaas gidida gishshas Mishiraachcho qaala yootanaas matan diza gutata ane boos» gides." 
Mark1:39 Hessa gishshas Ayhudata Woosa Keeththan geli geli sabbakishenne daydanth kessishe Galila katama kumeththaan yuuyides. 
Mark1:40 Issi inchchirachcha hargizaadey Yesusaakko shiiqidinne iza sinththan gulbatidi, «Ne shene gidikko ne tana paththana dandayaasa» gi woossides." 
Mark1:41 Yesusikka addezas mishettidi ba kushe yeddi iza bochchidi, «Ne paxana mala ta koyays; paxa!» gides." 
Mark1:42 Heerakka addeza inchchirachcha hargey aggiin addezi paxides. 
Mark1:43 Yesusikka addezas, «Oonaska hayssa ne yootontta mala naagetta; gido attiin baada qeeses nena bessa. Derezas markka gidana mala ne paxidayssas Musey azazida yarsho shiishsha» giidi keehi minththi yootides." 
Mark1:44  
Mark1:45 Gido attiin addezi kezi biidi ba bida ubbason wore darssi dharccides. Hessa gaason Yesusi ay katamankka qonccera gelanaas dandaybeenna. Hessafe dendidayssan katamaappe karera asi bayndason duus oykkides. Asay gidikko dumma dummasoppeka izakko yides. 
Mark2:1 Guuththa gallassafe guye, «Yesusi Qifirnahoome simmidi soon dees» giza wore asay siyides." 
Mark2:2 Hessa gishshas keeththara, karera uttizasoy dhayana gakkanaas daro derey shiiqides. Izikka Xoossa qaala asaas sabbakides." 
Mark2:3 Oyddu as dayti issi tohoy silida issi as tookkidi izakko ehida. 
Mark2:4 Asaa daroteththafe dendidayssan Yesusi dizaso gaththanaas dandayontta gishshas Yesusi diza ginara kaara qaaridi harganchchaza izi ichchida halaara Yesusa sinth duge woththida. 
Mark2:5 Yesusi asata ammano be7idi tohoy silida addeza, «Ta naazoo! Ne nagaray atto geetettides» gides." 
Mark2:6 Heen gadaan uttida issi issi Muse woga xaafeti ba wozinara hayssi addezi wostti hayssaththo gizee? «Xoossa bolla cashsha qaala haasayees. Issi Xoossaafe attiin nagara maarana dandayzay oonee?» giidi qoppida. 
Mark2:7  
Mark2:8 Yesusi heerakka istti ba wozinan qoppidayssa ba Ayanan eridi, «Intte wostti hayssaththo qoppeetii?" 
Mark2:9 Tohoy silida addeza, ‹Ne nagaray atto geetettides› guussafenne ‹Dendada ne hala tookkada ba› guussafe awayssi matizee?" 
Mark2:10 Gido attiin Asa Naas biitta bollan nagara maarana godateththi dizayssa intte erana mala» giidi toho sila addeza," 
Mark2:11 «Dendada ne tooketta yida halaa tookkada neso ba» gides. 
Mark2:12 Izikka dendidi asay wuri beyishin halaa tookkidi bides. Heen gadaan diza asay wuri hanozan malalettidi, «Kase hayssa malay haniin beyibeekko» giidi Xoos galatides." 
Mark2:13 Qasseka Yesusi Galila Abba lanqe bides. Daro derey izakko yiin izikka yida asaa tamaarsides. 
Mark2:14 Izi ogera aadhdhi bishin Ilfiyoosa naa Lewey qaraxa shiishshizason uttidayssa be7idi, «Haa ya tana kaalla» gides. Izikka dendidi Yesusa kaallides." 
Mark2:15 Hessafe guye Lewe soon kaththa maaddan utti dishin qaraxa shiishshiza daro asatinne nagaranchchati izara kaalli yida gishshas istti Yesusaranne iza kaallizaytara issife maaddaan uttida. 
Mark2:16 Farsaaweta baggafe gidida Muse woga tamaarsizayti Yesusi nagaranchchataranne qaraxa shiishshizaytara mishin be7idi iza kaallizayta, «Qaraxa qanxxisizaytaranne nagaranchchatara aazas mizee?» giidi oychchida." 
Mark2:17 Yesusikka istti gizayssa siyidi, «Aakimey harganchchatas koshshees attiin hargonttaytas gidenna. Tanikka nagaranchchata xeyganaas yadis attiin xillota xeyganaas yabeekke» gides." 
Mark2:18 Yohannisa kaallizaytinne Farsaaweti xooma xoomeettes. Issi issi asati Yesusaakko yiidi, «Yohannisa kaallizaytinne Farsaaweta kaallizayti xoomeettes shin nena kaallizayti aazas xoomettennee?» gi oychchida." 
Mark2:19 Yesusikka isttas, «Mishiray isttara dishin mishira laggeti xoomi erizoo? Mishiray isttara dishin xoomi erettenna." 
Mark2:20 Mishiray isttafe ekettana wodey yaana. He wode istti xoomana. 
Mark2:21 «Gal7a may7o bolla ooraththa woso woththi sikkizaadey oonikka deenna; hessaththo ooththiko ooraththazi gal7aa daakki daakki yeggees; daakeththayka kaseppe gede aadhdhi iitees. 
Mark2:22 Hessaththoka ooraththa woyne cajje gal7a lukkamon woththizaadey deenna. Woththizaa gidikko woyne cajjezi gal7a lukkamoza dhuussees; woyne cajjezinne lukkamozi nam7ay mooretteettes. Hessa gishshas ooraththa woyne cajjey daanaas bessizay ooraththa lukkamonna» gides. 
Mark2:23 Yesusi Ayhudata Sambata gallas gistte tiya giddora aadhdhishin iza kaallizayti izara issife bishe tiya xupho oykkida. 
Mark2:24 Farsaaweti, «Nena kaallizayti Sambata gallas digettida miish aazas ooththizoo?» giidi Yesusa oychchida." 
Mark2:25 Izikka isttas, «Dawiti gafidi miza miish koyida wode izara issife dizaytara izi ooththidayssa nababibeekketii?" 
Mark2:26 Abiyaataarey qeeseta halaqateththan dishin izi Xoossa Keeththe gelidi qeeseti xalala maana bessiza dumma kaththaa baas miidinne banara dizaytas immides» gides. 
Mark2:27 Qasseka Yesusi isttas, «Sambatay asas medhettides attiin asi Sambatas medhettibeenna." 
Mark2:28 Hessa gishshas ta Asa Nay Sambata godaa» gides. 
Mark3:1 Hara gallas Yesusi Ayhuda Woosa Keeththe gelides. Heenkka kushey silidaadey dees. 
Mark3:2 Yesusa mootanaas gaaso koyza asati izi Ayhudata Sambata gallas paththanaakkon giidi paththishin beyana koyida. 
Mark3:3 Izikka kushey silida addeza, «Heen shiiqi uttida asaa sinththan denda eqqa» gides." 
Mark3:4 Hessafe guye Yesusi asaa, «Sambata gallas bessizay lo7o oosoyee? Iita oosoo? Asa shempo ashoyee? Woykko shempo wodhoo?» giidi oychchides. Isttika co7u gida." 
Mark3:5 Istta wozina shuchchateththan mishettidi iza giddoththidi yuuyi aadhdhi eqqida asaa hanqora xeellidi addeza, «Ne kusheza piddisa!» gides. Addezikka ba kushe piddisiin kushezi mulera paxides." 
Mark3:6 Farsaaweti kezi biidi iza wostti dhayssanaakko Herdoosa bagga gidida asatara zorettida. 
Mark3:7 Yesusi bana kaallizaytara abbaako bides. Galilappenne Yuhudappe yida daro derey iza kaallides. 
Mark3:8 Izi ooththizayssa siyidi asay Yuhudappe, Yerusalaameppe, Eedoomeppe, Yordaanoose pinththan diza deretappe qasse Xirooseppenne Sidoona heerappe izakko yides." 
Mark3:9 Asay darida gishshas iza un7eththontta mala guuththa wogolo istti giigsana mala bana kaallizayta azazides. 
Mark3:10 Izi daro harganchchata paththida gishshas sakoy waayisizayti wuri iza ba kushera bochchanaas dafettida. 
Mark3:11 Tuna ayanatikka Yesusa be7ida mala iza sinththan kundidi, «Neni Xoossa Naa» giidi waassida." 
Mark3:12 Gido attiin izi oonakko tuna ayanati qonccisontta mala keehippe hanqides. 
Mark3:13 Yesusi pude zuma bolla kezidi ba koyzayta baakko yaana mala xeygides; isttika izakko yida. 
Mark3:14 Izara issife gidana malanne sabbakanaas yeddana mala tammanne nam7ata, «Hawaareta» gi sunththides." 
Mark3:15 Asaappe daydanththata kessana mala isttas godateth immides. 
Mark3:16 Izi sunththida tammanne nam7ata sunththi hayssafe kaallizayssa; Phexroosa geetettida Simoona," 
Mark3:17 Bi7orinegeese woykko daada nayta geetettida Zabdoosa nayta Yaaqoobenne Yohannisa," 
Mark3:18 Indiraasa, Piliphoosa, Bartelemoosa, Matoosa, Toomaasa, Ilfiyoosa naa Yaaqoobe, Tadoosa, ba baggas mishettiza Simoona," 
Mark3:19 Yesusa aaththi immida Asqoronto Yuhuda. 
Mark3:20 Hessafe guye Yesusi issi soo gelides. Izinne iza kaallizayti kath maana wodey isttas dhayana gakkanaas derey qasseka dari shiiqides. 
Mark3:21 Iza hanotaa siyida iza dabboti, «Gooyontta aggenna» giidi banara ekki baanaas izi dizaso gakkida." 
Mark3:22 Yerusalaameppe yida xaafetikka, «Bi7elizeebula geetettiza daydanththata halaqay iza bolla dees. Izi daydanththata kessizay daydanththata halaqa wolqqankko!» gida." 
Mark3:23 Izikka istta xeygidi leemisora, «Xala7ey asappe Xala7e wostti kessanee?" 
Mark3:24 Ba giddon shaakoy diza kawoteththi minnanaas dandayenna. 
Mark3:25 Issi keeththa asikka ba giddon shaakettiko eqqanaas dandayenna. 
Mark3:26 Hessaththoka Xala7ey ba garsan issoy issaara shaakettikonne ixettiko minni eqqanaas dandayenna. Hessika izas wurseth gidana. 
Mark3:27 «Hessa gaason issaadey koyrottidi wolqqama as qachchontta dishe wolqqamaza soo gelanaassinne iza miishshe bonqqanaas dandayenna; iza aqo bonqqanaas dandayettizay wolqqamaza qachchiko xalala. 
Mark3:28 «Ta inttes tumu gays; asa naytas nagaraynne cashshi wuri maarettana. 
Mark3:29 Gido attiin Xillo Ayana bolla cashsha qaala haasayza asa ubbaas mernaas nagara aco gidana attiin maarettenna» gides. 
Mark3:30 Hessa izi giday istti iza, «Ne bolla tuna ayanay dees» gida gishshassa." 
Mark3:31 Hessafe guye iza aayeyanne iza ishati kare yi eqqidinne ase izakko kiitti xeygisida. 
Mark3:32 Iza giddoththi uttida daro asay, «Hekko ne aayeyanne ne ishati karen eqqidi nena koyeettes» gida." 
Mark3:33 Izikka zaaridi, «Ta aaya oonee? Ta ishati oonanttee?» gides." 
Mark3:34 Iza yuuyi uttida asaakko xeellidi, «Ta aayeyanne ta ishati haytanttako!" 
Mark3:35 Xoossa shene ooththizay wuri izi ta isha, ta michchonne ta aayo» gides." 
Mark4:1 Qasse Yesusi hara wode abbaa achchan tamaarso oykkides. Izakko keehi daro derey shiiqida gishshas abbaa giddon diza wogolo dizaarin gelidi uttides; asaykka wuri abbaa achchan shiiqides. 
Mark4:2 Izikka daro yo7ota leemison hizgi tamaarsides. 
Mark4:3 «Siyite! Issaadey zereth zeranaas kezides. 
Mark4:4 Izi zerishin issi issi zereththi oge bolla wodhdhides. Oge bolla wodhdhida zereththaa kafoti maxi mida. 
Mark4:5 Baggay mela biittan wodhdhides. He biittay mela gidida gishshas heerakka caarides. 
Mark4:6 Gido attiin arshey kezida mala shullidi xapho yeddontta gishshas melides. 
Mark4:7 Qasse issi zereththi agunththa giddon wodhdhides; agunththayka diccidi cuullida gishshas ayfibeenna. 
Mark4:8 Hara zereththi qasse lo7o orde biitta bolla wodhdhida gishshas caaridi diccides; ayfekka ayfides; Issoy heedzdzu tammu, issoy qasse usuppun tammu, issoy qasse xeetu ayfides.»" 
Mark4:9 Yesusi qasseka, «Siyiza hayththi dizaadey siyo!» gides." 
Mark4:10 Yesusi barkka dishin tammanne nam7atinne kase izara diza asay izi yootida leemisoza gishshas iza zaari oychchida. 
Mark4:11 Izikka isttas, «Inttes Xoossa Kawoteththa xuura eroy gelides shin karen dizaytas gidikko yo7oy wuri leemisora yootettees." 
Mark4:12 Hessika kase, ‹Istti be7idi be7idayssa akeekontta malanne simmontta mala, qasseka istta nagaray maarettontta malakko› » gides." 
Mark4:13 Qasseka Yesusi, «Hayssi leemisoy inttes gelibeennee? Histtiin hara leemiso intte wostti eranee?" 
Mark4:14 Zerizaadey qaala zerees. 
Mark4:15 Issi issi asati oge bolla wodhdhida zereththaa misateettes; istti qaala siyiza wode Xala7ey yiidi heerakka istti siyida qaalaa istta wozinappe ekkichchees. 
Mark4:16 Hessaththoka harati mela biitta bolla wodhdhida zereththaa misateettes. Istti qaala siyidi ufayssan ekkeettes. 
Mark4:17 Gido attiin istti xapho yeddontta gishshas guuththa wode gam7ishin qaalaa gaason metoy woykko goodetay asata bolla yiza wode heerakka dhuphetteettes. 
Mark4:18 Harati qasse agunththa giddon wodhdhida zereththaa misateettes; istti qaalaa sis siyeettes. 
Mark4:19 Gido attiin ha biitta metoy, miishsha siiqoynne hara amoy istti siyida qaala cuullidi ayfe ayfontta mala diggees." 
Mark4:20 Hankkoyti lo7o biittan zerettida zereththaa misateettes; heytikka qaalaa siyidi ekkizaadenne heedzdzu tammu ayfe, usuppun tammu ayfenne xeetu ayfe ayfizayta» gides." 
Mark4:21 Qasseka Yesusi, «Xomppe oyththidi geemason woykko arsa garsan woththi ereetii? Poo7ana mala qoncceson woththeeta gidennee?" 
Mark4:22 Hessa gishshas qotettidi qoncce kezonttay, poo7on kezontta geeman attanay baa." 
Mark4:23 Hessa gishshas siyiza hayththi dizaadey siyo!» gides. 
Mark4:24 Gujjidikka, «Intte siyizayssa wozinan woththite; intte makkiza miishshara inttes makettana; hessafekka daroy gujettana." 
Mark4:25 Dizaades gujettana shin bayndaadefe izas dizaarakka ekketaychchana» gides. 
Mark4:26 Qasseka Yesusi, «Xoossa kawoteththiya zereth zeriza issi as misatawus." 
Mark4:27 Zeridaadey omars dhiskees. Wontishin dendees; gido attiin izi erontta dishin zerettida kaththay mokkidi diccees. 
Mark4:28 Gadeyakka koyro caarech, kaaleththada pudhe, qasseka pudheza bolla lo7o ayfe immawus." 
Mark4:29 Kaththay kaxxidaappe guye boney gakkiin keeththa aaway heerakka maxa oykkees» gides. 
Mark4:30 Yesusi, «Xoossa Kawoteth nu aazara ginisanee? Aazara leemisanee?" 
Mark4:31 Biitta bolla ubbaafe laafa gidida sanafice ayfe misatawus. 
Mark4:32 Zerettada diccidaappe guye qasse atakilteta ubbaafe aadhdhiza gishshas kafoti yiidi he atakiltey haggata kuwa giddon shempeettes» gides. 
Mark4:33 Yesusikka asay ekkanaas dandayzayssa keena hayta misatiza hara daro leemisora isttas yootides. 
Mark4:34 Ay miish gidikkoka asaas leemisoy baynda yooti erenna. Izinne iza kaallizayti xalla diza wode gidikko wursi birshi yootees. 
Mark4:35 He gallas gadey qammishin bana kaallizayta, «Ane gede he pinth pinnoos» gides." 
Mark4:36 Istti asaa heen aggaagidi izi utti diza wogolozara Yesusa ekki bida. Hara wogolotikka isttara issife deettes. 
Mark4:37 He wode wolqqama dambalay abbaa bolla dendidi wogoloza haaththi kumana gakkanaas shocechchides. 
Mark4:38 Gido attiin Yesusi borkoth borkotidi wogolozas guye baggan ichchides. Isttika iza denththidi, «Astamaaree! Nuni dhayshin nena meettennee?» gida." 
Mark4:39 Izikka dendidi carkoza, «Co7u ga!» abbaaka, «Woppu ga!» gides; carkoyka co7u gides; mulekka co7u gides." 
Mark4:40 Bana kaallizaytakka, «Hayssaththo aazas babbidetii? Hayssa gakkanaas inttes ammanoy baawee?» gides." 
Mark4:41 Isttika keehi babbidi ba giddon issoy issaara, «Carkoynne abbay izas azazettizay hayssi oonee?» geetettida." 
Mark5:1 Abbaa pinnidi gede Gergesenoone geetettizaso bida. 
Mark5:2 Yesusi wogoloyppe wodhdhida mala tuna ayanay iza bolla dizaadey duufoppe kezidi Yesusara gaaggana izakko yides. 
Mark5:3 Hayssi addezi duufoson dizaadenne haray attoshin oonikka iza sansalatankka qachchanaas dandaybeenna. 
Mark5:4 Daro wode toho birataranne sansalatara qashettees. Gido attiin kushe sansalata duuseththi yeggees; toho biratakka menththereththi yeggees; oonikka iza oykkidi teqqanaas dandaybeenna. 
Mark5:5 Gallassinne qamma duufota giddoninne zumata bolla yuuyi yuuyi waassishe ba bolla shuchchara qanxxereththidi madunththees. 
Mark5:6 Izikka Yesusa haahon be7ida mala woththan izakko yiidi iza sinththan gulbatidi goynnides. 
Mark5:7 Keehi waassidi, «Haysso wogga Xoossa Naa Yesusa, nees tanara aazi dizee? Xoossa sunththan ta nena woossays tana waayisoppa» gides." 
Mark5:8 Izi hessa giday Yesusi kase, «Neni tuna ayanay hayssafe keza» gida gishshassa." 
Mark5:9 Hessafe qasse Yesusi iza, «Ne sunththi oonee?» giidi oychchides. Izikka, «Nuni darota gidida gishshas ta sunththi Leegoone geetettees» gides." 
Mark5:10 He dereppe kessi yeddontta mala Yesusa keehi woossides. 
Mark5:11 Heen matan zuma bolla daro guddunththi heemettees. 
Mark5:12 Tuna ayanati, «Nu guddunththatan gelana mala nuus ero garkkii?» giidi Yesusa woossida." 
Mark5:13 Izikka isttas, «Ero» gides. Tuna ayanatikka addezappe kezidi guddunththatan gelida. Nam7u shii gidiza guddunththati wuri aafozara duguththaa genderetti wodhdhidi abban mitettida." 
Mark5:14 Guddunththa heemmizayti baqatidi hanidayssa katamaninne dere giddon yootida. Dereykka hanidayssa beyanaas ba dizasoppe dizasoppe kezides. 
Mark5:15 Yesusaakko yiidi daro daydanththi iza bolla diza addeza wozinay izas simmiin may7o may7idinne wogara uttidayssa yida asay be7idi babbides. 
Mark5:16 Hayssa be7ida asay daydanththi iza bolla diza addeza gishshassinne guddunththati hanoyssa derezas yootides. 
Mark5:17 Hessafe guye he dere asay Yesusi istta dere yeddidi baana mala woossides. 
Mark5:18 Yesusi wogolon gelishin daydanththati izappe kezida addezi Yesusara daanaas woossides. 
Mark5:19 Yesusi qasse izi oychchidayssa akkay giidi, «Neni gede neso ba; Goday nees ay mala gita miish ooththidaakkonne izi nees ooththida maaroteththaa neso asaas yoota» gides." 
Mark5:20 Addezikka baso biidi Yesusi izas ooththida gita miish wursi tammu katama geetettiza deren yootiin siyiday wurikka malalettides. 
Mark5:21 Qasseka Yesusi wogolon gelidi gede pinth pinnidi abbaa achchan dishin daro asay iza ach shiiqidinne iza giddoththides. 
Mark5:22 Ayhudata Woosa Keeththa halaqatappe issoy Iya7iroosa geetettizayssi izi dizaso biidi Yesusa demmida mala iza toho bolla kundidi 
Mark5:23 «Taas guuththa naa dizaara hayqqana gawus. Iza hayqqontta paxa daana mala ne haa yaada ne kushe izi bolla woththarkii?» giidi keehi woossides. 
Mark5:24 Yesusikka izara issife bides. Daro asay iza un7eththana gakkanaas kaallides. 
Mark5:25 Tammanne nam7u layth kumeth suuththi izi bollafe gukkiza maccas dizaara heen asaara dawus. 
Mark5:26 Iza baas diza miish wursana gakkanaas aakimeppe aakime laamon daro daaburadus. Gido attiin sakoy izis gede darides attiin aykkoka lo7ibeenna. 
Mark5:27 Iza Yesusa gishshas siyida mala asaa giddora Yesusa guyera kaallada iza may7o bochchadus. 
Mark5:28 Gaasoykka, «Ta ay hanadakka iza may7o kushera bocho bochchidaakkoka paxana» gaada qoppida gishshassa." 
Mark5:29 Gukkiza suuththay heerakka eqqi aggides; izakka paxidayssa ba asateththan eradus. 
Mark5:30 Baappe wolqqay kezidayssa Yesusi eridi gede asaakko simmidi, «Ta may7o oonee bochchiday?» gides." 
Mark5:31 Iza kaallizayti qasse, «Hayssi derey un7ettidi sugettishin beyashe waanada, ‹Tana bochchiday oonee?› gay» gida." 
Mark5:32 Yesusi hessa ooththiday oonakkonne beyanaas yuushshi xeellides. 
Mark5:33 Maccassayakka baas aazi waanidaakko erada babbashenne kokkorashe yaada Yesusa sinththan gufannada tumaa wursa izas yootadus. 
Mark5:34 Izikka, «Ta nayee! Ne ammanoy nena ashshides. Saron ba! Ne waayeppe paxa!» gides."
