Mark5:35 Yesusi buro haasayan dishin Ayhudata Woosa Keeththa halaqa Iya7iroosa sooppe yiidi Iya7iroosas, «Ne naya hayqqadus; Godaa mela aazas daabursay?» gida." 
Mark5:36 Gido attiin Yesusi istta haasayaa leppi histtidi Ayhudata Woosa Keeththaa halaqaza, «Ne ammano xalla ammana attiin babbofa!» gides." 
Mark5:37 Phexroosa, Yaaqooberanne Yaaqoobe isha Yohannisappe attiin haray oonikka iza kaallana mala koyibeenna." 
Mark5:38 Gede Ayhudata Woosa Keeththa halaqazaso gakkida mala asay waassishe camo yeeho yeekkizayssa be7ides. 
Mark5:39 Soo gelidi, «Hayssi wuri aaza waasonne aaza yeehoo? Naya dhiskadus attiin hayqqabeekku» gides." 
Mark5:40 Qasse asay wuri iza bolla miiccides; asaa wursika keeththaafe kessidi nayi aawaanne nayi aayiyo qasseka izara issife yidayta iza kaallizayta xalla kaaleththidi naya dizaso gelides. 
Mark5:41 Nay kushekka oykkidi, «Xaabita kum!» gides. «Xaabita kum!» guussas birsheththi, «Hanne nayee denda» guussa." 
Mark5:42 Nayakka heerakka denda eqqadus; yaanne haa hemettadus. Iziska layththay tammanne nam7a; asaykka he hanozan daro malalettides. 
Mark5:43 Yesusi hayssa oonikka erontta mala keehi minththi yootides; «Nays maana quma immite» gides. 
Mark6:1 Hessafe guye Yesusi heeppe dendidi gede ba dere bides. Iza kaallizaytikka izara bida. 
Mark6:2 Ayhudata Sambatay gakkiin Ayhudata Woosa Keeththe gelidi tamaarsishin siyida asay, «Hayssi addezi hayssa wursi awappe ekkidee? Hayssi izas imettida erateththay aazee? Qasse hayti izi ooththiza malaatati waani iza kushen hanizoo?» gishe malalettida." 
Mark6:3 «Hayssi anaaxeza gidennee? Maarami naa Yaaqoobentta Yoosantta, Yuhudanttanne Simoonantta isha gidennee? Iza michcheti nunara haan nu matan dizayta dettenee?» giidi hessafe dendidayssan izan ufayettibeettenna." 
Mark6:4 Yesusikka isttas, «Nabey bonchchettonttay ba deren ba dabbota giddoninne baso asaa achchan xalla» gides." 
Mark6:5 Heen guuththa harganchchata bolla kushe woththi paththoriippe attiin hara aykko malaatakka ooththanaas dandaybeenna. 
Mark6:6 Isttas ammanoy bayndayssa be7idi malalettides. Hessafekka Yesusi gutan gutan yuuyi yuuyi tamaarsides. 
Mark6:7 Tammanne nam7ata baakko xeygidi nam7u nam7u histti kiittishe tuna ayanata bolla isttas godateth immides. 
Mark6:8 Izi, «Oges gidiza guufe attiin oge shinqe woykko korojo woykko miishshe oykkofte." 
Mark6:9 Caamma aaththite gido attiin laammana may7o oykkofte. 
Mark6:10 Issi keeththe intte gelikko he katamaappe intte kezana gakkanaas he keeththaan diite. 
Mark6:11 Awanka oonikka inttena mokki ekkontta ixxiko heeppe kezishe he dereta bolla markka gidana mala intte toho bolla diza gudulla qoqofte» giidi azazides. 
Mark6:12 Isttika heeppe kezidi derey maaroteththan gelana mala sabbakida. 
Mark6:13 Daro daydanththata kessida; daro harganchchata zayte tiyi tiydi paththida. 
Mark6:14 Yesusa sunththi kaseppe eretti eretti bishin kawo Herdoosi hessa siyides. Issi issi asati, «Hayssa mala malaatata ooththizay Xammaqiza Yohannisi hayqoppe dendiina» gida." 
Mark6:15 Baggayti, «Eelaasa» geettes; bagga asay qasse, «Kase nabetappe issaa misatees» geettes." 
Mark6:16 Herdoosi yo7oza siyidi, «Ta iza qoodhe qanxxisida Yohannisi hayqoppe paxi dendides» gides." 
Mark6:17 Herdoosi ba isha Piliphoosa machcho Herodiyaado ekkida gaason oykettidi qashettana mala azazidi Yohannisa qasho keeththe gelththides. 
Mark6:18 Yohannisi Herdoosa, «Ne isha machcho ne ekkontta mala wogay nena diggees» gida gishshas qachchides." 
Mark6:19 Herodiyaada hessa gishshas hoollottada iza wodhisanaas koyadus shin dandayabeekku. 
Mark6:20 Gaasoykka Yohannisi xillonne geeshsha as gididayssa Herdoosi eriza gishshas Yohannisas babbeessinne iza naagees. Yohannisi yootizayssa Herdoosi siyidi hirgizaa gidikkoka izi yootizayssa wozinappe siyees. 
Mark6:21 Herdoosa yeleta gallas bonchchanaas dhoqqa shuumetas, ola wottadarata azaziza waannatassinne Galila biittan keehi erettiza gita asatas gibira kessides; hessika Herodiyaadis giiga gallas gidides." 
Mark6:22 Herodiyaadi macca naya gelada asaa sinththan mazamure yexxiin Herdoosanne izi xeygida asaa izi yeththay ufayssides. Kawozikka nayo, «Ne koyza miish ubbaa tana oychcha; ta nees immana» gides." 
Mark6:23 Qasseka ta kawoteththa baggaa gididaakkoka ne oychchiko ubbaa ta nees immana giidi izis caaqqides. 
Mark6:24 Naya elela kezada ba aayeyo, «Kawoza ay oychchoo?» gadus. Aayiyakka, «Xammaqiza Yohannisa hu7e qanxxada imma ga» gadus." 
Mark6:25 Nayakka elela kezada kawozaakko gelada, «Xammaqiza Yohannisa hu7e keren woththada ne taas immana mala koyays» ga oychchadus." 
Mark6:26 Kawoy he yo7ozan daro modhettides; gido attiin xeygettida imaththaa gishshassinne caaqqida qaalaa gishshas izis akkay gaanaas koyibeenna. 
Mark6:27 Hessa gishshas wottadaratappe issaa eeson kiittidi Yohannisa qoodhe qanxxidi iza hu7e ekki yaana mala azazides; izikka biidi qasho keeththaa giddon Yohannisa qoodhe qanxxides. 
Mark6:28 Hu7eza kerera ehidi nays immides; nayakka ba aayeys immadus. 
Mark6:29 Yohannisa kaallizaytikka hessa siyida mala yiidi Yohannisa aha ekki efidi moogida. 
Mark6:30 Hessafe guye Hawaareti simmidi Yesusa achchan yuuyi aadhdhi ba ooththidayssanne ba tamaarsidayssa ubbaa izas yootida. 
Mark6:31 Daro asay yishenne bishe giza gishshas quma miza wodeykka beettibeenna; «Ane intte xalla tanara asi bayndaso biidi guuth shempi ekkite» gides. 
Mark6:32 Hessa gishshas istti barkka wogolon gelidi issi asikka bayndaso bida. 
Mark6:33 Istti bishin daroti be7idi tohora woththan isttafe sinththe aadhdhida. 
Mark6:34 Yesusi wogolozappe wodhdhiza wode daro derey shiiqi uttidayssa be7ides. Heemmizaadey baynda mehe mala gidida gishshas asaas qadhettides; daro yo7okka tamaarso oykkides. 
Mark6:35 He wode gadey qammi qammi biza gishshas iza kaallizayti izakko shiiqidi, «Hayssi nu dizasoy bazzoko; gadeykka qammides." 
Mark6:36 Hayssa heeran asi dizaso biidi asay baas miza kath shammi maana mala asaa yedda» gida. 
Mark6:37 Izi isttas zaaridi, «Asaas miza miish intte immite» gides. Isttika malalettidi, «Nuni biidi nam7u xeetu dinaarera kath shammidi hayssa asaas immizaakko gidandee?» gida." 
Mark6:38 Izikka isttas, «Inttes ay keena ukeththi dizaakko ane biidi xeellite» giin istti bi xeellidi, «Ichchashu ukeththinne nam7u moley dees» gida." 
Mark6:39 Hessafe kaallidi asaa cilila maata bolla butten butten utisana mala azazides. 
Mark6:40 Asaykka xeetu xeetunne ichchashu tammu ichchashu tammu gididi butten uttides. 
Mark6:41 Izikka ichchashu ukeththatanne nam7u moleta ba kushen oykkidi pude salo xeellidi anjjidinne ukeththaa menththi menththi asaas gishana mala bana kaallizaytas immides; nam7u moletakka ubba asaas shaakereththides. 
Mark6:42 Asay wurikka miidi kallides. 
Mark6:43 Yesusa kaallizayti asay kalli miin attidayssa tammanne nam7u leemate kumeth shiishshides. 
Mark6:44 Kaththaa mida asaappe attumasay xalla ichchashu shii. 
Mark6:45 Heerakka izi asaa moyzishe iza kaallizayti sinththatidi gede pinth Betesayda geetettizaso pinnana mala azazides. 
Mark6:46 Heeppeka istta aggaagidi woossanaas pude zuma bolla kezides. 
Mark6:47 Gadey qammiin wogoloy abbaa giddon dishin izi barkka biitta bolla dees. 
Mark6:48 Abbaa bolla carkoy keehi metida gishshas iza kaallizayti abbaa shiri shiri wogolo laaggiza miishshaara baaxetishin Yesusi be7ides. Wontta bolla isttako yides; yiidinne istta achchara aadhdhi baanaaththo hanides. 
Mark6:49 Gido attiin aadhdhi baana hanishin iza be7ida mala moytille be7ida misatiin wurikka waassida. 
Mark6:50 Wurikka iza be7idi dagammida; izikka heerakka istta yoochchidi, «Aykkoy baa; tanakko dagammofte!» gides." 
Mark6:51 Izikka wogolon isttako geliin carkoy co7u gides, isttika daro malalettida." 
Mark6:52 Kase izi ukeththan ooththida malaata birsheth istti erontta gishshas istta wozinay doccides. 
Mark6:53 Abbaa pinnidi Gensereexe geetettizaso gakkida; wogolaappe wodhdhidi wogoloza heen qachchidi aggi bida. 
Mark6:54 Istti wogoloppe wodhdhida mala asay Yesusa erides. 
Mark6:55 Wurikka ba dizaso dizaso woxerettidi harganchchata halan tookki tookki ekkidi Yesusi dizaso ehida. 
Mark6:56 Izi gakkida gutan woykko katama giddon woykko dere giddon gidiin harganchchati izi aadhdhishin iza woossidinne iza may7o bochchidi paxana mala shiishshi shiishshi dubbushay dizason woththida. Izi aadhdhi bishin iza may7o bochchidayti wuri paxida. 
Mark7:1 Hessafe guye Farsaawetinne Yerusalaameppe yida issi issi xaafeti Yesusa lanqen yuuyi aadhdhida. 
Mark7:2 Yesusa kaallizaytappe baggayti meecettontta qita kushera kath mishin be7ida. 
Mark7:3 Farsaawetinne kase cima Ayhuda asati kase dere woga naaganaas kushe lo7eththi meecettontta kath mi erettenna. 
Mark7:4 Giya bi simmikokka bolla meecetti geeyontta dishe kath mi erettenna. Hessaththoka wancaka, otokka, kerekka, ichchiza hiiththeka meechcha mala hara wogatakka naageettes." 
Mark7:5 Farsaawetinne xaafeti Yesusa, «Nena kaallizayti kase aawata wogaa mala duus aggidi aazas kushe meecettontta kath mizoo?» giidi oychchida." 
Mark7:6 Izikka isttas, «Isayaasi qoodheppe qommon haniza intte gishshas, ‹Hayssi derey ba metershan xalala tana bonchchees; wozinay gidikko taappe haakkides." 
Mark7:7 Taas mela hada goynnees; istta timirteyka asi woththida woga xalla› giidi yootidayssi tuma» gides. 
Mark7:8 Xoossa wogaa aggidi asi woththida wogaa naageettes. 
Mark7:9 Qasseka, «Intte wogaas giidi Xoossa wogaa intte aggaagiza cinccateththa ogey inttes dees." 
Mark7:10 Ays giikko Musey, ‹Ne aayonne ne aawaa bonchcha; ba aayonne ba aawaa cayizaadey mulekka hayqqo› gides." 
Mark7:11 Gido attiin intte qasse, ‹Issi asi ba aawaa woykko ba aayo intte taappe demmanaas koshshiza maado ta Xoossas immadis› giikko," 
Mark7:12 intte qasse hayssaadey ba aawaska ba aayeysi hara aykkoka ooththana mala koyekketa. 
Mark7:13 Hessa gishshas intte wogaa naagana giidi Xoossa qaalaa laammeeta. Heytantta misatiza darota ooththeeta» gides. 
Mark7:14 Qasseka Yesusi asaa baakko xeygidi, «Wurikka ta gizaa siyitenne wozinan woththite." 
Mark7:15 Kareppe ulo gido gelidi as tunisiza issi miishshika deenna; harappeka ase tunisizay keeththa aawappe gede kare keziza miishsha. 
Mark7:16 Siyiza hayththi dizay siyo!» gides. 
Mark7:17 Izi asaa karen aggidi keeththe geliin iza kaallizayti izi yootida leemisoza birsheth Yesusa oychchida. 
Mark7:18 Izikka istta, «Intteska yo7oy gelennee? Kareppe gelidi ase tunisiza miishshi aazikka deenna." 
Mark7:19 Kareppe gelizay gede wozinan gidontta duge qanththa giddo gelees; qasse heeppe izaade asateththaafe gede kare kezees» gides; Yesusi hessa giday asi miza kaththi wurikka geesh gididayssa qonccisanaassa. 
Mark7:20 Kaaleththidikka, «Asappe kezizaazi ase tunisees." 
Mark7:21 Asa wozina giddofe kezizay iita qofata, layma amonne kaysoteth, ase wodho, laymateth," 
Mark7:22 Yiiqeteth, iitateth, baleththo, layma kaas, qanaateteth, asa sunth mooro, otoreteththinne azalla." 
Mark7:23 Hayti iita hanoti wuri asappe kezeettessinne ase tuniseettes» gides. 
Mark7:24 Yesusi heeppe kezidi Xiroose geetettiza dere bides; heen issaade keeththe gelidi izi heen dizayssa asi erontta mala koyides. Gido attiin izi heen iza duussay qotettanaas dandayettibeenna. 
Mark7:25 Heerakka issi tuna ayanay oykkida guuththa naa dizaari aaya Yesusi heen dizayssa siyada izakko yaada iza toho bolla kundadus. 
Mark7:26 Maccassaya Girike qaala haasayza maccas shin iza yelettidasoy Sirofinqe geetettees. Izakka Yesusi nayppe tuna ayana kessana mala woossadus. 
Mark7:27 Yesusi zaaridi izis, «Nayta quma ekki kanas yegganaas bessontta gishshas koyro nayti mi kalletto» gides." 
Mark7:28 Izakka zaarada, «Ee Godoo! Kanatikka maadda matan de7idi nayta kusheppe gaden wodhdhidayssa meettes» gadus." 
Mark7:29 Izikka, «Histtiko neni hessa gida gishshas ba! Daydanththay ne nayppe kezides» gides." 
Mark7:30 Iza simmada soo bishin naya daydanththay yeddiin paxada hiixan ichchidaaro demmadus. 
Mark7:31 Hessafe Yesusi Xiroose biittafe dendidi Sidoona geetettizasora aadhdhi tammu katama geetettizasora kanththidi gede Galila Abbaako gakkides. 
Mark7:32 Asay issi hayththa tullenne doona duude as izakko hee ekki yiidi Yesusi iza bolla ba kushe woththana mala woossida. 
Mark7:33 Yesusikka iza asaappe shaakki ekki biidi ba kushe biradhdheta addeza hayththan gelththides; qasseka cuch cuttidi addeza inxars bochchides. 
Mark7:34 Pude salo xeellidinne tookki shempidi, «Efta» gides. Hessika, «Pogetta» guussa." 
Mark7:35 Heerakka addeza hayththati pogettida; inxarsayka birshettiin geeshshi haasaydes. 
Mark7:36 Yesusi hayssa be7idayti oonaska yootontta mala azazides; gido attiin asay izi azazizadayssafe bollara keehi gujjidi yootides. 
Mark7:37 Derezikka keehi malalettidi, «Izi ooththidayssi wuri lo7o; tulleti siyana mala, doona duudeti haasayana mala ooththides» gida." 
Mark8:1 He wode qasse daro asi shiiqides. Shiiqida asaas miza kaththi baynda gishshas Yesusi bana kaallizayta xeygidi," 
Mark8:2 «Hayti asati tanara heedzdzu gallas gakkanaas gam7ida gishshassinne qasseka isttas miza kaththi baynda gishshas tana miichcheettes. 
Mark8:3 Isttafe issi issi asati haahoppe yida gishshas hayssa gafara ta istta soo yeddiko daaburdi oge bolla kundana» gides. 
Mark8:4 Iza kaallizaytikka zaaridi, «Hayssa bazzon hayssa mala dere mizana quma awappe demmanee?» gida." 
Mark8:5 Izikka istta, «Inttekon aappun ukeththi dizee?» gi oychchides. Isttika, «Laappun ukeththi dees» gida." 
Mark8:6 Izikka asay gaden uttana mala azazides; laappun ukeththaa ba kushen oykki galatidinne menththidi asaas gishechchana mala bana kaallizaytas immiin isttika derezas gishida. 
Mark8:7 Qasseka heen diza qeeri guuththa moleta gishshas Xoossaa galatidi guuththa moleta asaas gishechchana mala bana kaallizayta azazides. 
Mark8:8 Dereykka miidi kallides. Hessafekka iza kaallizayti maaddaafe palahida kath laappun leemate kumeth denththida. 
Mark8:9 Hessa mida asay oyddu shii gidana. He asaa moyzidi bana kaallizaytara wogolon gelidi gede Dalmanuuta geetettizaso bides. 
Mark8:10  
Mark8:11 Farsaaweti yiidi Yesusara palameteth oykkida; iza paaccanaas koyidi banttana saloppe malaata bessana mala oychchida. 
Mark8:12 Izikka tookki shempidi, «Hayssi yeletazi aazas malaata koyzee? Ta inttes tuma gays; hayssa yeletaas issi malataykka imettenna» gides." 
Mark8:13 Istta heen aggidinne wogolon gelidi he pinth pinnides. 
Mark8:14 Iza kaallizayti kath oykkontta balettida gishshas issi ukeththi attiin wogolo giddon hara ay kaththika deenna. 
Mark8:15 Yesusi istta, «Farsaaweta irshofenne Herdoosa irshofe naagettite» giidi azazides." 
Mark8:16 Istti qasse ba giddon issoy issaara, «Izi nuna hayssa gizay nuus kaththi baynda gishshassa» gi haasayettida." 
Mark8:17 Qasse Yesusi istta qofaa eridi, «Nuus kaththi baynda gishshas gaasa giidi intte giddon aazas haasayetteetii? Ha7ikka yuushshi qoppeketii? Wozinankka woththekeetii? Woykko intte wozinay shuchchatidee?" 
Mark8:18 Inttes ayfey dees shin xeelleketii? Hayththi dees shin siyekketii? Akeekekketii? 
Mark8:19 Ichchashu ukeththaa ichchashu shii asaas ta menththa immiin aappun leemate kumeththa kath denththidetii?» gides. Isttika zaaridi, «Tammanne nam7u» gida." 
Mark8:20 Izikka, «Laappun ukeththaa oyddu shii asaas ta menththa immiin aappun leemate kumeththa kath denththidetii?» gi oychchiin isttika, «Laappun» gida." 
Mark8:21 Izikka isttas, «Histtiin ha7i gakkanaas yuushshi qoppibeekketakkaa!» gides." 
Mark8:22 Hessafe gede Betesayda geetettizaso bida; guuththa asatikka ayfe qooqe as Yesusaakko ehidi Yesusi iza bochchana mala woossida. 
Mark8:23 Izikka he qooqeza kushe oykki goochchidi asi dizasoppe gede kare kessidi addeza ayfen cuttidinne ba kushe iza bolla woththidi, «Ha7i nees aazi beettizee?» gi oychchides." 
Mark8:24 Izikka dhoqqu gi xeellidi, «Asay mith misatidi qaaxettishe beettes» gides." 
Mark8:25 Qasseka Yesusi ba kusheta iza ayfeta bolla woththides; heerakka iza ayfeti xeellida; poo7oykka izas simmiin wursika geeshshi xeellides. 
Mark8:26 Qasse, «Ha gutata giddo geloppanne oonaska yootoppa» giidi iza gede izaso yeddides." 
Mark8:27 Yesusi bana kaallizaytara Qisaariya Piliphisiyoose geetettiza dere achchan diza gutata bides; istti oge bolla dishin bana kaallizayta, «Tana asay oona gizee?» giidi oychchides." 
Mark8:28 Isttika zaaridi nena, «Xammaqiza Yohannisa gizaytikka deettes, baggayti qasse Eelaasa geettes; harati qasse nabetappe issaade geettes» giidi yootida." 
Mark8:29 Kaaleththidikka, «Inttech tana oona geetii?» giidi oychchides. Phexroosi, «Neni Kirstoosa» gides." 
Mark8:30 Yesusikka ba gishshas oonaska istti yootontta mala minththi yootides. 
Mark8:31 Hessafe Yesusi bana kaallizayta, «Asa Nay daro waaye beyanayssanne dere cimatan, qeeseta halaqaninne xaafetan kadhettana; asa kushen hayqqana, hayqoppe heedzdzanththo gallas dendana bessees» giidi tamaarso oykkides." 
Mark8:32 Izikka hessa isttas qonccisi yootides, Phexroosikka iza dumma shaakki efidi, «Hessaththo gooppa!» giidi hanqides." 
Mark8:33 Yesusi qasse bana kaallizayta yuushshi xeellishe Phexroosa, «Haysso Xala7e ne taappe gede guye ba! Neni asazaappe attiin Xoossaaz qoppaka!» giidi hanqides." 
Mark8:34 Hessafe guye asaa bana kaallizaytara issife baakko xeygidi, «Tana kaallanaas dosizaadey diikko bana kaddo; ba masqale tookkidi tana kaallo." 
Mark8:35 Ba shempo ashshana dosizaadey dhayssana shin ta gishshassinne ta Mishiraachcho qaalaa gishshas ba shempo dhayssizaadey wurikka ashshana. 
Mark8:36 Asi alame kumeth haarikkonne ba shemppo dhayssiko iza ay go7anee? 
Mark8:37 Woykko asi ba shempo gishshas laame ekkanay aazi dizee? 
Mark8:38 «Hayssa laymanne nagaranchcha yeleta giddon dishe tananinne ta qaalan yeellatiza asi wuri ta Asa Nay ta Aawaa bonchchoranne Geeshsha Kiitanchchatara yiza wode izan yeellatana» gides. 
Mark9:1 Kaaleththidikka Yesusi «Ta inttes tuma gays; hayssan eqqida asaappe Xoossa kawoteththi wolqqara yishin beyana gakkanaas hayqqontta gam7ana issi issi asati deettes» gides. 
Mark9:2 Usuppun gallassafe guye Yesusi Phexroosa, Yaaqoobenne Yohannisa banara kaaleththi ekkidi issi gita zuma bolla kezides. Istti barkka dishin istta sinththan iza medhay laametti wodhdhides." 
Mark9:3 Izi may7ida may7oy biitta bolla oonikka may7o meeccidi hessa mala booththanaas dandayontta booth boottides. 
Mark9:4 He wode Eelaasinne Musey Yesusara haasayettishe isttas beettida. 
Mark9:5 Phexroosi Yesusa, «Astamaaree! Nuni haan hayssan dizaakko nuus lo7o; nees issi daase, Muses issi daase, qasse Eelaasas issi daase, heedzdzu daaseta nu ooththikochchii?» gides." 
Mark9:6 Daro babbida gishshas Phexroosi ba gizayssa eridi gibeenna. 
Mark9:7 Heerakka shaaray istta kammiin shaara giddora, «Hayssi ta dosiza ta naazakko! Izi gizaa siyite» giza qaala giirissi yides." 
Mark9:8 Heerakka istti yuushshi xeelliin Yesusappe attiin oonikka hara asi isttara deenna. 
Mark9:9 Istti zuma bollafe duge wodhdhishin Asa Nay hayqoppe dendana gakkanaas hayssa istti be7idayssa oonaska yootontta mala azazides. 
Mark9:10 Isttika baas yootida qaala ba wozinan oykkida shin, «Hayqoppe dendo guussi ay guussee?» giidi ba giddon haasayettida." 
Mark9:11 Qasse istti Muse wogaa tamaarsizayti, «Kasetidi Eelaasi yaana koshshees aazas gizoo?» giidi iza oychchida." 
Mark9:12 Yesusi isttas, «Tumukka Eelaasi kaseti yiidi wursika giigsana. Histtiinkka Asa Nay daro waaye ekkanaassinne kadhettanaas bessees geetetti xaafettidayssi inttes ay misatizee?" 
Mark9:13 Gido attiin ta inttes gizay Eelaasi gidikko yides shin asaykka iza gishshas xaafettida mala bana koshshida mala iza bolla ooththides» gides. 
Mark9:14 Geedon attida Yesusa kaallizaytakko istti simmi yishin daro asay istta giddoththiin Muse wogaa tamaarsizayti isttara palamettizayssa be7ida. 
Mark9:15 Derey iza demmida mala malalettidi sarokkanaas izakko woxxides. 
Mark9:16 Izikka istta, «Intte isttara aaza gishshas palameteetii?» giidi oychchides." 
Mark9:17 Asaa giddofe issaadey, «Astamaaree! Tuna ayanay izan geliin doona duudida ta naa dayssa ta neekko ekka yadis." 
Mark9:18 Ayanazi dendiza wode bollafe yeggees; doonara goppontto kessi kessi yeggees; achchaaka garccees; asateththaaka zoodisees; tuna ayana kessetto gaada nena kaallizayta ta yootiin isttika dandaybeettenna» gides. 
Mark9:19 Yesusikka isttas zaaridi, «Intteno ammanontta yeletatoo, ayde gakkanaas ta inttenara daanee? Qasse ayde gakkanaas ta inttena dandayanee? Ane naaza haa ehite» gides." 
Mark9:20 Asaykka naaza izakko ehides, tuna ayanay Yesusa be7ida mala naaza heerakka gaden genderisidi kokkorisidinne doonara goppontto coppu histtides." 
Mark9:21 Yesusi naaza aawaa, «Hayssi hargey iza ayidesappe oykkidee?» gides. Naaza aawaykka, «Naateththafe doommidi» gides." 
Mark9:22 «Iza wodhanaas koyidi daro wode tamankka haaththankka yeggees. Nees dandayettiko nuus mishettanne nuna maadda» gides. 
Mark9:23 Yesusi qasse, « ‹Nees dandayettiko› gay? Ammanizaades wurikka dandayettees» gides." 
Mark9:24 Naaza aaway heerakka, «Ta ammanays shin ta ammanoy laafa, tana maaddarkkii!» giidi waassides." 
Mark9:25 Asay wocamishe buuretti ekkidi izakko yizayssa Yesusi be7idi, «Haysso tullenne duude ayanazoo! Hayssa naazappe keza, ne qasse simmada gelontta mala ta nena azazays» giidi tuna ayanaa seerides." 
Mark9:26 Tuna ayanazikka keehi waassides; naazikka keehi qakettidaappe guye naazappe kezides. Daroti hayqqides gaana gakkanaas naazi aha misatides. 
Mark9:27 Gido attiin Yesusi naaza kushe oykki denththides; naazikka dendi eqqides. 
Mark9:28 Yesusi soo gelidaappe guye iza kaallizayti, «Nu izappe tuna ayana kessanaas aazas dandaybeekkonii?» giidi iza oychchida." 
Mark9:29 Izikka isttas, «Hayssa malay kezana dandayzay woosaninne xooman xalla» gides." 
Mark9:30 Heeppe dendidi Galila baggara aadhdhi bida; Yesusi ba dizaso oonikka erana mala koyibeenna. 
Mark9:31 Gaasoykka Yesusi bana kaallizaytas, «Asa Nay asa kushen aadhdhi imettana; isttika iza wodhana, heedzdzanththo gallassafe guye izi dendana» giidi istta tamaarsiza gishshassa." 
Mark9:32 Gido attiin izi gizayssi isttas gelibeenna; iza oychchanaaska babbida. 
Mark9:33 Hessafe guye Qifirnahoome bida; izi keeththe gelidi, «Intte yishe oge bolla aaza gishshas palamettidetii?» gi oychchides." 
Mark9:34 Istti qasse oge bolla, «Nu giddon nuuppe ubbaafe aadhdhizay oonee?» giidi palamettida gishshas wurikka co7u gida." 
Mark9:35 Izi uttidaappe guye tammanne nam7ata xeygidi, «Koyro gidana koyzaadey ubbaafe wurseththinne ubbatas ashkara gido» gides." 
Mark9:36 Qii guuththa naa ehidi istta giddon essides. Idimmidi," 
Mark9:37 «Hayta guuththa naytappe issaade ta sunththan mokki ekkizaadey tanakka mokki ekkees; tana mokki ekkizaadey wuri tana xalala gidontta tana kiittidayssaka mokki ekkees» gides. 
Mark9:38 Yohannisikka, «Astamaaree! Issaadey ne sunththan daydanth kessishin nu beydos. Izi nuna kaallontta gishshas kessontta mala diggidos» gides." 
Mark9:39 Yesusi qasse, «Diggofte; oonikka ta sunththan malaata ooththidi eesotidi ta bolla iita haasayanaas dandayenna." 
Mark9:40 Nunara eqettonttay wuri nunara dees. 
Mark9:41 Ta inttes tumu gays; intte tiyettida Kirstoosas gidida gishshas ta sunththan issi wanca haath inttena ushshidaadey wuri ba oosoys waaga dhayenna. 
Mark9:42 «Hayta tana ammaniza ha guuththatappe issaades dhuphe gidizay wuri deexo woxa shuchchi iza qoodhen qashettiin duge abba gido olettidaakko izas lo7o gidana. 
Mark9:43 Hessa gishshas ne kushey nena baleththiko neeppe qanxxa yegga; nam7u kushera daada gede Gaanname taman ne baanayssafe kushe duuxa gidada gede de7on geloy nees lo7o gidana. 
Mark9:44 Gaannamen guxuney hayqqenna, tamaynne to7enna." 
Mark9:45 Nena ne tohoy baleththiko neeppe qanxxa digga; nam7u tohora daada gede Gaanname tamaan yegettanaappe ne wobbe gidada gede de7oso geloy nees lo7o. 
Mark9:46 Gaannamen guxuney hayqqenna, tamaynne to7enna." 
Mark9:47 Nena ne ayfey baleththiko wooca kessada neeppe digga; nam7u ayfera daada gede Gaannamen yegettanaappe issi ayfera Xoossa Kawoteth geloy nees lo7o. 
Mark9:48 Gaannamen guxuney hayqqenna tamaynne to7enna. 
Mark9:49 «Buro asi wuri taman paacettana. 
Mark9:50 «Maxiney lo7o; gido attiin maxiney ba maxineteththaa yeddiko intte wostti iza mal7o eranee? Intte asateththan maxiney de7o. Intte intte giddon dosettite» gides. 
Mark10:1 Yesusi heeppe dendidi gede Yuhuda geetettiza derenne Yordaanoose shaafappe pinththan diza dere bides. Dereykka qasse iza yuuyi aadhdhiin izi kase ba ooththiza mala asaa tamaarsides. 
Mark10:2 Issi issi Farsaaweti izakko yiidi, «Asi ba machcho anjji yeddanaas bessizee?» giidi iza paace oysho oychchida." 
Mark10:3 Izikka isttas, «Musey inttena ay gi azazidee?» giidi zaari oychchides." 
Mark10:4 Isttika izas, «Musey ta izo anjja yeddadis giza waraqata xaafi immidi anjjo gides» gida." 
Mark10:5 Yesusikka zaaridi istta, «Musey hayssa mala woga xaafidayssi intte wozinay minnida gishshassa." 
Mark10:6 Gido attiin koyro Xoossi medhdhishe maccanne adde ooththi medhdhides. 
Mark10:7 Hessa gishshas asi ba aawaanne ba aayo aggidi ba machchira waaxettees. 
Mark10:8 Nam7ay issi asho gideettes; hessa gishshas istti nam7ay issinoppe attiin nam7u deettenna. 
Mark10:9 Hessa gishshas Xoossi gaththi waaxidayta asi shaakkofo» gides. 
Mark10:10 Qasseka istti soo geliin iza kaallizayti he yo7oza gishshas zaari iza oychchida. 
Mark10:11 Izi isttas, «Oonikka ba machcho anjji yeddidi hara maccas ekkiko he maccassay bolla layma ooththees." 
Mark10:12 Maccassayakka ba azina aggada hara adde gelikko izakka laymatawus» gides. 
Mark10:13 Yesusi ba kushe woththana mala asay nayta izakko ehides. Iza kaallizayti qasse ehida asaa bolla hanqettida. 
Mark10:14 Yesusi hessa beyi hanqettidi, «Nayti taakko yetto; diggofte; Xoossa Kawoteththi haytantta malassa." 
Mark10:15 Ta inttes tumu gays; Xoossa Kawoteth hayssa guuththa nayta mala ekkonttaadey izin mulekka gelenna» gides. 
Mark10:16 Nayta idimmidi istta bolla ba kushe woththidi anjjides. 
Mark10:17 Heeppe buro oge kezishin issaadey woxxishe izakko gakkidinne iza sinththan gulbatidi, «Kiya astamaarentoo! Tani mernaa de7o demmana mala ay ooththana taas bessizee?» gi oychchides." 
Mark10:18 Yesusikka, «Aazas tana kiya gay? Issi Xoossafe attiin kiyay baa» gides." 
Mark10:19 «Neni azazota eray? ‹Wodhoppa; laymatoppa; kaysotoppa; wordo markkattofa; as baleththofa; ne aawaanne ne aayo bonchcha› gizayta» gides. 
Mark10:20 Addezikka zaaridi, «Astamaaree! Ta hayta wursa naateththafe oykkada naagadis» gides." 
Mark10:21 Yesusi iza xeellidinne dosidi, «Histtiko ha7i nees issi miishshi paccees. Baadanne nees dizaa wursa bayza; miishshaa manqotas imma; neni salon shiiqida miish demmandasa; histtadanne haa yaada tana kaalla» gides." 
Mark10:22 Addezikka hessa siyidi daro yiillotides; izas daro aqotay diza gishshas muuzottishe bides. 
Mark10:23 Yesusi yuushshi aaththi xeellidi bana kaallizayta, «Duretas Xoossa Kawoteth geloy ay mala deexoo!» gides." 
Mark10:24 Iza kaallizaytikka iza haasayan malalettida; Yesusi qasse zaaridi, «Naytoo! Xoossa Kawoteth geloy ay mala deexo miishshee!" 
Mark10:25 Durey Xoossa kawoteth gelanayssafe gaamellay narpe lukora aadhdhanayssi kawuyana!» gides. 
Mark10:26 Iza kaallizaytikka darssi malalettidi ba giddon issoy issaa, «Histtiin ooni attana dandayzee?» gida." 
Mark10:27 Yesusi istta xeellidi, «Hayssi asas dandayettenna; Xoossa matan gidikko hessa mala gidenna. Xoossas wurikka dandayettees» gides." 
Mark10:28 Phexroosi qasse, «Hekko; nuni wursika aggidi nena kaallidos» gides." 
Mark10:29 Yesusikka zaaridi, «Ta inttes tumu gays; ta gishshassinne Mishiraachcho qaalaa gishshas giidi ba keeththe, woykko ba ishata, woykko ba michcheta, woykko ba aayo, woykko ba aawaa, ba nayta, woykko ba gade aggida asi wuri," 
Mark10:30 hayssa ha wodezan ha7i goodeteththara keeththata, ishata, michcheta, aayeta, naytanne gadekka xeetu kushe aaththi ekkonttaynne buro yaana alamezankka mernaa de7o laattonttaadey deenna." 
Mark10:31 Gido attiin sinththatida daroti guyetana; guyetidayti sinththatana» gides. 
Mark10:32 Istti Yerusalaame efiza oge bolla dishin Yesusi isttafe sinththe sinththe bees. Iza kaallizayti iza buussaan malalettida. Hankko iza gaason diza asay qasse izas babbides; qasseka tammanne nam7ata derezappe dumma shaakkidi ba bolla aazi gakkanaakkon isttas hizgi yootides; 
Mark10:33 «Nuni Yerusalaame kezana; Asa Nay qeeseta halaqatassinne Muse wogaa tamaarsizaytas aadhdhi imettana; isttika iza bolla hayqo pirda pirdananne dere asaas aaththi immana. 
Mark10:34 Iza bolla qidhi kaa7ana; iza bolla cuttana; izakka garafananne wodhanashin izi heedzdzu gallassafe guye hayqoppe dendana.» 
Mark10:35 Qasse Zabdoosa nayti Yaaqoobeynne Yohannisi izakko shiiqidi, «Astamaaree! Nuni nena woossidayssa ne nuus wursa ooththana mala nu koyoos» gida." 
Mark10:36 Izikka isttas, «Ta inttes ay ooththana mala koyeetii?» gides." 
Mark10:37 Isttika, «Neni ne kawoteththa bonchchon diza wode nuuppe issaadey ne ushachchan, issaadey ne hadirsan uttana mala nuus ero garkkii?» gida." 
Mark10:38 Yesusikka, «Intte oychchizayssa erekketa; tani uyana ushshaa uyanaassinne tani xammaqettiza xinqataa intte xammaqettanaas dandayandetii?» gides." 
Mark10:39 Isttika zaaridi, «Ee, dandayoos» gida. Yesusikka, «Ta uyiza ushshaa intte uyananne ta xammaqettiza xinqataa intte xammaqettana." 
Mark10:40 Gido attiin ta ushachchara woykko ta hadirsara uteththi Xoossi isttas giigsidaytas attiin ta immana miish gidenna» gides. 
Mark10:41 Tammati hessa siyidi Yaaqoobenne Yohannisa bolla hanqettida. 
Mark10:42 Yesusikka istta issi bolla shiishshidi, «Dere halaqa geetettizayti dere haarizayssa mala istta shuumeti istta bolla ba godateth bessizayssa intte ereeta." 
Mark10:43 Gido attiin intte giddon gita gidana koyza ubbay ashkara gido. 
Mark10:44 Sinththe aadhdhana koyzay wurikka ubbaas aylle gido. 
Mark10:45 Asa Nay gidikko asas ooththanaassinne ba shempo darota gishshas aaththi immanaas yides attiin ase oosisanaas yibeenna» gides. 
Mark10:46 Heeppe gede Iyarkko bida; Yesusinne iza kaallizayti hara daro asatara Iyarkkofe kezishin Ximoosa naa Barxemoosa geetettiza ayfe qooqey oge bolla uttidi woossees. 
Mark10:47 Izikka yizay Naazirete Yesusa gididayssa siyidi, «Dawite naa Yesusa tana maara» giidi keehi waassides." 
Mark10:48 Daroti izi co7u gaana mala hanqida; gido attiin izi, «Dawite nawu! Tana maara» giidi keehi waassides." 
Mark10:49 Yesusikka eqqidi, «Iza haa xeygite» gides. Isttika qooqeza, «Aykkoy baa denda nena xeygees» gida." 
Mark10:50 Izikka ba may7o qaari yeggidi pusukku gi dendi eqqidi Yesusaakko yides. 
Mark10:51 Yesusikka, «Ta nees ay ooththana mala koyay?» gides. Qooqezikka, «Astamaarentoo! Ta xeellana koyays» gides." 
Mark10:52 Yesusikka zaaridi, «Ba nena ne ammanoy paththides» gides. Heerakka iza ayfey xeellides. Izikka Yesusa kaalli bides." 
Mark11:1 Istti gede Yerusalaamen Dabrazayte geetettiza zuma achchan diza Betefaagenne Bitaaniya geetettizaso matida wode Yesusi bana kaallizaytappe nam7ata," 
Mark11:2 «Gede intte sinththan diza gutayo biite. Intte he gelida mala heen asi toggi erontta qashon diza hare gutte intte demmana; birshidi iza haa ekki yiite. 
Mark11:3 Oonikka inttena, ‹Hayssa ays ooththeetii?› giikko Godaas koshshees giidi yootite; izikka inttes eeson zaari yeddana» gi kiittides." 
Mark11:4 Isttika biidi issi keeththa karen oge bolla qashetti diza hare gutte demmidi birshida. 
Mark11:5 Heen eqqida issi issi asati, «Hare gutteza aazas birsheetii?» gi oychchida." 
Mark11:6 Yesusa kaallizayti Yesusi isttas gida mala asatas yootiin ero ekki biite gida. 
Mark11:7 Guttezakka Yesusaakko ehidi ba may7o iza zokko bolla yeggiin Yesusi iza toggides. 
Mark11:8 Daro asay ba may7o kessi kessi oge bolla miccides. Bagga asay cilila miththa hayth qanxxi qanxxidi oge bolla laallides. 
Mark11:9 Yesusappe sinththaranne guyera diza asay qaala dhoqqu histtidi, «Hoosa7inna; Godaa sunththan yizaadey anjjettidaade." 
Mark11:10 Hanna yizaara nu aawaa Dawite kawoteththaya anjjettidaaro; hoosa7inna! Bolla salon Xoossi bonchchetto» gishe waassides. 
Mark11:11 Yesusi Yerusalaame gakkidi hessafekka Xoossa Keeththe gelides. He heeran dizayssa ubbaa xeellidi gadey qammida gishshas tammanne nam7atara gede Bitaaniya kezides. 
Mark11:12 Wonteththa gallas istti Bitaaniyappe kezi bishin Yesusi gafides. 
Mark11:13 Izi issi hayththi cililida balase geetettiza miththi haahon be7idi ayfey daanakkon giidi izikko yides. Gido attiin balase miththi ayfontta wode gidida gishshas hayththafe attiin issi ayfekka izippe demmibeenna. 
Mark11:14 Hessa gishshas miththayo, «Hannife guye mernaas oonikka neeppe ayfe mooppo!» gides. Iza kaallizaytikka izi gizayssa siyida." 
Mark11:15 Gede Yerusalaame bida; heeppeka Xoossa Keeththe gelidi heen bayzizaytanne shammizayta kessi goodo oykkides. Miishshe laammizayta xaraphpheezanne haraphphe bayzizayta oyde gufanththi gufanththi yeggides. 
Mark11:16 Oonikka ay miish tookkidi Xoossa Keeththa gibbe giddora aadhdhontta mala diggides. 
Mark11:17 Isttaka tamaarsishe, «Ta keeththi dere ubbaas Woosa Keeththe gidana geetetti xaafettibeennee? Gido attiin intte kaysota gongolo kessideta» gides." 
Mark11:18 Qeeseta halaqatinne Muse wogaa tamaarsizayti hessa siyidi iza wostti dhayssanakkon oge kosh oykkida. Gido attiin dereykka iza timirtezan malalettida gishshas izas babbida. 
Mark11:19 Isttika gadey qammiin katamayppe kezi bida. 
Mark11:20 Wonteththa gallas maalado istti ogera aadhdhi bishin balase miththaya xaphoppe melidaaro be7ida. 
Mark11:21 Yo7ozi iza wozinan akeekettiin Phexroosi Yesusa, «Astamaaree! Hekko, hanna ne qanggida balaseya meladus» gides." 
Mark11:22 Izikka zaaridi, «Xoossa ammanite." 
Mark11:23 Ta inttes tumu gays; ‹Oonikka hayssa zumaza ne dhoqallettada abban gela› gizaakko hessaka wozinan sidhontta ammanidaakko izaades hanana. 
Mark11:24 Hessa gishshas intte woosan oychchidaaz ubbaa ekkida mala ammanikko inttes hanana. 
Mark11:25 Hessaththoka intte woosas eqqiza wode intte Salo Aaway intte nagara atto gaana mala intteka inttena qohidayta nagara ubbaa atto giite. 
Mark11:26 Intte atto gontta ixxiko intte salo aawaykka intte nagaraa atto geenna» gides. 
Mark11:27 Qasseka Yerusalaame yida; Yesusi Xoossa Keeththa kare giddon yaanne haa yuuyettishin qeeseta halaqati, Muse wogaa tamaarsizaytinne dere cimati izakko shiiqidi," 
Mark11:28 «Hayssa ne ooththizay ay godateththaraa? Hayta ne ooththana mala hayssa mala godateth nees ooni immidee?» gida. 
Mark11:29 Yesusikka isttas zaaridi, «Ane tanikka inttena issi oysho oychchays; intteka taas zaarikko tanikka ha yo7ota ay godateththara ooththizaakko inttes yootana." 
Mark11:30 Yohannisa xinqatay Xoossafeyee? Asappee? Ane taas zaarite» gides. 
Mark11:31 Isttika ba giddon issoy issaara, «Nu saloppe giikko izi nuna, ‹Histtiin aazas iza ammanibeekketii?› gaana;" 
Mark11:32 ‹Nu asappe› giikko» Yohannisi tumu nabe gididayssa derey wuri ammaniza gishshas hessaththo gaana babbida. 
Mark11:33 Hessa gishshas, «Nu erokko» giidi Yesusas zaarida. Yesusikka, «Histtiko ta hayta aaza godateththara ooththizaakko tanikka inttes yootikke» gides." 
Mark12:1 Qasse isttas leemisora yootishe, «Issaadey ba woyne mith tokkides. Keela yuushshi aaththi keelides; woyne miththa ayfe gum7ana olla bookkides. Naage keeththeka keexxides. Hessafe goshshanchchatas kira immidi hara dere bides." 
Mark12:2 Miththay ayfiza wode woyne miththaa ayfe ekkada ya giidi ashkaratappe issaade goshshanchchatakko yeddides. 
Mark12:3 Goshshanchchati ashkaraza oykki shocidi coo mela kushe yeddida. 
Mark12:4 Nam7anththoka hara ashkara yeddides. Goshshanchchati ha7ikka ashkaraa oykkidi izas hu7etara qoo7idinne kawushshidi zaari yeddida. 
Mark12:5 Ha7ikka zaaridi hara ashkara yeddides. He yeddoyssaka wodhida; hara darota giddofe issi issi asata qoxxida; baggayta wodhida. 
Mark12:6 «Ha7ikka kiitettontta attida haray dees; izikka aaway dosiza ba naaza. ‹Ta naaza istti boossana› gi qoppidi wurseththan ba naaza yeddides. 
Mark12:7 Goshshanchchati qasse ba giddon, ‹Hayssi waanna iza laattana naaza; haa yiite nu iza wodhikko biittay nuus gidana› gida." 
Mark12:8 Hessa gishshas heen oykki wodhidi woyne miththay dizasoppe haraso kessi yeggida. 
Mark12:9 «Histtiin woyne miththaa goday ay ooththana inttes misatizee? Izi yaana; goshshanchchatakka wodhana; woyne miththaa haratas immana. 
Mark12:10 Geeshsha Maxaafan, ‹Shuchcha keeththe keexxizayti hanenna giidi wora yeggida shuchchay keeththa gulas bolla hu7e gidides; hessaka Goday ooththides. Hessika nu ayfes malalisizaaz geetettidi xaafettidayssa nababibeekketii?› » gides." 
Mark12:11  
Mark12:12 Izi isttas leemisoza yootiday istta gishshas gididayssa Ayhuda halaqati erida gishshas iza oykkanaas koyida; gido attiin asaas babbida gishshas aggi bida. 
Mark12:13 Yesusa yo7on qaxxana mala Farsaawetappenne Herdoosa baggatappe guuththa asata dooridi izakko yeddida. 
Mark12:14 Isttika izakko yiidi, «Astamaaree! Neni mooroy baynda as gididayssa nu eroos; ne oonaska babbada wordo maaddaka; Xoossa oge xalala tumu tamaarsaasa. Oroome kawo Qeesaares giira qanxxanaas bessizeyee? Bessennee? Nu qanxxinoyee? Qanxxofinoo?»" 
Mark12:15 Yesusi istta oyshay qoodheppe qommo gididayssa eridi, «Aazas tana qaxxana koyeetii? Ane issi dinaare hammite ta beyays» gides." 
Mark12:16 Isttika miishshaa ehiin, «Hayssi iza bolla diza mislezi oona mislee? Iza bolla xaafettidayssi oona gizee?» gides. Isttika, «Qeesaareyssa» gida." 
Mark12:17 Yesusikka, «Qeesaareyssa Qeesaares, Xoossayssa Xoossas immite» gides. Isttika iza zaaron malalettida." 
Mark12:18 Hessafe guye hayqqidaytas hayqoppe denththi baa giza Saduqaaweti izakko yiidi iza hizgi oychchida. 
Mark12:19 «Astamaaree! Issi asi machcho ekkidi naa yelontta hayqqiko hayqqidayssa ishay iza machcheyo ekkidi izas laata naa yelana mala kase Musey nuus xaafides. 
Mark12:20 Gido attiin laappun ishantti deettes; isttafe bayray machcho ekkidi naa yelontta hayqqides. 
Mark12:21 Kaalozi he maccassayo ekkidi ha7ikka naa yelontta hayqqides; heedzdzanththoyka yelontta hayqqides. 
Mark12:22 Laappunatikka he maccassayo ekkidi laata yelibeettenna; wurseththan maccassayakka hayqqadus. 
Mark12:23 Histtiin laappunatikka izo ekkidashin hayqoppe dendoy dizaa gidikko ha maccassaya isttafe oona machcho gidanee?» gida. 
Mark12:24 Yesusikka isttas, «Intte balettizay Geeshsha Maxaafatanne Xoossa wolqqa erontta gishshassa." 
Mark12:25 Hayqqidayti dendiza wode Salo Kiitanchchata mala gidana attiin ekettettenanne gelettenna. 
Mark12:26 Hayqqidayta denththa gishshas gidikko Muse maxaafan hessika qeeri wora giddon eexxiza tama giddofe Xoossi, ‹Tani Abrahaame Xoossaa; Yisaaqa Xoossaa; Yaaqoobe Xoossaa› gizayssa nababibeekketii?" 
Mark12:27 Xoossi paxata Xoossa attiin hayqeththata Xoos gidenna; hessa gishshas intte daro balettideta» gides. 
Mark12:28 Istti palaman dishin xaafetappe issaadey istta palamaa siyidinne Yesusi oyshettidayssas lo7eththi zaaridayssa akeekidi, «Ero! Azazota ubbaafe aadhdhizay awayssee?» giidi oychchides." 
Mark12:29 Yesusi izas, «Ubbaafe aadhdhizay hayssa, ‹Isra7eele siya! Godaa nu Xoossi issi Godaa," 
Mark12:30 Nekka Godaa ne Xoossaa ne kumeththa wozinappe, ne kumeththa shemppofe, ne kumeththa qofappe, ne kumeththa wolqqafe dosa.›" 
Mark12:31 Nam7anththoyka, ‹Ne lagge ne hu7e mala dosa› ha nam7atappe aadhdhiza azazoy baa.»" 
Mark12:32 Xaafezikka, «Astamaaree! Lo7o gadasa, ‹Xoossi issino gididayssanne izappe haray bayndayssa› ne yootidayssi likke." 
Mark12:33 Iza ne kumeththa wozinappe ne kumeththa qofappe ne kumeththa wolqqafe dosoy qasseka ne lagge ne hu7e mala dosoy xuugettiza yarshofenne hara yarsho ubbaafe aadhdhees» gides. 
Mark12:34 Yesusikka addezi yuushshi qoppidi zaaridayssa be7idi, «Neni Xoossa Kawoteththafe haahon daakka» gides. Hessafe guye iza oychchanaas xalidaadey beettibeenna." 
Mark12:35 Yesusi Xoossa Keeththa gaaththan tamaarsishe, «Muse wogaa tamaarsizayti aazas, ‹Kirstoosa Dawite naa› gizoo?" 
Mark12:36 Dawiti Xillo Ayanan haasayshe, ‹Goday ta Godaa, ne morkketa ta ne toho gars aaththana gakkanaas ta ushachchan utta› gides." 
Mark12:37 Histtiin Dawiti ba doonara iza, ‹Godaa› giikko waanidi simmi izas naa gidanee?» gides. Daro dereykka izi gizayssa ufayssara siyides." 
Mark12:38 Izi tamaarsishe, «Muse wogaa tamaarsizaytappe naagettite, gadera gooshettiza adussa may7o may7idi yuushshe yuuyana doseettes; awanka aadhdhi aadhdhi asi isttas bonchcho sarota immana mala koyeettes." 
Mark12:39 Ayhudata Woosa Keeththan dhoqqaso, gibirasonkka bonchchoso koyeettes." 
Mark12:40 Istti azinay baynda maccassa keeth kalloseettes; qasseka bana bessanaas adussa woosa woosseettes. Haytanti iita pirda pirdettana» gides. 
Mark12:41 Yesusikka asay muxuwaata yeggizason uttidi daro asati immizayssa Xoossa Keeththa miishsha shiishshiza saaxinen yeggizayssa xeellides. Daro dureti daro miish yeggida. 
Mark12:42 Issi azinay baynda am7e dizaara issi sikkinnafe darontta xarqimala biratappe oosettida nam7u miish yeggadus. 
Mark12:43 Yesusi bana kaallizayta xeygidi, «Ta inttes tumu gays; saaxinezan yeggida ubbaafe hanna manqo am7eya aadheth yeggadus." 
Mark12:44 Hayti wuri baas diza tirpa miishshaafe yeggidashin hanna qasse ba manqoteththaafe baas dizayssa sinththafe izo koshshizayssara wursa immadus» gides. 
Mark13:1 Izi Xoossa Keeththaafe kezishin iza kaallizaytappe issoy, «Astamaaree! Hayssi keeththaynne keeththay keexettida shuchchay ay mala lo7izaakko hayssa beyay?» gides." 
Mark13:2 Yesusikka zaaridi, «Hayta gita keeththata xeellay? Shuchchati issoy issaa bolla diza mala deettenna; wurikka laalettana» gides." 
Mark13:3 Yesusi Xoossa Keeththa ginara Dabrazayte zumaa bolla utti dishin Phexroosi, Yaaqoobey, Yohannisinne Indiraasi xalla izakko shiiqidi," 
Mark13:4 «Hayssi ayde hananaakko nuus yoota. Hayssi wurseththan polettanaas malatay aazee?» gi oychchida. 
Mark13:5 Yesusikka isttas, «Oonikka inttena baleththontta mala naagettite." 
Mark13:6 Buro daroti, ‹Ta Kirstoosa› gishe ta sunththan yaana; darotakka baleththana." 
Mark13:7 Intte olanne ola wore siyiza wode dagammofte; hessi hananayssi attenna; wurseththi gidikko buroona. 
Mark13:8 Derey dere bolla, kawoy kawo bolla dendana, daroson biitta qaaththinne koshay hanana; heyti wuri miixas leesso mala." 
Mark13:9 «Intte inttes naagettite. Buro inttena dere duulatan aaththi immana. Istti inttena Ayhudata Woosa Keeththan garafana. Intte ta markkatta gidana mala ta gishshas dere daannata sinththaninne kawota sinththan eqqana. 
Mark13:10 Koyrottidi Mishiraachcho qaalay dere ubbaas sabbakettana bessees. 
Mark13:11 Intte oykettidi pirdas shiiqiza wode hinno he saateyin inttes imettizaaro haasayte attiin biidi, ‹Nu ay giinoo?› giidi kaseti hirgofte; haasayanay Xillo Ayanappe attiin inttena gidekketa." 
Mark13:12 «Ishay ishaa, aaway ba naa hayqos aaththi immana; nayti bana yelidayta bolla makkallananne wodhana." 
Mark13:13 Ta gaason intte asa ubbaan ixettidayta gidana; wurseth gakkanaas minni eqqidaadey gidikko attana. 
Mark13:14 «Intte harassiza tunateth izas bessonttason eqqidaashe beykko nababizaadey wozinan woththo; Yuhudan dizayti pude zuma bolla baqatetto. 
Mark13:15 Keeththa karen dizaadey soo geloppo; ba miish kessana giidi keeththe geloppo. 
Mark13:16 Goshshason dizaadey ba may7o ekkanaas guye simmofo. 
Mark13:17 He gallassatan shaara maccassatassinne naa dhanththizaytas aayye ana! 
Mark13:18 Hessika balgon gidontta mala Xoos woossite. 
Mark13:19 Xoossi koyro medheteth ubbaa medhdhoosofe ha7i gakkanaas woykko hayssafe guye iza misatizay baynda gita metoy hanana. 
Mark13:20 Goday he gallassata qaanththonttaako oonikka attenna shin baas doorettidayta gishshas izi he gallassata qaanththides. 
Mark13:21 «He wode oonikka, ‹Hekko Kirstoosi hayssan dees› giikko woykko, ‹Hekko heen dees› giikko ammanopite." 
Mark13:22 Wordo Kirstoosatinne wordo nabeti buro dendidi malaatatanne kase hani erontta pala miish ooththana; isttas dandayettiko haray attoshin doorettidaytakka baleththana. 
Mark13:23 Hessa gishshas naagettite; he wodey gakkontta dishin haara hayssa wursa ta inttes yootadis. 
Mark13:24 «He wode he metozappe kaallidi arshey dhumana; aginaykka poo7isuku. 
Mark13:25 Xoolintteti saloppe qoqofettana, salon diza wolqqamati qaaxxana." 
Mark13:26 «He wode Asa Nay gita wolqqaranne bonchchora salo shaarara yishin asay iza beyana. 
Mark13:27 Izikka kiitanchchata yeddidi oyddu baggafe biitta gaxappe gaxa gakkanaas diza baas doorettidayta shiishshana. 
Mark13:28 «Leemisoza balase miththafe tamaarte. Unquloy cililiza wode hayth kessishin boney matidayssa intte ereeta. 
Mark13:29 Hessaththoka hayti ta gidayti polettishin intte beykko wodey mati yiidi penge gakkidayssa erite. 
Mark13:30 Ta inttes tumu gays; ha yo7oti polettana gakkanaas hayssi ha yeletay aadhdhenna. 
Mark13:31 Saloynne sa7ay aadhdhana shin ta qaalay gidikko aadhdhenna. 
Mark13:32 «Qasse he gallassay gishshas woykko he saatey gishshas ta Aawappe attiin Salo Kiitanchchata gidiinkka Naaza gidiinkka oonikka erenna. 
Mark13:33 Hessa gishshas wodey aydekko intte erontta gishshas naagettite, minnitenne woossite." 
Mark13:34 Hessika ba keeth ashkaratas aggidi ashkarata issaa issaa ooso oyththidi penge naagizayssi beeggidi naagana mala azazidi bida asa misatees. 
Mark13:35 «Histtiko keeththa aaway ayde yaanaakko woykko leela giddoth yaanaakko woykko koyro kuttoy baqqishin yaanaakko woykko wontta bolla bazzoy zo7ishin yaanaakko intte erontta gishshas beeggidi naagite. 
Mark13:36 Intte qoppontta dishin izi yiidi intte dhiskidishin inttena demmofo. 
Mark13:37 «Ta inttes yootizayssa as ubbaas yootays; minnidi naagite! gays» gides. 
Mark14:1 Paaziganne ukeththa muussa ba7aale gallassay bonchchettanaas nam7u gallassi attishin qeeseta halaqatinne Muse wogaa tamaarsizayti Yesusa baleththi oykkidi wodhana oge koyida. 
Mark14:2 Gido attiin, «Asay meto medhdhontta mala ba7aale gallassatan gidoppo» gida." 
Mark14:3 Izi Bitaaniya geetettizason issi inchchirachcha harganchcha gidida Simoonason quma bolla dishin waagay daro al7o gidida nardoose geetettiza shittoy kumi uttida albasxiroose bilqaaxe oykkida issi maccassaya bilqaaxeza menththada shittoza Yesusa hu7e bolla gussadus. 
Mark14:4 Heen diza asatappe issi issi asati, «Hayssi shittozi aazas wogay baynda gukkizee?» giidi ba giddon hanqettida." 
Mark14:5 «Shittozi bayzettidaakko heedzdzu xeetu dinaareppe bollara bayzettidi manqotas imettenneeshin!» giidi maccassayokka kadhida. 
Mark14:6 Gido attiin Yesusi isttas, «Aggite! Hanno maccassayo aazas waayiseetii? Iza taas lo7o miish ooththadus." 
Mark14:7 Manqoti ay wodekka inttenara deettes. Intte koyida wode aydekka istta maaddanaas dandayeeta; ta gidikko ubba wode inttenara diikke. 
Mark14:8 Hanna ba ooththanaas dandayzaari keena ooththadus. Taas moogos gidana mala ta asho kaseta tiyadus. 
Mark14:9 Ta inttes tumu gays; hayssi Mishiraachcho qaalay alame kumeththaan sabbakettizason awanka iza ooththidayssi izo hassa7issizaaz gididi haasayettana» gides. 
Mark14:10 Hessafe guye tammanne nam7atappe issoy Asqoronto Yuhuday Yesusa aaththi immanaas qeeseta halaqataakko bides. 
Mark14:11 Isttika hessa siyidi ufayettida; izas miishshe immanaas izara giigida; hessa gishshas Yesusa aaththi immanaas injje wode naagishe gam7ides. 
Mark14:12 Paaziga dorsi shukettiza uketh muussa bonchchiza koyro gallas Yesusa kaallizayti Yesusaakko shiiqidi, «Paaziga kawo maanaso awan giigsana mala koyay?» gi oychchida." 
Mark14:13 Izikka bana kaallizaytappe nam7ata, «Katama biite; intte bishin haaththe otora tookkida issaadey inttenara gaaggana." 
Mark14:14 Izi biidi gelizaso gakkanaas iza kaallite. Keeththaadezas, ‹Astamaarey nena, tana kaallizaytara Paaziga kawo maanaas taas gidiza imaththa shemposoy awayssee? gides› giite." 
Mark14:15 Izikka bolla pooqe bolla diza giigi uttida aahoso inttena bessana; heen izan giigsite» gi kiittides. 
Mark14:16 Iza kaallizaytikka kezidi katama bida. Wurikka Yesusi gida mala hani beettides; Paazigakka heen giigsida. 
Mark14:17 Gadey qammishin Yesusi bana kaalliza tammanne nam7atara gakkides. 
Mark14:18 Istti maaddan dishin, «Ta inttes tumu gays; intte giddofe issoy izikka tanara issife mizayssi tana aaththi immana» gides." 
Mark14:19 Isttika muuzottidi, «Taneeshaa? Taneeshaa?» giidi issoy issoy Yesusa oychchida." 
Mark14:20 Izikka isttas, «Tammanne nam7atappe issoy tanara ba kushe keren yeddizaade." 
Mark14:21 Kase xaafettida mala Asa Nay iza gishshas hayqqana shin asa naa aaththi immizaades aayye ana! Hessaadey kase yelettontta attidaakko izas lo7okkoshin!» gides. 
Mark14:22 Istti mishin ukeththaa ekki anjjidinne menththidi bana kaallizaytas, «Hayssa ta asho he7ite» gi immides." 
Mark14:23 Ushshaaka denththi galatidi isttas immiin istti wurikka uyida. 
Mark14:24 Qasse Yesusi, «Hayssi darota gishshas gukkana ta ooraththa caaqo suuththaa." 
Mark14:25 Ta inttes tumu gays; ooraththa woyneppe giigida ushshaa Xoossa Kawoteththan ta uyana wode gakkanaas nam7anththo hayssa uyikke» gides. 
Mark14:26 Hessafe guye mazamure issife yexxidi pude Dabrazayte zuma bolla kezida. 
Mark14:27 Yesusi, « ‹Ta heemmizayssa shocana; he wode iza dorsati laalettana› geetetti xaafettidayssa mala intte wurikka tanan dhuphettana." 
Mark14:28 Ta dendidaappe guye gidikko ta inttefe kasetada Galila baana» gides. 
Mark14:29 Phexroosikka, «Asay wuri dhuphettikokka tani dhuphettike!» gides." 
Mark14:30 Yesusikka, «Ta nees tumu gays; hach omars kuttoy nam7uto waassana gakkanaas neni tana heedzdzuto kaddana» gides." 
Mark14:31 Phexroosi qasse, «Ta nenara hayqqizaakkoka mulekka nena kaddike» giidi keehi minththi yootides. Hankkoytikka wuri izayssaththo gida." 
Mark14:32 Hessafe guye Getesemaane geetettizaso bida; Yesusikka bana kaallizayta, «Tani woossishin intte hayssan gam7iishshite» gides." 
Mark14:33 Phexroosa, Yaaqoobenne Yohannisa banara ekki bides. Keehi qoppidessinne metotides." 
Mark14:34 Qasseka isttas, «Ta shemppoya daro metotadus intte haan diishshite. Dhiskontta naagite» gides." 
Mark14:35 Istta achchafe guuth haakki bi biitta bolla gufannidi he saateya izappe aadhdhana mala woossides. 
Mark14:36 «Ta Aawawu! Nees wuri dandayettees; hayssa waaye xuu7a taappe haassa. Gidikkoka ne sheneppe attiin ta sheney hanoppo» gides. 
Mark14:37 Izi heeppe simmi yishin iza kaallizayti dhiskidayta be7ides. Phexroosakka, «Simoona dhiskadii? Haray attoshin issi saatekka minnada naagoy nena xoonidee?" 
Mark14:38 Intte paacen gelontta mala beeggidi woossitenne minnite. Ayanay giigetti uttides shin ashoy gidikko daaburanchcha» gides. 
Mark14:39 Qasseka biidi koyroyssaththo woossides. 
Mark14:40 Izi nam7anththo simmi yishin istta ayfen dhiskoy deexxiin dhiskidayta demmides shin istti izas ay zaaranakkon eribeettenna. 
Mark14:41 Heedzdzanththo yiidi, «Ha7ikka intte ichchidi shempeetii? Ha7i gidana; saateyakka gakkadus; hekko Asa Nay nagaranchchata kushen aadhdhi imettana." 
Mark14:42 Ane eqqite boos; tana aaththi immanaadey yides» gides. 
Mark14:43 Yesusi buro haasayan dishin tammanne nam7atappe issoy Yuhuday yides. Izara issife qeese halaqatappenne Muse wogaa tamaarsizaytappe kiitettida daro asay giththa mashshanne durqqa oykkidi yides. 
Mark14:44 Iza aaththi immana Yuhuday isttas, «Asa giddofe ta yeerizaadey iza gidida gishshas oykkidi lo7eththi naagi efte» giidi kaseti malata immi woththides." 
Mark14:45 Gakkida mala Yuhuday Yesusaakko shiiqidi, «Astamaaree!» giidi yeerides." 
Mark14:46 Asatikka Yesusa oykkida. 
Mark14:47 Iza achchan eqqida issoy mashsha koohoppe shoddi qeeseta halaqaza ashkara hayth qanxxides. 
Mark14:48 Yesusikka isttas, «Panga mala tana oykkana mashshanne durqqa oykkidi yeetii?" 
Mark14:49 Wontiin wontiin Xoossa Keeththan tamaarsashe ta inttenara dishin oykkibeekketa shin kase xaafettidayssi polettana mala hayssi hanides» gides. 
Mark14:50 He wode iza kaallizayti wuri iza yeggi aggi bida. 
Mark14:51 Ba kalloteth qeeri naxalan kammida issi nay Yesusa kaallishin asay iza oykkiin," 
Mark14:52 Naazi naxalaa yeggidi kallo kichchides. 
Mark14:53 Yesusakka gede qeeseta halaqaakko efida; qeeseta halaqati, dere cimatinne Muse wogaa tamaarsizayti heen issife wuri shiiqida." 
Mark14:54 Phexroosikka Yesusa haahora kaallishe qeeseta halaqaza gibbe gakkanaas bides. Izi heen uttidi hara asatara tama ho7ishin," 
Mark14:55 qeeseta halaqatinne dere cimati wuri Yesusa wodhanaas markkattana as koyida shin demmanaas dandaybeettenna. 
Mark14:56 Daroti iza bolla wordora markkattikokka markkatta qaalay oykettibeenna. 
Mark14:57 Issi issi markkati dendidi wordora," 
Mark14:58 «Hayssi addezi, ‹Ta asa kushen keexettida Xoossa Keeththaa laallada asa kushey bochchonttaaz hara heedzdzu gallassara ta keexxana› gishin nu siyidos» gi markkattida." 
Mark14:59 Gido attiin istta markkateththi issi bolla wodhdhibeenna. 
Mark14:60 Qeeseta halaqaykka istta sinththan eqqidi, «Hayti ne bolla markkattizayssi aazee? Ne aazas doona zaarikkii?» giidi Yesusa oychchides." 
Mark14:61 Gido attiin Yesusi isttas aykkoka zaarontta co7u gides; qeeseta halaqay qasseka, «Anjjettida Xoossa Nay Kirstoosi nenee?» gi oychchides." 
Mark14:62 Yesusikka zaaridi, «Ee; tanakko! Asa Nay wolqqama Xoossa ushachchan uttishininne salo shaarara yishin intte iza beyana» gides." 
Mark14:63 Qeeseta halaqay ba may7o daakkidi, «Nuus hara aaza markka koshshizee?" 
Mark14:64 Izi cashsha qaala Xoossa bolla haasayshin intte siyideta; ha7ich inttes ay misatizee?» gides. Isttika, «Izas hayqoy bessees» giidi wurikka issi qaalan pirdida." 
Mark14:65 He wode issi issi asati iza bolla cuch cuttida; iza ayfe goozi oykkidi iccishe, «Ane tinbite yoota» gida. Baggayti qasse shagalan baqqishe efida." 
Mark14:66 Phexroosi duge baggara heen gibbe giddon dishin qeeseta halaqa garadetappe issiniya yadus. 
Mark14:67 Phexroosi tama ho7ishin tishshi histta xeellada, «Neni Naazirete Yesusara daasa gidikkii?» gadus." 
Mark14:68 Izi qasse, «Ne gizayssaade ta erikke; ne gizayssi taas gelenna» giidi kaddides. Hessafe gede penge pooqqi eqqi dishin heerakka kuttoy waassides." 
Mark14:69 He garadeya iza be7ida mala heen eqqida asatas, «Hayssi addezi izara diza asatappe issaadeko!» gaada qasseka haasayadus." 
Mark14:70 Izi qasseka kaddides. Guuththa wode gam7ishin heen eqqida asati Phexroosa, «Neni Galila asa, hessa gishshas tumappe ne isttafe issaade» gida." 
Mark14:71 Gido attiin izi qasse, «Intte gizaade ta erikke!» gishe caaqonne bana qanggeth oykkides." 
Mark14:72 Heerakka kuttoy nam7anththo waassides. Phexroosikka, «Kuttoy nam7aa waassanaas ne tana heedzdzaa kaddana» gida Yesusa qaalay izas qofettiin hiqimi yeekkides." 
Mark15:1 Maalado wonttara qeeseta halaqati, dere cimatinne Muse wogaa tamaarsizayti kumeththa shango alaafetara issife zorettidi Yesusa qachchi ekki efidi Philaxoosas aaththi immida." 
Mark15:2 Philaxoosikka Yesusa, «Ne Ayhudata kawoo?» gi oychchides. Yesusikka, «Ee, ne gida mala» giidi izas zaarides." 
Mark15:3 Qeeseta halaqatikka daro yo7o iza bolla shiishshi mootida. 
Mark15:4 Philaxoosi qasse, «Ne aazas oyshaa zaarikkii? Hekko nena daro yo7on mooteettes» giidi qasseka oychchides." 
Mark15:5 Gido attiin Yesusi ha7ikka izas aykkoka zaaro immontta gishshas Philaxoosikka malalettides. 
Mark15:6 Paaziga ba7aale gallas Philaxoosi derey birshana mala oychchidaade birshi yeddiza wogay kase dees. 
Mark15:7 Iita ooson dere bolla dendidi shempo wodhida asatara issife qashettida Barbaane geetettiza issaadey dees. 
Mark15:8 Dereykka yiidi kase lose gididayssa izi ooththana mala Philaxoosa woossides. 
Mark15:9 Philaxoosikka isttas, «Ta inttes Ayhuda kawo birshana mala koyeetii?» gi oychchides." 
Mark15:10 Philaxoosi hessaththo oychchiday kase qeeseta halaqati Yesusa qanaaten aaththi immidayssa eriza gishshassa. 
Mark15:11 Qeeseta halaqati qasse, «Iza exa Barbaaney birshetto!» gi oychchana mala dereza denththeththida." 
Mark15:12 Philaxoosi, «Histtiko intte Ayhuda kawo giza addeza wosttana mala koyeetii?» gides." 
Mark15:13 Istti qasseka, «Kaqqa! Kaqqa!» gi waassida." 
Mark15:14 Philaxoosikka, «Ay iita ooththidee?» gi istta oychchides. Istti qasse, «Kaqqa! kaqqa!» giidi kaseppe aaththi waassida." 
Mark15:15 Philaxoosikka dereza ufayssana giidi Barbaane isttas birshides. Yesusa garafidi kaqqanaas aaththi immides. 
Mark15:16 Wottadarati Yesusa dere haarizayssa gibbe ekki biidi attida wottadarata ubbaa shiishshida. 
Mark15:17 Yesusa zo7o may7o mayzida; agunththa akilile xaaxidi iza hu7en woththida. 
Mark15:18 Hessafekka, «Ayhuda kawo saroy nees gido!» gishe iza saroththida." 
Mark15:19 Iza hu7e guufera shocida; iza bollaka cuttida; gulbatidi izas goynnida. 
Mark15:20 Iza bolla qidhi kaa7idaappe guye kase mayzida zo7o may7oza qaari ekkidi kase iza may7oza zaari mayzidi kaqqanaaso ekki bida. 
Mark15:21 Alakisandrosanne Erufoosa aawa Simoona geetettiza issi Qareena dere asi dereppe katama yizayssa Yesusa masqale wolqqara oykki toossida. 
Mark15:22 Hessafe guye Yesusa Golgota geetettizaso efida; izas birsheththay, «Asa hu7e guugge» guussa." 
Mark15:23 Karbbe geetettiza camora walakettida woyne cajje uyana mala izas immiin izi ekkontta ixxides. 
Mark15:24 Hessafe guye iza kaqqida; iza may7o issaade issaade awayssi gakkanaakko giidi saama yeggidi gishettida. 
Mark15:25 Istti iza kaqqishin wonttafe heedzdzu saate gidides. 
Mark15:26 Istti masqale bolla xaafi shiishshida mooto qaalay, «Ayhuda kawo» giza qaala." 
Mark15:27 Izara issife nam7u pangata issaa izappe ushachchara issaa hadirsara kaqqida. 
Mark15:28 Hessankka kase maxaafay, «Iitatara issife taybettides» gida tinbite qaalay polettides." 
Mark15:29 Ogera aadhdhi bizaytikka ba hu7e qaaththishe, «Oy! Oy! Xoossa Keeththaa laallada heedzdzu gallassan keexxanay nenee?» giidi iita cashshe cayishe," 
Mark15:30 «Ane ha7i masqale bollafe wodhdhada nena ashsha» gida. 
Mark15:31 Hessaththoka qeeseta halaqatinne Muse wogaa tamaarsizayti ba giddon issoy issaas, «Harata ashshides shin bana ashshana dandaybeenna» giidi iza qidhida." 
Mark15:32 «Nu iza be7idi ammanana mala ane hayssi Kirstoosi Isra7eeleta kawoy ha7i masqaleppe wodhdho» gida. Izara kaqettidaytikka iza bolla cashshe korida. 
Mark15:33 Usuppun saateppe doommidi uddufun saate gakkanaas biittay wuri dhumides. 
Mark15:34 Uddufun saate bolla Yesusi, «Eelohe! Eelohe! Lama sabaqitane» giidi qaala dhoqqu histtidi waassides. Hessas birsheththay «Ta Xoossoo! Ta Xoossoo! Ne tana aazas aggadii?» guussa." 
Mark15:35 Heen eqqida asaappe issi issi asati hessa siyidi, «Eelaasa xeygeeskko!» gida." 
Mark15:36 Hessafe issi asi eleli biidi caalida woyne cajje isponje mala miishshan gelththi kessidi miththa xeeran oyththidi uyana mala Yesusas shiishshides. Hessafe qasse, «Ane aggaagite; Eelaasi yiidi iza kaqoppe woththishin nu beyana» gides." 
Mark15:37 Hessafe Yesusi qaala dhoqqu histti waassidi shempo kezides. 
Mark15:38 Xoossa Keeththe magalashay hu7era duge nam7u kezi daakettides. 
Mark15:39 Yesusa ginara eqqida issi mato halaqay Yesusi hessaththo gita qaalara waassidi shempo kezishin be7idi, «Hayssaadey tumu Xoossa naakkoshin» gides." 
Mark15:40 He wode maccassati hanizayssa haahon diidi xeellida. Istta giddofe Magdaleppe yida Maaramanne kaalotiza Yaaqoobe Yoosa aayo Maaramira qasseka Saloomira issife deettes. 
Mark15:41 Heyti maccassati Galilan Yesusa kaallishenne izas ooththishe gam7idayta. Isttarakka issife hara daro maccassati Yerusalaame bida. 
Mark15:42 Gadey qammi qammi bishin Sambatas giigettiza gallassi gakkides. 
Mark15:43 Dere cimata giddon bonchchettida issi Armatiyase dere as Yooseefe geetettizayssi Xoossa Kawoteth naagishe dizaadey babbontta Philaxoosakko biidi Yesusa aha woossides. 
Mark15:44 Philaxoosikka izi hinni wode ellera hayqqidayssa siyidi malalettides. Mato halaqa xeygisidi, «Izi hayqqi gam7idee?» giidi oychchides." 
Mark15:45 Izi hayqqidayssa mato halaqay geeshshi eridaappe guye Yesusa aha Yooseefes immides. 
Mark15:46 Yooseefeykka moogo may7o shammidi ahaa masqaleppe woththidi moogo may7on xaaxidi shuchchafe woocettida duufon moogides. Duufaa doona shuchchara gordides. 
Mark15:47 Magdaleppe yida Maaramiranne Yooseefe aayo Maaramira Yesusa aha awan moogidaakko be7ida. 
Mark16:1 Sambatay aadhdhidaappe guye Magdale Maarama, Yaaqoobe aayo Maaramiranne Saloomira issife biidi Yesusa aha tiyanaas shitto shammida." 
Mark16:2 Saaminttafe koyro gallas maalado wonttara buro arshey kezida mala Yesusa duufokko buro bishin," 
Mark16:3 «Duufoza doonappe shuchchaa nuus ooni genderisanee?» giidi ba giddon haasayettida. 
Mark16:4 Istti dhoqqu gi xeellishin daro gita shuchchay duufoza doonappe genderidayssa be7ida. 
Mark16:5 Duufoza giddo gelida mala issi booththa may7o may7ida panththi ushachcha baggara uttidayssa be7idi dagammida. 
Mark16:6 Izi qasse isttas, «Dagammofte! Intte kaqettida Naazirete Yesusa koyeeta; izi dendides; haan deenna; istti iza woththidaso hayssa be7ite." 
Mark16:7 Gido attiin intte biidi iza kaallizaytassinne Phexroosas kase inttes yootida mala inttefe kasetidi izi Galila baana. Intte iza heen demmana giidi isttas yootite» gides. 
Mark16:8 Maccassatikka malalettishenne kokkorishe duufaappe kezi baqatida. Babbida gishshas oonaska aykkoka qaattibeettenna. 
Mark16:9 Saaminttafe koyro gallas Wogga wontta maaladora izi hayqoppe dendidaappe guye Yesusi izippe laappun daydanth kessida Magdale Maaramis koyro beettides. 
Mark16:10 Izakka baada kase izara dizayti kayottishenne yeekkishe dishin demmada yootadus. 
Mark16:11 Istti Yesusi paxa dizayssanne iza ta Yesusa beyadis gidayssa siyidi ammanibeettenna. 
Mark16:12 Hessafe guye iza kaallizaytappe nam7ati gede dere gars bishin Yesusi isttas hara as misati beettides. 
Mark16:13 Isttika simmidi hessa iza kaallizaytappe attidaytas yootida; gido attiin iza kaallizayti siyidi ammanibeettenna. 
Mark16:14 Hessafe guye tammanne issineti maadda bolla dishin Yesusi isttas qonccides. Izi hayqoppe dendiin iza be7ida asati isttas yootiin siyidi ammanontta aggida gishshas isttas ammanoy bayndayssanne istta wozina muumeteththa gishshas istta borides. 
Mark16:15 Isttaskka, «Alame ubbaso biite, Mishiraachcho qaala medheteth ubbaas sabbakite." 
Mark16:16 Ammanidaynne xammaqettiday attana. Ammanonttay gidikko pirdettana. 
Mark16:17 Tana ammanizayta hayti malatati kaallana. Istti ta sunththan daydanththata kessana; ooraththa qaalankka haasayana. 
Mark16:18 Istti shooshshata ba kushera oykkana; wodhiza marze uyikkoka istta qohenna. Ba kushe harganchchata bolla woththi woossiko harganchchati paxana» gides. 
Mark16:19 Godaa Yesusi hessa yootidaappe guye pude salo dendi biidi Xoossa ushachchan uttides. 
Mark16:20 Iza kaallizayti hessafe kezidi ubbason aadhdhi aadhdhi sabbakida. Godaykka isttara ooththides. Istta timirteza ekkidi ooththizaytas ba yootida qaalakka malaata ooththi ooththi minththides. 
Luke1:1 Bonchcho Tofiloosaa! Nu achchan hanida yo7ota gishshas daro asati baas hanida mala xaafida. 
Luke1:2 He taarikezikka koyroppe denththidi ba ayfera be7ida markkatinne Xoossa qaala yootidayti nuus aaththidayssa. 
Luke1:3 Tanikka ta baggara xaphoppe denththada keeha naagettadanne paacca xeellada taarikeza wursa sinththe xaafettanaas bessizayssa sinththasada kaallidi xaafettanaas bessizayssa kaaleththada naagettada nees xaafana mala taas lo7o gidi beettides. 
Luke1:4 Hayssa ubbaa ta ooththizay ne tamaardayssi tuma gididayssa nena ero guussassa. 
Luke1:5 Herdoosi Yuhuda biittan kawotida wode Abiya geetettiza qeeseta halaqaza baggafe qeeseteththa ooso taray iza gakkida Zakaraasa geetettiza issi qeesey dees. Iza machcheyakka Elsabeexo geetettawus; izakka Aaroone bagga asa. Nam7atikka Godaa azazonne iza wogaa wosoy baynda naagidi dizaytanne Xoossa sinththan xillo asa. 
Luke1:6  
Luke1:7 Gido attiin Elsabeexa naa yelontta maynne gidida gishshas isttas nay baa; nam7atikka wodey bida asa. 
Luke1:8 Zakaraasi Xoossa sinththan qeeseteththa ooso taray iza gakkiin izi ooththishin 
Luke1:9 qeesetas diza wogaa mala Xoossa Keeththan gelidi exaane cuwasana mala exay iza gakkides. 
Luke1:10 Exaaney cuwattishin asay wurikka karen diidi woossees. 
Luke1:11 Godaa kiitanchchay exaaney cuwattiza sooppe ushachcha baggara eqqidi Zakaraasas beettides. 
Luke1:12 Zakaraasikka iza be7idi keehi dagammidi babbides. 
Luke1:13 Kiitanchchay Zakaraasas, «Babbofa! Ne woosay seetettides; ne machcheya Elsabeexa nees attuma naa yelana; iza sunththaaka ne Yohannisa gaada sunththana." 
Luke1:14 Iza yeletan neni daro ufayettana; Daro asaykka ufayettana. 
Luke1:15 Godaa sinththan izi gita gidana. Woyneppe oosettida cajje gidiinkka hara maththosiza ushshu gidiinkka izi uyenna; izi buro ba aayey qanththan dishe Xillo Ayanan kumana. 
Luke1:16 Isra7eele asaappe darota istta Xoossako zaarana. 
Luke1:17 Aawata wozina istta naytakko, azazettonttaytakka gede Xillota cinccateththaako zaarana malanne Godaas bessiza dere giigsana mala Eelaasa Ayananinne iza wolqqan Godaappe sinththara izi baana» gides." 
Luke1:18 Zakaraasi kiitanchchazas, «Tani cima; ta machcheyakka cimmadus; tani hayssa aazan eranee?» giidi oychchides." 
Luke1:19 Kiitanchchazikka zaaridi, «Tani Xoossa sinththan eqqiza Gabreele. Tanikka ha Mishiraachchoza nees gaththanaas kiitettada yadis." 
Luke1:20 Hekko neni ba woden polettana ta qaala ammanontta ixxida gishshas ne doonay duudana; nenikka haasayana dandayakka» gides. 
Luke1:21 He wode derey Zakaraasi, «Xoossa Keeththaafe kezontta aazas gam7idaakko» giidi modhettishe naagides." 
Luke1:22 Izi Xoossa Keeththaafe kezidi asa haasayssanaas dandaybeenna; malati malati besoppe attiin haasayanaas dandayontta aggiin asay izi Xoossa Keeththan Xoossafe ooraththa miish be7idayssa erides. 
Luke1:23 Zakaraasikka ba ooso taray polettidaappe guye baso simmides. 
Luke1:24 Hessafe guye iza machcheya Elsabeexa naa qanththatadus, ichchashanththo aginay gakkanaas asi bana be7ontta mala qotettadus." 
Luke1:25 Izakka, «Goday ba maarotan ta leqettidayssa asaa giddofe digganaas ha wodezan hayssa taas ooththides» gadus." 
Luke1:26 Elsabeexa qanththatida usuppunththa aginan, Xoossi ba kiitanchcha Gabreele, Galila biittan diza Naazirete geetettiza katama yeddides." 
Luke1:27 Izikka kawo Dawite zereth gidida Yooseefe geetettiza asas giiga uttida Maaramo geetettiza geela7oykko kiitettides. 
Luke1:28 Yiidinne iza dizaso gelidi, «Hanne Xoossi nena anjjidaare saro! Xoossi Goday nenara dees nenikka anjjettidaaro» gides." 
Luke1:29 Maarama kiitanchchaa haasayan keeha dagammada, «Hayssi ay giza sarokaa?» gaada yo7oza keeha qoppadus." 
Luke1:30 Kiitanchchayka Maaramo, «Xoossi nenan ufayettiza gishshas babbofa!" 
Luke1:31 Neni qanththatana; attuma naakka yelana; sunththaaka Yesusa gaada sunththana. 
Luke1:32 Izikka gita gidana; ubbaafe bolla gidida Xoossa naa geetettana; Godaa Xoossi iza aawaa Dawite kawoteththaa izas immana. 
Luke1:33 Izi Isra7eele nayta bollan mernaas kawotana; iza Kawoteththaskka wurseththi deenna» gides. 
Luke1:34 Maaramakka kiitanchchaas, «Tani adde gelabeekke shin hayssi waani hananee?» gaada oychchadus." 
Luke1:35 Kiitanchchayka Maaramis, «Xillo Ayanay ne bolla wodhdhana; ubbaafe bolla Xoossa wolqqay ne bolla kuwasana; hessa gishshas yelettana naazi Geeshsha Xoossa naa geetettana." 
Luke1:36 Asi yelukku; iza maynne giidi haasayza ne dabboya Elsabeexa cimateththan attuma naa qanththatada yelanaas usuppunththo agina oykkadus. 
Luke1:37 Xoossas hanontta miishshi deenna» gides. 
Luke1:38 Maaramakka zaarada, «Hekko tani Xoossa aylle diikkinaa; ne gida mala taas hano» giin kiitanchchay izippe shaakettidi bides. Maarama Elsabeexo beyana badus." 
Luke1:39 Maaramakka he wode matara eesota dendada pude gezze deren diza issi Yuhuda katama badus. 
Luke1:40 Zakaraasa keeththe gelada Elsabeexo sarotadus. 
Luke1:41 Elsabeexa Maarami sarokaa siyida mala qanththan diza naazi izi qanththan guppides, Elsabeexinkka Xillo Ayanay kumides." 
Luke1:42 Izakka ba qaala dhoqqu histtada, «Maccassa ubbaafe ne anjjettidaaro; Ne qanththan diza naazikka anjjettidayssa." 
Luke1:43 Ta Godaa aaya taakko yaada tana oychchanaas tani oonee? 
Luke1:44 Ne saroka qaala ta siyida mala ta ulo giddon diza nay ufayssan guppides. 
Luke1:45 Polettana giidi Goday izis yootidayssa ammanidaara iza anjjettidaaro» gadus. 
Luke1:46 Maaramakka, «Izi ba aylley kawushshateththaa xeellida gishshas ta shemppiya Godaa dhoqqu ooththada bonchchawus. Ta Ayanaykka tana ashshiza ta Xoossaan ufayettawus. Wolqqama Goday taas gita miishshe ooththida gishshas hachchife sinththan asi wuri tana anjjettidaaro gaana. Iza sunththayka geeshsha." 
Luke1:47  
Luke1:48  
Luke1:49  
Luke1:50 Iza maaroy izas babbizaytas naa naa gakkanaas daana. 
Luke1:51 Ba wolqqan daro mino ooso ooththides; ba wozina qofan otorettizayta laallides. 
Luke1:52 Kawota kawoteththafe woththides, ashketa qasse dhoqqu dhoqqu histtides." 
Luke1:53 Gafidayta lo7o miishshan kalssides; dureta gidikko mela kushe yeddides. 
Luke1:54 Kase nu aawatas Abrahaamessinne iza qommotas gida hidota qaala naaganaas ba maareteththaa yuushshi qoppidi ba aylle Isra7eele maaddides» gadus. 
Luke1:55  
Luke1:56 Maaramakka Elsabeexi achchan heedzdzu agina sire gam7ada baso simmadus. 
Luke1:57 Elsabeexis yelo gallassay gakkiin attuma naa yeladus. 
Luke1:58 Izi gutatinne dabbotikka Goday izis gita maareteth ooththidayssa siyidi izira issife ufayettida. 
Luke1:59 Yelettida osppunththa gallas qaxxaras yida. Iza aawaa sunththan Zakaraasa giidi sunththana koyida. 
Luke1:60 Gido attiin aayeya, «Hanenna; iza sunththi Yohannisa geetetto» gadus." 
Luke1:61 Isttika izis, «Ne dabbotappe Yohannisa geetettidi xeygettida asi oonikka baa» gida." 
Luke1:62 Aaway Zakaraasi Naaza oona giidi sunththana koyidaakko malatan oychchida. 
Luke1:63 Zakaraasikka xaafiza miish izas immana mala oychchi ekkidi sunththay, «Yohannisa» gi xaafiin asay wurikka malalettides." 
Luke1:64 Heerakka Zakaraasa doonay pogettidi inxarsi birshettiin Xoossaa galata oykkides. 
Luke1:65 Iza gutati wuri daro babbida. Hayssi wurikka dhoqqa gezze biittan Yuhuda deren, ubbason haasayettides." 
Luke1:66 Hayssaka siyida asi wurikka, «Ha guuththa nay ay hananeeshaa?» giidi hanoza wursika ba wozinan oykkides; Godaa kushey tumappe izara issife dees." 
Luke1:67 Naaza aaway Zakaraasi Xillo Ayanan kumidi tinbite haasayshe," 
Luke1:68 «Yiidi ba asaa ashshida gishshas Isra7eele Xoossi galatetto. 
Luke1:69 Beni wode ba geeshsha nabeta doonan haasayettidayssa mala ba aylle Dawite keeththan ashshiza wolqqa nuus denththides. 
Luke1:70  
Luke1:71 Izi nuna nu morkketappenne, nuna ixxizayta kusheppe ashshees." 
Luke1:72 Hayssa izi ooththiday nu aawatas ba maaroteth bessanaassa, ba geeshsha caaqoza yuushshi qoppanaassa." 
Luke1:73 Kase nu aawaa Abrahaames caaqqidayssa qoppana malanne nu morkketa kusheppe izi nuna kessiin nuni izas baboy baynda ooththanaassinne nu diza wode ubbaan ba sinththan nuna geeshshateththaninne xilloteththan essanaassa. 
Luke1:74  
Luke1:75  
Luke1:76 Godaa oge giigsanaas ne izappe sinththara biza gishshas ta naazoo neni wogga Xoossaa nabe geetettana. 
Luke1:77 Asay ba nagarappe maarettida gishshas deres atoteththa erateth ne immana mala," 
Luke1:78 nu Xoossaa lo7o maaroteththaafe dendidayssan Saloppe nuus arshey kezides. 
Luke1:79 Hessika dhuman dizaytassinne hayqo kuwa giddon dizaytaska poo7isana malanne nu tohotakka saroteththa oge kaaleththanaassa» gides. 
Luke1:80 Guuththa naazikka diccides; Ayanankka minnides; Isra7eele asaas qonccen beettana gakkanaas bazzo biittan de7ides. 
Luke2:1 He wode biitta bollan diza asi wurikka taybettidi xaafettana mala Oroome kawo Awugisxoosappe awajjay kezides. 
Luke2:2 Hessika Qerenewoosa geetettizayssi Sooriya dere haariza wode hanida koyro dere taybo. 
Luke2:3 Hessa gishshas asi wuri xaafettanaas ba dere dere bides. 
Luke2:4 Yooseefeykka asho dabboteththan Dawite baggafe gidida gishshas Galila awuraajja giddon diza Naazirete katamappe Yuhuda awuraajja Beeteliheeme geetettiza Dawite katamappe yides. 
Luke2:5 Izi xaafettana bishin izas giigetta dashe yelana matida Maaramira bides. 
Luke2:6 Isttika heen dishin izis yelo wodey gakkides. 
Luke2:7 Izakka koyro attuma naa yelidayssafe guye imaththi aqiza keeththan aqizasoy baynda gishshas naaza carqqara xaaxada miiza sinththan ishisadus. 
Luke2:8 Beeteliheeme achchan dors heemmiza asati dorsa naagishe omarsara karen aqizayti deettes. 
Luke2:9 Godaa kiitanchchayka isttako yides; Godaa bonchcho poo7oykka istta lanqen yuuyi aadhdhanaas poo7ides. Isttika keehi dagammida gishshas," 
Luke2:10 Kiitanchchay istta, «Babbofte! Tani asa ubbaas gidiza gita ufayssa mishiraachcho ekka yadis." 
Luke2:11 Hach kawo Dawite katama Beeteliheemen shempo dhaley yelettides. Izikka Godaa Kirstoosa geetettees. 
Luke2:12 Carqqara xaaxetti ichchida gacino naa demmandeta; hessika inttes malata gido» gides. 
Luke2:13 Izarakka hara daro salo kiitanchchati beettida. Xoossa galatishe," 
Luke2:14 «Bolla salon Xoossas bonchchoy gido; saroteththika biitta bollan izi dosiza asaa ubbaas gido» gida. 
Luke2:15 Kiitanchchati isttafe shaakettidi salo simmiin dorsa heemmizayti ba giddon issoy issaa, «Ane haa yiite Goday nuus qonccisidayssanne hanidayssa Beeteliheeme katama biidi beyoos» gida." 
Luke2:16 Isttika eleli biidi Maaramira, Yooseeferanne miiza sinththan ichchida naaza demmida." 
Luke2:17 Be7idaappe guye Godaa kiitanchchay naaza gishshas isttas yootidayssa ubbaa zaari yootida. 
Luke2:18 Heemmizayti yootidayssa siyida asay wuri keehi malalettides. 
Luke2:19 Gido attiin Maarama yo7oza wursa ba wozinan woththa denththa qoppashe gam7adus. 
Luke2:20 Heemmizaytikka hanidayssi wurikka kiitanchchay isttas yootida mala gididi beettida gishshas siyidayssassinne be7idayssas ubbaas Xoossa galatishenne bonchchishe simmida. 
Luke2:21 Naazi yelettiin osppunththa gallassan qaxxarettiza wodey gakkiin aayeya iza qanththatanaappe kase kiitanchchay gida mala Yesusa geetettidi summides. 
Luke2:22 Muse wogaa mala istti geeyza wodey wuriin Yooseefeynne Maarama guuththa naaza Yesusa Godaa Xoossa sinththe shiishshanaas ekkidi Yerusalaame kezida. Hessika Godaa wogaan koyro yelettiza attuma nay wuri Godaas dumma gidana geetettidi xaafettidayssa polanaassinne 
Luke2:23  
Luke2:24 qasseka Godaa wogaan nam7u haraphphetanne woykko nam7u haraphphe ciyeta geetettidayssa mala yarsho shiishshanaassa. 
Luke2:25 He wode Yerusalaame kataman xillonne Xoossa babbiza issi Simoona geetettiza asi dees; izikka Isra7eele nayta atoteththaa naagiza asanne Xillo Ayanay iza bolla shempida asa. 
Luke2:26 Qasseka Kirstoosa be7ontta dishe hayqqontta mala Xillo Ayanay izas qonccides. 
Luke2:27 Izikka he wode Xillo Ayanay kaaleththiin Xoossa Keeththe lasha gaath gelides. Naaza aayeyranne aawara Muse wogaan bessizayssa polanaas guuththa naaza Yesusa ekkidi gelida wode," 
Luke2:28 Simooni naaza ekki idimmidi Xoossaa galatishe," 
Luke2:29 «Godoo! Ne caaqqida qaalaa mala ha7i tani ne aylley ne ashshizayssa ta ayfera be7ida gishshas hi7a tana saron ekka; asa ubbaa sinththan ne giigsida atoteththaa ha7i tani ta ayfera beyadis. 
Luke2:30  
Luke2:31  
Luke2:32 Hayssika ubba deres geemettidayssa qonccisiza poo7o; ne dere Isra7eelesikka bonchcho» gides. 
Luke2:33 Iza aawaynne aaya iza gishshas haasayettida yo7ozan malalettida. 
Luke2:34 Simoonikka istta anjjides; Maaramokka, «Daro asa wozina qofay qonccana mala hayssi Isra7eelen diza darotas dhayossinne atoteththassa; Iza ixxizaytas qasse malata gidana mala doorettides." 
Luke2:35 Qasseka darota wozina qofay qonccana mala naaza mishay qara mashsha mala ne wozina phalqana» gides. 
Luke2:36 Qasseka Aaseere baggafe Fanu7eele naa Haanna geetettiza cimmida nabey dawus; izakka ba koyro azinara laappun layth kumeth de7adus. 
Luke2:37 Layththay izis osppun tammanne oyddu layth gidana gakkanaas omarsinne gallas xoomashenne woossashe Xoossa Keeththafe shaakettontta am7eteththan gam7adus. 
Luke2:38 He wodekka shiiqada Xoossaa galatadus; Yerusalaame wozzeteth naagishe dizaytas ubbaas guuththa naaza gishshas yootadus. 
Luke2:39 Yooseeferanne Maaramira Godaa wogaan azazettidayssa polidi Galila awuraajjan diza baso Naazirete katama simmida. 
Luke2:40 Guuththa naazikka diccidi minni minni bides; aadho erateththan kumides; Xoossa aadho kiyateththika iza bolla dees. 
Luke2:41 Iza aawaynne iza aaya layththan layththan Paaziga bonchchanaas Yerusalaame beettes. 
Luke2:42 Naazas layththay tammanne nam7u layth kumida wode kase lose gididayssa mala Paaziga bonchchana kezida. 
Luke2:43 Paaziga ba7aaleza bonchchidi baso simmishin Yesusi Yerusalaamen attides. Yelidaytikka izi attiddayssa eribeettenna. 
Luke2:44 Banara issife biza oge asaara dees gishe issi gallassa oge bida. Gido attiin izi isttara bayndayssa eridi ba dabbota achchaninne laggeta achchan dizaakko giidi koyida. 
Luke2:45 Koyi koyidi beettontta ixxiin Yerusalaame simmida. 
Luke2:46 Heedzdzu gallassafe guye Xoossa Keeththan tamaarsizayta giddon uttidi siyishe, asata oychchishenne istta oysha zaarishe Xoossa Keeththan dishin demmida." 
Luke2:47 Siyidayti wuri Yesusa akeekaninne iza zaarozan daro malalettida. 
Luke2:48 Yooseefeynne Maarama iza be7ida wode malalettida. Maaramakka, «Ta naazoo ays hayssa mala ooththadii? Ne aawaynne tani nena koyishe keehi metotettidos» gadus." 
Luke2:49 Izikka zaaridi, «Tana ays koyidetii? Tani ta aawa keeththan daanaas bessizayssa eribeekketii?» gides." 
Luke2:50 Gido attiin isttas izi yootidayssi gelibeenna. 
Luke2:51 Hessafe guye isttara issife Naazirete wodhdhidi isttas azazettishe de7ides. Iza aaya Maaramakka he hanida miishshaa ubbaa ba wozinan naagashe gam7adus. 
Luke2:52 Yesusi aadho erateththan, geesaninne saban Xoossa sinththaninne asa sinththan diccides." 
Luke3:1 Xibiraadoose geetettiza Qeesaarey kawotida tammanne ichchashanththo layththan Phanxoosa Philaxoosa geeteizayssi Yuhuda biittaa haariza wode Herdoosi Galila biittaa haariza wode, iza ishay Piliphoosi, Ixuriyaasanne Xirakondoose biittaa haariza wode Lisanoosikka Abloone biitta haariza wode," 
Luke3:2 Haannaynne Qayafay qeeseta halaqa gidida wode Xoossa qaalay bazzo biittan diza Zakaraasa naa Yohannisakko yides. 
Luke3:3 Yohannisi Yordaanoose shaafa achchan diza dereta, «Intte nagara atto gaanaas nagarappe simmidi xammaqettite» giidi yootides;" 
Luke3:4 Hessika qasse nabe Isayaasi, «Bazzon hizgidi waassiza asa kooshinchchi, ‹Godaas oge giigsite; baasidikka lo7eththite." 
Luke3:5 Shoobba biittay wuri kumana; zumatinne zumbullati wuri ziqqi gaana; geella ogey sitti gaana; moorettida ogey lo7o gidana. 
Luke3:6 Asa zereth ubbaa ashshiza Xoossa wolqqa beyana› giidi bazzon waassiza asa qaala giiris» giidi ba maxaafan xaafida mala. 
Luke3:7 Yohannisikka iza kushen xammaqettana yiza asaas, «Intteno ha shooshsha naytoo! Yaana diza Xoossa hanqofe haakkana mala ooni inttena zoridee?" 
Luke3:8 Intte nagara oosoppe simmidayssa erisiza ooso ooththite; ‹Nu aaway Abrahaamey nuus dees› guus aggite gides. ‹Xoossi baas giikko ha shuchchatappe Abrahaames naa ooththi denththanaas dandayzayssa erite› 
Luke3:9 Kalttay mith qanxxanaas miththa xaphon dees. Lo7o ayfe ayfontta iita miththi wuri qanxxettidi taman yegettana» gides. 
Luke3:10 Asaykka, «Histtiin ay ooththinoo?» giidi oychchides." 
Luke3:11 Yohannisikka asaas, «Nam7u may7oy dizay issi may7oy baynda asas immo; qasseka qumay dizaykka bayndaades shaakki immo» gides." 
Luke3:12 Qaraxa shiishshizaytikka xammaqettanaas yiidi, «Astamaaree! Nu ay ooththinoo?» gida." 
Luke3:13 «Izikka, ‹Intte azazettidayssafe bollara qaraxa shiishshofte› gides." 
Luke3:14 «Wottadaratikka, ‹Nuni qasse ay ooththinoo?› giidi oychchida. Izikka, ‹Oona miishsheka wolqqan ekkofte; qasseka oonakka wordon mootopite; intte damozay inttes gidana› » gides." 
Luke3:15 Asay Yohannisa be7idi, «Hayssi Kirstoosaa?» giidi ba wozinan sidhides." 
Luke3:16 Yohannisikka ubbaas, «Tani inttena haaththan xammaqays; gido attiin ta iza caamma birshanaas bessonttay taappe aadhdhizaadey yaana. Izi inttena Xillo Ayananinne taman xammaqana." 
Luke3:17 Balezan diza kaththaa gafezappe geeshshanaas kath suraggiza layday iza kushen dees. Baleza kumeth geeshshana; gistteza qasse di7en qolana; gafezakka to7ontta taman xuuggana» gides. 
Luke3:18 Yohannisi asaa hara dumma dumma zore qaalara minththi zorishe Mishiraachcho qaala yootides. 
Luke3:19 Gido attiin Galila biitta haariza Herdoosi ba isha machcho Herodiyaado ekkida gishshassinne hara daro iita ooththida gishshas Yohannisi iza hanqida gishshas," 
Luke3:20 kase mooroza bolla hara gujjidi Herdoosi Yohannisa qasho keeththan yeggides. 
Luke3:21 Asay xammaqettidaappe guye Yesusikka xammaqettides; izi woossishin saloy doyettides. 
Luke3:22 Xillo Ayanaykka haraphphe misatidi iza bolla wodhdhides. «Saloppe, ‹Ta dosiza nay nena; Nenan tani ufayettays› » giza qaalay yides." 
Luke3:23 Yesusi Xoossa ooso oykkishin izas layththay gede heedzdzu tammu gidana. Asaykka izi Yooseefe naa, Eele naa," 
Luke3:24 Maate naa, Lewe naa, Milka naa, Yuhuda naa, Yooseefe naa," 
Luke3:25 Matotiyo naa, Amoxe naa, Nahome naa, Isilime naa, Naage naa," 
Luke3:26 Maate naa, Matotiyo naa, Semeye naa, Yooseefe naa, Yuhuda naa," 
Luke3:27 Yoonane naa, Ereese naa, Zerubaabele naa, Salatiyaale naa, Neere naa,"
