Luke16:27 «Dure addezi qasse, ‹Aabboo! Hessi hessa gidikko neni Alazaare duge ta aawa soo yeddana mala ta nena woossays; taas ichchashu ishati deettes; hayti haa waayeso yontta mala biidi isttas lo7eththi yootana mala Alazaare yeddarkkii!› gides." 
Luke16:28  
Luke16:29 «Abrahaamey izas zaaridi, ‹Museynne nabeti heen istta achchan diza gishshas isttafe siyetto› gides." 
Luke16:30 «Izikka zaaridi, ‹Aawaa Abrahaame, hessa mala gidenna; hayqqida asaappe issaadey hayqoppe dendi biikko istti Xoossa maaroteththan gelana› gides." 
Luke16:31 «Abrahaameykka zaaridi, ‹Museynne nabeti gizayssa siyontta ixxiko hayqqida asaappe issaadey dendidaakkoka istti ammanettenna› » gides." 
Luke17:1 Yesusi bana kaallizayta, «Asa dhuphidi nagaran yeggiza miishshi yontta aggenna; gido attiin yaana dhuphezas gaaso gidizaades aayye ana!" 
Luke17:2 He addezi ha guuththatappe issaas dhuphe gidanaappe woxa shuchchi iza qoodhen qashettiin abba giddo izi yegettizaakko izas lo7o gidana. 
Luke17:3 Hessa gishshas intte hu7es naagettite. ‹Ne ishay nena qohikko hanqetta; izi ba mooro eridi simmiko maara.› 
Luke17:4 Issi gallassan laappunto zaari zaari qohidi laappuntokka zaari zaari, ‹Maara› giikko maara» gides." 
Luke17:5 Hawaaretikka, «Godoo! Nuus ammano gujja» gida." 
Luke17:6 Godaykka, «Gaashe ayfe lagge ammanoy inttes diikko hayssa, ‹Eththaa dhoqalletta baada abban gela toketta› intte giikko izi inttes azazettana» gides." 
Luke17:7 Qasseka Yesusi, «Intte giddofe issi asas goshshanchchay woykko dors heemmiza ashkaray diikko izi goshshasoppe simmishin, ‹Taas maana kawo giigsa; ta maada uyana gakkanaas gixettada taas ooththa; hessafe guye maandasanne uyandassa› gees attiin ha7i quma maana haa aadhdha gizee?" 
Luke17:8  
Luke17:9 Histtiko he ashkaraa goday izi iza azazo polida gishshas iza galati erizee? 
Luke17:10 Hessa gishshas inttenikka intte azazettidayssa wursi polida wode, ‹Nuni go7ay baynda oosanchchata nuus ooththanaas bessizayssa poli ooththidos› gite» gides." 
Luke17:11 Hessafe guye Yesusi Yerusalaame bishe Samaariyaranne Galila achchara aadhdhides. 
Luke17:12 Issi guta gelida wode inchchirachcha hargiza tammu asati iza demmida. Isttika haahon eqqidi 
Luke17:13 ba qaala dhoqqu histtidi, «Yesusaa! Godoo! Nuus mishettarkkii!» gida." 
Luke17:14 Izikka istta be7idi, «Biite! Inttena qeesetas bessite» gides; isttika buro bishe oge bolla paxida." 
Luke17:15 Isttafe issoy ba paxidayssa be7idi ba qaala dhoqqu histtidi Xoossaa bonchchishe simmides. 
Luke17:16 Izaadeyka Yesusa toho bolla kundidi galatides; izikka Samaariya biitta asa. 
Luke17:17 Yesusikka addeza, «Paxidayti tammu as deettennee? Histtiin uddufunati awa bidoo?" 
Luke17:18 Hayssa dumma dere addezappe attiin Xoossa galatizay baa guussee?» giidi oychchides. 
Luke17:19 Addezakka zaaridi «Dendada ba! Nena ne ammanoy paththides» gides. 
Luke17:20 «Xoossa Kawoteththi ayde yaanee?» giidi Farsaaweti Yesusa oychchida wode Yesusi, «Xoossa kawoteththi beettiza malatatan yuukku." 
Luke17:21 Asay Xoossa kawoteththi haan dawus woykko heen dawus gaanaas dandayettenna; Xoossa kawoteththi intte giddon dawus» giidi zaarides. 
Luke17:22 Bana kaallizaytaska, «Asa Naa gallassatappe issi gallassayo beyanaas intte amottana wodey yaana; gido attiin intte beyekketa." 
Luke17:23 Asay inttes, ‹Haan dawus› woykko, ‹Heen dawus› gaana shin intte istta kaallidi boopite." 
Luke17:24 Gaasoykka wolqqanththi wolqqamidi ha gaxappe he gaxa gakkanaas poo7isiza mala Asa Nay yiza gallas iza mala hanana. 
Luke17:25 Gido attiin hayssi wuri hananaappe koyro Asa Nay daro meto ekkanaassinne hayssa ha yeletaan kadhettanaas bessees. 
Luke17:26 «Nohe wode hanidayssa mala Asa Naa wodenkka hessaththo hanana. 
Luke17:27 Nohey markaben gelana gallas gakkanaas asay mishininne uyishin, ekkishininne gelishin dhayssiza haaththi yiidi wursika dhayssides." 
Luke17:28 «Looxe wodekka iza mala hanides; asay meessinne uyees; bayzeessinne shammees; tokkizaaz tokkees; keeththika keexxees. 
Luke17:29 Gido attiin Looxey Sodoomeppe kezida gallas shuchchinne mith qorontta diine tamay saloppe bukkidi ubbaa dhayssides. 
Luke17:30 «Asa Nay qoncciza gallas hessaththo hanana. 
Luke17:31 He wode ba keeththa bolla dizaadey oonikka keeththa giddon diza miish ekkana giidi duge wodhdhofo; hessaththoka goshsha soon diza asi guye soo simmofo. 
Luke17:32 Looxe machcho qopite. 
Luke17:33 Ba de7o gam7isana koyzay wuri dhayssana; ba shempo aaththi immizaadey gam7isana. 
Luke17:34 Ta inttes gizay he wode omars nam7u asi issi hiixan ichchana; issoy ekettana; issoy attana. 
Luke17:35 Nam7u maccassati issife gaaccishin issineya ekettana; hankkoora attana. 
Luke17:36 Nam7u asi issife goshshason daana; issoy ekettana; issoy attana. 
Luke17:37 «Isttika zaaridi, ‹Godoo! Istti awa ekettanee?› gida; izikka ahay dizason ankkoti shiiqana» gides." 
Luke18:1 Bana kaallizayti azallontta ubba wode woossanaas bessizayssa erisanaas Yesusi ha leemisoza isttas yootides. 
Luke18:2 «Issi kataman Xoossas yayyontta asinne bonchchontta issi daannay dees. 
Luke18:3 He katamankka issi am7eya dawus. Izakka, ‹Ta balgaarara taas mootoy diza gishshas pirdarkkii!› gashe izakko simerettadus." 
Luke18:4 «Daannazikka daro wode gakkanaas izis pirdibeenna; gido attiin guyeppe ba wozinan, ‹Xoossas yayyontta asekka bonchchontta aggiko," 
Luke18:5 hanna am7eya tana waayisiza gishshas ta izis pirdana› qoppides; hessa histtontta aggiko ubba wode simerettada iza tana daabursana» gides. 
Luke18:6 Godaykka, «Makkallanchcha daannay gidayssa siyite;" 
Luke18:7 Xoossi qamma, gallassinne omars izakko waassiza doorettidaytas pirdenneyee? Tana ay metidee! giidi ba maado gam7isandee?" 
Luke18:8 Ta inttes gays; izi isttas elle pirdana; gido attiin Asa Nay yiza wode biitta bolla ammano demmandeshaa?» gides. 
Luke18:9 Bana xillo asa mala qoodidi ceeqettizaytassinne harata leqo ayfen xeellizaytas leemisora," 
Luke18:10 «Nam7u asati woossanaas Xoossa Keeththe bida; issoy Farsaawe, hinkoyssi qaraxa shiishshizaade." 
Luke18:11 Farsaawezikka eqqidi ba gishshas, ‹Xoossoo! Tani hara asa mala bonqqizaade, makkallizaade, laymatizaade harappeka hayssa qaraxa shiishshizaade mala gidontta aggida gishshas ta nena galatays." 
Luke18:12 Saaminttan nam7aa xoomays; taas diza tammaafe issaa immays› giidi woossides. 
Luke18:13 «Gido attiin qaraxa shiishshiza addezi haahon eqqidi pude salo dhoqqu gi xeellanaas koyibeenna; gido attiin ba tira iccishe, ‹Xoossoo! Tana nagaranchchaza maararkkii!› gides." 
Luke18:14 «Ta inttes yootays; Xoossa sinththan Farsaawezi xilloteth demmibeenna; hayssi qaraxizayssi gidikko xillidi baso simmides; bana dhoqqisizay wuri ziqqi gaana; bana ziqqisizay gidikko dhoqqu gaana» gides. 
Luke18:15 Yesusi boshereththana mala asay guuththa nayta izakko ehides. Iza kaallizaytikka hessa be7idi hanqettida. 
Luke18:16 Gido attiin Yesusi guuththa nayta baakko xeygidi, «Guuththa nayti taakko yaanayssa diggofte; Xoossa kawoteththi haytantta malassa." 
Luke18:17 Ta inttes tumu gays; Xoossa kawoteth guuththa naa mala ekkonttay wuri izin gelenna» gides. 
Luke18:18 Ayhudata halaqatappe issoy, «Kiya astamaaree! Mernaa de7o laattanaas ta ay ooththoo?» gi oychchides." 
Luke18:19 Yesusikka, «Aazas tana kiya gay? Issi Xoossaafe attiin kiyay haray deenna." 
Luke18:20 ‹Laymatoppa; wodhoppa; kaysotoppa; wordo markkattofa; ne aawaa bonchcha› giza azazota ne eraasa» gi zaarides. 
Luke18:21 Addezikka, «Hayta gidikko guuth naateteththafe doommada naagadis» gides." 
Luke18:22 Yesusikka hessa siyidi, «Histtiko nees issi miishshi paccees; nees dizaaz wursa bayzada manqotas imma; salo mazgaban demmandasa; izappe guye yaada tana kaalla» gides." 
Luke18:23 Gido attiin addezi hessa siyida wode daro haaroy izas diza gishshas keehi mishettides. 
Luke18:24 Yesusikka addeza xeellidi, «Daro miishshi diza asati Xoossa kawoteth gelanayssi ay mala metoo!" 
Luke18:25 Durey Xoossa kawoteth gelanayssafe gaamellay narpe lukora aadhdhanayssi matana» gides. 
Luke18:26 Hessa siyida asay, «Histtiin ooni attana dandayzee?» gides." 
Luke18:27 Yesusikka, «Asa achchan dandayettonttay Xoossa achchan dandayettees» gides." 
Luke18:28 Phexroosikka, «Hekko nuni nuus dizaaz ubbaa aggidi nena kaallidos» gides." 
Luke18:29 Yesusikka isttas, «Ta inttes tumu gays; Xoossa Kawoteththa gishshas giidi ba keeththe, ba machcho, ba ishantta woykko bana yelidayta woykko ba nayta aggidaadey," 
Luke18:30 ha7i wode daro dakko kushe ekkonttaynne yiza wode qasse mernaa de7o ekkonttay oonikka deenna» gides. 
Luke18:31 Yesusikka bana kaalliza tammanne nam7ata dumma efidi, «Ha7i nuni Yerusalaame kezana goos; nabeti asa naa gishshas xaafidayssi wuri polettana." 
Luke18:32 Ayzaabetas aaththi immana; isttika iza qidhi kaa7ananne waayisana; iza bolla cuttana. 
Luke18:33 Garafana; hessafekka zaaridi wodhana; izikka heedzdzanththo gallas hayqoppe dendana» gides. 
Luke18:34 Iza kaallizayti gidikko hessa ubbaafe issinokka eribeettenna; izi gizayssika isttas gelibeenna. Izi aaza gishshas haasaydaakko eribeettenna. 
Luke18:35 Yesusi Iyarkko geetettizaso matida wode issi qooqe addey oge doonan uttidi woossees. 
Luke18:36 He qooqe addezikka daro asay ogera aadhdhizayssa siyidi, «Hessi aazee?» gi oychchides." 
Luke18:37 Isttika izas, «Naazirete Yesusi hayssara aadhdhees» gi yootida." 
Luke18:38 Izikka, «Dawite naa Yesusa taas qadhetta!» gi waassides." 
Luke18:39 Yesusappe sinththati bizayti, «Co7u ga!» giidi hanqettida. Gido attiin izi, «Dawite nawu! Taas qadhetta!» giidi darssi waassides." 
Luke18:40 Yesusikka eqqidi addeza izakko ehana mala azazides; izikka izakko shiiqida mala," 
Luke18:41 «Ta nees ay ooththana mala koyay?» giidi oychchides. Qooqezikka, «Godoo xeellanaas koyays» gides." 
Luke18:42 Yesusikka, «Nena ne ammanoy paththides xeella» gides." 
Luke18:43 Addezi heerakka xeellides; Xoossaaka bonchchishe Yesusa kaallides; hessa be7ida derey wuri Xoossaa galatides. 
Luke19:1 Yesusi Iyarkko geetettizasora aadhdhi bishin," 
Luke19:2 Zekkiyoosa geetettiza issi asi heen Yesusi biza oge bolla dees. Izikka qaraxa qanxxisizaytas halaqanne keehi dure asa. 
Luke19:3 Izi Yesusa geetettizayssi awayssako beyanaas koyishin qaanththa asa gidida gishshassinne daro derey Yesusa kaalliza gishshas Yesusa beyanaas dandaybeenna. 
Luke19:4 Yesusi he ogera aadhdhishin sinththe aadhdhidi oge bolla diza issi eththa miththa bolla kezides. 
Luke19:5 Yesusi eththaa gars gakkidi dhoqqu histti xeellidi, «Zekkiyoosaa! Hach ta ne keeththan pe7anaas bessees; elela wodhdha» gides." 
Luke19:6 Izikka eleli wodhdhidi ufayssan mokki ekkides. 
Luke19:7 He wode heen izara diza asay hessa be7idi, «Nagaranchcha keeththan imato maana gees» giidi wurikka ba giddon zuuzumettida." 
Luke19:8 Gido attiin Zekkiyoosi eqqidi, «Godoo! Tani taas diza miishshe ubbaafe bagga shaakkada manqotas immana; tani oonappeka wordora bonqqa ekkidaazi diikko oyddu kushe gujjada izaades immana» gides." 
Luke19:9 Yesusikka, «Ha addezi Abrahaame naa gidida gishshas hach ha keeththaas paxateththi yides» gides." 
Luke19:10 Hayssas gaasoykka Asa Nay haa yiday dhaydayssa koyanaassinne ashshanaassa. 
Luke19:11 Asay hayssa siyishin leemisora haasaya oykkides; gaasoykka izi Yerusalaame gakkanaas matida gishshassinne asatas Xoossa Kawoteththi qonccana haniza misatida gishshassa. 
Luke19:12 Hessa gishshas, «Issi kawoy ba kawoteththa shuumeteth ekki yaanaas haaho biitta bides." 
Luke19:13 Ba ashkarata giddofe tammata xeygidi tammu minaane isttas immidi, ‹Ta simmada yaana gakkanaas hayssa miishshaan zal7ite› gides." 
Luke19:14 «He dere asati qasse iza ixxida gishshas, ‹Hayssi addezi nu bolla kawotana mala koyokko› giidi as iza geedora kiita aaththi yeddida." 
Luke19:15 «Gido attiin ha kawo naazi kawo gididi guye ba dere simmides. Kase bishe tammu minaane immida tammu ashkarati izi immida biraan zal7idi ay keena tirfisidaakko eranaas istta xeygides. 
Luke19:16 «Isttafe koyrozi shiiqidi, ‹Godoo! Ne taas immida tammu minaaney hara tammu yelides› gides." 
Luke19:17 «Godazikka iza, ‹Ne ammanettida ashkara; lo7o ooththadasa. Guuththa miishshan ne ammanettida gishshas tammu katamata ne haarana mala nees immadis› gides." 
Luke19:18 «Nam7anththozikka izakko shiiqidi, ‹Godoo! Ne taas immida minaaneppe hara ichchashu minaaney wodhdhides› gides." 
Luke19:19 «Iza godazi izas zaaridi, ‹Neni ayssana mala tammu katamati nees imettida› gides." 
Luke19:20 «Qasseka hankko oosanchchay shiiqidi, ‹Godoo! Neni woththonttasoppe ekkizaade; zeronttasoppe maxizaadenne menxe iita as gidida gishshas ta nees babbada carqqan xaaxa woththida ne minaaneyo hey ekka› gides." 
Luke19:21  
Luke19:22 «Iza godazi zaaridi izas, ‹Haysso iita oosanchchazoo! Ta ne qaalan nena zaara pirdays. Tani woththonttasoppe ekkizaadenne zeronttasoppe maxiza menxe iita as gididayssa eraasashin tani ta miishshaa yelora ekkana mala he miishshaan ooththana asatas aazas immabeekkii?› gides." 
Luke19:23  
Luke19:24 «Iza godazikka heen eqqida asata, ‹Iza kusheppe minaaneza ekkidinne tammu minaaney dizayssas immite› gides." 
Luke19:25 «Isttika zaaridi, ‹Godoo! Izas tammu minaaney deesko› gida." 
Luke19:26 «Izikka, ‹Dizaades ubbaas haray gujettana; bayndaades kase dizayssi izappe ekettichchana. Gido attiin tani istta bolla kawotontta mala koyidayta hayta ta morkketa taakko haa ehidi ta sinththan shukkite› gi zaarides» gides." 
Luke19:27  
Luke19:28 Hessa haasayi simmidi Yesusi Yerusalaame kezanaas isttafe sinththati bides. 
Luke19:29 Dabrazayte geetettiza zumaa bolla diza Betefaagenne Bitaaniya geetettiza katamatakko matida wode bana kaallizaytappe nam7ata, «Heen intte sinththan diza qeeri katamayo biite; biidi katamayo intte gelishin oonikka toggi erontta issi qashetti diza hare gutte intte demmana; iza birshidi haa taas ekki yiite; inttena oonikka, ‹Aazas birsheetii?› giidi oychchiko, ‹Godaas koshshees giite› » gi kiittides." 
Luke19:30  
Luke19:31  
Luke19:32 Kiitettidaytikka biidi izi isttas yootida mala hare gutteza demmida. 
Luke19:33 Istti gutteza birshiin gutteza godati be7idi, «Aazas birsheetii?» giidi oychchida." 
Luke19:34 Isttika, «Godaas koshshees» gida." 
Luke19:35 Hare gutteza Yesusaakko ehidi ba may7o ubbaa gutteza bolla yeggidi hare gutteza bolla Yesusa togisida. 
Luke19:36 Asay wurikka ba afala Yesusi biza oge bolla miccides. 
Luke19:37 Dabrazayte zumaa bollara duge woththiza ogezakko matida wode qooday baynda derey ba be7ida malaata gishshas wurikka ufayssara ba qaala dhoqqu histtidi, «Godaa sunththan yiza kawoy anjjettidayssa; saroy salon, bonchchoy saloppe bolla salon gido» gides." 
Luke19:38  
Luke19:39 Deraappe issi issi Farsaaweti Yesusa, «Astamaaree! Ha nena kaalliza asay gizayssa gontta mala hanqa» gides." 
Luke19:40 Izikka isttas zaaridi, «Hayti co7u gidaakko shuchchatikka waassana» gides." 
Luke19:41 Yesusi Yerusalaame matishe katamayo be7idi izis yeekkides. «Nees saro gidizaaz hach ne eridaakko aazee dizay? Ha7i ne ayfeppe qotettida gishshas ne morkketi heera haara nena giddoththidi un7eththana wodey yaana. 
Luke19:42  
Luke19:43  
Luke19:44 Nenanne ne gibbe giddon nenara diza ne nayta ubbaa biitta kessana; shuchchaaka shuchcha bollafe laallontta aggettenna. Hessi wurikka Xoossi nena koyishin neni erontta aggida gishshassa» gides. 
Luke19:45 Hessafe kaallidi Yesusi Xoossa Keeththe gelidi Xoossa Keeththa giddon zal7izayta kessides. 
Luke19:46 Qasseka, «Ta keeththay Woosa Keeth gidana geetetti xaafettides; intte gidikko pangay diza gongolo histtideta» gides." 
Luke19:47 Wontiin wontiin Xoossa Keeththan izi tamaarsishin xaafetinne dere halaqati iza wodhanaas koyida. 
Luke19:48 Gido attiin derey wurikka izara oykettidi izi tamaarsizayssa kaalliza gishshas ooththanaazi isttas kirqi gides. 
Luke20:1 Issi gallas Yesusi asaa Xoossa Keeththan tamaarsishininne Mishiraachcho qaala sabbakishin qeese halaqati, xaafetinne dere Cimati shiiqettidi izakko yida." 
Luke20:2 «Hayssa ne ooththizay oona shenenee? Nees shene immiday oonee?» giidi iza oychchida. 
Luke20:3 Izikka isttas, «Tanikka inttena issi oysho oychchays; ane taas zaarite." 
Luke20:4 Yohannisa xinqatay saloppeyee? Asappee?» gides. 
Luke20:5 Isttika ba giddon issoy issaara, «Nu, ‹Yohannisa xinqatay saloppe› giikko izi nuna, ‹Histtiin aazas ammanibeekketii?› gaana." 
Luke20:6 ‹Asappe› giikko asay wuri Yohannisi nabe gididayssa ammaniza gishshas nuna shuchchara caddana» gi zorettida. 
Luke20:7 Hessa gishshas, «Izi awappeko nu erokko» giidi zaarida." 
Luke20:8 Yesusikka histtiko, «Tanikka aaza wolqqan ooththizaakko inttes yootikke» gides." 
Luke20:9 Qasseka Yesusi asaas leemisora, «Issaadey woyne mith tokkides; gade goyizaytas kira immidi hara dere biidi heen gam7ides." 
Luke20:10 Kaxxiza bone wode kaththaafe ekki yaana mala ba ashkaratappe issaade gadeza goyida asataakko yeddiin gadaa goyizayti kiitetti bidayssa qoxxidi mela kushe yeddida. 
Luke20:11 Kaaleththidikka hara ashkara yeddiin goshshanchchati ha7ikka oykki qoxxidinne kawushshidi mela yeddida. 
Luke20:12 Ha7ikka kaaleththidi heedzdzanththo ashkaraa yeddiin goshshanchchati izakka qoxereththi madunththidi kare kessi yeggida. 
Luke20:13 «Woyne miththaa goday, ‹Ha7i ay ooththoo? Oonee erizay ta keeha siiqiza ta naaza yeddidaakko iza bonchchandettoshaa?› gides." 
Luke20:14 «Gido attiin biitta goyizayti naaza be7ida mala ba giddon, ‹Hayssi iza laattana naaza gidennee? Haa yiite; iza wodhidi biittaa laattoos› giidi zorettida." 
Luke20:15 Woyne miththaa tokkidasoppe kare kessidi naaza wodhida. Histtiko ha7i woyne miththaa goday ha asata wosttanee? 
Luke20:16 Yiidinne he goshshanchchata dhayssana; woyne mith tokkizasohoza haratas immana» gides; dereykka hessa izi gidayssa siyidi, «Hayssa malay hanoppo» gides." 
Luke20:17 Yesusikka, «Isttako xeellidi, ‹Histtiin shuchchan keeththe keexxiza asati leqqi aggida shuchchay keeththas waanna hu7e gidana geetettidi xaafettida leemisozas birsheththay aazee?›" 
Luke20:18 Ha shuchchaa bolla kundiday wuri shuchchaan qoxettana; shuchchayka iza bolla wodhdhidaadey wurikka liiqana» gides. 
Luke20:19 Xaafetinne qeeseta halaqati hessi leemisozi istta bolla haasayettidayssa eridi heerakka iza oykkanaas koyida shin derezas babbida. 
Luke20:20 Yesusa wolqqara haarizaytas aaththi immanaas iza doonappe keziza bala qaala demmidi oykkanaas kaalli kaalli naagidanne xillo asa misatidi iza kaalli iza doonappe yo7o naagiza asata izakko yeddida. 
Luke20:21 Iza doonappe yo7o koyza asati Yesusa, «Astamaaree! Neni tumaa haasayzayssanne tumaa tamaarsizayssa; qasseka Xoossa oge ne tumu tamaarsizayssanne oonakka shaakka maaddonttayssa nu eroos." 
Luke20:22 Gido attiin Qeesaares giira giiranaas bessizee? Bessennee?» giidi oychchida. 
Luke20:23 Izikka isttas diza gene qofaa eridi," 
Luke20:24 «Ane issi dinaare tana bessite, hayssi iza bolla diza medhazinne xaafettoyssi oonayssee?» gides. Isttika, «Qeesaareyssa» gida." 
Luke20:25 Izikka zaaridi isttas, «Qeesaareyssa Qeesaares, Xoossayssa Xoossas immite» gides." 
Luke20:26 Hessa gishshas izi haasayda qaalappe ekkidi asaa sinththan iza qaxxanaas dandaybeettenna; izi immida qaalan malalettidi co7u gida. 
Luke20:27 Hayqqidayta denththi baa giza Saduqaawetappe issi issi asati Yesusaakko yiidi oysha shiishshida. 
Luke20:28 «Godoo! ‹Issaadey machcho ekkidi naa yelontta hayqqiko he hayqqidayssa machcheyo iza ishay ekkidi ba ishaa laattana naa izas yelo› giidi Musey nuus xaafides. 
Luke20:29 Histtiin laappun ishati deettes shin isttafe bayrazi machchidi naa yelontta hayqqides. 
Luke20:30 Iza kaalozikka izaththo hayqqides; 
Luke20:31 heedzdzanththozikka izo ekkides; laappunati wurikka he maccassayo ekkidi wurikka naa yelontta hayqqida. 
Luke20:32 Wurseththan maccassaya hayqqadus. 
Luke20:33 Laappunatikka ha maccassayo ekkidashin ha maccassaya wurseththan hayqqidayti dendiza wode iza awayssa machcho gidanee?» 
Luke20:34 Yesusi isttas, «Ha alame nayti geleettessinne ekkeettes." 
Luke20:35 Buro yaana alamen hayqqidayta denththaa demmanaas bessizayti gidikko gelettenanne ekkettenna. 
Luke20:36 Istti kiitanchchata mala gidana gishshas hessafe guye hayqqettennanne hayqoppe denththa nayta gidida gishshas istti Xoossa nayta. 
Luke20:37 Musey qeeri wora gishshas xaafettida taarikezan Godaa, ‹Abrahaame Xoossaa, Yisaaqa Xoossaa Yaaqoobe Xoossaa› guussan hayqqidayti dendanayssa bessees." 
Luke20:38 Wurikka izas de7oy diza gishshas izi paxata Xoossafe attiin hayqeththata Xoos gidenna» gides. 
Luke20:39 Issi issi xaafeti, «Astamaaree! Lo7o gadasa» gida." 
Luke20:40 Hessafe guye ay asikka iza oychchanaas xalibeenna. 
Luke20:41 Hessafe guye Yesusi, «Asay Masihe waanidi izi Dawite naa gizee?" 
Luke20:42 Gaasoykka Dawiti ba xaafida mazamure maxaafatan, ‹Ta ne morkketa ne toho gars aaththana gakkanaas Goday ta Godaa, ne ta ushachchan utta› waanidi gidee?" 
Luke20:43  
Luke20:44 Histtiko Dawiti iza, ‹Godaa› gi xeygishe waani izas naa gidanee?» gides." 
Luke20:45 Derey wuri siyishin bana kaallizaytas," 
Luke20:46 «Gooshettiza adussa qamisa may7idi yuushshe dosizaytappe giyay dizason saroketeth koyzaytappenne Ayhuda Woosa Keeththan dhoqqa oydenne diggisason bonchchoso koyza xaafetappe naagettite. 
Luke20:47 Haytanti am7eta keeth kallosizayta; asi istta beyana mala woosa adusseettes; heytantta iita pirday naagees» gides. 
Luke21:1 Yesusi dhoqqu gi xeellishin dure asati Xoossa Keeththen muxuwaata izan shiishshizayssa giddon muxuwaata yeggishin be7ides. 
Luke21:2 Qasseka issi am7o dizaara nam7u sikkina gidiza nam7u xarqimala he muxuwaata izan shiishshizayssan yeggishin xeellidi," 
Luke21:3 «Ta inttes tumu gays; hanna am7eya ubba asaappe bollara aadheth immadus. 
Luke21:4 Hayti asati immiday baas diza tirpafe gidishin iza gidikko baas baynda wolqqaafe baas dizaaronne ba duussas koshshizaaro wursa yeggadus» gides. 
Luke21:5 Iza kaallizaytappe issi issi asati Xoossa Keeththay lo7o shuchchaninne asay immida imotan ay mala lo7i keexettidaakko giidi ba giddon haasayettishin Yesusi siyidi, «Hayssi intte be7izayssi wuri laalettontta shuchchi shuchcha bolla keelettida mala attontta wodey yaana» gides." 
Luke21:6  
Luke21:7 Isttika iza, «Astamaaree! Hayssi wuri ayde hananee? Qasse hayssi hananayssas malatay aazee?» giidi oychchida." 
Luke21:8 Izikka isttas, «Intte balettontta mala naagettite; daroti bana, ‹Ta Kirstoosakko! Wodeykka matides› gishe ta sunththara yaana shin intte istta kaallofte." 
Luke21:9 Ola gishshassinne dere makkallateththa gishshas siyiza wode dagammofte. Hessi wuri kasetidi hananaas bessees; wurseththi gakkides; gido attiin heerakka hanenna» gides. 
Luke21:10 Qasse, «Derey dere bolla, kawoy kawo bolla dendana." 
Luke21:11 Biittay wolqqama qaath qaaxxana; koshaynne boshay dumma dummason hanana; daro babisizaazinne saloppe gita malatay beettana. 
Luke21:12 «Hessi wuri hananaappe kasetidi asay inttena oykkananne gooddana; Ayhuda Woosa Keeththinne qasho keeth gelththana; kawota sinththinne daannata sinth shiishshana. Hessi wuri ta sunththa gishshas intte bolla gakkana. 
Luke21:13 Hessi wurikka markkattanaas lo7o qaada gidana. 
Luke21:14 Hessa gishshas nuna oychchizaytas nu ay zaarinoo? giidi kasetidi hirgontta mala hayssa wozinan woththite. 
Luke21:15 Intte morkketappe oonikka inttenara eqettanaassinne baleththanaas dandayontta qaalanne cinccateth ta inttes immana. 
Luke21:16 Inttena yelidaytinne intte ishati, intte dabbotinne intte laggeti wuri inttena aaththi immana; inttefe baggata wodhana." 
Luke21:17 Ta sunththaa gishshas ubba asaa achchan intte ixettana. 
Luke21:18 Gido attiin intte hu7e binanatappe issinakka dhayukku. 
Luke21:19 Intte minni eqqiko intte shempo ashshana. 
Luke21:20 «Ola asay Yerusalaame giddoththishin beyikko izis dhayza wodey matidayssa erite. 
Luke21:21 He wode Yuhudan dizayti pude zuma bolla gangetto; kataman dizaytikka katamappe kezite; dere giddon dizaytikka he katamayo geloppetto. 
Luke21:22 Xaafettidayssi wuri polettanaas hanna halo kessiza wode. 
Luke21:23 Biitta bolla gita metoy hanana; hayssa dereza bolla hanqoy yaana; hessa gishshas he wode qanththara diza maccassatassinne dhanththiza aayetas aayye ana! 
Luke21:24 Bagga asay mashshan hayqqana; ba dereppe hara dere di7ettana; Yerusalaameykka Xoos erontta dereta wodey polettana gakkanaas, Xoos erontta asatan yedhettidaaro gidana." 
Luke21:25 «Arshe bolla, agina bollanne xoolintte bolla malatay beettana; abbaafenne abba dambala giirissafe dendidayssan biitta bolla diza derey hirgananne metotana." 
Luke21:26 Salo wolqqamati qaaxxiza gishshas asay biitta bolla aazee hananeeshaa guussaninne naagon xalla daaburana. 
Luke21:27 He wode Asa Nay wolqqara, gita bonchchoranne shaarara yishin beyana." 
Luke21:28 Intteka hayti ha ta gidayti poleteth oykkishin inttes ateththa wodey matida gishshas sitti gi eqqite; intte ayfe pude dhoqqu histtite» gides. 
Luke21:29 Kaaleththidi, «Balase miththinne hara miththata ubbaa xeellite; he miththati hayth kessishin intte be7iza wode boney matidayssa intte ereeta." 
Luke21:30  
Luke21:31 Hessaththoka haytanti geetettidayti polettishin intte be7iza wode Xoossa Kawoteththi intteko matidayssa erite. 
Luke21:32 «Ta inttes tumu gays; hayssi wuri polettana gakkanaas ha yeletay aadhdhenna. 
Luke21:33 Saloynne sa7ay aadhdhana shin ta qaalay aadhdhenna. 
Luke21:34 «Histtiko wogay baynda duussan, daro ushshaninne duussas hirgan intte wozinay daaburoppo; hessa ooththontta ixxiko he gallassay intte qoppontta narxa mala intte bolla gakkontta mala naagettite." 
Luke21:35 Hayssi biitta bollan diza asaa ubbaa bolla gakkana. 
Luke21:36 Hessa gishshas buro yaanayssafe intte kessi ekkana malanne Asa Naa sinththan eqqanaas dandayana mala ubba gallas minnidi woossite» gides. 
Luke21:37 Yesusi gallas gallas Xoossa Keeththan tamaarsi tamaarsidi omars omars Dabrazayte geetettiza zuma bolla kezi kezi aqees. 
Luke21:38 Asay wurikka izappe siyanaas maalado wonttara Yesusaakko Xoossa Keeththe yees. 
Luke22:1 He wode Paaziga geetettiza ukeththara bonchchettiza ba7aaley mati uttides. 
Luke22:2 Qeeseta halaqatinne xaafeti hankko dere asaas babbiza gishshas Yesusa dhayssana oge koyida. 
Luke22:3 Yesusa kaalliza tammanne nam7atappe Asqoronto dere as Yuhuda geetettizayssan Xala7ey gelides. 
Luke22:4 Yuhudaykka qeeseta halaqataakkonne Xoossa Keeththa alaafetakko biidi isttas Yesusa wostti aaththi immanakko isttara zorettides. 
Luke22:5 Isttika hessan ufayettidi miishshe immanaas izara giigida. 
Luke22:6 Yuhudaykka istta qofaa dosides; Yesusa isttas asi be7ontta aaththi immanaas injje wode naagishin Paaziga dorsaa shukkidi ukeththara bonchchiza ba7aale gallassi gakkides. 
Luke22:7  
Luke22:8 Yesusikka bana kaallizayta, «Paaziga kawo maanaas biidi nuus giigsite» giidi Phexroosanne Yohannisa kiittides." 
Luke22:9 Isttika, «Nu awan giigsana mala koyay?» gida." 
Luke22:10 Izikka zaaridi, «Intte gede Yerusalaame katama gelishin haaththa oto tookkida asi inttena demmana; intteka izi biidi geliza keeththe gakkanaas iza kaallite." 
Luke22:11 Keeththaades, ‹Astamaarey tana kaallizaytara Paaziga kawo maanaas imaththa keeththi awan dizee?› gees giite." 
Luke22:12 Izikka imaththas giigettida aahoso inttena bessana; izi bessizason giigsite» gides. 
Luke22:13 Isttika biidi Yesusi gida mala keeththaa demmidi Paaziga heen giigsida. 
Luke22:14 Wodey gakkida mala Yesusi Hawaaretara quma maaddan uttidi, «Tani waaye beyanaappe kasetada hayssa Paazigaa inttenara issife maanaas keeha amottadis." 
Luke22:15  
Luke22:16 Ta inttes tumu gays; Xoossa Kawoteththan hayssa birsheththi polettana gakkanaas hayssa Paazigaa nam7anththo ta inttenara miikke» gides. 
Luke22:17 Woyneppe oosettida ushshaa xuu7ara ekkidi Xoossaa galati simmidi, «He7ite; wurikka izappe uyite» giidi isttas immides." 
Luke22:18 «Ta inttes tumu gays; hayssafe guye Xoossa Kawoteththi yaana gakkanaas nam7anththo ha woyne ushshaafe uyikke» gides. 
Luke22:19 Ukeththaa ekkidi Xoossaa galatides; izappe isttas menththi immidi, «Hayssi intte gishshas imettana ta asho leemiso gidiza gishshas hayssa ubba wode tana qoppanaas ooththite» gides." 
Luke22:20 Izaththoka kawoppe guye ushshaa xuu7a denththidi, «Hayssi ushshay intte gishshas ta suuththaan hanana ooraththa caaqo woga." 
Luke22:21 «Gido attiin tana aaththi immanaade kushey ta kushera issife maaddan dees. 
Luke22:22 Asa Nay kasetidi iza gishshas hananayssi wuri uttida mala izi baana; gido attiin iza aaththi immizaades aayye ana!» gides. 
Luke22:23 Isttika hessa ooththanay oonee? giidi ba giddon issoy issaa oyshereththida. 
Luke22:24 Qasseka, «Ooni oonappe aadhdhizaakko» giidi ba giddon issoy issaara palamettida." 
Luke22:25 Yesusikka istta, «Dere haariza kawoti ba dere asaa wolqqara haareettessinne isttika lo7o kawota geetettidi xeygetteettes." 
Luke22:26 Intte gidikko hessaththo hanopite; inttefe gita gididaadey woykko ta ooppeka aadhdhays giza asi ubbaafe qeeri naa mala gido; haarizaadey haarettizaade mala gido. 
Luke22:27 Quma eqqidi mizidaadefenne uttidi mizaadefe ooni aadhdhizee? Uttidi mizaade gidennee? Tani qasse intte giddon ashkara mala days. 
Luke22:28 «Intte gidikko taappe shaakettontta ta waayishin ta matan eqqidayta. 
Luke22:29 Ta Aaway tana kawoththidayssa mala tanikka ta kawoteththaan inttena kawoththana. 
Luke22:30 Hessika ta kawoteththan ta maaddafe intte maana malanne uyana mala; qasseka ta kawoteththa algan uttidi tammanne nam7u Isra7eele nayta bolla pirdanaassa» gides. 
Luke22:31 Qasseka Yesusi Simoona xeygidi, «Simoonaa! Xala7ey inttena gistte mala suragganaas woossides." 
Luke22:32 Gido attiin tani neeppe ammanoy dhayontta mala ne gishshas Xoossaa woossadis; nekka simmida wode ne ishata minththeththa» gides. 
Luke22:33 Simoonikka zaaridi, «Godoo! Ta nenara qashettanaassinne hayqqanaas giiga uttadis» gides." 
Luke22:34 Yesusikka zaaridi, «Phexroosaa! Hach kuttoy issito waassanaas, ‹Ta iza erikke› gaada heedzdzuto ne tana kaddana» gides." 
Luke22:35 Qasseka Yesusi istta, «Ta inttena kase caammay, korojoynne qaraxiitey baynda kiittida wode inttes aazi paccidee?» gi oychchides. Isttika, «Aykkoyka paccibeenna» gida." 
Luke22:36 Izikka zaaridi, «Ha7i gidikko korojoykka, qaraxiiteykka dizaadey oykko; giththa mashshay bayndaadey ba may7o bayzidi shammo." 
Luke22:37 Ta inttes tuma gays; ‹Makkallatara izi issife taybettides› geetetti kase xaafettida qaalay ta bolla polettana bessees; ta gishshas xaafettidayssas poloy tumappe gakkides» gides. 
Luke22:38 Iza kaallizayti qasse, «Godoo! Hekko nam7u giththa mashshati hayssan deettes» gida. Izikka iza gishshas, «Hayssi gidana» gides." 
Luke22:39 Kase izas lose gidida mala pude Dabrazayte geetettiza zuma bolla kezi bides. Iza kaallizaytikka iza kaalli bida. 
Luke22:40 Hee gakkida mala, «Intte paacen gelontta mala woossite» gides." 
Luke22:41 Yesusi bana kaallizaytappe asi shuch olidi gaththanaaso mala haakki biidi gulbati woossides. 
Luke22:42 «Ta Aawawu! Ne shene gidikko hanno metoyo taappe digga; gido attiin ne sheney hanoppe attiin ta sheney hanoppo» giidi woossides. 
Luke22:43 Saloppe Kiitanchchay qonccidi Yesusa minththeththides. 
Luke22:44 Izikka keehi xuugettidi woossishin iza asateththaafe caway suuththa mala gukkides. 
Luke22:45 Woosappe dendidi bana kaallizaytakko bides. Isttika izas mishettidi qoppishin dhiskoy efidaashe Yesusi isttako yiidi," 
Luke22:46 «Ays dhiskeetii? Intte paacen gelontta mala ha7i dendidi woossite» gides. 
Luke22:47 Izi buro haasayan dishin Yesusa kaallizaytappe issoy Yuhuda geetettizayssi banara daro asaa kaaleththi ekki yiidi Yesusa yeeranaas izakko shiiqides. 
Luke22:48 Gido attiin Yesusi iza, «Yuhudaa! Tana Asa Naa yeeron aaththa immay?» gides." 
Luke22:49 Yesusa yuuyi aadhdhi diza asay hanoza lo7eththi xeellidi, «Godoo! Haytantta mashshara buththinoo?» gida." 
Luke22:50 Isttafe issoy qeeseta alaafe ashkaraza ushachcha hayth mashshara qanxxides. 
Luke22:51 Yesusi istta, «Intte ha7i taas aggite!» giidi ashkaraza hayth bochchidi paththides." 
Luke22:52 Qasseka iza oykkana yida qeeseta halaqata Xoossa Keeththa alaafetanne cimata, «Panga oykkiza asa mala giththa mashshanne durqqa ekkidi yidetii?" 
Luke22:53 Gallas gallas ta inttenara Xoossa Keeththan dishin ta bolla kushe woththibeekketa; hayssi dhumay kawotida intte wode» gides. 
Luke22:54 Hessafe guye Yesusa oykki ekkidi qeeseta halaqaso gelida; Phexroosikka Yesusa haahora kaallides. 
Luke22:55 Asay qeeseta halaqa gibbe giddon tama eeththidi ho7ishe issi bolla uttidaashe Phexroosikka isttara issife uttides. 
Luke22:56 Issi garadeya Phexroosi tama ho7izaytara uttidayssa beyadanne tishshi histta xeellada, «Hayssi addezikka Yesusara dees!» gadus." 
Luke22:57 Phexroosikka, «Hanne maccassayee! Ta iza erikke» giidi kaddides." 
Luke22:58 Guuth gam7ishin hara issaadey iza be7idi, «Nekka izara dizaytappe issaa gidikkii?» gides. Phexroosikka, «Haysso tani isttara diikke!» gides." 
Luke22:59 Issi saate mala gam7ishin hara asi qasseka, «Galila as gidiza gishshas sidhey baynda hayssi izara dees» gides." 
Luke22:60 Phexroosikka qasse, «Haysso ne gizaade ta erikke!» gides. Hinno gi kessontta dishin kuttoy waassides." 
Luke22:61 Godaykka Phexroosakko yishe xeelliin Phexroosi, «Hach kuttoy waassanaas ne tana heedzdzuto kaddana» giidi Goday kase yootoo qaalay iza wozinan karppi gides." 
Luke22:62 Phexroosikka kare kezidi hiqimi yeekkides. 
Luke22:63 Yesusa qachchidi naagiza asatikka iza bolla qidhi qidhi kaa7ishe shocereththida. 
Luke22:64 Iza ayfe goozidi, «Ne nabe gidikko nena shociday oonakko ane era!» giidi oychchida." 
Luke22:65 Hara daro cashsha qaalara kawushshida. 
Luke22:66 Gadey wontiin dere Cimati, qeeseta halaqatinne Muse wogaa tamaarsizayti duulata shiiqidi Yesusa duulatakko shiishshida." 
Luke22:67 Isttika Yesusa, «Ne Kirstoosaa? Ane nuus yoota» gida. Yesusikka, «Ta inttes yootidaakkoka tana ammanekketa." 
Luke22:68 Ta inttena oychchidaakko taas zaarekketa. 
Luke22:69 Gido attiin ha7ippe doommidi Asa Nay wolqqama Xoossa ushachchan uttana» gides. 
Luke22:70 He wode wurikka, «Histtiin ne Xoossa Naa?» giidi oychchida. Izikka, «Ta Xoossa Naa gididayssa intteka geeta» gides." 
Luke22:71 Isttika, «Hekko izi ba doonara markkattishin nu hayththara siyidos; hayssafe hara markka aazas koshshizee?» gida." 
Luke23:1 Heen shiiqida asay wuri dendidi Yesusa Philaxoosakko ekki bides. 
Luke23:2 «Hayssi addezi nu asay Qeesaares giira giirontta mala baleththishenne bana, ‹Tani Kirstoosi kawo› giidi baleththishin demmidos» giidi mootida." 
Luke23:3 Philaxoosikka Yesusa, «Neni Ayhudata kawoo?» giidi oychchides. Yesusikka zaaridi, «Ne gida mala» gides." 
Luke23:4 Philaxoosikka qeeseta halaqatassinne shiiqida asaas, «Hayssa addeza bolla iza mootisiza iita yo7o demmabeekke» gides." 
Luke23:5 Istti zaaridi, «Hayssi addezi Galilappe hayssa gakkanaas kumeththa Yuhuda waayiso bolla dees» giidi minththi yootida." 
Luke23:6 Philaxoosi asay gizayssa siyidi, «Yesusi Galila asakkonne» giidi lo7eththi eranaas oychchides." 
Luke23:7 Yesusi Herdoosa Kawoteththa giddon dizayssa shaakki eridi he wode Herdoosi Yerusalaamen diza gishshas izakko Yesusa yeddides. 
Luke23:8 Herdoosikka kase Yesusa beyanaas daro koyishe diza gishshas Yesusa be7idi keehi ufayides; iza gishshas kase siyidi izi ooththishin beyanaas koyidi ufayettides. 
Luke23:9 Daro oyshatakka iza oyshereththides; gido attiin Yesusi iza oyshaa zaaribeenna. 
Luke23:10 Qeese halaqatinne xaafeti heen iza matan eqqidi keehi wordo mooto mootida. 
Luke23:11 Herdoosikka ba wottadaratara issife iza kadhida; kawo may7o mayzidi Philaxoosakko zaari yeddides. 
Luke23:12 Herdoosinne Philaxoosi kase ba giddon issoy issaara ooshsha shin he gallas giigida. 
Luke23:13 Philaxoosi qeeseta halaqatara, dere daannataranne dere asaa shiishshidi," 
Luke23:14 «Hayssi addezi asay wuri makkallana mala denththeththees giidi intte taakko ehiin ta qorada iza oyththiza issi iita miishshika demmabeekke. 
Luke23:15 Qasseka Herdoosi issi iita miishshika iza bolla demmontta aggida gishshas haa nuukko zaari yeddides. Ha7i intte be7iza mala iza hayqos gaththiza issi iita miishshika ooththibeenna. 
Luke23:16 Hessa gishshas qaxxayada ta iza yeddana» gides. 
Luke23:17 Izi hessa giday istta ba7aale gallas qashettida asappe issaade birshiza wogay diza gishshassa. 
Luke23:18 Derey wurikka issi bolla, «Barbaane birshada hayssa addeza digga!» giidi waassides." 
Luke23:19 Barbaaney katama giddon asaa makkalla yo7on denththeththidi as wodhi qashettida asa. 
Luke23:20 Philaxoosikka Yesusa birshanaas koyida gishshas qasseka zaaridi oychchides. 
Luke23:21 Asay zaaridi iza, «Kaqqa! Kaqqa!» giidi waassides." 
Luke23:22 Philaxoosi heedzdzanththoka, «Aazas kaqqoo? Hayssi addezi ay iita ooththidee? Iza hayqos gaththiza iita ooso tani iza bolla beyabeekke; hessa gishshas qaxxayada ta iza birsha yeddana» gides." 
Luke23:23 Asaykka qaalaa dhoqqu histtidi Yesusi kaqettana mala Philaxoosa keehi woossishe waassides. 
Luke23:24 Hessa gishshas Philaxoosi istta oyshoy polettana mala azazides. 
Luke23:25 Asaa makkallisidi shempo wodhida gishshas qashettidayssa birshana mala istti woossidaade birshidi qasseka Yesusa istti dosida mala ooththetto giidi deraas aaththi immides. 
Luke23:26 Isttika Yesusa oykki ekki bishin Qareena geetettiza katamappe issi Simoona geetettiza addey haahoppe yizayssa demmida; Yesusi kaqettana masqale kocaa izi tookkidi Yesusa kaallana mala wolqqaththida. 
Luke23:27 Daro dereynne ba tira icci icci yeekkiza maccassati," 
Luke23:28 Yesusappe guyera iza kaallida. Yesusi isttako simmi xeellidi, «Intte Yerusalaame maccassay inttessinne intte naytas yeekkite attiin taas yeekkofte." 
Luke23:29 ‹Sinththafe intte hekko maynne gidida maccassati, yelontta ulotinne nay dhammontta dhanththati anjjettidayta!› gaana wodey sinththara yees." 
Luke23:30 He wode asay, ‹Zumatoo! Nu bolla woddite; zumbullatikka nuna qottite!› gaana." 
Luke23:31 Histtiin qaye miththa bolla hayssaththo ooththidayti mela miththa bolla wosttaneesha?» gides. 
Luke23:32 Izara issife hayqqana mala hara nam7u iita ooththida asata izara efida. 
Luke23:33 Qaaraniyo geetettizaso gaththidi kaqqida; iita ooththidaytappe issaa ushachcha baggara, issaa hadirsa baggara kaqqida." 
Luke23:34 Yesusikka, «Ta Aawawu! Hayti ba ooththizayssa eridi ooththontta gishshas isttas atto ga!» gides; isttika iza may7oza saama yeggidi ba giddon gishetti ekkida." 
Luke23:35 Hessi hanishin asay wuri eqqi xeellides; daannatikka, «Izi hara asaa ashshides shin Xoossafe doorettida Kirstoosi iza gidikko ane ha7i bana ashsho» giidi qidhida." 
Luke23:36 Wottadaratikka shiiqidi woyneppe agettida caala ushshu ushshidi iza qidhida. 
Luke23:37 «Neni Ayhuda kawo gidikkii? Ane ha7i nena ashsha» gida. 
Luke23:38 Iza hu7eppe bolla baggara masqale koca bolla, «Hayssi Ayhudata kawo» giza qaala xaafi qaaphida." 
Luke23:39 Iita ooththidi kaqettida asatappe issoy cashsha qaala Yesusa bolla qoqofides. «Ne Kirstoosa gidikkii? Ane nenakka nunakka ashsha» gides. 
Luke23:40 Iita ooththidaytappe issoy, «Neni nees bessiza pirda ekkashe Xoossas babbikii?" 
Luke23:41 Nuni nu ooththida iita oosos bessizayssa ekkoos; hayssi addezi gidikko issi iitakka ooththibeenna» gides. 
Luke23:42 Yesusa, «Neni ne kawoteththara yiza wode tana qoppa!» gides." 
Luke23:43 Yesusikka zaaridi, «Ta nees tumu gays; hach ne tanara Gannaten daana» gides." 
Luke23:44 He wode gadey seeta gallas gidishin biidi uddufun saate gakkanaas kumeththa biitta bolla dhumay dhumides. 
Luke23:45 Arshe poo7oy digettides. Xoossa Keeththa magalashaykka daakettidi nam7u kezides. 
Luke23:46 Yesusikka keehi waassidi, «Ta aawawu! Tani ta shempo ne kushen immays» gida mala shempo kezides." 
Luke23:47 Mato halaqay hessa be7idi, «Hayssi addezi tumappe xillo asakkoshin» giidi Xoossaa galatides." 
Luke23:48 Hessa beyanaas heen shiiqidi derey wuri he hanidayssa be7idi tira icci iccidi simmides. 
Luke23:49 Gido attiin Yesusa kase lo7eththi erizayti wuri qasseka Galilappera iza kaalliza maccassati hessa xeellishe haakki eqqida. 
Luke23:50 Ayhudata duulata asaappe issoy izikka Yooseefe geetettizayssi daro kiyanne xillo asa. 
Luke23:51 Izikka kase asay Yesusa bolla duulatishin he duulatan deenna; izikka Armatiyase geetettiza Ayhudata katama asa shin Xoossa Kawoteththi yaanayssa naagishe gam7ides. 
Luke23:52 Izikka Philaxoosakko biidi Yesusa ahaa baas immana mala Philaxoosa woossides. 
Luke23:53 Philaxoosi izas ero giin Yooseefey ahaa masqale kocappe woththida mala xaaxidi shuchchafe woocettida kase hara asi moogettontta duufon efidi woththides. 
Luke23:54 He gallassay asay Sambatas giigettiza gallas gidida gishshas Sambatay gelana hanees. 
Luke23:55 Galilappe dendidi Yesusara yida maccassatikka Yooseefe kaalli biidi duufoza be7ida. Yesusa ahaa wostti woththidaakko be7ida. 
Luke23:56 Heeppe simmidi shittonne tiyiza miish giigsida. Wogay giza mala Sambata gallas shempida. 
Luke24:1 Wogga wontta maaladora maccassati ba giigsida shittoza ekkidi Yesusa woththida duufozakko bida. 
Luke24:2 Shuchchayka duufoza doonappe genderidi dizayssa be7ida. 
Luke24:3 Gido attiin giddo gelidi Yesusa ahaa demmontta aggida gishshas," 
Luke24:4 isttas hanzaazi dhayiin istti tollu gidaashe qoppontta xolqettiza may7o may7ida nam7u asati istta achchan eqqida. 
Luke24:5 Maccassatikka keehi babbidi duge biitta xeellishin, «He asati paxidi dendidayssa hayqeththata giddon ays koyeetii?" 
Luke24:6 Izi dendides! Haan baa. Qasseka izi Galilan dishe inttes kase ay gidaakko ane qopite. 
Luke24:7 Asa Nay nagaranchchata kushen aadhdhi imettanaassinne kaqettanaas, hayqoppeka heedzdzanththo gallas dendanaas bessees» giidi yooti woththides." 
Luke24:8 Maccassatikka he wode kase izi gida qaalaa akeekida. 
Luke24:9 Maccassati duufosoppe simmidi hessa ubbaa Yesusa kaalliza tammanne issinetassinne haratas yootida. 
Luke24:10 Hessaka Hawaaretas yootiday Magdale gizasoppe yida Maaramonne Yohaano geetettizaarira Yaaqoobe Maaramonne isttara issife diza hara maccassata. 
Luke24:11 Gido attiin isttas maccassati yootidayssi agumo misatiin ammanibeettenna. 
Luke24:12 Gido attiin Phexroosi woththan Yesusa duufokko gakki hokkidi duufoza giddo xeellishin iza ahaza xaaxida may7oy xalla dizayssa be7idi keehi malalettishe baso simmides. 
Luke24:13 He gallas iza kaallizaytappe nam7ati Yerusalaameppe tammanne issi kilo metire haakkiza Emahoose geetettiza katama beettes. 
Luke24:14 Bishe istti he wode hanida Yesusa hayqo gishshas ba giddon haasayetteettes. 
Luke24:15 Istti haasayettishin Yesusi isttako shiiqidi isttara issife bishin," 
Luke24:16 istti iza erontta mala istta ayfey oykettides. 
Luke24:17 Yesusi istta, «Hayssi oge hemettishe intte intte giddon haasayettizayssi aazee?» gides. Isttika dagamara modhettishe sitti gi eqqaa gida." 
Luke24:18 Istta giddofe issoy Qaliyopha geetettizayssi zaaridi, «Ha mata gallassatan Yerusalaamen hanidayssa erontta imaththa asi nena xallaa?» gides." 
Luke24:19 Izikka isttas zaaridi, «Aazi hanidee?» giin istti qasse zaaridi, «Xoossa sinththaninne asa ubba sinththan oosoninne qaalan mino nabe gidida Naazirete Yesusa gishshassa» gida." 
Luke24:20 Izakka qeeseta halaqatinne daannati hayqo pirdas aaththi immidanne kaqqida. 
Luke24:21 Nuni gidikko, « ‹Isra7eele wozzanay iza› giidi ufayettidosishin harappeka hessi haniin qasse hach heedzdzanththo gallassa." 
Luke24:22 Qasse nu giddofe issi issi maccassati nuna keehi malalisida; isttika maalado wonttara gede iza duufokko biidi," 
Luke24:23 iza ahay beettontta ixxiin yiidi izi paxa dizayssa isttas yootiin Kiitanchchata be7idayssa nuus yootida. 
Luke24:24 Nuuppeka issi issi asati iza duufokko biidi maccassati gida mala be7ida attiin Yesusa demmibeettenna» gida. 
Luke24:25 Izikka isttas, «Intteno wozinan woththonttaytoo! Intte wozinay kase nabeti yootidayssa ammananaappe takkidaytoo!" 
Luke24:26 Xoossafe kiitettidayssi ha metoza ekkanaassinne gede ba bonchchoso gelanaas bessennee?» gides. 
Luke24:27 Museppenne nabetappe doommidi Geeshsha Maxaafatan iza gishshas xaafettidayssa isttas lo7eththi yootides. 
Luke24:28 Istti ba bizaso matida wode Yesusi aadhdhi bizaa misatides. 
Luke24:29 Isttika qasse, «Gadey qammiza gishshas nunara aqa» giidi iza keehi woossiin isttara aqanaas gelides." 
Luke24:30 Isttara issife maaddan uttidi uketh ba kushen oykkidi isttas menththi menththi immides. 
Luke24:31 He wode istta ayfey doyettiin iza gididayssa erida; izikka istta ayfeppe geemmides. 
Luke24:32 Isttika, «Nu yishe oge bolla dishin nuna haasayssidi Geeshsha Maxaafatakka qonccisidi nuus gelanaashe yootiin nu wozinay tama mala xuugettibeennee?» giidi issoy issaara haasayettida." 
Luke24:33 Heerakka dendidi Yerusalaame simmi bida; tammanne issinetinne isttara issife dizaytikka issi bolla shiiqi dizayta demmida. 
Luke24:34 Isttika ba giddon issoy issaas, «Goday tumu dendides! Simoonaska beettides» gida." 
Luke24:35 Iza kaallizaytappe nam7ati oge bolla hanidayssanne Yesusi ukeththaa menththi menththi immida wode istti wostti eridaakko isttas yootida. 
Luke24:36 Hessa gishshas istti ba giddon haasayettishin Yesusi istta giddon eqqidi, «Saroy inttes gido!» gides." 
Luke24:37 Gido attiin istti moytille be7idaa misatiin keehi dagammida. 
Luke24:38 Izikka isttas, «Aazas daro qoppeetii? Aazas intte wozinara sidheetii?" 
Luke24:39 Ta kushetanne ta tohota haa xeellite; tanakko; qasseka tana oykki be7ite; tana intte be7izayssa mala moytilles ashoynne meqeththi deenna» gides. 
Luke24:40 Hessa gi simmidi ba tohotanne ba kusheta istta bessides. 
Luke24:41 Isttika ufayssa daroppenne malaleteththafe dendidayssan buro ammanontta dishin Yesusi, «Hessan aykko mizaazi dizee?» giidi istta oychchides." 
Luke24:42 Isttika mole xiixa issi bars izas immida. 
Luke24:43 Izikka ekkidi istta sinththan mides. 
Luke24:44 Izikka, «Inttenara ta diza wode, ‹Muse wogan nabetaninne yeththa Maxaafatan ta gishshas xaafettidayssi wurikka polettanaas bessees› gaada ta inttes yootida ta qaalay hayssako» gides." 
Luke24:45 He wode Geeshsha Maxaafata istti erana mala wozina isttas doydes. 
Luke24:46 Isttaskka, «Kirstoosi waaye beyana; heedzdzanththo gallas hayqoppe dendana geetetti xaafettides." 
Luke24:47 Yerusalaameppe doommidi ubba deres nagarappe simoynne maaroteththi iza sunththan yootettana. 
Luke24:48 Intteka hayssas markkatta. 
Luke24:49 Tanikka ta Aaway immida ufayssaa inttes yeddana; intte qasse wolqqa bollafe may7ana gakkanaas Yerusalaame kataman takkite» gides. 
Luke24:50 Hessafe guye istta ekkidi Bitaaniya geetettizaso kezides. Ba kushetakka denththidi istta anjjides. 
Luke24:51 Istta anjjishe isttafe shaakettidi pude salo bides. 
Luke24:52 Isttika izas hokki goynnida; keehi ufayettishe Yerusalaame simmida. 
Luke24:53 Ubba wode Xoossa Keeththan Xoossaa galatishe gam7ida. 
John1:1 Qaalay kase koyro dees. Qaalaykka Xoossa achchan dees. He qaalaykka Xoossa. 
John1:2 Izi koyro Xoossa achchan dees. 
John1:3 Medheteththi wuri izan medhettides. Medhettidaazan izi baynda medhettiday issinakka duukku. 
John1:4 De7oy izan dawus; hanna de7oya asas poo7o. 
John1:5 Poo7oy dhuman poo7isees; dhumay poo7o mulekka xoonenna. 
John1:6 Xoossafe kiitettida Yohannisa geetettiza issaadey dees. 
John1:7 Iza markkateththan asi wuri ammanana mala Poo7os markka gidi yides. 
John1:8 Izi poo7o gishshas markkattana yides attiin izi ba hu7es poo7o gidenna. 
John1:9 As ubbaas poo7o immiza tumu poo7oy hayssa ha alamezan yuussan dees. 
John1:10 Qaalaykka kase alamen dees; alameykka medhettiday izanna. Gido attiin alamey iza eribeenna. 
John1:11 Izi ba baggataakko yiin iza baggati iza ekkibeettenna. 
John1:12 Gido attiin iza ekkidayti iza sunththan ammanidayti istti Xoossa nayta gidana mala maata isttas immides. 
John1:13 Isttika Xoossa nayta gididay Xoossafe yelettida gishshas attiin asa zereththafe hessika asa wogan woykko asho shenen gidenna. 
John1:14 Qaalaykka as gidides; Xoossa kiyateththaninne tuman kumidi nunan aqides; issi naas aawaa matan diza bonchcho misatiza iza bonchcho nu be7idos. 
John1:15 Yohannisikka, «Taappe guyera yizayssi taappe aadhdhees. Gaasoykka izi taappe kasekka dees gaada ta inttes yootidayssi hekko hayssi izakko!» gi markkattides." 
John1:16 Iza kumeththa kiyateththan nu wuri kiyateththa bolla kiyateth ekkidos. 
John1:17 Wogay Muse baggara imettides; kiyateththinne tumay gidikko Yesus Kirstoosa baggara nuus yides. 
John1:18 Xoos be7iday oonikka baa. Gido attiin Xoossa Aawa matan diza Xoossa Naa issoy xalala iza qonccisides. 
John1:19 Ayhudata daannati Yerusalaameppe qeesetanne Lewe nayta Yohannisakko kiittidi, «Ne oonee?» gi oychchishin," 
John1:20 Yohannisi, «Tani Kirstoosa gidikke» giidi geeshshi markkattides attiin markkattanaas ixxibeenna." 
John1:21 Isttika, «Histtiin ne oonee? Ne Eelaasaa?» gi oychchida; izikka, «Gidikke» giidi isttas zaarides. Isttika, «Izi yaana geetettida nabey nenee?» gida. Izikka, «Akkay tana gidikke» gides." 
John1:22 Istti qasse, «Histtiin ne oonee? Nuna kiittida asaas nu yootana mala ne nena oona gay?» gida." 
John1:23 Izikka, «Nabe Isayaasi yootida mala tani, ‹Xoossa oge suurisite› gishe bazzo biittan waassizaade qaala giirissa» gides." 
John1:24 Farsaawetappe kiitettida issi issi asati," 
John1:25 hessa gishshas, «Ne Xoossi kiittidaade woykko buro yaana geetettida nabey nena gidonttaa gidikko histtiin aazas nuna xammaqay?» giidi iza oychchida." 
John1:26 Yohannisikka isttas, «Ta haaththan xammaqays; gido attiin intte eronttaadey intte giddon eqqides." 
John1:27 Taappe guyera yaanayssi iza; ta iza caamma qasho birshanaas bessizaade gidikke» gides. 
John1:28 Hayssi wuri haniday Yohannisi xammaqiza Yordaanoose shaafappe he pinththan diza Bitaaniya geetettiza katamanna. 
John1:29 Wonteththa gallas Yohannisi Yesusi baakko yishin be7idi, «Dere nagara biittafe diggana Xoossa dorsi hekko hayssich!" 
John1:30 ‹Taappe guyera yaanayssi izi taappe kasekka diza gishshas taappe aadhdhees› gaada ta inttes yootizay hayssich! 
John1:31 Tanikka ta baggara iza erabeekke; gidikkoka izi Isra7eele deres qonccana mala ta haaththan xammaqashe yadis» gides. 
John1:32 Kaaleththidikka Yohannisi hizgi markkattides; «Xillo Ayanay haraphphe kafo misatidi saloppe wodhdhishininne iza bolla uttishin beyadis. 
John1:33 Ta ta baggara iza erikke shin ta haaththan xammaqana mala tana kiittidaadey, ‹Xillo Ayanay iza bolla wodhdhi shempishin ne beyanaadey Xillo Ayanan meeccanay iza› giidi taas yootides." 
John1:34 Tanikka hessa beyadis. Hessa gishshas izi Xoossa naa gididayssa ta markkattays» gides. 
John1:35 Wonteththa gallas Yohannisi bana kaalliza nam7atara heen eqqides. 
John1:36 Yesusi iza achchara aadhdhishin Yohannisi be7idi, «Xoossa dorsi hekko hayssich!» gides." 
John1:37 Yohannisa kaalliza nam7ati hessa siyidi Yesusa kaallida. 
John1:38 Istti iza kaallishin Yesusi guye yuuyi xeellidi, «Ay koyeetii?» gides. Isttika, «Astamaaree! Ne duussasoy awaa?» gida." 
John1:39 Izikka istta, «Haa yiidi be7ite» gides; hessa gishshas biidi izi awan dizaakko be7idanne he gallas izara issife pe7ida; wodeykka gede tammu saateso bides." 
John1:40 Yohannisi yootida qaalaa siyidi Yesusa kaallida nam7atappe issoy Simoona Phexroosa isha Indiraasa. 
John1:41 Indiraasi koyro ba isha Simoonaakko biidi, «Xoossi kiittida Kirstoosa nu demmidos!» gides." 
John1:42 Hessafe guye Indiraasi Simoona Yesusaakko ekki bides. Yesusikka iza tishshi histti xeellidi, «Haysso! Ne Yoona naa Simoona; hayssafe guye ne Keefa geetettana» gides. Keefa guussi Phexroosa guussa woykko zaalla shuch guussa." 
John1:43 Wonteththa gallas Yesusi Galila baanaas koyides. Piliphoosakka demmidi, «Tana kaalla» gides." 
John1:44 Piliphoosikka Indiraasa malanne Phexroosa mala Betesayda katama asa. 
John1:45 Piliphoosi Natina7eele demmidi, «Musey woga maxaafan qasse nabetikka buroppe hananayssa yootiza ba maxaafatan iza gishshas xaafida addeza nu demmidos. Izikka Yooseefe naa Naazirete Yesusaakko!» gides." 
John1:46 Natina7eeley qasse, «Naazireteppe lo7o miishshi beetti erizee?» gi oychchiin Piliphoosi iza, «Haa yaada beya» gides." 
John1:47 Natina7eeley Yesusa beyana yishin Yesusi be7idi iza, «Hekko! Geney baynda tumu Isra7eele asa!» giidi iza gishshas yootides." 
John1:48 Natina7eeleykka zaaridi, «Tana wostta eradii?» gi oychchiin Yesusikka, «Piliphoosi nena xeyganaappe kase balase miththa garsan ne dishin ta nena beyadis» gi zaarides." 
John1:49 Natina7eeley, «Astamaaree! Ne Xoossa naa; Ne Isra7eele kawo» gides." 
John1:50 Yesusikka izas, «Ne ammaniday, ‹Ta nena balase miththa garsan beyadis› gida gishshee? Ne buro hessafe aadhdhiza daro miish beyana." 
John1:51 Gujjidikka ta inttes tumu gays; buro saloy doyettiin Xoossa kiitanchchati Asa Naa bolla wodhdhishininne kezishin intte beyana» gides. 
John2:1 Heedzdzanththo gallas Galila giddon diza Qaana geetettiza kataman sargey dees; Yesusa aayeyakka heen dawus. 
John2:2 Yesusinne iza kaallizaytikka sargezaso xeygettida. 
John2:3 Sargezason woyneppe agettida ushshay wuriin Yesusa aaya Yesusa, «Woyne ushshay wurides» gadus." 
John2:4 Yesusikka izo, «Aayee! Taas nenara aazi dizee? Ta wodey gakkibeenna» gides." 
John2:5 He wode Yesusa aayeya Maarama heen gadezan diza oosanchchata, «Izi inttena gizayssa ooththite» gadus." 
John2:6 Ayhudatas geesho wogay diza gishshas shuchchafe medhettida usuppun baaththati heen deettes; isttika issoy issoy nam7u oto woykko heedzdzu oto haaththe oykkeettes. 
John2:7 Yesusi oosanchchata, «Baaththata haaththe kunththite» giin isttika baaththata doona gakkanaas siltti histti kunththida." 
John2:8 Hessafe guye oosanchchata, «Ane ha7i duuqqidi sargeza alaafezas izappe immite» gides. Isttika duuqqi duuqqi immida." 
John2:9 Alaafezikka woyne ushshan laamettida haaththaa ganxi xeellidi izi awappe yidaakko eribeenna. Haaththaa duuqqidayti gidikko ereettes; hessa gishshas sargeza alaafey mishiraza xeygidi," 
John2:10 «Asi wuri sargeson koyro lo7o ushshu shiishshees; asay maththottidaappe guye iitaa ehees; gido attiin ne gidikko lo7o ushshu hanno gakkanaas woththaa gadasa» gides. 
John2:11 Yesusi hessa malalisiza malata ubbaafe koyro Galila geetettiza deren Qaana kataman ooththides; ba bonchchoka hessa malan qonccisides; iza kaallizaytikka izan ammanida. 
John2:12 Hessafe guye Yesusi ba aayeyra ba ishataranne bana kaallizaytara duge Qifirnahoome wodhdhidi heen guuththa wode takkida. 
John2:13 Ayhudata Paaziga ba7aaley matida gishshas Yesusi Yerusalaame bides. 
John2:14 Xoossa Keeththa gibbe giddon boorata, dorsatanne haraphpheta bayzizayta qasseka miishshe laammizayti miishshe laammishin demmides." 
John2:15 Hessa be7idi wodoro xurqafe dooqqi ekkidi asaanne booratakka Xoossa Keeththa gibbefe kessides; miish laammizayta miishshaakka dharccidi istta xaraphpheezatakka shiri shiri yeggides. 
John2:16 Haraphphe bayziza asaakka, «Hayssa ubbaa gede diggite! Ta aawa keeththaa zal7e keeth histtofte» gides." 
John2:17 He wode iza kaallizayti, «Ne keeththa mishay tana tama mala xuuggees» geetetti xaafettida qaalaa qoppa." 
John2:18 Hessafe guye Ayhuda asaa halaqati Yesusa, «Ne hayssa wursa ooththanaas sheney nees dizayssa qonccisanaas ne nuna ay malalisiza malata bessanee?» gi oychchida." 
John2:19 Yesusikka isttas, «Ane hayssa Xoossa Keeththaa laallite; ta iza heedzdzu gallassara zaara keexxana» gi zaarides." 
John2:20 Isttika iza, «Hayssa Xoossa Keeththaa keexxanaas kase oyddu tammanne usuppun layth ekkides; histtiin neni heedzdzu gallassara keexxa kunththanee?» gi oychchida." 
John2:21 Gido attiin Yesusi, «Xoossa Keeth» giday ba asateththaa gishshassa." 
John2:22 Hessa gishshas Yesusi hayqqi dendiin iza kaallizayti he yo7oza yuushshi qoppidi eridanne hayssa kase maxaafan xaafettidayssa Yesusi isttas kaseti yootida qaalaa ammanida. 
John2:23 Paaziga ba7aale gallas Yesusi Yerusalaamen dishe ooththida malaatata be7idi daro asay iza ammanides. 
John2:24 Qasse Yesusi asaa ubbaa eriza gishshas oonakka ammanibeenna. 
John2:25 Izi asa wozinan dizaa ubbaa eriza gishshas oonikka izas asa gishshas yootanaas koshshibeenna. 
John3:1 Farsaaweta bagga as Ayhudata halaqatappe issi Niqodimoosa geetettiza asi dees. 
John3:2 Izi qamara Yesusaakko biidi, «Astamaaree! Xoossi izara dizaade gidikkofe attiin hayta ne ooththiza malalisiza malaatata ooththana dandayzaadey deenna; hessa gishshas neni Xoossa achchafe yida astamaare gididayssa nu eroos» gides." 
John3:3 Yesusikka izas zaaridi, «Ta nees tumu gays; asi nam7anththo yelettontta aggiko Xoossa kawoteth beyanaas dandayenna» gides." 
John3:4 Niqodimoosikka zaaridi, «Histtiin asi cimmidaappe guye waanidi nam7anththo yelettana dandayzee? Qasseka ba aayi ulon simmi gelidi yelettanee?» giidi oychchides." 
John3:5 Yesusikka izas, «Ta nees tumu gays; asi haaththafenne Xillo Ayanappe yelettontta dishe Xoossa kawoteth gelanaas dandayenna." 
John3:6 Asappe yelettiday asa; Ayanappe yelettiday Ayana. 
John3:7 Hessa gishshas, ‹Intte nam7anththo yelettanaas koshshees› ta nena gida gishshas malalettofa." 
John3:8 Carkoy ba koyida bagga carkees; neni carkos giiris siyaasa attiin izi awappe yizaakkonne awa bizaakko erakka. Ayanappe yelettidaykka hessa mala» gides. 
John3:9 Niqodimoosi, «Hayssi waani hanana dandayzee?» giidi oychchides." 
John3:10 Yesusikka izas, «Isra7eele astamaare gida uttada hessa ne erkkii?" 
John3:11 Ta nees tumu gays; nuni nu erizayssa yootoos. Nu be7idayssa markkattoos; gido attiin intte nu markkateth ekkeketa. 
John3:12 Ta inttes hayssa ha biitta yo7o yootiin ammanontta ixxiko salo miish yootikko wostti intte ammananee? 
John3:13 Saloppe duge wodhdhida asa Naappe attiin pude salo keziday haray oonikka deenna. 
John3:14 «Bazzo biittan Musey shoosh dhoqqu histti kaqqidayssaththo hessaththoka Asa Nay dhoqqasohon kaqettanaas bessees. 
John3:15 Hessika izan ammanizaadey wurikka mernaa de7o demmanaassa. 
John3:16 Xoossa Naa ammanizay wuri mernaa de7o demmanaappe attiin dhayontta mala Xoossi hayssa alameza daro siiqida gishshas ba mexi issi naaza immides. 
John3:17 Xoossi ba naaza duge alame kiittiday alame asay izan ammanidi attana malassa attiin izi alame asaa bolla pirdanaas gidenna. 
John3:18 «Iza ammanizaade bolla pirdettenna. Iza ammanonttaadey gidikko Xoossa Naa issinezan ammanontta gishshas kasekka pirdetti uttides. 
John3:19 Pirdayka hayssa mala, poo7oy ha alame yides shin asaas oosoy iita gidida gishshas asay poo7oppe keehi dhuma dosides." 
John3:20 Iita ooththizaadey wurikka poo7o dosenna. Izi ooththiza iita oosoy qoncce kezontta mala izi ba hu7es poo7oy dizaso kezenna. 
John3:21 Tumu ooththizaadey gidikko poo7oy dizaso yees. Izi poo7oy dizaso yiza gaasoykka Xoossa azazo mala izi ooththida oosoy qonccana malassa» gides. 
John3:22 Hessafe guye Yesusi bana kaallizaytara Yuhuda dere bides; heenkka asaa xammaqishe isttara guuththa wode gam7ides. 
John3:23 He wode Saalime achchan Henoone geetettizason daro Haaththi diza gishshas Yohannisi asaa xammaqishin asaykka izakko biidi xammaqettides. 
John3:24 He wode Yohannisi buro qasho keeththe gelibeenna. 
John3:25 He wode Yohannisa kaallizayta giddoninne issi issi Ayhuda asata giddon Ayhudata geesho wogaa gishshas gita palamay dendides. 
John3:26 Yohannisa kaallizayti izakko shiiqidi, «Astamaaree! Nenara Yordaanoose shaafa pinththan issife dishin ne iza gishshas markkatto addezi hekko xammaqees; asaykka izakko bees» gida." 
John3:27 Yohannisikka isttas, «Oonaska Xoossafe imettontta dishin aykkoyka daana dandayenna." 
John3:28 «Tani izappe sinththata kiitettadis attiin yaana gida Kirstoosi tana gidikke» gaada ta inttes yootoyssas intte intte hu7era ta markkatta. 
John3:29 Sarge wode ekkana mishiray dizaadey izikka mishira; mishira laggey gidikko mishiraza achchan eqqidi mishirazi gizaaz siyees; mishiraza qaala siyidi ufayettees; hessa gishshas ta ufayssi ha7i polettides. 
John3:30 Izi dhoqqu dhoqqu gaana mala tanikka ziqqi ziqqi gaana koshshees. 
John3:31 «Bollafe yizaadey ubbaafe bolla; garsa biittafe yizaadey izi biittafenne biittaaz yootees; Saloppe yizaadey izi ubbaafe bolla. 
John3:32 Izi ba be7idaazinne ba siyidaaz markkattees; gido attiin iza markkateth ekkizaadey deenna. 
John3:33 Iza markkateth ekkizaadey gidikko Xoossa tumanchcha gididayssa qonccisees. 
John3:34 Xoossi kiittidaadey Xoossa qaala yootees. Xoossika izaades ba Ayana makki immenna. 
John3:35 «Aaway ba naa dosees. Haniza yo7o ubbaa iza kushen aaththi immees. 
John3:36 Naazan ammanizaades mernaa de7oy dees. Naazan ammanonttay gidikko Xoossa hanqoy iza bolla daana attiin de7o demmenna» gides. 
John4:1 He wode Yesusi Yohannisappe bollara daro asa bana kaallizaade ooththizayssanne xammaqizayssa Farsaaweti siyida. 
John4:2 Gido attiin xammaqizayti iza kaallizaytappe attiin izi xammaqibeenna. 
John4:3 Iza gishshas haasayettizayssa Farsaaweti siyidayssa Yesusi eridi Yuhuda dere aggidi Galila dere simmi bides. 
John4:4 Izi hee bishin Samaariyara aadhdhi baanayssi izas attonttaaz gidides. 
John4:5 Hessa gishshas Sikaaro geetettizaso Samaariya katama bides. Sikaara Yaaqoobey ba naa Yooseefes immida biittaa achchan dawus. 
John4:6 Heenkka Yaaqoobe haaththa ollay dees. Yesusi oge hemetti daaburda gishshas he ollay achchan uttides. Wodeykka gallassafe usuppun saate mala. 
John4:7 He wode issi Samaariya dere maccas dizaara haaththe duuqqanaas he haaththaa ollaako yadus. Yesusikka izo, «Tana haaththe ushsha» gides." 
John4:8 Hessi hanishin Yesusa kaallizayti quma shammana katama bida. 
John4:9 Hinna Samaariya maccassaya Yesusa, «Ne Ayhuda as gida uttada waanada tana Samaariya maccas, ‹Haaththe ushsha› ga oychchay?» gadus; iza hessa giday Ayhuda asaassinne Samaariya asas gaagoteththi dontta gishshassa." 
John4:10 Yesusikka izis, «Xoossa imotaynne nena, ‹Tana haaththe ushsha› gizaadey izi oonakkonne ne erizaakko ne iza woossanaas bessees. Izikka nees de7o haaththe immanakkoshin» gides." 
John4:11 Izakka izas, «Godoo! Nees haaththe duuqqiza miishshi deenna; haaththaa ollayka daro ciimma; histtiin ne de7o haath awappe demmanee?" 
John4:12 Ne hayssa haaththa ollaza nuus immida nu aawaa Yaaqoobeppe aadhdhay? Izinne iza nayti iza mehetikka hayssa ha ollaafe haath uyida» gadus. 
John4:13 Yesusi izis, «Hayssa ha haaththaafe uyizay wuri nam7anththo saamettidi zaari hara uyanashin." 
John4:14 Ta immiza haaththe uyizaadey gidikko mernaas mulekka saamettenna; gaasoykka ta immiza haath uyizaades mernaa de7os pulttiza pultto haaththe gidana» gides. 
John4:15 Maccassayakka, «Godoo! Hayssafe guye tana haaththi saamontta malanne qasseka ta haaththe duuqqana haa yontta mala hessa ne giza haaththaa mala haaththe taas immarkkii?» gadus." 
John4:16 Yesusikka izo, «Baada ne azinaa xeyga ekkada ya» gides." 
John4:17 Maccassayakka zaarada, «Taas azinay deenna» gadus; iza hizgiin Yesusi, « ‹Ne taas azinay deenna› guussay tumukko." 
John4:18 Gaasoykka kase nees ichchashu azinati deettes; qasse ha7i nenara dizayssi ne azina gidenna; hessa gishshas ne tumu gadasa» gides. 
John4:19 Maccassaya izas, «Godoo! Neni nabe gididayssa ta ha7i eradis." 
John4:20 Kase nu Aawati hayssa zumaa bolla goynnida; intte qasse, ‹Asay goynnanaas bessizasoy Yerusalaamenkko!› geeta» gadus." 
John4:21 Yesusikka izis, «Hanne maccassayee, Xoossaa aawaas hayssa zumaa bolla woykko Yerusalaamen intte goynnontta wodey yaanayssa ammana." 
John4:22 Intte intte erontta Xoossas goynneeta; nu gidikko asas atoteththi Ayhudappe gidida gishshas nuni nu eriza Xoossas goynnoos. 
John4:23 Gido attiin tumu goynnizayti Xoossaa Aawaas Ayananinne tuman goynniza wodey buro yaana; haray attoshin ha7ikka yides. Xoossay aawaykka koyzay hessa mala goynnizayta. 
John4:24 Xoossi ba hu7es Ayana; iza goynnizayti ayananinne tuman goynnanaas bessees» gides. 
John4:25 Maccassayakka, «Kirstoosi yaanayssa ta erays; izi yiidi hanizaaz ubbaa nuus yootana» gadus." 
John4:26 Yesusikka izis, «Ha7i nenara haasayzay ta iza» gides." 
John4:27 Hessi hanishin iza kaallizayti ba bidasoppe simmida. Yesusi Maccassara haasayzayssa malalettida; gido attiin, «Hanne ay koyay? Woykko hannira aazas haasayay?» giidi oonikka oychchibeenna." 
John4:28 Hessafe guye maccassaya otoza heen aggaagada gede katama baada asaas," 
John4:29 «Ta ooththidaaz wursi taas yootidaade haa yiidi be7ite; oonee erizay Xoossi tiyda Kirstoosi izakkonnee!» gadus. 
John4:30 Asaykka katamaappe kezidi Yesusaakko bides. 
John4:31 He wode Yesusa kaallizayti Yesusa, «Astamaaree! Quma ma» giidi woossida." 
John4:32 Izi qasse, «Intte eronttay ta miza qumay taas dees» gides." 
John4:33 Hessa gishshas iza kaallizayti, «Aykko miza kath asi izas ehideeshaa?» giidi ba giddon haasayettida" 
John4:34 Yesusikka isttas zaaridi, «Ta qumay tana kiittida ta Aawaa shene oosonne iza ooso polo." 
John4:35 Intte qasse, ‹Kaththa maxay gakkanaas buro oyddu aginay attides› geeta gidekketii? Qasse tani gidikko inttena, ‹Dhoqqu giidi kaththay maxa gakkidayssa xeellite› gays." 
John4:36 Maxizaadey ba damoza ekkana; mernaas gidiza ayfe shiishshana; hessa gishshas zerizaadeynne maxizaadey issife ufayettana. 
John4:37 Hessa gishshas issaadey zerana; hara asi maxana geetettiza leemisoy tuma. 
John4:38 Ta inttena intte daaburonttayssa maxana mala yeddadis; harati ooson daaburda; gido attiin intte istta daabursan go7ettideta» gides. 
John4:39 Maccassaya, «Ta ooththidaaz ubbaa taas izi yootides» gaada asaas markkattida mala katamaappe daro Samaariya asay izan ammanides." 
John4:40 Hessa gishshas Samaariya asay Yesusaakko yiidi izi isttakon gam7ana mala woossides; izikka nam7u gallas heen gam7ides. 
John4:41 Iza qaalaa siyidi daro asay iza ammanides. 
John4:42 Maccassayokka, «Ha7i nu iza ammanizay ne yootida qaalaa gishshas xalla gidontta nunikka nu baggara izappe siyida gishshassinne tumappe izi dere ashshizaade gididayssa erida gishshassa» gida." 
John4:43 Yesusi Samaariyan nam7u gallas gam7idaappe guye Galila bides. 
John4:44 Izi ba baggara, «Nabey ba deren bonchchettenna» gi yootides." 
John4:45 Gido attiin izi Galila biin Galila asay iza lo7eththi mokki ekkides; gaasoykka Paaziga ba7aale bonchchana Yerusalaame bidason heen dishin izi ooththidayssa wursi be7ida gishshassa. 
John4:46 Hessafe guye Yesusi haaththe woyne cajje ooththida Galila dere giddon diza Qaana geetettiza katamaa nam7anththo bides. He wode Qifirnahoomen izas nay sakettida issi kawo shuumey dees. 
John4:47 Izikka Yesusi Yuhuda dereppe gede Galila yidayssa siyidi Yesusaakko bides. Yesusi duge Qifirnahoome wodhdhana malanne daro sakettidi hayqqana giza naaza paththana mala Yesusa woossides. 
John4:48 Yesusikka izas, «Intte gita malaatatanne malalisizaaz be7ontta aykkoka ammanekketa» gides." 
John4:49 Shuumezikka zaaridi, «Godoo! Ta naazi hayqqontta elela wodhdharkkii!» gides." 
John4:50 Yesusikka iza, «Neni neso ba! Naazi paxides» gides; addezikka Yesusi izas yootida qaalaa ammanidi soo simmi bides." 
John4:51 Izi soo bishin iza ashkarati izara ogen gaaggidi, «Ne naazi paxides» giidi izas yootida." 
John4:52 Shuumezikka naazi ay saaten paxidaakko istta zaari oychchides. Isttika izas, «Qamma gallassafe laappun saaten iza michchizayssi aggides» gida." 
John4:53 Naaza aawaykka Yesusi, «Ne naazi paxides» giday he istti izas yootiza wode gididayssa erides. Hessa gishshas he gallassafe oykkidi izinne izaso asay wuri Yesusa ammanida." 
John4:54 Hayssi malatay Yesusi Yuhudappe Galila yiidi ooththida nam7anththo malata. 
John5:1 Hessafe kaallidi Ayhudata ba7aaley diza gishshas Yesusi Yerusalaame bides. 
John5:2 Yerusalaamen dorsi geliza penge achchan Ibraaweta qaalara, «Betesayda» geetettiza issi pulttofe shiiqidi eellida haaththi dees; izappe bollara kamay diza ichchashu ogeti deettes." 
John5:3 Daro harganchchati, ayfe qooqeti, toho wobbetinne toho silati oge bolla ichchidi haaththi qaaxettana gakkanaas naageettes." 
John5:4 Issi issi wode Godaa kiitanchchay haaththaan wodhdhidi haaththa qaaththees; haaththaa qaaththafe kaallidi koyrottidi haaththaan geliza harganchchay bana sakkiza ay hargefekka paxees. 
John5:5 Heen heedzdzu tammanne osppun layth kumeth sakettida issaadey dees. 
John5:6 Yesusi addezi heen ichchidayssa be7idinne izi daro layth sakettidayssa eridi, «Ne paxana koyay?» gides." 
John5:7 Harganchchazikka zaaridi, «Godoo! Haaththay qaaxettiza wode tana haaththaan gelththiza asi deenna; ta buro baana gishin haray taappe kaseti haaththaan gelees» gides." 
John5:8 Yesusikka iza, «Denda! Ne ichchida algaa tookkada ba!» gides." 
John5:9 Addezikka heerakka paxides; ba algaa tookki ekkidi bides. Hessi haniday Ayhudata Sambata gallassa. 
John5:10 Hessa gishshas Ayhudata halaqati paxida addeza, «Hach Sambatara ne algaa tookkana mala Muse wogay azazenna» gida." 
John5:11 Izikka isttas, « ‹Ne ichchida algaa tookkada ba› gi yootides» gides." 
John5:12 Isttika, «Nena algaa tookkada ba giday oonee?» gi oychchida." 
John5:13 Derey darida gishshassinne Yesusi heeppe haakki bida gishshas iza ooni paththidaakko addezi eribeenna. 
John5:14 Hessafe guye Yesusi addeza Xoossa Keeththan demmidi, «Hekko ha7i ne paxadasa; kaseyssafe aadhdhiza iita miishshi ne bolla gakkontta mala nagara nam7anththo ooththofa» gides." 
John5:15 Addezikka biidinne iza paththiday Yesusa gididayssa Ayhudata halaqatas yootides. 
John5:16 Addeza Sambata gallas paththida gishshas Ayhudata daannati Yesusa oykkana yedeththida. 
John5:17 Yesusikka isttas, «Ta Aaway ubba wode ooththees; tanikka ooththana» gides;" 
John5:18 Hessa gaason Ayhudata daannati Yesusa wodhana mala kaseppe aaththi denththeththida. Qasse izi Sambata moorida gishshas xalla gidontta, «Xoossi ta Aawa» gida gishshassinne bana Xoossara ginisida gishshassa." 
John5:19 Yesusi isttas, «Ta inttes tumu gays; Aaway ooththishin be7idayssa oosoppe attiin naazi ba shenen aykkoka ooththenna. Aaway ooththizayssa iza nay hessaththoka ooththees." 
John5:20 Gaasoykka Aaway naaza dosees. Ba ooththizayssaka wursi iza bessees; intte malalettana mala hayssafekka aadhdhiza ooso buro bessana. 
John5:21 Aaway hayqqidayta denththizayssaththonne de7o immizayssaththo naazikka hessaththo ba koyidaades de7o immana. 
John5:22 Aaway oona bollaka pirdenna; gido attiin pirda maata ubbaa ba naazas immides. 
John5:23 Izi hessaththo ooththiday asay wuri Aawa bonchchana malanne qasseka naazakka bonchchana malassa. Naaza bonchchonttay naaza kiittida Aawaakka bonchchenna. 
John5:24 «Ta inttes tuma gays; ta qaalaa siyizaadessinne tana kiittidaaden ammanizaades mernaa de7oy dees. Izaadey hayqoppe gede de7on pinnides attiin iza bolla pirdettenna. 
John5:25 Ta inttes tuma gays; kase hayqqida asati Xoossa naa qaala siyiza wodey yaana; he wodeyakka hanno; siyizayti wuri de7on daana. 
John5:26 Gaasoykka Aaway ba baggara de7oy diza mala naazikka ba baggara de7oy daana mala ooththides. 
John5:27 Izi asa naa gidida gishshas pirdana mala godateth izas immides. 
John5:28 Hayssan aykkoka malalettofte. Gaasoykka kase hayqqidi duufon dizayti wuri iza qaala giiris siyiza wodey yaana. 
John5:29 Lo7o ooththidayti hayqoppe dendidi paxana. Gido attiin iita ooththidayti hayqoppe dendidi pirdettana. 
John5:30 «Tani ta shenen aykkoka ooththanaas dandaykke; gido attiin ta aawappe ta siyida mala pirdays. Tana kiittidayssa shene ooththays attiin ta shenen ta ooththontta gishshas ta pirdan balay baa. 
John5:31 Tani ta gishshas tarkka markkattiko ta markkay tumu gidenna. 
John5:32 Gido attiin ta gishshas markkattizaadey haray dees; izikka ta gishshas markkattizaade markkateththay tumu gididayssa ta erays. 
John5:33 Intte Yohannisakko ase kiittideta shin izikka tumu markkattides. 
John5:34 Ta hayssa gizay intte attana mala attiin taas hara markkateth koshshida gishshas gidenna. 
John5:35 Yohannisi eexxidi poo7isiza poo7o mala. Intteka guuththa wode iza poo7on ufayettana koyideta. 
John5:36 Taas gidikko Yohannisa markkateththafe aadhdhiza markkay dees. Ta markkayka ta Aaway taas immida ooso. Hessika ta ooththiza oosoy ta Aaway tana kiittidayssa taas markkattees. 
John5:37 Tana kiittida ta Aawaykka ba hu7era taas markkattides. Intte gidikko iza qaala giiris mulekka siyibeekketa; izas medhaakka mulera beyibeekketa. 
John5:38 Izi kiittidaaden intte ammanontta gishshas iza qaalay intte achchan deenna. 
John5:39 Inttes Geeshsha Maxaafatappe mernaa de7o demmanaas misatiin maxaafata pilggeeta; maxaafatikka ta gishshas markkatteettes. 
John5:40 Gido attiin intte de7o demmanaas taakko ha yaana koyekketa. 
John5:41 «Tani asappe bonchcho koykke. 
John5:42 Ta inttena erays; Xoossa siiqoy inttenan bayndayssaka erays. 
John5:43 Tani ta Aawa sunththan yadis shin intte tana mokki ekkibeekketa. Hara asi qasse ba sunththan yiikko intte iza mokki ekkeeta. 
John5:44 Intte intte giddon issoy issaafe bonchcho koyzaytoo! Issi Xoossafe beettiza bonchcho koyonttayto intte waanidi tana ammanana dandayeetii? 
John5:45 Ta Aawa sinththan inttena mootanay inttes tana misatoppo; inttena mootanay intte iza hidota ooththiza Muse. 
John5:46 Musey ta gishshas xaafidayssa ammanidaakko intte tana ammanana. 
John5:47 Izi xaafidayssa intte ammanontta aggiko qasse ta qaala intte waani ammananee?» gides. 
John6:1 Hessafe guye Yesusi Xibiraadoose geetettizaso Galila abbafe he pinth pinnides. 
John6:2 Yesusi harganchchata paththida malaata be7ida gishshas daro asay iza kaallides. 
John6:3 Yesusi bana kaallizaytara pude zuma bolla kezi uttides. 
John6:4 He wode Ayhudata Paaziga ba7aaley mati uttides. 
John6:5 He wode daro derey izakko yizayssa Yesusi dhoqqu gi xeellidi Piliphoosa, «Hayssa deraas gidana quma awappe shammana dandayzonii?» gides." 
John6:6 Yesusi Piliphoosa hessaththo oychchiday iza paaccanaas giidippe attiin izi ba ooththanayssa erees. 
John6:7 Piliphoosikka izas, «Issaades issaades issi bars gidiza kath shammizaakkoka nam7u xeetu dinaaren shammida kaththika hayssas gidenna» gides." 
John6:8 Yesusa kaallizaytappe issoy Simoona Phexroosa isha Indiraasi," 
John6:9 «Ichchashu bangga ukeththinne nam7u mole oykkida issi nay hayssan dees. Gido attiin hanna hayssa ha derezas ay gidanee?» gides. 
John6:10 Yesusikka zaaridi, «Asaa ubbaa utisite» gides; heen daro maatay diza gishshas asay uttides; asaa qoodaykka ichchashu shii gidizaaza." 
John6:11 Hessafe guye Yesusi ukeththaa ekkidi galata woosa woossidi uttida asaas gishides. Molezakka hessaththoka gishechchides. Asay wurikka baas gidizaaz demmides. 
John6:12 Asay wurikka kalli miin Yesusi bana kaallizayta, «Maaddan attida kaththaa issinokka ashshontta shiishshite» gides." 
John6:13 Isttika asay mishin ichchashu ukeththaafe attida tammanne nam7u leemate kumeth shiishshida. 
John6:14 Asatikka Yesusi ooththida malaataa be7idi, «Hayssaadey tumappe ha alame yaana nabezakko!» gida." 
John6:15 Asay qasse wolqqara Yesusa kawoththana qoppidayssa eridi Yesusi qasseka isttafe haakki biidi zuma bolla kezides. 
John6:16 Gadey qammishin Yesusa kaallizayti duge abbaako wodhdhida. 
John6:17 Wogolon gelidi Qifirnahoome baana kezida. Istti kezishin gadey dhumides. Yesusi hessa gakkanaaska isttako yibeenna. 
John6:18 Wolqqama carkoy carkiza gishshas abbay keehi qaaxxides. 
John6:19 Iza kaallizayti bagga saate oge mala wogoloza laaggidaappe guye Yesusi abbaa bollara tohora hemetti wogolozaakko matishin demmidi babbida. 
John6:20 Izikka isttas, «Tanakko! Babbofte!» gides." 
John6:21 Isttika iza ufayssara gede wogoloza giddo ekkana koyida. Heerakka wogolozikka istti baanaaso gakkides. 
John6:22 Abbaafe he pinththan attida asay wonteththa gallas abbaa bolla issi wogoloy xalla dizaaro be7ides. Yesusa kaallizayti kase barkka bidayssanne Yesusi isttara wogolon gelonttayssa erida. 
John6:23 Gido attiin hankko wogoloti Xibiraadooseppe dendidi Yesusi galata woosa woossiin asay kath midaso yida. 
John6:24 Asatikka Yesusi woykko iza kaallizayti heen bayndayssa be7idi he wogolotan gelidi Yesusa kosh Qifirnahoome bida. 
John6:25 Abbaafe he pinththan iza demmidi, «Astamaaree! Ne ayde hayssa yadii?» gida." 
John6:26 Yesusikka isttas, «Ta inttes tuma gays; intte tana koyzay kath mi kaallida gishshas attiin malata be7ida gishshas gidenna." 
John6:27 Dhayana kaththas ooththofte. Gido attiin hessafe aaththidi Xoossay aaway ammanththiza maatame iza bolla shocida gishshas Asa Nay inttes immiza mernaa de7os gidiza kaththas ooththite» gides. 
John6:28 Isttika izas, «Histtiin Xoossa ooso ooththanaas nu ay ooththinoo?» gida." 
John6:29 Yesusikka, «Xoossa oosoy Xoossi kiittida iza naazan ammano» giidi isttas zaarides." 
John6:30 Isttika izas, «Nu be7idi nena ammanana mala ne nuna ay malaata bessanee? Qasseka ay ooththanee?" 
John6:31 ‹Istti maana mala isttas quma saloppe immides› geetetti xaafettida mala kase nu aawati bazzo biittan manna geetettiza kath mida» gida. 
John6:32 Yesusi isttas, «Ta inttes tumu gays; saloppe wodhdhida quma inttes immiday Muse gidenna. Tumu quma saloppe inttes immizay ta Aawaa." 
John6:33 Gaasoykka Xoossa qumay saloppe wodhdhidi alames de7o immizayssa» gides. 
John6:34 Hessa gishshas asay, «Godoo, hessa mala quma nuus ubba wode immarkkii!» gides." 
John6:35 Yesusikka isttas, «De7o qumay tana; taakko yiza asi mulekka gafettenna; tana ammanizaadey aydekka saamettenna." 
John6:36 Kase ta inttes gida mala intte tana beyideta shin ammanibeekketa. 
John6:37 Ta Aaway taas immizay wurikka taakko yaana; taakko yizaade ta kare gooddike. 
John6:38 Gaasoykka tani saloppe wodhdhiday tana kiittidayssa shene ooththanaas attiin ta shene ooththanaas gidenna. 
John6:39 Tana kiittidayssa sheney taas immidaytappe issaadeka dhayssontta wurseththa gallas ta denththana. 
John6:40 Ee ta sheney naaza be7idi iza ammanizaadey wuri mernaa de7o demmanaassa. Tanikka wurseththa gallas iza hayqoppe denththana» gides. 
John6:41 Hessa gishshas Yesusi, «Saloppe wodhdhida qumay tana» gida gishshas Ayhudati iza bolla zuuzumettida." 
John6:42 «Hayssi Yooseefe naa Yesusa gidennee? Iza aawaanne iza aayo nu erokkonii? Histtiin ha7i izi, ‹Saloppe wodhdhadis› waani gizee?» gida." 
John6:43 Yesusikka isttas, «Intte intte giddon zuuzumeeta." 
John6:44 Tana kiittida ta Aaway xeygidaadefe attiin taakko yaana dandayzaadey oonikka deenna. Barkka taakko yaana dandayzay oonikka deenna; taakko yizaadeka wurseththa gallas ta iza hayqoppe denththana. 
John6:45 Nabeta maxaafatan asay wuri Xoossafe tamaardaade gidana geetetti xaafettides. Hessa gishshas Aawappe siyidi tamaarda asi wuri taakko yaana. 
John6:46 Hessa guussi Aawaa be7ida asi dees guus gidenna; Aawaa be7iday Xoossa achchafe yidayssa xalla. 
John6:47 Ta inttes tuma gays; tanan ammanida asas mernaa de7oy dees. 
John6:48 Tani de7o quma. 
John6:49 Kase intte aawati bazzo biittan manna mida; gido attiin wurikka hayqqida. 
John6:50 Saloppe wodhdhida qumay hayssa; hayssa mizaadey mulekka hayqqenna. 
John6:51 Saloppe wodhdhida de7o qumay tana; hayssa ha qumaappe mizaadey wurikka mernaas daana. Alames de7o gidana mala ta immiza qumay ta ashoza» gides. 
John6:52 He wode Ayhudati, «Hayssi addezi nu iza asho maana mala izi nuus wostti immanee?» giidi ba giddon palamettida." 
John6:53 Hessa gishshas Yesusi istta, «Ta inttes tumu gays; Asa Naa asho intte montta aggiko, iza suuththika uyontta aggiko inttes de7oy deenna." 
John6:54 Ta asho mizaadessinne ta suuth uyizaades ubbaas mernaa de7oy dees; tanikka izaade wurseththa gallas hayqoppe denththana. 
John6:55 Gaasoykka ta ashoy tumu quma; ta suuththika tumu ushsha. 
John6:56 Ta asho mizaynne ta suuth uyizay wuri tanan daana; tanikka izaaden daana. 
John6:57 De7o Aaway tana kiittida malanne tanikka izan de7on diza mala hessaththoka ta asho mizaadey wuri tanan de7on daana. 
John6:58 Hessa gishshas saloppe wodhdhida qumay hayssa; izikka kase intte aawati midayssa mala gidenna. Gaasoykka he qumaa midayti hayqqida; ha qumaa mizayti gidikko mernaas daana» gides. 
John6:59 Yesusi hayssa Qifirnahoomen Ayhudata Woosa Keeththan tamaarsiza wode yootides. 
John6:60 Iza kaallizaytappe darizayti hessa siyidi, «Hayssi yo7ozi deexo; hayssa ooni ekkana dandayzee?» gida." 
John6:61 Yesusikka iza kaallizayti hessa yo7oza gishshas zuuzumettidayssa ba wozinan eridi, «Hayssi inttena deexxizee?" 
John6:62 Asa Nay Kirstoosi ba dizaso simmi kezishin beykko intte ay gaanee? 
John6:63 Asas de7o immizay Xoossa Ayanakko! Asa wolqqay qasse aykkoka go7enna; ta inttes yootida qaalay de7o immiza ayana. 
John6:64 Gido attiin intte giddon issi issi ammanontta asati deettes» gides. Yesusi isttas hessa giday koyroppe doommidi istta giddon ammanonttayti oonanttako qasse iza aaththi immanaadeyka oonakko eriza gishshassa. 
John6:65 Kaaleththidikka Yesusi, «Aawaa sheney baynda taakko haa yaana dandayzaadey deenna gaada ta inttes yootiday hessassa» gides." 
John6:66 Hessafe dendidayssan iza kaallizaytappe daroti guye simmida. He gallassafe doommidi Yesusa kaalo aggida. 
John6:67 Hessa gishshas Yesusi bana kaalliza tammanne nam7ata, «Intteka baana koyeetii?» gides." 
John6:68 He wode Simoona geetettiza Phexroosi, «Godoo, nees mernaa de7o qaalay dishin nu oonakko baanee?" 
John6:69 Ne geeshsha Xoossa naa gididayssa eridi nuni ammanidos» gides. 
John6:70 Yesusikka isttas, «Ta inttena tammanne nam7ata doorabeekkinaa? Histtiin inttefe issoy Xala7e» gides." 
John6:71 Izi hessa giday Simoona naa Asqoronto Yuhuda gishshassa. Ays giikko Yuhuday tammanne nam7atappe issaa gidikkoka Yesusa aaththi immanay iza gidida gishshassa.
