John7:1 Hessafe guye Yesusi Galila giddon yuuyettides; gido attiin Yuhudan yuuyanaas koyibeenna. Gaasoykka Ayhudati iza wodhdhana koyza gishshassa. 
John7:2 He wode Ayhudata daase ba7aaley mati uttides. 
John7:3 Hessa gishshas Yesusa ishati izakko shiiqidi, «Nena kaallizayti ne ooththiza oosoza beyana mala ne hayssafe dendada Yuhuda dere ba." 
John7:4 Gaasoykka qonccen erettana koyzaadey ba ooso geeman ooththenna. Nekka haytantta wursa ooththashe nena alamen qonccisana koshshees» gida. 
John7:5 Istti hessa gida gaasoykka iza ishatakka gidiin izan ammanonttayta gidida gishshassa. 
John7:6 Yesusikka isttas, «Ta wodey buro gakkibeenna; intte wodey gidikko ubba wode inttes giigakko." 
John7:7 Derey inttena ixxana dandayenna; tana gidikko ixxees; gaasoykka tani alame oosoy iita gididayssa izas markkattiza gishshassa. 
John7:8 Ha7i intte ba7aalezaso biite; taas wodey gakkontta gishshas hayssa ha ba7aalezaso ta biikke» gides. 
John7:9 Hessa giidi Yesusi Galilan attides. 
John7:10 Gido attiin iza ishati ba7aalezaso bidaappe guye Yesusi qonccera gidontta qotara ba7aalezaso bides. 
John7:11 Ayhudati, «Izi awan dizee?» gishe ba7aalezason koyida." 
John7:12 Dereykka iza gishshas garsara saasuki haasayettides. Issi issi asati, «Izi lo7o asa» gishin baggay qasse, «Lo7o gidenna; izi dere baleththees» gida." 
John7:13 Gido attiin Ayhudata daannatas babbiza gishshas oonikka iza gishshas qonccen haasaybeenna. 
John7:14 Ba7aalezi wurana bagga gakkishin Yesusi Xoossa Keeththe biidi tamaarso oykkides. 
John7:15 Ayhudati, «Hayssi addezi tamaarontta dishe hayssa wursi wostti eridee?» giidi malalettida." 
John7:16 Hessa gishshas Yesusi, «Ta tamaarsiza timirtey tana kiittida ta Aawappe taas imettides attiin taappe gidenna." 
John7:17 Tana kiittidayssa shene ooththana koyzaadey diikko hayssi ha timirtey Xoossafe beettidayssa woykko ta taappe haasaydayssa gidikkoka erana. 
John7:18 Baappe haasayzaadey ba bonchcho koyees. Kiittidaade bonchcho koyzaadey gidikko izi tumanchcha; wordoy iza bolla deenna. 
John7:19 Musey inttes woga immides gidennee? Gidikkoka intte giddon woga naagi polidaadey oonikka deenna. Intte aazas tana wodhana koyeetii?» gides. 
John7:20 Dereykka iza, «Ne bolla daydanththi dees! Nena wodhana koyzay oonee?» gides." 
John7:21 Yesusikka isttas, «Ta issi ooso ooththadis; intte wurikka hanno ha oosoyn malaletteeta." 
John7:22 Musey inttes qaxxara woga immides; he wogaykka imettiday kase aawatappe beettides attiin Museppe gidenna. Histtiin hekko intteka Sambata gallassika as qaxxareeta. 
John7:23 Histtiko Muse wogay shaarettontta mala asi Sambata gallas qaxxarettizaaz gidikko histtiin ta Sambata gallas asaas kumeththa asateth paththiin aazas ta bolla hanqetteetii? 
John7:24 Suure pirda pirdite attiin asa ayfeso xeellidi maado pirda pirdofte» gi zaarides. 
John7:25 Yerusalaame asaappe issi issi asati, «Istti wodhana koyza addezi hayssa gidennee?" 
John7:26 Hekko izi qonccen haasayees shin istti iza aykkoka gibeettenna. Hayssi Xoossi kiittidaade gididayssa daannati tumu erizoshaa? 
John7:27 Histtiin hayssi addezi awa asakko nu eroos. Xoossi kiittidaadey yishin qasse izi awappeko erizaadey oonikka deenna» gida. 
John7:28 Hessa gishshas Yesusi Xoossa Keeththan tamaarsishe ba qaala dhoqqu histtidi, «Intte tana tumu ereeta; ta awappe yidaakko intte ereeta. Qasse tani ta shenen yabeekke; tana kiittidayssi izi tumanchcha; gido attiin intte qasse iza erekketa." 
John7:29 Ta gidikko iza achchafe yida gishshassinne izi tana kiittida gishshas ta iza erays» gides. 
John7:30 He wode iza oykkanaas koyida; gido attiin buro wodey gakkibeenna gishshas oonikka iza oykkibeenna. 
John7:31 Gidikkoka derezappe daroy izan ammanides; asay, «Xoossi kiittidaadey yiza wode hayssi addezi ooththoo malaatappe bollara hara ooththanee?» gides." 
John7:32 Asay Yesusa gishshas garsara saasuketti haasayettishin Farsaaweti siyida. Hessa gishshas qeeseta halaqatinne Farsaaweti Yesusa oykkanaas Xoossa Keeththa penge naagizayta yeddida. 
John7:33 He wode Yesusi, «Ta inttenara guuththa wode daashshana; hessafe guye tana kiittidayssako ta simma baana." 
John7:34 Intte tana koyana shin demmeketa; intte ta dizaso yaanaas dandayekketa» gides. 
John7:35 Hessa gishshas Ayhudata daannati ba giddon issoy issaara, «Hayssi addezi nu demmontta mala awa baaneesha? Oonee erizay Giriketa giddon laaletti diza Ayhudatakko biidi Giriketa tamaarsaneeshaa?" 
John7:36 Izi, ‹Intte tana koyana shin demmeketa; ta dizaso intte yaanaas dandayekketa› gishin hessi ay guussee?» gida." 
John7:37 Gita ba7aaleza wurseththa gallas Yesusi dendi eqqidi ba qaala dhoqqu histtidi, «Haath saamettidaadey diikko haa taakko yiidi uyo." 
John7:38 Geeshsha Maxaafay gida mala tana ammanizaadefe de7o haaththa pulttoy pulttana» gides. 
John7:39 Izi hessa giday izan ammanizayti buroppe ekkana Xillo Ayana gishshassa; gaasoykka Yesusi bonchchettiza wodey buro gakkontta gishshas Xillo Ayanay imettibeenna. 
John7:40 Hessa gishshas derezappe issi issi asati he qaalaa siyidi, «Yaana giza nabey tumappe hayssa» gida." 
John7:41 Harati, «Hayssi Xoossi kiittidaade» gida; baggayti qasse, «Xoossi kiittidaadey Galilappe waani yaanee?" 
John7:42 Xoossi kiittidaadey Dawite zereththafe yelettanayssanne Dawite katama Beeteliheemeppe yaanayssi kase Geeshsha Maxaafan xaafettibeennee?» gida. 
John7:43 Hessa gishshas iza gaason derey ba giddon shaaketti wodhdhides. 
John7:44 Isttafe issi issi asati iza oykkana koyida; gido attiin oonikka iza oykkibeenna. 
John7:45 Hessafe guye Xoossa Keeththe naagizayti qeeseta halaqataakkonne Farsaawetakko simmi bida. Isttika, «Aazas iza ekkontta yidetii?» gida." 
John7:46 Wottadaratikka zaaridi, «Ha addezi haasayzayssa mala ay asikka haasayi erenna» gida." 
John7:47 Farsaaweti istta, «Intteka balettidetii?" 
John7:48 Daannatappe woykko Farsaawetappe iza ammanidayti dizooshaa? 
John7:49 Hayssi Muse wogaa erontta derey tumappe qanggettidayssa» gida. 
John7:50 Hayssafe kase Yesusaakko bida Farsaawetappe issaa gidida Niqodimoosi isttas," 
John7:51 «Nu wogan issi mootettizaadey ba mootos zaaro immiin siyonttanne izi ay ooththidaakko erettontta dishin pirday pirdetti erizee?» gides. 
John7:52 Isttika, «Nekka Galila asee? Galilappe nabey dendonttayssa pilggada gakka era» gida." 
John7:53 Hessafe guye issoy issoy baso bides. 
John8:1 Hessafe guye Yesusi Dabrazayte bides. 
John8:2 Wonteththa gallas maalado wonttara Xoossa Keeththe simmi yides. Dereykka wuri izakko yiin izi uttidi istta tamaarso oykkides. 
John8:3 Muse wogaa tamaarsizaytinne Farsaaweti issi laymatashe oykettida maccas dizaaro ekki yiidi dere sinththan essida. 
John8:4 Yesusakka, «Astamaaree! Hekko hanna maccassaya laymatashe oykettadus." 
John8:5 Hanni mala maccassi shuchchan cadetta hayqqana mala Musey nu wogaan nuna azazides; nenich hanni gishshas ay gay?» gida. 
John8:6 Istti iza hessa giday iza bolla mootos gidiza gaaso demmanaassinne iza paaccana koyida gishshassa. Gido attiin Yesusi hokkidi biitta bolla ba biradhdhera xaafo oykkides. 
John8:7 Istti iza zaari zaari oychchiin dhoqqu giidi, «Intte giddofe nagaray baynda asi koyro shuch izi bolla olo» gides." 
John8:8 Hessafe qasseka hokkidi biitta bolla xaafides. 
John8:9 Isttika hessa siyidi cimatappe doommidi wurikka issoy issoy bida; hessa gishshas Yesusi heen eqqida maccassayra xalla attides. «Nena mootizayti awan dizoo? Ne bolla pirdiday oonikka deennee?» gides. 
John8:10  
John8:11 Izakka, «Godoo oonikka baa» gadus. Yesusikka, «Tanikka ne bolla pirdike; ba! Nam7anththo nagara ooththofa» gides." 
John8:12 Qasse Yesusi, «Tani alames poo7o. Tana kaallizaadey wuri de7o poo7o demmana. Dhuman simerettenna» giidi isttas yootides." 
John8:13 Farsaaweti, «Neni ne gishshas markkattaasa; Ne markkay tumu gidenna» gida." 
John8:14 Yesusikka isttas, «Tani ta gishshas ay markkattikokka ta awappe yidaakko qasse tani awa baanaakko ta eriza gishshas ta markkateththi tuma. Intte gidikko ta awappe yidaakkonne qasse awa baanaakko erekketa." 
John8:15 Intte asho qofa mala pirdeeta; tani gidikko oona bollaka pirdike. 
John8:16 Ta pirdikokka ta pirday tumu pirda. Gaasoykka tani tarkka pirdike; tana kiittida ta Aawaykka tanara dees. 
John8:17 Nam7u asata markkay tumu gididayssi intte wogaan xaafettides. 
John8:18 Hessa gishshas tani ta gishshas markkattays; tana kiittida ta Aawaykka taas markkattees» gi zaarides. 
John8:19 Isttika, «Ne Aaway awan dizee?» giidi iza oychchida. Yesusikka isttas, «Tana gidiin ta aawaakka gidiin intte erekketa; intte tana erizaakko ta Aawaakka eranakkoshin» giidi isttas zaarides." 
John8:20 Yesusi hessa isttas yootiday Xoossa Keeththa gibben miishshe woththiza saaxine achchan tamaarsishe yootides; gido attiin izas oykettiza wodey gakkontta gishshas oonikka iza oykkibeenna. 
John8:21 Yesusi qasseka, «Ta baanashin intte tana koyananne intte intte nagaran hayqqana attiin ta bizaso baana dandayekketa» gides." 
John8:22 Ayhudatikka ba giddon issoy issaara izi, « ‹Ta bizaso intte baana dandayekketa› gizay barkka bana wodhanaasseeshaa?» geetettida." 
John8:23 Izi qasse istta, «Intte garsa asa; tani bolla asa; intte hayssa alame asa; tani ha alameppe gidikke." 
John8:24 Intte ta oonakko eridi ammanontta aggiko intte intte nagaran hayqqana gishshas ta intte intte nagaran hayqqana giday hessa gishshassa» gides. 
John8:25 Isttika iza, «Ne oonee?» gida. Yesusikka isttas, «Ha7i gakkanaas ta inttes iza gishshas yootizaadey tana." 
John8:26 Ta intte bolla haasayanayssinne pirdiza yo7oy daroy dees. Gido attiin tana kiittidaadey ammanettidaade; tanikka izappe siyidayssa ha alamezas yootays» gides. 
John8:27 Izi isttas Aawaa gishshas yootizayssa akeekibeettenna. 
John8:28 Hessa gishshas Yesusi, «Intte Asa Naa dhoqqu histtidi kaqqida wode tani iza gididayssa intte erana; aaway tana tamaarsidayssa yootadis attiin tani ta shene mala aykkoka ooththonttayssa intte akeekana." 
John8:29 Tana kiittidayssi izi tanara dees. Ay wodekka ta ufayssizaaz ooththiza gishshas izi tana xalala yeggi aggibeenna» gides. 
John8:30 Izi hessa yootida mala daro asay izan ammanides. 
John8:31 Yesusi bana ammanida Ayhudata, «Intte tumu ta qaalan diikko intte tumappe tana kaallizayta gidana." 
John8:32 Tumay aazakko intte erananne tumaykka inttena wozzana» gides. 
John8:33 Isttika izas zaaridi, «Nuni Abrahaame naytakko! Nu oonaska aylleti erokko; histtiin ne nuna waanada intte wozzettana gay?» gida." 
John8:34 Yesusikka isttas, «Ta inttes tumu gays; nagara ooththizaadey wuri nagaras aylle;" 
John8:35 Ay wodekka aylley soon luxi de7enna. Yeloy gidikko aydekka soon dees. 
John8:36 Histtiko naazi inttena wozziko intte wozzettidayta gidana. 
John8:37 Intte Abrahaame nayta gididayssa ta erays; gido attiin ta qaala intte ero gi ekkontta gishshas tana wodhanaas koyeeta. 
John8:38 Tani ta Aawaa achchan be7idayssa inttes yootays; intte qasse intte aawappe siyidayssa ooththeeta» gides. 
John8:39 Isttika izas, «Nu aaway Abrahaame» giidi zaari yootiin Yesusi isttas, «Intte Abrahaame naa gididaakko Abrahaameththo ooththana." 
John8:40 Intte gidikko tani Xoossafe siyida tumaa inttes yootiin tana wodhanaas gixxi dendideta. Gido attiin Abrahaamey hessaththo ooththibeenna. 
John8:41 Intte intte aawaththo ooththeeta» gides. Isttika zaaridi, «Nu layman yelettida naa gidokko; nu aaway issi Xoossaa xalla» giidi izas zaarida." 
John8:42 Yesusi isttas, «Intte Aaway Xoossa gididaakko tanikka Xoossafe keza yida gishshas intte tana dosanakkoshin; tana izi kiittides attiin ta tarkka ta shenen yabeekke." 
John8:43 Ta yootizayssa ays yuushshi qoppeketii? Gaasoykka intte ta qaala siyana koyontta gishshassa. 
John8:44 Intte intte aawaa Xala7e nayta; intte aawaa amo polana koyeeta; izi kasekka shemppo wodhidaade. Iza achchan tumay dontta gishshas izi tuman eqqibeenna; izi ba hu7es wordanchchanne wordo aawaa gidida gishshas izi wordo haasaya baappe medhdhi ekkidi haasayees. 
John8:45 Ta qasse tumu haasayza gishshas intte tana ammanekketa. 
John8:46 Intte giddofe tana, ‹Ne hanno nagara ooththadasa› giidi markkara laththanaas mootana dandayzaadey dizee? Ta tumu haasayzaade gidikko histtiin aazas tana ammanekketii?" 
John8:47 Xoossafe gidida asi Xoossi gizaa siyees; intte gidikko Xoossafe gidontta gishshas Xoossa qaala siyekketa» gides. 
John8:48 Ayhudatikka zaaridi, «Nu nena ne, ‹Samaariya asa; ne bolla daydanththi dees› gidayssi tumu deennee?» gida." 
John8:49 Yesusi isttas, «Tani ta Aawaa bonchchays attiin daydanththi ta bolla baa. Intte gidikko tana kawushsheeta." 
John8:50 Tani taas bonchcho koykke. Ta bonchchettana mala koyzaadey qasse dees. Izikka pirda pirdanaade. 
John8:51 Ta inttes tumu gays; oonikka ta qaala naagikko hayqo mulekka hayqqenna» gi zaarides. 
John8:52 Ayhudati iza, «Ne bolla daydanththi dizayssa ha7i nuni eridos. Abrahaamey hayqqides; nabetikka izaththo hayqqida. Ne qasse, ‹Oonikka mule hayqo beyenna› ga yootaasa." 
John8:53 Ne nu aawaa Abrahaameppe aadhdhay? Izi hayqqides; nabetikka hayqqida; histtiin ne nena oona gaana koyadii?» gida. 
John8:54 Yesusikka isttas, «Ta tarkka tana bonchchiko ta bonchchoy hada. Tana bonchchizaadey gidikko intte, ‹Izi nu Xoossa› gizayssi ta Aawaa." 
John8:55 Intte iza erontta aggikokka ta iza erays. Ta iza erikke giikko tanikka intte mala wordanchcha gidays; ta qasse iza erays; iza qaalaakka naagays. 
John8:56 Intte aawaa Abrahaamey ta gallas beyanaas amottidi be7idessinne ufayettides» gides. 
John8:57 Ayhudati qasse, «Nees buro ichchashu tammu layth kumontta neni Abrahaame beyadii?» gida." 
John8:58 Yesusikka, «Ta inttes tumu gays; Abrahaamey yelettanaappe kasekka tani days» gides." 
John8:59 Ayhudati heerakka iza caddanaas wuri shuch denththida; gido attiin Yesusi istta matappe qotettidi Xoossa Keeththafe kezi bides. 
John9:1 Yesusi ogera aadhdhi bishe ba aayey uloppe yelettoosofe ayfe qooqidaade be7ides. 
John9:2 Iza kaallizayti iza, «Astamaaree! Hayssi addezi qooqe gidi yelettana mala nagara ooththiday oonee? Iza yelidayti ooththidooyee? Izi ooththidee?» giidi Yesusa oychchida." 
John9:3 Yesusikka isttas, «Iza gidiinkka iza yelidaytikka nagara ooththibeettenna. Izi hessaththo haniday Xoossa oosoy iza bolla qonccanaassa." 
John9:4 Gallassara tana kiittidaade ooso ooththanaas taas bessees. Buro oonikka ooththanaas dandayontta qammay yaana. 
John9:5 Ha biittaa bolla diza wode ha biittaas poo7oy tana» gides. 
John9:6 Hessa gi simmidi biitta bolla cuch cuttidi ba cuchchan urqqa shugisidi addeza ayfeza he urqqaa tiydi," 
John9:7 «Baada Selihoomen asay xammaqettizason meecetta» gides. Selihoome guussi kiitettidayssa guussa. Addezikka biidi meecettidi xeellishe simmi yides. 
John9:8 Iza dooththatinne kase izi heen woossishin be7ida asay, «Hayssaadey kase uttidi woossiza addeza deennee?» gida." 
John9:9 Isttafe issi issi asati, «Ee izakko» gida. Baggayti, «Iza deenna» gida. Izi qasse, «Ta izakko» gides." 
John9:10 Isttika, «Histtiin ne ayfey waani xeellidee?» gi oychchida." 
John9:11 Izikka zaaridi, «Yesusa geetettiza asi biitta munuqidi ta ayfeza he urqqaa tiydi tana, ‹Baada Selihoomen meecetta› gi yootiin ta baada meecettada xeellanaas dandayadis» gides." 
John9:12 Isttika, «Histtiin hessaadey ha7i awan dizee?» gida; izikka, «Ta erikke» gides." 
John9:13 Isttika he kase ayfe qooqe addeza Farsaawetakko efida. 
John9:14 Yesusi urqqa munuqidi addeza ayfe paththida gallassay Ayhudata Sambata gallassa. 
John9:15 Hessa gishshas Farsaaweti addeza izi wostti xeellidaakko iza oychchida. Addezikka zaaridi, «Izi ta ayfen urqqa tiydes; tanikka meecettadis; hekko ha7i xeelladis» gides." 
John9:16 Farsaawetappe issi issi asati, «Hayssi addezi Sambata bonchchonttaade gidida gishshas izi Xoossafe gidenna» gida. Baggayti qasse, «Nagaranchchay hayssa mala malaata waani ooththana dandayzee?» gida. Hessa gishshas istta giddon palamay medhettides." 
John9:17 Histtiin kase ayfe qooqe addezakko simmidi, «Ha ne ayfe paththida addeza gishshas ne ay gay?» gida. Addezi zaaridi, «Izi nabekko!» gides." 
John9:18 Ayhudati addeza yelida aayeyranne aawara xeygisi ehisana gakkanaas addezi kase qooqe gididayssa ammanibeettenna. 
John9:19 Isttika yelidayta, «Intte, ‹Nuus qooqe nay yelettides› giza naazi hayssee? Histtiin ha7i waanidi xeellana dandaydee?» gida." 
John9:20 Yelidaytikka hizgi zaarida, «Izi nu naa gididayssanne qooqe gidi yelettidayssa eroos." 
John9:21 Ha7i qasse izi waani xeellana dandaydaakkonne iza ayfe ooni pogidaakko nu erokko. Izi bana dandaydaade gidida gishshas izi ba gishshas yootanaas dandayees iza oychchite» gida. 
John9:22 Iza yelidayti hessaththo giday oonikka Yesusa izi Kirstoosa giidi markkattiday wuri Ayhudata woosa keeththafe goodettana mala Ayhudati kase seera ooththida gishshas Ayhudatas babbidi gida. 
John9:23 Hessa gishshas, «Iza yelidayti izi bana dandaydaade gidida gishshas iza oychchite» gida." 
John9:24 Kase qooqe addeza qasseka xeygidi, «Haysso ne tumayo yootada Xoossa bonchcha. Hayssi addezi nagaranchcha gididayssa nu eroos» gida." 
John9:25 Izikka, «Izi nagaranchcha gidiin ta erikke. Gido attiin ta kase qooqe gididaaronne qasse ha7i ta xeellizaaro hanno xalla erays» gides." 
John9:26 Istti qasse iza, «Izi nees ay ooththidee? Ne ayfeza wostti pogidee?» giidi oychchida" 
John9:27 Izikka, «Ta inttes kase yootiin wozinan woththi siyibeekketa shin ha7i qasse aazas zaareththi siyana koyeetii? Intteka iza kaallizayta gidana koyeetii?» gides." 
John9:28 Hessafe guye izas, «Nu Muse kaallizaadentta; ne iza kaallizaade gida." 
John9:29 Kase Xoossi Musera haasayettidayssa nu eroos; hayssi addezi awappe yidaakko nu erokko» gida. 
John9:30 Addezikka isttas, «Izi awappekkon intte eronttayssi malalisees; gido attiin ta ayfe xeelisidaadey iza." 
John9:31 Xoossi baas yayyizaadessinne iza shene ooththizaades attiin nagaranchcha as siyonttayssa nu eroos. 
John9:32 Ayfe qooqidi yelettidaade ayfey xeellides gizayssa alamey medhettoosoppe oonikka siyi erenna. 
John9:33 Hayssaadey Xoossafe gidonttaakko hayssa ooththanaas dandayenna» gi zaarides. 
John9:34 Isttika iza, «Neni nees mule asateththay nagaran munuqettiin yelettidayssi nuna tamaarsana waana xaladii?» giidi iza gooddida." 
John9:35 Addeza gooddidayssa Yesusi siyides. Iza demmidi, «Ne Asa Naan ammanay?» gides." 
John9:36 Addezikka, «Godoo! Ta izan ammanana mala izi oonee?» gi oychchides." 
John9:37 Yesusikka, «Ne iza beyadasa; ha7i nenara haasayzay izakko!» gides." 
John9:38 Addezikka, «Godoo! Iza ammanadis» giidi izas hokki goynnides." 
John9:39 Yesusikka, «Qooqeti xeellana malanne xeellizayti qooqana mala pirdanaas ta hayssa ha alame yadis» gides." 
John9:40 Izara diza Farsaawetappe issi issi asati hessa siyidi, «Hessi ay guussee? Histtiin nunikka qooqee?» gida." 
John9:41 Yesusikka istta, «Intte qooqeta gididaakko inttes nagara gidennashin intte ha7i, ‹Nu xeelloos› giza gishshas intte nagaranchcha gidida mala daana» gides." 
John10:1 Yesusi, «Ta inttes tumu gays; dorsata yiren pengerappe attiin hara baggara guppi gelizay kaysonne bonqqizaade." 
John10:2 Pengera gelizaadey izi dorsata heemmizaade. 
John10:3 Penge naagizaadey izas pengeza doyees. Dorsatikka iza qaala siyeettes; ba dorsata sunththara sunththara xeygi kessees. 
John10:4 Bayta ubbaa kessidaappe guye istta sinth aadhdhidi kaaleththees; dorsatikka iza qaala eriza gishshas iza kaalleettes. 
John10:5 Imaththa asa qaala erontta gishshas izappe baqateettes attiin mulekka iza kaallettenna» gides. 
John10:6 Yesusi hessa leemisoza isttas yootides shin istti qasse izi isttas yootidayssa aykkoka eribeettenna. 
John10:7 Hessa gishshas Yesusi qasseka isttas, «Ta inttes tumu gays; dorsata pengey tana." 
John10:8 Taappe kase yidayti wuri kaysonne bonqqizayta. Dorsati gidikko istti gizaa siyibeettenna. 
John10:9 Pengey tana; ta baggara gelizaadey wuri attana; gelananne kezana; heemettizasokka demmana. 
John10:10 Kaysoy kaysotana, wodhanaassinne dhayssanaas xalla yees. Tani gidikko inttes de7oy daana malanne inttes keehi darana mala yadis." 
John10:11 «Tani lo7o heenththanchcha; lo7o heenththanchchay ba shemppo ba dorsata gishshas aaththi immees. 
John10:12 Miishshera qaxxarettidi heemmizaadey gidikko dorsati izas gidontta gishshas kana suytey yiza wode dorsata yeggidi baas baqatees. Kana suyteykka dorsata dafi dafi meessinne laallees. 
John10:13 Baqatizaadey miishshan qaxxarettidaade gidida gishshassinne dorsatas mishettontta gishshassa. 
John10:14 «Lo7o heenththanchchay tana; tani ta dorsata erays; isttika tana ereettes. 
John10:15 Hessika Aaway tana erizayssa mala tani ta shemppo dorsata gishshas aaththa immana. 
John10:16 Hayssa ha dorsa yiren gelonttayti taas hara dorsati deettes; ta isttaka haa ehanaas taas bessees; isttika ta qaala siyananne issi mehe gidana. Heemmizayssika issaade gidana. 
John10:17 Ta zaarada denththanaas ta shemppo aaththa immiza gishshas ta Aaway tana dosees. 
John10:18 Tani ta shemppo ta dosara aaththa immadis attiin oonikka taappe woththi ekkenna; ta aaththa immanaas gidiin woykko zaara denththanaas gidiin sheney taassa; hessa he azazoza tani ta Aawappe ekkadis» gides. 
John10:19 Hessa he qaalaappe dendidayssan Ayhudata giddon qasseka shaaketeththi medhettides. 
John10:20 Daro asay, «Iza bolla daydanththi diza gishshassinne izi goosh gidida gishshas intte izi gizayssa ays siyeetii?» gida." 
John10:21 Baggayti qasse, «Daydanththi dizaadey hayssa mala deenna; daydanththi qooqida ayfe paththi erizee?» gida." 
John10:22 Yerusalaamen Xoossa Keeththa ooraththo ba7aale bonchcho wodey gakkides; he wodeykka balgo. 
John10:23 Yesusi Xoossa Keeththa gibbe giddon Solomoone simereteththasora aadhdhishin," 
John10:24 Ayhudati iza giddo aaththidi, «Ne ayde gakkanaas nu wozina hirgan gam7isanee? Ne Xoossi kiittidaade gidikko nuus qonccisa yoota» gida." 
John10:25 Yesusikka isttas, «Ta inttes yootadiskoshin intte gidikko ammanibeekketa. Ta Aawaa sunththan ta ooththiza malatati ta gishshas yooteettes." 
John10:26 Intte qasse ta dorsata gidontta gishshas tana ammanekketa. 
John10:27 Ta dorsati ta qaala siyeettes. Tanikka istta erays; isttika tana kaalleettes. 
John10:28 Ta isttas mernaa de7o immana; mulekka istti dhayettenna; istta ta kusheppe woththi ekkanaas dandayanaadey oonikka deenna. 
John10:29 Taas istta immida ta Aaway ubbaafe aadhdhees; ta Aawa kusheppe istta oonikka bonqqanaas dandayenna. 
John10:30 Taninne ta aaway nu issino» gides. 
John10:31 Ayhudati iza caddanaas qasseka shuch denththida. 
John10:32 Yesusikka, «Aawappe gidida daro gita malaatata ta inttena bessadis. Histtiin ha ta bessidaytappe awaari gishshas tana shuchchara caddeetii?» gides." 
John10:33 Ayhudatikka, «Nu nena shuchchara caddizay ne as gida uttada nena nerkka Xoos kessada cashsha qaala ne haasayda gishshassafe attiin ne lo7o ooththidayssa gishshas deenna» giidi izas zaarida." 
John10:34 Yesusikka isttas, «Intte wogaa giddon, ‹Ta inttena Xoossata gadis› geetetti xaafettibeennee?" 
John10:35 Xoossa qaalay isttas yida asata, ‹Xoossi giikko Maxaafay shaarettanaas dandayonttaa gidikko›" 
John10:36 histtiin, ‹Ta Xoossa naa› gida gishshas Aaway ba shaakki dummasidayssanne haa duge alame kiittidayssa intte, ‹Ne cayadasa› giidi tana wordora aazas mooteetii?" 
John10:37 Ta Aaway ooththizayssa ta ooththontta aggiko tanan ammanopite. 
John10:38 Ta izaththo ooththizaa gidikko intte tana ammanontta aggikokka ta Aaway tanan dizayssa tanikka izan dizayssa intte erana malanne yuushshi qoppana mala izi ooththida malaataan ammanite» gides. 
John10:39 Qasseka istti iza oykkanaas koyida shin izi istta kusheppe kessi ekki bides. 
John10:40 Hessafe guye Yesusi, Yohannisi kase xammaqizaso Yordaanooseppe he pinth simmidi heen gam7ides." 
John10:41 Daro asay izakko yides; istti qasse, «Yohannisi issi malaatakka ooththibeenna; gido attiin hayssa addeza gishshas izi yootidayssi wurikka tumukko» gida." 
John10:42 Heenkka daro asay Yesusan ammanides. 
John11:1 Bitaaniya geetettizason Maaramanne Martay diza gutan Alazaare geetettizaadey sakettides. 
John11:2 Izi isha Alazaarey sakettida Maarama kase Yesusa toho bolla shitto gussada Yesusa toho ba hu7e binanan quccidaarokko. 
John11:3 Michchetikka, «Godoo! Ne dosizayssi sakettides» giidi as Yesusaakko kiittida." 
John11:4 Yesusi hessa siyidi, «Ha sakoy Xoossa nay izan bonchchettana malanne Xoossi bonchchettanaassafe attiin iza hayqos gaththizaaz deenna» gides." 
John11:5 Yesusi Marta izi michcheyo Maaramonne Alazaare siiqees. 
John11:6 Gido attiin Alazaarey sakettidayssa siyidi heen ba dizason nam7u gallas gam7ides. 
John11:7 Hessafe guye bana kaallizayta, «Ane Yuhuda biitta simmi boos» gides." 
John11:8 Isttika, «Astamaaree! Guuththa wodeppe kase asay nena shuchchara caddana koyeetteskoshin; ne qasse ha7i hee simma baanee?» gida." 
John11:9 Yesusi isttas, «Issi gallassan tammanne nam7u saatey dees deennee? Gallassara hemettiza asi ha alameza poo7on simerettiza gishshas dhuphettenna." 
John11:10 Dhuphettizaadey gidikko izi qamara hemettizaade. Gaasoykka poo7oy baynda gishshassa» gides. 
John11:11 Hessa isttas yootidaappe guye, «Nu lagge Alazaarey dhiskides; tanikka iza dhiskofe denththana bays» gides." 
John11:12 Iza kaallizayti iza, «Godoo! izi dhiskidaa gidikko dendana» gida." 
John11:13 Yesusi isttas hessa yootiday Alazaare hayqo gishshassa; gido attiin iza kaallizaytas qasse dhisko gishshas yootidaa misatides. 
John11:14 Hessa gishshas qonccera isttas, «Alazaarey hayqqides." 
John11:15 Intte ammanana mala ta heen dontta aggidayssi intte gishshas tana ufayssees; ha7i gidikko ane gede izakko boos» gides. 
John11:16 Qasse Didimoosa geetettiza Toomaasi hankko Yesusa kaallizayta, «Ane nunikka biidi izara issife hayqqoos» gides." 
John11:17 Yesusi bi gakkishin Alazaarey hayqqi moogettiin oyddu gallas gidides. 
John11:18 Bitaaniyay Yerusalaameppe bagga saate oge haakkees. 
John11:19 Istta ishay hayqqida gishshas Maaramonne Marta minththeththanaas daro Ayhuda asay isttako shiiqides. 
John11:20 Yesusa yuussaa Martay siyada iza mokka ekkana badus; Maarama gidikko soon uttadus. 
John11:21 Martay Yesusa, «Godoo! Ne haan dizaakko ta ishay hayqqennakoshin." 
John11:22 Ha7ikka gidikko ne woossida ubbaa Xoossi nees immanayssa ta erays» gadus. 
John11:23 Yesusikka izis, «Ne ishay dendana» gides." 
John11:24 Martay qasse, «Wurseththan denththa wode izi dendanayssa tanikka erays» gadus." 
John11:25 Yesusikka izis, «Dendoynne de7oy tana; tana ammanizaadey hayqqikokka paxa daana." 
John11:26 Tanan dizaadeynne tana ammanizaadey mulekka hayqqenna; hessa ne ammanay?» gides. 
John11:27 Izakka zaarada, «Ee Godoo! Neni duge ha alameza kiitettida Xoossa Naa gididayssa ta ammanays» gadus." 
John11:28 Hessa gaadanne simma ba michcheyo Maaramo dumma xeyga kessada, «Astamaarey nena koyees» gadus." 
John11:29 Maaramakka hessa siyida mala elela dendada izakko badus. 
John11:30 Hessa gakkanaas Yesusi Martara gaaggidasohon dees attiin gede guta giddo gelibeenna 
John11:31 Maaramo minththeththishe izira soon diza Ayhudatikka Maarama pusukku ga denda eqqada kezidayssa be7idi iza Alazaare duufo achchan yeekkana bizaa misatiin izo kaallida. 
John11:32 Maarama Yesusi dizaso gakka iza demmida mala iza toho bolla gufannada, «Godoo! Ne haan dizaakko ta ishay hayqqennakoshin» gadus." 
John11:33 Izanne izo kaalli yida Ayhudati yeekkizayssa Yesusi beyi daro mishettidi," 
John11:34 «Iza awan moogidetii?» gi oychchides; isttika, «Godoo! Haa yaada beya» gida." 
John11:35 Yesusikka afunxxides. 
John11:36 Ayhudatikka, «Izi iza ay mala siiqizaakko be7ite» gida." 
John11:37 Istta giddofe issi issi asati, «Hayssi qooqe addeza ayfe pogdayssi hayssaadey hayqqontta mala ooththanaas dandayennee?» gida." 
John11:38 Yesusi iza wozinay mishettiin gede duufozakko bides; duufozikka shuchchara gordettida gongolo. 
John11:39 Izikka istta, «Shuchchaa denththite!» gides; hayqqidayssa michcheya Martay, «Godoo! Izi hayqqiin hach oyddu gallas gidida gishshas xinqqanakko!» gadus." 
John11:40 Yesusikka, «Ne ammanizaa gidikko Xoossa bonchcho beyandasa gaada nees ta yootabeekkinaa?» gides." 
John11:41 Hessa gishshas shuchchaa denththida; Yesusikka pude salo xeellidi, «Ta Aawawu! Ne ta gizaaz siyida gishshas ta nena galatays." 
John11:42 Ne ubba gallas ta gizaaz siyizayssa ta erays; gido attiin ta hessa giday hayssan eqqida asati ne tana kiittidayssa ammanana malassa» gides. 
John11:43 Yesusi hessa gidaappe guye kaaleththidi qaala dhoqqu histtidi, «Alazaaree! Haa keza!» giidi xeygides." 
John11:44 Hayqqida Alazaareykka kumeththa asateththay moogo may7on xaaxettida mala duufozappe kezides. Yesusikka, «Birshi yeddite bo!» gides." 
John11:45 Hessa gishshas Maaramo minththeththana yida Ayhudatappe daro asay Yesusi ooththidayssa be7idi izan ammanides. 
John11:46 Isttafe baggayti biidi Yesusi ooththidayssa Farsaawetas yootida. 
John11:47 Hessa qeeseta halaqatinne Farsaaweti Ayhudata duulata shiiqana mala xeygidi, «Ha addezi daro dumma dumma malaatata ooththidaade gidida gishshas nu ay ooththiko lo7oo?" 
John11:48 Nu co7u giikko asi wuri izan ammanananne Oroome asikka yiidi hayssa nu biittanne nu asaa nuuppe ekkana» gida. 
John11:49 Istta giddofe issaadey he layth qeesetas waanna halaqa Qayafay, «Intte aykkoka erekketa." 
John11:50 Derey wuri dhayanaappe dere gishshas issi asi hayqqiko lo7o gidana gishshas yuushshi qoppeketii?» gides. 
John11:51 Izi hessa baappe gidontta he layth izi qeesetas halaqa gidida gishshas Yesusi Ayhuda dere gishshas sinththafe hayqqanayssa yootides. 
John11:52 Izi hayqqanay he dere asaas xalla gidontta kase laalettida Xoossa naytakka issi bolla shiishshanaassa. 
John11:53 He gallassafe haa simmiin iza wodhanaas maqettida. 
John11:54 Hessa gishshas Yesusi he gallassafe haa simmiin Ayhudata giddon qonccera simerettibeenna. Gido attiin duge bazzo biitta matan diza Efreeme geetettiza katamay dizaso biidi bana kaallizaytara heen takkides. 
John11:55 Ayhudati Paaziga ba7aaley matida mala ba7aaley gakkanaappe kase geesho woga ooththanaas daro asay dumma dumma dereppe Yerusalaame yides. 
John11:56 Asay Yesusa koyishe Xoossa Keeththan eqqidi ba giddon issoy issaara, «Inttes ay misatizee? Ba7aalezas yeenneshaa?» gides." 
John11:57 Qeeseta halaqatinne Farsaaweti qasse Yesusa oykkanaas izi awan dizaakko erizaadey isttas malatana mala kase azazi woththida. 
John12:1 Paaziga ba7aales buro usuppun gallassi attishin Yesusi hayqoppe denththida Alazaarey dizaso Bitaaniya bides. 
John12:2 Heen Yesusas kawo kaththidi Martay iza kawo mizishin izara issife maaddan uttidaytappe issoy Alazaare. 
John12:3 Maarama daro al7o waagara shamettida bagga litiro gidiza geeshsha nardoose shitto ekka yaada Yesusa toho bolla gussada tohoza ba hu7e binanara quccadus. Keeththaaka shitto sawoy kumides. 
John12:4 Yesusa kaallizaytappe issoy Yesusa aaththi immana Asqoronto Yuhuday," 
John12:5 «Hayssi shittozi heedzdzu xeetu dinaares bayzettidi miishshay aazas manqotas imettibeennee?» gides. 
John12:6 Izi hessa giday miish shiishshiza karaxiite oykkizaadey iza gidida gishshas shiiqiza miishshaafe baas shiishshidi go7ettizaade gidida gishshassa attiin manqotas mishettidi gidenna. 
John12:7 Yesusi qasse, «Hayssi shittozi taas moogo gallassas qofettidaaz gidida gishshas he wode gakkanaas iza ba achchan naagu, bochchofte." 
John12:8 Manqoti ay wodekka inttenara deettes. Gido attiin intte tana ubba wode demmeketa» gides. 
John12:9 He wode daro Ayhuda asati Yesusi heen dizayssa eridi izakko yida; yidaytikka Yesusa xalala kosh gidontta Yesusi hayqoppe denththida Alazaarekka beyanaassa. 
John12:10 Hessa gishshas qeeseta halaqati Yesusara Alazaarekka gaththi wodhanaas ba giddon zorettida. 
John12:11 Hessika Alazaare gaason daro Ayhuda asay Yesusaakko bi biidi iza ammaniza gishshassa. 
John12:12 Wonteththa gallas ba7aaleza bonchchana yida derey Yesusi Yerusalaame yizayssa siyides. 
John12:13 Zamba hayth ekkidi Yesusa mokkana kezides; derey qaala dhoqqu histtidi, «Hoosa7inna! Godaa sunththan yiza Isra7eele kawoy anjjettidayssa!» gides." 
John12:14 Beni, «Hanne! Xiyoone nayee, babbofa! Hekko ne kawoy hare gutte toggidi yees» geetetti xaafettida mala Yesusi hare gutte demmidi toggides." 
John12:15  
John12:16 Iza kaallizayti hessa ubbaa koyro wozinan woththibeettenna. Iza gishshas xaafettidayssanne izas oosettida hanokka ubbaa Yesusi hayqoppe dendidaappe guye erida. 
John12:17 Alazaare duufoppe xeygidi hayqoppe denththida wode izara issife diza asay iza denththaa gishshas markkattida. 
John12:18 Daro asikka izi hessa mala gita malaata ooththidayssa siyidi iza mokkana kezides. 
John12:19 Hessa gishshas Farsaaweti ba giddon issoy issaa, «Histtiin nuni ay ooththana dandayzonii? Be7ite! Kumeththa derey attontta iza kaallees» gida." 
John12:20 Goynnanaas ba7aalezas shiiqida asaa giddon Girike dere asatikka deettes. 
John12:21 Isttika Galila giddon diza Betesayda geetettiza dere as Piliphoosa geetettizaadeko biidi, «Godoo! Nu Yesusa beyana koyoos» gida." 
John12:22 Piliphoosikka Indiraasas yootides. Indiraasinne Piliphoosi biidi Yesusas yootida. 
John12:23 Yesusikka isttas, «Hekko Asa Nay bonchchettiza saatey gakkides." 
John12:24 Ta inttes tumu gays; gistte ayfey biittan wodhdhada hayqqontta co7u ga uttiko barkka attawus. Iza hayqqizaa gidikko hara daro ayfawus. 
John12:25 Ba shempo dosizaadey dhayssees. Hayssa biittaa bolla ba shemppo ixxizaadey gidikko mernaa de7o demmees. 
John12:26 Taas ooththana koyzaadey tana kaallo; Taas ooththizaadey ta dizason daana; taas ooththizaade ta Aaway iza bonchchana» gides. 
John12:27 Qasseka Yesusi, «Hekko ta shemppoya metotadus; ‹Ta Aawawu! Ha saateyppe tana ashsha gooshaa?› Ta hizgontta mala ta yiday hanno ha meto saateyssa." 
John12:28 «Ta Aawawu! Ne sunththaa bonchcha» gides. Hessafe kaallidi, «Tani ta sunththaa bonchchadis; qasseka gujja bonchchana» giza qaalay saloppe yides." 
John12:29 Heen eqqida asay hessa siyidi, «Daday dadatees» gida. Baggayti qasse, «Kiitanchchako haasayzay» gida." 
John12:30 Yesusi, «Hayssi giirissay yiday intte gishshassa attiin ta gishshas gidenna." 
John12:31 Hayssi alamey pirdettana wodey hayssa; hayssa dereza haariza Xala7ey ha7i gede kare yegettana. 
John12:32 Tani dhoqqu gaada kaqettiza wode asaa wursa taakko zaarana» gides. 
John12:33 Yesusi hessa yootiday izi ay mala hayqo hayqqanaakko erisanaassa. 
John12:34 Asay qasse, «Nu wogan xaafettiday, ‹Xoossi kiittidaadey mernaas daana› gees; histtiin ne qasse waanada, ‹Asa Nay dhoqqu gi kaqettana bessees› gay? Ne giza Asa Nay awayssee?» gi oychchida." 
John12:35 Yesusi isttas, «Ha7i guuththa wodes inttenara poo7oy dees; gadey dhumontta poo7ora hemettite; qammara hemettizaadey izi awa bizaakko erenna." 
John12:36 Intte poo7o nayta gidana mala poo7oy dishin poo7on ammanite» gides. Yesusi hessa gidaappe guye biidi istta ayfeppe geemmides. 
John12:37 Yesusi isttas hessa mala malaata istta sinththan ooththiinkka Ayhudati izan ammanibeettenna. 
John12:38 Hessi haniday nabe Isayaasi, «Godoo! Nu markkateththaa ammaniday oonee? Xoossa qaalay oonas qonccidee?» gida mala." 
John12:39 Hessa gishshas ammananaas dandaybeettenna; gaasoykka nabe Isayaasi kase," 
John12:40 «Istti ba ayfen be7idi, ba wozinan yuushshi qoppidi, simmontta malanne izi istta paththontta mala Xoossi istta ayfe qooqisides; istta wozinakka muumisides» gi xaafida gishshassa." 
John12:41 Isayaasi hessa giday Xoossi kiittidaade bonchcho be7ida gishshassa; hessa gishshas Yesusi yootides. 
John12:42 Gidikkoka Ayhudata halaqatappe daro asay Yesusa ammanides. Gido attiin istta Ayhudata Woosa Keeththafe gooddontta mala Farsaawetas babbidi ba ammano qonccen markkattibeettenna. 
John12:43 Istti hessaththo haniday isttas Xoossafe imettiza bonchchofe aaththidi asappe imettiza bonchcho dosida gishshassa. 
John12:44 Yesusi ba qaala dhoqqu histtidi, «Tana ammanizaadey tanan xalala gidontta tana kiittidayssanka ammanees." 
John12:45 Tana be7idaadey tana kiittidayssaka beyana. 
John12:46 Tana ammanizay wuri dhuman dontta mala tani poo7o gidada hayssa ha alameza yadis. 
John12:47 Ta qaala siyidi ooththonttaade bolla pirdanay tana gidikke. Gaasoykka ta yiday alame ashshanaas attiin alame bolla pirdanaas gidenna. 
John12:48 Tana koyonttaadenne ta qaala ekkonttaade bolla pirdanaadey dees; ta izas yootida qaalay wurseththa gallas iza bolla pirdana. 
John12:49 Gaasoykka tani coo ta shenen yootabeekke; ta gizayssanne ta yootiza azazo taas immiday tana kiittida ta Aawa. 
John12:50 Iza azazoy mernaa de7o gididayssa ta erays; hessa gishshas ta yootizay wuri Aaway taas yootidayssa» gides. 
John13:1 He wodeykka Ayhudata Paaziga ba7aaleppe kase Yesusi hayssa alameza yeddidi ba Aawaakko baana saatey gakkidayssa erides; hayssa alamezan diza ba baggata ubbaa siiqides. Wurseththi gakkanaaska dosides. 
John13:2 Yesusinne iza kaallizayti issife kawo mishin Simoona nay Asqoronto Yuhuday Yesusa aaththi immana mala Xala7ey iza wozinan iita qofa gelththides. 
John13:3 Yesusi Aaway izas godateth wursi immidayssanne izi Xoossa achchafe kezidi yidayssa, qasse simmidi Xoossako baanayssa erees." 
John13:4 Hessa gishshas maaddaa bollafe dendidinne may7o qaari woththidi pooxa ekkidi xeessan gixxides. 
John13:5 Toho meecciza gonggen haaththe gujjidi bana kaallizayta toho meechche oykkides; ba gixxida pooxankka meeccida tohoza quccides. 
John13:6 Yesusi Simoona geetettiza Phexroosakko shiiqiin Simoona geetettiza Phexroosi iza, «Godoo! Ne ta toho meeccanee?» gides." 
John13:7 Yesusikka, «Tani ooththizayssa ne ha7i erakka; guyeppe qasse ne erandasa» gides." 
John13:8 Phexroosikka, «Ne ta toho mulekka meeccaka» gides. Yesusi qasse, «Ta ne toho meeccontta aggiko neessinne taas issifeteththi deenna» gides." 
John13:9 Simoona geetettiza Phexroosikka zaaridi, «Godoo, hessa gidikko taas toho xalala gidontta kushera hu7era wursa meecca» gides." 
John13:10 Yesusi qasse, «Ba asateththi meecettidaades kumeththa bollay geesh gidida gishshas izas toho meechchafe attiin hara koshshenna. Intte geesh shin ubbata deekketa» gides." 
John13:11 Yesusi, «Intte ubbatikka geesh deekketa» giday iza aaththi immanaadey oonakko eriza gishshassa." 
John13:12 Istta toho meeccidaappe guye ba may7o ekki may7idi kase ba uttidasohon simmi uttides. Qasse isttas, «Ta inttes ay ooththidaakko wozinan woththidetii?" 
John13:13 Intte tana Astamaarenne Godaa geeta; ta qasse Astamaarenne Godaa gidida gishshas intte guussay tumukko. 
John13:14 Histtiko ta inttes Godaanne astamaare gidashe intte toho meeccizaa gidikko intteka intte giddon issoy issaa toho meeccana bessees. 
John13:15 Ta inttes ooththidayssa mala intteka ooththana mala ta inttes leemiso bessadis. 
John13:16 Ta inttes tumu gays; ashkaray godaappe aadhdhenna; kiitettidaadey kiittidaadefe aadhdhenna. 
John13:17 Intte hayssa eridi ooson peyshshiko intte anjjettidayta. 
John13:18 «Ta hayssa gizay intte ubbata gishshas deenna; tani ta dooridayta wursa erays; gido attiin, ‹Ta kath midaadey ta morkke gididi ta bolla dendides› giza maxaafa qaalay polettanaas koshshees." 
John13:19 Ta hayssa ha7ira inttes yootizay izi polettiza wode ta oonakko intte ammananaassa. 
John13:20 Ta inttes tumu gays; ta kiittidaade ekkizaadey tana ekkees; tana ekkizaadey tana kiittidaade ekkees» gides. 
John13:21 Yesusi hessa gi simmidi keehi qofan gelidi, «Ta inttes tumu gays; intte giddofe issaadey tana aaththi immana» giidi qonccen yootides." 
John13:22 Iza kaallizayti hessa izi oona gishshas gidaakko erontta gishshas ba giddon issoy issaara xeelettida. 
John13:23 Iza kaallizayta giddofe Yesusi siiqiza issoy Yesusa achchan uttides. 
John13:24 Simoona geetettiza Phexroosi Yohannisa som7i bessidi, «Izi oona gishshas gizaakko ane iza oychcha» gides." 
John13:25 Hessa gishshas izi ba qoodhe gede Yesusa hayththako shiishshidi, «Godoo! Izi oonee?» gi oychchides." 
John13:26 Yesusikka zaaridi, «Izaadey ta ha7i buddena woxen dhim7ada barsizaade» gides; hessa gi simmidi buddena woxen dhim7i ekkidi Asqorontofe yida Simoona naa Yuhuda barsides." 
John13:27 Yuhuday iza baadhida mala heerakka Xala7ey izan gelides. Yesusikka Yuhuda, «Ne ooththanaas qoppidayssa elela ooththa» gides." 
John13:28 Yesusi hessa aazas gidaakko maaddaan uttida asaappe yo7oy gelidaadey oonikka deenna. 
John13:29 Yuhuday miish oykkizaade gidida gishshas Yesusa kaallizaytappe baggayti Yesusi Yuhuda, «Ba7aalezas koshshizayssa shamma woykko manqotas muxuwaata imma» gidaa misatides." 
John13:30 Yuhudaykka buddennaa baadhida mala heerakka kezidi bides; izi bishin gadey qammako. 
John13:31 Yuhuday kezi bidaappe guye Yesusi, «Asa Nay ha7i bonchchettides; iza gaason Xoossika bonchchettides." 
John13:32 Xoossi iza gaason bonchchettizaa gidikko Xoossika iza bonchchana; heerakka gam7ontta bonchchana. 
John13:33 Ta naytoo! Ta inttenara daro wode gam7ike; intte tana koyana; ta kase Ayhudata halaqataska, ‹Ta bizaso intte yaana dandayekketa› gaada yootida mala ha7ikka intteska hessaththo yootays." 
John13:34 Intte intte giddon issoy issaara siiqettana mala ta inttes ooraththa azazo immays. Ta inttena siiqida mala intte intte giddon issoy issaara siiqettite. 
John13:35 Intte intte giddon siiqettiko intte tana kaallizayta gididayssa asi wuri erana» gides. 
John13:36 Hessafe guye Simoona geetettiza Phexroosi Yesusa, «Godoo! Ne awa baanee?» gi oychchides. Yesusi qasse, «Ta bizaso ne ha7i tana kaallana dandayakka shin guyeppe ne tana kaallana» gides." 
John13:37 Phexroosi, «Godoo! Ta nena ha7i kaallanaas ays dandaykkinaa? Haray attoshin tani ta shemppoka ne gishshas aaththa immana» gides." 
John13:38 Yesusikka zaaridi, «Neni ne shemppo ta gishshas aaththa immanee? Ta nees tumu gays; hach kuttoy waassanaappe kasetada ne tana heedzdzuto kaddana» gides." 
John14:1 Kaaleththidikka Yesusi, «Intte wozinay metotoppo; Xoos ammanite; tanakka ammanite." 
John14:2 Ta Aawaa achchan daro duussasoy dees; hessa gidonttaakko, ‹Inttes daanaso giigsanaas ta baana› gaana shin." 
John14:3 Baada ta inttes soo giigsidaappe guye intte ta dizason daana mala ta simma yaada inttena ekkana. 
John14:4 Ta biza oge intte ereeta» gides. 
John14:5 Toomaasi, «Godoo! Ne awa bizaakko nu erokkon; histtiin ogeza nu wostti eranaas dandayzonii?» gides." 
John14:6 Yesusikka izas, «Ogeynne, tumay, de7oykka tana; ta baggara gidikkofe attiin oonikka Aawaakko baana asi deenna." 
John14:7 Intte tana erizaakko ta Aawaakka eranakkoshin; ha7i hayssafe guye intte iza erana; iza be7okka beyideta» gi zaarides. 
John14:8 Piliphoosi, «Godoo! Ne nuna Aawaa bessiko nuus gidana» gides." 
John14:9 Yesusikka izas, «Piliphoosaa! Hayssa gakkanaas ta inttenara de7inkka ne tana erkkii? Tana be7idaadey Aawaakka be7ides; histtiin neni waanada, ‹Nuna Aawaa bessa› gay?" 
John14:10 Tani ta Aawaan, ta Aawaykka tanan dizayssa ammanikkii? Ta inttes yootiza qaala yootizay ta shene mala deenna; gido attiin oosoza ubbaa ooththizay tanan diza ta Aawaa." 
John14:11 Tani Aawaan diza mala, Aawaykka tanan dizayssa intte ammanite; akkay giikko ta ooththiza oosota gishshassika tana ammanite." 
John14:12 Ta inttes tumu gays; tana ammanizaadey ta ooththiza ooso ooththana; hessafekka aaththi ooththana; gaasoykka tani Aawaakko baana. 
John14:13 Aaway naaza gaason bonchchettana mala intte ta sunththan woossidayssa ta inttes wursa ooththana. 
John14:14 Intte ay miishshika ta sunththan woossidayssa ta ubbaa ooththana. 
John14:15 «Intte tana dosizaa gidikko ta azazoyo naagite. 
John14:16 Tani Aawa woossana; Izikka inttenara mernaas daana mala hara inttena minththeththanaade inttes immana. 
John14:17 Hayssi minththeththiza Ayanay dere asay iza beyi erontta gishshas alamey ekkanaas dandayontta Tumu Ayana; gido attiin intte iza ereeta; gaasoykka izi inttenara diza gishshassinne izi intte gaaththan diza gishshassa. 
John14:18 «Aawaynne aaya baynda nayta mala ta inttena xalla aggike; ta simmada ha intteko yaana. 
John14:19 Guuththa wodeppe guye dere asay tana beyenna; intte gidikko beyandeta; tani de7on diza gishshas intteka de7on daandeta. 
John14:20 Tani ta Aawaan diza mala intteka tanan dizayssanne tanikka inttenan dizayssa intte he wode erandeta. 
John14:21 «Ta azazo ekkidi ooththizaadey tana dosees; tana dosizaadeka ta Aaway dosees; tanikka iza dosana; tanakka izaades qonccisana» gides. 
John14:22 Asqoronto Yuhuda gidontta hankko Yuhuday, «Godoo! Neni alame asaas gidontta nuus wostta nena qonccisanee?» gides." 
John14:23 Yesusikka izas, «Tana siiqizaadey ta qaala naagana; ta Aawaykka iza dosana; nuni izakko yaana; yiidikka izaadera issife daana." 
John14:24 Tana dosonttaadey ta qaala naagenna; hayssi intte siyiza qaalay tana kiittida ta Aawa qaalappe attiin ta qaala gidenna. 
John14:25 «Tani ha7i inttenara dashe hayssa inttes yootadis. 
John14:26 Aaway ta sunththan yeddana minththeththiza Xillo Ayanay qasse haniza ubbaa inttena tamaarsana; ta inttes yootoyssaka ubbaa intte wozinan woththana mala maaddana. 
John14:27 «Ta inttes saroteth aggada bays; ta saroteththika ta inttes immana; ta inttes immiza saroteththi alamey immiza saroteththa mala deenna; intte wozinay hirgofonne babbofo. 
John14:28 « ‹Ta baana; baadakka intteko simma yaana› gaada ta inttes kase yootidayssa siyideta; intte tana dosizaakko tani ta Aawaakko bizayssi inttena ufayssanakkoshin. Gaasoykka Aaway taappe aadhdhees. 
John14:29 Hayssi haniza wode intte ammanana mala hayssa ta inttes kaseta yootadis. 
John14:30 Hayssa alameza haariza Xala7ey yiza wodey gakkida gishshas ha7i ta inttenara daro haasaykke; izi ta bolla aykkoka ooththanaas izas wolqqay deenna. 
John14:31 Gido attiin tani Aawaa dosizayssa alamey erana mala Aaway tana azazidayssa ta ubbaa polana. Ane hayssafe boos; dendite» gides. 
John15:1 Qasseka Yesusi, «Tumu woyne miththa anoy tana; atakilteza oosanchchay ta Aawa." 
John15:2 Ta bolla dishe ayfe immontta hagga ubbaa ta Aaway qanxxi diggana; ayfiza haggaa gujji ayfana mala qirxi geeshshana. 
John15:3 Ta inttes yootida qaalaa gaason intte ha7i geeshshata. 
John15:4 Tanan diite; tanikka inttenan daana; haggay woyne ano bolla dontta aggiko barkka ayfe ayfana dandayonttayssa mala intteka tanan dontta aggiko ayfe ayfanaas dandayekketa. 
John15:5 «Tani woyne miththas ano; intte qasse haggata; daro ayfe ayfizaadey tanan dizaadenne tanikka izan dizaade; gaasoykka ta baynda intte aykkoka ooththanaas dandayekketa. 
John15:6 Tanan bayndaadey qanxxettidi wora yegettida haggaa mala kare yegettidi heen melana; heyta mala haggati issi bolla shiiqidi taman yegettannanne eexxana. 
John15:7 Intte tanan diikko ta qaalaykka inttenan diikko intte koyidayssa oychchiko demmana. 
John15:8 Daro ayfe intte ayfishin ta Aaway bonchchettees; intte tana kaallizayta gididayssi hessan erettana. 
John15:9 «Aaway tana dosidayssaththo tanikka inttena dosadis; hessa gishshas intte ta siiqon diite. 
John15:10 Tani ta Aawaa azazo polada iza siiqon dida mala intteka ta azazo polikko ta siiqon daana. 
John15:11 Hayssa ta inttes yootizay ta ufayssi inttenan gidana malanne intte ufayssika kumeth gidanaassa. 
John15:12 Ta inttes immiza azazoy ta inttena siiqida mala intteka intte giddon issoy issaara siiqettanaassa. 
John15:13 Asi ba lagges ba shemppo aaththi imoppe aadhdhiza siiqoy deenna. 
John15:14 Ta inttena azazizayssa ubbaa intte polikko intte ta laggeta. 
John15:15 Ashkaray goday ooththizayssa erontta gishshas hayssafe guye ta inttena ashkarata giikke. Gido attiin tani ta Aawappe siyidayssa wursa inttes qonccisida gishshas ta inttena ta laggeta gadis. 
John15:16 Ta inttena dooradis attiin intte tana dooribeekketa; intte biidi daro ayfe ayfana mala intte ayfey eqqi daana mala ta inttena woththadis; hessa gishshas intte ta sunththan woossidayssa ubbaa ta Aaway inttes immana. 
John15:17 Hessa gishshas intte intte giddon issoy issaara siiqettana mala ta inttena azazays. 
John15:18 «Kaaleththidikka Yesusi inttena alamey ixxiko inttefe kase tana ixxidayssa erite. 
John15:19 Intte ammanontta alame asaa gidikko alame asay ba bagga gididaade dosees. Gido attiin intte alame bagga gidontta gishshas ta inttena alameppe shaakkada doorida gishshas derey inttena ixxees. 
John15:20 ‹Ashkaray godaappe aadhdhenna› gaada ta kase inttes yootoyssa yuushshi qopite; istti tana gooddizayti inttenakka gooddana; istti ta qaalaa naagizaakko intte qaala naagana. 
John15:21 Istti tana kiittidaade erontta gishshas ta gaason intte bolla hessa wursi ooththana. 
John15:22 Ta yaada isttas yootonttaako isttas nagara gidenna. Ha7i qasse istta nagaraas hanno giza gaasoykka baa. 
John15:23 Tana ixxizaadey ta Aawaakka ixxees. 
John15:24 Hara asi ooththontta ooso ta istta giddon ooththonttaako isttas nagara gidennashin; ha7i istti hessa ubbaa be7idaappe guye tanakka ta Aawaakka ixxida. 
John15:25 Hessika haniday kase, ‹Tana gaasoykka baynda dishin ixxida› geetettidi istta wogan xaafettida qaalay polettanaassa." 
John15:26 «Gido attiin Aawappe kezidi yaanayssi, tanikka ta Aawa achchafe inttes yeddanayssi minththeththiza Tuma Ayanay yiidi izi ta gishshas markkattana." 
John15:27 Intte koyroppeka tanara diza gishshas taas intteka markkattandeta» gides. 
John16:1 Qasseka Yesusi, «Hekko hayssa wursa ta inttes intte ammanoy yark yarkofo gaada yootadis." 
John16:2 Istti inttena ba keeththafe gooddana; haray attoshin inttena wodhizaadey wuri Xoossas ooththizaade misatiza wodey yaana. 
John16:3 Istti hessaththo ooththizay tanakka, ta Aawaakka erontta gishshassa." 
John16:4 Ta hayssa inttes yootiza wode intte ta inttes gidayssa qoppanaassa» gides. Kaaleththidikka Yesusa, «Hayssa wursa ta inttes yootontta aggiday ta inttenara issife diza gishshassa." 
John16:5 «Ha7i qasse tana kiittidayssako ta baana gays; gido attiin inttefe oonikka, ‹Ne awa baanee?› giidi oychchanay baa." 
John16:6 Gido attiin hayssa wursa ta inttes yootida gishshas intte wozinay muuzottees. 
John16:7 Ta qasse inttes tumu gays; ta buussi inttes go7a gidana; gaasoykka ta bontta aggiko minththeththiza Ayanay intteko yeenna; ta bidaappe guye iza intteko yeddana. 
John16:8 Izi yiidi asa nagara gishshassinne xilloteththa gishshas qasseka pirda gishshas erisana. 
John16:9 Asa nagara gishshas izi erisanay asay tana ammanontta gishshassa. 
John16:10 Xilloteththa gishshas izi asaa erisanay tani ta Aawaakko biza gishshassinne qasse nam7anththo intte tana be7ontta gishshassa. 
John16:11 Pirda gishshas izi erisanay hayssa alameza haarizayssa bolla pirdettida gishshassa. 
John16:12 «Ta inttes buro yootana daro yo7oy dees; gido attiin ha7i inttena deexxana. 
John16:13 Tuma Ayanay yiidi inttena tumay dizaso kaaleththana; gaasoykka izi siyidayssa yootana attiin baappe gidontta gishshas izi sinththafe hanana yo7ota inttes yootana. 
John16:14 Taas dizayssafe ekkidi izi inttes yootiza gishshas tana bonchchana. 
John16:15 Aawaas gididay wurikka tayssa, ‹Taas gididayssafe ekkidi izi inttes yootana› ta giday hessassa» gides." 
John16:16 Yesusi gujjidi, «Guuththa wodeppe guye intte tana beyekketa; qasseka guuththa wodeppe guye intte tana beyana» gides." 
John16:17 Iza kaallizaytappe baggati ba giddon, « ‹Hayssi nuus guuththa wodeppe guye intte tana beyekketa; qasseka guuththa wodeppe guye intte tana beyana; qasse ta Aawaakko baana› guussi ay guussee?» gida." 
John16:18 «Histtiin hayssi, ‹Guuththa wodeppe guye› gizayssi izi aazee? izi yootizayssi nuus erettenna» giidi ba giddon zaari zaari oyshettida." 
John16:19 Istti iza oychchanayssa Yesusi eridi isttas, «Intte intte giddon issoy issaara oyshettizay ta inttes, ‹Guuththa wodeppe guye intte tana beyekketa; qasseka guuththa wodeppe guye intte tana beyana› gida gishshassee?" 
John16:20 Ta inttes tuma gays; intte waassananne yeekkanashin alamey gidikko ufayettana. Intte muuzottishin intte muuzoy ufayssan laamettana. 
John16:21 Maccassi yelo wodey gakkishin miixas hirgawus; gido attiin naa yela yeggidaappe guye biitta bolla nay yelettida gishshas ufayssafe dendidayssan kase ba waaydayssa zaara qoppuku. 
John16:22 Hessaththo intteka ha7i muuzotteeta; qasse ta inttena beyana intte wozinaykka ufayettana; intte ufayssaa zaari ekkanaadey deenna. 
John16:23 «Intte he wode taappe aykkoka woosseketa; ta inttes tumu gays; ta sunththan ta aawaa woossiko izi inttes ubbaaka immana. 
John16:24 Hanno gakkanaas intte ta sunththan aykkoka woossi erekketa; woossite intte ekkana; intte ufayssayka kumeth gidana. 
John16:25 «Ha7i gakkanaas ta inttes leemisora yootadis; hayssafe guye ta leemisora yootontta wodey yaana. Gido attiin Aawaa gishshas ta inttes ubbaa qonccisa yootana. 
John16:26 He wode intte ta sunththan woossana; tanikka, ‹Aawaa intte gishshas woossana› giikke." 
John16:27 Gaasoykka Aaway ba baggara inttena dosiza gishshassa; Aaway inttena dosizay intte tana dosiza gishshassinne tani Xoossa achchafe yidayssa intte ammanida gishshassa. 
John16:28 Tani Aawaa achchafe kezada hayssa ha alame yadissinne qasseka ha alameza aggada Aawaakko simma baana» gides. 
John16:29 Iza kaallizayti, «Hekko ne ha7i leemiso gidontta nuus qonccera yootadasa." 
John16:30 Ne wursa eriza malanne oonikka nena oychchanaas koshshonttayssa ha7i nu eridos; hessa gishshas ne Xoossa achchafe kezidayssa nu ammanoos» gida. 
John16:31 Yesusi isttas, «Intte ha7i ammanideta;" 
John16:32 gido attiin intte intte baggara baggara laalettidi tana xalla aggana wodey gakkides; he saateyakka ha7i gakkadus. Gido attiin Aaway tanara gidida gishshas ta tarkka diikke. 
John16:33 Ta hayssa inttes yootizay intte tanan de7iin inttes saroteththi daana mala gaada yootays. Intte ha alamen dishin inttes waayey dees; gido attiin aykkoy baa; ta alame xoonadis» gides. 
John17:1 Yesusi hessa gidaappe guye pude salo dhoqqu gi xeellidi, «Ta Aawawu! Hekko ha7i saatey gakkides; ne nay nena bonchchana mala neni ne naaza bonchcha." 
John17:2 Ne bonchchanaykka ne izas immidaytas izi mernaa de7o immana mala ne izas asa ubbaa bolla godateth immida gishshassa. 
John17:3 Mernaa de7oykka ne xalla tumu Xoossanne ne kiittida Yesus Kirstoosa ero guussa. 
John17:4 Ne taas immida ooso tani wursada ha biittaa bolla nena bonchchadis. 
John17:5 Ta Aawawu! Alamey medhettanaappe kase taas nenara diza bonchchon ha7ikka tana ne achchan bonchcharkkii! 
John17:6 «Hayssa alame asaappe ne taas doorada immida asatas ne oonakko ta isttas nena qonccisadis; istti kasekka neyta shin ne taas immadasa; isttika ne qaalaa naagida. 
John17:7 Ne taas immidayssi wurikka neeppe gididayssa istti ha7i erida. 
John17:8 Ne taas immida qaalatakka ta isttas immadis; isttika ekkida; ta ne achchafe yidayssa istti tumappe erida; ne tana kiittidayssaka istti ammanida. 
John17:9 «Ta isttas woossays; heyti ne taas immidayti istti neyta gidida gishshas ta isttas woossays; gido attiin hankko alame asaas woossike. 
John17:10 Taas gididay wurikka neyssa; neyssi wurikka tayssa; tanikka isttan bonchchettana. 
John17:11 Hayssafe guye tani hayssa alame bolla diikke; istti gidikko ha alameza bolla deettes; ha7i ta neekko bays; ta Aawa Geeshshazoo! Hayta ne taas immidayta istti nu mala ba giddon issino gidana mala ne taas immida ne sunththaan istta naaga. 
John17:12 Ta isttara issife dashe ne taas immida ne sunththaan ta istta naagadis; hessa gishshas kase xaafettida Geeshsha Maxaafaa qaalay polettana mala izi kasekka dhayos diza naazappe attiin isttafe oonikka dhaybeenna. 
John17:13 Ta qasse ha7i neekko bays; ta ha alameza bolla dashe hayssa yootizay ta ufayssi isttan polettana mala gaada yootays. 
John17:14 Tani ne qaalaa isttas immadis; tani hayssa alameza as gidonttayssa mala isttika ha alame as gidettenna; hessa gishshas ha alame asay istta ixxides. 
John17:15 Ne istta iitappe naagana mala ta nena woossays attiin ne istta ha alameppe denththa efana mala ta nena woossike. 
John17:16 Tani alame as gidonttayssa mala isttika ha alame as gidettenna. 
John17:17 Ne istta ne tuman nees shaakka; ne qaalaykka tumu qaala. 
John17:18 Ne tana ha alame kiittoyssaththo tanikka istta alame bolla kiittadis. 
John17:19 Istti tumappe nees dumma as gidida mala tanikka tana istta gishshas dummasays. 
John17:20 «Istta qaala markkateththan tana ammananayta gishshassara ta nena woossays attiin ta nena istta gishshas xalla woossike. 
John17:21 Ta woossizay istti wurikka issino gidana malassa. Ta Aawawu! Qasseka ne tanan diza mala isttika nunan gidana malanne ne tana kiittidayssa ha alamey ammanana mala ta nena woossays. 
John17:22 Nuni nu giddon issino gidida mala isttika ba giddon issino gidana mala ne taas immida bonchchoza tanikka isttas immadis. 
John17:23 Ta nena woossizay ta isttan; nekka tanan gidida mala isttika kumeth issino gidana malassa. Qasseka neni tana kiittida malanne tana ne siiqida mala isttaka ne siiqidayssa alame asay eranaassa. 
John17:24 «Ta Aawawu! Ne tana hayssi alamey medhettanaappe kase dosida gishshas ne taas immida ta bonchchoza istti beyana mala hayti ne taas immidaytikka ta dizason tanara daana mala dosays. 
John17:25 Xillo gidida ta Aawawu! Nena alamey eribeenna; ta gidikko nena erays; haytikka ne tana kiittidayssa erida. 
John17:26 Ne tana siiqida siiqoy isttan gidana malanne tanikka isttan gidana mala isttika nena erana mala ooththadis. Qasseka istti erana mala ta ooththana» gides. 
John18:1 Hessa ubbaa yootidaappe guye Yesusi bana kaallizaytara Qediroone geetettiza shoobba pinnidi atakilte giddo gelides. 
John18:2 Yesusinne iza kaallizayti kasekka he gadeyin daro wode issife shiiqiza gishshas Yesusa aaththi immida Yuhuday he gadeyo kasekka erees. 
John18:3 Hessa gishshas Yuhuday wottadarata, qeeseta halaqatanne Farsaawetappe kiitetti yida ashkarata wursi kaaleththi ekkidi hee istti shiiqizaso yides. Izara yida asay paanose, xomppe, mashshanne toora oykkidi yides." 
John18:4 Yesusi ba bolla gakkanayssa ubbaa eridi yida asaakko biidi, «Oona koyeetii?» gides." 
John18:5 Istti qasse, «Naazirete Yesusa koyoos» gida. Izikka isttas, «Tani izakko» gides. Isttas aaththi immida Yuhuday isttara issife eqqides." 
John18:6 Yesusi, «Tani izakko» gida mala asati guye gandigardi biitta bolla kundida." 
John18:7 Yesusi ha7ikka, «Oona koyeetii?» gi oychchiin istti zaaridi, «Naazirete Yesusa koyoos» gida." 
John18:8 Izikka zaaridi, «Tani izakko; histtiin intte koyzay tana gidikko hayti betto bochchofte» gides." 
John18:9 Hessi haniday, «Ta Aawawu! Ne taas immidaytappe issaadeka ta dhayssabeekke» gida qaalay polettana malassa." 
John18:10 Simoona geetettiza Phexroosi giththa mashsha oykkida gishshas mashshaa koohoppe shoddidi issi qeeseta halaqa ashkara dizayssa hayth mashshara qanxxi yeggides; he ashkaraza sunththi, «Malkoosa» geetettees." 
John18:11 Yesusi qasse Phexroosa, «Ne mashshaza koohon zaara gelththa. Aaway taas immida waaye ushshaa ta uyontta aggana misatizee?» gides." 
John18:12 Hessafe guye wottadarati, istta azazizayssinne Ayhudata ashkarati Yesusa oykkidi qachchida." 
John18:13 Koyro he layththan qeesetas halaqa Qayafa bollo Haannako efida. 
John18:14 Qayafay, «Dere gishshas issaadey hayqqiko lo7o» giidi Ayhudata daannata kase zoridaade." 
John18:15 Simoona geetettiza Phexroosinne Yesusa kaallizaytappe issaadey Yesusa kaallida; hessaadey qeeseta halaqa achchan keehi erettidaade. Hessa gishshas Yesusara issife qeeseta halaqaza gibbe gelides. 
John18:16 Phexroosi gidikko pengefe kare baggara eqqides; qeeseta halaqa achchan keehi erettidi Yesusa kaallizayssi yiidi pengen diza garadeya Phexroosa gibbe giddo gelththana mala yootidi Phexroosa ekki gelides. 
John18:17 Penge naagiza garadeya Phexroosa, «Nekka hessa addeza kaalliza asatappe issaa diikkii?» gadus; izi qasse, «Tani iza kaallizaade gidikke» gides." 
John18:18 Wodey meeggiza wode gidida gishshas oosanchchatinne ashkarati tama eeththidi eqqi ho7eettes. Phexroosikka isttara eqqidi ho7ees. 
John18:19 He wode qeeseta halaqay Yesusa iza kaallizayta gishshassinne izi tamaarsida timirte gishshas oychchides. 
John18:20 Yesusikka izas, «Ta asa ubbaas qonccen yootadis; Ayhudati shiiqiza istta Woosa Keeththan gidiinkka Xoossa Keeththan tamaarsadis; ta qotan haasaydaazi aykkoyka deenna." 
John18:21 Histtiin ne tana oychchizay aazee? Ta yootishin siyidayta oychcha; ta yootidayssa istti ereettes» gides. 
John18:22 Yesusi hessa gida mala heen eqqida ashkaratappe issoy, «Qeeseta halaqas hayssaththo wostta zaaray?» gishe Yesusa shagalan baqa shaayides." 
John18:23 Yesusikka zaaridi, «Ta iita haasaydaa gidikko ane ta goyssa ne markkatta; Ta yootiday likke gidikko tana aazas baqqay?» gides." 
John18:24 Hessafe guye Haannay Yesusa qachchida mala qeeseta halaqa Qayafakko yeddides. 
John18:25 He wode Simoona geetettiza Phexroosi eqqidi tama ho7ishin hankko asay iza, «Haysso! Ne Yesusa kaallizaytappe issaa diikkii?» gida. Izikka zaaridi, «Ta iza kaallizaade diikke» giidi kaddides." 
John18:26 Kase Phexroosi iza hayth qanxxidayssa dabboy qeeseta halaqa ashkaratappe issoy, «Wona ta nena atakilteson isttara dishin beyabeekkinaa?» gides." 
John18:27 Phexroosi qasseka kaddides; heerakka kuttoy waassides. 
John18:28 Hessafe guye Yesusa Qayafa keeththafe dere ayssiza kawoza gibbe mallado wonttara ekki bida. Ayhuda asas Paaziga ba7aale dorsa asho miza wode gidida gishshas bana tunisontta mala giidi malladora dere ayssizayssa gibbe giddo gelibeettenna. 
John18:29 Hessa gishshas Philaxoosi isttako kezidi, «Hayssa addeza intte aazas mooteetii?» giidi oychchides." 
John18:30 Istti qasse, «Hayssi addezi iita ooththonttaade gididaakko nu iza nees aaththi immokoshin» gida." 
John18:31 Philaxoosikka, «Intte iza ekki biidi intte wogaa mala pirdite» gides. Ayhudata ayssizayti qasse zaaridi, «Nuni as wodhana mala nuus piqaadey imettibeenna» gida." 
John18:32 Hessika haniday Yesusi kase isttas izi waani hayqqanaakko yootida qaalay polettana gishshassa. 
John18:33 Philaxoosi qasseka guye gibbe giddo gelidi Yesusa xeygisidi, «Ne Ayhudata kawoo?» giidi oychchides." 
John18:34 Yesusikka zaaridi, «Ne hessa gizay neeppeyee? Woykko hara asati ta gishshas nees yootidoo?» gides." 
John18:35 Philaxoosikka, «Ta Ayhuda asee? Nena taas aaththi immidayti ne baggatanne qeeseta halaqataakko; ne ay ooththadii?» gides." 
John18:36 Yesusikka, «Ta kawoteththi hayssa ha alame bolla gidenna. Ta kawoteththi hayssa ha alame bolla gididaakko Ayhudata daannata kushen ta kundontta mala ta ashkarati ta gishshas olettanakkoshin ta kawoteththi gidikko ha alame bolla gidenna» gides." 
John18:37 Philaxoosikka, «Histtiin ne kawoo?» gides; Yesusi qasse, «Tani ne gidayssa mala ee kawo; ta yelettidaynne ha biittaa yiday tumaa gishshas markkattanaassa; tumappe gididay wuri ta qaala siyees» gides." 
John18:38 Philaxoosikka, «Tumay aazee?» gides; hessafe guye Philaxoosi nam7anththo Ayhudatakko kezidi, «Ta iza bolla aykko balakka beyabeekke." 
John18:39 Gido attiin kasekka ta inttes Paaziga ba7aale gallas issi qasho as birshiza mala hayssa Ayhudata kawo inttes birshana mala koyeetii?» gides. 
John18:40 Istti gidikko, «Nuus Barbaane birsha attiin hayssa deenna!» giidi waassida; Barbaaney ba hu7es panga." 
John19:1 Hessafe guye Philaxoosi Yesusa efidi garafissides. 
John19:2 Wottadaratikka agunththa zawude xaaxidi Yesusa hu7en woththida; zo7o kaabbaka mayzida. 
John19:3 Izakko shiiqi shiiqidi, «Ayhuda kawo saro! saro!» gi giidi iza shagalan baqqida." 
John19:4 Philaxoosi qasseka kare kessidi, «Hekko ta iza bolla aykko moorokka demmonttayssa intte erana mala ta iza inttes haa kare kessana» gides." 
John19:5 Hessa gishshas Yesusi agunththa zawude hu7en woththi ekkidi zo7o kaabba may7idi kare kezides. Philaxoosikka isttas, «Hekko addezi hayssich!» gides." 
John19:6 Qeeseta halaqatinne istta ashkarati Yesusa be7idi, «Ne iza kaqqa! Kaqqa!» gishe waassida. Philaxoosi qasse, «Tani ta baggara iza bolla issi moorokka demmabeekke; koykko intte efidi kaqqite» gides." 
John19:7 Ayhuda asati qasse, «Nuus wogay dees; hayssi addezi bana Xoossa naa giza gishshas nu woga mala izas hayqoy bessees» gida." 
John19:8 Philaxoosi hessa istti gizayssa siyidi daro babbides. 
John19:9 Gede gibbe gelidi Yesusa, «Ne awappe yadii?» gi oychchides. Yesusi qasse izas ay zaarokka immibeenna." 
John19:10 Hessa gishshas Philaxoosi, «Ne taas yootikkii? Ta nena kaqqanaas woykko birsha yeddanaas godateththi taas dizayssa erkkii?» gides." 
John19:11 Yesusikka izas zaaridi, «Sheney nees Xoossafe imettonttaako nees ta bolla ay godateththika deennashin; gido attiin tana nees aaththi immidaade bolla gita nagaray dees» gides." 
John19:12 Philaxoosi hessa Yesusa haasaya siyidaappe guye iza birshi yeddana koyides shin Ayhudatas babbida gishshas istti, «Ne hayssa addeza birshiko Oroome Kawo Qeesaare bagga gidakka; gaasoykka bana barkka kawoththizaadey wuri Qeesaares morkke» gishe wurikka waassida." 
John19:13 Philaxoosi hessa siyida mala Yesusa kare kessidi, «Lochcha shuch» geetettizason pirda womboran uttides. He pirdasoy Ayhudata qaalara, «Gabata» geetettees." 
John19:14 He wode gadey asi Paaziga ba7aales giigettiza gallassa. Wodeykka gallassafe usuppun saate mala gidides; he wode Philaxoosi Ayhudata, «Hekko intte kawoy hayssich!» gides." 
John19:15 Gido attiin istti qasse, «Gede digga! Gede digga! Kaqqa!» gishe waassida. Philaxoosikka, «Ta intte kawo kaqqoo?» gides. Qeeseta halaqati zaaridi, «Nuus Qeesaareppe hara kawoy deenna» gida." 
John19:16 Hessafe simmidi Philaxoosi Yesusa kaqqana mala isttas aaththi immides. Isttika Yesusa oykki ekki efida. 
John19:17 Hessafe guye Yesusi ba kaqettana masqaleza tookkidi, «Asa hu7e guugge» geetettizaso kezides. He sohoy Ayhudata qaalara, «Golgota» geetettees." 
John19:18 Iza heen kaqqida. Yesusa giddo gelththidi hara nam7u asata izaththo hadirsaranne ushachchara kaqqida. 
John19:19 Philaxoosi, «Naazirete Yesusi Ayhudata kawo» giza qaala xaafidi iza masqale bolla izas hu7esora qaaphides." 
John19:20 Yesusi kaqettidasoy katamaas mata gidida gishshas daro Ayhuda asay Philaxoosi xaafidayssa nababides; xaafettidayssika Ayhudata qaalara, Laatine qaalaranne Girike qaalara." 
John19:21 Ayhudata qeeseta halaqati Philaxoosa, «Ne iza Ayhudata kawo» gaada xaafoppa. Gido attiin, « ‹Hayssi addezi bana ta Ayhudata kawo› gides gaada xaafa» gida." 
John19:22 Philaxoosi qasse, «Ta xaafidayssa xaafadis» gides." 
John19:23 Wottadarati Yesusa kaqqidaappe guye iza may7oza ekkidi wottadarata issaa issaa gakkana mala oyddu kessi shaakereththida. Garsara may7iza may7ozakka hessaththo shaakereththida. Gido attiin garsara may7iza may7ozi sikettontta pudeppe duge gakkanaas coo yeda dees. 
John19:24 Hessa gishshas wottadarati ba giddon, «Gishan oona gakkanaakko erana mala iza bolla saama yeggana attiin daakkoko» gida; hessika haniday kase, «Ta may7o istti gishetti ekkida; tani bollara may7iza may7oza bolla saama yeggida» geetettida Geeshsha maxaafa qaalay polettana malassa. Wottadaratikka hessa ooththida." 
John19:25 Yesusa masqale achchan iza aayeyanne aayey michcheya Qaliyopha machcha Maaramanne Magdale geetettizasoppe yida Maarama heen eqqida. 
John19:26 Yesusi ba aayeyonne izi siiqiza iza kaallizayssi ba achchan eqqidayta be7idi ba aayeyo, «Aayee! Ne naaza hessa beya» gides." 
John19:27 Hessafe kaaleththidi bana kaallizayssa, «Ne aayo hinno beya» gides. Hinno he saateyppe simmiin iza kaallizayssi aayeyo baso efides." 
John19:28 Hessafe guye Yesusi ha7i wurikka polettidayssa eridi Geeshsha Maxaafan xaafettidayssi polettana mala, «Tana saamees» gides." 
John19:29 Heen caala phanqida ushshi kumi uttida issi xaaro malay dees. Hessa gishshas heen dizayti he caala ushshaa zandza misatiza safinege geetettizayssara hisophphe geetettiza miththa xeeran qaaphidi iza doonaakko shiishshida. 
John19:30 Yesusi he caala ushshaa xunxi xeellidi, «Polettides!» gides. Ba hu7e duge ziqqisidi shemppo kezides." 
John19:31 Hessafe guye Ayhudata daannati kaqettida asata meqeth wodirappe menththidi istti iza masqale bollafe woththana mala Philaxoosa woossida. Istti hessa ooththiday Ayhudati sambatas giigettiza gallas gidida gishshassinne he sambataykka daro gita ba7aale gidida gishshas Sambata gallas ahay masqale bolla gam7ontta mala koyida gishshassa. 
John19:32 Hessa gishshas wottadarati biidi Yesusara kaqettida asata meqeth wodirappe wodirappe menththida. 
John19:33 Istti Yesusaakko biin izi kaseti hayqqidayssa be7idi iza wodira meqeth menththibeettenna. 
John19:34 Gido attiin wottadarata giddofe issaadey toorara iza millen caddiin heerakka suuththinne haaththi gukkides. 
John19:35 Hessa be7idaadey intte izan ammanana mala markkattides; iza markkateththika tuma. Izi yootizaykka tumu gididayssa izi erees. 
John19:36 Hessika haniday, «Iza meqeththafe issinakka meqquku» geetettida Geeshsha maxaafa qaalay polettanaassa." 
John19:37 Qasseka Geeshsha Maxaafan harason, «Istti bana caddidaade beyana» gees." 
John19:38 Ayhudata daannata babbidi qotan Yesusa kaalliza Armatiyase geetettizasoppe yida Yooseefey Yesusa aha ekkanaas Philaxoosa woossiin Philaxoosikka izas ero gides. Hessa gishshas Yooseefey biidi Yesusa aha ekkides. 
John19:39 Kase Yesusaakko qamara yida Niqodimoosikka bagga kilo gidiza karbbenne godare uuththara walakettida shitto ekki yides. 
John19:40 He nam7u asati Yesusa ahaza ekkidi Ayhudati ahaa xaaxiza mala shitto puukkidi lee7e may7ora xaaxida. 
John19:41 Yesusi kaqettidasohon issi atakiltesoy dees. He atakiltezason oonikka moogettontta ooraththa duufoy dees. 
John19:42 Ayhudata sambatas giigettiza gallas gidida gishshassinne duufoykka matan diza gishshas Yesusa aha heen moogida. 
John20:1 Wogga gallas wontta mallado buro bazzoy zo7ishin Magdale Maarama Yesusa duufokko badus. Iza he gakkishin kase Yesusa duufo izara gordida shuchchay duufoza doonappe dendidi genderidayssa beyadus. 
John20:2 Hessa gishshas iza Yesusa kaallizaytappe Simoona geetettiza Phexroosakko Yesusi dosiza hankko iza kaallizayssako woxxa baada, «Godaa duufoppe kessi ekkidi awan woththidaakko nu erokko» gadus." 
John20:3 Heerakka Phexroosinne Yesusa kaallizaytappe issoy kezidi duufoy dizaso bida. 
John20:4 Nam7ayka issife woxxida; gido attiin Yesusa kaalliza hinkoyssi Phexroosappe pilati woxxidi kaseti duufoy dizaso gakkides. 
John20:5 Duufoza hokki xeellidi ahay izan xaaxettida may7oy xalla dizayssa be7ides; gido attiin gede duufoza giddo gelibeenna. 
John20:6 Simoona geetettiza Phexroosikka iza kaalli gakkidi duufoza giddo gelides; ahay izan xaaxettida carqqay heen dizayssa be7ides. 
John20:7 Yesusa hu7ey xaaxettida carqqay hankko xaaththa carqqatara gidontta dumma harason xaaxetti dizayssa be7ides. 
John20:8 Koyrotti gakkida Yesusa kaallizayssika duufoza giddo geli be7idi ammanides. 
John20:9 Gaasoykka, «Izi hayqoppe dendana bessees» giza maxaafa qaalaa istti buro hassa7ibeettenna." 
John20:10 Hessafe guye nam7atikka simmidi baso baso bida. 
John20:11 Magdale Maarama yeekkashe Yesusa duufoppe karera eqqada hokka duufoza giddo xeelladus. 
John20:12 Yesusa ahay dizason booththa may7o may7ida nam7u kiitanchchatappe issoy hu7eson issoy tohoson uttidayta beyadus. 
John20:13 Isttika Maaramo, «Hanne maccassayee! Aazas yeekkay?» gida. Izakka, «Istti ta Godaa efidi awan woththidaakko ta erikke» gadus." 
John20:14 Iza hinno gaada guye yuuyishin Yesusi eqqidayssa demmadus shin izi Yesusa gididayssa erabeekku. 
John20:15 Yesusi izo, «Hanne maccassayee! Aazas yeekkay? Qasse oona koyay?» gides; izikka izis atakilte naagizaade misatiin, «Godoo! Ne ekkidaa gidikko ne woththidaso taas yootarkkii! Ta iza taas ekkana» gadus." 
John20:16 Yesusi izo, «Maaramee!» gides; izakka gede izakko simmada Ayhudata qaalara, «Erebuune!» gadus; hessa birsheththi, «Astamaaree!» guussa." 
John20:17 Yesusi qasse, «Ta buro pude ta Aawaakko kezabeekke; tana bochchofa; gido attiin ne ha7i ta ishataakko baada, ‹Tani ta Aawakkonne intte Aawaakko, ta Xoossaakonne intte Xoossaako kezana gides› gaada isttas yoota» gides." 
John20:18 Hessa gishshas Magdale Maarama Yesusa kaallizaytakko baada iza Yesusa be7idayssanne izi izis yootidayssa isttas yootadus. 
John20:19 He gallas wogga omars Yesusa kaallizayti Ayhudata daannatas babbidi kare ba bolla gordidi keeththaa giddon shiiqon dishin karey doyettontta Yesusi iza kaallizayti shiiqi diza keeththaa gelides; istta giddon eqqidi, «Saroy inttes gido!» gides." 
John20:20 Hessa gi simmidi ba kushetanne ba mille istta bessides; iza kaallizaytikka Godaa be7idi keehi ufayettida. 
John20:21 Hessafe guye qasseka Yesusi istta, «Inttes saroy gido! Ta Aaway tana kiittida mala tanikka inttena kiittays» gides." 
John20:22 Hessa gi simmidi istta bolla ufu giidi, «Intte Xillo Ayana ekkite." 
John20:23 Intte asa nagara atto giikko isttas atto geetettana; intte asa nagara atto gontta ixxiko qasse isttas atto geetettenna» gides. 
John20:24 Yesusi bana kaallizaytakko yida wode tammanne nam7atappe issoy Didimoosa geetettiza Toomaasi isttara deenna. 
John20:25 Hessa gishshas hankko Yesusa kaallizayti Toomaasas, «Nuni Godaa be7idos» gida. Toomaasi qasse, «Misimaaren cadettida iza kusheta tani ta ayfera be7ontta dashe, qasseka ta biradhdhe misimaarey gelidason gelththa xeellontta dashenne ta kushe iza mille madunththaan gelththa xeellontta dashe ammanikke» gides." 
John20:26 Osppun gallassafe guye iza kaallizayti qasseka istti soon dishin, Toomaasikka isttara issife dishin; kareykka gordan dishin Yesusi yiidi istta giddon eqqidi, «Saroy inttes gido!» gides." 
John20:27 Hessafe guye Toomaasa, «Ne biradhdhe haa ehada ta kusheta beya. Ne kushe haa ehada ta millen gelththa ammana attiin ammanonttaade gidoppa» gides." 
John20:28 Toomaasi, «Ta Godoo! Ta Xoossoo!» gides." 
John20:29 Yesusikka Toomaasa, «Neni tana be7ida gishshas ammanadasa; tana be7ontta ammanizayti gidikko istti anjjettidayta» gides." 
John20:30 Hayssa maxaafaan xaafettontta daro malaatata bana kaallizayta sinththan Yesusi ooththides. 
John20:31 Gido attiin Yesusi izi Masihe, Xoossa naa gididayssa intte erana malanne intte iza sunththan ammanidi de7o demmana mala hayssi xaafettides." 
John21:1 Hessafe guye Yesusi Xibiraadoose Abba achchan bana kaallizaytas qasseka beettides. 
John21:2 Simoona geetettiza Phexroosi, Didimoosa geetettiza Toomaasi, Galila Qaana as Natina7eeley, Zabdoosa naytikka Yesusa kaallizaytappe hara nam7atikka wuri issife dishin" 
John21:3 Simoona geetettiza Phexroosi isttas, «Tani mole oykkana bays» gides; isttika izas, «Nunikka nenara baana» gida. Izara kezi biidi wogolon gelida shin he gallassa omars issi molekka oykkibeettenna." 
John21:4 Gadey wontishin Yesusi abba achchan eqqides; iza kaallizayti qasse izi Yesusa gididayssa eribeettenna. 
John21:5 Yesusi istta, «Naytoo moley dizee?» gides; isttika, «Aykkoyka baa» gida." 
John21:6 Izikka, «Giteza wogolozappe ushachcha baggara abban yeggite; intte demmana» gida gishshas giteza abbaa giddo yeggiin daro moley oykettida gishshas giteza molezara goochchana dandaybeettenna." 
John21:7 He wode Yesusa kaallizaytappe izi siiqiza issoy Phexroosas, «Hessi Godaakko!» gides. Simoona geetettiza Phexroosi, «Hessi Godaakko!» giza qaala siyida mala ooso diggofo giidi may7o qaari woththidi kallo diza gishshas heerakka may7o ekki may7idi abbaza giddo guppi gelides." 
John21:8 Yesusa kaalliza hankkoyti qasse biittafe xeetu metire mala haakki diza gishshas moley kumi diza giteza goochchi ekkidi wogolora gakkida. 
John21:9 Istti wogolozappe wodhdhishin moley iza bolla diza bonqo tamanne uketh be7ida. 
John21:10 Yesusi istta, «Ha7i intte oykkida molezappe ane haa ekki yiite» gides." 
John21:11 Hessa gishshas Simoona geetettiza Phexroosi wogoloza giddo gelidi 153 wogga gita moleti kumida giteza abbafe gede gade bolla goochchides; hessa mala daro molera diinka gitezi daakettibeenna. 
John21:12 Hessafe guye Yesusi istta, «Haa yiidi miite» gides. Izi Godaa Yesusa gididayssa wuri erida gishshas iza kaallizaytappe issaadeyka, «Ne oonee?» gi oychchanaas xalidaadey baa." 
John21:13 Yesusi yiidi ukeththaanne moleza ekkidi isttas immides. 
John21:14 Yesusi hayqoppe dendiin iza kaallizayti iza beyishin hayssi heedzdzanththo. 
John21:15 Istti mi giigshin Yesusi Simoona Phexroosa, «Yoona naa Simoonaa! Haytanttafe ne tana aaththa dosay?» gides. Izikka, «Ee ta Godoo! Ta nena dosizayssa nekka eraasa» gides." 
John21:16 Yesusi iza, «Dhammizayta tayta heemma» gides; nam7anththoka, «Yoona naa Simoonaa! Ne tana dosay?» gides; izikka zaaridi, «Ee Godoo! Ta nena dosizayssa nekka eraasa» gides; Yesusi qasseka, «Ta laaqqata naaga» gides." 
John21:17 Heedzdzanththo, «Yoona naa Simoonaa! Ne tana dosay?» gides. Izi heedzdzanththo, «Ne tana dosay?» gida gishshas Phexroosi mishettidi, «Godoo! Ne ubbaa eraasa; ta nena dosizayssaka ne eraasa» gides; Yesusikka qasseka, «Ta dorsata heemma." 
John21:18 Ta nees tumu gays; ne naateththan dashe ne giththe nerkka gixxada ne koyidaso baasashin ne cimmiza wode gidikko neni ne kusheta piddisiin hara asi nena gixisananne ne dosonttaso nena efana» gides. 
John21:19 Yesusi iza hessaththo giday Phexroosi ay mala hayqon Xoos bonchchanaakko izas erisanaassa; hessafe guye Phexroosa, «Ne tana kaalla» gides." 
John21:20 Phexroosi yuushshi xeellidi Yesusi dosizayssi iza kaallishin be7ides; hessaadey kase istti kawo mishin Yesusa hayththako shiiqidi, «Godoo! Nena aaththi immanaadey izi oonee?» gi oychchides." 
John21:21 Phexroosi iza be7idi, «Godoo! Hayssaadey waanandee?» giidi Yesusa oychchides." 
John21:22 Yesusikka izas, «Ta haa simma yaana gakkanawu ta iza paxa woththiko nena aazi gaththidee? Ne tana kaalla» gides." 
John21:23 Hessa gaason ishata giddon, «Izi hayqo hayqqenna» giza worey laalettides. Gido attiin Yesusi, «Ta yaana gakkanaas paxa daana mala ta koykko nena aazee gaththiday?» gides attiin, «Hayqqaka» gibeenna." 
John21:24 He yo7ota gishshas markkattidaynne xaafiday ha Yesusa kaallizayssa; iza markkateththika tumu gididayssa nuni eroos. 
John21:25 Yesusi ooththida hara daroti deettes; taas misatiza mala izi ooththida miishshata ubbaa issi bolla xaafizaakko xaafettida maxaafata hayssi alamey tookkana dandayenna. 
Acts1:1 Tofiloosaa! Yesusi ooththanaassinne tamaarsanaas oykkidayssa wursa ta nees koyro maxaafaan xaafadis. 
Acts1:2 Hessika izi pude denththa gallas gakkanaas ba doori kiittidaytas Xillo Ayana baggara izi isttas immida azazokko. 
Acts1:3 Izi daro waaye be7idaappe guye isttako shiiqidi hayqoppe dendanayssa isttas daro markkara qonccisishe oyddu tammu gallas gakkanaas isttas gallas gallas beettishe Xoossa Kawoteththa gishshas yootides. 
Acts1:4 Isttara issife maaddan utti dishe istta, «Yerusalaameppe kezopite; gido attiin ta inttes yootishin intte siyidayssa ta Aaway immida ufayssaa naagite." 
Acts1:5 Yohannisi haaththan xammaqides; intte gidikko guuththa wodeppe guye Xillo Ayanan xammaqettana» giidi yootides. 
Acts1:6 Isttika issi bolla shiiqetti dishe, «Godoo! Ne Isra7eeleta kawoteth zaarada ha7i essanee?» gi oychchida." 
Acts1:7 Izikka isttas, «Aaway ba shenen woththida wode eroy inttes imettibeenna." 
Acts1:8 Gido attiin Xillo Ayanay intte bolla wodhdhida wode intte wolqqa ekkana. Yerusalaamenkka, Yuhudankka, Samaariyankka ubbason biitta gaxa gakkanaas intte taas markkatta gidana» gides." 
Acts1:9 Hessa gi yootidaappe guye istti xeellishin pude salo dendides; shaaraykka istta ayfeppe iza genththides. 
Acts1:10 Izi bishin istti iza tishshi histti pude salo xeellishin booththa may7o may7ida nam7u asati qoppontta istta achchan eqqidi," 
Acts1:11 «Intteno Galila asatoo! Intte pude salo xeellishe hayssan aazas eqqidetii? Hayssi intte matappe pude salo dendishin intte be7iza Yesusi salo kezishin intte be7ida mala hessaththoka izi haa simmi yaana» gida. 
Acts1:12 Hessafe guye Dabrazayte geetettiza zuma bollafe wodhdhidi Yerusalaame simmida. He zumaykka Yerusalaameppe issi kilo metire mala haakkees. 
Acts1:13 Gede katamayo gelidi kase ba diza keeththaa pooqe bolla kezida; heytikka Phexroosa, Yohannisa, Yaaqoobe, Indiraasa, Piliphoosa, Toomaasa, Bartelemoosa, Matoosa, Ilfiyoosa naa Yaaqoobe, ba baggas mishettiza Simoonanne Yaaqoobe naa Yuhuda." 
Acts1:14 Heyti wurikka maccassatappe Yesusa aayo Maaramira hessaththoka iza ishatara issi wozinan issi bolla qanxxontta minni woossida. 
Acts1:15 He gallassatan Phexroosi xeetanne nam7u tammu ammaniza asaa giddon eqqidi," 
Acts1:16 «Ta ishatoo! Yesusa oykkida asata kaaleththi ehida Yuhuda gishshas Xillo Ayanay kasetidi Dawite doonan haasayda Geeshsha maxaafa qaalay polettana koshshees. 
Acts1:17 Izikka nuuppe issaade mala taybettidi hayssa ha oosozan gelanaas qaada demmides» gides. 
Acts1:18 Gidikkoka hayssaadey ba iita ooson demmida miishshan gade shammides; heenkka ba liiphen gufanni kundiin iza asateththay giddofe phalqetti wodhdhides; iza maracey biitta bolla zaazettides. 
Acts1:19 Hessika Yerusalaamen diza asaa ubbaas siyettides; biittayka istta qaalara, «Akeldaama» geetettides; hessas birsheththayka suuththa biitta guussa." 
Acts1:20 Gujjidikka Phexroosi, «Yeththa maxaafan, ‹Iza gadey mela atto; izan ay asikka dooppo; qasseka iza daannateth hara asi ekko› geetetti xaafettides." 
Acts1:21 «Hessa gishshas Godaa Yesusi nunara diza wode ubbaan nunara issife dizayta giddofe nu issaade dooranaas koshshees.
