Acts1:22 Hessika Yohannisa xinqatappe haa simmiin Yesusi nuuppe shaaketti dendi baana gakkanaas nunara dizaade gidanaas bessees; gaasoykka ha asatappe issaadey nunara Yesusa denththaas markka gidana koshshees» gides. 
Acts1:23 Hessa gishshas Barsabaasa woykko Yosxoosa geetettiza Yooseefenne Maatiyaasa nam7ata shiishshidi," 
Acts1:24 «Godoo! Neni asa ubbaa wozina eraasa; hayta nam7ata giddofe ne oona dooridaakko izaade nuna bessa. 
Acts1:25 Yuhuday yeggi bidason ha oosaa ooththanaadenne Hawaare gidanaade ne doora» gi woossida. 
Acts1:26 Hessafe saama yeggiin saamay Maatiyaasas kezides; izikka tammanne issi Hawaaretara issife taybettides. 
Acts2:1 Phenxeqoste geetettiza ba7aale gallassi gakkida wode asay wurikka issi soon shiiqi dishin," 
Acts2:2 qofay baynda daro mino gote carko mala giirissi yides; asay diza keeththaaka kumides. 
Acts2:3 Tama laco misatiza qaalay asaas beettidi shaaketti shaaketti issaa issaa bolla uttides. 
Acts2:4 Ammanizayti wuri Xillo Ayanan kumidi Ayanay isttas haasayanaas immidayssa keena hara qaalara haasaya oykkida. 
Acts2:5 He wode salo gufanththon diza dereppe yida Xoossas babbiza Ayhudati Yerusalaamen deettes. 
Acts2:6 He giirissaa siyidi derey shiiqides; issoy issoy ba qaalara haasayzayssa siyidi malalettida. 
Acts2:7 Malalettidi gaanaazi dhayiin, «Hayti haasayzayti wurikka Galila as deettennee?" 
Acts2:8 Histtiin nuni nu yelettida nu dere qaalara istti haasayshin wostti siyizonii? 
Acts2:9 Nuni Phartaane asay, Meede asay, Eelaame asay, Mesphexoomiyan, Yuhudan, Qophodooqiyan, Phanxoosan, Iisiyan," 
Acts2:10 Pirgiyan, Phinfiliyan, Gibxen, Qareena achchan diza Liibiyappenne Oroomeppe yidayti" 
Acts2:11 Ayhudatinne gede Ayhudateththan gelida Qarxeese asaanne Arabe asata gidishin wolqqama ooso Xoossayssa hayti nu qaalara haasayshin nu siyoos» gida. 
Acts2:12 Wurikka keehi malalettidinne gaanaazi dhayiin ba giddon, «Hayssi aazeeshaa?» geetettida." 
Acts2:13 Bagga asay, «Hayti daro woyne cajje uyida» giidi istta qidhida." 
Acts2:14 He wode Phexroosi tammanne issinetara eqqidi ba qaala dhoqqu histtidi deraas, «Intteno Yuhuda asatoo! Yerusalaamen dizaytoo! Intte wurikka hayssa issi miish eritenne ta gizayssa siyite." 
Acts2:15 Ha7i gadey wontiin buro heedzdzu saate gidida gishshas intte qoppiza mala hayti asati maththottibeettenna. 
Acts2:16 Gido attiin hayssi kase nabe Iyu7eelen hizgi yootettida qaalay polettanaassa," 
Acts2:17 « ‹Xoossi Wurseththa gallas ta Ayana asho may7ida ubbaa bolla tani gussana; intte macca naytinne intte attuma nayti tinbite haasayana; yelaga nayti ajjuuta beyana; cimati agumo agumettana. 
Acts2:18 He wode ta macca ashkarata bollanne ta attuma ashkarata bolla ta Ayanappe ta gussana. Isttika tinbite haasayana. 
Acts2:19 Bolla Salon malalisiza hanota ta bessana, garsa sa7an malaatata ta bessana; suuththi, tamaynne tulalay hanana." 
Acts2:20 Gitanne bonchcho gidida Godaa gallassi yaanaappe kasetidi arshey dhumana; aginaykka suuth misatana. 
Acts2:21 Godaa sunth xeygizay wuri attana› gides. 
Acts2:22 «Isra7eele naytoo! Hayssa qaala siyite; intte intte baggara erizayssa mala intte giddon malatanne asi siyi erontta miishshata iza kushen ooththidi Xoossi Naazirete Yesusas markkattides. 
Acts2:23 Xoossi kase ba qachchidayssa izas beni erateththaa mala hayssaade intte kushen aaththi immides. Intteka iita asata kushen kaqetti hayqqana mala ooththideta. 
Acts2:24 Gido attiin Xoossi iza bollafe hayqo wolqqa diggidi hayqoppe denththides; hayqoykka iza oykki ashshanaas dandaybeenna. 
Acts2:25 Dawitikka iza gishshas, « ‹Tani Godaa ubba wode ta sinththan beyays; izi ta ushachchan dees; mulekka hirgike." 
Acts2:26 Hessa gishshas ta wozinay ufayettees; ta doonaykka galatees; ta ashoy ufayssan daana. 
Acts2:27 Ne ta shemppoyo duufon aggaka; ne naa geeshshaza wooqqana mala aggaagakka. 
Acts2:28 Ne de7o oge ta erana mala ooththadasa. Ne tanara diza gishshas ta ufayssay kumeththa.› 
Acts2:29 «Ta ishatoo! Beni aawatappe Dawiti hayqqi moogettidayssanne iza duufoy hach gakkanaas nu achchan dizayssa babbontta ta inttes yootana dandayays. 
Acts2:30 Izi nabe gidida gishshas Xoossi iza zereththafe issaade iza kawoteththa alga bolla woththanayssa kase caaqo qaalaan yootidayssa erides. 
Acts2:31 Hessa kasetidi erida gishshassinne iza ashoy wooqqi duufon attontta doorettida Kirstoosa denththa gishshas haasaydes. 
Acts2:32 He Yesusa Xoossi hayqoppe denththides; nunikka wuri hayssas markkatta. 
Acts2:33 Hessa gishshas izi Xoossa ushachchan dhoqqu dhoqqu gidaappe guye Xillo Ayana ufayssaa ba aawappe ekkidi ha7i intte be7izayssanne siyizayssa duge gussides. 
Acts2:34 Dawiti pude salo kezibeenna; izi ba doonan, «Goday ta Godaas, ‹Ta ne morkketa ne toho garsan yedhisana gakkanaas ta ushachchan utta› gides." 
Acts2:35  
Acts2:36 «Hessa gishshas Xoossi intte kaqqida Yesusa Godaanne Kirstoosa histtidayssa Isra7eele asay wuri lo7eththi ero» gides. 
Acts2:37 Derey hessa siyida mala wozinay boshettides; Phexroosanne hankko Yesusi kiittidayta, «Histtiin nu ishatoo! Nu ay ooththinoo?» gida." 
Acts2:38 Phexroosikka, «Maaroteththan gelite; intte nagaray maarettana mala inttefe issi issi asi Yesus Kirstoosa sunththan xammaqettite; izi immiza Xillo Ayana intte ekkana." 
Acts2:39 Ufayssa qaalay inttessinne intte naytassa; qasseka Godaa Xoossi baakko xeygiza haahon dizaytassara ubbaassa» gides. 
Acts2:40 Hara daro qaalara isttas markkattishe, «Hayssa geella yeletaappe inttena ashshite» giidi istta qofsides." 
Acts2:41 He gallas qaalaa ekkidaytinne xammaqettidayti heedzdzu shii mala asay kaseyta bolla gujettides. 
Acts2:42 Isttika Hawaareta timirten, issife quma muussaninne woosan minnida." 
Acts2:43 Hawaareta kushen daro malaatati oosettida gishshas asi ubbay isttas babbides. 
Acts2:44 Ammanidayti wurikka issife de7ida; baas dizaazikka ubbaa issi bolla go7ettida. 
Acts2:45 Baas diza miishshenne mehe bayzi bayzi ba giddon koshshida mala gishechchida. 
Acts2:46 Gallas gallas Xoossa Keeththan issife shiiqeettes; ba keeththankka quma issife ufayssaninne suure wozinan issifeteththan meettes. 
Acts2:47 Istti Xoossaa galatishe dere sinththan bonchchettida. Godaykka istta bolla gallas gallas oorath ammanizayta gujjides. 
Acts3:1 Issi wode gallassafe uddufun saate bolla Phexroosinne Yohannisi woosa saaten Xoossa Keeththe baana kezida. 
Acts3:2 Issi yelettoosoppe doommidi tohoy silidaade Xoossa Keeththe geliza asappe miishshe woossana mala asay gallas gallas tookki efidi woththiin, «Lo7o» geetettiza Xoossa Keeththa pengen woossizaadey dees." 
Acts3:3 Izikka Phexroosinne Yohannisi Xoossa Keeththe gelishin be7idi isttafe miishshe woossides. 
Acts3:4 Phexroosinne Yohannisi iza tishshi histti xeellida. Phexroosikka iza, «Ane haa nuna xeella» gides." 
Acts3:5 Addezikka isttafe aykko demmana giidi istta tishshi histti xeellides. 
Acts3:6 Gido attiin Phexroosi izas zaaridi, «Taas biraynne worqqay deenna; gidikkoka taas dizaaz ta nees immays; Naazirete Yesus Kirstoosa sunththan dendada ne tohora hemetta» gides." 
Acts3:7 Izas ushachcha kushe oykkidi denththides. Heerakka addeza tohoynne toho qirphey minnides. 
Acts3:8 Guppi dendi eqqidi hemeth oykkides. Yaanne haa hemettishenne guppishe Xoossaka galatishe isttara issife Xoossa Keeththa gibbe gelides. 
Acts3:9 Izi Xoossa galatishe yaanne haa simerettishin asay be7ides. 
Acts3:10 Hayssaadey hayssafe kase, «Lo7o» geetettiza Xoossa Keeththa pengen uttidi miishshe woossizay iza gididayssa erides. Iza bolla hanidayssafe dendidayssan asay keehi malalettides." 
Acts3:11 Ha paxida woosanchchay Phexroosakkonne Yohannisakko shiphphi giidi isttara oyketti dishin derey wuri malalettidi isttako, «Solomoone simereteththaso» geetettizaso woththan yides." 
Acts3:12 Phexroosi he asaa be7idi, «Intteno Isra7eele deretoo! Hayssan aazas malaletteetii? Qasseka hayssa addeza nuni nu wolqqan woykko nuni nu xilloteththan paththidi hemettissida mala qoodidi nuna aazas tishshi histti xeelleetii?" 
Acts3:13 Nu aawantta Abrahaamentta, Yisaaqantta, Yaaqoobentta Xoossi ba naaza Yesusa bonchchides. Intte qasse iza hayqos aaththi immideta; Philaxoosi iza birshana koyiinkka intte, ‹Koyokko› gideta." 
Acts3:14 Geeshshanne xilloza intte kaddidi shempo wodhizayssi birshettana mala woossideta. 
Acts3:15 De7o immizaade intte wodhideta; gido attiin Xoossi iza hayqoppe denththides; hessas nuni markka. 
Acts3:16 Hayssi intte be7izayssinne intte erizayssi minni eqqiday Yesusa sunththan ammanida gishshassa; intte wurikka be7iza mala izi kumeththa paxateth demmiday Yesusa sunththaninne iza sunththan beettiza ammanonna. 
Acts3:17 «Ha7ikka ta ishatoo! Intte hessa ooththiday intte halaqata mala erontta gididayssa ta erays. 
Acts3:18 Gidikkoka Kirstoosi waaye ekkanayssa Xoossi kase nabeta doonan haasaydayssa polides. 
Acts3:19 Hessa gishshas intte nagaray qucetti dhayana mala maaroteththan gelite; intte biza ogeppe simmite; Godaa matappe intte ooraxana wodey inttes yaana. 
Acts3:20 Qasseka Xoossi kase inttes doori woththida Yesus Kirstoosa izi inttes yeddana. 
Acts3:21 Xoossi kase geeshsha nabeta doonan haasaydayssa mala hanizayssa ubbaa ooraxissana wodey gakkanaas izi salon gam7anaas koshshees. 
Acts3:22 Museykka, ‹Intte Godaa Xoossay intte giddofe ta mala nabe inttes denththana. Izi inttes yootizayssa siyite." 
Acts3:23 He nabeza siyontta ixxida shemppoy wuri dere giddofe shaaketti dhayo.› 
Acts3:24 «Tumappe Sameelappe haa simmiin dendida nabeti wuri hayta wodeta gishshas haasayda. 
Acts3:25 Intteka nabeta nayta; qasseka Xoossi Abrahaames, ‹Ne zereththan biitta bolla diza asi wuri anjjettana› giidi izi caaqqida caaqoza intte laattana." 
Acts3:26 Xoossi naaza denththida wode inttena issaa issaa intte iitateththaafe zaaridi anjjana mala kasetidi intteko kiittides» gides. 
Acts4:1 Phexroosinne Yohannisi asaas haasayan dishin qeeseta Halaqatinne Xoossa Keeththaa naagizayta halaqay qasseka Saduqaaweti isttako yida. 
Acts4:2 Histtidi Hawaareti asaa tamaarsizayssassinne Yesusa baggara beettida hayqqidayta denththaa gishshas sabbakizayssas keehi hanqettida. 
Acts4:3 Phexroosanne Yohannisa gadey qammishin oykkidi wonttana gakkanaas qasho keeththan ayssida. 
Acts4:4 Gido attiin qaalaa siyida asaappe dariza baggay ammanides; ammanida attuma asaa qooday gede ichchashu shii gakkanaas dhoqqu gides. 
Acts4:5 Wonteththa gallas istta halaqatinne cimati qasseka Muse wogaa tamaarsizayti Yerusalaamen shiiqida. 
Acts4:6 Istta qeeseta halaqa Haannaynne Qayafay, Yohannisi, Iskindiroosinne qeeseta halaqaso asay wuri heen beettida." 
Acts4:7 Isttika Phexroosanne Yohannisa ba giddon aaththi essidi, «Hayssa intte ooththizay aaza wolqqanee? Woykko oona sunththanee?» giidi oychchida." 
Acts4:8 He wode Phexroosi Xillo Ayanan kumidi, «Intteno dere halaqatoo! Dere cimatoo!" 
Acts4:9 Intte hach ha toho sila addezas oosettida lo7o oosoy waani izi paxidaakko intte nuna oychchizaa gidikko," 
Acts4:10 intte kaqqiin Xoossi hayqoppe denththida Naazirete Yesus Kirstoosa sunththan izi paxidayssanne intte sinththan izi eqqidayssa intteka Isra7eele dere asay wuri hayssa erite. 
Acts4:11 Izikka intte keeththa hiillati leqqi aggida shuchchay gimbe keeththas gula bolla bollara woththiza shuch gidides. 
Acts4:12 Atoteththi hara oonankka baa; saloppe garsa baggara nu asa nayti attana mala nuus imettiday hayssafe hara sunththi deenna» gides. 
Acts4:13 Ayhudata duulata asaykka Phexroosinne Yohannisi hessaththo xali haasayzayssa be7idi istti tamaarontta as gididayssa eridi malalettidanne istti kase Yesusara dizayta gididayssa akeekida. 
Acts4:14 He paxida addezi isttara eqqi dishin be7ida gishshas isttas hara ooththanaas gaasoykka dhaydes. 
Acts4:15 Hessa gishshas istta duulataappe kessana mala azazida. Hessafe qasseka shiiqettidi ba giddon zorettida. 
Acts4:16 Ba giddon, «Hayta asata wosttinoo? Yerusalaamen diza asay wuri istta kushen hanida gita malaataa erides. Hessa gishshas nu ha yo7oza asaa baleththanaas dandayokko." 
Acts4:17 Gido attiin hayssi yo7ozi dere giddon keehi aakkontta malanne hayti asati nam7anththo hayssa ha sunththaan hara oonaska yootontta mala isttas lo7eththi yootana» gida. 
Acts4:18 Istta xeygidinne mulekka Yesusa sunththan haasayontta malanne tamaarsontta mala azazida. 
Acts4:19 Phexroosinne Yohannisi qasse zaaridi, «Nuni Xoossafe bollara inttes azazettanaas bessizaakko ane intte Xoossa sinththan pirdite." 
Acts4:20 Nuni nu be7idayssanne nu siyidayssa haasayanaappe guye gookko» gida. 
Acts4:21 Qasseka istta bolla mandidi yeddida; gaasoykka hankko derey wuri hanida yo7oza gaason wurikka Xoos galatiza gishshas istta qaxxayanaas dandaybeettenna. 
Acts4:22 He gita malaataan paxida addezas layththay oyddu tammaafe bolla. 
Acts4:23 Phexroosinne Yohannisi qashoppe birshettidi ba asataakko simmidi qeeseta Halaqatinne Dere cimati istta gidayssa ubbaaka yootida. 
Acts4:24 Isttika hessa siyida mala ba qaala dhoqqu histtidi issife Xoossaako, «Wogga Godawu! Neni salonne sa7a, abbanne abba giddon dizayta wursa medhdhadasa." 
Acts4:25 Ne ashkaraa nu aawaa Dawite doonara Xillo Ayanan, « ‹Kawoteththay aazas hanqetti dendidee? Derey aazas mela maqettizee?" 
Acts4:26 Biitta kawoti issife gaaggidi biitta haarizayti issi bolla shiiqettidi Godaa bollanne dooretti tiyettidayssa bolla duulatida› gi waassida. 
Acts4:27 «Tumappe Herdoosinne Phanxoosa Philaxoosi Isra7eeletaranne hara dere asaara hanno katamayn ne doora tiyda geeshsha naaza Yesusa bolla yo7o qachchanaas shiiqettida. 
Acts4:28 Hayssanka ne wolqqaninne ne shenen kase ne qoppidayssa istti polida. 
Acts4:29 Godoo! Ha7ikka istta mandeza ne beya; nuni ne aylleti ne qaala babbontta kumeththa xalateththara yootana mala dandayssa. 
Acts4:30 Paththanaas ne kushe micca. Ne naa geeshshaza sunththan gita malaata ooththa» gida. 
Acts4:31 Istti woossidaappe guye istti dizasoy qaaxxides; wurikka Xillo Ayanan kumidi Xoossa qaala xalateththan yootida. 
Acts4:32 Ammanizayti wurikka issi wozinaninne issi qofan gaaggi deettes. Isttas dizay wuri issi bolla dees attiin baas dizaaz, «Hayssi taas buzo miishsha» gizaadey deenna." 
Acts4:33 Hawaaretikka Godaa Yesusa denththaa gita wolqqan markkateth oykkida; ubbaa bolla gita Xoossa kiyateththi dees. 
Acts4:34 Istta giddon metotanchchay issaadeyka deenna; gaasoykka gade gidiin, keeththe gidiin baas dizaa ubbaa bayzi bayzi shiishshida miish," 
Acts4:35 Hawaareta kushen woththidi issaades issaades izas koshshiza mala gisheettes. 
Acts4:36 Qophiroose geetettizason diza Yooseefe geetettizaadey issi Lewe bagga asi dees; izikka Hawaaretan, «Barnabaasa» geetetti summides. Hessas birsheththay, «Minththeththo naa» guussa." 
Acts4:37 Izikka ba gade bayzida miishshaa ehidi Hawaareta kushen woththides. 
Acts5:1 Issi Hanaaniya geetettiza asi Saphphira geetettiza ba machcheyra ba gade bayzides. 
Acts5:2 Machcheya Saphphiray lo7eththa erishin gadeza bayzida miishshaafe baggaa shaakki ashshidi baggaa ehidi Hawaareta kushen immides. 
Acts5:3 Qasse Phexroosi, «Haysso Hanaaniya! Neni Xillo Ayana bolla wordotanaassinne gadeza miishshaafe ashshana mala Xala7ey ays ne wozinan gelidee? Bayzanaappe kase gadezi neyssa gidennee? Ne bayzidaappe guye qasse miishshay ne kushen deennee? Histtiin ne hayssa mala wostta ne wozinan qoppadii? Neni Xoossa bolla wordotadasa attiin asa bolla gidenna» gides." 
Acts5:4  
Acts5:5 Hessa siyida mala Hanaaniyay kundi hayqqides; hessa siyida asay wuri daro babbides. 
Acts5:6 Attumasay dendidi ahaa xaaxidi heerakka efidi moogides. 
Acts5:7 Heedzdzu saateppe guye machcheya izi waanidaakko erontta dashe yadus. 
Acts5:8 Phexroosikka, «Ane taas yoota; intte gadeza bayzida waagay hanno xallaa?» gides. Izakka, «Ee hanno ha waagayn bayzidos» gadus." 
Acts5:9 Phexroosikka, «Intte Xoossa Ayana paaccanaas ays issi doona gididetii? Hekko ne azinaa moogida asati moogi simmidi karen penge bolla deettes. Istti nenakka kessi ekki efana» gides." 
Acts5:10 Iza siyida mala heerakka iza toho bolla kundada hayqqadus. Attumasaykka soo gelida mala hayqqidaaro be7idi kessi efidi izi azinaa achchan izo moogida. 
Acts5:11 Kumeththa Woosa Keeththa asaynne hessa siyida asay wuri daro babbides. 
Acts5:12 Hawaaretikka dere giddon daro malaatatanne malalisiza miish ooththida; ammanizayti wuri, «Solomoone simereteththaso» geetettiza pengen shiiqeettes." 
Acts5:13 Isttas babbida gishshas oonikka isttara walakettanaas koyibeenna; gido attiin derey istta keehi bonchchees. 
Acts5:14 Daro maccassatinne addeti wodeppe woden Godaan ammani ammani istta bolla gujettida. 
Acts5:15 Hessa gaason Phexroosi aadhdhishin haray attiin iza eeshoy harganchchatappe bagga harganchchata bolla wodhdhana mala hargizayti ichchiza alga bollanne hala bolla karen ishiseettes. 
Acts5:16 Yerusalaame yuushon diza katamatappe hargizaytanne tuna ayanay waayisizayta ehiin wuri paxida. 
Acts5:17 He wode qeeseta halaqaynne izara diza Saduqaaweta baggayti wurikka qanaate qanaatizayta xalla gidida. 
Acts5:18 Hawaareta oykkidi qasho keeththe gelththida. 
Acts5:19 Gido attiin Godaa kiitanchchay qammara qasho keeththaza kare doydi istta kessidi," 
Acts5:20 «Biidi Xoossa Keeththaa gibbe giddon eqqidi hayssa de7o qaalaa ubba deraas yootite» gides. 
Acts5:21 Gadey wontida mala isttas yootidayssa Xoossa Keeththaa gibbe gelidi dereza tamaarso oykkida; qeeseta halaqaynne izara dizayti yiidi Ayhudata duulataanne Isra7eele dere cimata kumeth issi bolla shiishshida; Hawaareta qasho keeththafe ekki yaana mala as yeddida. 
Acts5:22 Kiitetti bida asati biidi istta qasho keeththan demmibeettenna; simmidi," 
Acts5:23 «Qasho keeththay lo7i qulpeti dees; naagizaytikka penge bolla eqqi dishin nu be7idos; gido attiin nu doyi gelishin keeththan oonikka baa» gida. 
Acts5:24 Xoossa Keeth naagizayta halaqaynne qeeseta halaqatikka hessa siyida mala hanozan daro malalettidanne isttas hanoy wuri tikki gides. 
Acts5:25 Heerakka issi asi yiidi, «Hekko intte qasho keeththe gelththida asati Xoossa Keeththa gibbe giddon eqqidi dere tamaarson deettes» gides." 
Acts5:26 Xoossa Keeththe naagizayta halaqay ba oosanchchatara biidi istta oykki ekki yides; oykki ehidayti asay bana shuchchara caddontta mala babbidi wolqqaththontta loddara ehida. 
Acts5:27 Hawaareta ehidi Ayhudata duulata sinththan essida; qeeseta halaqaykka istta, «Hayssa ha sunththaan intte tamaarsontta mala inttes lo7eththi yootidoskoshin intte intte timirteza Yerusalaame ubbaan kunththeeta; qasse nunakka ha addeza suuththas oyshettizayta histtanaas gixxi dendideta» gides." 
Acts5:28  
Acts5:29 Phexroosinne hankko hawaaretikka zaaridi, «Nuni asappe aaththidi Xoossas azazettanaas bessees." 
Acts5:30 «Intte iza miththa bolla kaqqi wodhida Yesusa nu aawantta Xoossay iza hayqoppe denththides. 
Acts5:31 Izikka Isra7eele naytas nagarappe simmidi maarettana mala Xoossi iza ubbaafe bollanne ashshizaade histtidi ba ushachchan dhoqqu dhoqqu histtides. 
Acts5:32 Nunikka hayssas markkatta; qasseka Xoossi baas azazettiza oonaska immida Xillo Ayanaykka markka» gida. 
Acts5:33 Asati hessa siyidi iita hanqo hanqettida; wodhanakka koyida. 
Acts5:34 Gido attiin dere achchan keehi bonchchettida issi woga astamaare, izikka Gamalyaale geetettiza Farsaaweta baggay dere cimata giddon dendi eqqidi Hawaareti guuththa wode karen gam7ana mala azazides." 
Acts5:35 Dere cimatas, «Isra7eele asatoo! Intte hayta asata bolla ooththanayssa daro akeekara ooththanaas bessees." 
Acts5:36 Hayssafe kase issi Tewodaasa geetettizaadey bana gita as histti qoodi dendiin oyddu xeetu derey iza kaallides; gido attiin izi asa kushen hayqqides; iza kaallizaytikka coo laalettiin iza hanoy coo mela attides. 
Acts5:37 Izappe guyekka derey taybettiza wode Galila Yuhuday dendidi daro dere banara kaaleththides. Bana kaallizaytakka demmides; gido attiin izikka dhaydes; iza kaallizaytikka wuri dhayda. 
Acts5:38 «Hessa gishshas ta ha7i inttena gizay hayta asata aggite, bochchofte; istta qofay woykko istta oosoy asappe gidikko dhayana." 
Acts5:39 Xoossafe gidikko qasse intte istta teqqanaas dandayekketa; oonee erizay intte Xoossara ooyettishe beettanakko» gides. 
Acts5:40 Isttika iza zoreza ekkidi Hawaareta xeygidi garafissida; nam7anththo Yesusa sunththan haasayontta mala azazidi yeddida. 
Acts5:41 Hawaaretikka iza sunththa gishshas kawuyanaas bessiza gishshas daro ufayettishe dere cimata achchafe kezi bida. 
Acts5:42 Gallas gallas Xoossa Keeththaninne issaa issaa keeththan Yesusi izi Xoossi dooridaade gididayssa tamaarsofenne sabbakoppe mulekka guye gibeettenna. 
Acts6:1 Ammanizayta qooday dari dari biza wode Girike biittafe yida Ayhuda asati Yuhudan diza Ayhuda asaa guyera zigirettida; gaasoykka ubba wode miza kath gishashe am7eta wudettontta aggida gishshassa. 
Acts6:2 Hessa gishshas nu tammanne nam7u Hawaareti ammaniza harata issi bolla shiishshidi, «Nuni kaththa gishason gelidi Xoossa qaalaa tamaarso agganaas bessenna." 
Acts6:3 Hessa gishshas nu ishatoo! Intte giddofe eranchchata, Xillo Ayanan kumidaytanne lo7o markkateththi diza laappun asata doorite; hayssa alaafeteth nu isttas immana." 
Acts6:4 Nuni gidikko woosaninne qaalaa yooton minnana» gida. 
Acts6:5 Istti gida yo7oy siyidayta ufayssides; Ammanoninne Xillo Ayanan kumidayti Isttifaanose, Piliphoosa, Phirosqoroosa, Niqaroona, Ximoona, Pharmenanne Yuhudateththan gelida Anxokiya dere as Niqoloosa doorida." 
Acts6:6 Heyta ehidi Hawaareta sinth shiishshida. Isttika ba kushe istta bolla woththidi isttas woossida. 
Acts6:7 Xoossa qaalay aakki aakki bides; ammanizayta qooday Yerusalaamen dari dari bides; qeesetappe daroti ammanida. 
Acts6:8 He wode Isttifaanosi Xoossa imoteththaninne wolqqan kumidi dereza giddon gita malalisiza malaatata ooththides. 
Acts6:9 «Wozzetti kezida» geetetti xeygettizasoppe Ayhudata Woosa Keeththafe yida as gidida Qareenappenne Iskindiriyappe; qasseka Kilqiyappenne Iisiya awuraajjatappe yida asatikka wuri Isttifaanosera marshettida. 
Acts6:10 Gido attiin erateththan izi haasayza haasayanne izan diza Ayanaa eqettanaas dandaybeettenna. 
Acts6:11 Hessa gishshas, «Isttifaanosi Musenne Xoos cayishin nu siyidos» giza asata guyera giigsida." 
Acts6:12 He wode dereza, dere cimatanne wogaa tamaarsizayta, denththeththidi Isttifaanose oyththidi dere duulataakko shiishshida." 
Acts6:13 Iza bolla «Hayssi addezi hayssa Xoossa Keeththaa bollanne wogaa bolla cashsha qaala haasaya mulekka aggibeenna. 
Acts6:14 Gaasoykka hayssi addezi, ‹Naazirete Yesusi hayssa Xoossa Keeththaa dhayssana› gishininne ‹Nu Museppe ekkida wogaa laammana› gi haasayshin nu siyidos» gi wordora markkattiza asata shiishshidi markkasida." 
Acts6:15 Duulata uttida asay wuri Isttifaanose tishshi histti xeellishin iza ayfesoy isttas kiitanchcha ayfeso misati beettides. 
Acts7:1 Qeeseta halaqay Isttifaanose, «Hayssi ne bolla shiiqida yo7ozi tumee?» gi oychchides." 
Acts7:2 Isttifaanosikka, «Ta ishatoo! Ta aawatoo! Ta gizayssa siyite! Nu aawa Abrahaamey Kaaraane geetettizaso yaanaappe kase buro Mesphexoomiyan dishin bonchcho Goday izas qonccidi," 
Acts7:3 ‹Ne dereppenne ne dabbofe shaakettada ta nena bessizaso ba› gides. 
Acts7:4 Izikka Kaladaaweta biittafe kezidi Kaaraane geetettiza biittan uttides. Iza aaway hayqqidaappe guye intte ha7i dizaso ha dere iza ehides. 
Acts7:5 Haray attoshin issi tohoy eqqiza gadey izas hayssafe imettibeenna; gido attiin he wode izas issi naykka baynda dishin izinne izappe guyen iza zereththi biittayo laattana mala Xoossi izas caaqqides. 
Acts7:6 Qasseka Xoossi izas, ‹Ne zereththi allaga biittan bete as gidana. Oyddu xeetu layth aylleteththa qambara giddon waayettana." 
Acts7:7 Gido attiin istta aylle mala haariza dere ta qaxxayana; hessafe guye istti he biittafe kezidi hanno ha sohoyin taas goynnana› gides. 
Acts7:8 Hessafe guye qaxxara woga caaqo izas immides; Abrahaameykka Yisaaqa yelidi iza osppunththa gallas qaxxarides; Yisaaqaykka Yaaqoobe yelides; Yaaqoobeykka tammanne nam7u qommota yelides. 
Acts7:9 «He qommota aawati Yooseefe bolla qanaatidi iza aylleteththas duge Gibxe bayzida; gido attiin Xoossi izara dees. 
Acts7:10 Meto ubbaafe iza ashshides; Gibxe kawo Paaroone sinththan bonchcho immides; Paarooney iza Gibxe biittaninne ba keeththa asa ubbaa bolla alaafeteththan shuumides. 
Acts7:11 «He wode Kanaaneninne Gibxen daro meto ehida gita koshay dendides. Nu aawataska miza kaththi dhaydes. 
Acts7:12 Yaaqoobey Gibxe deren kaththi dizayssa siyidi nu aawata koyro Gibxe yeddides. 
Acts7:13 Istti nam7anththo biza wode Yooseefey izi oonakko bana ba ishatas qonccisides. Paarooneykka Yooseefe ishata erides. 
Acts7:14 Hessafe guye Yooseefey kiittidi ba aawa Yaaqoobenne laappun tammanne ichchashu gidiza ba dabbota kumeth ehisides. 
Acts7:15 Yaaqoobey duge Gibxe wodhdhides. Izikka nu aawatikka wuri heen hayqqida. 
Acts7:16 Istta ahaykka Seekeeme geetettizaso efiin Abrahaamey Emoore naytappe ba miishshan shammida duufon moogettides. 
Acts7:17 «Xoossi Abrahaames caaqqida qaalay polettiza wodey matishin Gibxen diza nu asaa qooday dari dari bides. 
Acts7:18 Hessafe guye Gibxe biittan Yooseefe erontta hara kawoy kawotides. 
Acts7:19 Izikka nu asaa ba gene ooson metoththides; buro yelettida guuththa nayti hayqqana malanne asay yelida nayta kare kessi wora yeggana mala wolqqaththides. 
Acts7:20 He wode Musey yelettides; izikka Xoossa achchan dosettida mala lo7o naa gidides; ba aawaa keeththan heedzdzu agina al7ison diccides. 
Acts7:21 Izi wora yegettida wode kawo Paaroone macca naya demmada baas ekkadus; ba naa mala ooththada dichchadus. 
Acts7:22 Museykka Gibxeta aadho erateththaa ubbaa tamaardes; Yo7on era; oosonkka mino gidides. 
Acts7:23 «Muse layththay oyddu tammu gidida wode Musey ba ishata Isra7eele nayta beyanaas ba wozinan qoppides. 
Acts7:24 Izikka issi Gibxe asi Muse bagga asaappe issaade bolla qoho gaththishin be7idi ba bagga addeza maaddides; Gibxe addeza wodhidi qohettidayssa halo kessides. 
Acts7:25 Muses Xoossi iza kushen istta wozzanayssa iza asay akeekizaa misatides; gido attiin istti hessa yuushshi qoppibeettenna. 
Acts7:26 Wonteththa gallas qasseka Isra7eele naytappe nam7ati ba giddon ooyettishin gakkidi ooyettizayta giigsanaas koyidi, ‹Hayto asatoo! Intte intte garsan issoy issaara ishantta; intte waanidi issoy issaa qoheetii?› gides." 
Acts7:27 «Ba laggeza bolla qoho gaththidayssi Muse sugi yeggidi, ‹Nena nu bolla nuna haarizaadenne nu bolla pirdizaade ooththi shuumiday oonee? Woykko qamma Gibxe addeza wodhoyssaththo tanakka wodhana koyay?› gides." 
Acts7:28  
Acts7:29 Musey hessa siyida mala Midiyaame biitta betidi heen bete as gidi de7ides; Yaankka nam7u attuma nayta yelides. 
Acts7:30 «Hessafe oyddu tammu layththafe guye Siina zumaa achchan diza bazzo biittan qeeri wora giddon eexxiza tama lacon kiitanchchay izas beettides. 
Acts7:31 Museykka iza be7ida mala malalettides; aazakko shaakki eranaas izi hee izakko shiiqishin Godaa qaalay, ‹Tani ne aawantta Xoossaa; Abrahaame, Yisaaqanne Yaaqoobe Xoossa› gishin siyides. Museykka daro dagammides; xeellanaaska xalibeenna." 
Acts7:32  
Acts7:33 «Godaykka izas, ‹Hayssi ne eqqidasoy geeshshasoho gidida gishshas ne tohoppe caamma shodda; Gibxen diza ta dereta waaye ta tumappe beyadis; istti waassiza waaye waasoza ta siyada istta ashshanaas wodhdhadis; ha7ikka ne haa ya; ta nena duge Gibxe zaarada kiittana› gides." 
Acts7:34  
Acts7:35 «Histtiin heyti, ‹Nu bolla nena haarizaadenne pirdizaade histti ooni shuumidee?› giidi asay kase kadhida Muse Xoossi qeeri wora giddon izas beettida kiitanchchaza baggara istta haarizaadenne ashshizaade histtidi isttako zaari yeddides." 
Acts7:36 Izikka istta kaaleththidi Gibxeppe kessides; Gibxen, Zo7o abbaninne bazzo biittan oyddu tammu layth daro malalisiza miishshatanne gita malaatata isttas ooththides." 
Acts7:37 «Isra7eele naytas, ‹Ta mala nabe Xoossi intte giddofe denththana› gidayssi hayssa Musekko!" 
Acts7:38 Izikka Siina zuma bolla haasayda kiitanchcharanne bazzo biittan nu aawatara dere duulata giddon dees; de7o qaalakka haa nuus aaththanaas ekkides. 
Acts7:39 «Nu Aawati gidikko izara eqettida attiin izas azazettanaas koyontta gishshas ba wozinara guye Gibxe simmida. 
Acts7:40 Aarooneska, ‹Nu sinththara biza eeqa nuus giigsa! Nuna Gibxeppe kaaleththi kessida Musey waanidaakko nu erokko› gida." 
Acts7:41 He wode mara misle medhdhidi eeqas yarsho shiishshida; barkka medhdhida ba kushe ooson ufayettidi guppida. 
Acts7:42 «Gido attiin Xoossi isttas zokko zaarides; istti salo xoolinttetas goynnana mala aaththi immides; hessika nabeta maxaafan, « ‹Intteno Isra7eele naytoo! Intte bazzo biittan oyddu tammu layth diza wode inttefe yarshonne muxuwaata taas shiishshi ereetii?" 
Acts7:43 Harappeka intte goynnanasoho ooththida eeqa Molooke dunkaananne intte eeqa Erafaane geetettiza xoolintte misleza dhoqqu dhoqqu histti oykkideta. Hessa gishshas ta inttena intte dizasoppe denththada Baabiloonera aaththa yeddana› geetettidi xaafettides. 
Acts7:44 «Xoossi Muse bessida leemisoza malanne azazidayssa mala oosettida Xoossi asara gaaggiza dunkaaneya nu aawatara bazzo biittan de7adus. 
Acts7:45 Nu Aawati dunkaaneyo ekkidayssafe guye Xoossi Iyaaso kaaleththiin kase istta gooddida dereta laattida wode dunkaaneyo ekki gelida; Dawite wode gakkanaas dunkaaneya he biittan de7adus. 
Acts7:46 Dawitikka Xoossa sinththan bonchcho demmidi Yaaqoobe Godaas aqoso giigsanaas woossides. 
Acts7:47 Gido attiin Solomooney izas aqoso keexxides. 
Acts7:48 «Gido attiin wogga Goday asa kushey keexxida keeththan deenna; hessika nabey kase Geeshsha maxaafan xaafida mala, « ‹Saloy ta uttiza alga; biittayka tani tohon yedhdhizaso; histtiin intte taas ay mala keeththe keexxeetii? Woykko ta shempanasoy awayssee? Hayssa ubbaa ta kushey ooththibeennee?› gees Godaa Xoossay." 
Acts7:49  
Acts7:50  
Acts7:51 «Intteno wozina muumetoo! Hayththa tulletoo! Intteka intte aawata mala ubba wode Xillo Ayanara eqetteeta. 
Acts7:52 Nabetappe intte Aawati gooddontta nabey oonee? Xilloza Yohannisa kaseti yootida nabetakka wodhida; intteka ha7i iza aaththi immidetanne wodhideta. 
Acts7:53 Kiitanchcha baggara inttes imettida woga ekkideta attiin naagibeekketa» gides. 
Acts7:54 Duulatan diza asay hessa siyida mala daro hanqettidi iza bolla ba achchi garccides. 
Acts7:55 Gido attiin Isttifaanosi Xillo Ayanan kumidi pude salo tishshi histti xeellishin Xoossa bonchchon Yesusi Xoossa ushachchan eqqidayssa be7idi, «Hekko ta saloy doyettidayssanne Asa Nay Xoossa ushachchan eqqidayssa beyays» gides." 
Acts7:56  
Acts7:57 He wode asay qaala dhoqqu histti waassishe ba hayth tucci oykkidi izakko issife woxxides. 
Acts7:58 Isttifaanose oykkidi katamappe kare olida; shuchchan cach oykkida; hessi wuri hanishin markkatikka ba may7o Sa7oole geetettiza panththaza achchan woththida. 
Acts7:59 Istti shuchchara iza caddishin Isttifaanosi, «Ta Godaa Yesusaa! Ta shemppoyo neekko ekka» giidi woossides." 
Acts7:60 Qasseka gulbatidi dhoqqa qaalan «Godoo! Haytantta nagara qoodoppa» giidi waassides; hessa gidaappe guye hayqqides. 
Acts8:1 Sa7oolikka Isttifaanose hayqon isttara qofan gaaggides; he wode Yerusalaamen diza ammanizayta bolla wolqqama goodeteththi dendides. Hawaareti attaafe ammanizayti wuri Yuhuda awuraajjaninne Samaariya awuraajja ubbaan laalettida. 
Acts8:2 Ayana ooson minni eqqida asati Isttifaanose moogidi izas daro yeekkida. 
Acts8:3 Sa7ooli qasse Woosa Keeth dhayssanaas gixxi dendides; ammaniza asaa issaa issaa keeththe gelidi maccassatanne addeta goochchi goochchi kessidi qasho keeth gelththides. 
Acts8:4 Laalettidayti wuri ba bidason bidason Xoossa qaala yootida. 
Acts8:5 Piliphoosikka Samaariya geetettiza katamaa wodhdhidi asaas Kirstoosa sabbakides. 
Acts8:6 Daro derey Piliphoosi ooththiza malaata be7idi izi yootiza qaalaa wozinappe lo7eththi siyides. 
Acts8:7 Tuna ayanatikka daro asappe waassi waassi kezida; daro toho silatinne wobbetikka paxida. 
Acts8:8 Hessa gishshas he katamaa asay daro ufayettides. 
Acts8:9 Gido attiin hessafe kase he katamayin maro marotidi Samaariya asaa daro malalisizaaz ooththiza issi Simoona geetettiza maroy dees; izikka bana gita asa mala qoodizaade. 
Acts8:10 Asay wuri guuththatappe gitata gakkanaas wurikka, «Hayssi addezi gita wolqqama geetettiza Xoossa wolqqa» gishe izi gizayssa wursi wozinappe siyees." 
Acts8:11 Daro wode ba maroteththa ooson asaa malalisida gishshas asay iza wozinappe kaallishe gam7ides. 
Acts8:12 Gido attiin Piliphoosi Xoossa Kawoteththa gishshassinne Yesus Kirstoosa gishshas sabbakidayssa siyidi ammanida maccassaynne attumasay xammaqettides. 
Acts8:13 Simoonikka ammanidi xammaqettides; Piliphoosakka kaalli biidi haniza gita malaataa be7idi malalettides. 
Acts8:14 Yerusalaamen diza Hawaareti Samaariya asay Xoossa qaala ekkidi ammanidayssa siyidi Phexroosanne Yohannisa isttako kiittida. 
Acts8:15 Isttika Samaariya gakkidi ammanida asay Xillo Ayana ekkana mala asaas woossida. 
Acts8:16 Gaasoykka he wode istti coo Yesusa sunththan xammaqettida attiin buro Xillo Ayanay isttafe issaade bollaka wodhdhibeenna. 
Acts8:17 Hessa gishshas Phexroosinne Yohannisi ba kushe asaa bolla woththiin asay Xillo Ayana ekkides. 
Acts8:18 Simoonikka Hawaareti kushe woththi woossiin Xillo Ayanay imettizayssa be7idi Phexroosassinne Yohannisas miishshe ekki yiidi," 
Acts8:19 «Ta iza bolla ta kushe woththizaadey wuri Xillo Ayana ekkana mala hayssa mala godateth taaska immite» giin," 
Acts8:20 Phexroosi izas zaaridi, «Xoossa imota ne miishshan shammana qoppida gishshas neni ne miishshara issife dhaya." 
Acts8:21 Ne wozinay Xoossa sinththan suure gidontta gishshas nees hayssa ha oosozan gishay woykko qaaday deenna. 
Acts8:22 Hayssa ne iitateththaa gishshas ha7i elle maaroteththan gela; ne wozina qofaa nees atto gaanaakko nees Goda woossa. 
Acts8:23 Gaasoykka neni iitateththan kumidayssinne makkallan qashetta uttidayssi taas beettees» gides. 
Acts8:24 Simoonikka zaaridi, «Intte gida yo7otappe aykkoyka ta bolla gakkontta mala taas Godaa woossite» gides." 
Acts8:25 Phexroosinne Yohannisi Godaa qaala markkattidayssafenne qonccisi yootidayssafe guye daro Samaariya gutatan mishiraachcho qaalaa sabbakishe Yerusalaame simmida. 
Acts8:26 Godaa kiitanchchay Piliphoosa «Denda! Yerusalaameppe duge baggara gede Gaaza efiza bazzo ogera ba» gides. 
Acts8:27 Izikka dendi bides; Hindeko geetettiza Tophphiyappe gidida kawoya ba keeththaninne ba kawoteththan diza ubba miishshaa bolla alaafeteththan woththida issi Tophphiya dere gundula asi izara gaaggides; he addezi Xoossas goynnana Yerusalaame bides. 
Acts8:28 Izi heeppe simmishe para-gaaren uttidi nabe Isayaasa maxaafa nababees. 
Acts8:29 Ayanay Piliphoosa, «Ba! Gede para-gaarezakko shiiqa» gides." 
Acts8:30 Piliphoosikka eesotidi para-gaarezakko biidi addezi nabe Isayaasa maxaafa nababishin siyidi «Hessi ne nababizayssi nees gelizee?» gides. 
Acts8:31 Gundula addezikka «Tana erisiza asi baynda ta wostta eroo?» gides. Izikka gede iza gaarezan gelidi iza achchan uttana mala woossides. 
Acts8:32 Izi nababiza maxaafay, «Izi dorsa mala shukettana laagettides; dorsa laaqqay iske qanxxizayssa sinththan co7u giza mala hessaththoka izi ba doona pogibeenna." 
Acts8:33 Bana kawushshidi pirday bayndaade gidides. Iza shemppoy biitta bollafe digettides. Iza yeletaa gishshas haasayana dandayzay oonee?» gees. 
Acts8:34 Gundula addezikka zaaridi Piliphoosa, «Nabezi hayssa oona gishshas gizee? Ba gishshas gizeyee? Woykko hara asa gishshas gizee? Hayyana, taas yootarkkii!» gides." 
Acts8:35 Piliphoosikka ba doona doydi he maxaafappe doommidi Yesusa Mishiraachcho qaala gishshas markkattides. 
Acts8:36 Istti issife bishe haaththi dizaso gakkida; addezikka, «Hekko haaththi hayssan dees; histtiin ta xammaqettontta mala tana diggizay aazee?» gides." 
Acts8:37 Piliphoosikka, «Ne kumeththa wozinappe ammanikko xammaqettana dandayaasa» gides. Addezikka, «Yesus Kirstoosi Xoossa Naa gididayssa ta ammanays» gides." 
Acts8:38 Addezi para-gaarezi eqqana mala azaziin nam7ay issife haaththan wodhdhiin Piliphoosi addeza xammaqides. 
Acts8:39 Istti haaththaafe kezishin Xoossa Ayanay Piliphoosa denththi efides; addezi hessafe guye iza beyibeenna; gido attiin ufayssan ba oge bides. 
Acts8:40 Hessafe guye Piliphoosi Azaxoone geetettizason beettides; Qisaariya geetettizaso gakkanaas izi biza oge bolla katama ubbaan mishiraachcho qaala sabbakides. 
Acts9:1 Sa7ooli Godaa ammaniza asaa wodhanaas ceeqettishe qeeseta halaqaakko bides. 
Acts9:2 Godaa oge kaallizayta maccassatanne addeta demmi qachchidi Yerusalaame ekki yaanaas Damasqo geetettizason diza Ayhudata Woosa Keeththas dabdaabe xaafana mala qeeseta halaqaa woossides. 
Acts9:3 Damasqo gakkana matishin qoppontta saloppe poo7oy iza yuushon pol7u gides. 
Acts9:4 Izikka heerakka biitta bolla kundidi saloppe, «Sa7oole, Sa7oole, tana aazas goodday?» giza qaala siyides." 
Acts9:5 Sa7oolikka, «Godoo! Ne oonee?» gides. Izikka izas, «Tani ne goodeththiza Yesusaakko!" 
Acts9:6 Ne ha7i dendada gede katama gela; ne ooththanaas bessizaaz nees ta yootana» gides. 
Acts9:7 Sa7oolera issife biza asati qaala giiris sissafe attiin oonakka be7ontta gishshas ba doona oykki eqqida. 
Acts9:8 Sa7ooli ba kundidasohoppe dendidi ayfe doyi xeelliza wode aykkoka demmanaas dandaybeenna; hessa gishshas izara diza asati iza kushe oykkidi kaaleththi ekkidi Damasqo efida. 
Acts9:9 Heedzdzu gallas gakkanaas qooqidi kath haath beyibeenna. 
Acts9:10 Damasqon issi Hanaaniya geetettiza ammanizaadey dees; izas Goday ajjuutan, «Hanaaniya» giidi xeygides; izikka, «Yee Godoo!» gides." 
Acts9:11 Godaykka iza, «Denda! Suure geetettiza ogeyra Yuhuda geetettizaso ba. Heen Sa7oole geetettiza issi Xarseese asi woossishe dees; ne iza koya demma." 
Acts9:12 Gaasoykka Hanaaniya geetettizayssi Sa7ooli dizaso yiidi izi xeellana mala iza bolla ba kushe woththishin ajjuutan be7ides.» 
Acts9:13 Hanaaniyaykka zaaridi, «Godoo! Hayssaadey Yerusalaamen diza geeshshata bolla ay mala iita meto gaththidaakko ta daro asappe siyadis." 
Acts9:14 Izi haa yiday ne sunththaa xeygizayta ubbaa qachchanaas qeeseta halaqatappe godateth ekkidikko» gides. 
Acts9:15 Godaykka izas, «Ne ba! Hayssi addezi Ayzaabeta sinththaninne kawota sinththan hessaththoka Isra7eele dere sinththan ta sunth tookkana mala izi taas doorettidayssa." 
Acts9:16 Izi ta sunththaa gishshas ay mala waaye beyanaakko ta iza bessana» gides. 
Acts9:17 Hanaaniyay biidi izas yootettidaso gelides. Sa7oole bolla ba kushe woththidi, «Ta isha Sa7oole ne haa yishin nees oge bolla qonccida Godaa Yesusi ne ayfey xeellana malanne neni Xillo Ayanan kumana mala tana neekko kiittides» gides." 
Acts9:18 Heerakka Sa7oole ayfeppe poqo malay poqetti wodhdhiin izi xeellana dandaydessinne dendidi xammaqettides. 
Acts9:19 Kaththika miidi minnides; undenna wode ammanizaytara Damasqon gam7ides. 
Acts9:20 Heerakka Yesusi Xoossa Naa gididayssa Ayhudata Woosa Keeththatan tamaarso oykkides. 
Acts9:21 Siyida asay wuri, «Hayssi Yerusalaamen ha sunththaa xeygizayta dhayssiza addeza gidennee? Qasse izi haa yiday he asata qachchi ekki qeeseta halaqataakko efanaas deennee?» gishe malalettida." 
Acts9:22 Sa7ooli kaseppe minni minni bides; Damasqon diza Ayhudatas Yesusi izi Xoossi kiittidaade gididayssa ammanththishe asaa doona oyththides. 
Acts9:23 Daro gallassatappe guye Ayhudati Sa7oole wodhanaas duulatida. 
Acts9:24 Izikka istta qofaa erides; isttika iza wodhanaas katamaa gelththiza ogen gallassinne qamma naagida. 
Acts9:25 Ammanizayti gidikko iza giddoth katamaa yuushon diza maskootezara keeshen duge woththida. 
Acts9:26 Sa7ooli Yerusalaame yiidi ammanizaytara walakettana koyiin izi tumu ammanizaade gididayssa istti ammanettontta gishshas izas babbida. 
Acts9:27 Gido attiin Barnabaasi iza Hawaaretakko efiin Sa7ooli izi Damasqo oge bolla Godaa wostti be7idaakko, Godaykka izas ay yootidaakkonne Damasqon dishe izi ay mala xalateththara Yesusa sunththan sabbakidaakko isttas yootides." 
Acts9:28 Hessa gishshas Sa7ooli isttara dides; Yerusalaamen yuuyi yuuyi asas babbontta Godaa sunththan tamaarsides. 
Acts9:29 Girike dereppe yida Ayhudatara haasayshe palamettides; gido attiin asaykka iza wodhanaas koyides. 
Acts9:30 Ammanizayti hessa eridi duge Qisaariya geetettizaso woththidi Xarseese yeddida. 
Acts9:31 He wode Yuhudaninne Galilan, Samaariyankka diza ammanizayti saron diidi kaseppe minnida; qasseka Xoossa yashshateththan simerettishe Xillo Ayanan minettidanne kaseppe qoodan dari dari bida." 
Acts9:32 Phexroosi dereppe deren yuuyishe Liida kataman diza ammanizayta beyanaas duge wodhdhides. 
Acts9:33 Heen Eeniya geetettizayssa osppun layth hiixan qashetti uttida issi gunda as demmides. 
Acts9:34 Phexroosikka, «Haysso Eeniya! Yesus Kirstoosi nena paththana; dendada ne hiixa denththa!» gides; Eeniyay heerakka pusuku gi dendides." 
Acts9:35 Liidaninne Saroonan diza asay wuri iza be7idi Godaan ammanides. 
Acts9:36 Iyophphe geetettizason Xaabita geetettiza issi ammanizaara dawus; izi sunththaa birsheththi Girike qaalara, «Dorqa» geetettees; iza ubba wode lo7o ooso minna ooththashenne manqota maaddashe dawus." 
Acts9:37 He wode iza hargada hayqqiin asay ahaza meecci pude pooqen kessi woththides. 
Acts9:38 Liiday Iyophphes mata gidida gishshas ammanizayti Phexroosi Liidan dizayssa siyidi nam7u asata kiittidi, «Elle haa yarkkii!» gi woossida." 
Acts9:39 Phexroosikka dendidi kiitettida asatara gakkida wode iza pude pooqe bolla kessida; am7etikka wuri iza yuuyi aadhdhi eqqidi Dorqay paxa dashe isttara ooththida qamisatanne may7ota bessishe yeekkida. 
Acts9:40 Phexroosikka ubba asaa kifilezappe kessidi gulbati woossides. Ahaakko simmidi, «Hanne Xaabita denda!» gides. Izakka ba ayfe doyada xeelladus; Phexroosakka beyada denda uttadus." 
Acts9:41 Izikka izi kushe oykki denththides. Ammanizaytanne am7eta xeygidi izo isttas paththi immides. 
Acts9:42 He hanoy kumeththa Iyophphen erettidessinne daro asaykka Godaa ammanides. 
Acts9:43 Phexroosikka issi Simoona geetettiza galba qaacizaadera Iyophphen daro wode de7ides. 
Acts10:1 Qisaariya geetettiza deren, «Xaalaane wottadarata» geetettiza ola asaa garsan mato halaqa Qornoloosa geetettizayssi dees." 
Acts10:2 Izikka ba keeththa asaa kumeththaara Ayana hanon minonne Xoos babbizaade; manqotaska daro muxuwaata immizaadenne daro wode Xoos woossiza asa. 
Acts10:3 Issi gallas gallassafe uddufun saate bolla Xoossa kiitanchchay izas ajjuutan beettidi izakko yiidi, «Qornoloosaa!» gi xeygishin qonccen be7ides." 
Acts10:4 Qornoloosikka dagamara tishshi histti xeellishe, «Godoo hayssi aazee?» gides. Kiitanchchayka zaaridi, «Ne woosaynne ne muxuwaatay qofettanaas pude Xoossa sinth gakkides." 
Acts10:5 Ne ha7i as Iyophphe yeddada Phexroosa geetettiza Simoona xeygisa. 
Acts10:6 Izikka abba matan diza galba qaaciza Simoonason imaththateth dees» gides. 
Acts10:7 Qornoloosa haasayssida kiitanchchay izappe shaakettidi bidaappe guye ba ashkaratappe nam7ata qasse Ayana yo7os minonne izas daro ammanettiza wottadaratappe issaa xeygisidi," 
Acts10:8 izi be7idayssa ubbaa isttas yootidi Iyophphe kiittides. 
Acts10:9 Kiitettida asati wonteththa gallas gede katamaykko matishin Phexroosi usuppun saate bolla woossana pude Pooqe bolla kezides. 
Acts10:10 He wode izi gafida gishshas qumay buro kaxxishin dhisko mala liphiphi histtiin ajjuutara saloy doyettiin issi gita xaaxettida may7o malay oyddu baggara oykettidi duge biittan wodhdhishin be7ides. 
Acts10:11  
Acts10:12 He may7oza bolla oyddu tohoy diza dumma dumma do7ati biittara gooshettiza medheteththatinne salo bolla piradhdhiza kafoti deettes. 
Acts10:13 He wode, «Phexroosa denda hayta shukkada ma!» giza qaala siyides." 
Acts10:14 Phexroosi qasse, «Godoo hayssi hanenna! Geesh gidonttayssa woykko tuna miish ta mulerakka ma erikke» gides." 
Acts10:15 He kase qaalay qasseka nam7anththo izakko yiidi, «Xoossi geeshshidayssa ne tuna mala qoodoppa» gides." 
Acts10:16 Hessika heedzdzuto shiretti shiretti izakko yidaappe guye may7o misatizayssi heerakka pude salo bides. 
Acts10:17 Phexroosikka ba be7ida ajjuutaza birsheththaa eranaas daro metotidi keehi qofa bolla dishin Qornoloosi kiittida asati Simoona keeththe koyishe demmidi pengen eqqida. 
Acts10:18 Qaala dhoqqu histtidi, «Phexroosa geetettiza Simooni dizasoy hayssan awanee?» gi oychchida." 
Acts10:19 Phexroosi ba be7idayssa keehi qoppishin Xillo Ayanay iza, «Hekko heedzdzu asati nena koyeettes; denda! Duge wodhdhada istta yeddiday tana gidida gishshas sidhey baynda isttara ba» gides." 
Acts10:20  
Acts10:21 Phexroosikka duge wodhdhidi, «Hekko intte koyzaadey tanakko! Intte yiday aazassee?» gides." 
Acts10:22 Isttika izas, «Nuni mato halaqa Qornoloosa matappe yidos; izikka Xoossas babbiza xillo asanne Ayhuda asa ubbaa matan daro bonchchettida asa; nekka iza soo baana malanne ne gizayssa izi siyana mala geeshsha kiitanchchay izas yootides» gida." 
Acts10:23 Phexroosikka asata ba dizason mokki ekkidi ayssides. Phexroosikka wonteththa gallas dendidi isttara bides; Iyophphefe yida issi issi ammaniza asati izara issife bida. 
Acts10:24 Qornoloosikka ba dabbotanne mata laggeta ba soon shiishshidi naago bolla dishin izi nam7anththo gallas Qisaariya gakkides. 
Acts10:25 Phexroosikka Qornoloosa keeththe geliin Qornoloosi iza mokki ekkidi iza toho bolla hokki goynnides. 
Acts10:26 Gido attiin Phexroosi, «Tanikka ne mala asakko! Denda» giidi denththides." 
Acts10:27 Phexroosikka iza haasayssishe izara soo gelishin daro derey shiiqi uttidayssa be7ides. 
Acts10:28 Izikka isttas, «Ayhuda asi hara dere asara gaaggontta mala woykko hara dere as gididayta mata shiiqontta mala nu wogay diggizayssa intte ereeta; gido attiin ta oonakka tuna woykko izi geesh deenna gontta mala Xoossi taas qonccisides." 
Acts10:29 Hessa gishshas ta xeygettida wode hekko sidhontta yadis; histtiin intte tana aazas xeygidaakko erana koyays» gides. 
Acts10:30 Qornoloosikka, «Oyddu gallassafe kase likke hanni wode gallassaafe uddufun saaten tani tason woossishin qoppontta booththa may7o may7ida asi yiidi ta sinththan eqqidi" 
Acts10:31 tana, ‹Qornoloosaa! Ne woosay siyettides; ne manqotas immiza muxuwaatay Xoossa sinth gakkides." 
Acts10:32 Hessa gishshas Iyophphe katama as kiittada Phexroosa geetettiza Simoona ehisa; izi abba achchan galba qaaciza Simoona keeththan imaththateth dees› gides. 
Acts10:33 Tanikka heerakka neekko as kiittadis; ne yuussayka lo7o; histtiko Goday nena azazidayssa ne nuus yootikko Xoossi yootidayssa neeppe siyanaas nu wurikka hayssan Xoossa sinththan doos» gides. 
Acts10:34 Phexroosikka, «Xoossi oonakka shaakki maaddonttayssa tumappe ta eradis." 
Acts10:35 Gido attiin Xoossas babbizaytanne xillo ooththizayta ubbaa oona baggafe gidiinkka izi ekkees. 
Acts10:36 Xoossi ubbaas Godaa gidida Yesus Kirstoosa baggara Isra7eele asas kiittida saroteththa Mishiraachcho kiitay hayssa. 
Acts10:37 Yohannisi xinqata gishshas sabbakidaappe guye Galilappe doommidi kumeththa Yuhudan hanidayssa intte ereeta. 
Acts10:38 Xoossi Naazirete Yesusa Xillo Ayananinne wolqqan tiydes; izikka Xoossi izara diza gishshas ba gakkidason ubbaan lo7o ooththishe Xala7e godateththa giddon dizayta ubbaa paththides. 
Acts10:39 «Izi Ayhudata dereninne Yerusalaame kataman ooththidayssa ubbaas nu markka; qasseka asay iza miththa bolla kaqqi wodhides. 
Acts10:40 Gido attiin Xoossi iza heedzdzanththo gallas hayqoppe denththidessinne asi iza beyana mala ooththides. 
Acts10:41 Izi qoncciday asa ubbaas gidontta hayqoppe dendiin izara midaytassinne izara uyidaytas Xoossi koyro doorida nuus iza markkatassa. 
Acts10:42 Izi nu derezas sabbakana malanne hayqqidayta bollanne paxa dizayta bolla pirdanaas Xoossi shuumiday iza gididayssa nu markkattana mala nuna azazides. 
Acts10:43 Iza ammanidaadey wuri iza sunththan nagara maarettidi geeyanayssa nabeti izas markkatteettes» gi yooto doommides. 
Acts10:44 Phexroosi hessa haasayshin qaalaa siyizayta ubbaa bolla Xillo Ayanay wodhdhides. 
Acts10:45 Qaxxarettidayta baggafe Phexroosara yida ammanizayti Xillo Ayana imoteththi Ayzaabeta bolla wodhdhishin be7idi malalettida. 
Acts10:46 Hessika istti dumma qaalan haasayshininne Xoossa galatishin siyida gishshassa. He wode Phexroosi," 
Acts10:47 «Hayti asati nu mala Xillo Ayana ekkida gishshas istti haaththan xammaqettontta mala istta digganay oonee?» gides. 
Acts10:48 Hessa gishshas Yesus Kirstoosa sunththan xammaqettana mala azazides; hessafe guye Phexroosi guuththa wode isttara daana mala woossida. 
Acts11:1 Hawaaretinne Yuhudan diza ammanizayti Ayzaabeti Xoossa qaala ekkidayssa siyida. 
Acts11:2 Hessa gishshas Phexroosi pude Yerusalaame keziin qaxxarettida Ayhudappe ammanizayti Phexroosa," 
Acts11:3 «Ne qaxxarettontta asata keeth gelada isttara kath madasa» giidi walassida. 
Acts11:4 Phexroosi qasse isttas gelana mala maarara hizgi yootides. 
Acts11:5 «Tani Iyophphe kataman woossishin dhisko mala tana liphiphi histtidi ajjuutan gita may7o misatiza miishshi oyddu baggara oykettidi saloppe ta dizaso wodhdhishin beyadis. 
Acts11:6 Ta tishshi histta xeellishin oyddu tohora diza meheta, wora do7ata, biitta bolla gooshettiza medheteththatanne salo bolla piradhdhiza kafota beyadis." 
Acts11:7 Heerakka tana, ‹Phexroosa denda! Hayssa shukkada ma› giza qaala siyadis." 
Acts11:8 «Tanikka, ‹Godoo hessi hanenna; tani tuna woykko geesh gidonttayssa mulekka ta doonaakko shiishsha erikke› gadis." 
Acts11:9 «He kase qaalay qasseka, ‹Xoossi geeshshidayssa ne tunisoppa› giidi saloppe taas yootides." 
Acts11:10 Hessika heedzdzuto shiretti shiretti yootettidaappe guye wurikka simmidi pude salo bides. 
Acts11:11 «Qisaariyappe taakko kiitettida heedzdzu asati heerakka he saateyin yi gakkidi ta diza keeththa karen eqqida. 
Acts11:12 Ta aynne sidhontta isttara baana mala Xillo Ayanay taas yootides. He usuppun ishati tanara issife biidi addeza keeththe gelidos. 
Acts11:13 Izikka Xoossa kiitanchchay iza keeththan eqqidi izas beettidayssa, ‹Iyophphe geetettizaso as yeddada Phexroosa geetettiza Simoona xeygisa." 
Acts11:14 Izi yiidi nenanne neso asaa ubbaa ashshana qaala yootana› gidayssa nuus yootides. 
Acts11:15 «Tanikka baada buro yooto oykkishin koyro Xillo Ayanay kase nu bolla wodhdhoyssaththo istta bollaka wodhdhides. 
Acts11:16 Kase Goday nuus yootishe, ‹Yohannisi haaththan xammaqides; intte gidikko Xillo Ayanan xammaqettana› gida qaalay heerakka taas qofettides." 
Acts11:17 Hessa gishshas nuni Godaa Yesus Kirstoosa ammanishin nuus immida Xillo Ayana Xoossi isttas immiko histtiin Xoossara eqettanaas tani oonee?» gides. 
Acts11:18 Istti hessa siyida wode isttas gizaazi dhayiin co7u gi simmidi, «Hayssa mala gidikko Ayzaabetikka ha ooraththa de7okko yaana mala Xoossi asas maaroteth immides guussa» giidi Xoossaa galatida." 
Acts11:19 Isttifaanose bolla dendida goodeteththa gaason laalettida ammaniza asay qaalaa Ayhudatas xalala yootishe Pinqe, Qophiroosenne Anxokiya geetettizaso gakkanaas kanththi bida." 
Acts11:20 Qophirooseppenne Qareenappe yida issi issi asati Anxokiya biidi Giriketaska Godaa Yesusa Mishiraachcho qaalaa yootida. 
Acts11:21 Godaa maadoykka isttara dees; qoodan keehi daro asay ammanidi Godaakko simmides. 
Acts11:22 Hessa woreykka Yerusalaamen diza Woosa Keeththa asaa hayththan wodhdhiin Woosa Keeththaya Barnabaasa Anxokiya yeddadus. 
Acts11:23 Izikka hee bi gakkidi Xoossi ba aadho kiyateth deraas immidayssa be7idi ufayettidessinne asay wurikka kumeththa wozinappe Godaa ammanon minnana mala zorides. 
Acts11:24 Izikka Xillo Ayananinne ammanon kumida lo7o asa. Daro derey Godaa ammanidi gujettides. 
Acts11:25 Hessafe kaallidi Barnabaasi Sa7oole koyana Xarseese bides. 
Acts11:26 Iza demmidi Anxokiya ekki yides; nam7ayka heen diza Woosa Keeththa asaara gididi layth kumeth daro dere tamaarsida. Heen Anxokiyan ammanizayti koyro, «Kirsaane» geetetti xeygettida." 
Acts11:27 He wode issi issi nabeti Yerusalaameppe duge Anxokiya wodhdhida. 
Acts11:28 Istta giddofe issoy Agaboosa geetettizayssi dendi eqqidi Xillo Ayanay iza bessiin alame ubbaan gita koshay dendanayssa yootides. Hessika Oroome kawo Qalawodoosa Qeesaare geetettizayssa kawoteththa wode polettides. 
Acts11:29 Ammanizayti wuri issoy issoy ba wolqqa keena miishshe kesettidi Yuhudan diza ammaniza ishata maaddanaas qachchida. 
Acts11:30 Maado miish kesettidi Barnabaasanne Sa7oole kushen cimatas gaththana mala yeddida. 
Acts12:1 He wode kawo Herdoosi issi issi ammaniza asaa gooddi gooddi metoththides. 
Acts12:2 Yohannisa isha Yaaqoobe mashshan wodhisides. 
Acts12:3 Izi hessa ooththiday Ayhudata ufayssidayssa be7idi Phexroosakka oyththides; hessika haniday Ayhudatas ukeththa ba7aale geetettiza ba7aale gallassa. 
Acts12:4 Phexroosakka qasho keeth gelththidaappe guye oyddu oyddu wottadarati taran taran naagana mala giigettida wottadaratas immides. Izi hessaththo ooththiday Paaziga ba7aaley aadhdhida mala kessidi derey pirdana mala shiishshanaassa. 
Acts12:5 Hessa gishshas Phexroosa qasho keeththe gelththidi naageettes; gido attiin Woosa Keeththa asay izas keehi mino woosa woossides. 
Acts12:6 Herdoosi Phexroosa dereza sinth shiishshana qoppi utti dishin he qamma giddoth nam7u sansalatan qashettidi nam7u wottadarata giddon ichchides; qasho keeththa naagizayti keeththaa penge bolla eqqi naagishin," 
Acts12:7 Godaa kiitanchchay ezgontta beettides; istti diza kifilen poo7oy poo7ides; kiitanchchazikka Phexroosa mille bochchi beegoththidi, «Elle denda!» gides; heerakka sansalatay iza kusheppe gaden wodhdhides." 
Acts12:8 Kiitanchchazi iza, «Ne may7o may7a! Caammaka aaththa!» giin Phexroosikka azazettida mala ooththides; qasseka kiitanchchay, «Ne gaabe may7ada tana kaalla» gides." 
Acts12:9 Phexroosikka qasho keeththaafe iza kaalli kezides; gido attiin izas agumo be7izaa misatides attiin kiitanchchazi ooththizayssi tumu gididayssa eribeenna. 
Acts12:10 Koyro zabetappenne nam7anththo zabetappe aadhdhidi gede katama kessiza oge bolla diza birata pengaako gakkida; pengeyka barkka doyetti wodhdhides; istti kezi bida; istti qeeri oge dizaaro aadhdhida mala kiitanchchazi izappe shaakettides. 
Acts12:11 Phexroosas kahay simmishin, «Goday ba kiitanchcha kiittidi tana Herdoosa kusheppenne Ayhudati ta bolla qoppida ubbaafe tana kessidayssa ta ha7i tumappe eradis» gides." 
Acts12:12 Hessa akeeki eridaappe guye daro asay issi bolla shiiqettidi woossiza Marqoosa geetettiza Yohannisa aayo Maaramiso bides. 
Acts12:13 Izi hee biidi kare penge qoxxiin issi Eroodo geetettiza garadeya kare ooni qoxxizaakko eranaas kare mata badus. 
Acts12:14 Qaalay Phexroosayssa gididayssa erada keeha ufayettida gishshas kareza doyontta woththan guye simmada, «Phexroosi Karen penge bolla eqqides» gadus." 
Acts12:15 Asaykka izo, «Hanne gooyay!» gida; iza qasse zaara zaara isttas yootiin, «Histtiko hessi iza naagiza kiitanchchaa gidontta aggenna» gida." 
Acts12:16 Phexroosi qasseka penge qoth gujjides; isttika pengaa doydi iza be7ida mala malalettida. 
Acts12:17 Izikka istti co7u gaana mala ba kushen malati bessidi Goday iza qashosoppe wostti kessidaakko lo7eththi yootides. «Hayssa wursi Yaaqoobessinne hankko ammanizaytas yootite» gides. Hessafekka haraso bides. 
Acts12:18 Wonteththa gallas wonttara wottadarati, «Phexroosi waanidee?» gishe ba giddon bul7akettida." 
Acts12:19 Herdoosi as yeddi Phexroosa koyisidi izi dhayda gishshas naagizayta lo7eththi oychchidaappe guye istta wodhana mala azazides. Hessafe guye Herdoosi Yuhudappe duge Qisaariya wodhdhidi heen uttides. 
Acts12:20 Herdoosikka Xiroose asaaranne Sidoona asaara ooshsha; he dere asay kath demmizay Herdoosa dereppe gidida gishshas he dere kawo xeellizaade Bilasxoosappe maado qaala demmida mala issi bolla gididi Herdoosara maqayinththanaas oychchida. 
Acts12:21 Giigana barettida gallas Herdoosi kawoteththa may7o may7idi kawoteththa algan uttidi deraas haasaydes. 
Acts12:22 Derezikka, «Hayssi Xoossa qaalappe attiin asa qaala deenna!» gi waassides." 
Acts12:23 Herdoosikka Xoossas bonchcho immontta aggida gishshas Godaa kiitanchchay heerakka Herdoosa shoci yeggiin guxuni hayqqides. 
Acts12:24 Xoossa qaalay gidikko diccidi aakki aakki bides. 
Acts12:25 Barnabaasinne Sa7ooli ba ekki bida kiitaa polidi Yerusalaame simmidi Marqoosa geetettiza Yohannisakka banara ekki simmida. 
Acts13:1 Anxokiyan diza Woosa Keeththan nabetinne astamaareti deettes; heytikka Barnabaasinne Negere geetettiza Simoonara, Qareena dere as Luqiyoosara, Herdoosara issife diccida Minaheranne Sa7oolera wuri issife deettes." 
Acts13:2 Heyti wuri Godaas goynnishenne xoomishe dishin Xillo Ayanay, «Barnabaasanne Sa7oole ta istta xeygida oosos taas shaakki kessite» gides." 
Acts13:3 Isttika xoomi woossidi ba kushe istta bolla woththidaappe guye moyzida. 
Acts13:4 Barnabaasinne Sa7ooli Xillo Ayana kiitan duge Selawuqiya wodhdhida; heeppeka markaben gelidi Qophiroose bida. 
Acts13:5 Salmise geetettizaso gakkidi Ayhudata Woosa Keeththatan Xoossa qaala sabbakida; Marqoosa geetettiza Yohannisikka isttara biidi istta maaddides. 
Acts13:6 Abba giddon diza biitta Qophiroose geetettiza dereyo ha gaxappe he gaxa gakkanaas kanththi kezidi Phaafa geetettizaso gakkishin issi Ayhuda asa shin maronne wordo nabe Baar-Yesusa geetettiza as demmida. 
Acts13:7 Izikka issi Sarggoosa Phawuloosa geetettiza wozinama dere ayssizayssara issife dees; hessi dere ayssiza addezi Xoossa qaala siyana koyidi Barnabaasanne Sa7oole xeygisides. 
Acts13:8 Marozi Elimaasi ba sunththaa birsheththa mala dere ayssizayssi ammanontta mala dhuphanaas koyidi isttara eqettides. 
Acts13:9 Phawuloosa geetettida Sa7ooli Xillo Ayanay izan kumiin maroza tishshi histti xeellidi," 
Acts13:10 «Nenoo xilloteth ubbaas morkkezoo! Geneynne iitateththi nenan kumidaysso haysso daabulosa nawu! Godaa suure oge geellaseththafe shempikii? 
Acts13:11 Hekko ha7i Godaa kushey ne bolla dees; ne qooqana; hannife guye arshe poo7o issinokka beyakka» gides. Heerakka shaarumaynne dhumay iza bolla wodhdhides; kushe oykki bana kaaleththanaade koshshi yaanne haa gides. 
Acts13:12 Dere ayssizayssi ha hanida yo7oza be7idi Godaa gishshas siyida timirtezan malalettidi ammanides. 
Acts13:13 Phawuloosinne izara dizayti Phaafappe dendidi Phinfiliya geetettizason diza Phergene geetettizaso markaben geli bida; Yohannisi isttafe shaakettidi guye Yerusalaame simmides. 
Acts13:14 Istti gidikko Phergeneppe dendidi Phissidiya giddon diza Anxokiya bida; Sambata gallas Ayhudata woosa keeth geli uttida. 
Acts13:15 Muse woga maxaafatinne nabeta maxaafati nababettidaappe guye Ayhudata Woosa Keeththa halaqati, «Nu ishatoo! Inttes hayssa asaa zorana qaalay diikko haasayte» giidi isttako ase yeddida." 
Acts13:16 Phawuloosikka dendi eqqidi ba kushera malatidi, «Intteno Isra7eele asatoo! Qasseka intteno Xoossas yayyiza Ayzaabetoo! siyite." 
Acts13:17 Ha Isra7eele dere Xoossay kase nu aawata doorides; istti Gibxe deren dishin istta dhoqqu dhoqqu histtides; ba wolqqama qesera heeppe istta kessides. 
Acts13:18 Oyddu tammu layth kumeth istta bazzo biittan dandaydes. 
Acts13:19 Kanaane biittan dizayta laappun kawota dhayssidi istta biittaa ba deretas gade histti laatissides. 
Acts13:20 Hessi wuri polettiday oyddu xeetanne ichchashu tammu layththata giddona; hessafe guye nabe Sameela wode gakkanaas istta bolla pirdiza daannata immides. 
Acts13:21 «Hessafe guye derey ba bolla kawo kawoththana mala Sameela woossides; Xoossayka Biniyaame baggafe Qiise naa Sa7oole isttas immides; izikka istta oyddu tammu layth haarides. 
Acts13:22 Sa7oole shaaridaappe guye Dawite kawoththides; iza gishshas, ‹Ta wozina mala hanizayssanne ta koyidayssa ubbaa ooththiza Isseye naa Dawite ta demmadis› giidi Dawite gishshas Xoossi markkattides." 
Acts13:23 Xoossika ba caaqo qaalaaththo ha addeza zereththafe as ashshizayssa Yesusa Isra7eeles ehides. 
Acts13:24 Yesusi yaanaappe kase Yohannisi Isra7eele derey wuri maaroteththan gelidi xammaqettana mala sabbakides. 
Acts13:25 Yohannisi ba kiitettidayssa polo bolla dishe, ‹Ta inttes oona misatazinaa? Ta kiitettidayssa gidikke; haray attoshin ta izas toho caamma kire birshanaas bessonttayssi taappe guyera yaana› gides." 
Acts13:26 «Intteno Abrahaame zereththafe yelettida nu ishatoo! Qasseka intte giddonkka Xoossas yayyizayti wuri hayssi atoteththa kiitay kiitettiday nuus ubbatassa! 
Acts13:27 Yerusalaame asatinne istta halaqati Yesusa eribeettenna; gido attiin istti iza bolla pirdida; hessankka sambatan sambatan nababettiza kase nabeta qaalay iza bolla polettides. 
Acts13:28 Iza hayqos gaththiza issi gaasokka istti demmontta aggikokka Philaxoosi iza bolla hayqo pirda pirdana mala woossida. 
Acts13:29 Iza gishshas xaafettidayssa istti ubbaa polidaappe guye iza kaqettida miththaa bollafe gaden woththidi duufon moogida. 
Acts13:30 Gido attiin Xoossi iza hayqoppe denththides. 
Acts13:31 Galilappe Yerusalaame gakkanaas banara dizaytas daro wode beettides; heytikka ha7i iza gishshas deretas markkatta. 
Acts13:32 «Nunikka kase Xoossi nu Aawatas caaqqida Mishiraachcho qaalaa inttes sabbakoos. 
Acts13:33 Yesusa kiittidi isttas caaqqida qaalaa nuus istta naytas polides; hessika mazamure maxaafan nam7anththo shempon, ‹Ne ta naaza; ta nena hach yeladis› geetetti xaafettides." 
Acts13:34 Qasseka izi wooqqonttayssanne Xoossi iza hayqoppe denththidayssa shaakki erana mala, « ‹Anjjettidayssanne ammanettida Dawite anjjo ta inttes immana› gides." 
Acts13:35 Hessa gishshas harasonkka, ‹Ne geeshshay hayqqi wooqqana mala ne koyakka› gees." 
Acts13:36 «Dawiti ba woden Xoossa shene mala ooththidaappe guye hayqqides; kase ba aawatara moogettiin iza ashoy wooqqides. 
Acts13:37 Xoossi iza hayqoppe denththidayssi izi gidikko wooqqibeenna. 
Acts13:38 Hessa gishshas ta ishatoo! Nagaras maaroteththi beettizay Yesusa baggara gididayssi inttes sabbakettidayssa erite. 
Acts13:39 Iza ammanizaadey wuri kase Muse wogaa baggara demmontta xilloteth demmana. 
Acts13:40 Hessa gishshas kase nabeti, « ‹Intteno qidhizayto xeellite, malalettitenne dhayte, inttes oonikka yootiin ammananaas inttena metiza miish ta intte woden ooththana› gida qaalay intte bolla gakkontta mala naagettite» gides." 
Acts13:41  
Acts13:42 Phawuloosinne Barnabaasi Ayhudata Woosa Keeththafe kezishin asay istta hessa istti yootida qaalaa kaalliza Sambata gallas zaari yootana mala woossides. 
Acts13:43 Shiiqoy laalettidaappe guye daro Ayhudatinne Ayhudata ammanon gelidi Xoos goynniza asati Phawuloosanne Barnabaasa kaallida. Phawuloosanttika istta qofsishe istti Xoossa kiyateththan minni daana mala zorida. 
Acts13:44 Kaalliza Sambata gallas katama asappe guuththati xalala attiin dariza baggay wuri Godaa qaalaa siyana shiiqides. 
Acts13:45 Ayhudatikka daro dere be7idi qanaateteththan kumida; Phawuloosa haasaya eqettishe iza cayida. 
Acts13:46 Phawuloosinne Barnabaasi babbontta xalateththan, «Xoossa qaalay koyro inttes yootettanaas bessees; gido attiin intte qaalaa leqqideta. Inttes mernaa de7oy bessonttayssa intterkka intte bolla pirdida gishshas ha7i nuni gede Ayzaabetakko baana koyoos; qasseka Goday nuna, ‹Asas atoteththa qaala biitta gaxa gaththana mala ta nena Ayzaabetas poo7o histta kiittadis› gi azazides» gida." 
Acts13:47  
Acts13:48 Ayzaabeti hessa siyidi daro ufayettida; Godaa qaalaska bonchcho immida; mernaa de7os giigettida derey wuri ammanides. 
Acts13:49 Godaa qaalay heeran diza dere ubbaso gakkides. 
Acts13:50 Ayhudati qasse Ayana hanon kaseppe minnizaytanne duussan bonchchettida maccassata hessaththoka kataman diza gita asata denththeththidi Phawuloosa bollanne Barnabaasa bolla goodeteth denththidi ba dereppe kessi gooddida. 
Acts13:51 Phawuloosinne Barnabaasi asay istta ixxidayssa bessanaas ba toho bolla diza gudulla pittidi Iqoniyoone geetettizaso bida. 
Acts13:52 Ammanizayti ufayssaninne Xillo Ayanan kumida. 
Acts14:1 Iqoniyoonen Phawuloosinne Barnabaasi issife Ayhudata Woosa Keeththe gelida; heenkka istti asaa lo7eththi tamaarsida gishshas Girike asaappenne Ayhuda asappe daroy ammanides. 
Acts14:2 Hinko ammanontta Ayhuda asay Ayzaabeta istta bolla denththeththidi asay ammanizayta ixxana mala ooththides. 
Acts14:3 Phawuloosinne Barnabaasi Godaa gishshas xalateththara asas yootishe heen daro wode gam7ida; Godaykka istti yootiza qaalaa gita malataranne wolqqama ooson qonccisi markkattides. 
Acts14:4 Katamaa asay ba giddon nam7u kezi shaakettidi baggay Ayhudata bagga, baggay Phawuloosantta bagga gidides." 
Acts14:5 He wode Ayhudatinne Ayzaabeti bana kaaleththizaytara issife gididi istta waayisanaassinne shuchchan caddanaas koyida. 
Acts14:6 Isttika hessa erida mala Listtiranne Darbeene geetettizaso Liqa7ooniya katamatanne he heeran diza dere baqatida. 
Acts14:7 Heenkka mishiraachcho qaalaa sabbako doommida. 
Acts14:8 Listtiran yelettoosoppe ba tohora hemetti erontta issi toho sila addey dees. 
Acts14:9 Hessaadey Phawuloosi sabbakishin utti siyees; Phawuloosikka izakko tishshi histti xeellidi addeza paththana ammanoy iza bolla dizayssa be7idinne qaala dhoqqu histtidi, «Sitti gaada ne tohon eqqa!» gides. Addezi heerakka guppi dendidi hemeth oykkides." 
Acts14:10  
Acts14:11 Asay Phawuloosi ooththidayssa be7idi Liqa7ooniya qaalara, «Eeqa Xoossati as misatidi haa nuukko wodhdhida» giidi waassides." 
Acts14:12 Barnabaasa, «Diya» gida Phawuloosakka haasayza waannay iza gidida gishshas, «Hermeene» gida." 
Acts14:13 Katamaappe asi bayndason diza Diya geetettiza eeqa keeththa qeesey kormatanne xaaxetti giigida ciish gede katama geliza oge bolla efidi derezara issife gididi Phawuloosassinne Barnabaasas yarshana koyides. 
Acts14:14 Hawaareti Barnabaasinne Phawuloosi hessa siyida mala ba may7o daakkidi gede dereza giddo woxxida; ba qaala dhoqqu histtidi hizgida; 
Acts14:15 «Hayto asatoo! Hayssa aazas ooththeetii? Nunikka intte mala asakko! Intteka qasse hayssa mela hada yo7oppe haakkidi salonne sa7a, abbaka, abbata giddon dizayta ubbaa medhdhida de7o Xoossaako intte simmana mala inttes mishiraachcho qaala sabbakoos." 
Acts14:16 Izi kase aadhdhida yeletaynne derey wurikka ba koyida mala hananaas yeddi bessides. 
Acts14:17 Gido attiin Xoossi saloppe iranne hessaththoka kaththi kaxxiza wodeta immidi intte wozina kaththaninne ufayssan kunththides; ufayssaaka inttena kalssidi lo7o ooson bana markkay baynda aggibeenna» gida. 
Acts14:18 Hessa ubbaa haasaydi asay isttas yarshontta mala waaydi diggida. 
Acts14:19 Ayhudati qasse Anxokiyappenne Iqoniyooneppe yida asay asaa zoridi Phawuloosa shuchchan caddana mala ammanththida; Phawuloosakka shuchchan caddidi hayqqides gi goochchidi katamappe gede kare kessida. 
Acts14:20 Gido attiin ammanizayti iza yuuyi aadhdhi naagishin Phawuloosi dendidi gede katama gelides; wonteththa gallas Barnabaasara issife Darbeene geetettizaso bida. 
Acts14:21 Phawuloosinne Barnabaasi Darbeenen mishiraachcho qaalaa sabbakidi daro asaa ammanththidaappe guye gede Listtira, Iqoniyoonenne Anxokiya simmida." 
Acts14:22 Ammanizayta wozina minththeththishe istti ammanon minni daana mala zorishe, «Nu Xoossa kawoteth gelanaas daro meto giddora aadhdhanaas koshshees» gida." 
Acts14:23 Hessafe guye dumma dumma Woosa Keeththatan cimata dooridaappe guye xoomaninne woosan ammanettida Godaas hadara aaththi immida. 
Acts14:24 Phissidiyara aadhdhidi Phinfiliya simmida. 
Acts14:25 Phergenen qaala sabbakidi duge Axaaliya geetettizaso wodhdhida. 
Acts14:26 Axaaliyappeka ha7i gakkanaas istti ooththida oosoza hadara isttas imettida katama Sooriyan diza Anxokiya markaben gelidi simmida. 
Acts14:27 Hee gakkida mala Woosa Keeththa asaa ubbaa shiishshidi Xoossi isttara ooththidayssa qasseka Ayzaabetas ammano pengey waani doyettidaakko wursi yootida. 
Acts14:28 Heen ammanizaytara daro wode gam7ida. 
Acts15:1 Issi issi asati Yuhudappe duge Anxokiya wodhdhidi, «Intte Muse wogaa mala qaxxarettontta aggiko oonikka attanaas dandayekketa» giidi ammanizayta tamaarso doommida." 
Acts15:2 Hessika Phawuloosanne Barnabaasa gita palamaninne ooshsha giddo gelththides; hessa gishshas Phawuloosinne Barnabaasi hara issi issi ammaniza asatara Yerusalaame kezidi ha yo7oza gishshas cimatanne Hawaareta oychchana mala geetettides. 
Acts15:3 Hessa gishshas Woosa Keeththaya istta Yerusalaame baana mala kiittiin istti Pinqeranne Samaariyara aadhdhi bishe heen diza Ayzaabeti ammanon simmidayssa yootida; he wode ammanizayti hessa siyidi keehi ufayettida. 
Acts15:4 Istti Yerusalaame gakkiin Woosa Keeththa asay Hawaaretinne cimati istta mokki ekkida; kiitetti bidaytikka Xoossi isttara gididi ooththidayssa ubbaa isttas yootida. 
Acts15:5 Farsaaweta bagga asatappe ammanida issi issi asati dendidi, «Ayzaabeti qaxxarettanaassinne Muse wogaa naagana mala isttas yootanaas bessees» gida." 
Acts15:6 Hawaaretinne cimati he yo7oza giddo lo7eththi xeellanaas shiiqida. 
Acts15:7 Daro palamappe guye Phexroosi dendi eqqidi, «Ta ishatoo! Guuththa wodeppe kase Xoossi tana intte giddofe dooridi Ayzaabeti ta doonappe mishiraachcho qaala siyidi ammanana mala ooththidayssa intte ereeta." 
Acts15:8 Asa wozina eriza Xoossi nuus immidayssa mala isttaskka Xillo Ayana immidi istta baas ekkidayssa markkattides. 
Acts15:9 Istta wozinakka ammanon geeshshidi nu giddoninne istta giddon aykko shaakokka ooththibeenna. 
Acts15:10 Hessa gishshas nu aawatinne nunikka tookkanaas dandayontta qambara ammanizayta toossanaas intte aazas Xoos paacceetii? 
Acts15:11 Nu attiday likke isttaththoka Godaa Yesusa aadho kiyateththan gididayssa ammanoos» gides. 
Acts15:12 Shiiqida asay wurikka co7u giin Barnabaasinne Phawuloosi Xoossi istta baggara Ayzaabeta giddon ooththida gita malaatata gishshas yootishin malalettidi lo7eththi siyida. 
Acts15:13 Istti yooti wursishin Yaaqoobey dendi eqqidi, «Ta ishatoo! Ta gizayssa siyite;" 
Acts15:14 Xoossi Ayzaabetappe baas gidana dere kasetidi izi wostti xeygi woththidaakko Simooni nuus lo7eththi yootides. 
Acts15:15 Kase nabetan hizgi xaafettida qaalay hayssara gaaggees. 
Acts15:16 « ‹Hayssafe guye ta simmada laalettida Dawite keeththe keexxana; laalettidayssa zaara essana; zaaradakka keexxana. 
Acts15:17 Hessika attida asay Godaa koyana malanne ta sunththaan xeygettida Ayzaabeti tana koyana mala gees ubbaa ooththida Xoossay. 
Acts15:18 Hayssa koyroppeka erisida Xoossi tana› gees. 
Acts15:19 «Hessa gishshas ha Xoossaako simmida Ayzaabeta nu metoththontta mala hayssi ta baggara taas qasho. 
Acts15:20 Gido attiin eeqas yarshettidi tunida kath moopite; laymappe haakkite; bawuti hayqqida mehe asho moopite; suuth uyopite giidi nu isttas xaafana bessees. 
Acts15:21 Muse wogay gidikko beniisofe Sambata Sambata gallas Ayhudata Woosa Keeththan nababettishenne katamay dizason sabbakettishe dees» gides. 
Acts15:22 He wode Hawaaretinne cimati kumeththa Woosa Keeththa asaara gididi ba giddofe issi issi asata dooridi Phawuloosaranne Barnabaasara gaththi Anxokiya yeddanaas qachchida. Ammaniza asaa giddofe waannatizayta Barsabaasa geetettiza Yuhudanne Sillaase doorida. 
Acts15:23 Istta kushen immi yeddida dabdaabezi, «Intte ishatappe, Hawaaretappe, cimatappe, Ayzaabetappe ammanida Anxokiyaninne Sooriyan, Kilqiyankka diza ammanizaytas nu sarokay inttena gakko." 
Acts15:24 «Issi issi asati nuuppe gidontta ba baggara nu achchafe biidi ba haasayan intte wozina yaanne haa qaaththidayssanne inttena bul7akidayssa nu siyidos. 
Acts15:25 Hessa gishshas guuththa asata dooridi dosettida Barnabaasaranne Phawuloosara intteko yeddanaas nu wurikka qaala gaaggidos. 
Acts15:26 Istti Godaa Yesus Kirstoosa gishshas ba shemppo aaththi immidayta. 
Acts15:27 Hessa gishshas nu inttes xaafidayssa istti inttes ba doonara lo7eththi yootana mala Yuhudanne Sillaase intteko yeddidos. 
Acts15:28 Hayta inttes koshshiza yo7otappe hara deexo tooho nu intte bolla woththontta mala nuussinne Xillo Ayanas lo7o misati beettides. 
Acts15:29 Hessika eeqas shukettida ashoppe, suuththafe, bawuti hayqqida mehe ashoppenne laymappe intte haakkana malassa; intte hayta misatizaytappe haakkiko inttes lo7o; saron diite» gees." 
Acts15:30 Kiitettida asati moyzettidi duge Anxokiya wodhdhida; heen ammanizayta wursi shiishshidi ehida dabdaabeza isttas immida. 
Acts15:31 Dereykka nababidi minththeththiza qaalan ufayettides. 
Acts15:32 Yuhudaynne Sillaasi nabeta gidida gishshas daro zoridi ammanizayta minththeththida. 
Acts15:33 Heen guuththa wode gam7idi ammaniza asay moyziin guye bana kiittidaytakko simmida. 
Acts15:34 Sillaasi qasse heen attanaas koyides. 
Acts15:35 Phawuloosinne Barnabaasi hara daro asatara gididi Godaa qaalaa tamaarsishenne sabbakishe Anxokiyan gam7ida. 
Acts15:36 Phawuloosi guuththa wode gam7idi Barnabaasa, «Nu kase Godaa qaalaa yootida ubba katamata biidi ammanizayti ay mala dizaakko ane yuuyi beyoos, denda» gides." 
Acts15:37 Barnabaasikka Marqoosa geetettiza Yohannisi isttara baana mala koyides. 
Acts15:38 Phawuloosi qasse iza ekki baanaas koyibeenna; gaasoykka kase Marqoosi isttafe shaakettidi Phinfiliya geetettizason guye attidi isttara oosos sinth kezontta aggida gishshassa. 
Acts15:39 Histtiin daro palamay istta giddon medhettida gishshas ba giddon shaaketti wodhdhida; hessa gishshas Barnabaasi Marqoosa ekkidi markaben gelidi Qophiroose bides. 
Acts15:40 Phawuloosi qasse Sillaase doorides; ammanizaytikka Godaa aadho kiyateththaas Phawuloosa hadara immidaappe guye izi isttafe shaakettidi bides. 
Acts15:41 Ammanizayta minththeththishe Sooriyaranne Kilqiyara aadhdhi bides. 
Acts16:1 Phawuloosi Darbeene geetettizasonne Listtira gakkidi iza aaway Girike as, aayeya qasse Ayhuda as gidida Ximtoosa geetettiza issi ammanizaade heen demmides." 
Acts16:2 Izikka Listtiraninne Iqoniyoonen ammaniza asaa achchan lo7o markkateththi dizaade. 
Acts16:3 Phawuloosikka Ximtoosa banara ekki baanaas koyides; hessa gishshas he heeran Ayhudata gishshas giidi Ximtoosa qaxxarides; gaasoykka Ayhudati Ximtoosa aaway Girike as gididayssa eriza gishshassa. 
Acts16:4 Istti issi katamappe hara katama aadhdhi aadhdhi bishe Hawaaretinne Yerusalaame Woosa Keeththa cimati yeddida kiitaa asay ekkidi naagana mala ammaniza asaas immi immi aadhdhida. 
Acts16:5 Woosa keeththa asay ammanon minni minni bides; qasse asaykka qoodan gallas gallas gujetti gujetti bides. 
Acts16:6 Phawuloosinne izara diza zatati qaalaa Iisiyan sabbakontta mala Xillo Ayanay diggida gishshas Pirgiyaranne Galatiya derera aadhdhi bida. 
Acts16:7 Istti Miisiya geetettizaso gakkana matishe Bitiniya geetettizaso gelana qoppiin Yesusa Ayanay istta diggides. 
Acts16:8 Hessa gishshas Misiyara aadhdhidi Xiro7aada geetettizaso wodhdhida. 
Acts16:9 Issi Maqidooniya asi eqqidi Phawuloosa Maqidooniya pinnada nuna maadda gishin Phawuloosi omars ajjuutan be7ides. 
Acts16:10 Izikka he ajjuutaa beyiin nuni heerakka Maqidooniya baana koyidos; Xoossi nuni isttas Mishiraachcho qaalaa yootana mala xeygides gi qoppida gishshassa. 
Acts16:11 Markabera Xiro7aada geetettizasoppe dendidi sitti giidi Samotiraaqe geetettizaso bidos; wonteththa gallas Naaphule geetettizaso sinth hemeth gujjidos. 
Acts16:11 Markabera Xiro7aada geetettizasoppe dendidi sitti giidi Samotiraaqe geetettizaso bidos; wonteththa gallas Naaphule geetettizaso sinth hemeth gujjidos. 
Acts16:12 Heeppeka Oroome asay tooran haarida dere gidida Maqidooniya dere waanna katama gidida Piliphisiyoose geetettizaso gelidos; heenkka undenna wode uttidos. 
Acts16:13 Sambata gallas woosa woossizaso koyishe katamaa gelizaso penge kezidi duge shaafa wodhdhoos; nu heen uttidi shiiqi diza maccassatas qaalaa yootidos. 
Acts16:14 Qaala lo7eththi siyiza maccassatappe issi Liidiya geetettizaara izakka Xoos goynnizaaronne Tiyaxiroone katamaappe yaada zo7o Haare may7o zal7izaaro Phawuloosi yootiza qaalaa iza wozinan woththa siyana mala Goday izi wozina doydes. 
Acts16:15 Izanne iziso asaykka xammaqettidaappe guye, «Tani Xoos ammanidayssa intte tumu eridaa gidikko haa taso yiidi guuththa wode diishshite» gaada istta minththa woossadus." 
Acts16:16 Issi gallas nu woosaso bishin kaayo kayotta marotiza issi garade naa dizaara nuna demmadus; izakka ba maroteththaan bana ayssizaytas daro miish gelththawus. 
Acts16:17 Hanna garade naya Phawuloosanne nuna kaalla kaalla, «Hayti asati inttes intte attana oge yootizayti wogga Xoossa oosanchchata» ga ga waassadus." 
Acts16:18 Hessaka daro gallas shira shira gadus; gido attiin Phawuloosi izi qaalaan daro metotida gishshas izikko simmidi izi doonara haasayza tuna ayanaza, «Ne izippe kezana mala ta nena Godaa Yesus Kirstoosa sunththan azazays» gides. He ayanay heerakka yeggi izippe kezides." 
Acts16:19 Izo ayssiza asati isttas miishshe demmiza ogey duuxxiin istta hidotay qanxxettidayssi isttas geliin Phawuloosanne Sillaase oykkidi biittara goochchidi waannati dizaso giya giddo efida. 
Acts16:20 Dere ayssiza waannatakko shiishshidi, «Hayti asati baas Ayhuda as gidi uttidi nu katamaa bul7akeettes;" 
Acts16:21 qasse nu Oroome asati ekkanaas woykko ooththanaas nuus bessontta woga nu asaa giddon laalleettes» gida. 
Acts16:22 Dereykka issi bolla gididi Phawuloosa bollanne Sillaase bolla dendides; deraa ayssizayti Phawuloosantta may7o qaari ekkidi durqqara qoxxana mala azazida. 
Acts16:23 Iita buka bukkidi qasho keeththan yeggida; qasho keeththaa naagizayssika istta lo7eththi naagana mala azazida. 
Acts16:24 Izikka hessa mala mino azazo ekkidi qasho keeththaas waanna giddo kifile gelththidi istta toho gita durumara shiishshi qachchides. 
Acts16:25 Giddi giddoth gidishin Phawuloosinne Sillaasi woosaninne mazamuren Xoossaa galatishin qasho asay istta yeththaanne galataa ezgi siyides. 
Acts16:26 Hassa7ay baynda dingate qasho keeththaa xaphoppe qaaththiza mino biitta qaaththi hanides; heerakka qasho keeththaa pengeti doyettida; qashettida ubba asaa qashoy birshettides. 
Acts16:27 Qasho keeththaa naagizayssi dhiskofe beeggidi qasho keeththaa pengeti doya dizayssa be7idi qasho asay wuri kessi ekkida misatiin bana wodhana mashsha shoddides. 
Acts16:28 Phawuloosi qasse ba qaalaa dhoqqu histtidi, «Nu wuri haan doos! Ne bolla ayne iita ooththofa» gi waassides." 
Acts16:29 Qasho keeththaa naagizayssi xomppe woossi ekkidi giddo guppi gelides; kokkorishe Phawuloosa toho bollanne Sillaase toho bolla kundides. 
Acts16:30 Istta ekki kare kezidi, «Ha asatoo! Ta attana mala ay ooththoo?» gides." 
Acts16:31 Isttika izas, «Godaa Yesusa ammana; nekka neso asaykka intte wuri attana» gida." 
Acts16:32 Hessafe guye izassinne izason diza asaas ubbaas Godaa qaalaa yootida. 
Acts16:33 Qasho keeththaa naagizayssi heerakka he gallas qammara efidi istta madunththaa meeccides; heerakka izinne izaso asay wuri xammaqettida. 
Acts16:34 Qasho keeththaa naagizayssika istta ba keeththe efidi isttas kath aaththides; baso asaa ubbaara Xoossaa ammanida gishshas addezi daro ufayides. 
Acts16:35 Gadey wontishin dere ayssizayti, «Heyta asata birsha yedda» giidi ba shuumeta qasho keeththaa naagizayssako yeddida." 
Acts16:36 Qasho keeththaa naagizayssika isttas, «Dere ayssizayti intte birshettana mala azazida; hessa gishshas ha7i saron kezi biite» giidi Phawuloosas yootides." 
Acts16:37 Phawuloosi qasse, «Nu Oroome yeleteth gidishin pirday baynda dere sinththan durqqara bukkidi qasho keeththan yeggida; histtiin ha7i qasse nuna qotara asi erontta kessana koyizoo? Hessi hanenna; istti yiidi barkka birshetto!» gides." 
Acts16:38 Shuumeti he izi gida qaalaa dere ayssizaytas yootida; isttika Phawuloosinne Sillaasi Oroome yeleta gididayssa siyidi dagammida. 
Acts16:39 Yiidi isttafe maareteth oychchidi woyneppe kessida; istti he katamayo aggidi haraso baana mala istta woossida. 
Acts16:40 Phawuloosinne Sillaasi qasho keeththaafe kezidi Liidiyaso bida; heenkka diza ammanizayti istta keehi minththeththidi heeppe kezi bida. 
Acts17:1 Phawuloosinne Sillaasi Anfiphoolanne Apholooniya geetettiza derera aadhdhidi Tasolonqe geetettiza dere bida; heenkka Ayhudata Woosa Keeththi dees. 
Acts17:2 Phawuloosikka izas lose gidida mala Ayhudata Woosa Keeth gelides; heedzdzu saamintta kumeth qaalappe ekki ekki isttara haasayettides. 
Acts17:3 Kirstoosi waaye ekkanaassinne hayqqi dendanaas bessizayssa qonccisi ammanththon, «Hayssi ta sabbakiza Yesusi izi kiitetti yaana geetettidayssako!» gides." 
Acts17:4 Ayhudatappe issi issi asay ba siyidayssa ammanidi Phawuloosaranne Sillaasera issife gidides; qasseka daro derey Xoossas yayyiza Giriketappe daro erettida maccassati ba siyida qaalaan ammanidi isttara issino gidida. 
Acts17:5 Ayhudati qasse istta qanaatidi giyan diza wordo asata shiishshidi kumeththa dereza istta bolla denththeththidi katamaan shiro medhdhida. Phawuloosanne Sillaase shiishshidi deraa sinththan essanaas issi Iyaasoone geetettizayssaso koyanaas eleli bida. 
Acts17:6 Gido attiin istta Iyaasoone keeththan demmontta aggida gishshas Iyaasoonenne hara ammaniza asata katama daannata sinththara goochchishe, «Hayti asati dere wursi bul7akishe gam7idi qasse ha7i haa yida." 
Acts17:7 Iyaasooneykka istta ba keeththan woththides; hayti asati wuri, ‹Yesusa geetettiza hara kawoy dees› giidi Qeesaare woga ekkettenna» gishe waassida." 
Acts17:8 Dereynne he katamaa daannati hessa siyidi ba giddon buqettida. 
Acts17:9 Iyaasoonenne haratakka waase xeygisidi yeddida. 
Acts17:10 Ammanizayti heerakka Phawuloosanne Sillaase qammara Beeriya yeddida; isttika hee gakkida mala Ayhudata Woosa Keeththe gelida.
