Romans5:12 Hessa gishshas nagaray issaade gaason duge ha alameza yida mala hayqoykka nagara gaason yides; hayqoykka hessa baggara asa ubbaakko yides; hessas gaasoykka asi wurikka iza baggara nagara ooththida gishshassa. 
Romans5:13 Wogay imettanaappe kase nagaray biitta bolla dees shin wogay bayndason nagaray nagara gidenna. 
Romans5:14 Gido attiin Addaameppe haa simmiin Muse wode gakkanaas diza woden Addaame mala woga menththidi nagara ooththonttayta bollaka hayqoy kawotides; Addaamey buro yaana Kirstoosas leemiso. 
Romans5:15 Gidikkoka iza kiyateththa imotay asa qoho mala gidenna; issaadey mooridayssan daro asay hayqqikokka Xoossa kiyateththaninne issi as Yesus Kirstoosa kiyateththan yida imotay darotas keehi dari imettides. 
Romans5:16 Qasseka Xoossa imotay issaade baggara yida nagarappe beettida ayfe mala gidenna; gaasoykka iza pirday issaade nagara kaallidi pirda ekki yides; iza imotay qasse daro qoho gaason xilloteth ehides. Hayqoy issaade baggara kawotidayssa gidikko daro tirpa gidida Xoossa kiyateththinne xilloteththa imota ekkidayti issaade baggara hessika Yesus Kirstoosa baggara xoonidi de7on daana. 
Romans5:17  
Romans5:18 Histtiko issaade qoho gaason pirday asa ubbaa bolla gakkida mala hessaththoka issaade xilloteththa ooson as ubbaas de7o immiza xilloteththi beettides. 
Romans5:19 Issaadey azazettontta ixxida gishshas daro asay nagaranchcha gidida mala issaade azazeteththan qasse daroti xillana. 
Romans5:20 Wogay yiin mooroy darides; gido attiin nagaray daroyssafe bollara Xoossa kiyateththi keehi darides. 
Romans5:21 Hessika haniday nagaray hayqo bolla kawotidayssa mala Yesus Kirstoosa baggara qasse mernaa de7oy beettana mala iza kiyateththi xilloteththan kawotanaassa. 
Romans6:1 Histtiin nu ay giinoo? Xoossa kiyateththi darana mala nagara gujji ooththinoo? 
Romans6:2 Mulekka gidenna; nuni nagaras hayqqidos; histtiin hayssafe guye nu waani nagaran daanee? 
Romans6:3 Nuni Yesus Kirstoosara issino gidana mala xammaqettidayti iza hayqon nu issife gidanaas xammaqettidayssa hayssa intte erekketii? 
Romans6:4 Hessa gishshas Kirstoosi ba Aawaa bonchchon hayqoppe dendida mala nunikka hessaththo ooraththa de7on daanaas xinqatan hayqqidi izara moogettidos. 
Romans6:5 Nuni hessa mala hayqon izara issino gidikko qasse denththankka izara issino gidoos. 
Romans6:6 Hayssafe guye nuni nagaras aylle gidontta mala nagara asateththay kichchana mala kase nu ceega asateththay izara issife kaqettidayssa nu eroos. 
Romans6:7 Gaasoykka hayqqida asi nagarappe shempides. 
Romans6:8 Nuni Kirstoosara hayqqidayta gidikko nu izara issife daanayssa ammanoos. 
Romans6:9 Kirstoosi hayqoppe dendida gishshas nam7anththo izi hayqqonttayssanne iza bolla hayqos wolqqay bayndayssa nu eroos. 
Romans6:10 Izi hayqqida wode issito ubbaa nagara gishshas hayqqides; gido attiin Xoossas paxa duus dees. 
Romans6:11 Hessaththoka intte nagaras hayqqidi Xoossas Yesus Kirstoosa baggara paxa dizayssa erite. 
Romans6:12 Hessa gishshas iita ooththana koyza iita asho qofa koyidi hayqqida intte asateththaa bolla nagaray kawotana mala ooththofte. 
Romans6:13 Intte asateththaa iita ooso ooththiza miish ooththi nagaras haarisopite; hessa mala ooththanaappe hayqoppe gede de7on pinnida asata mala inttena Xoossas haarisite; intte asateththaa xilloteththa miishsha mala Xoossas haarisite. 
Romans6:14 Intte Xoossa kiyateththa garsan deeta attiin woga garsan dontta gishshas inttena nagaray haarenna. 
Romans6:15 Histtiin ay ooththinoo? Woga garsan gidontta nuni Xoossa kiyateththa garsan diza gishshas nagara ooththinoo? Mulekka ooththanaas bessenna. 
Romans6:16 Intte inttena aylle mala shiishshiza wode intte azazettizaades aylle gididayssa ereeta; hessaththoka gede hayqokko efiza nagaras woykko xilloteththako gaththiza azazeteththas intte aylle gididayssa erekketii? 
Romans6:17 Intte kase nagaras aylleta gidikko inttes imettida timirtezas intte wozinappe azazettida gishshas Xoossi galatetto. 
Romans6:18 Intte nagarappe wozzettidi xilloteththas aylle gidideta. 
Romans6:19 Hayssa tani asa qaalan inttes qonccen yootizay intte yeleteththan daaburanchcha gidida gishshassa. Intte kase wode intte asateththaa aylleteththasinne kaseppe aadhdhi iitana mala ooththi immida mala ha7i qasse geeshshateththaako efiza xilloteththas aylle histti haarisite. 
Romans6:20 Intte kase nagaras aylletidi diza wode intte xilloteththaafe mela attideta shin; 
Romans6:21 ha7i qasse intte yeellatiza miishshatappe he wode ay go7a demmidetii? Hessa he hanozas go7ay hayqo. 
Romans6:22 Ha7i qasse intte nagarappe wozzettidi Xoossa aylleta gidideta; hessika inttena geeshshateththaako kaaleththees; wurseththayka mernaa de7o. 
Romans6:23 Nagara waagay hayqo; gido attiin Xoossa imotay gidikko Godaa Yesus Kirstoosa baggara mernaa de7o. 
Romans7:1 Ta ishatoo! Tani woga eriza asatas yootays; wogay shemppora paxa diza asaa xalala haarizayssa intte erekketii? 
Romans7:2 Issi maccassi azina gelikko ba azinara iza wogan qashettizay azinay paxa diza wode gakkanaassa; azinay hayqqiko iza machcho gidiza wogaappe anjjettawus. 
Romans7:3 Gido attiin azinay paxa dishin iza hara azina gelikko layma geetettawus; azinay hayqqiko qasse hara as gelikko kase azinaa wogaappe anjjettadus attiin, «Layma» geetettuku." 
Romans7:4 Hessa gishshas ta ishatoo! Intteka Yesus Kirstoosa asateththa baggara wogas hayqqideta; intte hayqoppe dendida Kirstoosa bagga gidiin nuni Xoossas ayfe ayfanaassa. 
Romans7:5 Nagaranchcha medheteththa shenen nu diza wode hayqos gaththiza ayfe nu ayfana mala wogay denththeththida nagara amoy nu bolla ooththides. 
Romans7:6 Ha7i gidikko kase nuna waaxi qachchida wogaas hayqqida gishshas he wogaappe wozzettidos; hessika kase ceega wogaan xaafettidayssan gidontta dishe ooraththa Ayana ogen nuni ooththanaassa. 
Romans7:7 Histtiin nu ay giinoo? Ba hu7es wogay nagaraa? Mulekka gidenna. Woga baggara gidonttaakko nagaray aazakko nu erokko shin; wogay «Amottofa!» gonttaako amoy aazakko tumappe ta erikke. 
Romans7:8 Nagaray qasse wogappe kezida azazoy bessida ogen go7ettidi ta giddon dumma dumma iita amo denththeththides; wogay yaanaappe kase nagaray hayqqidaaza. 
Romans7:9 Wogay baynda kase tani paxa dayssishin wogay yiin qasse nagaray paxa gidides; ta gidikko hayqqadis. 
Romans7:10 As ashshana qofettida azazoykka hayqo ekki yidayssa eradis. 
Romans7:11 Nagaray woga baggara beettida gaason go7ettidi tana baleththidessinne azazon wodhides. 
Romans7:12 Hessa gishshas wogay ba baggara geeshsha; azazoykka geeshsha; xillonne lo7o. 
Romans7:13 Gido attiin lo7os hanidayssi taas hayqos gididee? Mulekka gidenna; gido attiin nagaray ba nagarateththan erettana mala lo7o gidida hano baggara ta bolla hayqo ehides; hessika nagaray azazo baggara kaseppe aaththi nagara darssides. 
Romans7:14 Wogay Ayana yo7o gididayssa nu eroos; ta qasse nagaras aylle mala bayzettida asa. 
Romans7:15 Tani ta ooththizayssa erikke; ta ooththana koyzayssa ooththa erikke shin ta ixxiza miish ooththays. 
Romans7:16 Ta ooththana koyontta miish ooththizaa gidikko wogay lo7o gididayssa ta markkattays. 
Romans7:17 Hessa ooththizay tana gidontta ta gaaththan diza nagaray ooththees. 
Romans7:18 Tanan hessika nagaranchcha gidida ta medheteththa giddon aykko lo7o miishshi bayndayssa ta erays; lo7o ooththanaas taas amoteththi dees shin pola ooththa erikke. 
Romans7:19 Ta ooththizay ooththana gaada koyza lo7o ooso gidenna; gido attiin ta ooththana koyontta iita ooso ooththays. 
Romans7:20 Tani ooththanaas koyonttayssa ooththizaa gidikko hessa ooththizay tana gidontta ta giddon diza nagara. 
Romans7:21 Hessa gishshas hayssi wogay ooson dizayssi taas gelides. Hessika tani lo7o ooththana koyaysishin iita ooththays. 
Romans7:22 Tani ta gaaththara Xoossa wogaan ufayettays. 
Romans7:23 Gido attiin ta asateththa giddon ooththiza nagara wogay tana qachchi oykkidi ta qofa wogaara olettiza hara wogay ta asateththa giddon ooththishin beyays. 
Romans7:24 Ta ay mala laafa asee! Hayssa hayqos imettida asateththafe tana ashshanay oonee? 
Romans7:25 Nu Godaa Yesus Kirstoosa baggara galatay Xoossas gido. Histtiko tani ta baggara ta qofan Xoossa wogaas aylle gidashe tani ta medheteththa wogan nagara wogas aylle. 
Romans8:1 Hessa gishshas Yesus Kirstoosa ammanizayta bolla pirday deenna. 
Romans8:2 Gaasoykka de7o Ayana wogay Yesus Kirstoosa baggara nagarappe istta geeshshida gishshassa. 
Romans8:3 Nagaranchcha ashoppe dendidayssan wogay polanaas dandayonttayssa Xoossi ba naaza nagaranchcha asa leemison nagaras yarshettana mala yeddidi polides; histtidi nagara iza ashon pirdides. 
Romans8:4 Hessika nuni ashon gidontta Ayanan simerettiza nuuppe wogay koyza xilloteththaa polanaassa. 
Romans8:5 Asho shene mala daana koyza asata wozinay ashoy koyza miishshan shempees; Ayana shene mala dizayti qasse ba wozina Ayanay koyza miishsha bolla woththeettes. 
Romans8:6 Ashos xalla qofay hayqo gidishin Ayana yo7os qofay gidikko de7onne saroteththa. 
Romans8:7 Nagaras haarettiza wozinay Xoossara ooshsha; gaasoykka izi Xoossa wogas haarettennanne haarettanaas dandayenna. 
Romans8:8 Asho shene mala diza asatikka Xoos ufayssanaas dandayettenna. 
Romans8:9 Intte qasse Xoossa Ayanay inttenan dizaa gidikko ashon gidontta Ayanan deeta; Kirstoosa Ayanay iza bolla bayndaadey Kirstoosas gidenna. 
Romans8:10 Kirstoosi intte giddon diikko qasse intte asateththay nagara gaason hayqeth gidikkoka intte Ayanay qasse xilloteththa gaason de7on dees. 
Romans8:11 Yesusa hayqoppe denththida iza Ayanay intte bolla dizaa gidikko Kirstoosa hayqoppe denththidayssi intte giddon diza iza ayanay hayqqanaas diza intte asateththas de7o immana. 
Romans8:12 Hessa gishshas ta ishatoo! Hessika hananay dosan gidennashin nuni asho shene mala daanaas ashos gidokko. 
Romans8:13 Asho shene mala dizaa gidikko intte hayqqana; asho ooso iitaza intte Ayanan wodhikko intte de7on daana. 
Romans8:14 Xoossa Ayanan kaallizayti istti Xoossa nayta. 
Romans8:15 Intte ekkida Ayanay zaaridi inttena aylleteththan haariza ayana gidontta «Nu Aawawu» gi xeygisiza naateteththa Ayana ekkideta. 
Romans8:16 Nuni Xoossa nayta gididayssa he Ayanay ba baggara nu ayanara issife nuus markkattees. 
Romans8:17 Nuni Xoossa nayta gidikko iza laattizayta. Nu Kirstoosa bonchchoza laattizayta gidana mala addafekka izara iza metoza gishettizayta gidikko nu Xoos laattizayta; Kirstoosarakka issife laattizayta. 
Romans8:18 Ha7i nu ekkiza waayey buro nuus sinththan giigi uttida bonchchozara gaththi xeellishin aykkoka gidenna gays. 
Romans8:19 Medheteththi wurikka Xoossa nayti qonccanayssa laamoteththan naagon dees. 
Romans8:20 Medheteththi wurikka mela hada gidana mala pirdettides; hessika ba dooron gidontta sinththafes haarettana mala izi ba shene mala haarisida gishshassa. 
Romans8:21 Hessika medheteththi wurikka dhayssa aylleteththafe wozzettidi Xoossa naytas gidida bonchchettida shene mala dizaso gakkanaassa. 
Romans8:22 Ha7i gakkanaas medheteththi wurikka daro waayen miixattishe dizayssa nu eroos. 
Romans8:23 Iza xalala gidontta koyro Xillo Ayana imota demmida nunikka nu asateththay attana; nu iza naa gidanayssaka laamotishenne wozinara miixattishe doos. 
Romans8:24 Hayssa ha hidotan xalla attidos; hidotay ayfen beettiza miish gidikko buroppe naagana koshshenna; ha7i ba ayfen be7iza miishshi buroppes naagizay oonee? 
Romans8:25 Gido attiin nuni buro nu ayfen be7ontta miish hidotan naagizaaz gidikko saletay baynda naagoos. 
Romans8:26 Hessaththoka qasse nu daaburshin Ayanay nuna maaddees; nuni woosa wostti woossanaakko erontta gishshas Ayanay nuni qaalan qonccisanaas dandayettontta qaalara nuus woossees. 
Romans8:27 Nu wozina paacci eriza Ayanay izi Ayana qofaa erees; gaasoykka Ayanay Xoossa shene mala ammaniza asaas nuus woossees. 
Romans8:28 Xoossi bana dosizaytassinne iza shene mala xeygettidaytas ubbaas ooththiza miish ubbaaka lo7os ooththizayssa nu eroos. 
Romans8:29 Xoossi kaseppe ba erizayta istti iza naaza misatana mala kasekka doori woththides; hessika daro ba ishata giddofe izi bayra gidanaassa. 
Romans8:30 Kase koyroppe ba dooridayta istta xeygides; qasseka xeygidayta xillisides; ba xillisidaytakka bonchchides. 
Romans8:31 Histtiin hessa nu ay giinoo? Xoossi nunara gidikko nunara eqettanaas dandayzay oonee? 
Romans8:32 Ba naazas mishettontta nu gishshas aaththi immiday iza; histtiin ubba miish nuus izara kiyateththan wursi aazas immennee? 
Romans8:33 Xoossi dooridayta mootizay oonee? Xillisizay Xoossa. 
Romans8:34 Histtiin pirdizay oonee? Hayqqidi hayqoppe dendidi Xoossa ushachchan uttida Yesus Kirstoosi nu gishshas gaannatees. 
Romans8:35 Nuna Kirstoosa siiqoppe shaakkanay oonee? Metoyee? Waayee? Woykko goodeteththee? Woykko gafaa? Woykko kalloteththee? Woykko qoppontta gakkiza metoyee? Mashshaa? 
Romans8:36 Hessika kase, «Ne gishshas nu shukettiza dorsa mala qoodettidos; gallas kumeth ne gishshas nuni hayqora baaxetana» geetetti xaafettidayssa mala." 
Romans8:37 Nuna aazikka izappe shaakkenna; hayssa ubbaan nuna siiqidayssan xoonizaytappeka nu aadhdhoos. 
Romans8:38 Hessa gishshas hayqo gidiin, de7o gidiin, kiitanchchata gidiin, woykko ha7i diza miish gidiin, buro yaana miish gidiin, woykko ay wolqqama gidiin," 
Romans8:39 dhoqqa gidiin woykko ziqqa gidiin, woykko ay medheteth gidiin Godaa Yesus Kirstoosa baggara nuus diza Xoossa siiqoppe nuna shaakkana dandayza miishshi bayndayssa ta shaakka eradis." 
Romans9:1 Ta Yesusa sunththan tumu gays; wordotikke; ta wozinaykka Xillo Ayana baggara taas markkattees. 
Romans9:2 Taas wozinappe kichchontta gita qofaynne mishay dees. 
Romans9:3 Ta dabbota gishshas ta qanggetadanne Kirstoosappe shaaketta wora wodhdhidaakko dosays. 
Romans9:4 Isttika Isra7eele nayta; istti Xoossa naa gidana mala Xoossa bonchchoynne caaqo qaalay, wogaynne Xoossa Keeththa woga hidotay isttas imettides." 
Romans9:5 Kase Aawatikka istta bagga; Kirstoosi istta zereththa zarkken qoodettees; izikka ubbaafe bolla gidida mernaas galatettida Xoossaa. Amiin. 
Romans9:6 Gido attiin hessa guussi Xoossa qaalay attides guus gidenna; Isra7eeleppe yelettiday wuri Isra7eele as gidenna. 
Romans9:7 Abrahaameppe yelettidayti izappe yelettida gishshas wurikka iza nayta gidettennashin, «Ne zereththi Yisaaqa baggara xeygettana» geetettida mala hanides." 
Romans9:8 Hessa guussika Xoossa naa geetettidayti istti ashon yelidayta gidettenna; gido attiin naa gidanayti hidota qaalaan yootetti uttidayta. 
Romans9:9 «Yiza layth hanni wode ta haa simmana; Saaraykka nees attuma naa yelana» geetettidi izas hidota qaalay imettides. 
Romans9:10 Hessa xalalakka gidenna; Irbiqa nayti issaade naakko! Izikka nu aawaa Yisaaqa. 
Romans9:11 Mentteti yelettidi buro iita woykko lo7o ooththontta dishin Xoossa qofay minnana mala," 
Romans9:12 ooson gidontta xeygidayssafe gidida gishshas, «Bayray kaalozas haarettana» geetettidi Irbiqas yootettides." 
Romans9:13 Hessika, «Ta Yaaqoobe dosadis; Eesawe ixxadis» geetetti kase xaafettida mala hanides." 
Romans9:14 Histtiin nu ha7i ay giinoo? Xoossi bessontta ogera maaddi erizee? Mulekka maaddi erenna. 
Romans9:15 Xoossi Muses, «Ta maarana koyidaade maarana; ta mishettana koyidaadeska mishettana» gees." 
Romans9:16 Hessa gishshas asi koyida mala gidontta woykko asa daaburan gidontta Xoossi maarida mala hanees. 
Romans9:17 Geeshsha Maxaafay Paaroone, «Ta wolqqay ne bolla beettana malanne ta sunththi biitta ubbaa bolla yootettana mala ta nena hayssas denththadis» gees." 
Romans9:18 Hessa gishshas Xoossi maarana koyzaade maarees; iza wozina muumisana koyzaade wozina muumisees. 
Romans9:19 Inttefe issaadey, «Histtiin hanoy hessa mala gidikko nuna hanno gakkanaas aazas waayisizee? Gaasoykka iza shene diggana dandayzay oonee?» gaada ne oychchontta aggaka." 
Romans9:20 Gido attiin Xoossas zaaro imos ne oonee? «Oosettida miish zaaridi ooththidayssa ne tana aazas hayssaththo ooththadii?» gi erizee? 
Romans9:21 Urqqa medhdhizaadey he urqqaafe baggaa bonchchos, baggaa qasse coo hiraysso oosos medhdhanaas iza shene gidennee?" 
Romans9:22 Xoossika ba hanqo bessanaassinne ba wolqqa erisanaas koyidi iza hanqo qonccisizayta, dhayanaas giigettidayta dhayssontta aggikochchi!" 
Romans9:23 Koyro bonchchos giigsida iza maaroteth bessizaytas iza bonchcho dureteththi erettana mala izi ooththanaassa. 
Romans9:24 Xeygidaadey Ayhudata baggafe xalala gidontta Ayzaabeta baggafe gidida nunakka ashshontta xeygides. 
Romans9:25 Hose7e maxaafan, «Ta dere gidonttayta tani, ‹Ta dereta› ga xeygana; tani istta dosettonttayta, ‹Dosettidayta› ga xeygana." 
Romans9:26 Qasseka, ‹Intte ta dere deekketa› geetetti yootettidason, ‹Istti de7o Xoossa nayta› geetetti xeygettana.»" 
Romans9:27 Isayaasikka Isra7eele nayta gishshas, «Isra7eele nayta qooday abba ace mala darikkoka guuththati xalala attana." 
Romans9:28 Goday ba pirdaa biitta bolla elle pirdana» gi yootides. 
Romans9:29 Hessika, «Wogga Goday nuus zereth ashshonttaakko nunikka Sodoome katamaa malanne Gamoora katama mala dhayanashin» geetettidi kase Isayaasa doonan yootidayssa mala hanides." 
Romans9:30 Histtiin nu ay giinoo? Ammanon beettida xilloteth demmanaas Ayzaabey daaburontta demmides. 
Romans9:31 Gido attiin xilloteththa woga kaalliza Isra7eele nayti demmibeettenna. 
Romans9:32 Hessi aazas hessaththo hanidee? Istti ammanon gidontta ooson demmana kaallida gishshassa; isttika dhuphe shuchchan dhuphettida. 
Romans9:33 Hessika, «Hekko as dhuphiza shuch istta kundisiza zaalla Xiyoone bolla ta woththana; izan ammanizaadey yeellatenna» geetettidi kase Geeshsha Maxaafan xaafettidayssa mala hanides." 
Romans10:1 Ta ishatoo! Isra7eele nayta gishshas ta amoynne ta Xoos woossizay istti dhayontta attanaassa. 
Romans10:2 Istti Xoossa yo7os mishettizayta gididayssa ta istta gishshas markkattana dandayays; istta misheteththi gidikko erateththan gidenna. 
Romans10:3 Xoossi as xillisiza oge erontta aggidi ba xilloteththa oge kaallida attiin Xoossa xilloteththa oge kaallibeettenna. 
Romans10:4 Ammaniza asaa ubbaa xillisanaas Kirstoosi woga ubbaa polides. 
Romans10:5 Musey woga baggara beettiza xilloteththaa gishshas erisishe, «Hayta wogata poli ooththizaadey ha wogatan daana» gizayssa." 
Romans10:6 Ammanon beettiza xilloteththi qasse, «Ne wozinara pude salo oonee kezanay? gooppa;» hessaththo guussi Kirstoosa saloppe duge haa woththana guussa." 
Romans10:7 Woykko, « ‹Duge ciimman oonee wodhdhanay?› Gooppa!» hessika Kirstoosa hayqoppe buro denththana guussa." 
Romans10:8 Gido attiin qaalay ay gizee? «Qaalay ne achchan dees.» Ne doonaninne ne wozinan dees, nuni ammano gishshas sabbakiza qaalay hayssa." 
Romans10:9 Neni ne doonara, «Yesusi Godaa» gaada markkattiko Xoossi iza hayqoppe denththidayssa ne wozinan ne ammanikko attana." 
Romans10:10 Neni xillanay wozinan ammanikko; ne attanay ne doonara markkattiina. 
Romans10:11 Geeshsha Maxaafay giza mala, «Izan ammanizay wurikka yeellatenna.»" 
Romans10:12 Ayhudata giddoninne Ayzaabeta giddon dummateththi deenna; issi Goday ubbaasikka Godaa; iza woossizayta gujji anjjees. 
Romans10:13 «Godaa sunth xeygizayti wurikka attana» geetetti Geeshsha Maxaafan xaafettides. 
Romans10:14 Histtiin iza ammanonttayti iza wozgi xeyganee? Qasse iza gishshas siyontta dishe wostti ammananee? Sabaakey baynda dishin wostti siyanee? 
Romans10:15 Kiitettontta wostti sabbakandettoo? Hessika, «Mishiraachcho qaala ekki yizayta yuussi ay mala lo7oo!» geetetti Geeshsha Maxaafan xaafettida mala hanides." 
Romans10:16 Gido attiin siyidayti wurikka Mishiraachcho qaalaa ekkibeettenna; Isayaasi, «Godoo! Nu yootidayssa ooni ammanidee?» gida mala hanides." 
Romans10:17 Hessa gishshas ammanoy beettizay yootiza qaala siyeththana; yootettiza qaalaykka Kirstoosa gishshas yootiza qaalaappe. 
Romans10:18 Gido attiin asay siyibeenneeshaa? gaada ta oychchays; tumappe asay siyides; Geeshsha Maxaafan xaafettida mala, «Istta qaalay biitta ubbaaninne alame gaxa gakkanaas siyettdes.»" 
Romans10:19 Ta qasseka oychchays; Isra7eele nayti qaalaa eribeetteneeshaa? Koyro Musey isttas, «Ta dere gidonttaytan ta istta amosana; yuushshi qoppontta deretan ta istta yiillochchana» gides." 
Romans10:20 Isayaasikka xalateththan, «Tana koyonttaytas ta beettadis; tana oychchonttaytas tana qonccisadis» gides." 
Romans10:21 Isra7eele gishshas qasse, «Taas azazettontta derekkonne taas eeno gontta derekko kumeththa gallas ta kushe miccadis» gees." 
Romans11:1 Histtiin Xoossi ba dereta yeggi aggidee? Gaada ta oychchays; mulekka aggibeenna; tanikka ta baggara Biniyaame zarkke, Abrahaame zereth gidida Isra7eele asa." 
Romans11:2 Xoossi koyroppe ba erida dereza yeggibeenna; Eelaasi Isra7eele nayta bolla mooto Xoossaako wostti shiishshidaakko Geeshsha Maxaafay iza gishshas ay gizaakko intte erekketii? 
Romans11:3 «Godoo! Istti ne nabeta wodhida; nees yarshizasohotakka laallida; qasse tani tarkka attadis; tanakka wodhana geettes» gides. 
Romans11:4 Xoossi izas, «Ba7aale geetettiza Eeqas goynnonttayta laappun shii as tani taas ashshadis» gi zaarides" 
Romans11:5 Hessa malakka ha7i ha wodezankka Xoossa kiyateththan Isra7eele asaappe dooretti attida guuththati deettes. 
Romans11:6 Histtiin hessi Xoossa kiyateththan attiin asa ooson gidenna; asa ooson gididaakko Xoossa kiyateththi kiyateth gidenna. 
Romans11:7 Histtiin ay gaanee? Isra7eele nayti lo7eththi koyidayssa demmibeettenna; Xoossan doorettidayti gidikko demmida; hankko attidayta wozinay muumides. 
Romans11:8 Kase, «Istta ayfey xeellontta mala, istta hayththayka siyontta mala Xoossi hanno gakkanaas isttas doccissiza Ayana immides» geetetti Geeshsha Maxaafan xaafettida mala." 
Romans11:9 Dawitikka, «Istta maadday istta oykkiza narxanne yarde; isttas dhuphizaazinne qixaate gido." 
Romans11:10 Istta ayfey xeellofo; goozetto; istta zokkoy mernaas kuunno» gides. 
Romans11:11 Ane qasse ta zaara oychchays; Isra7eele asay kundeththaafe nam7anththo dendennee? Dendana. Harappeka Isra7eele nayta qanaatissana gishshas istta mooro gaason atoteththi Ayzaabetas gakkides. 
Romans11:12 Gido attiin qasse istta mooroy Ayzaabetas anjjo gidides. Istta kundeththika qasse Ayzaabetas anjjo gidikko istti simmi attidaakko ay mala gita anjjo gidandeeshin! 
Romans11:13 Ayzaabetoo! Ta inttes yootays; ta Ayzaabetas kiitettidaade gidida gishshas ta oosoza minna polana. 
Romans11:14 Hessika ta bagga asati amosana mala denththeththada isttafe guuththa asata ashshanaas ufays ooththays. 
Romans11:15 Xoossi istta aggida Ayzaabeti Xoossara giigikko Xoossi Isra7eele nayta zaaridi ekkiza wode inttes aazi hanana misatizee? Hessa guussi, «Hayqoppe dendides» guussa mala." 
Romans11:16 Koyro bukeesoy lo7o gidikko hankko izappe oosettizayssi wurikka lo7o gidees; hessaththoka issi miththa xaphoy lo7o gidikko hankko iza bolla diza haggatikka lo7o gideettes. 
Romans11:17 Keeththa matan diza wogara miththa haggata malati intte meqqi wodhdhiin hankko woran diza wogara miththata misatiza Ayzaabeti intte kichchoosan gididi intte haaronne intte anjjo shaakki ekkizaadentta gidikko," 
Romans11:18 heyta he meqqi wodhdhida haggata bolla otorettofa; intte istta bolla otorettiko qasse hanno wozinan woththite; he miththaa tookkiday nena gidakka; miththay nena tookkides attiin. 
Romans11:19 Histtiko, «He haggati meqqi wodhdhiday nuni istti kichchoosan gelana malassa» gontta aggeketa." 
Romans11:20 Tumu gidetashin istti meqqiday ammano paceppe dendidayssanna. Intte qasse ammanon eqqideta; babbite attiin otorettofte. 
Romans11:21 Xoossi koyroppe diza haggatas mishettonttaade gidikko intteska mishettenna. 
Romans11:22 Hessa gishshas Xoossa kiyateththinne iza menxe iitateththaa ane xeella; iza menxe iitateththi kundidayta bolla; iza kiyateththi qasse intte iza qadheteththa garsan diza wode gakkanaas xalala; hessi baynda aggiko intteka qanxxettana. 
Romans11:23 Istti ammanontta minni eqqidasoppe simmiko kase ba dizaso simmi gelana; Xoossika istta zarsi gelththana dandayees. 
Romans11:24 Intte bazzo wogara miththafe qanxxetti kase intte medheteththafe gidontta lo7o miththan intte gelana dandaykko koyroppe ba medheteththa haggata gididayti heyti kase iza bolla diza wogara miththaan simmi geloy isttas waani hanennee? 
Romans11:25 Ta ishatoo! Intte cincca as gididayssa inttes misatontta mala hayssa giddo xuura yo7oza intte erontta attana mala ta koykke. Hessika Ayzaabetappe xeygettidayti wuri ammanana gakkanaas Isra7eele nayta wozinay muumides. 
Romans11:26 Hessa gishshas Isra7eele nayti wurikka attana. «Ashshizaadey Xiyooneppe yaana; Yaaqoobeppeka iitateth diggana. 
Romans11:27 Tani istta nagara wursa dhayssidaappe guye ta isttara caaqon geliza qaalay hessa» geetettidi kase Geeshsha Maxaafan xaafettida mala hanides. 
Romans11:28 Inttes Ayzaabetas Mishiraachcho qaalay gakkana mala Isra7eele nayti Xoossan ixettida as gidida; gidikkoka kase dooroza mala gidikko ba aawata baggara istti dosettidayta. 
Romans11:29 Xoossi dooridaappenne ba kiyateth immidaappe guye ba ooththida miishshan simmidi modhettenna. 
Romans11:30 Intteka kase azazettonttaytakko! Istti azazettontta ixxiin ha7i inttena maaridayssaththo; 
Romans11:31 Xoossi inttena maarida gaason isttika maarettana mala ha7i azazettonttayta gidida. 
Romans11:32 Xoossi wursika maaranaas asi wurikka azazettontta mala gordides. 
Romans11:33 Xoossa dureteththi, aadho erateththaynne iza erateththay ay mala ciimmaa! Iza pirday ay malakko paacettenna; izi aadhdhida geedoykka erettenna." 
Romans11:34 «Godaa wozina eriday oonee? Izas zore immiday oonee? 
Romans11:35 Xoossi zaari immana mala izas tal7e immiday oonee?» geetetti xaafettida mala. 
Romans11:36 Wurikka izappe, izan, izassa; izas bonchchoy mernaappe mernaas gido! Amiin." 
Romans12:1 Hessa gishshas ta ishatoo! Intte asateththaa geeshshinne Xoos ufayssiza de7o yarsho ooththidi intte shiishshana mala ta inttena Xoossa qadhetan woossays; hessika wozinama asa mala intte Xoossas ooththiza ooso. 
Romans12:2 Lo7o, ufayssizaazinne kumeth gidida Xoossa sheney aazakko intte paacci erana mala intte qofan ooraxidi laamettite attiin hayssa alame asaa misatopite." 
Romans12:3 Inttes Xoossi immida ammano mala intterkka inttena paacci xeellite attiin ha7i dizayssafe bollara inttena dhoqqisi xeellontta mala tani taas imettida Xoossa kiyateththan inttena issaa issaa zorays. 
Romans12:4 Nuuppe issi issi asas issi asateththa bolla daro billiteti diza mala heytikka he billiteti issi mala ooso ooththonttayssaththo," 
Romans12:5 hessaththoka nuni darota gidi uttidi Kirstoosan issi asho; nuni issoy issaas asho. 
Romans12:6 Nuus imettida imota mala dumma dumma imotay dees; issaades buroppe hananaaz yooto gidikko izaades imettida ammano mala yooto. 
Romans12:7 Ooththi maaddizaadey ooththi maaddo; tamaarsizaadeyka tamaarso. 
Romans12:8 Zorizaadey gidikko zoro; bayndaytas immizaadey gujji immo; ayssizaadey minni aysso; maarizaadeyka ufayssan maaro. 
Romans12:9 Intte siiqoteththi qoodheppe qommon gidoppo; iita gididayssa wursika ixxite. Lo7o gididayssara issife oykettite. 
Romans12:10 Intte intte garsan issoy issaara ishata mala lo7eththi siiqettite; issoy issaa baappe aaththi bonchchizayta gidite. 
Romans12:11 Godaas ooththana Ayanan xuugettizayta gidite attiin hessa he minoteththaafe guye goopite. 
Romans12:12 Hidotan ufayettizayta gidite; meto dandayte; woosan minnite. 
Romans12:13 Ammanishe waayettizaytas inttes dizayssafe shaakki immite; imath mokkite. 
Romans12:14 Inttena qanggizayta anjjite attiin qanggofte. 
Romans12:15 Ufayettizaytara ufayettite; muuzottizaytara muuzottite. 
Romans12:16 Intte intte garsan doseteththan diite; manqotara issifeteththan daanaas koyite attiin otorettoftenne ceeqettofte. 
Romans12:17 Oonaska iita gishshas iita zaaropite; as ubbaa achchan lo7o miish ooththanaas minnite. 
Romans12:18 Inttes dandayettiko intte intte baggara as ubbaara saron diite. 
Romans12:19 Ta siiqotoo! Intte halo Xoossi kesso attiin intterkka halo kessofte. «Halo kessanay tana gees Goday» geetetti Geeshsha Maxaafan xaafettides. 
Romans12:20 Halo kessanaappe, «Neni ne morkkey gafikko miza; izi saamettiko ushsha; ne hessaththo ooththiko tama bonqo iza bolla koraasa» geetettidi Geeshsha Maxaafan xaafettides." 
Romans12:21 Iita lo7o ooson xoona attiin iitan xoonettofa. 
Romans13:1 Ay asikka bana ayssiza daannatas haarettanaas bessees; Xoossafe imettontta dishin daannateththi deenna; ha7i diza daannati Xoossafe daannatidayta. 
Romans13:2 Hessa gishshas daanna bolla makkalliday Xoossa wogaa bolla makkallees. He makkallizaytikka ba bolla pirda eheettes. 
Romans13:3 Dere ayssizayti iita ooththizayta babiseettes attiin lo7o ooththizayta babisettenna. Neni dere ayssizaades babbontta aggana koyay? Histtiko lo7o ooththa; izikka nena galatana. 
Romans13:4 Izi nees lo7o ooththanaas Xoossa oosanchcha; gido attiin ne iita ooththidaa gidikko izas babba; gaasoykka izi mashsha coo mela gixxibeenna; izi iita ooththizaade qaxxayanaas Xoossa oosanchcha. 
Romans13:5 Hessa gishshas iza qixaates babo xalala gidontta ne qofankka daannatizaades azazettanaas bessees. 
Romans13:6 Intte giira immizay hessassa; ayssizayta he oosoza bolla Xoossi woththides. 
Romans13:7 Isttafe issaas issaas bessizayssa immite; giira immana bessizaytas giira immite; qaraxa qanxxanaas bessizaytas qaraxa qanxxite; babbanaas bessizaytas babbite; bonchchanaas bessizayta bonchchite. 
Romans13:8 Intte garsan issoy issaara siiqeteththafe attiin oona bollaka acoy dooppo; as siiqiza asi izi wogaa polides. 
Romans13:9 «Laymatoppa; wodhoppa; amottofa» gizaytinne hara azazoti diikkoka, «As ubbaaka ne mala siiqa» giza hanno issi wogayn wurikka kuuyettides." 
Romans13:10 Siiqoy asa bolla iita ooththenna; hessa gishshas siiqoy woga ubbaas kuushsha. 
Romans13:11 Hayssa wodeza caddi xeellidi hessa ooththite; ha7i hanna intte dhiskofe dendiza wode; nu kase ammanoosofe haa simmiin ha7i nuus attiza wodey matides. 
Romans13:12 Qammay aadhdhiin wonttana gees; hessa gishshas ane nu dhuma ooso wora yeggidi poo7o ola miish may7oos. 
Romans13:13 Gallassara hemettiza mala ane wogara hemettoos; magulsaninne maththon gidoppo; layma amoninne layman gidoppo; qanaateteththaninne palaman gidoppo. 
Romans13:14 Hessa aggidi Yesus Kirstoosa may7ite; asho amo polanaas qoppofte. 
Romans14:1 Intte garsan ammanon buro minnonttaade shiishshi ekkite attiin iza qofaa bolla pirdofte. 
Romans14:2 Issi issi asi beettidayssa wursi maanaas ammanoy dees; qasse ammanon minnonttaadey atakilte xalala mees. 
Romans14:3 Beettidayssa ubbaa mizaadey wursi monttaade kadhoppa; monttaadey qasse mizaade bolla pirdofo; Xoossi ubbaaka ekkides. 
Romans14:4 Hankko ooththizaade bolla pirdizaadey ne oonee? Izaadey kundiko woykko eqqikokka Godaassa; Goday iza essanaas dandayza gishshas izi eqqandes. 
Romans14:5 Issaadey, «Gallassatappe issi gallas hara gallassafe aaththidi baas dumma gallas» gi qoppees; hara asi qasse, «Gallassati wurikka issi gina» gi qoppees. Issi issi asi ba wozinan ammanida mala ooththo." 
Romans14:6 Issi gallas hara gallassafe dummasi qoppizaadey izi hessa ooththizay Godaa bonchchos gidikko mizaadeyka Godaa bonchchos giidi mees. Histtidi Xoos galatees. Monttaadeyka Godaa bonchchos giidi muus aggeessinne Xoossas galata immees. 
Romans14:7 Nuuppe oonikka baas dizaadeynne baappe baas hayqqizaadey deenna. 
Romans14:8 Nu diikkoka Godaas doos; hayqqikokka Godaas hayqqoos; hessa gishshas diikkoka woykko hayqqiko nuni Godaassa. 
Romans14:9 Hessa gishshas hayqqidaytassinne paxa dizaytas Godaa gidanaas Kirstoosi hayqqidi hayqoppe paxi dendides. 
Romans14:10 Histtiin ne aazas ne ishaa bolla pirday? Aazas ne ishaa leqqay? Nu wurikka Xoossa pirda wombora sinth shiiqana doos. 
Romans14:11 «Ta paxa days; gulbatey wurikka taas gulbatana. Inxarsi wuri Xoossas markkattana» geetetti kase Geeshsha Maxaafan xaafettides. 
Romans14:12 Hessa gishshas nuni issi issi asi Xoossa sinth shiiqidi nu ooso gishshas izas zaaro immana. 
Romans14:13 Hessa gishshas nuni nu garsan issoy issaa bolla pirdanaappe ane naagettoos; hessa aggidi nu ishaas dhuphe gidizayssa woykko iza oykkiza narxa woththontta mala ane nu naagettoos. 
Romans14:14 Tani Godaa Yesusan ammanada miza kaththan tunay bayndayssa eradis; gido attiin issaadey issi miish tuna gi qoppiko he miishshay izaades tuna. 
Romans14:15 Neni ne ishaas miza kaththa gaason dhuphe gidikko siiqon simerettabeekka; Kirstoosi iza gishshas hayqqida ne ishaa ne miza kaththa gaason wodhoppa. 
Romans14:16 Intte lo7o giidi qoppiza miishshi iita geetettana mala ooththofte. 
Romans14:17 Xoossa kawoteththi Xillo Ayanan beettida xilloteth, saroteththinne ufayssafe attiin muussa yo7onne ushsha yo7o gidenna." 
Romans14:18 Hayssaththo Kirstoosas ooththizaadey Xoos ufaysseessinne asa achchanka galatettees. 
Romans14:19 Hessa gishshas saroteththi beettiza ogenne nuni nu garsan lo7anaas bessiza oge ane koyoos. 
Romans14:20 Nuni miza kaththa gaason Xoossa ooso ane moorokko; kaththi wurikka geeshsha; gido attiin hara asas dhuphe gidiza kath muussi bala ooso. 
Romans14:21 Ne ishaas dhuphe gidizaaz gidikko ashokka maanaappenne woyne cajje uyanaappe woykko ay miishshika ne ooththontta aggiko lo7o. 
Romans14:22 Hessa gishshas haytantta misatiza miishshatas nees diza ammanoy ne giddoninne Xoossa giddon de7o. «Hayssi likkeko» giidi ammanon ekkida miishshan barkka ba bolla pirdonttaadey izaadey anjjettidaade. 
Romans14:23 Gido attiin wozinara sidhishe miikko izi ammanon montta gishshas iza bolla pirdettides; ammanon ooththonttaazi wurikka nagara. 
Romans15:1 Nuni ammanon minnidayti hankko ammanon minnonttayta meto tookkanaas bessees attiin nu xalla ufayettizayta gidanaas bessenna. 
Romans15:2 Nuni wurikka hara asi ba ammanon minnana mala iza go7izaazinne ufayssiza miish ane ooththoos. 
Romans15:3 Kirstoosi bana ufayssibeenna; harappeka, «Asay nena cayida cashshay tana gakkides» geetetti kase Geeshsha Maxaafan xaafettidayssi polettides." 
Romans15:4 Nuni Geeshsha Maxaafatappe demmiza dandayaynne minoteththi nuus daana mala koyroppe xaafettidayssi wurikka nu izappe nuus timirte demmana mala xaafettides. 
Romans15:5 Minoteththinne dandaya immiza Xoossi intte Yesus Kirstoosa kaallishin inttes intte giddon Ayana issifeteth immo. 
Romans15:6 Hessika intte issi wozinaninne issi doona gididi nu Godaa Yesus Kirstoosa Aawaa Xoossa bonchchanaassa. 
Romans15:7 Hessa gishshas Xoossi inttena Xoossa bonchchon mokki ekkida mala intteka issoy issaa ufayssan mokki ekkite. 
Romans15:8 Kase aawatas imettida hidota qaalaa polanaas Xoossa tumateththi erettana mala Kirstoosi Ayhudatas ooththizaade gididayssa ta inttes yootays. 
Romans15:9 Hessaththoka Ayzaabeti iza maaroteththaa gishshas Xoos galatana mala; hessika, «Ta nena dere giddon galatana; ne sunththaaska galata mazamure yexxana» geetetti Geeshsha Maxaafan xaafettida mala." 
Romans15:10 Qasseka, «Ayzaabetoo! Intteka Xoossa deretara ufayettite» geetetti Geeshsha Maxaafan xaafettides." 
Romans15:11 Nam7anththoka, «Ayzaabeti intte wurikka Godaa galatite; derey wuri iza sabbite» geetetti Geeshsha Maxaafan xaafettides." 
Romans15:12 Hessaththo Isayaasan, «Ba dere asaa bolla kawotiza Isseye nay yaana. Alame asaa ayssizaadey dendana; isttika izan ufayettana» gees." 
Romans15:13 Intte izan ammaniza gishshas hidota Xoossi inttenan ufayssinne saroteth kunththo; hessika Xillo Ayana wolqqa hidotay inttes daranaassa. 
Romans15:14 Ta ishatoo! Intte lo7eteththan, erateth ubbaan kumidaytanne harata zoranaas eray dizayta gididayssa ta addafe shaakka eradis." 
Romans15:15 Ta Xoossafe ekkida imotaa gina qasseka inttena qofsanaas issi issi yo7ota xalateththan inttes xaafadis. 
Romans15:16 Hessa he kiyateththi imettiday tani Xoossa Mishiraachcho qaalaa hankko deretas yootana malassa; qasseka qeese mala gidida Yesus Kirstoosas ooththanaassa; hessa gishshas hankko dere asay Xillo Ayanan dummatidi Xoos ufayssiza yarsho gididi shiiqana mala ooththays. 
Romans15:17 Hessa tani Xoossas ooththiza gishshas Yesus Kirstoosan ceeqettays. 
Romans15:18 Ta yootidayssaninne ta ooththidayssan hankko dere asay Xoossas azazettana mala Kirstoosi tanan gididi ooththidaazappe attiin hara haasayana xalikke. 
Romans15:19 Hessika haniday Xillo Ayana wolqqan malaatata baggara hanides; hessa malankka Yerusalaameppe Ilwaqoore gakkanaas ta Kirstoosa Mishiraachcho qaalaa sabbakadis. 
Romans15:20 Hara asi kase ooththidason ta gelontta mala gaada kase Kirstoosa sunththi xeygetti eronttason Mishiraachcho qaalaa sabbakanayssi taas amo. 
Romans15:21 Harappeka, «Iza gishshas isttas yootetonttayti iza beyana; siyi eronttayti akeekana» geetetti kase Geeshsha Maxaafan xaafettida mala hanides." 
Romans15:22 Hessa gaason ta intteko bontta mala daro wode digettadis. 
Romans15:23 Ha7i qasse taas haan oosoy baynda gishshas daro layththatappe haa simmiin inttena beyanaas ta daro laamotadis. 
Romans15:24 Hayssa ta qofaa tani Ispeene biza wode polanaas qoppays; heera aadhdhashe inttena beyanaassinne inttenara guuththa wode gam7ada laamota aaththida mala intte tana maaddana gaada hidota ooththays. 
Romans15:25 Ha7i qasse ammanizaytas imettiza maado miish ekkada Yerusalaame bays. 
Romans15:26 Gaasoykka Maqidooniyaninne Akayan diza manqota maaddana Xoossa derey dendides. 
Romans15:27 Hayssa ha maadoza istti ba dosan immiday istti ooththanaas bessiza gishshassa; Ayzaabeti Ayhudatara issife Ayana anjjo ekkizayta gidikko isttika baas diza biittaa anjjon Ayhudata maaddanaas bessees. 
Romans15:28 Hessa gishshas hayssa shiiqida maado miishshaa Yerusalaamen immidaappe guye intte achchara ta Ispeene baana. 
Romans15:29 Ta hee intteko bashe inttes Kirstoosa anjjo kunththa ekka baanayssa ta erays. 
Romans15:30 Ta ishatoo! Tani Xoossa woosan baaxetiza mala intteka tanara baaxetana mala ta inttena Godaa Yesus Kirstoosaninne Xillo Ayana siiqon woossays. 
Romans15:31 Tani Yuhudan diza ammanontta asaa kusheppe attana malanne Yerusalaamen diza ta oosoykka heen ammanizayta achchan ekettana mala taas woossite. 
Romans15:32 Hessika Xoossa shene mala hee intteko ta ufayssara baana malanne inttenara issife shempanaassa. 
Romans15:33 Saroteththa Goday inttenara ubbatara gido. Amiin. 
Romans16:1 Kinkira7oose Woosa Keeththan ooththiza ammanettida michcheyo Pebeeno inttes hadara gays. 
Romans16:2 Ammaniza asas bessiza moko intte izo Godaa sunththan mokki ekkana malanne iza inttefe koyza ay miishshankka intte izo maaddana mala ta inttena qofsays. 
Romans16:3 Kase tanara Godaa Yesus Kirstoosas issife ooththida Phirsiqillassinne Aqilas ta saroka gaththite. 
Romans16:4 Istti ta gishshas hayqqana gakkanaas bana aaththi immida; tana xalala gidontta Ayzaabetappe ammanidaytikka istta galateettes. 
Romans16:5 Istta keeththan diza ammaniza asaakka saro giite; Iisiyappe koyro Kirstoosan ammanida ta siiqoza Ephenexoose saro giite. 
Romans16:6 Inttes daro daaburdaaro Maaramo saro giite. 
Romans16:7 Tanara issife qashettida Andiraqonenne Yuniyaase saro giite; heytantti Hawaareta garsan lo7o sunththara dizaytanne Kirstoosa taappe kase ammanidayta. 
Romans16:8 Tani Godaa baggara daro siiqiza Philyaxone saro giite. 
Romans16:9 Kirstoosa ooso tanara issife ooththiza Irobanoonenne ta siiqiza Senxakekka saro giite. 
Romans16:10 Kirstoosan iza ammanoy paacettidi galatettida Exesseneesses ta saroka gaththite; Arsixabaloso asaasikka ta saroka gaththite. 
Romans16:11 Ta dabbo Herodiyaana saro giite; Godaan diza Niriqaasoso asaa saro giite. 
Romans16:12 Godaan gididi minoteththan ooththiza maccassata Tirofimoononne Xirofimoono saro giite; Godaas ooson daro daaburdaaris Kirstoosan tani izo siiqiza Xarsidis ta saroka gaththite. 
Romans16:13 Godaan doorettida Erufoones, taassinne izas aayo gididaaris ta saroka yootite." 
Romans16:14 Asqeroones, Afilasoones, Heromeenes, Phaxirobaanes, Hermaanessinne isttara diza ishata ubbatas ta saroka gaththite." 
Romans16:15 Filegoones, Yuuliyas, Neeriyassinne iza michcheys hessaththoka Alxoones, isttara diza ammanizaytasikka ta saroka gaththite." 
Romans16:16 Issoy issaa yeeri yeeri ekkidi sarokettite; Kirstoosan ammaniza Woosa Keeththaa asay wurikka inttena saro gees. 
Romans16:17 Ta ishatoo! Asa garsan shaaketeth medhdhizaytappenne intte tamaarda timirtaa ekkontta ixon inttes dhuphe gidiza asatappe intte naagettite. 
Romans16:18 Heytantta mala asati Yesus Kirstoosas ooththizayta gidontta ba qanththa kaththa gishshas ooththizayta; shugo qaalara haasayaninne wozina kiya asata baleththeettes. 
Romans16:19 Intte mishiraachcho qaalas azazettizayta gididayssa asi wuri siyides; hessika tana daro ufayssides; gidikkoka intte lo7o hanos cinccata qasse iita oosos eeyata gidana mala ta koyays. 
Romans16:20 Saroteththa Goday Xala7e eeson intte toho gars aaththi dincereththana. Godaa Yesus Kirstoosa kiyateththi inttenara gido. 
Romans16:21 Tanara issife ooththiza Ximtoosi qasseka ta dabbo Luqiyoosi, Iyaasooneynne Susiphexiroosi inttena saro saro geettes." 
Romans16:22 Hayssa kiitaa xaafiday tani Xerixiyoosi inttena Godaa sunththan saro gays. 
Romans16:23 Taninne hayssan diza kumeththa Woosa Keeththa asay mokki ekkiza Gayiyoosikka inttena saro gees; katama miishshaa oykkiza Erisxoosinne nu isha Qo7axiroosi inttena saro geettes. 
Romans16:24 Godaa Yesus Kirstoosa kiyateththi inttenara ubbatara gido. Amiin. 
Romans16:25 Tani yootiza Mishiraachcho qaalay Yesus Kirstoosa gishshas yootettiza kiitaynne beni wodeppe doommidi qotan gam7idi ha7i qasse qonccida tuma xuura baggara izi inttena ammanon essanaas dandayees. 
Romans16:26 Ha7i qasse hayssi tumay qonccides; mernaa Xoossa azazon wurikka ammanidi azazettana mala nabeta maxaafa baggara dereti wurikka iza erana mala hanides. 
Romans16:27 Izi xalala era gidida Godaas Yesus Kirstoosa baggara mernaa bonchchoy izas gido! Amiin. 
1Corinthians1:1 Xoossa shenen Yesus Kirstoosas kiitettanaas xeygettida Phawuloosappenne nu ishaa Sostineeseppe," 
1Corinthians1:2 Qorontoosen diza Xoossa Woosa Keeththaas, Godaa Yesus Kirstoosas dummatidaytassinne isttassara nuussara Godaa gidida Godaa Yesus Kirstoosa sunththaa awanka xeygiza ammanizaytara gidanaas xeygettida asa ubbaas," 
1Corinthians1:3 nu Aawa Xoossafenne Godaa Yesus Kirstoosappe kiyateththinne saroy inttes gido. 
1Corinthians1:4 Godaa Yesus Kirstoosa baggara inttes imettida Xoossa kiyateththaa gishshas ubba wode intte gishshassika tani Xoossaa galatays. 
1Corinthians1:5 Gaasoykka ay yo7onkka, hessika haasayan gidiin erateth ubbaan intte duretideta." 
1Corinthians1:6 Kirstoosa gishshas nu inttes markkattidayssi intte achchan minnides. 
1Corinthians1:7 Hessa gishshas intte Yesus Kirstoosi qonccana gallas naagishin Ayana imotatappe aykkoyka inttes paccenna. 
1Corinthians1:8 Godaa Yesus Kirstoosi nam7anththo yaana gallassan intte intte bolla borey baynda beettana mala wurseth gakkanaas izi inttena lo7eththi naagana. 
1Corinthians1:9 Izi ba naaza nu Godaa Yesus Kirstoosa issifeteththaako inttena xeygida Xoossi izi ammanettida Xoossa. 
1Corinthians1:10 Ta ishatoo! Intte garsan shaaketeththi dontta mala inttes issi wozinaynne issi qofay daana malanne intte intte garsan issino gidana mala Godaa Yesus Kirstoosa sunththan ta inttena woossays. 
1Corinthians1:11 Ta ishatoo! Intte garsan palamay dizayssa ta Qaalo7e soo asaappe siyadis. 
1Corinthians1:12 Yo7ozikka hayssa mala; intte garsan issi issi asati, «Ta Phawuloosa bagga» geettes; baggay qasse, «Ta Aphiloosa bagga» geettes; baggay qasse, «Ta Keefa bagga» gishin haray qasse, «Ta Kirstoosa bagga» geettes." 
1Corinthians1:13 Histtiko Kirstoosi shaaketti wodhdhidee? Intte gishshas Phawuloosi kaqettidee? Woykko Phawuloosa sunththan xammaqettidetii? 
1Corinthians1:14 Intte giddofe Qerisphoosappenne Gayiyoosappe attiin hara oonakka ta xammaqontta gishshas Xoossaa galatays. 
1Corinthians1:15 Hessa gishshas oonikka, «Ta Phawuloosa sunththan xammaqettadis» gaana asi deenna." 
1Corinthians1:16 Tumukka Isttifaanose soo asaa xammaqadis; heytappe hara ta xammaqidaakko ta erizaadey deenna. 
1Corinthians1:17 Kirstoosi tana kiittiday Mishiraachcho qaalaa yootanaas attiin xammaqanaas gidenna; Kirstoosa masqaley hada gidontta mala tani asappe gidida cinccateththan sabbakikke. 
1Corinthians1:18 Masqaleza kiitay dhayana dizaytas eeyateththa; gido attiin attana diza nuus gidikko Xoossa wolqqa. 
1Corinthians1:19 «Cinccata cinccateth ta isttafe dhayssana; eranchchata erateththaa ta hada ooththana» geetetti Geeshsha Maxaafan xaafettides. 
1Corinthians1:20 Cinccay awan dizee? Tamaarda eray awan dizee? Hayssa wodeza pilggi erizay awan dizee? Xoossi ha alameza erateth eeyateth ooththibeennee? 
1Corinthians1:21 Xoossa erateththafe dendidayssan alamey ba erateththan Xoos eroy xooniin sabbako eeyateththan ammanizayta ashshanaas Xoossa shene gidides. 
1Corinthians1:22 Ay wodekka Ayhudati dumma malaata koyeettes; Girike asati qasse erateth koyeettes. 
1Corinthians1:23 Nuni gidikko kaqettida Kirstoosa sabbakoos; hessika Ayhudatas dhuphe; Ayzaabetas qasse eeyateththa. 
1Corinthians1:24 Xoossi xeygidaytas istti Ayhudata gidiin woykko Girike dere as gidikkoka Kirstoosi Xoossa wolqqanne Xoossa erateththa. 
1Corinthians1:25 Gaasoykka asa erappe Xoossa eeyateththi aadhdhida erateththa; asa minoteththafe Xoossa laafateththi aadhdhees. 
1Corinthians1:26 Ta ishatoo! Kase intte xeygettiza wode intte ay mala asakko ane qopite; asa qofa mala gidikko inttefe darizayti erata gidekketa. Inttefe daroti wolqqay bayndayta; darotikka gita keeththa asappe yelettibeekketa. 
1Corinthians1:27 Gido attiin Xoossi erata yeellachchanaas deraappe eeyata doorides; Xoossi minota yeellachchanaas alamezappe daaburanchchata doorides. 
1Corinthians1:28 Xoossi hankko ammanontta asaa achchan deettes geetetti erettiza miishshata baynda miishsha mala ooththana hayssa alamezan leqettidaytanne kawuyidayta laafata doorides. 
1Corinthians1:29 Hessaka izi ooththiday oonikka iza sinththan ceeqettontta malassa. 
1Corinthians1:30 Inttena qasse Xoossi Yesus Kirstoosara issifeteththi daana mala ooththides; hessa gishshas Xoossi Yesus Kirstoosa nu erateth, nu xilloteth, nu geeshshateththinne nuna ashshizaade gidana mala ooththides." 
1Corinthians1:31 Hessa gishshas kase Geeshsha Maxaafan xaafettida mala, «Ceeqettiza asi Godaan ceeqetto.»" 
1Corinthians2:1 Ta ishatoo! Ta intteko Xoossa xuura qonccisana biday taas doona qarateththi woykko era daroy diza gishshas gidenna. 
1Corinthians2:2 Ta intte giddon diza wode kaqettida Yesus Kirstoosappe attiin hara erontta mala ta baggara murttadis. 
1Corinthians2:3 Ta intteko daro daaburan, yashshateththaninne daro kokkorashe badis." 
1Corinthians2:4 Ta qaalaynne sabbakoykka Ayana wolqqa qoncciseththanpe attiin cimoninne era daron gidenna. 
1Corinthians2:5 Hessika intte ammanoy Xoossa wolqqanppe attiin asa cinccateththa bolla xaphontta mala hanides. 
1Corinthians2:6 Nu kaha kunththida asata achchan era haasaya haasayoos; gido attiin hayssa ha alameza erateth gidenna; woykko dhayana diza ha alameza haarizayta erateth gidenna. 
1Corinthians2:7 Gido attiin nu haasayzay kase qotetti diza Xoossa xuura erateththa; he erateththay Xoossi daro wodeppe kase nuna bonchchos kasetidi giigsi woththidayssa. 
1Corinthians2:8 Ha alameza haarizaytappe oonikka ha erateththaa eribeenna; eridaakko istti bonchcho Godaa kaqqettenna. 
1Corinthians2:9 Gido attiin Geeshsha Maxaafan, «Asa ayfey be7onttaaz, asa hayththi siyonttaaz, asa wozinaykka qopponttaaz Xoossi ba dosizaytas giigsides» gees." 
1Corinthians2:10 Xoossi gidikko hessa ba Ayana baggara nuus qonccisides; Ayanaykka Xoossas diza ciimma yo7o ashshontta ubbaa pilggi xeellees. 
1Corinthians2:11 Asa garsan izaades diza ayanappe attiin izaade wozina erizay oonee? Hessaththoka Xoossa Ayanappe attiin Xoossa qofaa erizay oonikka deenna. 
1Corinthians2:12 Xoossafe nuus imettidayssa nuni erana mala Xoossa Ayanay nuus imettides attiin nuni hayssa ha alameza ayana ekkibeekko. 
1Corinthians2:13 Nu yootizay hayssa; nuni asappe tamaarda qaala gidontta Ayanappe tamaarda qaala haasayoos; Ayana tumateththaaka nu qonccisizay Ayana qaalanna. 
1Corinthians2:14 Xoossa Ayanay izan baynda asi Xoossa Ayanappe gididaaz ekkanaas dandayenna; gaasoykka hessa mala yo7oy izas eeyateththa; izi baas Ayanan paacettizaade gidida gishshas izi eranaas dandayenna. 
1Corinthians2:15 Xoossa Ayanay izan dizaadey qasse ubbaaka paaccees attiin baas oonankka paacettenna. 
1Corinthians2:16 Hessika, «Godaa qofaa eranaas dandayzay oonee? Iza zoranaas dandayzay oonee?» geetetti kase Geeshsha Maxaafan xaafettida mala; nuus gidikko Kirstoosa wozinay dees." 
1Corinthians3:1 Ta ishatoo! Ta inttena intte Kirstoosan buro guuththa nayta malanne buro ammanoy gelontta asa malappe attiin Ayanan kumida asa mala gaada inttes haasayanaas dandayabeekke. 
1Corinthians3:2 Intte buro minnontta gishshas ta inttena maath paahadis attiin buro mino kath mizabeekke; ha7ikka gidikko intte burokko! 
1Corinthians3:3 Intte ha7ikka buro ammanon minnonttayta gidida gishshas intte giddon qanaateteththinne palamay dees; histtiin intte buro ammanon minnontta asa mala gidekketii? Intte oosoy coo mela asi ooththizayssa mala gidennee? 
1Corinthians3:4 Gaasoykka intte garsafe issoy, «Ta Phawuloosassa» hankkoyssi qasse, «Ta Aphiloosassa» giikko intte coo asho qofan xalala diza asa mala gidekketii?" 
1Corinthians3:5 Ero! Gido attiin Aphiloosi aazee? Phawuloosikka aazee? Istti Goday isttas issaas issaas immida mala ooththiza oosanchchata; intteka istta baggara ammanideta. 
1Corinthians3:6 Ta tokkadis; Aphiloosi haaththe ushshides; dichchiday gidikko Xoossa. 
1Corinthians3:7 Hessa gishshas dichchizay Xoos attiin tokkizaadeyka, haaththe ushshizaadeyka aykkoka gidettenna." 
1Corinthians3:8 Tokkizaade gidiin woykko ushshizaade gidiin istti issino; isttafe issaadey issaadey ba ooso mala woyto ekkana. 
1Corinthians3:9 Gaasoykka nu Xoossara issife ooththizayta; intteka Xoossa goshsha gadenne Xoossa Keeththata. 
1Corinthians3:10 Xoossafe taas imettida imoteththaa gina Keeththe keexxiza hiilla mala keeththay eqqanaas lo7eththa giigsadis; iza bolla hara asi keeth keexxana; gido attiin keeth keexxizaadey wostti keexxanaakko naagettanaas bessees. 
1Corinthians3:11 Gaasoykka keeththay keexeteth oykettidaappe guye hara woththi qasse keexxana dandayzaadey oonikka baa; hessika keeththaas yochchay Yesus Kirstoosa. 
1Corinthians3:12 Oonikka keeththay koyro keexettidayssa bolla worqqan woykko biran bonchchettida shuchchan woykko miththaninne maatan woykko maqan keexxiko," 
1Corinthians3:13 issaade issaade oosoy ay malakko pirda gallas qonccana; gaasoykka he gallas issaade issaade oosoy ay malakko taman paacetti erettana. 
1Corinthians3:14 Oonikka keexxida keeththi minni eqqizaa gidikko hessaadey ba woyto ekkana. 
1Corinthians3:15 Iza oosoy xuugettidaadey gidikko woytoy izas deennashin izaadey ba hu7es attana; gido attiin izaade ateththi tamappe asi waaydi attiza ateththa mala gidana. 
1Corinthians3:16 Intte intte hu7es Xoossa Keeththe gididayssanne Xoossa Ayanay intte giddon dizayssa erekketii? 
1Corinthians3:17 Oonikka Xoossa Keeththe laalliko Xoossi izaade laallana; Xoossa Keeththi geeshsha; hessika inttenakko! 
1Corinthians3:18 Oonikka barkka bana baleththofo; inttefe oonikka hayssa ha alamezan bana eranchcha mala qoppiko izaadey eranchcha gidana mala bana barkka eeya mala qoodo. 
1Corinthians3:19 Hayssa ha dereza erateththi Xoossa achchan eeyateththa; kase Geeshsha Maxaafan, «Izi eranchchata istta gene ooso gaason zaaridi oykkana» geetetti xaafettides." 
1Corinthians3:20 Qasseka harason, «Eranchchata qofay hada gididayssa Goday erees» geetetti xaafettides." 
1Corinthians3:21 Hessa gishshas wurikka inttes gidida gishshas oonikka asan ceeqettofo. 
1Corinthians3:22 Phawuloosa gidiin, Aphiloosa gidiin, woykko Keefa gidiin, alame gidiin, de7o gidiin, woykko hayqo gidiin, ha7i dizaaz gidiin, woykko buro yaana miish gidiin, wurikka inttessa." 
1Corinthians3:23 Intteka Kirstoosayta; Kirstoosikka Xoossayssa. 
1Corinthians4:1 Hessa gidida gishshas asi wurikka nuna Kirstoosa oosanchchata malanne Xoossa xuura qonccisanaas hadara ekkida asa mala qoodanaas bessees. 
1Corinthians4:2 Hadara ekkidaytikka ammanettidayta gidanaas bessees. 
1Corinthians4:3 Ta bolla intte pirdinkka woykko duulata asay pirdinkka ta baggara taas aykkoy baa; haray attoshin tarkka ta bolla pirdike. 
1Corinthians4:4 «Ta eriza mala tani ta wozinara sidhiza miishshi baa; gido attiin hessa guussi ta bolla mooroy baa» guus gidenna. Buro ta bolla pirdanay Godaa. 
1Corinthians4:5 Hessa gishshas pirdana wodey gakkontta haara ay yo7okka pirdofte; Goday yaana gakkanaas naagite; izi dhuma giddon qotettidayssa buro qoncce kessana. Asa wozina giddon diza qofaakka qoncce kessana; he wode issi issi asi baas bessiza galata Xoossa achchafe ekkana. 
1Corinthians4:6 Hessa gishshas ta ishatoo! Ta inttena go7ana mala ha yo7ozan tananne Aphiloosa inttes leemiso shiishshadis; ta hayssa ooththiday, «Xaafettidayssafe aadhdhofa» gizayssa intte nuuppe taamarana malassa. Hessa gishshas intte issaade sabbidi hara as kadhanaas bessenna." 
1Corinthians4:7 Neni aazan aadhdhay? Neni harappe ekkontta attida miishshi aazee? Histtiin ne wursaka ekkiday hara asappe gidikko hara asappe ekkontta asa mala aazas ceeqettay? 
1Corinthians4:8 Ha7i gidikko inttes koshshizaaz intte ubbaa demmidetanne duretideta; nuuppeka shaakettidi kawotideta; intte tumukka kawotidaakko nunikka inttenara kawotanakko shin. 
1Corinthians4:9 Gaasoykka Xoossi nuna Hawaareta nu bolla hayqo pirday pirdettida asata mala asa ubbaafe wurseth ooththidaaz taas misatees; hessa gishshas alames, kiitanchchatassinne asa ubbaas kaassa miish gididos." 
1Corinthians4:10 Nu Kirstoosa gishshas eeyata gididos; intte qasse Kirstoosan eranchchata; nuni daaburanchchata; intte gidikko minota; intte bonchchettidayta; nuni gidikko kawushshata. 
1Corinthians4:11 Hanno gakkanaas nu gafoos; saamettoos; kallottoos; bukettoos; aqizasoy dhayiin waayettoos. 
1Corinthians4:12 Nu kushera ooththi daaburi aqoos; nuna qanggishin nu qasse anjjoos; nuna gooddishin nu dandayoos. 
1Corinthians4:13 Nu sunth istti moorishin nu qasse lo7o zaaroos; hanno gakkanaas nuni biittafe pitettida buura gididos. 
1Corinthians4:14 Ta hayssa inttes xaafizay inttena ta dosiza ta nayta mala zoranaas gaada attiin inttena yeellachchanaas gidenna. 
1Corinthians4:15 Inttena Kirstoosan dichchiza daro asati diikkoka inttes daro Aawati deettenna; tani qasse Yesus Kirstoosa Mishiraachcho qaalan inttena yeladis. 
1Corinthians4:16 Hessa gishshas intte tana misatana mala ta inttena woossays. 
1Corinthians4:17 Godaan daro dosettidayssanne ammanettida ta naa Ximtoosa ta intteko kiittiday hessa gaasonna. Izikka dumma dummason diza Woosa Keeththa asaa wursi ta tamaarsida timirtezara gaaggizayssa Yesus Kirstoosan diza de7o oge gishshas inttena izi qofsana. 
1Corinthians4:18 Inttefe issi issi asati ta nam7anththo inttena beyanaas bonttaaz isttas misatiin otorettida. 
1Corinthians4:19 Gido attiin Godaa shene gidikko matara ta intteko baana; hee baada he otoranchchati haasayzaaz xalala gidontta isttas aaza wolqqay dizaakko beyana koyays. 
1Corinthians4:20 Gaasoykka Xoossa kawoteththi coo doona xalala gidontta doonappe bollara Xoossa wolqqa. 
1Corinthians4:21 Ero! Intte koyzay awayssee? Durqqa ekka booyee? Woykko siiqoranne ashketeththa Ayanara booyee? 
1Corinthians5:1 Intte garsan yeellachchiza laymay dizayssi woretees; hessa mala tunateththi ammanontta dereta achchanka deenna; ba aawa machcho ekkida asi inttekon dees. 
1Corinthians5:2 Histtiin hessa mala yeellachchiza miishshi intte giddon dishin aazas otoreteetii? Hessafe he yo7ozan intte muuzottanaas inttes bessennee? Hessa mala ooththidaade intte garsafe diggite. 
1Corinthians5:3 Ta inttenara ashon issife dontta aggikokka ayanan qasse inttenara days; ta ha7i inttenara diza mala hessa ooththidaade bolla pirdadis. 
1Corinthians5:4 Intte shiiqizason ta inttenara diza gishshas Godaa Yesusa sunththaninne intte giddon diza nu Godaa Yesusa wolqqan he mooranchchaza ashoy dhayiin iza shemppoy Godaa gallassan attana mala hessa mala asi Xala7es aadhdhi imetto. 
1Corinthians5:5  
1Corinthians5:6 Intte ceeqettizayssi lo7os gidenna; guuththa irshoy daro bukeeso denththeththizaa erekketii? 
1Corinthians5:7 Intte ha7i irshoy baynda ooraththa bukeeso gidana mala kase caala irshoza intte giddofe diggite; nu Paaziga dors gidida Kirstoosi nuus yarshettides. 
1Corinthians5:8 Hessa gishshas ane nuni Paaziga ba7aaleza qohoynne iitateththi izan kumida kase caala irsho bolla gidontta irshoy baynda ukeththan suureteththaninne tuman bonchchoos. 
1Corinthians5:9 Inttes laymatiza asatara issifeteththi dontta mala ta inttes kase dabdaabe xaafadiskoshin. 
1Corinthians5:10 Intte ammanoos gishe laymatiza asaara gidontta woykko coo gaphigaphizaytara, kaysotizaytara, eeqas goynnizaytara gaaggofte guus gidontta dishin ha7i ta xaafiday ammanays gishe laymatizaytara woykko maththottizaytara, gaphigaphizaytara, eeqas goynnizaytara, asa sunth moorizaytara woykko cayizaytara, asa miish bonqqizaadenttara inttes issifeteththi dooppo; heytantta malara haray attoshin kaththika issife moopite." 
1Corinthians5:11  
1Corinthians5:12 Hankko ammanontta asaa bolla pirdanaas tana aazi gaththizee? Woosa keeththan dizayta bolla intte pirdeketii? 
1Corinthians5:13 Woosa keeththafe karera dizayta bolla gidikko Xoossi pirdana, «Intte intte giddofe iita as diggite» geetetti Geeshsha Maxaafan xaafettides." 
1Corinthians6:1 Intte garsafe issaades hara ammanizaadera yo7oy diikko he yo7oza ammanizayta ach shiishshanayssa wostti ammanontta asa sinththan pirdettana shiishshizee? 
1Corinthians6:2 Ammaniza asay ammanontta asaa bolla pirdanayssa intte erekketii? Intte buro alame bolla pirdandeta; gidikkoka hessa guuththa yo7o bolla pirdanaas dandayekketii? 
1Corinthians6:3 Hayssa biittaa bolla diza pirday attoshin intte buro kiitanchchata bolla pirdanayssa erekketii? 
1Corinthians6:4 Intte intte garsan ooyettiko ammanizayta maabarappe karen dizaytaninne kadhettida asata sinththan wostti intte yo7o shiishsheetii? 
1Corinthians6:5 Ta hessa inttes gizay inttena yeellachchanaassa; intte garsan ammanizayta giigsanaas dandayza wozinama asi deennee? 
1Corinthians6:6 Gido attiin ammanizaadey hara ammanizaade mootanaas alame pirda keeththe baanaas bessizee? 
1Corinthians6:7 Intte garsan issoy issaa mootoy intte kundeththaas malata bessees. Intte qohanaappe qohettiko lo7ennee? Qasseka intte as baleththanaappe inttena asi baleththiko lo7ennee? 
1Corinthians6:8 Intte haa qohettanaappe gede qoheetanne baleththeeta; hessika intte ishata," 
1Corinthians6:9 Makkallanchchati Xoossa kawoteth gelonttayssa erekketii? Hessa mala yo7on balettofte. Laymatana qaaqqatizayti, eeqa eqqizaytinne addey addera laymatizayti," 
1Corinthians6:10 woykko kaysoti, gaphigaphizayti, maththottizayti, as cayizaytinne bonqqizayti Xoossa kawoteth laattettenna." 
1Corinthians6:11 Inttefe issi issi asati heytantta mala shin ha7i qasse Godaa Yesus Kirstoosa sunththaninne nu Xoossaa Ayanan meecettideta; dummatidetanne xillideta. 
1Corinthians6:12 Haray wurikka taas imettides; Gido attiin wurikka go7izaaz gidenna. Wurikka taas imettides gido attiin ay miishshika tana haarenna. 
1Corinthians6:13 Qasse Kaththi ulossa; uloykka kaththassa; gido attiin Xoossi nam7aakka dhayssana; asateththi Godaassafe attiin laymas gidenna; Godaykka asateththassa. 
1Corinthians6:14 Xoossi Godaa hayqoppe denththida mala nunakka qasse izi ba wolqqan hayqoppe denththana. 
1Corinthians6:15 Intte asateththay Kirstoosa asateththa billite gididayssa intte erekketii? Histtiin ta Kirstoosa asateththaafe issaa layman aqiza asatara issino histtoo? Mulekka bessenna. 
1Corinthians6:16 Woykko laymatizaarira aqizaadey izira issi asho gidizayssa intte erekketii? «Nam7ay issi asho gideettes» geetettides. 
1Corinthians6:17 Gido attiin Godaara issino gidizaadey izara issi Ayana gidees. 
1Corinthians6:18 Laymappe haakkite; asi ooththiza hara nagaray wuri izaade ashoppe karera hanees; layma laymatizaadey gidikko barkka ba asateththaa bolla nagara ooththees. 
1Corinthians6:19 Intte asateththay intte gaaththan diza Xillo Ayanas duussaso gididayssa intte erekketii? He Ayanaykka intte Xoossafe ekkidayssa; intteka inttes gidekketa. 
1Corinthians6:20 Intte miishshan shamettideta; hessa gishshas intte intte asateththan Xoos bonchchite. 
1Corinthians7:1 Intte taas xaafida mala asi maccassako gakkontta aggizaakko lo7okko! Gido attiin laymappe naagettanaas attumasaas issaas issaas machcha du. Maccassaska issineys issineys azinay do. 
1Corinthians7:2  
1Corinthians7:3 Azinay ba machcheys koshshizaaz ubbaa ooththo; machchaka ba azinaas koshshizaaz wursa ooththu. 
1Corinthians7:4 Machchi asateththi izis xalala gidontta azinaassara koththa; hessaththoka azinaa asateththi izas xalala gidontta machcheyssara koththa. 
1Corinthians7:5 Nam7ay dosan woosas giidi zoren gido giidi qachchida gallassatappe attiin hara gallas issoy issaas akkay gooppetto; hessa gaason inttes inttena haaroy xooniin Xala7ey inttena paaccontta mala nam7ay issife aqite. 
1Corinthians7:6 Ta hessa gizay coo azazo mala gidontta zore zorays. 
1Corinthians7:7 Asi wuri ta mala machcho ekkontta dizaakko ta dosays; gido attiin issi issi asaas Xoossafe imettida dumma dumma imotay dees; issaas issi qommo imotay dees; hankkoyssas qasse hara qommo imotay dees. 
1Corinthians7:8 Buro ekkonttaytanne gelonttayta gishshas qasseka azinay hayqqida maccassata gishshas ta gizay istti gelonttanne ekkontta ta mala dizaakko isttas lo7o gays. 
1Corinthians7:9 Gido attiin istti bana naaganaas dandayonttayta gidikko gelettonne ekketto; coo amon xuugetanaappe ekoynne geloy lo7o. 
1Corinthians7:10 Ekkidaytassinne gelidaytas ta immiza azazoy hayssa; hessika Godaa azazoppe attiin ta azazo gidenna; azina gelida maccassaya ba azinappe shaakettufu. 
1Corinthians7:11 Shaakettizaa gidikko hara azina gelontta uttu; akkay giikko ba azinara giigu; azinaykka ba machcho anjji yeddofo. 
1Corinthians7:12 Hankko asaas qasse ta hizgays; hessa gizaykka tana attiin Godaa gidenna; ammanontta machcha diza ammanizaadey machcheya izara daana dosikko izi izo anjji yeddanaas bessenna. 
1Corinthians7:13 Ammanontta azinay diza ammaniza maccassaya he ammanontta azinay izira daanaas koykko iza izappe anjjetta baanaas bessenna. 
1Corinthians7:14 Gaasoykka ammanontta azinay ammaniza ba machcheyin anjjettees; ammanontta maccassayakka ammaniza ba azinaan anjjettawus; hessaththo hanontta aggiko intte yelida nayti tunata gidanashin ha7i qasse anjjettidayta. 
1Corinthians7:15 Gido attiin nam7atappe issoy ammanonttaadey shaakettana koykko shaaketto; adde gidiin macca gidiin ammanizaadey hessa mala wogaan qashettenna; Xoossi nuna saron daana mala xeygides. 
1Corinthians7:16 Hanne neni ne azinaa ashshanaakko ay eray? Woykko haysso neni ne machcho ashshanaakko ay eray? 
1Corinthians7:17 Coo issi issi asi Xoossi xeygida malanne Goday woththida mala de7o; woosa keeththatas ta woththiza wogay hessa. 
1Corinthians7:18 Issaadey ammananaappe kase qaxxarettida gidikko qaxxarettontta asa mala hanoppo. Qasse qaxxarettontta dishe ammanidaadeyka qaxxarettofo. 
1Corinthians7:19 Qaxxarettiin qaxxarettontta aggiin nam7aanka go7ay deenna; waanna ayfe yo7oy Xoossa azazo polo. 
1Corinthians7:20 Issi issi asi ba xeygettida xeygeteththan minni de7o. 
1Corinthians7:21 Ammaniza wode ne ayllee? Ne hessas daro metotoppa; wozzettana dandaykko wozzeta; gaasoykka aylle gidi dishe Godaa ammanidaadey izi Godaa goqa; hessaththoka ammaniza wode goqa gididaadey izi Kirstoosas aylle. 
1Corinthians7:22  
1Corinthians7:23 Intte miishshan shamettideta; hessa gishshas asa aylle gidopite. 
1Corinthians7:24 Ta ishatoo! Inttefe issi issi asi ba xeygettida mala Xoossara minni de7o. 
1Corinthians7:25 Geela7otanne panththata gishshas taas Godaappe imettida azazoy deenna; gido attiin Godaa maaroteththafe dendidayssan ta inttes ammanettidaade gidada inttena zorays. 
1Corinthians7:26 Hayssa ha7i wode meto gaason intte ha7i diza mala dizaakko taas lo7o misatees. 
1Corinthians7:27 Ne machcho ekkidaade gidikko anjja yeddanaas koyoppa; machcho ekkonttaade gidikko machcho ekkanaas koyoppa. 
1Corinthians7:28 Machcho ekkikokka nagara gidenna. Geela7oyakka gelikko nagara gidenna; gido attiin ekkiza asatanne gelizayta bolla hayssa alamezan istta daro metoy gakkana; ta qasse hessi intte bolla gakkontta agganayssa dosays. 
1Corinthians7:29 Ta ishatoo! Ta qofay hayssa mala; wodezi qaanth gidida gishshas machcha dizaadey machcha bayndaade mala de7o. 
1Corinthians7:30 Yeekkizayti yeekkontta asa mala, ufayettizayti ufayettontta asa mala gidetto; miishshe shammidaadenti shamettida miishshaa baas gi qoppofetto." 
1Corinthians7:31 Hayssa alameza miishshan go7ettizayti ubbay go7ettontta asa mala gidi detto. Gaasoykka hayssa alameza hanoy aadhdhanaas dees. 
1Corinthians7:32 Intte hirgay baynda daana mala ta koyays; machchonttaadey Godaa ufayssanaas Godaa gishshas qoppees. 
1Corinthians7:33 Machchidaadey qasse ba machchiyo ufayssanaas hayssa alameza miish qoppees. 
1Corinthians7:34 Hayssan iza qofay nam7u kezi shaakettees; gelontta maccassaya woykko geela7oya Godaaz xalla qoppawus; izis gita qofaykka ashonkka, ayanankka Godaas dummateththa; gelidaara gidikko ba azinaa ufayssanaas hayssa alameza hano xalla qoppawus." 
1Corinthians7:35 Ta hessa gizay inttes lo7anaaz qoppadappe attiin inttena daro qofan yegganaas gidenna; taas diza gita qofay intte wozinay shaaketti nam7u kezontta intte Godaan minnidi wogara de7anaassa. 
1Corinthians7:36 Issaadey ba oychchida geela7oyo wogara oykkontta aggiko izi wodeykka cimmi cimmi biikko ekkana koykko ba koyida mala ekko; ekkikonne gelikko lo7o; nagara gidenna. 
1Corinthians7:37 Gido attiin hayssa ha yo7ozan iza wozinay qaaxxontta bana haaridi geela7oyo ekkike giidi murttida asi lo7o ooththides. 
1Corinthians7:38 Hessa gishshas geela7oyo ekkidaadey lo7o ooththides; ekkonttaadeyka aadheththa lo7o ooththides. 
1Corinthians7:39 Issi maccassi azinay paxa diza wode kumeththan ba azinara qashettadus; azinazi hayqqiko ba koyida as gelana dandayawus; iza gelanaadey ammanizaade gido attiin gelu. 
1Corinthians7:40 Ta qofa mala gidikko iza gelontta dizaakko daro ufayssan de7andus; taaska tanan Xoossa Ayanay dizaa misatees. 
1Corinthians8:1 Eeqas shukettida asho gishshas intte taas xaafidayssa mala gidikko tumukka nu wurikka eriza miishshi dees; eroy otorisees; siiqoy gidikko go7ees. 
1Corinthians8:2 Ta erays giza asi eranaas bessiza mala buro eribeenna. 
1Corinthians8:3 Xoos siiqizaadey gidikko izi Xoossa achchan erettidaade. 
1Corinthians8:4 Hessa gishshas eeqas yarshettida asho muussa gishshas ta inttes gizay hayssa alamezan eeqay hada gididayssanne issi Xoossaafe attiin hara Xoossi bayndayssa nu eroos. 
1Corinthians8:5 Aydekka gidikko daro eeqatinne daro godati deettes shin salon gidiin sa7a bolla Xoos geetettiza daro eeqati diikkoka nuus gidikko haniday wurikka izan hanides. Nunikka izas gidida issi Xoossi Aaway dees; qasseka hanidaazi wurikka izan haniday nunikka izan hanida issi Goday Yesus Kirstoosi xalala nuus dees. 
1Corinthians8:6  
1Corinthians8:7 Gido attiin hessa asi wuri erenna; issi issi asati hanno gakkanaas eeqa goyno dosida gishshas hessa mala asho mishe addaka eeqas shukettidayssa qoppeetes; isttas qofay laafa gidida gishshas istti tuneettes. 
1Corinthians8:8 Gido attiin kaththi nuna Xoossa ach gaththenna; nu montta aggikokka nuus paccizay deenna; nu miikkoka nuus wodhey deenna. 
1Corinthians8:9 Gido attiin intte metoy baa guussan ooththizayssi ammanon minnontta asaas dhuphe gidontta mala naagettite. 
1Corinthians8:10 Nees hessa misatiza erateththi diza gishshas hinko ammanon minnonttaadey eeqa keeththan ne mizayssa be7idi eeqas shukettidayssa maanaas xalennee? 
1Corinthians8:11 Hessa gishshas Kirstoosi iza gishshas hayqqida he ammanon minnontta ishay ne erateththa gaason dhayees guussa. 
1Corinthians8:12 Hessaththoka intte intte ishata qohoninne istta laafa qofaa madunththon Kirstoosa qoheeta. 
1Corinthians8:13 Hessa gishshas ta miza miishshi ta ishaa dhuphizaaz gidikko ta ishaa ta dhupheththontta mala mulekka asho miikke. 
1Corinthians9:1 Tani goqa as gidikkinaa? Ta Hawaare gidikkinaa? Nu Godaa Yesusa tani ta ayfera beyabeekkinaa? Intteka Godaan ta ooson beettida ayfe gidekketii? 
1Corinthians9:2 Haratas ta Hawaare gidontta aggikokka ta inttes tumappe Hawaare; gaasoykka Godaan ta Hawaareteththaa bessiza maatamey inttena. 
1Corinthians9:3 Tana paaccizaytas ta immiza zaaroy hessa. 
1Corinthians9:4 Ero! Maanaassinne uyanaas nuus bessennee? 
1Corinthians9:5 Hara Hawaareta mala Godaa ishata malanne keefantta mala nunikka ammaniza nu machcheta ekki yuuyana dandayokkonii? 
1Corinthians9:6 Woykko waayetti daaburdi daanaas bessizay tananne Barnabaasa xallaa? 
1Corinthians9:7 Ero! Ba miishshara wottadarateth ooththizay oonee? Woyne mith tokkidi he tokkida miththaa ayfe monttay oonee? Mehe heemmishe ba heemmiza meheza maath uyonttay oonee? 
1Corinthians9:8 Ta hayssa gizay coo asa qofa mala xallaa? Muse wogay hessaththo geennee? 
1Corinthians9:9 Muse wogaa garsan, «Kath bukkiza mehe doona qachchofa» geetetti xaafettides; histtiin Xoos metiday he meheza qanththee?" 
1Corinthians9:10 Izi hessa giday tumappe nu gishshas gidennee? Hessi xaafettiday addafe nu gishshassa; goshshanchchaynne qasseka bukkizayssi ba ooso ayfeppe bana gakkizayssa ekkanaas hidota ooththees. 
1Corinthians9:11 Nu intte giddon Ayana zereth zeridayti ashos gidizaaz maxikko hessi gita miishshee? 
1Corinthians9:12 Hara asati inttefe hessa mala go7a ekkanaas dandaykko nu qasse hessafe daro demmanaas bessennee? Gido attiin nuni nuus bessiza mala go7ettibeekko; harappeka nu Kirstoosa Mishiraachcho qaalaas dhuphe gidontta mala hanizaaz ubbaaka dandayoos. 
1Corinthians9:13 Xoossa Keeththan ooththizayti ba maanayssa Xoossa keeththafe ekkizayssa mala yarshoson ooththizaytikka he ba yarshizayssafe mizayssa intte erekketii? 
1Corinthians9:14 Hessaththoka Mishiraachcho qaalaa sabbakizayti baas koshshizayssa Mishiraachcho qaalaa ooththizasoppe ekkana mala Goday woga woththides. 
1Corinthians9:15 Tani gidikko hessa ubbaafekka aykkoka go7ettabeekke; ha7ikka ta inttes hayssa xaafizay heytantta mala miish taas ooththetto gaada gidenna. Ays giikko oonikka tani ta Godaan ceeqettizaaro taappe woththi ekkanaappe taas hayqoy lo7o. 
1Corinthians9:16 Mishiraachcho qaalaa sabbakidayssi tana ceeqissenna; ta sabbakizay dosan gidontta wolqqara tana gakkida gishshassa; ta Mishiraachcho qaalaa sabbakontta aggiko taas aayye ana! 
1Corinthians9:17 Mishiraachcho qaalaa tani ta dosan sabbakikko taas woytoy dees; tani ta dosan gidontta wolqqara ooththizayssa gidikko hadara polana mala ooso xalala gidana. 
1Corinthians9:18 Histtiin taas aaza woytoy dizee? Taas woytoy daanay Mishiraachcho qaalaa sabbakashe taas bessizayta ta go7ettontta aggikokko. 
1Corinthians9:19 Ta goqappe attiin oonaska aylle gidikke; gido attiin darota Godaakko zaarana gishshas asa ubbaas aylle mala gidadis. 
1Corinthians9:20 Ayhudata ashshanaas Ayhudatara istta misatadis; tani ta baggara Muse wogaappe garsara gidontta dashe Muse wogaappe garsara dizayta ashshanaas istta misatadis. 
1Corinthians9:21 Tani ta baggara Xoossa wogay dizaadenne Kirstoosa wogaas haarettizaade gidikkoka wogay bayndayta ashshanaas istta mala wogay bayndaade gidadis. 
1Corinthians9:22 Daaburanchchata ashshanaas gaada tanikka daaburanchchatara istta mala daaburanchcha gidadis; taas dandayettida mala ubbaan issi issi asata ashshanaas asa ubbaara istti hanizaaz hanadis. 
1Corinthians9:23 Ta hayssa wursa ooththizay Mishiraachcho qaalaa anjjo isttara gishettanaas Mishiraachcho qaalaa gishshas ooththadis. 
1Corinthians9:24 Gaadde woth woxxizayti daro shin xoonidi woyto demmizay issaade xalala gididayssa intte erekketii? Hessa gishshas woyto ekkanaas woxxizaade mala intteka woxxite. 
1Corinthians9:25 Gaadden woxxi aadhdhanaas giigettizaadey oonikka hano ubbaan barkka bana naagees. Heytantti aadhdhananne dhayana akilile ekkanaas daabureettes shin nu qasse mernaas dhayontta akilile demmanaas daaburoos. 
1Corinthians9:26 Hessa gishshas ta qasse poloy baynda coo mela woxxizaade mala woxxike; qasseka carkora baaxetizaade mala coo mela gaden baaxetikke. 
1Corinthians9:27 Ta qasse haratas sabbaka pe7ada taas kunda attontta mala ta asateth shiishsha oykkada haarays. 
1Corinthians10:1 Ta ishatoo! Kase nu Aawati shaaray isttafe bollara gididi kaaleththidayssa malanne istti wurikka zo7o abba pinnidayssa ta inttena qofsanaas koyays. 
1Corinthians10:2 Istti Musera gidanaas giidi shaaraninne abban xammaqettida. 
1Corinthians10:3 Wurikka issi ayana quma mida. 
1Corinthians10:4 Wurikka issi ayana ushshu uyida; istti uyidaykka bana kaalliza ayana zaallafe pulttidayssafe; he zaallayka Kirstoosa. 
1Corinthians10:5 Gido attiin Xoossi darotan ufayettibeenna; hessa gishshas istta ahay bazzon kundi attides. 
1Corinthians10:6 Istti iita miish amottidayssaththo nunikka amottontta mala istta hanoy nu naagettana mala nuus leemiso gidides. 
1Corinthians10:7 «Derey maanaassinne uyanaas uttides; yexxanaaska dendides» geetetti kase Geeshsha Maxaafan xaafettida mala istta garsafe issi issi asati ooththoyssaththo intteka eeqa goynnizayta gidopite. 
1Corinthians10:8 Istta garsafe issi issi asati laymatidi issi gallas 23,000 asay dippi gi wuroyssaththo wurontta mala nunikka ane laymatokko." 
1Corinthians10:9 Istta garsafe issi issi asati Godaa paaccidi shooshshan duketti hayqqi dhaydayssa mala nunikka ane Godaa paaccoko. 
1Corinthians10:10 Istta garsafe issi issi asati zuuzumidi dhayssiza bosha kiitanchchan dhaydayssaththo intteka dhayontta mala zuuzumopite. 
1Corinthians10:11 Hessi wuri nuus leemiso gidana mala istta bolla gakkides; wode wurseththan diza nuus timirte gidana mala nuus xaafettides. 
1Corinthians10:12 Hessa gishshas ta minna eqqa days gizaadey diikko kundontta mala baas naagetto. 
1Corinthians10:13 Asa bolla gakkida paaceppe hara aadhdhiza paacey intte bolla gakkibeenna; Xoossi ammanettiza Xoos gidida gishshas intte dandayontta intte wolqqafe bollara intte paacettenna mala izi inttena aggaagenna; gido attiin intte paacettiza wode he paaceza intte dandayana mala wolqqa immidi paaceppe intte kessi ekkana oge izi inttes giigsana. 
1Corinthians10:14 Hessa gishshas ta siiqotoo! Eeqas goynnofte; izappe haakkite. 
1Corinthians10:15 Ta inttes hayssa gizay wozinama gidida gishshassa; hessa gishshas ta yootizayssa ane intte intterkka pirdite. 
1Corinthians10:16 Nuni Xoossa galatidi ekkiza ushshay Kirstoosa suuththara gaagoteththi dizayssa gidennee? Hessaththoka nu baththi baththi gishetti miza ukeththay Kirstoosa ashora gaagoteththi dizayssa gidennee? 
1Corinthians10:17 Ukeththay issino gidida mala nunikka daro gidi uttidi wurikka issi asho; nu wurikka issi ukeththaza gishetti moos. 
1Corinthians10:18 Ane intte Isra7eele nayti ooththidayssa qopite; shiiqiza yarshozappe mizaytas yarshoy shiiqizasora gaagoteththi deennee? 
1Corinthians10:19 Histtiin eeqas yarshettida yarsho gidiin woykko eeqay ba baggara go7ara dees gazinaa? 
1Corinthians10:20 Gidenna! Ammanontta asay shiishshiza yarshoy Xoossas gidontta Xala7essa; inttes Xala7era issifeteththi daana mala ta koykke. 
1Corinthians10:21 Xala7e ushshinne Godaa ushshu intte issife gaththi uyana dandayekketa; Godaa maaddafenne Xala7e maaddafe gaththi maana dandayekketa. 
1Corinthians10:22 Nuni Godaa hanqeththinoo? Nu izappe minnizonii? 
1Corinthians10:23 Wurikka taas imettides shin wurikka tana go7izaaz gidenna; wurikka taassa shin wurikka tana maaddenna. 
1Corinthians10:24 Asi wurikka ba lagge go7anaaz gaththi xeello attiin bana go7anaaz xalala koyoppo. 
1Corinthians10:25 Giyan bayzettiza asho ubbaa sidhey baynda miite. 
1Corinthians10:26 Biittaynne biitta bolla dizay wurikka Godayssa. 
1Corinthians10:27 Ammanontta asi inttena baso xeygidi shiishshida kath wursi aykkoka sidhontta miite. 
1Corinthians10:28 Gido attiin issaadey, «Hayssi eeqas yarshettida kaththa» giikko he kaththaa he addeza qofaa gishshassinne inttena sidhiskko moopite." 
1Corinthians10:29 Ta inttes hessa gizay he yootidaade qofaa gishshas gadis attiin intte qofaa gishshas gabeekke; ta xillo gida dishin aazas hara asa qofaa gaason ta bolla pirdettizee? 
1Corinthians10:30 Ta Xoos galatada mizaade gida uttada aazas hara asan pirdettoo? 
1Corinthians10:31 Histtiko intte ay miikkoka, ay uyikkoka woykko aykko ooththiko wursika Xoossa bonchchos ooththite." 
1Corinthians10:32 Ayhuda asaas gidiin Ayzaabetas gidiin woykko Xoossa Woosa Keeththas oonaska dhuphe gidopite. 
1Corinthians10:33 Ta as wursaka ay ogerakka ufayssana koyza mala intteka hessaththo ooththite; daroti attana mala ta tana go7izaaz gidontta istta go7izaaz koyays. 
1Corinthians11:1 Tani Kirstoosa leemiso kaalliza mala intteka ta leemiso kaallite. 
1Corinthians11:2 Intte taas wursi qoppiza gishshassinne taappe ekkida timirteza lo7eththi oykkida gishshas ta inttena galatays. 
1Corinthians11:3 Gido attiin ta intte erana mala koyzay attumasaas ubbaas hu7ey Kirstoosa gididayssa mala attumasay maccas ubbaas hu7e; qasse Xoossi Kirstoosas hu7e. 
1Corinthians11:4 Ba hu7e gullunttidi Xoos woossizaadey woykko qaala yootizaadey oonikka barkka bana kawushshees. 
1Corinthians11:5 Ba hu7e goozontta woossiza maccassaya woykko tinbite qaala yootiza ay maccasika barkka bana kawushshawus; hessi iza ba hu7e bulisidaadera gina. 
1Corinthians11:6 Maccassi ba hu7e goozontta aggiko meedettu woykko qanxxisu; izis hu7e meedeteththi woykko qanxxiseththi yeellachchizaaz gidikko goozu. 
1Corinthians11:7 Addey ba hu7e gullunttanaas bessenna; attumasi Xoossa leemisonne Xoossa bonchcho; maccassi gidikko addes bonchcho. 
1Corinthians11:8 Gaasoykka maccassi addefe medhettadus attiin attumasi maccassafe medhettibeenna. 
1Corinthians11:9 Qasseka maccassi addes medhettadus attiin addey maccassas medhettibeenna. 
1Corinthians11:10 Hessa gishshas kiitanchchati beyanaas naagiza maccassas imettida maata bessiza goosse ba hu7en goozu. 
1Corinthians11:11 Godaa achchan gidikko maccassi addey baynda, addeyka maccassi baynda de7ettenna." 
1Corinthians11:12 Maccassi addefe beettidayssaththo addeyka maccassafe yelettees; gido attiin nam7ayka Xoossafe beettida. 
1Corinthians11:13 Maccassi ba hu7e goozontta Xoos woossanaas bessizaakko ane intte pirdite. 
1Corinthians11:14 Attumasi ba hu7e adussi dichchiko borso gididayssa inttena medheteththa hanoteththi erisuwee? 
1Corinthians11:15 Maccay gidikko ba hu7e binana dichchiko hessi izis bonchcho gidennee? Izis adussa hu7e binanay imettiday izis seelo gidanaassa. 
1Corinthians11:16 Hessa gishshas oonikka hayssa ha yo7ozan palamettana koykko nuus gidiinkka Xoossa Woosa Keeththatas hayssafe hara wogay deenna. 
1Corinthians11:17 Intte issi soo shiiqettiza wode qohos attiin go7as gidontta gishshas ta hayssa azazoza inttes aaththizay inttena galatashe gidenna. 
1Corinthians11:18 Intte Woosa Keeththan shiiqiza wode intte garsan shaaketeththi dizayssa ta kaseta siyadis; ta siyoyssafe baggay tumu gidanayssa ta ammanays. 
1Corinthians11:19 Intte giddofe tumanchchati shaaketti erettana mala hessa mala shaakoy intte giddon daanayssi dosa gidenna. 
1Corinthians11:20 Intte issife shiiqettidi mizay Godaa kawo gidenna. 
1Corinthians11:21 Intte shiiqettidi issoy issaa naagontta dishe kath meeta; inttefe issaadey gafan dishin hankkoyssi qasse maththottees. 
1Corinthians11:22 Histtiin inttes uyanasoynne maanasoy baawee? Woykko Xoossa Keeththe leqqidi aykkoyka bayndayta yeellachcheetii? Histtiin ta inttena ay goo? Hayssa ha hanozas inttena galatoo? Mulekka galatikke. 
1Corinthians11:23 Tani Godaappe ekkidayssa inttes aaththadis; hessika Godaa Yesusi aadhdhi imettida omars uketh denththidinne Xoos galati baththidi, «He7ite! Miite! Hayssi inttes gidiza ta asho; tana qoppanaas intte hayssa ooththite» gides." 
1Corinthians11:24  
1Corinthians11:25 Hessaththoka kawoppe guye ushshaa denththidi, «Hayssi ushshay ta suuththan haniza ooraththa caaqo; hessa gishshas ushshaafe intte uyiza wode hayssa tana qoppana mala ooththite» gides." 
1Corinthians11:26 Hayssa ukeththaa intte miza wodenne hayssa ushshaaka uyiza ubba wode Goday yaana gakkanaas intte iza hayqo yootana. 
1Corinthians11:27 Hessa gishshas oonikka bessontta dishin hayssa ukeththaa miikko woykko Godaa ushshaa uyikko izaadey Godaa ashonne iza suuththaa kawushshida gishshas izi oyshettana. 
1Corinthians11:28 Oonikka hayssa ha ukeththaa maanaappenne ushshaafe uyanaappe kaseti barkka bana paacco. 
1Corinthians11:29 Gaasoykka oonikka Godaa asho baas gelontta dishin miikkonne Godaa ushshaa uyikko izaadey barkka ba bolla pirda ehees. 
1Corinthians11:30 Intte garsan daro asay daaburdaynne sakettiday qasseka baggay hayqqiday hessa gaasonna. 
1Corinthians11:31 Nuni nurkka nu bolla pirdizaakko izi nu bolla pirdenna. 
1Corinthians11:32 Gido attiin Goday pirdiza wode nu hankko ammanontta asaara pirdettontta mala izi nuna kaseti murees. 
1Corinthians11:33 Hessa gishshas ta ishatoo! Intte maana shiiqiza wode issoy issaara naagettite.
