Galatians5:13 Ta ishatoo! Intte geeshshateththas xeygettideta; intte intte geeshshateththaa zaaridi inttes asho amo polanaas go7ettofte; hessafe intte intte garsan siiqon issoy issaa maaddite. 
Galatians5:14 Wogay wuri shiiqettidi issi qaalan qashettees; hessika, «Neni ase ne mala dosa!» gizayssa." 
Galatians5:15 Gido attiin intte issoy issaara saxettizayta gidikko intte intte garsan wurontta mala naagettite. 
Galatians5:16 Hessa gishshas ta inttena Ayanan simerettite; qasseka asho amokka polopite gays. 
Galatians5:17 Ashoy Ayanay koyonttaaz amottees; Ayanaykka ashoy koyonttaaz amottees; hayti issoy issaara ba garsan ixettiza gishshas intte intte koyida mala ooththeketa. 
Galatians5:18 Intte Ayanan dizayta gidikko wogas haarettizayta gidekketa. 
Galatians5:19 Asho oosoy qonccen erettees; hessika laymateth, tunateth, layma kaas," 
Galatians5:20 Eeqas goyno, bita, ixeteth, oosh, qanaateteth, hanqo, bana xalla doso, shaaketeth, zuppeteth," 
Galatians5:21 miqqayneteth, maththoteth, alame mazamure yexeththinne heytantta misatizayta. Tani inttes kase yootida mala ha7ikka intte naagettana mala qofsays; hessa mala duus dizayti wurikka Xoossa kawoteth laattettenna." 
Galatians5:22 Ayana ayfey gidikko siiqo, ufays, saroteth, dandaya, kiyateth, lo7eteth, ammaneteth," 
Galatians5:23 ashketeth, barkka bana haaro; haytantta mala diggiza wogay baa." 
Galatians5:24 Yesus Kirstoosas gididayti asho iza iita qofaaranne iza iita amoteththaara issife kaqqida. 
Galatians5:25 Nu Ayanan daana koykko ane Ayanan simerettoos. 
Galatians5:26 Nuni issoy issaa iitas denththeththishenne qanaatettishe coo mela ceeqettizayssa ane aggoos. 
Galatians6:1 Ta ishatoo! Issi asi nagara ooththi beettiko intte qasse Ayanan lo7o dizayti iza ashketeththara zaaranaas bessees; gido attiin nekka izaade mala paacettontta mala ne hu7es naagetta. 
Galatians6:2 Intte issoy issaa deexo tooho tookkite; hessa mala ooson Kirstoosa wogaa poleeta. 
Galatians6:3 Issaadey aykkoka hanontta dishe bana gitasizaa misatikko hessaadey barkka bana baleththees. 
Galatians6:4 Issi issi asi ba ooso barkka paacci xeello; hessafe guye hara asara bana ginasontta dishe izi bana ceeqisizaaz demmana. 
Galatians6:5 Issi issi asi barkka ba tooho tookkanaas bessees. 
Galatians6:6 Qaala tamaarzay oonikka ba tamaarda lo7o miishshaa ba astamaarezara gishetto. 
Galatians6:7 Balettofte; Xoossi qilcca erenna; asi ba zeridaaro izo zaari maxana. 
Galatians6:8 Ba asho amo kunththanaas zerizaadey ashoppe dhayo maxana; Ayana ufayssanaas zeridaadey gidikko ayanappe mernaa de7o maxana. 
Galatians6:9 Ane nu lo7o ooso ooththanaas azalloko; nu ufays qanxxontta aggiko wodey gakkishin gakkida kath nu maxana. 
Galatians6:10 Hessa gishshas nuus dandayettiko asa ubbaas harappeka ammaniza asaas ane lo7o ooththoos. 
Galatians6:11 Tani ta kushera inttes ay mala gita pidalen xaafidaakko ane xeellite. 
Galatians6:12 Coo kare baggara beettana koyza asati intte qaxxarettana mala wolqqaththana koyeettes; istti hessa ooththizay Kirstoosa masqale gishshas giidi goodettontta malassa. 
Galatians6:13 Istti intte qaxxarettana mala koyzay intte ashon ceeqettanaas koyza gishshas attiin qaxxarettidayti wogaa naagizayta gidettenna. 
Galatians6:14 Qasse alamey taas, tanikka alames kaqettida Godaa Yesus Kirstoosa masqalenppe attiin haran ceeqoy taappe haakko." 
Galatians6:15 Qaxxarettiin woykko qaxxarettontta aggiin izas go7ay baa; go7ay ooraththa medheteth gideththa. 
Galatians6:16 Hayssa ha azazoza kaalliza ubbatassinne Xoossa dere gidida Isra7eele asatas saroteththinne maareteththi gido. 
Galatians6:17 Tani Yesusa malaata ta asateththan tookkadis; hessa gishshas ha7i tana oonikka waayisenna. 
Galatians6:18 Ta ishatoo! Godaa Yesus Kirstoosa aadho kiyateththi inttenara gido! Amiin. 
Ephesians1:1 Xoossa shene mala Yesus Kirstoosa Hawaare gidida Phawuloosappe, Yesus Kirstoosan diza ammanettizaytas Efesoonen ammaniza asaas," 
Ephesians1:2 nu Aawaa Xoossafenne Godaa Yesus Kirstoosappe kiyateththinne saroteththi inttes gido. 
Ephesians1:3 Nu Godaa Yesus Kirstoosa baggara salon Ayana anjjo ubbaan nuna anjjida Godaa Yesus Kirstoosa Aaway Xoossi anjjetto. 
Ephesians1:4 Nu iza sinththan geeshshinne wosoy bayndayta gidana mala buro alamey medhettanaappe kase ba siiqon Kirstoosa baggara nuna doorides. 
Ephesians1:5 Yesus Kirstoosa baggara nu iza naa gidana mala ba lo7o qofaan koyro ubbaa woththides. 
Ephesians1:6 Hessika ba dosizaade baggara coo mela nuus imettida bonchcho kiyateththi galatettana malassa. 
Ephesians1:7 Xoossa aadho kiyateththa dureteththaafe dendoyssan Yesusa suuththan wozzettidi nagarappe nu maarettidos. 
Ephesians1:8 Izi ba kiyateththaa, hiillateththaninne erateth ubbaan nu bolla keehi darssides." 
Ephesians1:9 Xoossi qoppida ba xuura qofaa Kirstoosa baggara ba lo7o qofaa mala nuna erisides. 
Ephesians1:10 Buroppe wode wurseththan hananaas diza iza qofay salo bollanne biitta bolla dizaytas ubbaas hu7e gidida Yesus Kirstoosappe ubbaa gars aaththanaassa. 
Ephesians1:11 Wursika ba shene mala ooththiza iza shenen koyrokka izi qoppi woththidayti nuni izan doorettidos. 
Ephesians1:12 Nuni kasetidi Kirstoosa baggara ekkana giidi ufayssan naagizayti Xoossa bonchcho galatan qonccisanaassa. 
Ephesians1:13 Intteka qasse tumaa qaalaa hessika inttena ashshiza Mishiraachcho qaalaa siyidi Kirstoosan ammanideta; iza ammanidi kase imettana geetettida Xillo Ayana maatamen attamettideta. 
Ephesians1:14 He Ayanazikka iza bonchcho galatan qonccisana mala Xoossi baas gididayta ubbata wozzana gakkanaas nu laatas oyso. 
Ephesians1:15 Hessa gishshas intte Godaa Yesusa ammanida gishshassinne ammaniza asaa intte siiqizayssa ta siyoosoppe haa simmiin inttena qoppa qoppa ekkada tani ta woosan intte gishshas Xoossas galata shiisho aggabeekke. 
Ephesians1:16  
Ephesians1:17 Bonchcho Aawaa gidida nu Godaa Yesus Kirstoosa Aawaa Xoossaa intte lo7eththi erana mala qonccisiza Ayanaynne erateththa Ayanay inttes imettana mala ta inttes pacey baynda woossays. 
Ephesians1:18 Hessaththoka intte izan xeygettida ufayssay hessika ammanizayta achchan diza iza dureteththi aazakkonne intte erana mala intte wozina ayfey poo7ana mala woossays. 
Ephesians1:19 Nuus ammanizaytas ubbaafe bolla gidida iza wolqqa dhoqqateth intte erana mala ta woossays; he wolqqayka iza gita minoteththaa ooson bessidayssi hayqoppe Kirstoosa denththidi salon ba ushachchan utissida Kirstoosa baggara. 
Ephesians1:20  
Ephesians1:21 Ayssizaytappe, godateththafe, wolqqafenne kawoteththafe qasseka ha7i xalla gidontta buroppe yaana wodekka gidiin sunth ubbaafe izi bolla." 
Ephesians1:22 Xoossi hara wursi iza tohoppe garsan haarisides; Woosa keeththankka ubbaa bolla hu7e ooththides. 
Ephesians1:23 Woosa Keeththiya Kirstoosa asateththa; he izakka ubbason ubba miish kunththiza he iza kumeththa. 
Ephesians2:1 Intte qohida qoho gishshassinne intte nagara gaason intte hayqqideta shin; 
Ephesians2:2 hessa intte hayssa alameza iita oge kaallideta; bolla carko bolla diidi haariza wolqqama ayanatas ha7ikka Xoossas azazettontta asaa bolla ooththiza iita ayanas intte azazettishe gam7ideta. 
Ephesians2:3 Hayssafe kase nuni nu asho amoteth polishe ashoy koyza oge kaallishe isttara doos; nunikka hankko asa mala nu medheteththafe Xoossa hanqo garsan de7oos. 
Ephesians2:4 Gido attiin Xoossi keehi siiqida gishshas ba maaro daron nuni nu qoho daroteththaan hayqqidayta gidi dishin Kirstoosa baggara nuna ashshides; intte paxiday iza kiyateththanna. 
Ephesians2:5  
Ephesians2:6 Xoossi nuna Kirstoosara gaththi denththides; Yesus Kirstoosa baggara nuna salon banara utissides. 
Ephesians2:7 Hessika hayssafe guye yaana wodezan Yesus Kirstoosi nuus ba kiyateththan qonccisida zaway baynda ba kiyateththa dureteththaa nuna bessanaassa. 
Ephesians2:8 Intte Xoossa kiyateththan ammanon attideta; hessika Xoossi inttes mela coo immidazaappe attiin intte oosoppe gidenna. 
Ephesians2:9 Oonikka ceeqettontta mala oosoppe gidenna. 
Ephesians2:10 Hessika Xoossi kase koyro giigsi woththida lo7o ooso nuni ooththana mala Yesus Kirstoosa baggara nuni nam7anththo medhettidaytanne Xoossa medheteththata. 
Ephesians2:11 Hessa gishshas intte kase intte yeleteththan Ayzaabeti intte asateththa bolla asa kushe ooso gaason, «Nuni qaxxarettidos» giza asati inttena, «Qaxxarettonttayta» gizaytoo! Intte hessa ane wozinan woththite." 
Ephesians2:12 Intte he wode Kirstoosappe shaakettidi, Isra7eele naytappe haakkidi, caaqo qaalaska allaga gididi, hayssa alameza bolla hidotaynne Xoossi baynda kase intte diza duussaa yuushshi qopite." 
Ephesians2:13 Ha7i qasse intte kase haahon dizayti Yesus Kirstoosan gididi iza suuththaa baggara shiiqideta. 
Ephesians2:14 Nam7ata issi bolla gaththidi giddon shaakki ooshshiza miishshaa laallida nu saroy iza. 
Ephesians2:15 Wogaa, woga azazora gaththi issife ba ashon shaarides; izi hessa ooththida gaasoykka izas waanna qofay nam7atappe issi ooraththa as ba baggara medhdhidi saroteth ehanaassa." 
Ephesians2:16 Izi masqale bolla hayqqidi morkketeth diggides; nam7atakka issi asho histtidi Xoossara maqayinththides. 
Ephesians2:17 Izi yiidi inttes haakki dizaytassinne matan dizaytas gaththi saroteth sabbakides. 
Ephesians2:18 Nu wurikka iza baggara issi Ayanan Aawaa ach shiiqana. 
Ephesians2:19 Hessa gishshas intte ammanizaytara issife issi dere asanne Xoossas soo asa attiin hayssafe guye betetanne imaththata gidekketa. 
Ephesians2:20 Intte Hawaaretanne nabeta yochchan keexettideta; keeththaas wurseththa kuushshay Yesus Kirstoosa. 
Ephesians2:21 Keeththazi wurikka issife oykettidi Godaas dumma keeththe gidanaas diccees. 
Ephesians2:22 Intteka Xoossi ba Ayanan daanaas izas duussaso gidana mala issife keexettishe deeta. 
Ephesians3:1 Hessa gaason ta Phawuloosi inttes ammanonttayta gishshas Yesus Kirstoosi qachchidaade gidadis. 
Ephesians3:2 Ta inttena go7ana mala Xoossi kiyateththan taas oosos exa immidayssa intte tumappe siyideta. 
Ephesians3:3 Hayssafe kase ta inttes qaanththara xaafida mala taas qoncciin ta eranaas dandayda xuuray hayssa. 
Ephesians3:4 Hessa gishshas intte hessa nababishe Kirstoosa xuura ta ay mala eridaakko intteka eranaas dandayeeta. 
Ephesians3:5 He xuuraykka ha7i ammaniza Hawaaretassinne nabetas qonccida mala kase beni aadhdhida wode diza asataskka qonccibeenna. 
Ephesians3:6 Hessi he xuuray Ayzaabeti Mishiraachcho qaalaa baggara Isra7eele naytara issife laattizayta; issife issaade asateththa mala gididi Yesus Kirstoosa baggara beettida hidota issife gishetti laattizayta gidanaassa. 
Ephesians3:7 Tanikka iza wolqqa ooso mala taas imettida Xoossa kiyateththa imota mala hayssa Mishiraachcho qaalaa oosanchcha gidadis. 
Ephesians3:8 Ta qasse hankko ammaniza asaappe laafa gidikkoka oonikka zaway baynda Kirstoosa dureteth Ayzaabetas sabbakana mala Xoossa kiyateththan hayssi taas imettides. 
Ephesians3:9 Hessaththoka ubbaa medhdhida Xoossaan beni wode qotetti diza Xoossaas xuura qofay aazakko ubbaas ta qonccisana mala taas Xoossa kiyateththi imettides. 
Ephesians3:10 Iza qofay ha7i wode Woosa Keeththa baggara dumma dumma medhay diza Xoossa hiillateththi salon diza halaqatassinne godatas erettana mala hanides. 
Ephesians3:11 Xoossi nu Godaa Yesus Kirstoosa baggara hayssa poliday ba mernaa qofaa mala. 
Ephesians3:12 Nuni izayta gidida gishshassinne izan ammanida gishshas geeshshateththaranne hirgay baynda nuni Xoossako shiiqana dandayoos. 
Ephesians3:13 Hessa gishshas intte bonchchettana mala tani intte gishshas ta bolla gakkida waayezan intte ufays qanxxontta mala ta inttena hadara gays. 
Ephesians3:14 Hessa gishshas tani Xoossa sinththan gulbatays. 
Ephesians3:15 Salon dizaynne biitta bolla diza izaso asay wurikka izi sunththiin summees. 
Ephesians3:16 Intte garsa baggara minnana mala Ayana baggara iza bonchcho dureteththi inttes imettana mala ta woossays. 
Ephesians3:17 Hessika Kirstoosi intte wozinan ammanon daana malanne qasseka intte izan xaphidi siiqon minnana mala woossays. 
Ephesians3:18 Kirstoosa siiqos aahoteththay, adussateththay, dhoqqateththaynne ciimmateththi ay ginakko intte ammaniza ubba asaara issife shaakki erana mala." 
Ephesians3:19 Intte Xoossaa kumeththara shaakki eridi izan kumeth gidana mala asa erappe bolla gidida Kirstoosa siiqo intte erana mala ta woossays. 
Ephesians3:20 Hessa gishshas nu giddon ooththiza ba wolqqaa gina nu woossizayssafenne woykko nu qoppizayssafe ubbaafe bollara keehi darssi ooththanaas dandayza Xoossaas," 
Ephesians3:21 Woosa keeththan qasseka Yesus Kirstoosa baggara wode ubbaan mernaappe mernaa gakkanaas izas bonchchoy gido. Amiin. 
Ephesians4:1 Hessa gishshas Godaa sunththan qashettida tani intte xeygettida xeyssaas bessiza duus daana mala inttena woossays. 
Ephesians4:2 Mulekka ashketanne shugota gidite; issoy issaara siiqon diitenne issoy issaa dandayte. 
Ephesians4:3 Saroteth immiza Ayana issifeteth naaganaas minnite. 
Ephesians4:4 Intte xeygettida gallas issi hidotaakko xeygettida mala issi asateththinne issi Ayanay dees. 
Ephesians4:5 Issi Goday, issi ammanoynne issi xinqatay dees." 
Ephesians4:6 Ubbaafe bollara gididay, ubbaa bolla ooththizay, ubbason dizay, ubbaas Aawaa gidida issi Xoossi dees." 
Ephesians4:7 Gidikkoka Kirstoosi immana gi qachchida mala nuus issaas issaas dumma dumma imoteththi imettides. 
Ephesians4:8 Hessa gishshas, «Izi pude kezida wode di7o di7ides; Asaas kiyateththa imota immides» geetetti Geeshsha Maxaafan xaafettides." 
Ephesians4:9 Histtiin, «Izi pude kezides» guussi qasseka duge biitta gars wodhdhides guus gidontta aggiko hessi ay guussee?" 
Ephesians4:10 Izi duge garse wodhdhidayssi kumeth alame medheteth kumana mala saloppeka bolla keziday iza. 
Ephesians4:11 Issi issi asati Hawaareta, baggayti Nabeta, harati Mishiraachcho qaala sabaake, baggayti qasse heemmizaytanne tamaarsizayta gidana mala izi imota immides." 
Ephesians4:12 Hessika Kirstoosa asateth gidida Woosa Keeththiya keexettana mala ammanizayta ammano oosos giigsanaassa. 
Ephesians4:13 Hessika hananay nu wurikka Xoossa Naa ammanoninne iza eron beettiza issifeteththaako gakkidi kumeththa as gidanaas Kirstoosan nuni Kirstoosaththo kumeththinne polo gidana malassa. 
Ephesians4:14 Hessa gishshas abba bolla dendiza gote carkoy yaanne haa shocechchiza mala dumma dumma timirte carkon asa geneninne baleththon ane nuni yaanne haa phonqettishe qeeri guuththa nayta mala hanokko. 
Ephesians4:15 Hessaththo hano aggidi tumaa siiqon haasayshe hu7e gididayssaako hanizaazan ubbaan ane diccoos; he hu7ezikka Kirstoosa. 
Ephesians4:16 Iza gaason asateththi wuri xaphon oykettidi issi issi asateththi ba ooso ooththishe wurikka siiqon dicceessinne banakka minththees. 
Ephesians4:17 Ayzaabeta mala coo mela qofan mela simerettanaas inttes bessenna gaada ta inttena zorays. 
Ephesians4:18 Istta wozinay muumida gishshassinne yuushshi qoppontta gishshas istta wozina ayfey qooqides; istti Xoossa de7oppe shaakettida. 
Ephesians4:19 Isttafe yeellateththi dhayda gishshas ba koyida mala bana kalssontta amoninne tunateththan daanaas wogay baynda iita oosos bana aaththi immida. 
Ephesians4:20 Intte qasse Kirstoosa hessa malan eribeekketa. 
Ephesians4:21 Ee tumukka intte iza gishshas siyidetanne Yesusan diza tumaa izappe tamaardeta. 
Ephesians4:22 Intte kase diza duussay baleththiza amon qitattida gishshas kase ceega asateth inttefe qaari yeggana mala tamaardeta. 
Ephesians4:23 Qasseka intte qofay Ayanan ooraxo. 
Ephesians4:24 Tumu xilloteththaninne geeshshateththan Xoos misatana medhettida ooraththa asateth may7ite. 
Ephesians4:25 Nu wurikka issi asho gidida gishshas wordoteth diggidi nuni nu garsan issoy issaara ane tumaa haasayoos. 
Ephesians4:26 Hanqettite shin nagara ooththofte; intte hanqon dishin arshey wullofo. 
Ephesians4:27 Xala7es soho immofte. 
Ephesians4:28 Kase kaysotizaadey hayssafe guye kaysotoppa; gido attiin metotettidi iza woossizaytas immiza miishshi iza kushen daana mala lo7o miish ba kushera ooththi demmanaas daaburo. 
Ephesians4:29 Koshshiza mala hankko siyizayta go7izaazinne maaddiza qaalappe attiin go7ay baynda qaalay intte doonappe kezoppo. 
Ephesians4:30 Intte attana gallassas attamettida Xoossaa Xillo Ayana mishisopite. 
Ephesians4:31 Camo yo7o ubbaa hanqo, yiillo, oosh, cashshe, qasseka hankko hara iitateth ubbaa inttefe diggite." 
Ephesians4:32 Inttena Xoossi Kirstoosa baggara atto gida mala intteka intte garsan atto atto geetettite; issoy issaara kiyatanne issoy issaas qadhettizayta gidite. 
Ephesians5:1 Hessa gishshas intte dosettiza nayta mala Xoos misatite. 
Ephesians5:2 Kirstoosi nuna siiqida mala qasseka nu gishshas bana sawiza yarsho ooththi Xoossas immida mala intteka siiqon simerettite. 
Ephesians5:3 Laymay woykko tunateththi woykko uuzeteththi mulekka intte giddon beetoy attiin zigirsika siyettofo; hessa malay geeshsha Xoossa asas bessenna. 
Ephesians5:4 Intte galata galatizayta gidite attiin ase yeellachchiza laafa haasayay, coo eeyateththa yo7oy inttes bessontta gishshas hessa malay intte garsan dooppo." 
Ephesians5:5 Qasseka intte laymatizaytas woykko tunatas woykko uuzettizaytassinne eeqas goynnizaytas Kirstoosa kawoteththaninne Xoossa Kawoteththan isttas laatasoy bayndayssa intte erite. 
Ephesians5:6 Inttena oonikka wordo haasayan baleththofo; gaasoykka Xoossa hanqoy izas azazettontta nayta bolla yaanay haytantta malanna. 
Ephesians5:7 Hessa gishshas hessantta malara zuppetopite. 
Ephesians5:8 Kase intte dhuma shin Godaan ha7i intte poo7o; intte poo7o nayta mala diite. 
Ephesians5:9 Poo7os ayfey lo7eteththan, xilloteththaninne tumateththan ubbaan dees." 
Ephesians5:10 Hessaththoka Godaa ufayssiza miish koyite. 
Ephesians5:11 Ayfey baynda dhuma oosora inttes aykko gaagoteththi dooppo; hessafe iita ooso qoncce kessite. 
Ephesians5:12 Dhuman diza asati geeman ooththiza miishsha gishshas haasayaykka yeellachchees. 
Ephesians5:13 Poo7oy poo7idaazi wuri qonccen beettees. 
Ephesians5:14 Gaasoykka ubbaa bessizay poo7o; hessa gishshas, «Nenoo, dhiskizaysso beegga! Hayqoppe denda! Kirstoosi nees poo7isana» geetettides." 
Ephesians5:15 Hessa gishshas erateththi bayndayta mala gidontta intte waanidi erata mala daanaakko naagettite. 
Ephesians5:16 Hayssi wodezi iita gidida gishshas hessa lo7eththi erite. 
Ephesians5:17 Hessa gishshas eeyata gidopite; Godaa sheney aazakko yuushshi qopite. 
Ephesians5:18 Ayanay kumidayta gidite attiin maththosiza ushshan maththottofte; hessi coo mela miishsha laaleththa. 
Ephesians5:19 Ayana yeththan galatara gaththi yexxishe intte giddon issoy issaara haasayettite; intte sabaninne yeththan kumeththa wozinappe Godaa galatite. 
Ephesians5:20 Hessan Xoossa Aawaa, Godaa Yesus Kirstoosa sunththaa ubba miishshas ubba wode galatite." 
Ephesians5:21 Intte Kirstoosa bonchchos giidi yashshara issoy issaas azazettite. 
Ephesians5:22 Machcheto intte Godaas haarettiza mala intte azinatas haarettite. 
Ephesians5:23 Kirstoosi ba asho gidida Woosa Keeththays hu7e gidida mala azinaykka ba machcheys hu7e. 
Ephesians5:24 Hessa gishshas Woosa Keeththiya Kirstoosas azazettiza mala machchetikka ba azinatas ay hanonkka azazettanaas bessees. 
Ephesians5:25 Azinatoo! Kirstoosi Woosa Keeththayo siiqida malanne bana izi gishshas aaththi immida mala intteka intte machcheta siiqite. 
Ephesians5:26 Ba qaala baggara haaththan meecci geeshshi dummasides. 
Ephesians5:27 Hessaththoka qitay woykko ayfeso xirphoteththi woykko issi iitay izi bolla beettontta geeshshinne balay izi bolla bayndaaro bonchcho Woosa Keeththe histtidi shiishshanaassa. 
Ephesians5:28 Azinatikka hessaththo ba machcheta ba asho mala siiqanaas bessees; ba machcho siiqizaadey bana siiqees. 
Ephesians5:29 Barkka bana ixxizaadey oonikka deenna; ba ashos meessinne bana naagees; Kirstoosikka Woosa Keeththas hinniththo ooththides. 
Ephesians5:30 Nuni Kirstoosa asateththa. 
Ephesians5:31 Hessa gishshas, «Asi aayonne aawa aggidi ba machcheyra issino gidees; nam7ayka issi asho gideettes» geetetti Geeshsha Maxaafan xaafettides." 
Ephesians5:32 Hayssi daro xuura yo7o; tanikka hayssa Kirstoosa gishshassinne Woosa Keeththa gishshas yootays. 
Ephesians5:33 Gidikkoka inttefe issi issaadey ba machcho bana siiqiza mala siiqo; machchaka ba azinaa bonchchu. 
Ephesians6:1 Naytoo! Intte inttena yelidaytas Godaan azazettite; hessi inttes bessees. 
Ephesians6:2 «Ne aawaanne ne aayo bonchcha» giza azazo giddon diza hidotay koyro azazo. 
Ephesians6:3 Ne hessaththo ooththiko nees lo7ananne nees layththay biittaa bolla aduqqana. 
Ephesians6:4 Yelidaytoo! Intteka intte nayta hanqeththofte; gido attiin intte nayta Godaa zoreninne seeran dichchite. 
Ephesians6:5 Oosanchchatoo! Intte Kirstoosas azazettiza mala biitta bolla inttena oosisizaytas yashshateththaninne bonchchon suure wozinappe azazettite. 
Ephesians6:6 Coo asa ayfen beettana malanne oosisizaytappe doona anjjo ekkanaas gidontta intte Kirstoosa aylleta mala Xoossa shene kumeththa wozinappe polana mala wozinappe azazettite. 
Ephesians6:7 Asas ooththiza mala gidontta Godaas ooththiza mala intte kumeththa wozinappe ooththite. 
Ephesians6:8 Gaasoykka aylle gidiin woykko godaa gidiin ba ooththiza lo7o oosos ubbaas woyto ekkanayssa intte ereeta. 
Ephesians6:9 Intteno godatoo! Intteka intte oosisizaytas hessaththo ooththite; isttassinne inttes Godaa gididay bolla salon dizayssa; izikka ayfeso xeelli as maaddonttayssaka intteka eriza gishshas oosanchchata babiso aggidi lo7o ooththite. 
Ephesians6:10 Hara baggara mino Godaaninne iza gita wolqqan minnite. 
Ephesians6:11 Daabulosa gene ooso intte eqettanaas dandayana mala Xoossaa ola may7ota may7ite. 
Ephesians6:12 Gaasoykka nu olettanay ashoranne suuththara gidontta hayssa dhuma alameza haariza godatara, wolqqamataranne salo bolla diza tuna ayana olanchchatara olettoos." 
Ephesians6:13 Iita gallassay gakkishin intte morkke wolqqara eqettanaas dandayana mala Xoossa ola may7ota kumeth may7ite; intte ubbaaka polidaappe guye minni eqqanaas dandayeeta. 
Ephesians6:14 Hessa gishshas intte xeessan tumaa zinnaare mala danccettidi xilloteththa xurureta mala tiran may7idi," 
Ephesians6:15 saroteththa Mishiraachcho qaalaa tohon caamma mala aaththidi giigetti eqqite. 
Ephesians6:16 Heytanttafekka bollara tama mala popol7u giza iita ayana wondafeta intte ubbaa toyssana dandayana mala ammano gondalle mala denththite. 
Ephesians6:17 Atoteth birata qoobe mala hu7en woththite; Ayana giththa mashsha oykkite; hessika Xoossa qaala. 
Ephesians6:18 Woosan ay hanonkka Ayanan woossite; hessa qoppidi beeggite; ammanizayta ubbaa gishshas qanxxontta woossite. 
Ephesians6:19 Tani Mishiraachcho qaala xuuraa asas qonccisanaas doona doyza ubba wode yashshi baynda ta xalateththan yootanaas qaalay taas imettana mala taas woossite. 
Ephesians6:20 Tani Mishiraachcho qaalaa gishshas sansalatan qashettada kiitettidaade gididay hessassa; hessa gishshas ta yootanaas bessizayssa babbontta yootana mala taas woossite. 
Ephesians6:21 Ta ay mala dizaakkonne ay ooththizaakko intte erana mala dosettida ta ishay Godaas ammanettida oosanchchay Tiqiqoosi inttes hanidayssa wursika inttes yootana. 
Ephesians6:22 Intte nu hanoteth erana malanne intte wozina izi minththeththana mala ta iza intteko yeddadis. 
Ephesians6:23 Aawaa Xoossaafe, Godaa Yesus Kirstoosappe saroteththinne siiqoy ammanora inttes ta ishatas gido." 
Ephesians6:24 Godaa Yesus Kirstoosa pacey baynda siiqiza ubbaas saroteththi gido. Amiin. 
Philippians1:1 Yesus Kirstoosa oosanchcha gidida Phawuloosappenne Ximtoosappe Woosa Keeththa cimataranne daaqonetara issife Piliphisiyoose deren diza ammanizaytas Yesus Kirstoosas dummatidaytas ubbaas," 
Philippians1:2 nu Aawaa Xoossaafe, Godaa Yesus Kirstoosappe kiyateththinne saroteththi inttes gido." 
Philippians1:3 Inttena qoppiza ubba gallas tani ta Xoossaa galatays. 
Philippians1:4 Ubba gallas intte gishshas ta woossiza wode ufayssan woossays. 
Philippians1:5 Koyro gallassafe haa simmiin hanno gakkanaas Mishiraachcho qaalaa ooson intte tanara deeta. 
Philippians1:6 Inttenan lo7o ooso doommidayssi izi Yesus Kirstoosi wurseththa pirdas yaana gakkanaas inttena dandayssanayssa ta ammanays. 
Philippians1:7 Ta ha7i qasho keeththan dishininne ta qashettanaappeka kase Mishiraachcho qaalaa tuma naaganaassinne minththeththanaas Xoossi taas ba kiyateththan immida maadon intte wurikka tanara issife ooththidayta gidida gishshas intte ubba gallas ta wozinappe dhayekketa; hessa gishshas tani intte gishshas qoppanaas bessees. 
Philippians1:8 Ta inttena Yesus Kirstoosa siiqon wostta laamotizaakko Xoossi taas markka. 
Philippians1:9 Intte siiqoy erateththaninne akeekan keehi darana mala ta woossays. 
Philippians1:10 Hessika intte ubbaafe aadhdhizayssa shaakki erana malanne Yesus Kirstoosa yuussa gallas gakkanaas intte geeshshatanne wosoy bayndayta gidana mala koyays. 
Philippians1:11 Xoossa bonchchisizayssanne galatissizayssa intte ooththana mala Yesus Kirstoosan beettiza geeshshateththa ayfen intte wozinay kumo. 
Philippians1:12 Ha7ikka ta ishatoo! Ta bolla gakkida metoy Mishiraachcho qaalay kaseppe keehi aakkanaas gididayssa intte erana mala ta koyays. 
Philippians1:13 Hessa gishshas ta qasheteththay Kirstoosa gishshas gididayssi kawo keeththa zabetassinne harataska erettides. 
Philippians1:14 Ta qashettidayssa gaason ammanizayti Xoossa qaalaa babbontta xalateththan asas markkattanaas minoteth demmida. 
Philippians1:15 Issi issi asati coo nu izappe waanidon geeththaninne hoolloteththan sabbakeettes; baggayti qasse lo7o qofara Kirstoosa gishshas sabbakeettes. 
Philippians1:16 Baggayti tani Mishiraachcho qaalaa gishshas mootettana haan dizayssa eriza gishshas siiqon sabbakeettes. 
Philippians1:17 Hankkoyti qasse lo7o qofan gidontta tana gakkida qashoza bolla hara waaye gaththanaassinne ba iita qofaa polanaas Kirstoosa sabbakeettes. 
Philippians1:18 Hessa gidikko ay metoo dizay! Waanna ayfe yo7oy suureteththan gidiin woykko misatisson gidiinkka awarakka Kirstoosa sabbakiza gishshas ta ufayettays. 
Philippians1:19 Ta bolla gakkida metoppe ta aadhdhanay intte woosaninne Yesus Kirstoosa Ayana maadon gididayssa ta erays. 
Philippians1:20 Ta ay ogerakka yeellatontta mala mino ufayssinne laamotay taas dees; gido attiin kasekka hachchika, ta hayqqiinka paxa diinka Kirstoosi ta ashon bonchchettanayssa tani xalateththan haasayays." 
Philippians1:21 Taas duus guussi Kirstoosa; hayqoykka taas go7a. 
Philippians1:22 Gido attiin tani hayssa asho duussan gujja dizaakko ayfe immiza ooso ooththays guussa; ta awayssa dooranaakko taas erettenna. 
Philippians1:23 Ha nam7u hanotan metotettadis; ta baada Kirstoosara daanaas laamotays; hessi hara ubbaafe keehi lo7o. 
Philippians1:24 Gido attiin taas ashon duussi inttes keehi koshshees. 
Philippians1:25 Hessa akeekada intte ammanon diccana malanne ufayettana mala intte ubbata matan gam7anayssanne daanayssa ta erays. 
Philippians1:26 Ta hee baada intte achchan de7ikko ta gaason inttes Kirstoosan diza ceeqeteththi darana. 
Philippians1:27 Kirstoosa Mishiraachcho qaalaas bessiza mala diite; hessaththo haankka ta inttena baada be7idaakko woykko haahon daada intte gishshas ta siyizaakko intte Mishiraachcho qaalaa ammanos issife olettishe issi Ayanan intte minni eqqanayssa ta erays. 
Philippians1:28 Ay ogerakka inttenara eqettizaytas hirgofte; hessi istti dhayanayssassinne intte attanayssas Xoossafe imettida malata. 
Philippians1:29 Intte Kirstoosa ammanizayta xalla gidontta iza gishshas waaye ekkizayta gidana mala hayssi Xoossa kiyateththi inttes imettides. 
Philippians1:30 Intte kase be7ida mala ha7ikka ta bolla dizayssa intte siyizayssa mala hessaththo inttenakka waayison dees. 
Philippians2:1 Inttes Kirstoosa baggara beettida issifeteththaa gaason issoy issaa minththeththizaaz siiqo gidiinkka woykko Ayana issifeteth woykko maaroynne asas misheteththi intte garsan diikko intte as siiqon issi Ayananinne issi qofan gididi ta ufays polite. 
Philippians2:2  
Philippians2:3 As ubbaa inttefe bollara xeellite attiin intterkka inttena doson woykko go7ay baynda galata ekkanaas issi miishshika ooththofte. 
Philippians2:4 Inttefe issi issi asi hara as go7izayssa xeellite attiin intte go7a xalla xeellofte. 
Philippians2:5 Yesus Kirstoosas diza ashketeththi intte achchanka do. 
Philippians2:6 Izi Xoossakoshin bana Xoossara ginisanaas koyibeenna. 
Philippians2:7 Gido attiin aylle medha ekkidi as misatidi barkka bana eeya as kessides. 
Philippians2:8 As gidi qonccidikka bana asappe ziqqisides; hayqqana gakkanaas hessika masqale bolla kaqetti hayqqana gakkanaas azazettides. 
Philippians2:9 Hessa gishshas Xoossi iza daro dhoqqu histtides; sunth ubbaafe dhoqqu gida sunth izas immides. 
Philippians2:10 Hessika saloninne sa7an, sa7appe garsankka diza medheteththinne gulbatey wuri Yesusa sunththaas gulbatana malassa." 
Philippians2:11 Asa inxarsi wurikka Xoossaa Aawaa bonchchos Yesus Kirstoosi Godaa gididayssa markkattanaassa. 
Philippians2:12 Hessa gishshas ta ishatoo! Intte kase ubba wode azazettizayta gidida mala ha7ikka tani matan dontta inttefe haahon diikkoka intte atoteththay kumeth gidana mala yashshateththaninne bonchchon polite. 
Philippians2:13 Xoossi inttes azazeteth immishe ba qofaa wurseth gakkanaas intte giddon ooththees. 
Philippians2:14 Ay miishshika zuuzunththinne palamay baynda ooththite. 
Philippians2:15 Hessika intte iitanne geella asa giddon geeshshatanne wosoy baynda Xoossa nayta gididi alame bolla arshe mala dere ubbaas poo7anaassa. 
Philippians2:16 Intte ekkida de7o qaalaa lo7eththi oykkiko Kirstoosi haa simmi yiza wode ta mela daaburonttayssa gishshas ta ceeqettanaazi taas dees. 
Philippians2:17 Qasseka inttes Godaan diza ammanoy intte Xoossas shiishshida dumma yarsho mala ta shemppoy intte yarshora issife yarsho mala gukkizaakko inttenara tanikka ufayettana. 
Philippians2:18 Hessaththoka intte inttes ufayettidi tanakka ufayssanaas bessees. 
Philippians2:19 Goday maaddiko Ximtoosa intteko yeddada intte lo7eteththaa gishshas lo7o woreta siyanaas koyays. 
Philippians2:20 Intte lo7eteththaa gishshas qoppiza asi hara iza malay oonikka baa. 
Philippians2:21 Haray wurikka Yesus Kirstoosayssa gidontta ba go7as woxxizaade xalala. 
Philippians2:22 Gido attiin intte erizayssa mala Ximtoosi izi ay mala asakko ba gishshas markkasides. Nay ba aawara ooththiza mala tanara Mishiraachcho qaalaa yootides. 
Philippians2:23 Hessa gishshas hayssafe sinththan ta waananaakko shaakka eridaappe guye iza ta intteko kiittana qoppays. 
Philippians2:24 Tanikka intteko mata wode baanayssa Godaan ammanettays. 
Philippians2:25 Hessaththoka intte tana koshshiza miishshan ubbaan maaddana malanne lo7eththi oykkana mala yeddida Afrodixo ta intteko zaara yeddana mala koshshizayssi taas erettides. 
Philippians2:26 Gaasoykka izi inttena kumeththata beyanaas laamotida gishshassinne qasseka intte iza sakoza siyidayssas qoppida gishshassa. 
Philippians2:27 Tumappeka izi hargidi hayqqishe attides; gido attiin Xoossi iza maarides; ta kase muuzottizayssa bolla hara muuzoy gujettontta mala tanakka maaddides. 
Philippians2:28 Hessa gishshas intte iza be7idi ufayettana malanne tanikka hirgafe shempana mala amottays. 
Philippians2:29 Intte iza keehi ufayssan mokki ekkite; iza mala asatakka bonchchite. 
Philippians2:30 Intte tana matan diidi ooththi maaddanaas dandayontta gishshas izi ba shemppos mishettontta tana ooththi maaddidi Kirstoosa ooso gaason hayqqishe attides. 
Philippians3:1 Ta ishatoo! Hayssafe hara ta inttena gizay Godaan ufayettite; ha7ikka zaarada izo ta inttes xaafikko tana saleththenna; inttenakka go7ana. 
Philippians3:2 Heyta kana mala huskkattizaytappe, iita ooththizaytappenne asas meqeth menththiza asatappe naagettite." 
Philippians3:3 Tumu qaxxarettidayti, Xoos woossizayti, Yesus Kirstoosan ceeqqizayti, ashon ceeqettonttaytinne ashonkka ammanettonttayti nuna." 
Philippians3:4 Tani ceeqqana koykko asho baggara ceeqqana miishshi taaska dees; oonaska ashon ceeqqiza miishshi dizaa misatikko ta izappe aadhdhays. 
Philippians3:5 Tani yelettida osppunththa gallas qaxxarettadis; ta Isra7eele zereththinne Biniyaame kochchafe yelettadis; Ibraaweta giddon tanikka adda Ibraawe; woga baggara oychchizaadey diikko ta kase Farsaawe. 
Philippians3:6 Muse wogaas zil7ettizayssa gidikko tani kase Woosa Keeththaa gooddizaade. Wogaa naagon beettiza xilloteth gidikko kase ta bolla issi wosoykka deenna. 
Philippians3:7 Gido attiin taas go7a gididayssa ubbaa Kirstoosa gishshas gaada go7ay baynda miishsha mala qoodadis. 
Philippians3:8 Hessafekka ta Godaa Yesus Kirstoosa eroppe aadhdhizay haray aykkoyka bayndayssa ta ammaniza gishshas ubbaaka go7ay baynda miishsha mala qoodadis; tani iza gishshas gaada ubbaaka aggadis; ta Kirstoosa demmana gaada ubba miishshaakka wora wodhdhida iita miishsha mala qoodadis. 
Philippians3:9 Tani hessaththo ooththiza gaasoykka kase Muse wogaan taas diza xilloteththaa aggada ammanon beettiza Xoossa xilloteth Kirstoosan ammanada demmanaassinne ta izara issife de7anaassa. 
Philippians3:10 Kirstoosanne izi hayqqi dendida denththaa wolqqa ta erana mala iza waayekka ta izara gishettana malanne hayqonkka ta iza misatana mala amottays. 
Philippians3:11 Hessaththoka ta hayqqa dendidaappe guye mernaas daanaas koyays. 
Philippians3:12 Ta hayssa wursa demmadis woykko hayssaththo hanadis guus gidenna; gido attiin Yesus Kirstoosi tana baas histtidi taas giigsida woyto ekkanaas minna woththa bolla days. 
Philippians3:13 Ta ishatoo! Ta ha7i ta koyzayssaka oykkida mala qoodikke; gido attiin ta issi miish ooththana; taappe guyera dizayssa agga aggada taappe sinththan dizayssa oykkanaas zaradhdhays. 
Philippians3:14 Xoossi tana Yesus Kirstoosa baggara pude xeygida gishshas woyto gakka ekkanaas elelays. 
Philippians3:15 Hessa gishshas nuni ammanon minnidayti wurikka haniza yo7o ubbaa hessaththo xeellanaas bessees; issi issi dumma qofay inttes diikko hessaka Xoossi inttes qonccisana. 
Philippians3:16 Gidikkoka nu ha7i gakki eridaazan ane simerettoos. 
Philippians3:17 Ta ishatoo! Ane intte ta haniza mala tana kaallitenne haratarakka issife de7ite; nuni nuna inttes leemiso histti bessida mala diza asata wozinan woththite. 
Philippians3:18 Gaasoykka hayssafe kase ta inttes zaara zaara yootida mala ha7ikka zaarada afunththara inttes yootays; daroti Kirstoosa masqales morkke gididi simeretteettes. 
Philippians3:19 Istta wurseththi dhayo; istta uloy istta Xoossa; isttas kawushshateththay isttas bonchcho; istta wozinay shempiday ha biittaa duussanna. 
Philippians3:20 Nu derey gidikko salonna; heeppe buro yaanayssa nuna ashshida Godaa Yesus Kirstoosa yuussaa laamoteththan naagon doos. 
Philippians3:21 Izikka ubbaa baappe garsan haarisana dandayza ba wolqqan daaburanchcha gidida nu asateth bonchchettida ba asateth misatissidi laammana. 
Philippians4:1 Ta inttena dosizaytoo! Ta inttena laamotizaytoo! Taas ufayssinne ooso zawude gidida ta ishatoo! Godaan minni eqqite. 
Philippians4:2 Intte qofay Godaan issino gidana mala Ewodiyanne Sinxekey ba garsan siiqettana mala ta istta woossays. 
Philippians4:3 Ero! Nenoo! Tanara issife ammanettida oosanchchazoo! Mishiraachcho qaalaa yootos tanaranne Qalamenxoosara qasseka istta sunththay de7o maxaafan xaafettida hankko tanara ooso laggetara issife waayettida maccassata ne maaddana mala ta nena woossays. 
Philippians4:4 Ay wodekka Godaan ufayettite; qasseka ta inttena ufayettite gays. 
Philippians4:5 Intte kiyateththi as ubbaa achchan eretto; Goday yaana matides. 
Philippians4:6 Haniza yo7on ubbaan galatan, woosaninne gaannateththan Xoossa sinth shiiqite attiin ay miishshankka hirgofte." 
Philippians4:7 Asa qofappe bollara diza Xoossa saroteththi intte wozinanne intte qofaa wursi Yesus Kirstoosan naagees. 
Philippians4:8 Wurseththa bolla ta ishatoo! Tumu gidida yo7o ubbaa, bonchcho gidida yo7o ubbaa, adda gidida yo7o ubbaa, geeshshi gidida yo7o ubbaa, dosettida miish ubbaa, lo7o gidida yo7o ubbaa, lo7eteth gidiinkka galatakka haytantta misatizaaz ubbaa qopite." 
Philippians4:9 Intte taappe tamaardayssa woykko ekkidayssanne siyidayssa woykko be7idayssa ay gidikkoka ubbaa ooththite; Goday inttenara gidana. 
Philippians4:10 Daro wodeppe guye ooraththa qofara intte ta gishshas qofo oykkideta; hessika Godaa baggara tana keehi ufayssees; tumukka intte taas qofo aggibeekketashin intte qoppida mala ooththanaas inttes hano ixxides. 
Philippians4:11 Tani hessa gizay tana metida gishshas gidenna; gaasoykka ta ay hankkoka, «Dizayssi taas gidana» guus tamaaradis." 
Philippians4:12 Pacekka ta erays; demmadakka erays; gafadakka, kalladakka erays; diinka dhayiinkka erays; ay gidikkoka taas dizay gidana guussa xuura ta lo7eththa erays." 
Philippians4:13 Taas wolqqa immiza Kirstoosan tani ubba miish ooththanaas dandayays. 
Philippians4:14 Gidikkoka intte tana ta waayen maaddida gishshas lo7o ooththideta. 
Philippians4:15 Intte Piliphisiyoose asati hessafe bollara intte erizay koyro Mishiraachcho qaalaa intte ekkida wode tani Maqidooniyappe dendashe inttefe attiin gede immidikka haa ekkidikka maadettidinne maaddidi giza Woosa Keeththi taas deenna. 
Philippians4:16 Haray attoshin ta kase Tasolonqen diza wodekka tani metotiin intte zaari zaari taas maado yeddideta. 
Philippians4:17 Ta hessa gizay immida gishshas inttes anjjoy darana mala gaada attiin ta inttefe maado ekkanaas amottada gidenna. 
Philippians4:18 Taas koshshizayssanne tana koshshizayssafekka bollara ekkadis; intte taas yeddida maado miishshaa Afrodixo kusheppe ekkiin ta pacey kumides; hayssi daroppe Xoossa achchan ekettida daro lo7o sawiza yarsho mala. 
Philippians4:19 Xoossi ba dureteththaa gina inttes koshshizayssa Godaa Yesus Kirstoosa baggara kunththana. 
Philippians4:20 Nu Aawassinne nu Xoossaas mernaappe mernaas bonchchoy gido. Amiin. 
Philippians4:21 Ammaniza asa ubbaa Yesus Kirstoosa sunththan saro giite; tanara diza ishati wurikka inttena saro geettes. 
Philippians4:22 Ammanizayti wuri harappeka Qeesaareso asaappe ammanizayti wurikka inttena saro geettes. 
Philippians4:23 Godaa Yesus Kirstoosa aadho kiyateththi inttenara gido. Amiin. 
Colossians1:1 Xoossa shenen Yesus Kirstoosan kiitettida Phawuloosappenne nu ishaa Ximtoosappe," 
Colossians1:2 Qolasiyaasen diza Kirstoosan dummatidaytassinne ammanettida ishatas nu Aawaa Xoossaafe saroteththinne kiyateththi inttes gido. 
Colossians1:3 Nu intte gishshas woossiza ubba gallas nu Godaa Yesus Kirstoosa Aawaa Xoossaa galatoos. 
Colossians1:4 Gaasoykka inttes Yesus Kirstoosan diza ammanoninne ammaniza asaa intte ubbaa siiqizayssa nu siyida gishshassa. 
Colossians1:5 Hessi wurikka haniday salon inttes giigettida hidotappe dendidayssanna; hessa he hidota gishshas Mishiraachcho qaalaa intte kasetidi siyideta. 
Colossians1:6 Hessika hee intteko gakkides; hessa Mishiraachcho qaalaa intte siyoosoppenne Xoossa kiyateththa tumateththa intte eroo gallassafe haa simmiin alame yuushon izi ooththishe dizayssa mala intte achchan ayfe ayfishenne diccishe dees. 
Colossians1:7 Hessaka ha7i nu gishshas gididi Kirstoosas ammanettida oosanchcha gididayssinne nunara issife ooththizanne siiqiza Ephafiray inttena tamaarsides. 
Colossians1:8 Qasseka izi inttenan diza Ayana siiqoteththaa nuus yootides. 
Colossians1:9 Nu qasse hessa siyoosoppe haa simmiin intte Xoossa shene erateththaninne akeekan inttena kunththana mala intte gishshas woosa qanxxibeekko. 
Colossians1:10 Hessaththoka Godaas bessiza duus daana mala intte iza poli ufayssana mala lo7o ooso ubbaan ayfe immana malanne Xoos eron dicci dicci baana mala nu inttes woossoos. 
Colossians1:11 Goday ba gita wolqqan ba minoteth ubbaa inttes immo; wursika intte dandayana malanne ufayssan giigettidayta gidana mala inttena izi maaddo. 
Colossians1:12 Ammanizayti laattizaso poo7o kawoteth laattizayta nu gidana mala nuna gaththida nu Aawaa intte galatanaassa. 
Colossians1:13 Izi nuna dhuman haareteththafe ashshidi gede ba dosiza naaza kawoteththan pinththides. 
Colossians1:14 Nu izan wozzettidi nagarappe maarettidos. 
Colossians1:15 Kirstoosi ayfen beettontta Xoossas tumu leemiso; medheteththa ubbaafe gitanne bayra. 
Colossians1:16 Medheteththi wuri izan medhettides. Saloninne sa7an dizayti, ayfen beettizaytinne beettonttayti gidiinkka, wolqqamata gidiinkka, haarizayti gidiinkka woykko godateththi dizayti haniday wurikka izan izas medhettida." 
Colossians1:17 Izi ubbaafe kase dees; wurikka issi bolla oyketti minniday izanna. 
Colossians1:18 Izi ba asateth gidida Woosa Keeththays hu7e; ubbaas bolla gidana mala izi hayqqida asa ubbaafe koyro dendides. 
Colossians1:19 Hessika haniday kumeththa Xoossateththay iza Naazan de7ana mala Xoossaa Aawaa shene gidida gishshassa. 
Colossians1:20 Masqale bolla izappe gukkida suuththaan saroteth medhdhidi sa7a bolla gidiin salo bolla dizayssa ubbaa iza baggara banara maqayinththides. 
Colossians1:21 Intte iita qofa gaason kase intte Xoossafe shaakettidi izas morkketakkoshin. 
Colossians1:22 Ha7i qasse intte bolla balaynne wosoy baynda geeshshata ooththidi inttena ba sinth shiishshanaas Kirstoosa asho hayqo baggara Xoossi inttena banara maqayinththides. 
Colossians1:23 Hessika hananay intte ammanon xaphphidinne giigetti intte intte ammanon ekkida mishiraachcho qaalaappe qaaxxontta minni eqqikonna; inttessinne salo gufanththon diza medheteththaas sabbakettida Mishiraachcho qaalay hessa. Ta Phawuloosikka hayssa ha mishiraachcho qaalaas oosanchcha gidadis. 
Colossians1:24 Ta intte gishshas waaye be7idayssi ha7ikka tana ufayssees; Kirstoosi ba asateth hessika Woosa Keeththa gishshas izi ekkida waayezappe ekkishin pacciday diikko tani ta ashon kunththana. 
Colossians1:25 Xoossa qaalaa ta inttes pacey baynda gaththana mala taas Xoossafe imettida hadaraa mala ta Woosa Keeththa oosanchcha gidadis. 
Colossians1:26 Ha qaalay beni wodeppenne kase yeletaappe geemmidi xuura gidi gam7ides; ha7i gidikko ammanizaytas ubbaas qonccides. 
Colossians1:27 Xoossi ba asaas qonccisanaas koyida xuuray iza bonchcho dureteththi ayzaabe gidida intte giddon ay mala gitakko bessanaassa; izikka iza bonchcho hidota gidida intte giddon diza Kirstoosa. 
Colossians1:28 Nunikka issi issi as Kirstoosas kumeththa as histti shiishshanaas dandayana mala as ubbaa hiillara zorishenne tamaarsishe Kirstoosa gishshas sabbakoos. 
Colossians1:29 Xoossi ba gita wolqqan tanan ooththiza gishshas he wolqqaan baaxetashe he qofaa polanaas dafettays. 
Colossians2:1 Intte gishshassinne Lodoqiyan dizaytanne hessaththoka tana ba ayfera beyi erontta asa ubbaas ta ay mala baaxetizaakko intte erana mala ta koyays. 
Colossians2:2 Qasseka istta wozinay minnana malanne istti siiqoteththan issoy issaara oykettana mala kumeth gididayssa yuushshi qoppi eron dureteth demmidi Xoossaa xuura gidida Kirstoosa istti erana mala ta dafettays. 
Colossians2:3 Qotan diza cinccateththinne erateththa haaroy wurikka beettizay Kirstoosa achchanna. 
Colossians2:4 Oonikka inttena doona mal7eththon baleththontta mala ta inttes yootays. 
Colossians2:5 Ta inttefe asho ayfen haakka diikkoka Ayanan inttenara issife days; intte wogara dizayssanne intte Kirstoosa lo7eththi ammanizayssa beyada ta daro ufayettays. 
Colossians2:6 Hessa gishshas intte Godaa Yesus Kirstoosa ammanida mala izan de7ite. 
Colossians2:7 Intte izan tokettidinne keexettidi intte tamaarda mala ammanon minnidi daro tirpa galata izas shiishshishe diite. 
Colossians2:8 Kirstoosan xaphphidaaz gidontta asa woganinne go7ay baynda ha alameza laafa wogan eqqida asa erateththaninne coo baleththo haasayan inttena oonikka di7ontta mala naagettite. 
Colossians2:9 Gaasoykka kumeththa Xoossateththay iza asateththan dees. 
Colossians2:10 Intteka haarizaytassinne godata ubbaas hu7e gidida Kirstoosan kumeth gidite. 
Colossians2:11 Intte izan qaxxarettideta; hessi he qaxxarazikka nagara gidida asho qofaa digganaas Kirstoosan hanidayssa attiin asa kushen hanibeenna. 
Colossians2:12 Xinqatan izara issife moogettideta; iza hayqoppe denththida Xoossa wolqqan ammanidi qasseka izara issife dendideta. 
Colossians2:13 Intte kase intte mooroninne intte asho nagara hanoteththaa inttefe diggontta aggida gishshas hayqqidaytakko shin Xoossi inttena Kirstoosa baggara paththides; intte nagaraakka ubbaa atto gides. 
Colossians2:14 Kase nuna mootishenne nunara eqettishe diza Muse wogaan aco mootos xaafettidayssa qucci diggides. Masqale bolla torgidi nu bollafe diggides. 
Colossians2:15 Halaqatanne godatizayta godateth isttafe woththi ekkidinne masqale bolla hayqqidi xooni dendidi di7ettidayta qonccen yuushshi bessides. 
Colossians2:16 Hessa gishshas muussan woykko ushshan, issife bonchchon woykko agina xeeroninne Sambata gallas bonchcho gishshas intte bolla oonikka pirdofo." 
Colossians2:17 Heyti wurikka buro yaana hanotas eeshota gidishin waanna asateththay gidikko Kirstoosa. 
Colossians2:18 Bessontta ashketeththinne kiitanchchatas goyno dosiza asi oonikka inttena dhuphidi mela ashshontta mala naagettite; hessa mala asi ba be7ida agumos wogay baynda bana nashshishe hada asho qofaan kumidi otorettees. 
Colossians2:19 Hessa mala asas hu7e gidida Kirstoosara aykko gaytoteththika deenna; kumeththa asateth shayaninne koldzen oyseththi dichchiza hu7ey Kirstoosa; Xoossi Kirstoosa asateth kumeth dichchizay hessa malanna. 
Colossians2:20 Hayssa ha alameza wogaas intte Kirstoosara hayqqidayta gidikko histtiin ha7i aazas he wogaas haaretteetii? 
Colossians2:21 He wogati oykkofa, laacca beyoppa; bochchofa gizayta." 
Colossians2:22 Hayti wuri asa azazoninne asa timirten wodhdhida wogata gidida gishshas oosettidaappe guye coo dhayanaas deettes. 
Colossians2:23 Ha azazoti barkka baappe medhdhi ekkida goyno qofay coo bessontta ashketeththinne ba asateth naaqqi oyththan isttas tumu aadho erateththi dizayta misateettes; gido attiin asho amoteth shiishshi oykkiza wolqqay isttas baa. 
Colossians3:1 Histtiko intte Kirstoosara issife dendidayta gidikko Kirstoosi Xoossa achchan uttidasohon puden diza hanoteththaa koyite. 
Colossians3:2 Intte qofay pude bollan diza miishsha bolla gido attiin ha biittaa yo7o bolla gidoppo. 
Colossians3:3 Gaasoykka intte hayqqidetanne intte de7oykka Kirstoosara Xoossa achchan qotettides. 
Colossians3:4 Inttes de7o gidida Kirstoosi qoncciza gallas intteka he wode izara issife bonchchora qonccana. 
Colossians3:5 Hessa gishshas inttes biitta bolla diza amoteth diggite; heytikka layma, tunateth, asho amo, iita amoteththinne eeqas goyno mala gidida gaphigapho." 
Colossians3:6 Heytantta gaason Xoossa hanqoy Xoossas azazettonttayta bolla yaana. 
Colossians3:7 Intteka kase diza duussaan he miishshata ooththideta. 
Colossians3:8 Ha7i gidikko hanqo, yiillo, cashshe, zigirsinne yeellasiza haasaya heytantta misatizayta ubbaa diggite." 
Colossians3:9 Kase ceega asateth iza oosora gaththi inttefe qaari yeggida gishshas intte intte garsan issoy issaara wordo haasayopite. 
Colossians3:10 Bana medhdhidayssa misatana mala eran ooraxida ooraththa asateth may7ideta. 
Colossians3:11 Heen Girike as gidiin woykko Ayhuda as woykko qaxxarettidayta woykko qaxxarettonttayta woykko tamaardaytanne tamaaronttayta woykko maarettonttayta woykko aylle woykko goqa geetettiza dummateththi deenna; Kirstoosi heytantta ubbaassa; qasse ubbaankka dees. 
Colossians3:12 Hessa gishshas dumma gididi dosettidaytoo! Intte Xoossas doorettidayta gidida mala misheteththinne kiyateth, ashketeth, bonchchonne dandaya may7ite." 
Colossians3:13 Intte issoy issaa dandayte; inttefe issaadey issaade bolla mishettiko yo7oykka iza bolla diikko issoy issaas atto atto geetettite; Godaykka inttes atto gida mala intteka hara asas atto giite. 
Colossians3:14 Hessa ubbaa bolla ubbaa kumeththa issifeteththan shiishshi qachchiza siiqo may7ite. 
Colossians3:15 Intte wurikka issi asho gididi saroteththas xeygettida Kirstoosa saroteththi intte wozinan kawoto; intte galatizayta gidite. 
Colossians3:16 Kirstoosa qaalay inttenan kumeth gido; intte intte garsan aadho erateththan tamaartenne zorettite; mazamureninne saban Ayana yeththan galatara gaththi intte wozinara Xoossas yexxite. 
Colossians3:17 Iza baggara Xoossaa Aawaas galata shiishshishe qaalan gidiin woykko ooson intte ooththizayssa ubbaa Godaa Yesusa sunththan ooththite. 
Colossians3:18 Machchetoo! Godaa achchan inttes bessiza miish gidida gishshas intte azinatas azazettite. 
Colossians3:19 Azinatoo! Intte intte machcheta siiqitenne isttas menxe iitopite. 
Colossians3:20 Naytoo! Intte Godaa ufayssana mala intte inttena yelidaytas ubba miishshan azazettite. 
Colossians3:21 Aawatoo! Nayti hidota qanxxontta mala intte nayta hanqeththofte. 
Colossians3:22 Aylletoo! As ufayssanaassinne coo ayfeson beettanaas gidontta suure wozinappe intte Godaas babbite; hayssa ha biittan haariza godataska hano ubbaan azazettite. 
Colossians3:23 Intte ooththiza miish ubbaa asas gidontta Godaas ooththiza mala taybidi kumeththa wozinappe ooththite. 
Colossians3:24 Intte Godaa achchafe intte ooso mala ekkanaas laatay dizayssa intte ereeta; intte ooththizay Godaa Yesus Kirstoosassa. 
Colossians3:25 Qoho ooththidaadey ba ooththidaari kushe ekkana; iza achchan dumma maadoy deenna. 
Colossians4:1 Godatoo! Inttes salon Goday dizayssa intte eriza gishshas inttes ooththizaytas tumaninne suureteththan ooththite. 
Colossians4:2 Beeggidi galatara gaththi pacey baynda Xoossaa woossite. 
Colossians4:3 Ta iza gishshas qashettida Kirstoosa xuuraa awajjanaas dandayana mala Xoossi nuus qaala yootanaas oge doyana mala nu gishshassika woossite. 
Colossians4:4 Qasseka haasayanaas bessiza qaala qonccen ta haasayana mala taas woossite. 
Colossians4:5 Ammanontta asatara inttes diza hanoteththan aadho erateththan simerettite; inttes beettida lo7o qaadan go7ettite. 
Colossians4:6 Issoy issaas intte zaaro wostti immanaakko intte erana mala intte haasayay maxinera kaxxida kaththa mala mal7o gido. 
Colossians4:7 Tiqiqoosi ta duussaa gishshas wursi inttes yootana; izi daro dosettida ishanne Godaas tanara issife ooththiza ammanettida oosanchcha. 
Colossians4:8 Nu duussaa gishshas intte erana malanne intte wozina minththana mala tani iza intteko kiittadis. 
Colossians4:9 Izi intte bagga gididi ammanettidaadenne dosettidaade gidida nu ishaa Anasmoosara intteko yaana; isttika haan diza hanoza ubbaa inttes yootana. 
Colossians4:10 Barnabaasa aawaa michchey naa Marqoosinne tanara issife qashettida Arxirokoosi inttena saro geettes. Marqoosa gishshas intte ay ooththanaakko kase inttena ta qofsa woththida mala izi intteko gakkishin iza mokki ekkite. 
Colossians4:11 Iyosxoosa geetettiza Iyaasoykka inttena saro gees; Ayhuda asaa giddofe Xoossa Kawoteththas tanara ooththizayti haytantta xalla; istti tana minththeththida. 
Colossians4:12 Intte baggafe gidida Yesus Kirstoosa oosanchcha Ephafiray inttena saro gees; izikka inttena Ayana duussan lo7eththi minnidi mulera woppu giidi Xoossa shenen minni eqqana mala ubba wode intte gishshas woosan baaxetees. 
Colossians4:13 Qasseka intte gishshas hessaththoka Lodoqiyaninne Iyarpolise kataman dizaytas izi pacey baynda ooththizayssa ta iza gishshas markkattays. 
Colossians4:14 Daro dosettida aakime Luqaasinne Deemaasi inttena saro geettes. 
Colossians4:15 Lodoqiyan diza nu ishatas, Nimpusinne izi keeththan shiiqiza ammaniza asatas ta sarokaa yootite." 
Colossians4:16 Hanna ta kiitaya inttes nababettida mala qasseka Lodoqiyan diza Woosa Keeththayn nababettana mala ooththite; intteka qasse Lodoqiyappe inttes kiitettida kiitaa nababite. 
Colossians4:17 Arikiphaases, «Neni Godaappe ekkida oosoza wurseth gaththanaas minna» giite." 
Colossians4:18 Hayssa sarokaa tani Phawuloosi ta kushera xaafadis; ta qashetta dizayssa dogopite; Xoossa kiyateththi inttenara gido. 
1Thessalonians1:1 Phawuloosappe, Silwaanoosappenne Ximtoosappe; Xoossaa Aawassinne Godaa Yesus Kirstoosayta gidida Tasolonqen diza ammaniza asaas nu Aawaa Xoossaafenne Godaa Yesus Kirstoosa kiyateththinne saroteththi inttes gido." 
1Thessalonians1:2 Nu inttena nu woosan qoppishe ubba wode Xoossaa intte gishshas galatoos. 
1Thessalonians1:3 Ammanoninne mino siiqoteththan intte ooththida ooso gishshas Godaa Yesus Kirstoosa bolla diza intte mino hidotan beettida intte minoteththaa gishshas nu Godaa Xoossaa, nu Aawaa sinththan ubba gallas intte gishshas qoppoos." 
1Thessalonians1:4 Xoossan dosettida nu ishatoo! Izi inttena dooridayssa nu eroos. 
1Thessalonians1:5 Gaasoykka Mishiraachcho qaalay intteko yiday wolqqara Xillo Ayananinne lo7eththi shaakki eriin attiin coo qaala xallan gidenna; qasseka nu intte gishshas giidi waani de7idaakko intte ereeta. 
1Thessalonians1:6 Ha7i intte nunanne Godaa misatideta; intte bolla ay metoy gakkidaa gidikkoka Xillo Ayana ufayssan qaalaa intte ekkideta. 
1Thessalonians1:7 Hessafe dendidayssan intte Maqidooniyaninne Akayan ammaniza asa ubbaas lo7o leemisota gidideta. 
1Thessalonians1:8 Godaa qaalay inttefe kezidi Maqidooniyaninne Akayan siyeteth xalla gidontta inttes Xoossa bolla diza ammanoy ubbason erettides; hessa gishshas nu inttes yootanaas aykkoka koshshenna. 
1Thessalonians1:9 Intte nuna wostti mokki ekkidaakkonne de7on diza tumu Xoossaas ooththanaas intte eeqatappe Xoossaako waani simmidaakko asay intte gishshas haasayees. 
1Thessalonians1:10 Qasseka Xoossi hayqoppe denththidayssa buro yaana hanqofe nuna ashshana Saloppe yaana Xoossa Naa Yesusa yuussaa intte wostti naagizaakko asay haasayees. 
1Thessalonians2:1 Nu ishatoo! Nu inttekon gam7ida gam7oy hada gidonttayssa intteka ereeta. 
1Thessalonians2:2 Intteka erizayssa mala hayssafe kase Piliphisiyoosen nu waayenne meto be7idossinne cayettidos; gido attiin aynne mino waayey nuna gakkikokka Xoossa Mishiraachcho qaalaa inttes yootanaas nu Godaappe xalateth demmidos. 
1Thessalonians2:3 Nu inttena zorida zorey iita qofara woykko inttena baleththanaas koyidi gidenna. 
1Thessalonians2:4 Gido attiin nu Mishiraachcho qaalaa hadara ekkanaas dandayza asata mala Xoossi nuna qoodida gishshas nu haasayoos; hessaka nu ooththizay nu wozina paacci eriza Xoossaa ufayssanaas attiin as ufayssanaas giidi gidenna. 
1Thessalonians2:5 Nu mulekka baleththo qaala yootibeekko woykko nu uuzeteth kammanaas giidi baleththo hano nu hanonttayssa intte ereeta; hayssaska nu markkay Xoossa. 
1Thessalonians2:6 Inttefe gidiin woykko haratappe oonappeka asappe imettiza bonchcho nu koyibeekko. 
1Thessalonians2:7 Nu Kirstoosi kiittidayta gidida gishshas inttes tooho gidanaas dandayoos; gido attiin aaya ba nayta dichchiza mala nunikka intte giddon ashketeththan simerettidos. 
1Thessalonians2:8 Xoossa qaala xalla gidontta dishin nu shemppoka intte gishshas ufayssan immana gakkanaas inttena siiqidos; gaasoykka nu inttena daro siiqida gishshassa. 
1Thessalonians2:9 Nu ishatoo! Nu dafeteththaanne nu daaburaa intte ereeta; oonaska tooho gidontta mala qammanne gallas nuus ooththishe Mishiraachcho qaalaa inttes yootidos. 
1Thessalonians2:10 Nu inttenara ammanizaytara diza wode xilloteththaninne geeshshateththan qasseka wosoy baynda nu waani de7idaakko intteka Xoossika nuus markka. 
1Thessalonians2:11 Aaway ba naytas haniza mala nunikka inttes issaas issaas ay hanidaakko intte ereeta. 
1Thessalonians2:12 Intte inttena ba kawoteththassinne ba bonchchos xeygida Xoossaas bessiza mala intte daana mala nu inttena minththidos; lo7eththi zoridossinne hadara gidos. 
1Thessalonians2:13 Intte nuuppe siyida Xoossa qaalaa ekkida wode ammaniza intte achchan tumu ooththiza Xoossa qaalaa mala ekkideta attiin coo asa qaala mala intte ekkontta aggida gishshas nuni Xoossaa qanxxoy baynda galatoos. 
1Thessalonians2:14 Nu ishatoo! Yuhuda biittan Yesus Kirstoosa ammaniza Xoossa Woosa Keeththata misatideta; istti Ayhudatappe metonne waaye ekkida mala intteka intte asaappe waaye ekkideta. 
1Thessalonians2:15 Istti Godaa Yesusanne kase nabetakka wodhida; nunakka gooddida; Xoossaaka ufayssibeettenna; as ubbaara eqettizayta gidida. 
1Thessalonians2:16 Hessika Ayzaabeti siyidi attana qaala nu isttas yootontta mala digganaassa; hessa mala ooson ba nagara ubba wode ba bolla wurseth gakkanaas gujji gujji beettes; Xoossa hanqoyka istta bolla wodhdhides. 
1Thessalonians2:17 Gidikkoka nu ishatoo! Nu guuththa wodes inttefe Ayanan gidontta ashon shaakettikokka intte laamotay nuna wodhiza gishshas intte ayfeso beyanaas daro dafeteththan doos. 
1Thessalonians2:18 Nu intteko baanaas daro laamotidos shin harappeka ta Phawuloosi daro wode dafettadis shin Xala7ey nuna diggides. 
1Thessalonians2:19 Godaa Yesusi haa yiza wode iza sinththan nu hidotay woykko nu ufayssi woykko nu zawudey nuus inttefe haray oonee? 
1Thessalonians2:20 Tumappeka nu ufayssinne nu bonchchoy inttena. 
1Thessalonians3:1 Hessa gishshas nuus dandayettontta ixxiin he wode Ateenan nurkka nu attanayssi nuus lo7o gidi beettides. 
1Thessalonians3:2 Inttena ammanon minththana mala nunara asas Kirstoosa mishiraachcho qaalaa yootiza Xoossa ashkara gidida Ximtoosa intteko yeddidos. 
1Thessalonians3:3 Hessika hayssa paacezan oonikka ammanoppe qanxxontta malassa; nunikka hayssas doorettidayssa intteka ereeta. 
1Thessalonians3:4 Nu qasse inttenara diza wode waayey nu bolla gakkanayssa kasetidi inttes yootidos; intte eriza malakka hanides. 
1Thessalonians3:5 Hessa gishshas ta aykkoka genceciin taas dandayettontta ixxida gishshas intte ammano gishshas eranaas gaada Ximtoosa kiittadis; ta hessa ooththiday oonee erizay paaccizaadey istta paacciin hanni wode nu daaburay wurikka hada gidontta aggenna gaada babbida gishshassa. 
1Thessalonians3:6 Ha7i qasse Ximtoosi intte achchafe nuukko yiidi intte ammano gishshassinne intte siiqoteththaa gishshas lo7o wore nuna sissides. Qasseka intte ubba wode nuna lo7eththi qoppizayssanne nunikka inttena beyanaas laamotiza mala intteka nuna beyanaas laamotizayssa nuus yootides. 
1Thessalonians3:7 Hessa gishshas nu ishatoo! Nu dizay waayeninne meto garsan gidikkoka intte ammano gaason inttenan ha7i nu minettoos. 
1Thessalonians3:8 Intte Godaan minni eqqida gishshas tumappe ha7i nu paxa daana. 
1Thessalonians3:9 Intte gaason nu Xoossa sinththan nu demmida ubba ufayssaa gishshas Xoossa ay mala galatanaas dandayzonii? 
1Thessalonians3:10 Qasseka nu inttena beyanaassinne intte ammanoppe paccidayssa kunththanaas omarsinne gallas keehi woossoos. 
1Thessalonians3:11 Ha7ikka nu intteko baana mala nu Aaway Xoossi Godaa Yesus Kirstoosi ogeza izi nuus suuriso. 
1Thessalonians3:12 Nu inttena siiqiza mala inttes intte garsan diza siiqonne intte harata siiqiza siiqoza Goday darsonne keehi gujjo. 
1Thessalonians3:13 Nu Godaa Yesus Kirstoosi geeshshata ubbatara yiza wode nu Aawaa Godaa Xoossaa sinththan intte wosoy bayndaytanne geeshshata gididi beettana mala intte wozina izi minththo. 
1Thessalonians4:1 Ha7i wurseththan ta ishatoo! Intte Xoossa ufayssanaas intte waani waani daana bessizaakko nu inttena tamaarsidos; tumappeka nu tamaarsida mala deeta; hessa gishshas Godaa Yesus Kirstoosan nu inttena woossizaynne zorizay hayssafekka aadhdhiza hanora intte sinththe gujjana malassa. 
1Thessalonians4:2 Godaa Yesus Kirstoosa wolqqan nu inttes ay azazo immidaakko intte ereeta. 
1Thessalonians4:3 Xoossa sheney intte laymappe haakkidi dummatanaassa. 
1Thessalonians4:4 Qasse issi issi asay ba machcho geeshshateththaninne bonchchon ayso bessizayssa shaakki ero. 
1Thessalonians4:5 Hessika Xoos ammanontta Ayzaabeta mala layma qaaqqateththan gidoppo. 
1Thessalonians4:6 Hessa malan oonikka balettidi ba ishaa baleththofo; gaasoykka hayssafe kase nu inttes yootida malanne naagettanaas akeekissida mala Goday heytantta mala nagara ooththiza ubbata bolla ba hanqo ehana. 
1Thessalonians4:7 Xoossi nuna geeshshateththas xeygides attiin tunateththas xeygibeenna. 
1Thessalonians4:8 Hessa gishshas hayssa ha zoreza kadhidi ekkonttaadey Xillo Ayana izas immida Xoossaa kadhees attiin as kadhizaade gidenna. 
1Thessalonians4:9 Ishata siiqoteththa gishshas inttes oonikka xaafanaas koshshenna; gaasoykka intte intte giddon siiqettana mala intte intte baggara Xoossafe tamaardeta. 
1Thessalonians4:10 Kumeththa Maqidooniyan diza ammaniza asaa intte ubbaa siiqizayssi erettidayssa; gido attiin nu ishatoo! Sinththa baggan intte hayssafe aaththi siiqettana mala nu inttena zoroos. 
1Thessalonians4:11 Nu hayssafe kase inttena azazida mala intte intte kushera ooththite; woppu gi diite; inttes gidizayssa lo7eththi xeellite. 
1Thessalonians4:12 Hessika gallas gallas intte duussay hankko ammanontta asaa achchan inttena bonchchisana malanne intte ay asaska tooho gidontta malassa. 
1Thessalonians4:13 Ta ishatoo! Intte ashon hayqqidayta gishshas tumaa erana mala nu koyokko; qasseka hidotay baynda hara asata mala intte kayottana mala nu koyokko. 
1Thessalonians4:14 Yesusi hayqqidi dendidayssa nu ammanizaa gidikko Yesusa ammanidayta Xoossi Yesusara hessaththoka zaari haa yeddana. 
1Thessalonians4:15 Nu Godaa qaalan inttes gizay hayssa; nuni hayqqontta paxa dizaytinne Goday yaana gakkanaas gam7anayti kase hayqqidaytappe sinththatokko. 
1Thessalonians4:16 Goday ba hu7era gita azazon kiitanchchata halaqa giirissara Xoossa xurumba giirissan saloppe wodhdhana; kase Kirstoosa ammanidi hayqqidayti istti kaseti dendana. 
1Thessalonians4:17 Hessafe guye nuni qasse paxa dizayti Godaa carko bolla gaagganaas isttara issife shaarara dendana; hessaththoka nu mernaas Godaara daana. 
1Thessalonians4:18 Hessa gishshas ha qaalaan issoy issaara minettite. 
1Thessalonians5:1 Ta ishatoo! Hessi hanana wodeza gishshas nu inttes xaafanaas koshshenna. 
1Thessalonians5:2 Kaysoy qamman yiza mala Godaa gallassika hessa mala yaanayssa intte intte baggara lo7eththi ereeta. 
1Thessalonians5:3 Asay, «Gadey saronne lo7okko» gishin miixay qanththara diza maccas oykkiza mala hessaththoka as dhayssizay qoppontta dishin asa bolla gakkana; oonikka kessi ekkenna." 
1Thessalonians5:4 Intteno ishatoo! He gallassay kayso mala inttena daganththanaas intte dhuman deekketa. 
1Thessalonians5:5 Intte wurikka poo7o nayta; nuni dhuma woykko qamma baggata gidokko. 
1Thessalonians5:6 Histtiko ane beeggoos; ane nurkka nuna haaroos attiin hankko dhiskiza asaa mala nunikka ane dhiskokko. 
1Thessalonians5:7 Dhiskizayti qammara dhiskeettes; maththottizaytikka qammara maththotteettes. 
1Thessalonians5:8 Nuni gidikko gallassa asata gidida gishshas ammanonne siiqo, tiran may7iza xurure may7o mala may7idi atoteththa hidota hu7en woththiza birata qoobe mala hu7en woththidi ane nunateththaa haaridi de7oos." 
1Thessalonians5:9 Xoossi nu Godaa Yesus Kirstoosa baggara atoteth demmana mala attiin nuna hanqos xeygibeenna. 
1Thessalonians5:10 Nu hayqqikokka woykko paxa diikkoka izara daana mala izi nu gishshas hayqqides. 
1Thessalonians5:11 Hessa gishshas tumappe intte ha7i ooththizayssa malakka issoy issaara minettitenne minththeththite. 
1Thessalonians5:12 Histtiko ta ishatoo! Intte giddon minni ooththizayta Godaan inttefe bollara diza halaqatanne inttena zorizayta intte bonchchana mala nu inttena woossoos. 
1Thessalonians5:13 Istta ooso gishshassika istta siiqora lo7eththi bonchchite; intte intte giddon saron diite. 
1Thessalonians5:14 Ta ishatoo! Nu inttena, «Ooso ooththontta asata hanqettite; babbizayta minththite; daaburanchchata maaddite; as ubbaa dandayte» gi zoroos." 
1Thessalonians5:15 Oonaska iita gishshas iita zaarontta mala naagettite; gido attiin intte intte giddon gidiin hara asara gidiin ubba wode lo7o gidizayssa ooththanaas baaxetite. 
1Thessalonians5:16 Ubba wode ufayettite. 
1Thessalonians5:17 Qanxxontta woossite. 
1Thessalonians5:18 Ay hanonkka galatite; Xoossa sheney inttes Yesus Kirstoosa baggara hessa. 
1Thessalonians5:19 Xillo Ayana tama toyssofte. 
1Thessalonians5:20 Tinbite qaala kadhopite. 
1Thessalonians5:21 Wursika paacci xeellite; lo7o gididaaz oykkite. 
1Thessalonians5:22 Iita gidida ay miishshafekka haakkite. 
1Thessalonians5:23 Saroteththa Goday izi ubba miishshan inttena dummaso; intte ayanay, intte shemppoynne intte ashoy Godaa Yesus Kirstoosi yiza wode wosoy baynda naagetto." 
1Thessalonians5:24 Inttena xeygidayssi ammanettidaade gidida gishshas izi hessa ooththana. 
1Thessalonians5:25 Nu ishatoo! Nu gishshassika woossite. 
1Thessalonians5:26 Ammanizayta ubbaa geeshsha yeereteththan sarokkite. 
1Thessalonians5:27 Ha kiitay ammanizaytas ubbaas nababettana mala Godaa sunththan hadara gays. 
1Thessalonians5:28 Nu Godaa Yesus Kirstoosa aadho kiyateththi inttenara gido. 
2Thessalonians1:1 Phawuloosappe, Silwaanoosappenne Ximtoosappe; nu Aawaa Xoossaninne Godaa Yesus Kirstoosan gidida Tasolonqen ammaniza asaas," 
2Thessalonians1:2 Xoossaa Aawappenne Godaa Yesus Kirstoosappe kiyateththinne saroteththi inttes gido. 
2Thessalonians1:3 Ta ishatoo! Intte ammanoy wodeppe woden dicci dicci biza gishshassinne intte siiqoykka kaseppe gujetti gujetti biza gishshas nu intte gishshas Xoossa lo7eththi galatanaas bessees. 
2Thessalonians1:4 Hessa gishshas intte bolla gakkida goodeteththaninne meto ubbaan intte minnida gishshas nuni nu baggara intte dandayaa gishshassinne intte ammano gishshas ammaniza asa ubbaa achchan ceeqettoos. 
2Thessalonians1:5 Hessi wurikka Xoossa pirday suure gididayssa bessees; hessa gaason waaye be7iza intte Xoossa Kawoteththas bessizayta gidi beettideta. 
2Thessalonians1:6 Xoossi xillo gidida gishshas inttena waayisizayta izi waayisana. 
2Thessalonians1:7 Waaye ekkida inttessinne nuus shempo immana; hessika Godaa Yesus Kirstoosi wolqqama salo Xoossa kiitanchchatara salo bolla qoncciza wode hanana. 
2Thessalonians1:8 He wode Xoos erontta asatanne Godaa Yesus Kirstoosa Mishiraachcho qaalaas azazettontta asata bolla izi ba halo kessana. 
2Thessalonians1:9 Isttika Godaa sinththafenne iza bonchcho wolqqaa achchafe kichchidi mernaas dhayon qaxxayettana. 
2Thessalonians1:10 Istti qaxxayettanay izi geeshshata achchan bonchchettanaassinne ammanizayti wuri izan malalettana mala izi yiza gallassan hanana; intteka he ammaniza asaara daana; gaasoykka nu inttes markkattidayssa intte ammanida gishshassa. 
2Thessalonians1:11 Nu hessa qoppishe nu Xoossi inttena ba xeyssaas gidizayta histti qoodana mala intte lo7o ooththanaas amottiza amozanne ammanon intte ooththida oosoza ubbaa izi inttes ba wolqqan polana mala nu inttes ubba wode woossoos. 
2Thessalonians1:12 Qasseka nu Godaa Xoossaanne nu Godaa Yesus Kirstoosa kiyateththaa mala Yesus Kirstoosa sunththi intte achchan bonchchettana malanne intteka izan bonchchettana mala nu inttes woossoos. 
2Thessalonians2:1 Ta ishatoo! Godaa Yesus Kirstoosa yuussaa gishshassinne nu izakko baana buussaa gishshas nu inttena qofsoos. 
2Thessalonians2:2 Ayanay qonccisides woykko qaalay gees giidi woykko nuuppe inttes kiitettida kiitaa mala, «Godaa yuussaa gallassi gakkides» giidi intte qofan yark yarkoftenne dagammofte." 
2Thessalonians2:3 Oonikka ay hanonkka inttena baleththofo. Daro asay ammano kaddanaappe sinththe dhayanaas bessiza issi makkalla asi qonccontta dishin he gallassay gakkenna. 
2Thessalonians2:4 Izikka Xoos geetetti goynnettiza eeqa xoossata ubbaafe bollara bana dhoqqu dhoqqu histtizaadenne Xoossara eqettizaade; izikka Xoossa Keeththan uttidi bana, «Tani Xoossa» giidi awajja awajjisana." 
2Thessalonians2:5 Ta inttenara diza wode hayta ha yo7ota inttes ta yootidayssi inttes qofettizeesha? 
2Thessalonians2:6 Izi ba woden qonccana gakkanaas ha7i izi qonccontta mala aazi diggizaakko intte ereeta. 
2Thessalonians2:7 Makkallanchcha xuuray haray attoshin ha7ikka ooso bolla dees; gido attiin hayssi hananay izi ha7i ooththontta mala iza diggizaadey iza ogeppe kichchana gakkanaas xalla. 
2Thessalonians2:8 Hessafekka kaallidi Godaa Yesusi ba doona peenoninne ba bonchcho yuussaan dhayssana; makkallanchchay qonccana. 
2Thessalonians2:9 He makkallanchcha yuussi Xala7e wolqqan hessika as baleththiza malaatataninne malalisiza miishshatan hanana. 
2Thessalonians2:10 Hessaththoka ekki attontta mala tumaa ixxidi dhayza asata baleththanaas dumma dumma iita oosoy yaana. 
2Thessalonians2:11 Hessa gaason istti wordo yo7o ammanana mala Xoossi istta bolla bala ooso kiittana. 
2Thessalonians2:12 Hessi hananay tumaa ammanontta ixxidi wordo yo7on ufayettizayti wuri pirdettanaassa. 
2Thessalonians2:13 Godaan dosettida ta ishatoo! Nu gidikko ubba wode intte gishshas Xoos galatanaas nuus bessees; gaasoykka Xoossi inttena koyroppe oykkidi intte Xillo Ayanan dummatidaytanne tumu ammanidi intte attana mala inttena doorides. 
2Thessalonians2:14 Nu Godaa Yesus Kirstoosi bonchcho gishettizayta intte gidana mala nu yootida mishiraachcho qaalaa baggara inttena xeygides. 
2Thessalonians2:15 Hessa gishshas ta ishatoo! Intte minni eqqite; nuni nu doonan gidiin woykko kiitan woykko nu inttes aaththi yeddida timirteza lo7eththi oykkite. 
2Thessalonians2:16 Izi nu Godaa Yesus Kirstoosi qasse nuna siiqidaynne ba kiyateththan mernaa minththeththonne lo7o hidota izi nuus immida nu Aawaa Xoossay," 
2Thessalonians2:17 izi intte wozina lo7o oosoninne qaalan minththo. 
2Thessalonians3:1 Wurseththan ta ishatoo! Qasseka Godaa qaalay intte achchan hanoyssaththoka eleli ubbaso gakkana malanne bonchchettana mala nuus woossite. 
2Thessalonians3:2 Qasseka asi wuri ammanizayssa gidontta gishshas makkallanchchatappenne iita asatappe nu attana mala nuus woossite. 
2Thessalonians3:3 Goday gidikko ammanettidayssa; izikka inttena minththana; Xala7eppeka inttena naagana. 
2Thessalonians3:4 Nu inttena azazidayssa intte ha7i ooththideta shin sinththafekka intte ooththanayssa nuni Godaan ammanettoos. 
2Thessalonians3:5 Goday intte wozina Xoossa siiqookkonne Kirstoosa dandayaakko kaaleththo. 
2Thessalonians3:6 Ta ishatoo! Ooso ooththontta asaappenne intte nuuppe ekkida timirteza mala dontta ammanizaytappe intte haakkana mala Godaa Yesus Kirstoosa sunththan inttena nu azazoos. 
2Thessalonians3:7 Intte nu leemiso wostti kaallanaakko intte intte baggara ereeta; nu inttenara diza wode ooso ooththontta coo de7ibeekko. 
2Thessalonians3:8 Qasseka oona sooppeka kath coo mela mibeekko; qasse inttefe oonaska nu tooho gidontta mala qammanne gallas daaburan ooththi midos. 
2Thessalonians3:9 Nu hessa ooththiday intte nuna kaallana mala inttes lo7o leemiso gidana giidippe attiin nuus koshshizayssa inttefe ekkanayssa nuna diggiza wogay diin gidenna. 
2Thessalonians3:10 Nu inttenara diza wode, «Ooso ooththanaas dosontta asi kath mooppo» giza azazo inttes immidos." 
2Thessalonians3:11 Intte giddon issi issi asati ooso ooththonttayssa nu siyidos; heytantti ooso ooththontta mela asa yo7on geliza asata. 
2Thessalonians3:12 Heyta mala asati ba ooso co7u gi ooththana malanne ba kath maana mala Godaa Yesus Kirstoosa sunththan nu istta azazoossinne zoroos. 
2Thessalonians3:13 Intte gidikko ta ishatoo! Lo7o ooso ooththanaappe mulekka azallofte. 
2Thessalonians3:14 Hayssa nu kiittida qaalaas azazettonttay oonikka diikko hessa misatizaade lo7eththi kaallitenne izi ba ooson yeellatana mala izara gaaggofte. 
2Thessalonians3:15 Gido attiin iza intte isha mala hanqite attiin morkke mala xeellofte. 
2Thessalonians3:16 Saroteththaa Goday izi ba baggara yo7o ubbaan inttes saroteth immo; Goday inttenara ubbaara gido. 
2Thessalonians3:17 Hayssa sarokaa tani ta kushera inttes xaafiday tana Phawuloosa. Ta kiitaas dumma malatay hayssa; izikka hayssa tani ta kushen xaafoyssa. 
2Thessalonians3:18 Nu Godaa Yesus Kirstoosa aadho kiyateththi inttenara ubbaara gido. 
1Timothy1:1 Nuna ashshida Xoossaan, nuus hidota gidida Yesus Kirstoosa azazon Hawaare gidida Phawuloosappe" 
1Timothy1:2 Ammanon taas tumu naa gidida Ximtoosas Xoossaa nu Aawappe nu Godaa Yesus Kirstoosappe kiyateththi, maaroteththinne saroy nees gido." 
1Timothy1:3 Tani Maqidooniya bashe nena hadara gida mala hayssafe sinththan issi issi asati wordo timirte tamaarsontta mala ne azazanaas Efesoonen daashsha. 
1Timothy1:4 Qasseka asay yootiin wurontta beni wode haysi7en ba wode wursontta mala azaza; heyta mala yo7oy palama denththeththees attiin ammanon oosettiza Xoossa oosos aykkoka go7enna. 
1Timothy1:5 Ha azazozas waanna ayfe yo7oy gidikko geeshsha wozinappe lo7o qofara hessaththoka tumu ammanoppe beettiza siiqo. 
1Timothy1:6 Issi issi asay haytappe pooqqi eqqidi go7ay baynda yo7otakko simmides. 
1Timothy1:7 Wogaa tamaarsizayta gidana mala koyeettes; gidikkoka istti ba yootizayssa woykko keehi mootettiza yo7oza lo7eththi erettenna. 
1Timothy1:8 Gido attiin asi maaran go7ettizaakko wogay lo7o gididayssa nu eroos. 
1Timothy1:9 Qasseka wogay imettiday xillo asas gidontta wogaa yedhdhi aadhdhizaytas, azazettonttaytas, Xoossas babbonttaytas, nagaranchchatas, geeshshateththi bayndaytas, Xoos leqqizaytas, ba aayonne ba aawaa wodhizaytassinne shemppo wodhizaytas gididayssa nu eroos." 
1Timothy1:10 Hessaththoka laymatizaytas, addera aqiza addetas, as bayzizaytassinne shammizaytas, wordanchchatas, asas wordora caaqqizaytas, lo7o timirtera eqettiza ubbatassa." 
1Timothy1:11 He lo7o timirtey anjjettida Xoossi taas hadara immida bonchcho mishiraachcho qaalara gaaggizayssa. 
1Timothy1:12 Tana ba oosos shuumidinne ammanettizaade histti ekkidinne taas minoteth immida nu Godaa Yesus Kirstoosa ta galatays. 
1Timothy1:13 Hayssafe kase ta ay mala as cayizaadenne goodeththizaade, qasse makkalla as gidikkoka hessa ta eronttanne ammanontta dashe ooththida gishshas Xoossi tana maarides." 
1Timothy1:14 Yesus Kirstoosappe gidida ammanoranne siiqora nu Godaa kiyateththi taas keehi darides. 
1Timothy1:15 Yesus Kirstoosi nagaranchchata ashshanaas duge hayssa ha alame yides giza qaalay tumanne asi wurikka ekkanaas bessizayssa. Nagaranchchatappeka aadhdhiza nagaranchchay tana. 
1Timothy1:16 Gido attiin ta maarettidaykka Yesus Kirstoosi zaway baynda ba dandayaa, ubbaafe aadhdhida nagaranchcha gidida ta bolla bessiday izan ammananaytassinne mernaa de7o demmanaytas leemiso gidana malassa." 
1Timothy1:17 Hessa gishshas mernaas hayqqi erontta, ayfen beetti erontta barkka xalla Xoos gidida kawos mernaappe mernaa gakkanaas izas bonchchoynne galatay gido. Amiin." 
1Timothy1:18 Ta naa Ximtoosaa! Ne gishshas kasetidi yootettida mala hayssa azazoza ta nees immadis; hessika ne he qaalaa kaallashe lo7o baaxe baaxetanaassa. 
1Timothy1:19 Ammanoynne lo7o qofay nees de7o; issi issi asati ba lo7o qofaa yedhdhi aadhdhidi abba bolla metoy iza bolla gakkiin waayettiza markabe mala ba ammano dhayssida. 
1Timothy1:20 Istta giddon Xoossa cash aggidi taamarana mala tani Xala7es aaththa immidayti Hemenewoosinne Iskindiroosi deettes. 
1Timothy2:1 Hessa gishshas ubbaafe koyro hara asas shoobeththa woosa, gaannateththa woosanne galata woosa asa ubbaas kawotassinne dere ayssizaytas ubbaas woossana mala ta nena qofsays." 
1Timothy2:2 Hessika Tumu Ayana duussaninne geeshshateth ubbaan nuni saroteththaninne wogan daana malassa. 
1Timothy2:3 Hayssi nuna ashshiza Xoossaa achchan lo7onne ufayssizaaza. 
1Timothy2:4 Izi asi wuri attana malanne tumaa erana mala koyees. 
1Timothy2:5 Issi Xoossi xalla dees; qasseka Xoossassinne asas giddon issi giigsiza gaannay dees; izikka as gidida Yesus Kirstoosa. 
1Timothy2:6 Izi bana asa ubbaas aaththi immides; hessika heerakka wodey aadhdhontta izas markkattides. 
1Timothy2:7 Tanikka hayssas mishiraachcho qaala yootanaas kiitettidaade; qasseka deretas tumu ammano astamaare gidada shuumettadis; hessaka ta wordotontta tumu yootanaassa. 
1Timothy2:8 Hessa gishshas attuma asay ubbason hanqoy bayndanne palamay baynda ba geeshsha kusheta pude dhoqqu histtidi woossana mala ta koyays. 
1Timothy2:9 Hessaththoka maccassati bonchchora bana shiishshi ekkidi bessiza may7o may7etto attiin ba hu7e daddi ekkidi woykko al7o may7o, worqqanne inqqu aaththidi walqqi walqqi gooppetto." 
1Timothy2:10 Gido attiin Xoos woossoos giza maccassati isttas ooththana bessiza lo7o ooson lo7etto. 
1Timothy2:11 Maccassi co7u gaada kumeththara azazeteth tamaaru. 
1Timothy2:12 Maccassi co7u gaanaappe attiin iza tamaarsana mala woykko adde bolla godatana mala ta koykke. 
1Timothy2:13 Gaasoykka koyro Addaamey medhettides; kaallada Hewaana medhettadus. 
1Timothy2:14 Qasseka koyro balettiday Addaame gidenna; balettada Xoossa wogaappe aadhdhiday maccassayo. 
1Timothy2:15 Gidikkoka maccassi ammanoninne siiqon geeshshateththan barkka bana haaron minniko naa yelon attana. 
1Timothy3:1 «Oonikka Woosa Keeththa cima gidana koykko lo7o ooso amottees» giza qaalay tuma. 
1Timothy3:2 Hessa gidikko Woosa Keeththe kaaleththizaadey borey bayndaade, issi machcha diza adde, ginara dizaade, bana haarizaade, wogara aqizaade, imath mokkizaade, tamaarsanaas dandayzaade," 
1Timothy3:3 maththottonttaade, oosh ooyettonttaade, qasse maarage as, asara palamettonttaade, miish gooddonttaade gidanaas bessees." 
1Timothy3:4 Ba nayta azazettizaytanne as bonchchizayta histti dichchidi ba keeththa asaa wogara ayssizaade gidanaas bessees. 
1Timothy3:5 Issaadey ba keeththa asaa wogara ayso erontta aggiko Xoossa Woosa Keeththe wostti naagana dandayzee? 
1Timothy3:6 Otoreteththan puuridi Xala7ey kundida pirdan izi kundontta mala oorath ammanizaade gidoppo. 
1Timothy3:7 Qasseka iza sunththan boretontta malanne Xala7e narxan izi gelontta mala ammanontta asaa achchan lo7o markkateththi daanaas koshshees. 
1Timothy3:8 Daaqonetikka hessaththo bonchchettidaytanne ba gida qaalaa laammi laammi yeggonttayta, daro woyne ushshas amottonttayta, ogey baynda go7a gooddonttayta gidanaas bessees." 
1Timothy3:9 Ammano xuura, lo7o qofara naaganaas bessees." 
1Timothy3:10 Haytantika koyrotti paacettetto; issi iitay istta bolla beettontta aggiko hessafe guye daaqoneteththan ooththetto. 
1Timothy3:11 Macca daaqonetikka bonchchettidayta, zigironttayta, qasse wogara dizayta, hano ubbaan ammanettidayta gidanaas bessees." 
1Timothy3:12 Daaqoneti issi machchi azina gidanaas bessees; qasseka ba naytanne ba keeththa asaa wogara ayssizayta gidanaas bessees. 
1Timothy3:13 Wogara ooththidayti baas gita bonchchonne Yesus Kirstoosan isttas diza ammanon daro xalateth demmana. 
1Timothy3:14 Ta neekko elle baana koykkoka hayta azazota nees xaafays. 
1Timothy3:15 Ta hanno nees xaafizay ta gam7izaa gidikkoka asay Xoossa Keeththan waani daanaakko ne erana mala gaadakko! Keeththay de7o Xoossaa Woosa Keeththa; hessika tumu tuussinne xapho. 
1Timothy3:16 Tumu Ayana duussa xuuray sidhey baynda gita; izikka, «Ase gidides; iza Xilloteththi Xillo Ayanan qonccides; kiitanchchatas beettides; dere ubbaas sabbakettides; alamen dizaytan ammanettides; bonchchora pude dendi bides» gizayssa." 
1Timothy4:1 Wode wurseththa bolla issi issi asay ammano aggidi baleththiza ayanatanne iita ayana timirte kaallanayssa Xillo Ayanay qonccera yootees. 
1Timothy4:2 Hessa mala timirtey istta qofay bonqo biratan xuugettida mala geellateththan doccida qoodheppe qommon haniza wordanchcha asatappe yaana. 
1Timothy4:3 He asati asay ekkontta malanne gelontta mala diggana; ammanizaytinne tumaa shaakki eriza asay Xoossi medhdhida kath galatarakka ekkizayti montta mala diggananne azazana. 
1Timothy4:4 Xoossi medhdhiday wurikka lo7o; asi galatara ekkiko wora wodhdhizay issinakka deenna. 
1Timothy4:5 Wurikka Xoossa qaalaninne woosan geeyana. 
1Timothy4:6 Hayssa ha azazoza ammaniza asaa ne qofsikko, ammano qaalaninne ne ekkida lo7o timirtezan minnada Yesus Kirstoosas lo7o oosanchcha gidandasa." 
1Timothy4:7 Xoos bonchchisontta go7ay baynda haysi7eppenne cima maccassata haysi7eppe haakkada tuma ayana oosos ne asateth giigsa. 
1Timothy4:8 Asateththaa asho ogen dosisoy guuththa wodes go7ees shin Tumu Ayana duussas bana tamaarsoy gidikko hayssa ha alamezassinne buro yaana duussaas hidotay diza gishshas ubbaas go7ees. 
1Timothy4:9 Hayssi ha qaalay ammanettidayssanne ubbay ekkanaas bessiza qaala. 
1Timothy4:10 Nu hessas giidi dafettoossinne daaburoos; hessika asa ubbaas harappeka ammanizaytas ashshiza de7o Xoossaan nu hidota ooththiza gishshassa. 
1Timothy4:11 Hayta yo7ota azazanne tamaarsa. 
1Timothy4:12 Ne yelagateththaa oonikka leqqofo; gido attiin neni haasayan, duussan, siiqon, ammanoninne geeshshateththan ammanizaytas lo7o leemiso gida." 
1Timothy4:13 Ta hee baana gakkanaas qaalaa nababanaas, zoranaassinne tamaarsanaas minna." 
1Timothy4:14 Cimati ne bolla ba kushe woththi woossishin, nees imettida tinbite imoteththaa leppi histta aggofa." 
1Timothy4:15 Asi wuri ne dichchaa beyana mala ha yo7ota lo7eththa minththada dandayan pola. 
1Timothy4:16 Ne duussaa gishshassinne ne tamaarsiza timirtezas naagetta; haytan minna; ne hessa ooththiko nenanne ne gizayssa siyizayta ashshana. 
1Timothy5:1 Cima asaa ne Aawaa mala bonchchora zora attiin dom7ofa; naateththa attuma nayta ne ishata mala xeella. 
1Timothy5:2 Hessaththoka cima maccassata ne aayi mala, naateththa maccassata qasse ne michcheta mala suure wozinappe xeella." 
1Timothy5:3 Addafe metotettida am7eta lo7eththa naaga. 
1Timothy5:4 Issi am7eys nay woykko naa nay dizaa gidikko he nayti baso asata maaddanaassinne bana yelidaytas kase istti ooththidayssa kushe zaaron harappe kasetidi ba ammano ooson bessanaassinne tamaaranaas bessees; hessika Xoos ufayssizayssa. 
1Timothy5:5 Qasse tumappe maadoy baynda barkka diza am7eya Xoos xalla xeellawus; woosassinne Xoossafe maado demmanaas gallassinne qamma minettawus.
